1:7.text: Ṣi-raa-ṭal- la-ẓee-na ʹan-ʻam-ta ʻa-lay-him G̣ay-ril- mag̣-ḍoo-bi ʻa-lay-him wa-laḍ- ḍaaal-leen.

2:2.text: Ẓaa-li-kal- Ki-taa-bu laa - ray-ba- feeh. Hu-dal- lil-Mut-ta-q̣een;

2:3.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na yuʹ-mi-noo-na bil-G̣ay-bi wa-yu-q̣ee-moo-naṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta wa-mim-maa ra-zaq̣-naa-hum yuñ-fi-q̣oon;

2:4.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na yuʹ-mi-noo-na bi-maaa ʹuñ-zi-la ʹi-lay-ka wa-maaa ʹuñ-zi-la miñ- q̣ab-lik, wa-bil-ʹAa-khi-ra-ti hum yoo-q̣i-noon.

2:5.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka ʻa-laa Hu-dam- mir- Rab-bi-him, wa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- Muf-li-ḥoon.

2:6.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na Ka-fa-roo sa-waaa-ʹun ʻa-lay-him ʹa-ʹañ-ẓar-ta-hum ʹam lam tuñ-ẓir-hum laa  yuʹ-mi-noon.

2:7.text: Kha-ta-mal- laa-hu ʻa-laa q̣u-loo-bi-him wa-ʻa-laa sam-ʻi-him, wa-ʻa-laaa ʹab-ṣaa-ri-him g̣i-shaa-wah; wa-la-hum ʻa-ẓaa-bun ʻa-z̤̣eem.

2:8.text: Wa-mi-nan- naa-si mañy- ya-q̣oo-lu ʹaa-man-naa bil-laa-hi wa-bil-Yaw-mil- ʹAa-khi-ri wa-maa - hum̃- bi-muʹ-mi-neen.

2:9.text: Yu-khaa-di-ʻoo-nal- laa-ha wal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo: wa-maa Yakh-da-ʻoo-na ʹil-laaa ʹañ-fu-sa-hum wa-maa yash-ʻu-roon.

2:10.text: Fee q̣u-loo-bi-him- ma-ra-ḍuñ fa-zaa-da-hu-mul- laa-hu Ma-ra-ḍaa. Wa-la-hum ʻa-ẓaa-bun ʹa-lee-mum̃- bi-maa Kaa-noo Yak-ẓi-boon.

2:11.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa q̣ee-la la-hum laa- tuf-si-doo fil- ʹar-ḍi q̣aa-looo ʹin-na-maa naḥ-nu muṣ-li-ḥoon.

2:12.text: ʹA-laaa ʹin-na-hum hu-mul- muf-si-doo-na wa-laa-kil- laa yash-ʻu-roon.

2:13.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa q̣ee-la la-hum ʹaa-mi-noo ka-maaa ʹaa-ma-nan- naa-su q̣aa-looo ʹa-nuʹ-mi-nu ka-maaa ʹaa-ma-nas- su-fa-haaaʹ? ʹA-laaa ʹin-na-hum hu-mus- su-fa-haaa-ʹu wa-laa-kil- laa yaʻ-la-moon.

2:14.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa la-q̣ul- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo q̣aa-looo ʹaa-man-naa, wa-ʹi-ẓaa Kha-law ʹi-laa Sha-yaa-ṭee-ni-him q̣aa-looo ʹin-naa ma-ʻa-kum ʹin-na-maa naḥ-nu mus-tah-zi-ʹoon.

2:15.text: ʹAl-laa-hu yas-tah-zi-ʹu bi-him wa-ya-mud-du-hum fee ṭug̣-yaa-ni-him yaʻ-ma-hoon.

2:16.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-kal- la-ẓee-nash- ta-ra-wuḍ- ḍa-laa-la-ta bil-hu-daa: fa-maa Ra-bi-ḥat- ti-jaa-ra-tu-hum wa-maa Kaa-noo Muh-ta-deen.

2:17.text: Ma-s̤a-lu-hum Ka-ma-s̤a-lil- la-ẓis- taw-q̣a-da Naa-raa; fa-lam-maaa ʹa-ḍaaa-ʹat maa- ḥaw-la-hoo ẓa-ha-bal- laa-hu bi-noo-ri-him wa-ta-ra-ka-hum fee z̤̣u-lu-maa-til- laa Yub-ṣi-roon.

2:18.text: Ṣum-mum- buk-mun ʻum-yuñ fa-hum laa- yar-ji-ʻoon.

2:19.text: ʹAw ka-ṣay-yi-bim- mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi fee-hi z̤̣u-lu-maa-tuñw- wa-raʻ-duñw- wa-barq̣: yaj-ʻa-loo-na ʹa-ṣaa-bi-ʻa-hum feee ʹaa-ẓaa-ni-him mi-naṣ- ṣa-waa-ʻi-q̣i ḥa-ẓa-ral- mawt. Wal-laa-ḥu Mu-ḥee-ṭum- bil-kaa-fi-reen.

2:20.text: Ya-kaa-dul- bar-q̣u yakh-ṭa-fu ʹab-ṣaa-ra-hum: kul-la-maaa ʹa-ḍaaa-ʹa la-hum- ma-shaw fee-hi wa-ʹi-ẓaaa ʹaz̤̣-la-ma ʻa-lay-him q̣aa-moo. Wa-law shaaa-ʹal- laa-hu la-ẓa-ha-ba bi-sam-ʻi-him wa-ʹab-ṣaa-ri-him; ʹin-nal- laa-ha ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Q̣a-deer.

2:21.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-han- naa-suʻ- bu-doo. Rab-ba-ku-mul- la-ẓee kha-la-q̣a-kum wal-la-zee-na miñ- q̣ab-li-kum la-ʻal-la-kum tat-ta-q̣oon.

2:22.text: Al-la-ẓee ja-ʻa-la la-ku-mul- ʹar-ḍa fi-raa-shañw- was-sa-maaa-ʹa bi-naaa-ʹaa: wa-ʹañ-za-la mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi maaa-añ- fa-ʹakh-ra-ja bi-hee mi-nas̤- s̤a-ma-raa-ti riz-q̣al- la-kum: fa-laa taj-ʻa-loo lil-laa-hi ʹañ-daa-dañw- wa-ʹañ-tum taʻ-la-moon.

2:23.text: Wa-iñ- kuñ-tum fee ray-bim- mim-maa naz-zal-naa ʻa-laa ʻAb-di-naa faʹ-too bi-Soo-ra-tim- mim- mis̤-lih; wad-ʻoo shu-ha-daaa-ʹa-kum- miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi ʹiñ- kuñ-tum ṣaa-di-q̣een.

2:24.text: fa-ʹil- lam taf-ʻa-loo wa-lañ- taf-ʻa-loo fat-ta-q̣un- Naa-ral- la-tee wa-q̣oo-du-han- naa-su wal-ḥi-jaa-ra-tu ʹu-ʻid-dat lil-Kaa-fi-reen.

2:25.text: Wa-bash-shi-ril- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- Ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti ʹan-na la-hum jan-naa-tiñ- taj-ree miñ- taḥ-ti-hal- ʹan-haar. Kul-la-maa ru-zi-q̣oo min-haa miñ- s̤a-ma-ra-tir- riz-q̣añ- q̣aa-loo- haa-ẓal- la-ẓee ru-ziq̣-naa miñ- q̣abl. wa-ʹu-too bi-hee mu-ta-shaa-bi-haa. Wa-la-hum fee-haaa ʹaz-waa-jum- mu-ṭah-ha-rah; wa-hum fee-haa khaa-li-doon.

2:26.text: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha laa yas-taḥ-yeee ʹañy- yaḍ-ri-ba ma-s̤a-lam- maa ba-ʻoo-ḍa-tañ- fa-maa faw-q̣a-haa. Fa-ʹam-mal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo fa-yaʻ-la-moo-na ʹan-na-hul- Ḥaq̣-q̣u mir- Rab-bi-him: wa-ʹam-mal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo fa-ya-q̣oo-loo-na maa-ẓaaa ʹa-raa-dal- laa-hu bi-haa-ẓaa ma-s̤a-laa? Yu-ḍil-lu bi-hee ka-s̤ee-rañw- wa-yah-dee bi-hee ka-s̤ee-raa: wa-maa yu-ḍil-lu bi-heee ʹil-lal- Faa-si-q̣een;

2:27.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na yañ-q̣u-ḍoo-na ʻAh-dal- laa-hi mim- baʻ-di mee-s̤aa-q̣i-hee, wa-yaq̣-ṭa-ʻoo-na maaa ʹa-ma-ral- laa-hu bi-heee ʹañy- yoo-ṣa-la wa-yuf-si-doo-na fil- ʹarḍ: ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- khaa-si-roon.

2:28.text: Kay-fa tak-fu-roo-na bil-laa-hi wa-kuñ-tum ʹam-waa-tañ- fa-ʹaḥ-yaa-kum; s̤um-ma yu-mee-tu-kum s̤um-ma yuḥ-yee-kum s̤um-ma ʹi-lay-hi tur-ja-ʻoon.

2:29.text: Hu-wal- la-ẓee kha-la-q̣a la-kum- maa fil- ʹar-ḍi ja-mee-ʻaa; s̤um-mas- ta-waaa ʹi-las- Sa-maaa-ʹi fa-saw-waa-hun-na sab-ʻa sa-maa-waat; wa-Hu-wa bi-kul-li shay-ʹin ʻa-leem.

2:30.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣aa-la Rab-bu-ka lil-Ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-ti ʹIn-nee jaa-ʻi-luñ- fil ʹar-ḍi Kha-lee-fah˹. Q̣aa-looo ʹa-taj-ʻa-lu fee-haa mañy- yuf-si-du fee-haa wa-yas-fi-kud- di-maaaʹ? wa-naḥ-nu nu-sab-bi-ḥu bi-Ḥam-di-ka wa-nu-q̣ad-di-su lak. Q̣aa-la ˹ʹIn-neee ʹaʻ-la-mu maa laa- taʻ-la-moon.˺

2:31.text: Wa-ʻal-la-ma ʹAa-da-mal- ʹas-maaa-ʹa kul-la-haa s̤um-ma ʻa-ra-ḍa-hum ʻa-lal- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-ti fa-q̣aa-la ʹam-bi-ʹoo-nee bi-ʹas-maaa-ʹi haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi ʹiñ- kuñ-tum ṣaa-di-q̣een.

2:32.text: Q̣aa-loo ˹Sub-ḥaa-na-ka laa ʻil-ma la-naaa ʹil-laa maa- ʻal-lam-ta-naa: ʹIn-na-ka ʹañ-tal- ʻA-lee-mul- Ḥa-keem.˺

2:33.text: Q̣aa-la ˹Yaaa-ʹAa-da-mu ʹam-biʹ-hum̃- bi-ʹas-maaa-ʹi-him.˺ Fa-lam-maaa ʹam-ba-ʹa-hum̃- bi-ʹas-maaa-ʹi-him q̣aa-la ʹa-lam ʹa-q̣ul- la-kum ʹIn-neee ʹaʻ-la-mu g̣ay-bas- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi wa-ʹaʻ-la-mu maa tub-doo-na wa-maa kuñ-tum tak-tu-moon.

2:34.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣ul-naa lil-ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tis- ju-doo li-ʹAa-da-ma fa-sa-ja-dooo ʹil-laaa ʹIb-lees: ʹa-baa- was-tak-ba-ra wa-kaa-na mi-nal- Kaa-fi-reen.

2:35.text: Wa-q̣ul-naa yaaa-ʹAa-da-mus- kun ʹañ-ta wa-zaw-ju-kal- jan-na-ta wa-ku-laa Min-haa ra-g̣a-dan ḥay-s̤u shiʹ-tu-maa; wa-laa taq̣-ra-baa haa-ẓi-hish- sha-ja-ra-ta fa-ta-koo-naa mi-naz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen.

2:36.text: Fa-ʹa-zal-la-hu-mash- Shay-taa-nu ʻan-haa fa-ʹakh-ra-ja-hu-maa mim-maa kaa-naa feeh. Wa-q̣ul-nah- bi-ṭoo baʻ-ḍu-kum li-baʻ-ḍin ʻa-duww. Wa-la-kum fil- ʹar-ḍi mus-ta-q̣ar-ruñw- wa-ma-taa-ʻun ʹi-laa ḥeen.

2:37.text: Fa-ta-laq̣-q̣aaa ʹAa-da-mu mir- Rab-bi-hee Ka-li-maa-tiñ- fa-taa-ba ʻa-layh: ʹin-na-hoo Hu-wat- Taw-waa-bur- Ra-ḥeem.

2:38.text: Q̣ul-nah- bi-ṭoo min-haa ja-mee-ʻaa; fa-ʹim-maa yaʹ-ti-yan-na-kum- min-nee Hu-dañ- fa-mañ ta-bi-ʻa Hu-daa-ya fa-laa khaw-fun ʻa-lay-him wa-laa hum yaḥ-za-noon.

2:39.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na Ka-fa-roo wa-kaẓ-ẓa-boo bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naaa ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bun- Naar; hum fee-haa Khaa-li-doon.

2:40.text: Yaa-Ba-neee- ʹIs-raaa-ʹee-laẓ- ku-roo niʻ-ma-ti-yal- la-teee ʹan-ʻam-tu ʻa-lay-kum wa-ʹaw-foo bi-ʻAh-deee ʹoo-fi bi-ʻAh-di-kum wa-ʹiy-yaa-ya Far-ha-boon.

2:41.text: Wa-ʹaa-mi-noo Bi-maaa ʹañ-zal-tu mu-ṣad-di-q̣al- li-maa ma-ʻa-kum wa-laa ta-koo-nooo ʹaw-wa-la Kaa-fi-rim̃- bih. Wa-laa tash-ta-roo bi-ʹAa-yaa-tee s̤a-ma-nañ q̣a-lee-laa; wa-ʹiy-yaa-ya Fat-ta-q̣oon.

2:42.text: Wa-laa Tal-bi-sul- Ḥaq̣-q̣a bil-baa-ṭi-li wa-tak-tu-mul- Ḥaq̣-q̣a wa-ʹañ-tum taʻ-la-moon.

2:43.text: Wa-ʹa-q̣ee-muṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta wa-ʹaa-tuz- Za-kaa-ta War-ka-ʻoo ma-ʻar- raa-ki-ʻeen.

2:44.text: ʹA-taʹ-mu-roo-nan- naa-sa bil-bir-ri wa-tañ-saw-na ʹañ-fu-sa-kum wa-ʹañ-tum tat-loo-nal- Ki-taab? ʹA-fa-laa taʻ-q̣i-loon?

2:45.text: Was-ta-ʻee-noo biṣ-Ṣab-ri waṣ-Ṣa-laah: wa-ʹin-na-haa la-ka-bee-ra-tun ʹil-laa ʻa-lal- Khaa-shi-ʻeen,

2:46.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na Ya-z̤̣un-noo-na ʹan-na-hum- mu-laa-q̣oo Rab-bi-him wa-ʹan-na-hum ʹi-lay-hi raa-ji-ʻoon.

2:47.text: Yaa-Ba-neee- ʹIs-raaa-ʹee-laẓ- ku-roo niʻ-ma-ti-yal- la-teee ʹan-ʻam-tu ʻa-lay-kum wa-ʹan-nee faḍ-ḍal-tu-kum ʻa-lal- ʻaa-la-meen.

2:48.text: Wat-ta-q̣oo Yaw-mal- laa taj-zee naf-sun ʻan- naf-siñ shay-ʹañw- wa-laa yuq̣-ba-lu min-haa sha-faa-ʻa-tuñw- wa-laa yuʹ-kha-ẓu min-haa ʻad-luñw- wa-laa hum yuñ-ṣa-roon.

2:49.text: Wa-ʹiẓ naj-jay-naa-kum- min ʹAa-li Fir-ʻaw-na ya-soo-moo-na-kum sooo-ʹal- ʻa-ẓaa-bi yu-ẓab-bi-ḥoo-na ʹab-naaa-ʹa-kum wa-yas-taḥ-yoo-na ni-saaa-ʹa-kum; wa-fee ẓaa-li-kum̃ ba-laaa-ʹum- mir- Rab-bi-kum ʻa-z̤̣eem.

2:50.text: Wa-ʹiẓ Fa-raq̣-naa bi-ku-mul- baḥ-ra fa-ʹañ-jay-naa-kum wa-ʹag̣-raq̣-naaa ʹAa-la Fir-ʻaw-na wa-ʹañ-tum tañ-z̤̣u-roon.

2:51.text: Wa-ʹiz waa-ʻad-naa Moo-saaa ʹar-ba-ʻee-na lay-la-tañ- s̤um-mat- ta-khaẓ-tu-mul- ʻij-la mim- baʻ-di-hee wa-añ-tum z̤̣aa-li-moon.

2:52.text: S̤um-ma ʻa-faw-naa ʻañ-kum- mim- baʻ-di ẓaa-li-ka la-ʻal-la-kum tash-ku-roon.

2:53.text: Wa-ʹiẓ ʹaa-tay-naa Moo-sal- Ki-taa-ba wal-Fur-q̣uaa-na la-ʻal-la-kum Tah-ta-doon.

2:54.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣aa-la Moo-saa li-Q̣aw-mi-hee yaa-q̣aw-mi ʹin-na-kum z̤̣a-lam-tum ʹan-fu-sa-kum̃ bit-ti-khaa-ẓi-ku-mul- ʻij-la fa-too-booo ʹilaa Baa-ri-ʹi-kum faq̣-tu-looo ʹañ-fu-sa-kum; ẓaa-li-kum khay-rul- la-kum ʻiñ-da Baa-ri-ʹi-kum. Fa-taa-ba ʻa-lay-kum: ʹin-na-hoo Hu-wat- Taw-waa-bur- Ra-ḥeem.

2:55.text: Wa-ʹIẓ q̣ul-tum yaa-Moo-saa lan- nuʹ-mi-na la-ka ḥat-taa na-ral- laa-ha Jah-ra-tañ fa-ʹa-kha-ẓat-ku-muṣ- ṣaa-ʻi-q̣a-tu wa-ʹañ-tum tañ-z̤̣u-roon.

2:56.text: S̤um-ma ba-ʻas̤-naa-kum mim- baʻ-di Maw-ti-kum la-ʻal-la-kum tash-ku-roon.

2:57.text: Wa-Z̤̣al-lal-naa ʻa-lay-ku-mul- g̣a-maa-ma wa-ʹañ-zal-naa ʻa-lay-ku-mul- Man-na was-Sal-waaa: Ku-loo miñ ṭay-yi-baa-ti maa ra-zaq̣-naa-kum wa-maa z̤̣a-la-moo-naa wa-laa-kiñ kaa-nooo ʹañ-fu-sa-hum yaz̤̣-li-moon.

2:58.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣ul-nad- khu-loo haa-ẓi-hil- q̣ar-ya-ta fa-ku-loo min-haa ḥay-s̤u shiʹ-tum ra-g̣a-dañw- wad-khu-lul- baa-ba Suj-ja-dañw- wa-q̣oo-loo ḥit-ta-tun- nag̣-fir la-kum Kha-ṭaa-yaa-kum: wa-sa-na-zee-dul- Muḥ-si-neen.

2:59.text: Fa-bad-da-lal- la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-moo q̣aw-lan g̣ay-ral- laẓee q̣ee-la la-hum fa-ʹañ-zal-naa ʻa-lal- la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-moo rij-zam- mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi bi-maa Kaa-noo yaf-su-q̣oon.

2:60.text: Wa-ʹiẓis- tas-q̣aa Moo-saa li-q̣aw-mi-hee fa-q̣ul-naḍ- rib bi-ʻA-ṣaa-kal- ḥa-jar. Fañ-fa-ja-rat min-hus̤- na-taa ʻash-ra-ta ʻay-naa. Q̣ad ʻa-li-ma Kul-lu ʻu-naa-sim- mash-ra-ba-hum. Ku-loo wash-ra-boo mir- riz-q̣il- laa-hi wa-laa taʻ-s̤aw fil- ʹar-ḍi muf-si-deen.

2:61.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣ul-tum yaa-Moo-saa lan- naṣ-bi-ra ʻa-laa ṭa-ʻaa-miñw- waa-ḥi-diñ fad-ʻu la-naa Rab-ba-ka yukh-rij la-naa mim-maa tum-bi-tul- ʹar-ḍu mim- baq̣-li-haa Wa-q̣is̤-s̤aaa-ʹi-haa Wa-foo-mi-haa wa-ʻada-si-haa wa-ba-ṣa-li-haa. Q̣aa-la ʹa-tas-tab-di-loo-nal- la-ẓee hu-wa ʹad-naa bil-la-ẓee hu-wa Khayr? ʹIh-bi-ṭoo miṣ-rañ  fa-ʹin-na la-kum- maa sa-ʹal-tum. Wa-ḍu-ri-bat ʻa-lay-hi-muẓ- ẓil-la-tu wal-mas-ka-nah; wa-baaa-ʹoo bi-g̣a-ḍa-bim- mi-nal- laah. Ẓaa-li-ka bi-ʹan-na-hum kaa-noo yak-fu-roo-na bi-ʹaa-yaa-til- laa-hi wa-yaq̣-tu-loo-nan- na-biy-yee-na bi-g̣ay-ril- ḥaq̣q̣. Ẓaa-li-ka bi-maa ʻa-ṣaw- Wa-kaa-noo  yaʻ-ta-doon.

2:62.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo Wal-la-ẓee-na haa-doo- wan-Na-ṣaa-raa waṣ-Ṣaa-bi-ʹeena man ʹaa-ma-na bil-laa-hi wal-Yaw-mil- ʹAa-khi-ri wa-ʻa-mi-la ṣaa-li-ḥañ- fa-la-hum ʹaj-ru-hum ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-him: Wa-laa - khaw-fun ʻa-lay-him wa-laa-  hum yaḥ-za-noon.

2:63.text: Wa-ʹiẓ ʹa-khaẓ-naa Mee-s̤aa-q̣a-kum Wa-ra-faʻ-naa faw-q̣a-ku-muṭ- Ṭoor: Khu-ẓoo maaa aa-tay-naa-kum̃- bi-q̣uw-wa-tiñw- waẓ-ku-roo maa fee-hi la-ʻal-la-kum tat-ta-q̣oon.

2:64.text: S̤um-ma ta-wal-lay-tum- mim̃- baʻ-di ẓaa-lik: Fa-law-laa faḍ-lul- la-hi ʻa-lay-kum wa-raḥ-ma-tu-hoo la-kuñ-tum- mi-nal- khaa-si-reen.

2:65.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʻa-lim-tu-mul- la-ẓee-naʻ- ta-daw miñ-kum fis- Sab-ti fa-q̣ul-naa la-hum koo-noo q̣i-ra-da-tan khaa-si-ʹeen!

2:66.text: Fa-ja-ʻal-naa-haa na-kaa-lal- li-maa bay-na ya-day-haa wa-maa khal-fa-haa wa-maw-ʻi-z̤̣a-tal- lil-Mut-ta-q̣een.

2:67.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣aa-la Moo-saa li-q̣aw-mi-heee ʹin-nal- laa-ha yaʹ-mu-ru-kum ʹañ- taẓ-ba-ḥoo Ba-q̣a-rah. Q̣aa-looo ʹa-tat-ta-khi-ẓu-naa hu-zu-waa? Q̣aa-la ʹa-ʻoo-ẓu bil-laa-hi ʹan ʹa-koo-na mi-nal- jaa-hi-leen!

2:68.text: Q̣aa-lud- ʻu la-naa Rab-ba-ka yu-bay-yil- la-naa maa- hee! Q̣aa-la ʹin-na-hoo ya-q̣oo-lu ʹin-na-haa ba-q̣a-ra-tul- laa faa-ri-ḍuñw- wa-laa-  bikr; ʻa-waa-num- bay-na ẓaa-lik: faf-ʻa-loo maa- tuʹ-ma-roon.

2:69.text: Q̣aa-lud- ʻu la-naa Rab-ba-ka yu-bay-yil- la-naa maa- law-nu-haa. Q̣aa-la ʹin-na-hoo ya-q̣oo-lu ʹin-na-haa ba-q̣a-ra-tuñ- ṣaf-raaa-ʹu faa-q̣i-ʻul- law-nu-haa ta-sur-run- naa-z̤̣i-reen.

2:70.text: Q̣aa-lud- ʻu la-naa Rab-ba-ka yu-bay-yil- la-naa maa- hi-ya ʹin-nal ba-q̣a-ra ta-shaa-ba-ha ʻa-lay-naa: wa-ʹin-naaa ʹiñ- shaaa-ʹal- laa-hu la-muh-ta-doon.

2:71.text: Q̣aa-la ʹin-na-hoo ya-q̣oo-lu ʹin-na-haa ba-q̣a-ra-tul- laa- ẓa-loo-luñ- tu-s̤ee-rul- ʹar-ḍa wa-laa tas-q̣il- hars̤; mu-sal-la-ma-tul- laa shi-ya-ta fee-haa. Q̣aa-lul- ʹaa-na jiʹ-ta bil-ḥaq̣q̣. Fa-ẓa-ba-ḥoo-haa wa-maa kaa-doo yaf-ʻa-loon.

2:72.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣a-tal-tum naf-sañ- fad-daa-raʹ-tum fee-haa: wal-laa-hu mukh-ri-jum- maa kuñ-tum tak-tu-moon.

2:73.text: Fa-q̣ul-naḍ- ri-boo-hu bi-baʻ-ḍi-haa. Ka-ẓaa-li-ka yuḥ-yil- laa-hul- maw-taa wa-yu-ree-kum ʹAa-yaa-ti-hee la-ʻal-la-kum taʻ-q̣i-loon.

2:74.text: S̤um-ma q̣a-sat q̣u-loo-bu-kum- mim- baʻ-di ẓaa-li-ka fa-hi-ya kal-ḥi-jaa-ra-ti ʹaw ʹa-shad-du q̣as-wah. Wa-ʹin-na mi-nal- ḥi-jaa-ra-ti la-maa ya-ta-faj-ja-ru min-hul- ʹan-haar; wa-ʹin-na min-haa la-maa yash-shaq̣-q̣a-q̣u fa-yakh-ru-ju min-hul- maaaʹ. Wa-ʹin-na min-haa la-maa yah-bi-ṭu min khash-ya-til- laah. Wa-mal- laa-hu bi-g̣aa-fi-lin ʻam-maa taʻ-ma-loon,

2:75.text: ʹA-fa-taṭ-ma-ʻoo-na ʹañy- yuʹ-mi-noo la-kum wa-q̣ad kaa-na fa-ree-q̣um- min-hum yas-ma-ʻoo-na Ka-laa-mal- laa-hi s̤um-ma yu-ḥar-ri-foo-na-hoo mim- baʻ-di maa- ʻa-q̣a-loo-hu wa-hum yaʻ-la-moon?

2:76.text: wa-ʹiẓaa la-q̣ul- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo q̣aa-looo ʹaa-man-naa: wa-ʹiẓaa kha-laa baʻ-ḍu-hum ʹi-laa baʻ-ḍiñ q̣aa-l  ooo ʹa-tu-ḥad-di-s̤oo-na-hum bi-maa fa-ta-ḥal- laa-hu ʻa-lay-kum li-yu-ḥaaaj-joo-kum̃ bi-hee ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-kum? ʹA-fa-laa taʻ-q̣i-loon?

2:77.text: ʹA-wa-laa yaʻ-la-moo-na ʹan-nal- laa-ha yaʻ-la-mu maa- yu-sir-roo-na wa-maa yuʻ-li-noon?

2:78.text: Wa-min-hum ʹUm-miy-yoo-na laa- yaʻ-la-moo-nal- Ki-taa-ba ʹil-laaa ʹa-maa-niy-ya wa-ʹin hum ʹil-laa ya-z̤̣un-noon.

2:79.text: Fa-way-lul- lil-la-ẓee-na yak-tu-boo-nal- Ki-taa-ba bi-ʹay-dee-him s̤um-ma ya-q̣oo-loo-na haa-ẓaa min ʻiñ-dil- laa-hi li-yash-ta-roo bi-hee s̤a-ma-nañ q̣a-lee-laa! Fa-way-lul- la-hum- mim-maa ka-ta-bat ʹay-dee-him wa-way-lul- la-hum- mim-maa yak-si-boon!

2:80.text: Wa-q̣aa-loo lañ ta-mas-sa-nan- Naa-ru ʹil-laaa ʹay-yaa-mam- maʻ-doo-dah. Q̣ul ʹat-ta-khaẓ-tum ʻiñ-dal- laa-hi ʻah-dañ fa-lañy- yukh-li-fal- laa-hu ʻah-da-hooo ʹam ta-q̣oo-loo-na ʻa-lal- laa-hi maa laa- taʻ-la-moon?

2:81.text: Ba-laa mañ- ka-sa-ba say-yi-ʹa-tañw- waʹaḥa-ṭat bi-hee kha-ṭeee-ʹa-tu-hoo fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bun- Naar: hum fee-haa khaa-li-doon.

2:82.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bul- Jan-nah: hum fee-haa khaa-li-doon.

2:83.text: Wa-ʹiẓ ʹa-khaẓ-naa Mee-s̤aa-q̣a Ba-neee- ʹIs-raaa-ʹee-la laa- taʻ-bu-doo-na ʹil-lal- laa-ha wa-bil-waa-li-day-ni ʹiḥ-saa-nañw- wa-ẓil- q̣ur-baa wal-ya-taa-maa wal-ma-saa-keeni wa-q̣oo-loo lin-na-si ḥus-nañw- waʹa-q̣ee-muṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta wa-ʹaa-tuz- Za-kaah. Ṣum-ma ta-wal-lay-tum ʹil-laa q̣a-lee-lam- miñ-kum wa-ʹañ-tum- muʻ-ri-ḍoon.

2:84.text: Wa-ʹiẓ ʹa-khaẓ-naa Mee-s̤aa-q̣a-kum laa- tas-fi-koo-na di-maaa-ʹa-kum wa-laa tukh-ri-joo-na ʹañ-fu-sa-kum- miñ- di-yaa-ri-kum s̤um-ma ʹaq̣-rar-tum wa-ʹañ-tum tash-ha-doon.

2:85.text: S̤um-ma ʹañ-tum haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi taq̣-tu-loo-na ʹañ-fu-sa-kum wa-tukh-ri-joo-na fa-ree-q̣am- miñ-kum- miñ- di-yaa-ri-him; ta-z̤̣aa-ha-roo-na ʻa-lay-him̃- bil-ʹis̤-mi- wal-ʻud-waan; wa-ʹiñy- yaʹ-too-kum ʹu-saa-raa tu-faa-doo-hum wa-hu-wa mu-ḥar-ra-mun ʻa-lay-kum ʹikh-raa-ju-hum. ʹA-fa-tuʹ-mi-noo-na bi-baʻ-ḍil- Ki-taa-bi wa-tak-fu-roo-na bi-baʻḍ? Fa-maa ja-zaaa-ʹu mañy- yaf-ʻa-lu ẓaa-li-ka miñ-kum ʹil-laa khiz-yuñ- fil- ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa? Wa-Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti yu-rad-doo-na ʹil-aaa ʹa-shad-dil- ʻa-ẓaab. Wa-mal- laa-hu bi-g̣aa-fi-lin ʻam-maa taʻ-ma-loon.

2:86.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-kal- la-ẓee-nash- ta-ra-wul- ḥa-yaa-tad- Dun-yaa bil-ʹAa-khi-ra-ti fa-laa yu-khaf-fa-fu ʻan-hu-mul- ʻa-ẓaa-bu wa-laa hum yuñ-ṣa-roon.

2:87.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹaa-tay-naa Moo-sal- Ki-taa-ba wa-q̣af-fay-naa mim- baʻ-di-hee bir-ru-su-li wa-ʹaa-tay-naa ʻee-sab- na- Mar-ya-mal- Bay-yi-naa-ti wa-ʹay-yad-naa-hu bi-roo-ḥil- q̣u-dus. ʹA-fa-kul-la-maa jaaa-ʹa-kum Ra-soo-lum̃- bi-maa laa- tah-waaa ʹañ-fu-su-ku-mus- tak-bar-tum? Fa-fa-ree-q̣añ- kaẓ-ẓab-tum wa-fa-ree-q̣añ taq̣-tu-loon?

2:88.text: Wa-q̣a-loo q̣u-loo-bu-naa g̣ulf; bal- la-ʻa-na-hu-mul- laa-hu bi-kuf-ri-him fa-q̣a-lee-lam- maa yuʹ-mi-noon.

2:89.text: Wa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹa-hum Ki-taa-bum- min ʻiñ-dil- laa-hi mu-ṣad-di-q̣ul- li-maa ma-ʻa-hum wa-kaa-noo miñ- q̣ab-lu yas-taf-ti-ḥoo-na ʻa-lal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo, fa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹa-hum- maa ʻa-ra-foo ka-fa-roo bi-hee fa-laʻ-na-tul- laa-hi ʻa-lal- Kaa-fi-reen.

2:90.text: Biʹ-sa-mash- ta-raw bi-heee ʹañ-fu-sa-hum ʹañy- yak-fu-roo bi-maaa ʹañ-za-lal- laa-hu bag̣-yan ʹañy- yu-naz-zi-lal- laa-hu miñ- faz̤̣-li-hee ʻa-laa mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu min ʻi-baa-dih. Fa-baaa-ʹoo bi-g̣a-ḍa-bin ʻa-laa g̣a-ḍab. Wa-lil-Kaa-fi-ree-na ʻa-ẓaa-bum- mu-heen.

2:91.text: Wa-ʹiẓaa q̣ee-la la-hum ʹaa-mi-noo bi-maaa ʹañ-za-lal- laa-hu q̣aa-loo nuʹ-mi-nu bi-maaa ʹuñ-zi-la ʻa-lay-naa wa-yak-fu-roo-na bi-maa wa-raaa-ʹa-hoo wa-hu-wal- Ḥaq̣-q̣u mu-ṣad-di-q̣al- li-maa ma-ʻa-hum. Q̣ul fa-li-ma taq̣-tu-loo-na ʹam-bi-yaaa-ʹal- laahi miñ- q̣ab-lu ʹiñ- kuñ-tum- muʹ-mi-neen?

2:92.text: Wa-la-q̣ad jaaa-ʹa-kum- Moo-saa bil-Bay-yi-naa-ti s̤um-mat- ta-khaẓ-tu-mul- ʻij-la mim- baʻ-di-hee wa-ʹañ-tum z̤̣aa-li-moon.

2:93.text: Wa-ʹiẓ ʹa-khaẓ-naa Mee-s̤aa-q̣a-kum wa-ra-faʻ-naa faw-q̣a-ku-muṭ- Ṭoor: khu-ẓoo maaa ʹaa-tay-naa-kum̃- bi-q̣uw-wa-tiñw- was-ma-ʻoo. Q̣aa-loo sa-miʻ-naa wa-ʻa-ṣay-naa: wa-ʹush-ri-boo fee q̣u-loo-bi-hi-mul- ʻij-la bi-kuf-ri-him. Q̣ul biʹ-sa-maa yaʹ-mu-ru-kum̃- bi-heee ʹee-maa-nu-kum ʹiñ kuñ-tum- muʹ-mi-neen.

2:94.text: Q̣ul ʹiñ kaa-nat la-ku-mud- Daa-rul- ʹAa-khi-ra-tu ʻiñ-dal- laa-hi khaa-li-ṣa-tam- min doo-nin- naa-si fatamannawul- mawta ʹiñ- kuñ-tum ṣaa-di-q̣een.

2:95.text: Wa-lañy- ya-ta-man-naw-hu ʹa-ba-dam- bi-maa q̣ad-da-mat ʹay-dee-him. Wal-laa-hu ʻA-lee-mum̃- biz̤̣-z̤̣aa-li-meen.

2:96.text: Wa-la-ta-ji-dan-na-hum ʹaḥ-ra-ṣan- naa-si ʻa-laa ḥa-yaah. Wa-mi-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹash-ra-koo ya-wad-du ʹa-ḥa-du-hum law yu-ʻam-ma-ru ʹal-fa sa-nah: wa-maa hu-wa bi-mu-zaḥ-zi-ḥi-hee mi-nal- ʻa-ẓaa-bi ʹañy- yu-ʻam-mar. Wal-laa-hu Ba-see-rum- bi-maa yaʻ-ma-loon.

2:97.text: Q̣ul mañ- kaa-na ʻa-duw-wal- li-Jib-ree-la fa-ʹin-na-hoo naz-za-la-hoo ʻa-laa q̣al-bi-ka bi-ʹiẓ-nil- laa-hi mu-ṣad-di-q̣al- li-maa bay-na ya-day-hi wa-hu-dañw- wa- bush-raa lil-Muʹ-mi-neen,

2:98.text: Mañ- kaa-na ʻa-duw-wal- lil-laa-hi wa-ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-ti-hee wa-ru-su-li-hi wa-Jib-ree-la wa-Mee-kaa-la fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha ʻa-duw-wul- lil-kaa-fi-reen.

2:99.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹañ-zal-naaa ʹi-lay-ka ʹAa-yaa-tim- bay-yi-naat; wa-maa yak-furu bi-haaa ʹil-lal- faa-si-q̣oon.

2:100.text: ʹA-wa-kul-la-maa ʻaa-ha-doo ʻah-dan- na-ba-ẓa-hoo fa-ree-q̣um- min-hum? Bal ʹak-s̤a-ru-hum laa- yuʹ-mi-noon.

2:101.text: Wa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹa-hum Ra-soo-lum- min ʻiñ-dil- laa-hi mu-ṣad-di-q̣ul- li-maa ma-ʻa-hum na-ba-ẓa fa-ree-q̣um- mi-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹoo-tul- Ki-taa-ba Ki-taa-bal- laa-hi wa-raaa-ʹa z̤̣u-hoo-ri-him ka-ʹan-na-hum laa- yaʻ-la-moon!

2:102.text: Wat-ta-ba-ʻoo maa- tat-lush- sha-yaa-ṭee-nu ʻa-laa mul-ki- Su-lay-maan. Wa-maa ka-fa-ra Su-lay-maa-nu wa-laa-kin-nash- sha-yaa-ṭee-na ka-fa-roo yu-ʻal-li-moo-nan- naa-sas- siḥr, wa-maaa ʹuñ-zi-la ʻa-lal- ma-la-kay-ni bi-Baa-bi-la Haa-roo-ta wa-Maa-root. Wa-maa yu-ʻal-li-maa-ni min ʹa-ḥa-din ḥat-taa ya-q̣oo-laaa ʹin-na-maa naḥ-nu fit-na-tuñ- fa-laa tak-fur. Fa-ya-ta-ʻal-la-moo-na min-hu-maa -  maa yu-far-ri-q̣oo-na Bi-hee bay-nal- mar-ʹi wa-zaw-jih. Wa-maa hum̃- bi-ḍaaar-ree-na bi-hee min ʹa-ḥa-din ʹil-laa bi-ʹiẓ-nil- laah. Wa-ya-ta-ʻal-la-moo-na maa- ya-ẓur-ru-hum wa-laa yañ-fa-ʻu-hum. Wa-la-q̣ad ʻa-li-moo la-ma-nish- ta-raa-hu maa- la-hoo fil- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti min kha-laaq̣. Wa-la-biʹ-sa maa- sha-raw bi-heee ʹañ-fu-sa-hum, law kaa-noo yaʻ-la-moon.

2:103.text: Wa-law ʹan-na-hum ʹaa-ma-noo wat-ta-q̣aw la-ma-s̤oo-ba-tum- min ʻiñ-dil- laa-hi khayr: law kaa-noo yaʻ-la-moon.

2:104.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-zee-na ʹaa-ma-noo laa- ta-q̣oo-loo raa-ʻi-naa wa-q̣oo-luñ- z̤̣ur-naa was-ma-ʻoo. Wa-lil-Kaa-fi-ree-na ʻa-ẓaa-bun ʹa-leem.

2:105.text: Maa- ya-wad-dul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo min ʹAh-lil- Ki-taa-bi wa-lal- Mush-ri-kee-na ʹañy- yu-naz-za-la ʻa-lay-kum- min khay-rim- mir- Rab-bi-kum. Wal-laa-hu yakh-taṣ-ṣu bi-raḥ-ma-ti-hee mañy- ya-shaaaʹ: Wal-laa-hu Ẓul- Faḍ-lil- ʹa-z̤̣eem.

2:106.text: Maa- nañ-sakh min ʹaa-ya-tin ʹaw nuñ-si-haa naʹ-ti bi-khay-rim- min-haaa ʹaw mis̤-li-haa: ʹa-lam taʻ-lam ʹan-nal- laa-ha ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Q̣a-deer?

2:107.text: ʹA-lam taʻ-lam ʹan-nal- laa-ha la-hoo mul-kus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ? Wa-maa la-kum- miñ doo-nil- laa-hi miñw- wa-liy-yiñw- wa-laa na-ṣeer.

2:108.text: ʹAm tu-ree-doo-na ʹañ- tas-ʹa-loo Ra-soo-la-kum ka-maa su-ʹi-la Moo-saa miñ- q̣abl? Wa-mañy- ya-ta-bad-da-lil- kuf-ra bil-ʹee-maa-ni fa-q̣ad ḍal-la sa-waaa-ʹas- sa-beel.

2:109.text: Wad-da ka-s̤ee-rum- min ʹAh-lil- Ki-taa-bi law ya-rud-doo-na-kum- mim- baʻ-di ʹee-maa-ni-kum kuf-faa-ran, ḥa-sa-dam- min ʻiñ-di añ-fu-si-him- mim- baʻ-di maa- ta-bay-ya-na la-hu-mul- Ḥaq̣q̣. Faʻ-foo waṣ-fa-ḥoo ḥat-taa yaʹ-ti-yal- laa-hu bi-ʹam-rih: ʹin-nal- laa-ha ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Q̣a-deer.

2:110.text: Wa-ʹa-q̣ee-muṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta wa-ʹaa-tuz- Za-kaah: wa-maa tu-q̣ad-di-moo li-ʹañ-fu-si-kum- min khay-riñ- ta-ji-doo-hu ʻiñ-dal- lah: ʹin-nal- laa-ha bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na Ba-ṣeer.

2:111.text: Wa-q̣aa-loo lañy- yad-khu-lal- Jan-na-ta ʹil-laa mañ- kaa-na Hoo-dan ʹaw Na-ṣaa-raa. Til-ka ʹa-maa-niy-yu-hum. Q̣ul haa-too bur-haa-na-kum ʹiñ- kuñ-tum ṣaa-di-q̣een.

2:112.text: Ba-laa, man ʹas-la-ma waj-ha-hoo lil-laa-hi wa-hu-wa muḥ-si-nuñ fa-la-hooo ʹaj-ru-hoo ʻiñ-da Rab-bih; wa-laa khaw-fun ʻa-lay-him wa-laa hum yaḥ-za-noon.

2:113.text: Wa-q̣aa-la-til- Ya-hoo-du lay-sa-tin- Na-ṣaa-raa ʻa-laa shayʹ; wa-q̣aa-la-tin- Na-ṣaa-raa lay-sa-til- Ya-hoo-du ʻa-laa shay-ʹiñw- wa- hum yat-loo-nal- Ki-taab. Ka-ẓaa-li-ka q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na laa- yaʻ-la-moo-na mis̤-la q̣aw-li-him. Fal-laa-hu Yaḥ-ku-mu bay-na-hum Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti fee-maa kaa-noo fee-hi yakh-ta-li-foon.

2:114.text: Wa-man ʹaz̤̣-la-mu mim-mam- ma-na-ʻa ma-saa-ji-dal- la-hi ʹañy- yuẓ-kara fee-has- mu-hoo wa-sa-ʻaa fee kha-raa-bi-haa? ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka maa- kaa-na la-hum ʹany- yad-khu-loo-haaa ʹil-laa khaaa-ʹi-feen. La-hum fid- dun-yaa khiz-yuñw- wa-la-hum fil- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti ʻa-ẓaa-bun ʻa-z̤̣eem.

2:115.text: Wa-lil-laa-hil- Mash-ri-q̣u wal-Mag̣-rib: Fa-ʹay-na-maa tu-wal-loo fa-s̤am-ma Waj-hul- laah. ʹIn-nal- laa-ha Waa-si-ʻun ʻA-leem.

2:116.text: Wa-q̣aa-lut- ta-kha-ẓal- laa-hu wa-la-dañ- Sub-ḥaa-nah! Bal- la-hoo maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ: kul-lul- la-hoo q̣aa-ni-toon.

2:117.text: Ba-dee-ʻus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ: wa-ʹi-ẓaa q̣a-ḍaaa ʹam-rañ- fa-ʹin-na-maa ya-q̣oo-lu la-hoo ˹Kuñ˺  fa-ya-koon.

2:118.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal la-ẓee-na laa- yaʻ-la-moo-na law-laa- yu-kal-li-mu-nal- laa-hu ʹaw taʹ-tee-naaa ʹAa-yah? Ka-ẓaa-lika q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na miñ- q̣ab-li-him- mis̤-la q̣aw-li-him. Ta-shaa-ba-hat q̣u-loo-bu-hum. Q̣ad bay-yan-nal- ʹaa-yaa-ti li-q̣aw-miñy- yoo-q̣i-noon.

2:119.text: ʹIn-naaa ʹar-sal-naa-ka bil-ḥaq̣-q̣i ba-shee-rañw- wa-na-ẓee-ra wa-laa tus-ʹa-lu ʻan ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bil Ja-ḥeem.

2:120.text: Wa-lañ- tar-ḍaa ʻañ-kal- Ya-hoo-du wa-lan- Na-ṣaa-raa ḥat-taa tat-ta-bi-ʻa mil-la-ta-hum. Q̣ul ʹin-na Hu-dal- laa-hi hu-wal- Hu-daa. Wa-la-ʹi-nit- ta-baʻta ʹah-waaa-ʹa-hum baʻ-dal- la-ẓee jaaa-ʹa-ka mi-nal- ʻil-mi maa- la-ka mi-nal- laa-hi miñw- wa-liy-yiñw- wa-laa- na-ṣeer.

2:121.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-tay-naa-hu-mul- Ki-taa-ba yat-loo-na-hoo ḥaq̣-q̣a ti-laa-wa-tih: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka yuʹ-mi-noo-na bih. Wa-mañy- yak-fur bi-hee fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- khaa-si-roon.

2:122.text: Yaa-Ba-neee- ʹIs-raaa-ʹee-laẓ- ku-roo niʻ-ma-ti-yal- la-teee ʹan-ʻam-tu ʻa-lay-kum wa-ʹan-nee faḍ-ḍal-tu-kum ʻa-lal- ʻaa-la-meen.

2:123.text: Wat-ta-q̣oo Yaw-mal- laa taj-zee naf-sun ʻan- naf-siñ- shay-ʹañw- wa-laa- yuq̣-ba-lu min-haa ʻad-luñw- Wa-laa- tañ-fa-ʻu-haa sha-faa-ʻa-tunw- wa-laa- hum yuñ-ṣa-roon.

2:124.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓib- ta-laaa ʹIb-raa-hee-ma Rab-bu-hoo bi-Ka-li-maa-tiñ- fa-ʹa-tam-ma-hun-na: q̣aa-la ʹIn-nee- jaa-ʻi-lu-ka lin-naa-si ʹI-maa-maa. Q̣aa-la wa-miñ- ẓur-riy-ya-tee! Q̣aa-la laa- ya-naa-lu ʻah-diz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen.

2:125.text: Wa-ʹiẓ ja-ʻal-nal- Bay-ta ma-s̤aa-ba-tal- lin-naa-si wa-ʹam-naa; wat-ta-khi-ẓoo mim- Ma-q̣aa-mi ʹIb-raa-hee-ma mu-ṣal-laa: wa-ʻa-hid-naaa ʹi-laaa ʹIb-raa-hee-ma wa-ʹIs-maa-ʻee-la ʹañ- ṭah-hi-raa Bay-ti-ya liṭ-ṭaaa-ʹi-fee-na wal-ʻaa-ki-fee-na war-ruk-ka-ʻis- su-jood.

2:126.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣aa-la ʹIb-raa-hee-mu Rab-bij- ʻal haa-ẓaa Ba-la-dan ʹAa-mi-nañw- war-zuq̣ ʹah-la-hoo mi-nas̤- s̤a-ma-raa-ti man ʹaa-ma-na min-hum̃- bil-laa-hi wal-Yaw-mil- ʹAa-khir. Q̣aa-la wa-mañ- ka-fa-ra fa-ʹu-mat-ti-ʻu-hoo q̣a-lee-lañ- s̤um-ma ʹaḍ-ṭar-ru-hoo ʹi-laa ʻa-ẓaa-bin- Naar, wa-biʹ-sal- ma-ṣeer!

2:127.text: Wa-ʹiẓ yar-fa-ʻu ʹIb-raa-hee-mul- q̣a-waa-ʻi-da mi-nal- Bay-ti wa-ʹIs-maa-ʻeel: Rab-ba-naa ta-q̣ab-bal min-naa: ʹin-na-ka ʹAñ-tas- Sa-mee-ʻul- ʻA-leem.

2:128.text: Rab-ba-naa waj-ʻal-naa Mus-li-may-ni la-ka wa-miñ- ẓur-riy-ya-ti-naaa ʹUm-ma-tam- Mus-li-ma-tal- lak; wa-ʹa-ri-naa ma-naa-si-ka-naa wa-tub ʻa-lay-naa; ʹin-na-ka ʹAn-tat- Taw-waa-bur- Ra-ḥeem.

2:129.text: Rab-ba-naa wab-ʻas̤ fee-him Ra-soo-lam- min-hum yat-loo ʻa-lay-him ʹAa-yaa-ti-ka wa-yu-ʻal-li-mu-hu-mul- Ki-taa-ba wal-Ḥik-ma-ta wa-yu-zak-kee-him: ʹin-na-ka ʹAñ-tal- ʻA-zee-zul- Ḥa-keem.

2:130.text: Wa-mañy- yar-g̣a-bu ʻam- Mil-la-ti ʹIb-raa-hee-ma ʹil-laa mañ sa-fi-ha naf-sah? Wa-la-q̣a-diṣ- ṭa-fay-naa-hu fid- dun-yaa: wa-ʹin-na-hoo fil- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti la-mi-naṣ- Ṣaa-li-ḥeen.

2:131.text: ʹIẓ q̣aa-la la-hoo Rab-bu-hooo ʹas-lim q̣aa-la ʹas-lam-tu li-Rab-bil- ʻaa-la-meen.

2:132.text: Wa-waṣ-ṣaa bi-haaa ʹIb-raa-hee-mu ba-nee-hi wa-Yaʻ-q̣oob: yaa-ba-niy-ya ʹin-nal- laa-haṣ- ṭa-faa la-ku-mud- Dee-na fa-laa ta-moo-tun-na ʹil-laa wa-ʹañ-tum- Mus-li-moon.

2:133.text: ʹAm kuñ-tum shu-ha-daaa-ʹa ʹiẓ ḥa-ḍa-ra Yaʻ-q̣oo-bal- maw-tu ʹiẓ q̣aa-la li-ba-nee-hi maa- taʻ-bu-doo-na mim- baʻ-dee? Q̣aa-loo naʻ-bu-du ʹI-laa-ha-ka wa-ʹI-laa-ha ʹaa-baaa-ʹi-ka ʹIb-raa-hee-ma wa-ʹIs-maa-ʻee-la wa-ʹIs-ḥaa-q̣a ʹI-laa-hañw- Waa-ḥi-daa: wa-naḥ-nu la-hoo Mus-li-moon.

2:134.text: Til-ka ʹum-ma-tuñ- q̣ad kha-lat. La-haa maa- ka-sa-bat wa-la-kum- maa ka-sab-tum. Wa-laa tus-ʹa-loo-na ʻam-maa kaa-noo yaʻ-ma-loon.

2:135.text: Wa-q̣aa-loo koo-noo Hoo-dan ʹaw Na-ṣaa-raa tah-ta-doo. Q̣ul bal Mil-la-ta ʹIb-raa-hee-ma Ḥa-nee-faa, wa-maa kaa-na mi-nal- mush-ri-keen.

2:136.text: Q̣oo-looo ʹaa-man-naa bil-laa-hi wa-maaa ʹuñ-zi-la ʹi-lay-naa wa-maaa ʹuñ-zi-la ʹi-laaa ʹIb-raa-hee-ma wa-ʹIs-maa-ʻee-la wa-ʹIs-ḥaa-q̣a wa-Yaʻ-q̣oo-ba wal-ʹas-baa-ṭi wa-maaa ʹoo-ti-ya Moo-saa wa-ʻEe-saa wa-maaa ʹoo-ti-yan- na-biy-yoo-na mir- Rab-bi-him. Laa- nu-far-ri-q̣u bay-na ʹa-ḥa-dim- min-hum, wa-naḥ-nu la-hoo Mus-li-moon.

2:137.text: Fa-ʹin ʹaa-ma-noo bi-mis̤-li maaa ʹaa-mañ-tum̃- bi-hee fa-q̣a-dih- ta-daw. Wa-ʹiñ- ta-wal-law fa-ʹin-na-maa hum fee shi-q̣aaq̣: fa-sa-yak-fee-ka-hu-mul- laah, wa-Hu-was- Sa-mee-ʻul- ʻA-leem.

2:138.text: Ṣib-g̣a-tal- laah: wa-man ʹaḥ-sa-nu mi-nal- laa-hi ṣib-g̣ah? Wa-naḥ-nu la-hoo ʻaa-bi-doon.

2:139.text: Q̣ul ʹatu-ḥaaaj-joo-na-naa fil- laa-hi wa-Hu-wa Rab-bu-naa wa-Rab-bu-kum; wa-la-naa ʹaʻ-maa-lu-naa wa-la-kum ʹaʻ-maa-lu-kum; wa-naḥ-nu la-hoo mukh-li-ṣoon.

2:140.text: ʹAm ta-q̣oo-loo-na ʹin-na ʹIb-raa-hee-ma wa-ʹIs-maa-ʻee-la wa-ʹIs-ḥaa-q̣a wa-Yaʻ-q̣oo-ba wal-ʹAs-baa-ṭa kaa-noo Hoo-dan ʹaw Na-ṣaa-raa? Q̣ul ʹa-ʹañ-tum ʹaʻ-la-mu ʹa-mil- laah? Wa-man ʹaz̤̣-la-mu mim-mañ- Ka-ta-ma sha-haa-da-tan ʻiñ-da-hoo mi-nal- laah? Wa-mal- laa-hu bi-g̣aa-fi-lin ʻam-maa taʻ-ma-loon.

2:141.text: Til-ka ʹUm-ma-tuñ- q̣ad kha-lat. La-haa maa- ka-sa-bat wa-la-kum- maa ka-sab-tum. Wa-laa tus-ʹa-loo-na ʻam-maa kaa-noo yaʻ-ma-loon.

2:142.text: Sa-ya-q̣oo-lus- su-fa-haaa-ʹu mi-nan- naa-si maa- wal-laa-hum ʻañ- Q̣ib-la-ti-hi-mul- la-tee kaa-noo ʻa-lay-haa? Q̣ul lil-laa-hil- Mash-ri-q̣u wal-mag̣h-rib: yah-dee mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu ʹi-laa Ṣi-raa-ṭim- Mus-ta-q̣eem.

2:143.text: Wa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka ja-ʻal-naa-kum ʹUm-ma-tañw- Wa-ṣa-tal- li-ta-koo-noo Shu-ha-daa-ʹa ʻa-lan- naa-si wa-ya-koo-nar- Ra-soo-lu ʻa-lay-kum Sha-hee-daa. Wa-maa ja-ʻal-nal- Q̣ib-la-tal- la-tee kuñ-ta ʻa-lay-haaa ʹil-laa li-naʻ-la-ma mañy- yat-ta-bi-ʻur- Ra-soo-la mim-mañy- yañ-q̣a-li-bu ʻa-laa ʻa-q̣i-bayh. Wa-ʹiñ- kaa-nat la-ka-bee-ra-tan ʹil-laa ʻa-lal- la-ẓee-na ha-dal- laah. Wa-maa Kaa-nal- laa-hu li-yu-ḍee-ʻa ʹee-maa-na-kum. ʹIn-nal- laa-ha bin-naa-si la-Ra-ʹoo-fur- Ra-ḥeem.

2:144.text: Q̣ad na-raa ta-q̣al-lu-ba waj-hi-ka fis- sa-maaaʹie:  fa-la-nu-wal-li-yan-na-ka Q̣ib-la-tañ- tar-ḍaa-haa. Fa-wal-li waj-ha-ka shaṭ-ral- Mas-ji-dil- Ḥa-raam. Wa-ḥay-s̤u maa- kuñ-tum fa-wal-loo wu-joo-ha-kum shaṭ-rah. Wa-ʹin-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹoo-tul- Ki-taa-ba la-yaʻ-la-moo-na ʹan-na-hul- ḥaq̣-q̣u mir- Rab-bi-him. Wa-mal- laa-hu bi-g̣aa-fi-lin ʻam-maa yaʻ-ma-loon.

2:145.text: Wa-la-ʹin ʹa-tay-tal- la-ẓee-na ʹoo-tul- Ki-taa-ba bi-kul-li ʹAa-ya-tim- maa ta-bi-ʻoo Q̣ib-la-tak; wa-maaaʹ añ-ta bi-taa-bi-ʻin- Q̣ib-la-ta-hum; wa-maa baʻ-ḍu-hum̃- bi-taa-bi-ʻiñ- Q̣ib-la-ta baʻḍ. Wa-la-ʹi-nit- ta-baʻ-ta ʹah-waaa-ʹa-hum mim- baʻ-di maa- jaaa-ʹa-ka mi-nal- ʻil-mi ʹin-na-ka ʹi-ḍal- la-mi-naz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen.

2:146.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-tay-naa-hu-mul- ki-taa-ba yaʻ-ri-foo-na-hoo ka-maa yaʹ-ri-foo-na ʹab-naa-ʹa-hum: wa-ʹin-na fa-ree-q̣am- min-hum la-yak-tu-moo-nal- Ḥaq̣-q̣a wa-hum yaʻ-la-moon.

2:147.text: ʹAl-Ḥaq̣-q̣u mir- Rab-bi-ka fa-laa ta-koo-nan-na mi-nal- mum-ta-reen.

2:148.text: Wa-li-kul-liñw- wij-ha-tun hu-wa mu-wal-lee-haa fas-ta-bi-q̣ul- khay-raat. ʹAy-na maa- ta-koo-noo yaʹ-ti bi-ku-mul- laa-hu Ja-mee-ʻaa. ʹIn-nal- laa-ha ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Q̣a-deer.

2:149.text: Wa-min ḥay-s̤u kha-raj-ta fa-wal-li waj-ha-ka shaṭ-ral- Mas-ji-dil- Ḥa-raam; wa-ʹin-na-hoo lal-ḥaq̣-q̣u mir- rab-bik. Wa-mal- laa-hu bi-g̣aa-fi-lin ʻam-maa taʻ-ma-loon.

2:150.text: Wa-min ḥay-s̤u kha-raj-ta fa-wal-li waj-ha-ka shaṭ-ral- Mas-ji-dil- ha-raam; wa-ḥay-s̤u maa- kuntum fa-wal-loo Wu-joo-ha-kum shaṭ-ra-hoo li-ʹal-laa ya-koo-na lin-naa-si ʻa-lay-kum huj-ja-tun ʹil-lal- la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-moo min-hum; fa-laaa takh-shaw-hum wakh-shaw-nee; wa-li-ʹu-tim-ma niʻ-ma-tee ʻa-lay-kum Wa-la-ʻal-la-kum tah-ta-doon.

2:151.text: Ka-maaa ʹar-sal-naa fee-kum Ra-soo-lam- miñ-kum yat-loo ʻa-lay-kum ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa wa-yu-zak-ki-kum wa-yu-ʻal-li-mu-ku-mul- Ki-taa-ba wal-Ḥik-ma-ta wa-yu-ʻAl-li-mu-kum- maa lam ta-koo-noo taʻ-la-moon.

2:152.text: Faẓ-ku-roo-neee ʹaẓ-kur-kum wash-ku-roo lee wa-laa tak-fu-roon.

2:153.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nus- ta-ʻee-noo biṣ-Ṣab-ri was-Ṣa-laah; ʹIn-nal- laa-ha ma-ʻaṣ- ṣaa-breeen.

2:154.text: Wa-laa ta-q̣oo-loo li-mañy- yuq̣-ta-lu fee Sa-bee-lil- laa-hi ʹam-waat. Bal ʹaḥ-yaaa-ʹuñw- Wa- laa-kil- laa tash-ʻuroon

2:155.text: Wa-la-nab-lu-wan-na-kum̃ bi-shay-ʹim- mi-nal- khaw-fi wal-joo-ʻi wa-naq̣-ṣim- mi-nal- ʹam-waa-li wal-ʹañ-fusi was̤-s̤a-ma-raat: wa-bash-shi-ris̤- S̤aa-bi-reen,

2:156.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na ʹi-ẓaaa ʹa-ṣaa-bat-hum- mu-ṣee-ba-tuñ q̣a-looo ʹin-naa lil-laa-hi wa-ʹin-naaa ʹi-lay-hi raa-ji-ʻoon.

2:157.text: ʹU-laaa-ʻi-ka ʻa-lay-him ṣa-la-waa-tum- mir- Rab-bi-him wa-raḥ-mah: wa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- Muh-ta-doon.

2:158.text: ʹIn-naṣ- S̤a-faa wal-Mar-wa-ta miñ- Sha-ʻaa-ʹi-ril- laah. Fa-man ḥaj-jal- Bay-ta ʹa-wiʻ- ta-ma-ra fa-laa Ju-naa-ḥa ʻa-lay-hi ʻany- yaṭ-ṭaw-wa-fa bi-hi-maa. Wa-mañ- ta-ṭaw-wa-ʻa khay-rañ fa-ʹin-nal- la-ha Shaa-ki-run ʻA-leem.

2:159.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na yak-tu-moo-na maaa ʹañ-zal-naa mi-nal- bay-yi-naa-ti wal-hu-daa mim- ba-ʻdi maa- bay-yan-naa-hu lin-naa-si fil- Ki-taa-bi ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka yal-ʻa-nu-hu-mul- laa-hu wa-yal-ʻa-nu-hu-mul- laa-ʻi-noon,

2:160.text: ʹIl-lal- la-ẓee-na taa-boo wa-ʹaṣ-la-ḥoo wa-bay-ya-noo fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka ʹa-too-bu ʻa-lay-him; wa-ʹA-nat- Taw-waa-bur- Ra-ḥeem.

2:161.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo wa-maa-too wa-hum kuf-faa-run ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka ʻa-lay-him laʻ-na-tul- laa-hi wal-ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-ti wan-naa-si ʹaj-ma-ʻeen,

2:162.text: Khaa-li-dee-na fee-haa: laa- yu-khaf-fa-fu ʻan-hu-mul- ʻa-ẓaa-bu wa-laa hum yuñ-z̤̣a-roon.

2:163.text: Wa-ʹI-laa-hu-kum I-laa-huñw- Waa-ḥid: Laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa Hu-war- Raḥ-maa-nur- Ra-ḥeem.

2:164.text: ʹIn-na fee khal-q̣is- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi Wakh-ti-laa-fil- lay-li wan-na-haa-ri wal-ful-kil- la-tee taj-ree fil- baḥ-ri bi-maa yañ-fa-ʻun- naa-sa wa-maaa ʻañ-za-lal- aa-hu mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi mim- maaa-ʹiñ- fa-ʹaḥ-yaa bi-hil- ʹar-ẓa baʻ-da maw-ti-haa wa-bas̤-s̤a fee-haa miñ kul-li daab-bah: wa-taṣ-ree-fir- ri-yaa-ḥi was-sa-ḥaa-bil- mu-sakh-kha-ri bay-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi wal-ʹar-ḍi la-ʹAa-yaa-til- li-q̣aw-miñy- yaʻ-q̣i-loon.

2:165.text: Wa-mi-nan- naa-si mañy- yat-ta-khi-ẓu miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi ʹañ-daa-dañy- yu-ḥib-boo-na-hum ka-ḥub-bil- laah. Wal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nooo ʹa-shad-du ḥub-bal- lil-laah. Wa-law ya-ral- la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-mooo ʹiẓ ya-raw-nal- ʻa-ẓaa-ba ʹan-nal- Q̣uw-wa-ta lil-laa-hi ja-mee-ʻañw- waʹan-nal- laa-ha Sha-dee-dul- ʻa-ẓaab.

2:166.text: ʹIẓ ta-bar-ra-ʹal- la-ẓee-nat- tu-bi-ʻoo mi-nal- la-ẓee-nat- ta-ba-ʻoo wa-ra-ʹa-wul- ʻa-ẓaa-ba wa-ta-q̣aṭ-ṭa-ʻat bi-hi-mul- ʹas-baab.

2:167.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-nat- ta-ba-ʻoo law ʹan-na la-naa kar-ra-tañ- fa-na-ta-bar-ra-ʹa min-hum ka-maa ta-bar-ra-ʹoo min-naa. Ka-ẓaa-li-ka yu-ree-hi-mul- laa-hu ʹaʻ-maa-la-hum ḥa-sa-raa-tin ʻa-lay-him. Wa-maa hum̃- bi-khaa-ri-jee-na mi-nan- Naar.

2:168.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-han- naa-su ku-loo mim-maa fil- ʹar-ḍi Ḥa-laa-lañ- ṭay-yi-baa; wa-laa tat-ta-bi-ʻoo Khu-ṭu-waa-tish- Shay-ṭaan. ʹIn-na-hoo la-kum ʻa-duw-wum- mu-been.

2:169.text: ʹIn-na-maa yaʹ-mu-ru-kum̃ bis-sooo-ʹi wal-faḥ-shaaa-ʹi wa-ʹañ- ta-q̣oo-loo ʻa-lal- laa-hi maa- laa- taʻ-la-moon.

2:170.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa q̣ee-la la-hu-mut- ta-bi-ʻoo maaa ʹañ-za-lal- laa-hu q̣aa-loo bal nat-ta-bi-ʻu maaa ʹal-fay-naa ʻa-lay-hi ʹaa-baaa-ʹa-naa. ʹA-wa-law kaa-na ʹaa-baaa-ʹu-hum laa- yaʻ-q̣i-loo-na shay-ʹañw- wa-laa- yah-ta-doon?

2:171.text: Wa-ma-s̤a-lul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo ka-ma-s̤a-lil- la-ẓee yan-ʻi-q̣u bi-maa laa- yas-ma-ʻu ʹil-laa du-ʻaaa-ʹañw- wa-ni-daaa-ʹaa. S̤um-mum̃- buk-mun ʻum-yuñ- fa-hum laa- yaʻ-q̣i-loon.

2:172.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo ku-loo miñ- ṭay-yi-baa-ti maa- ra-zaq̣-naa-kum wash-ku-roo lil-la-hi ʹiñ- kuñ-tum ʹiy-yaa-hu taʻ-bu-doon.

2:173.text: ʹIn-na-maa ḥar-ra-ma ʻa-lay-ku-mul- may-ta-ta wad-da-ma wa-laḥ-mal- khiñ-zee-ri wa-maaa ʹu-hil-la bi-hee li-g̣ay-ril- laah. Fa-ma-niḍ- ṭur-ra g̣ay-ra baa-g̣iñw- wa-laa- ʻaa-diñ- fa-laaa ʹis̤-ma ʻa-layh. ʹIn-nal- laa-ha G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

2:174.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓeee-na yak-tu-moo-na maaa ʹañ-za-lal- laa-hu mi-nal- Ki-taa-bi wa-yash-ta-roo-na bi-hee s̤a-ma-nañ- q̣a-lee-lan ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka maa- yaʹ-ku-loo-na fee bu-ṭoo-ni-him il-lan- Naa-ra wa-laa yu-kal-li-mu-hu-mul- laa-hu Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti wa-laa yu-zak-kee-him wa-la-hum ʻa-ẓaa-bun ʹa-leem.

2:175.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-kal- la-zee-nash- ta-ra-wuḍ- ḍa-laa-la-ta bil-hu-daa wal-ʻa-ẓaa-ba bil-mag̣-fi-rah. Fa-maaa ʹaṣ-ba-ra-hum ʻa-lan- Naar!

2:176.text: Ẓaa-li-ka bi-ʹan-nal- laa-ha naz-za-lal- Ki-ta-ba bil-Ḥaq̣q̣. Wa-ʹin-nal- la-ẓee-nakh- ta-la-foo fil- Ki-taa-bi la-fee shi-q̣aa-q̣im- ba-ʻeed.

2:177.text: Lay-sal- bi-rra ʹañ- tu-wal-loo wu-joo-ha-kum q̣i-ba-lal- Mash-ri-q̣i wal-Mag̣-ri-bi wa-laa-kin-nal- bir-ra man ʹaa-ma-na bil-laa-hi wal-Yaw-mil- ʹAa-khi-ri wal-ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-ti wal-Ki-taa-bi wan-na-biy-yeen: wa-ʹaa-tal- maa-la ʻa-laa ḥub-bi-hee ẓa-wil- q̣ur-baa wal-ya-taa-maa wal-ma-saa-kee-na wab-nas- sa-bee-li was-saaa-ʹi-lee-na wa-fir- ri-q̣aab: wa-ʹa-q̣aa-maṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta wa-ʹaa-taz- Za-kaah; wal-moo-foo-na bi-ʻah-di-him i-ẓaa ʻaa-ha-doo; waṣ-Ṣaa-bi-ree-na fil- baʹ-saaa-ʹi waḍ-ḍar-raaa-ʹi wa-ḥee-nal- baʹas. ʹU-laaa-ʹi-kal- la-ẓee-na ṣa-da-q̣oo: wa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- Mut-ta-q̣oon.

2:178.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo ku-ti-ba ʻa-lay-ku-mul- Q̣i-ṣaa-ṣu fil- q̣at-laa: ʹal-ḥur-ru bil-ḥur-ri wal-ʻab-du bil-ʻab-di wal-ʹuñ-s̤aa bil-ʹuñ-s̤aa. Fa-man ʻu-fi-ya la-hoo min ʹa-khee-hi shay-ʹuñ- fat-ti-baa-ʻum- bil-maʻ-roo-fi wa-ʹa-daaa-ʹun ʹi-lay-hi bi-ʹiḥ-saan. Ẓaa-li-ka takh-fee-fum- mir- Rab-bi-kum wa-raḥ-mah. Fa-ma-niʻ- ta-daa baʻ-da ẓaa-li-ka fa-la-hoo ʻa-ẓaa-bun ʹa-leem.

2:179.text: Wa-la-kum fil- Q̣i-ṣaa-ṣi Ḥa-yaa-tuñy- yaaa-ʹu-lil- ʹal-baa-bi la-ʻal-la-kum tat-ta-q̣oon.

2:180.text: Ku-ti-ba ʻa-lay-kum ʹi-ẓaa ḥa-ḍa-ra ʹa-ḥa-da-ku-mul- maw-tu ʹiñ- ta-ra-ka khay-ra-nil- wa-ṣiy-ya-tu lil-waa-li-day-ni wal-ʹaq̣-ra-bee-na bil-maʻ-roof; ḥaq̣-q̣an ʻa-lal- Mut-ta-q̣een.

2:181.text: Fa-mam- bad-da-la-hoo baʻ-da-maa- sa-mi-ʻa-hoo fa-ʹin-na-maaa ʹis̤-mu-hoo ʻa-lal- la-ẓee-na yu-bad-di-loo-nah. ʹIn-nal- laa-ha Sa-mee-ʻun ʻA-leem.

2:182.text: Fa-man khaa-fa mim- moo-ṣiñ- ja-na-fan ʹaw ʹis̤-mañ- fa-ʹaṣ-la-ḥa bay-na-hum fa-laaa ʹis̤-ma ʻa-layh: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

2:183.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo ku-ti-ba ʻa-lay-ku-muṣ- Ṣi-yaa-mu ka-maa ku-ti-ba ʻa-lal- la-ẓee-na miñ- q̣ab-li-kum la-ʻal-la-kum tat-ta-q̣oon.

2:184.text: ʹAy-yaa-mam- maʻ-doo-daat; fa-mañ- kaa-na miñ-kum- ma-ree-ḍan ʹaw ʻa-laa sa-fa-riñ fa-ʻid-da-tum- min ʹay-yaa-min ʹu-khar. Wa-ʻa-lal- la-ẓee-na yu-ṭee-q̣oo-na-hoo fid-ya-tuñ ṭa-ʻaa-mu mis-keen. Fa-mañ- ta-ṭaw-wa-ʻa khay-rañ fa-hu-wa khay-rul- lah. Wa-ʹañ- ta-ṣoo-moo khay-rul- la-kum ʹiñ- Kuñ-tum taʻ-la-moon.

2:185.text: Shah-ru Ra-ma-ḍaa-nal- la-ẓeee ʹuñ-zi-la fee-hil- Q̣ur-ʹaa-nu hu-dal- lin-naa-si wa-bay-yi-naa-tim- mi-nal- hu-daa wal-fur-q̣aan. Fa-mañ- sha-hi-da miñ-ku-mush- Shah-ra fal-ya-ṣumh. Wa-mañ- kaa-na ma-ree-ḍan ʹaw ʻa-laa sa-fa-riñ fa-ʻid-da-tum- min ʹay-yaa-min ʹu-khar. Yu-ree-dul- laa-hu bi-ku-mul- yus-ra wa-laa yu-ree-du bi-ku-mul- ʻusr. Wa-li-tuk-mi-lul- ʻid-da-ta wa-li-tu-kab-bi-rul- laa-ha ʻa-laa maa- ha-daa-kum wa-la-ʻal-la-kum tash-ku-roon.

2:186.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa sa-ʹa-la-ka ʻi-baa-dee ʻan-nee fa-ʹin-nee Q̣a-reeb: ʹu-jee-bu daʻ-wa-tad- daa-ʻi ʹi-ẓaa da-ʻaa-ni fal-yas-ta-jee-boo lee wal-yuʹ-mi-noo bee la-ʻal-la-hum yar-shu-doon.

2:187.text: ʹU-ḥil-la la-kum lay-la-taṣ- Ṣi-yaa-mir- ra-fa-s̤u ʹi-laa ni-saaa-ʹi-kum. Hun-na li-baa-sul- la-kum wa-ʹañ-tum li-baa-sul- la-hunn. ʻA-li-mal- laa-hu ʹan-naa-kum kuñ-tum takh-taa-noo-na ʹañ-fu-sa-kum fa-taa-ba ʻa-lay-kum wa-ʻa-faa ʻañ-kum; fal-ʹaa-na baa-shi-roo-hun-na wab-ta-g̣oo maa- ka-ta-bal- laa-hu la-kum, wa-ku-loo wash-ra-boo ḥat-taa ya-ta-bay-ya-na la-ku-mul- khay-ṭul- ʹab-ya-ḍu mi-nal- khay-ṭil- ʹas-wa-di mi-nal- Fajr. S̤um-ma ʹa-tim-muṣ- ṣi-yaa-ma ʹi-lal- layl; wa-laa tu-baa-shi-roo-hun-na wa-ʹañ-tum ʻaa-ki-foo-na fil- ma-saa-jid. Til-ka ḥu-doo-dul- laa-hi fa-laa taq̣-ra-boo-haa. Ka-ẓaa-li-ka yu-bay-yi-nul- laa-hu ʹAa-yaa-ti-hee lin-naa-si la-ʻal-laa-hum yat-ta-q̣oon.

2:188.text: Wa-laa taʹ-ku-looo ʹam-waa-la-kum̃- bay-na-kum̃- bil-baa-ṭi-li wa-tud-loo bi-haaa ʹi-lal- ḥuk-kaa-mi li-taʹ-ku-loo fa-ree-q̣am- min ʹam-waa-lin- naa-si bil-ʹis̤-mi wa-ʹañ-tum taʻ-la-moon.

2:189.text: Yas-ʹa-loo-na-ka ʻa-nil- ʹAhil-lah. Q̣ul hi-ya ma-waa-q̣ee-tu lin-naa-si wal-Ḥajj. Wa-lay-sal- bir-ru bi-ʹañ taʹ-tul- bu-yoo-ta miñ- z̤̣u-hoo-ri-haa wa-laa-kin-nal- bir-ra ma-nit- ta-q̣aa. Waʹ-tul- bu-yoo-ta min- ʹab-waa-bi-haa wat-ta-q̣ul- laa-ha la-ʻal-la-kum tuf-li-ḥoon.

2:190.text: Wa-q̣aa-ti-loo fee sa-bee-lil- laa-hil- la-ẓee-na yu-q̣aa-ti-loo-na-kum wa-laa taʻ-ta-doo; ʹin-nal- laa-ha laa- yu-ḥib-bul- muʻ-ta-deen.

2:191.text: Waq̣-tu-loo-hum ḥay-s̤u s̤a-q̣if-tu-moo-hum wa-ʹakh-ri-joo-hum- min ḥay-s̤u ʹakh-ra-joo-kum wal-fit-na-tu ʹa-shad-du mi-nal- q̣atl. Wa-laa tu-q̣aa-ti-loo-hum ʻiñ-dal- Mas-ji-dil- Ḥa-raa-mi ḥat-taa yu-q̣aa-ti-loo-kum feeh; fa-ʹiñ- q̣aa-ta-loo-kum faq̣-tu-loo-hum. Ka-ẓaa-li-ka ja-zaaa-ʹul- kaa-fi-reen.

2:192.text: Fa-ʹi-niñ- ta-haw fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

2:193.text: Wa-q̣aa-ti-loo-hum ḥat-taa laa- ta-koo-na fit-na-tuñw- wa-ya-koo-nad- Dee-nu lil-laah; fa-ʹi-niñ- ta-haw fa-laa ʻud-waa-na ʹil-laa ʻa-laz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen.

2:194.text: ʹAsh-Shah-rul- Ḥa-raa-mu bish-Shah-ril- Ḥa-raa-mi wal-ḥu-ru-maa-tu q̣i-ṣaaṣ. Fa-ma-niʻ- ta-daa ʻa-lay-kum faʻ-ta-doo ʻa-lay-hi bi-mis̤-li maʻ- ta-daa ʻa-lay-kum. Wat-ta-q̣ul- laa-ha waʻ-la-mooo ʹan-nal- laa-ha ma-ʻal- Mut-ta-q̣een.

2:195.text: Wa-ʻañ-fi-q̣oo fee sa-bee-lil- laa-hi wa-laa tul-q̣oo bi-ʹay-dee-kum ʹi-lat- tah-lu-kah. Wa-ʹaḥ-si-nooo ʹin-nal- laa-ha yu-ḥib-bul- Muḥ-si-neen.

2:196.text: Wa-ʹa-tim-mul Ḥaj-ja wal-ʻum-ra-ta lil-laah. Fa-ʹin ʹuḥ-ṣir-tum fa-mas- tay-sa-ra mi-nal- had-yi, wa-laa taḥ-li-q̣oo ru-ʹoo-sa-kum ḥat-tan yab-lu-g̣al- had-yu ma-ḥil-lah. Fa-mañ kaa-na miñ-kum- ma-ree-ḍan ʹaw bi-heee ʹa-ẓam- mir- raʹ-si-hee fa-fid-ya-tum- miñ- ṣi-yaa-min ʹaw ṣa-da-q̣a-tin ʹaw nu-suk. Fa-ʹi-ẓaaa ʹa-miñ-tum, fa-mañ- ta-mat-ta-ʻa bil-Um-ra-ti ʹi-lal- Ḥaj-ji fa-mas- tay-sa-ra mi-nal- had-yi. Fa-mal- lam ya-jid fa-ṣi-yaa-mu s̤a-laa-s̤a-ti ʹay-yaa-miñ- fil- Ḥaj-ji wa-sab-ʻa-tin ʹi-ẓaa ra-jaʻ-tum. Til-ka ʹa-sha-ra-tuñ- kaa-mi-lah. Ẓaa-li-ka li-mal- lam ya-kun ʹah-lu-hoo ḥaa-ḍi-ril- Mas-ji-dil- Ḥa-raam. Wat-ta-q̣ul- laa-ha waʻ-la-mooo ʹan-nal- laa-ha Sha-dee-dul- ʻi-q̣aab.

2:197.text: ʹAl-Ḥaj-ju ʹash-hu-rum- maʻ-loo-maat. Fa-mañ- fa-ra-ḍa fee-hin-nal- Ḥaj-ja fa-laa ra-fa-s̤a wa-laa fu-soo-q̣a wa-laa ji-daa-la fil- Ḥajj. Wa-maa taf-ʻa-loo min khay-riñy- yaʻ-lam-hul- laah. Wa-ta-zaw-wa-doo fa-ʹin-na khay-raz- zaa-dit- taq̣-waa. Wat-ta-q̣oo-ni yaaa-ʹu-lil- ʹal-baab.

2:198.text: Lay-sa ʻa-lay-kum ju-naa-ḥun ʹañ- tab-ta-g̣oo faḍ-lam- mir- Rab-bi-kum. Fa-ʹi-ẓaaa ʹa-faḍ-tum- min ʻA-ra-faa-tiñ- faẓ-ku-rul- laa-ha ʻiñ-dal- Mash-ʻa-ril- Ḥa-raam. Waẓ-ku-roo-hu ka-maa ha-daa-kum. wa-ʹiñ- kuñ-tum- miñ q̣ab-li-hee la-mi-naḍ- ḍaaal-leeen.

2:199.text: S̤um-ma ʹa-fee-ḍoo min ḥay-s̤u ʹa-faa-ḍan- naa-su was-tag̣-fi-rul- laah. ʹIn-nal- laa-ha G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

2:200.text: Fa-ʹi-ẓaa q̣a-day-tum- ma-naa-si-ka-kum faẓ-ku-rul- laa-ha ka-zik-ri-kum, ʹaa-baaa-ʹa-kum ʹaw ʹa-shad-da ẓik-raa. Fa-mi-nan- naa-si mañy- ya-q̣oo-lu Rab-ba-naaa ʹaa-ti-naa fid- dun-yaa wa-maa la-hoo fil- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti min kha-laaq̣.

2:201.text: Wa-min-hum- mañy- ya-q̣oo-lu Ra-ba-naaa ʹaa-ti-naa fid- dun-yaa ḥa-sa-na-tañw- wa-fil- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti ḥa-sa-na-tañw- wa-q̣i-naa ʻa-ẓaa-ban- Naar.

2:202.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka la-hum na-ṣee-bum- mim-maa ka-sa-boo: wal-laa-hu Sa-ree-ʻul- ḥi-saab.

2:203.text: Waẓ-ku-rul- laa-ha feee ʹay-yaa-mim-  maʻ-doo-daat. Fa-mañ- ta-ʻaj-ja-la fee yaw-may-ni fa-laaa ʹis̤-ma ʻa-layh. Wa-mañ- ta-ʹakh-kha-ra fa-laaa ʹis̤-ma ʻa-lay-hi li-ma-nit- ta-q̣aa. Wat-ta-q̣ul- laa-ha waʻ-la-mooo ʹan-na-kum ʹi-lay-hi tuḥ-sha-roon.

2:204.text: Wa-mi-nan- naa-si mañy- yuʻ-ji-bu-ka q̣aw-lu-hoo fil- ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa wa-yush-hi-dul- laa-ha ʻa-laa maa- fee q̣al-bi-hee wa-hu-wa ʹa-lad-dul- khi-s̤aam.

2:205.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa ta-wal-laa sa-ʻaa fil- ʹar-ḍi li-yuf-si-da fi-haa wa-yuh-li-kal- ḥar-s̤a wan-nasl. Wal-laa-hu laa- yu-ḥib-bul- fa-saad.

2:206.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa q̣ee-la la-hut- ta-q̣il- laa-ha ʹa-kha-ẓat-hul- ʻiz-za-tu bil-ʹis̤-mi fa-ḥas-bu-hoo Ja-han-nam; wa-la-biʹ-sal- mi-haad!

2:207.text: Wa-mi-nan- naa-si mañy- yash-ree naf-sa-hub- ti-g̣aaa-ʹa Mar-ḍaa-til- laah: wal-laa-hu Ra-ʹoo-fum- bil-ʻi-baad.

2:208.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nud- khu-loo fis- Sil-mi kaaaf-fah; wa-laa tat-ta-bi-ʻoo khu-ṭu-waa-tish- Shay-taan. ʹIn-na-hoo la-kum ʻa-duw-wum- mu-been.

2:209.text: Fa-ʹiñ za-lal-tum- mim- baʻ-di maa- jaaa-ʹat-ku-mul- Bay-yi-naa-tu faʻ-la-mooo ʹan-nal- laa-ha ʻA-zee-zun- Ḥa-keem.

2:210.text: Hal yañ-z̤̣u-roo-na ʹil-laaa ʹañy- yaʹ-ti-ya-hu-mul- laa-hu fee z̤̣u-la-lim- mi-nal- g̣a-maa-mi wal-ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tu wa-q̣u-ḍi-yal- ʹamr? Wa-ʹi-lal- laa-hi tur-ja-ʻul- ʹu-moor.

2:211.text: Sal Ba-neee- ʹIs-raaa-ʹee-la kam ʹaa-tay-naa-hum- min ʹAa-ya-tim- bay-yi-nah. Wa-mañy- yu-bad-dil niʻ-ma-tal laa-hi mim- baʻ-di maa- jaaa-ʹat-hu fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha Sha-dee-dul- ʻi-q̣aab.

2:212.text: Zuy-yi-na lil-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-rul- ḥa-yaa-tud- dun-yaa wa-yas-kha-roo-na mi-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo. Wal-la-ẓee-nat- ta-q̣aw faw-q̣a-hum Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-mah. Wal-laa-hu yar-zu-q̣u mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu bi-g̣ay-ri ḥi-saab.

2:213.text: Kaa-nan- naa-su ʹum-ma-tañw- waa-ḥi-dah; fa-ba-ʻa-s̤al- laa-hun- na-biy-yee-na Mu-bash-shi-ree-na wa-Muñ-ẓi-reen: wa-ʹañ-zala ma-ʻa-hu-mul- Ki-taa-ba bil-ḥaq̣-q̣i- li-yaḥ-ku-ma bay-nan- naa-si fee-makh- ta-la-fooo feeh. Wa-makh- ta-la-fa fee-hi ʹil-lal- la-ẓee-na ʹoo-too-hu mim- baʻ-di maa- jaaa-ʹat-hu-mul- bay-yi-naa-tu bag̣-yam- bay-na-hum. Fa-ha-dal- la-hul- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo li-makh- ta-la-foo fee-hi mi-nal- Ḥaq̣-q̣i bi-ʹiẓ-nih. Wal-laa-hu yah-dee mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu ʹi-laa Ṣi-raa-ṭim- Mus-ta-q̣eem.

2:214.text: ʹAm ḥa-sib-tum ʹañ- tad-khu-lul- Jan-na-ta wa-lam-maa yaʹ-ti-kum- ma-s̤a-lul- la-ẓee-na kha-law miñ- q̣ab-li-kum? Mas-sat-hu-mul- baʹ-saaa-ʹu waḍ-ḍar-raaa-ʹu wa-zul-zi-loo ḥat-taa ya-q̣oo-lar- Ra-soo-lu wal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo ma-ʻa-hoo ma-taa naṣ-rul- laah? ʹA-laaa ʹin-na naṣ-ral- laa-hi q̣a-reeb!

2:215.text: Yas-ʹa-loo-na-ka maa-ẓaa yuñ-fi-q̣oon. Q̣ul maaa ʹañ-faq̣-tum- min khay-riñ- fa-lil-waa-li-day-ni wal-ʹaq̣-ra-bee-na wal-ya-taa-maa wal-ma-saa-kee-ni wab-nis- sa-beel. Wa-maa taf-ʻa-loo min khay-riñ- fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha bi-hee ʻA-leem.

2:216.text: Ku-ti-ba ʻa-lay-ku-mul- q̣i-taa-lu wa-hu-wa kur-hul- la-kum. Wa-ʻa-saaa ʹañ- tak-ra-hoo shay-ʹañw- wa-hu-wa khay-rul- la-kum. Wa-ʻa-saaa ʹañ- tu-ḥib-boo shay-ʹañw- wa-hu-wa shar-rul- la-kum. Wal-laa-hu yaʻ-la-mu wa-ʹañ-tum laa- taʻ-la-moon.

2:217.text: Yas-ʹa-loo-na-ka ʻa-nish- shah-ril- Ḥa-raa-mi q̣i-taa-liñ- feeh. Q̣ul q̣i-taa-luñ- fee-hi ka-beer. Wa-ṣad-dun ʻañ- sa-bee-lil- laa-hi wa-kuf-rum- bi-hee wal-Mas-ji-dil- Ḥa-raa-mi wa-ʹikh-raa-ju ʹah-li-hee min-hu ʹak-ba-ru ʻiñ-dal- laah. Wal-fit-na-tu ʹak-ba-ru mi-nal- q̣atl. Wa-laa ya-zaa-loo-na yu-q̣aa-ti-loo-na-kum ḥat-taa ya-rud-doo-kum ʻañ- Dee-ni-kum ʹi-nis- taṭaa-ʻoo. Wa-mañy- yar-ta-did miñ-kum ʻañ- Dee-ni-hee fa-ya-mut wa-hu-wa kaa-fi-ruñ- fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka ḥa-bi-ṭat ʹaʻ-maa-lu-hum fid- dun-yaa wal-ʹAa-khi-rah. Wa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bun- Naa-ri hum fee-haa khaa-li-doon.

2:218.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wal-laẓee-na haa-ja-roo wa-jaa-ha-doo fee Sa-bee-lil- laa-hi ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka yar-joo-na Raḥ-ma-tal- laah: wal-laa-hu G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

2:219.text: Yas-ʹa-loo-na-ka ʻa-nil- kham-ri wal-may-sir. Q̣ul fee-hi-maaa ʹis̤-muñ- ka-bee-ruñw- wa-ma-naa-fi-ʻu lin-naas: Wa-ʹis̤-mu-hu-maaa ʹak-ba-ru min- naf-ʻi-hi-maa. Wa-Yas-ʹa-loo-na-ka maa-ẓaa yuñ-fi-q̣oon. Q̣u-lil- ʻafw. Ka-ẓaa-li-ka yu-bay-yi-nul- laa-hu la-ku-mul- ʹaa-yaa-ti la-ʻal-la-kum ta-ta-fak-ka-roon

2:220.text: Fid- dun-yaa wal-ʹAa-khi-rah. Wa-yas-ʹa-loo-na-ka ʻa-nil- ya-taa-maa. Q̣ul ʹiṣ-laa-ḥul- la-hum khayr. Wa-ʹiñ- tu-khaa-li-ṭoo-hum fa-ʹikh-waa-nu-kum. Wal-laa-hu yaʻ-la-mul- muf-si-da mi-nal- muṣ-liḥ. Wa-law shaaa-ʹal- laa-hu la-ʹaʻ-na-ta-kum: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha ʻA-zee-zun Ḥa-keem.

2:221.text: Wa-laa tañ-ki-ḥul- mush-ri-kaa-ti ḥat-taa yuʹ-minn: wa-la-ʹa-ma-tum- muʹ-mi-na-tun khay-rum- mim- mush-ri-ka-tiñw- wa-law ʹaʻ-ja-bat-kum. Wa-laa tuñ-ki-ḥul- mush-ri-kee-na ḥat-taa yuʹ-mi-noo: wa-la-ʻab-dum- muʹ-mi-nun khay-rum- mim- mush-ri-kiñw- wa- law ʹaʻ-ja-ba-kum. ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka yad-ʻoo-na ʹi-lan- Naar. Wal-laa-hu yad-ʻoo ʹi-lal- Jan-na-ti wal-mag̣-fi-ra-ti bi-ʹiẓ-nih, wa-yu-bay-yi-nu ʹaa-yaa-ti-hee lin-naa-si la-ʻal-la-hum ya-ta-ẓak-ka-roon.

2:222.text: Wa-yas-ʹa-loo-na-ka ʻa-nil- ma-ḥeeḍ. Q̣ul hu-wa ʹa-ẓañ- faʻ-ta-zi-lun- ni-saaa-ʹa fil- ma-ḥee-ḍi wa-laa taq̣-ra-boo-hun-na ḥat-taa yaṭ-hurn. Fa-ʹi-ẓaa ta-ṭah-har-na faʹ-too-hun-na min ḥay-s̤u ʹa-ma-ra-ku-mul- laah. ʹIn-nal- laa-ha yu-ḥib-but- Taw-waa-bee-na wa-yu-ḥib-bul- Mu-ta-ṭah-hi-reen.

2:223.text: Ni-saaa-ʹu-kum ḥar-s̤ul- la-kum: faʹ-too ḥar-s̤a-kum ʹan-naa shiʹ-tum; wa-q̣ad-di-moo li-ʹañ-fu-si-kum; wat-ta-q̣ul- laa-ha waʻ-la-mooo ʹan-na-kum- mu-laa-q̣ooh: Wa-bash-shi-ril- Muʹ-mi-neen.

2:224.text: Wa-laa taj-ʻa-lul- laa-ha ʻur-ḍa-tal- li-ʹay-maa-ni-kum ʹañ- ta-bar-roo wa-tat-ta-q̣oo wa-tuṣ-li-ḥoo bay-nan- naas; Wal-laa-hu Sa-mee-ʻun ʻA-leem.

2:225.text: Laa- yu-ʹaa-khi-ẓu-ku-mul- laa-hu bil-lag̣-wi fee  ʹay-maa-ni-kum wa-laa-kiñy- yu-ʹaa-khi-ẓu-kum̃- bi-maa ka-sa-bat q̣u-loo-bu-kum; wal-laa-hu G̣a-foo-run Ḥa-leem.

2:226.text: Lil-la-ẓee-na yuʹ-loo-na min- ni-saaa-ʹi-him ta-rab-bu-ṣu ʹar-ba-ʻa-ti ʹash-hur! fa-ʹiñ- faaa-ʹoo fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

2:227.text: Wa-ʹin ʻa-za-muṭ- ṭa-laa-q̣a fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha Sa-mee-ʻun ʻA-leem.

2:228.text: Wal-mu-ṭal-la-q̣aa-tu ya-ta-rab-baṣ-na bi-ʹañ-fu-si-hin-na s̤a-laa-s̤a-ta q̣u-roooʹ. Wa-laa ya-ḥil-lu la-hun-na ʹañy- yak-tum-na maa- kha-la-q̣al- laa-hu feee ʹar-ḥaa-mi-hin-na ʹiñ- kun-na yuʹ-min-na bil-laa-hi wal-Yaw-mil- ʹAa-khir. Wa-bu-ʻoo-la-tu-hun-na ʹa-ḥaq̣-q̣u bi-rad-di-hin-na fee ẓaa-li-ka ʹin ʹa-raa-dooo ʹiṣ-laa-ḥaa. Wa-la-hun-na mis̤-lul- la-ẓee ʻa-lay-hin-na bil-maʻ-roof: wa-lir-ri-jaa-li ʻa-lay-hin-na da-ra-jah. Wal-laa-hu ʻA-zee-zun Ḥa-keem.

2:229.text: ʹAṭ-ṭa-laa-q̣u mar-ra-taan: fa-ʹim-saa-kum- bi-maʻ-roo-fin ʹaw tas-ree-ḥum- bi-ʹiḥ-saan. Wa-laa ya-ḥil-lu la-kum ʹañ- taʹ-khu-ẓoo mim-maaa ʹaa-tay-tu-moo-hun-na shay-ʹan ʹil-laaa ʹañy- ya-khaa-faaa ʹal-laa yu-q̣ee-maa Ḥu-doo-dal- laah. Fa-ʹin khif-tum ʹal-laa yu-q̣ee-maa Ḥu-doo-dal- laa-hi fa-laa ju-naa-ḥa ʻa-lay-hi-maa fee-maf- ta-dat bih. Til-ka Ḥu-doo-dul- laa-hi fa-laa taʻ-ta-doo-haa. Wa-mañy- ya-ta-ʻad-da Ḥu-doo-dal- laa-hi fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-muz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-moon.

2:230.text: Fa-ʹiñ- ṭal-la-q̣a-haa fa-laa ta-ḥil-lu la-hu mim- baʻ-du ḥat-taa ṭañ-ki-ḥa zaw-jan g̣ay-rah: fa-ʹiñ ṭal-la-q̣a-haa fa-laa ju-naa-ha ʻa-lay-hi-maaa ʹañy- ya-ta-raa-ja-ʻaaa ʹiñ z̤̣an-naaa ʹañy- yu-q̣ee-maa Ḥu-doo-dal- laah. Wa-til-ka Ḥu-doo-dul- laa-hi yu-bay-yi-nu-haa li-q̣aw-miñy- yaʻ-la-moon.

2:231.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa ṭal-laq̣-tu-mun- ni-saaa-ʹa fa-ba-lag̣-na ʹa-ja-la-hun-na fa-ʹam-si-koo-hun-na bi-maʻ-roo-fin ʹaw sar-ri-ḥoo-hun-na bi-maʻ-roof. Wa-laa tum-si-koo-hun-na ḍi-raa-ral- li-taʻ-ta-doo. Wa-mañy- yaf-ʻal- ẓaa-li-ka fa-q̣ad z̤̣a-la-ma naf-sah. Wa-laa tat-ta-khi-ẓooo ʹAa-yaa-til- laa-hi hu-zu-waa, waẓ-ku-roo niʻ-ma-tal- laa-hi ʻa-lay-kum wa-maaa ʹañ-zala ʻa-lay-kum- mi-nal- Ki-taa-bi wal-Ḥik-ma-ti ya-ʻi-Z̤̣u-kum̃-  bih Wat-ta-q̣ul- laa-ha waʻ-la-mooo ʹan-nal- laa-ha bi-kul-li shay-ʹin ʻA-leem.

2:232.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa ṭal-laq̣-tu-mun- ni-saaa-ʹa fa-ba-lag̣-na ʹa-ja-la-hun-na fa-laa taʻ-ḍu-loo-hun-na ʹañy- yañ-kiḥ-na ʹaz-waa-ja-hun-na ʹi-ẓaa ta-raa-ḍaw bay-na-hum̃- bil-maʻ-roof. Ẓaa-li-ka yoo-ʻa-z̤̣u bi-hee mañ- kaa-na miñ-kum yuʹ-mi-nu bil-laa-hi wal-Yaw-mil- ʹAa-khir. Ẓaa-li-kum ʹaz-kaa la-kum wa-ʹaṭ-har. Wal-laa-hu yaʻ-la-mu waʹañ-tum laa- taʻ-la-moon.

2:233.text: Wal-waa-li-daa-tu yur-ḍiʻ-na ʹaw-laa-da-hun-na ḥaw-lay-ni kaa-mi-lay-ni li-man ʹa-raa-da ʹañy- yu-tim-mar- ra-ḍaa-ʻah. Wa-ʻa-lal- maw-loo-di la-hoo riz-q̣u-hun-na wa-kis-wa-tu-hun-na bil-maʻ-roof. Laa- tu-kal-la-fu naf-sun ʹil-laa wus-ʻa-haa. Laa- tu-ḍaaar-ra waa-li-da-tum- bi-wa-la-di-haa wa-laa maw-loo-dul- la-hoo bi-wa-la-di-hee wa-ʻa-lal- waa-ri-s̤i mis̤-lu ẓaa-lik. Fa-ʹin ʹa-raa-daa fi-ṣaa-lan ʻañ- ta-raa-ḍim- min-hu-maa wa-ta-shaa-wu-riñ- fa-laa ju-naa-ḥa ʻa-lay-hi-maa. Wa-ʹin ʹa-rat-tum ʹañ- tas-tar-ḍi-ʻooo ʹaw-laa-da-kum fa-laa ju-naa-ḥa ʻa-lay-kum ʹi-ẓaa sal-lam-tum- maaa ʹaa-tay-tum̃- bil-maʻ-roof. Wat-ta-q̣ul- laa-ha waʻ-la-mooo ʹan-nal- laa-ha bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na Ba-ṣeer.

2:234.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na yu-ta-waf-faw-na miñ-kum-wa- ya-ẓa-roo-na ʹaz-waa-jañy- ya-ta-rab-baṣ-na bi-ʹañ-fu-si-hin-na ʹar-ba-ʻa-ta ʹash-hu-riñw- Wa-ʻash-raa. Fa-ʹi-ẓaa ba-lag̣-na ʹa-ja-la-hun-na fa-laa ju-ña-ḥa ʻa-lay-kum fee-maa fa-ʻal-na feee ʹañ-fu-si-hin-na bil-maʻ-roof. Wal-laa-hu bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na Kha-beer.

2:235.text: Wa-laa ju-naa-ḥa ʻa-lay-kum fi-maa ʻar-raḍ-tum̃- bi-hee min khiṭ-ba-tin- ni-saaa-ʹi ʹaw ʹak-nañ-tum feee ʹañ-fu-si-kum. ʻA-li-mal- laa-hu ʹan-na-kum sa-taẓ-ku-roo-na-hun-na wa-laa-kil- laa tu-waa-ʻi-doo-hun-na sir-ran ʹil-laa ʹan- ta-q̣u-loo q̣aw-lam- maʻ-roo-faa. Wa-laa taʻ-zi-moo ʻuq̣-da-tan- Ni-kaa-ḥi ḥat-taa Yab-lu-g̣al- Ki-taa-bu ʹa-ja-lah. Waʻ-la-mooo ʹan-nal- laa-ha yaʻ-la-mu maa- feee ʹañ-fu-si-kum faḥ-ẓa-rooh; Waʻ-la-mooo ʹan-nal- laa-ha G̣a-foo-run Ḥa-leem.

2:236.text: Laa- ju-naa-ḥa ʻa-lay-kum ʹiñ ṭal-laq̣-tu-mun- ni-saaa-ʹa maa- lam ta-mas-soo-hun-na ʹaw taf-ri-ḍoo la-hun-na fa-ree-ḍah. Wa-mat-ti-ʻoo-hun-na, ʻa-lal- moo-si-ʻi q̣a-da-ru-hoo wa-ʻa-lal- muq̣-ti-ri q̣a-da-ruh. Ma-taa-ʻam- bil-maʻ-roo-fi: Ḥaq̣-q̣an ʻa-lal- Muḥ-si-neen.

2:237.text: Wa-ʹiñ- ṭal-laq̣-tu-moo-hun-na miñ- q̣ab-li ʹañ- ta-mas-soo-hun-na wa-q̣ad fa-raḍ-tum la-hun-na fa-ree-ḍa-tañ- fa-niṣ-fu maa- fa-raḍ-tum ʹil-laaa ʹañy- yaʻ-foo-na ʹaw yaʻ-fu-wal- la-ẓee bi-ya-di-hee ʻuq̣-da-tun- Ni-kaaḥ. Wa-ʹañ taʻ-foo ʹaq̣-ra-bu lit-taq̣-waa. Wa-laa tañ-saw-ul- faḍ-la bay-na-kum. ʹIn-nal- laa-ha bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na Ba-ṣeer.

2:238.text: Ḥaa-fi-z̤̣oo ʻa-laṣ- Ṣa-la-waa-ti waṣ-Ṣa-laa-til- wus-ṭaa; wa-q̣oo-moo lil-laa-hi q̣aa-ni-teen.

2:239.text: Fa-ʹin khif-tum fa-ri-jaa-lan ʹaw ruk-baa-naa. Fa-ʹi-ẓaaa ʹa-miñ-tum faẓ-ku-rul- laa-ha ka-maa ʻal-la-ma-kum- maa lam ta-koo-noo taʻ-la-moon.

2:240.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na yu-ta-waf-faw-na miñ-kum wa-ya-ẓa-roo-na ʹaz-waa-jañw- wa-ṣiy-ya-tal- li-ʹaz-waa-ji-him- ma-taa-ʻan ʹi-lal- ḥaw-li g̣ay-ra ʹikh-raaj. Fa-ʹin kha-raj-na fa-laa ju-naa-ḥa ʻa-lay-kum Fee maa- fa-ʻal-na feee ʹañ-fu-si-hin-na mim- maʻ-roof. Wal-laa-hu ʻA-zee-zun- Ḥa-keem.

2:241.text: Wa-lil-mu-ṭal-la-q̣aa-ti ma-taa-ʻum- bil-maʻ-roof. Ḥaq̣-q̣an ʻa-lal- Mut-ta-q̣een.

2:242.text: Ka-ẓa-li-ka yu-bay-yi-nul- laa-hu la-kum ʹAa-yaa-ti-hee la-ʻal-la-kum taʻ-q̣i-loon.

2:243.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹi-lal- la-ẓee-na kha-ra-joo miñ di-yaa-ri-him wa-hum ʹu-loo-fun ḥa-ẓa-ral- maw-ti fa-q̣aa-la la-hu-mul- laa-hu moo-too: s̤um-ma ʹaḥ-yaa-hum. ʹIn-nal- laa-ha la-Ẓoo- Faḍ-lin ʻa-lan- naa-si wa-la-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ran- naa-si laa- yash-ku-roon.

2:244.text: Wa-q̣aa-ti-loo fee sa-bee-lil- laa-hi waʻ-la-moo ʹan-nal- laa-ha Sa-mee-ʻun ʻA-leem.

2:245.text: Mañ- ẓal- la-ẓee yuq̣-ri-ḍul- laa-ha Q̣ar-ḍan Ḥa-sa-nañ fa-yu-ḍaa-ʻi-fa-hoo la-hooo ʹaḍ-ʻaa-fañ- ka-s̤ee-rah? Wal-laa-hu yaq̣-bi-ḍu wa-yab-ṣuṭ. Wa-ʹi-lay-hi tur-ja-ʻoon.

2:246.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹi-lal- ma-la-ʹi mim- Ba-neee- ʹIs-raaa-ʹee-la mim- baʻ-di Moo-sa? ʹIẓ q̣aa-loo li-na-biy-yil- la-hu-mub- ʻas̤- la-naa Ma-li-kan- nu-q̣aa-til fee Sa-bee-lil- laah. Q̣aa-la hal ʻa-say-tum ʹiñ- ku-ti-ba ʻa-lay-ku-mul- q̣i-taa-lu ʹal-laa tu-q̣aa-ti-loo? Q̣aa-loo wa-maa la-naaa ʹal-laa nu-q̣aa-ti-la fee Sa-bee-lil- laa-hi wa-q̣ad ʹukh-rij-naa miñ- di-yaa-ri-nna wa-ʹab-naaa-ʹi-naa? Fa-lam-maa ku-ti-ba ʻa-lay-hi-mul- q̣i-taa-lu ta-wal-law ʹil-laa q̣a-lee-lam- min-hum. Wal-laa-hu ʻA-lee-mum- biz̤̣-z̤̣aa-li-meen.

2:247.text: Wa-q̣aa-la la-hum Na-biy-yu-hum ʹin-nal- laa-ha q̣ad ba-ʻa-s̤a la-kum Ṭaa-loo-ta Ma-li-kaa. Q̣aa-looo ʹan-naa ya-koo-nu la-hul- mul-ku ʻa-lay-naa wa-naḥ-nu ʹa-ḥaq̣-q̣u bil-mul-ki min-hu wa-lam yuʹ-ta sa-ʻa-tam- mi-nal- maal? Q̣aa-la ʹin-nal- laa-haṣ- ṭa-faa-hu ʻa-lay-kum wa-zaa-da-hoo bas-ṭa-tañ- fil- ʻil-mi wal-jism. Wal-laa-hu yuʹ-tee mul-ka-hoo mañy- ya-shaaaʹ. Wal-laa-hu Waa-si-ʻun ʻA-leem.

2:248.text: Wa-q̣aa-la la-hum Na-biy-yu-hum ʹin-na ʹaa-ya-ta- Mul-ki-heee ʹañy- yaʹ-ti-ya-ku-mut- Taa-boo-tu fee-hi sa-kee-na-tum- mir- Rab-bi-kum wa-ba-q̣iy-ya-tum- mim-maa ta-ra-ka ʹAa-lu- Moo-saa wa-ʹAa-lu- Haa-roo-na taḥ-mi-lu-hul- ma-laaa-ʹi-kah. ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹaa-ya-tal- la-kum ʹiñ- kuñ-tum- Muʹ-mi-neen.

2:249.text: Fa-lam-maa fa-ṣa-la Ṭaa-loo-tu bil-ju-noo-di q̣aa-la ʹin-nal- laa-ha mub-ta-lee-kum̃ bi-nahr. Fa-mañ- sha-ri-ba min-hu fa-lay-sa min-nee: Wa-mal- lam yaṭ-ʻam-hu fa-ʹin-na-hoo min-neee ʹil-laa ma-nig̣h- ta-ra-fa g̣ur-fa-tam- bi-ya-dih. Fa-sha-ri-boo min-hu ʹil-laa q̣a-lee-lam- min-hum. Fa-lam-maa jaa-wa-za-hoo hu-wa wal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo ma-ʻa-hoo q̣aa-loo laa- ṭaa-q̣a-ta la-nal- Yaw-ma bi-Jaa-loo-ta wa-ju-noo-dih. Q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na ya-Z̤̣un-noo-na  ʹan-na-hum- mu-laa-q̣ul- laa-hi kam- miñ- fi-ʹa-tiñ- q̣a-lee-la-tin g̣ha-la-bat fi-ʹa-tañ- ka-s̤ee-ra-tam- bi-ʹiẓ-nil- laah? Wal-laa-hu ma-ʻaṣ- Ṣaa-bi-reen.

2:250.text: Wa-lam-maa ba-ra-zoo li-Jaa-loo-ta wa-ju-noo-di-hee q̣aa-loo Rab-ba-naaa ʹaf-rig̣h ʻa-lay-naa ṣab-rañw- wa-s̤ab-bit ʹaq̣-daa-ma-naa wañ-s̤ur-naa ʻa-lal- Q̣aw-mil- kaa-fi-reen.

2:251.text: Fa-ha-za-moo-hum̃- bi-ʹiẓ-nil- laa-hi wa-q̣a-ta-la Daa-woo-du Jaa-loo-ta wa-ʹaa-taa-hul- laa-hul- Mul-ka wal-Ḥik-ma-ta wa-ʻal-la-ma-hoo mim-maa ya-shaaaʹ. Wa-law-laa daf-ʻul- laa-hin- naa-sa baʻ-ḍa-hum̃- bi-baʻ-ḍil- la-fa-sa-da-til- ʹar-ḍu wa-laa-kin-nal- laa-ha Ẓoo- Faḍ-lin- ʻa-lal- ʻaa-la-meen.

2:252.text: Til-ka ʹAa-yaa-tul- laa-hi nat-loo-haa ʻa-lay-ka bil-ḥaq̣q̣; wa-ʹin-na-ka la-mi-nal- Mur-sa-leen.

2:253.text: Til-kar- ru-su-lu faḍ-ḍal-naa baʻ-ḍa-hum ʻa-laa baʻ-ḍ. Min-hum- mañ kal-la-mal- laa-hu wa-ra-fa-ʻa baʻ-ḍa-hum da-ra-jaat. Wa-ʹaa-tay-naa ʻEe-sab- na- Mar-ya-mal- Bay-yi-naa-ti wa-ʹay-yad-naa-hu bi-roo-ḥil- q̣u-dus. Wa-law shaaa-ʹal- laa-hu maq̣- ta-ta-lal- la-ẓee-na mim- baʻ-di-him mim- baʻ-di- maa- jaaa-ʹat-hu-mul- Bay-yi-naa-tu wa-laa-ki-nikh- ta-la-foo fa-min-hum- man ʹaa-ma-na wa-min-hum- mañ- ka-far. Wa-law shaaa-ʹal- laa-hu maq̣- ta-ta-loo; wa-laa-kin-nal- laa-ha yaf-ʻa-lu maa- yu-reed.

2:254.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nooo ʹañ-fi-q̣oo mim-maa ra-zaq̣-naa-kum- miñ- q̣ab-li ʹañy- yaʹ-ti-ya Yaw-mul- laa bay-ʻuñ- fee-hi wa-laa- khul-la-tuñw- wa-laa- sha-faa-ʻah . Wal-kaa-fi-roo-na hu-muz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-moon.

2:255.text: ʹAl-laa-hu laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa HooʹAl-  Ḥay-yul- Q̣ay-yoom. Laa-  taʹ-khu-ẓu-hoo si-na-tuñw- wa-laa nawm. La-hoo Maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-maa fil- ʹarḍ. Mañ- ẓal- la-ẓee yash-fa-ʻu ʻiñ-da-hooo ʹil-laa bi-ʹiẓ-nih? Yaʻ-la-mu Maa- bay-na ʹay-dee-him wa-maa khal-fa-hum. Wa-laa yu-ḥee-ṭoo-na bi-shay-ʹim- min ʻil-mi-heee ʹil-laa bi-maa shaaaʹ. Wa-si-ʻa Kur-siy-yu-hus- Sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ; wa-laa ya-ʹoo-du-hoo ḥif-z̤̣u-hu-maa wa-Hu-wal- ʻA-liy-yul- ʻA-z̤̣eem.

2:256.text: Laaa ʹik-raa-ha fid- deen. Q̣at- ta-bay-ya-nar- Rush-du mi-nal- G̣ayy. Fa-mañy- yak-fur biṭ-Ṭaa-g̣oo-ti wa-yuʹ-mim- bil-laa-hi fa-q̣a-dis- tam-sa-ka bil-ʻur-wa-til- wus̤-q̣aa, lañ- fi-ṣaa-ma la-haa. Wal-laa-hu Sa-mee-ʻun ʻA-leem.

2:257.text: ʹAl-laa-hu Wa-liy-yul- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo yukh-ri-ju-hum- mi-naz̤̣- z̤̣u-lu-maa-ti ʹi-lan- noor. Wal-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-rooo ʹaw-li-yaaa-ʹu-hu-muṭ- Ṭaa-g̣oo-tu yukh-ri-joo-na-hum- mi-nan- Noo-ri ʹi-laz̤̣- z̤̣u-lu-maat. ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bun Naa-ri hum fee-haa khaa-li-doon.

2:258.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹi-lal- la-ẓee ḥaaaj-ja ʹIb-raa-hee-ma fee Rab-bi-heee ʹan ʹaa-taa-hul- laa-hul- mulk? ʹIẓ q̣aa-la ʹIb-raa-hee-mu Rab-bi-yal- la-ẓee yuḥ-yee wa-yu-mee-tu q̣aa-la ʹa-na ʹuḥ-yee wa-ʹu-meet. Q̣aa-la ʹIb-raa-hee-mu fa-ʹin-nal- la-ha yaʹ-tee bish-Sham-si mi-nal- Mash-ri-q̣i faʹ-ti bi-haa mi-nal Mag̣-ri-bi Fa-bu-hi-tal- la-ẓee ka-far. Wal-laa-hu laa- yah-dil- q̣aw-maz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen.

2:259.text: ʹAw kal-la-ẓee mar-ra ʻa-laa q̣ar-ya-tiñw- wa- hi-ya khaa-wi-ya-tun ʻa-laa ʻu-roo-shi-haa. Q̣aa-la ʹan-naa yuḥ-yee haa-ẓi-hil- laa-hu baʻ-da maw-ti-haa? Fa-ʹa-maa-ta-hul- laa-hu mi-ʹa-ta ʻaa-miñ- s̤um-ma ba-ʻa-s̤ah. Q̣aa-la kam la-bis̤t? Q̣aa-la La-bis̤-tu yaw-man ʹaw baʻ-ḍa yawm. Q̣aa-la bal- la-bis̤-ta mi-ʹa-ta ʻaa-miñ- fañ-z̤̣ur ʹi-laa ṭa-ʻaa-mi-ka wa-sha-raa-bi-ka lam ya-ta-san-nah. Wañ-z̤̣ur ʹi-laa ḥi-maa-rik! wa-li-naj-ʻa-la-ka ʹaa-ya-tal- lin-naa-si wañ-z̤̣ur ʹi-lal- ʻi-z̤̣aa-mi kay-fa nuñ-shi-zu-haa s̤um-ma nak-soo-haa laḥ-maa. Fa-lam-maa ta-by-ya-na la-hoo q̣aa-la ʹaʻ-la-mu ʹan-nal- laa-ha ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Q̣a-deer.

2:260.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣aa-la ʹIb-raa-hee-mu Rab-bi ʹa-ri-nee kay-fa tuḥ-yil- maw-taa. Q̣aa-la ʹa-wa-lam tuʹ-min? Q̣aa-la ba-laa wa-laa-kil- li-yaṭ-ma-ʹin-na q̣al-bee. Q̣aa-la fa-khuẓ ʹar-ba-ʻa-tam- mi-naṭ- ṭay-ri fa-s̤ur-hun-na ʹi-lay-ka s̤um-maj- ʻal ʻa-laaa kul-li ja-ba-lim- min-hun-na juz-ʹañ- s̤um-mad- ʻu-hun-na yaʹ-tee-na-ka saʻ-yaa. Waʻ-lam ʹan-nal- laa-ha ʻA-zee-zun Ḥa-keem.

2:261.text: Ma-s̤a-lul- la-ẓee-na yunñ-fi-q̣oo-na ʹam-waa-la-hum fee Sa-bee-lil- laa-hi ka-ma-s̤a-li ḥab-ba-tin ʹam-ba-tat sab-ʻa- sa-naa-bi-la fee kul-li sum-bu-la-tim- mi-ʹa-tu ḥab-bah. Wal-laa-hu yu-ḍaa-ʻi-fu li-many- ya-shaaaʹ. Wal-laa-hu Waa-si-ʻun ʻA-leem.

2:262.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na yuñ-fi-q̣oo-na ʹam-waa-la-hum fee Sa-bee-lil- laa-hi s̤um-ma laa- yut-bi-ʻoo-na maaa ʹañ-fa-q̣oo man-nañw- wa-laaa ʹa-ẓal- la-hum ʹaj-ru-hum ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-him; wa-laa khaw-fun ʻa-lay-him wa-laa hum yaḥ-za-noon.

2:263.text: Q̣aw-lum- maʻ-roo-fuñw- wa-mag̣-fi-ra-tun khay-rum- miñ- ṣa-da-q̣a-tiñ- yat-ba-ʻu-haaa ʹa-ẓaa. Wal-laa-hu G̣a-niy-yun Ḥa-leem.

2:264.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na aa-ma-noo laa- tub-ṭi-loo ṣa-da-q̣aa-ti-kum̃- bil-man-ni wal-ʹa-ẓaa kal-la-ẓee yuñ-fi-q̣u maa-la-hoo ri-ʹaaa-ʹan- naa-si wa-laa yuʹ-mi-nu bil-laa-hi wal-Yaw-mil- ʹAa-khir. Fa-ma-s̤a-lu-hoo ka-ma-s̤a-li ṣaf-waa-nin ʻa-lay-hi tu-raa-buñ- fa-ʹa-ṣaa-ba-hoo waa-bi-luñ- fa-ta-ra-ka-hoo ṣal-daa. Laa- yaq̣-di-roo-na ʻa-laa shay-ʹim- mim-maa ka-sa-boo. Wal-laa-hu laa- yah-dil- q̣aw-mal- kaa-fi-reen.

2:265.text: Wa-ma-s̤a-lul- la-ẓee-na yuñ-fi-q̣oo-naʹ am-waa-la-hu- mub-ti-g̣aaa-ʹa mar-ḍaa-til- laa-hi wa-tas̤-bee-tam- min ʹañ-fu-si-him ka-ma-s̤a-li jan-na-tim- bi-rab-wa-tin ʹa-ṣaa-ba-haa waa-bi-luñ- fa-ʹaa-tat ʹu-ku-la-haa ḍiʻ-fayn. Fa-ʹil- lam yu-ṣib-haa waa-bi-luñ- fa-ṭall . Wal-laa-hu bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na Ba-ṣeer.

2:266.text: ʹA-ya-wad-du ʹa-ḥa-du-kum ʹañ- ta-koo-na la-hoo jan-na-tum- min- na-khee-liñw- wa-ʹaʻ-naa-biñ- taj-ree miñ- taḥ-ti-hal- ʹan-haa-ru la-hoo fee-haa miñ- kul-lis̤- s̤a-ma-raa-ti wa-ʹa-ṣaa-ba-hul- ki-ba-ru wa-la-hoo ẓur-riy-ya-tuñ- ḍu-ʻa-faaa-ʹu fa-ʹa-ṣaa-ba-haaa ʹiʻ-ṣaa-ruñ- fee-hi naa-ruñ- faḥ-ta-ra-q̣at? Ka-ẓaa-li-ka yu-bay-yi-nul- laa-hu la-ku-mul- ʹaa-yaa-ti la-ʻal-la-kum ta-ta-fak-ka-roon.

2:267.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nooo ʹañ-fi-q̣oo miñ- ṭay-yi-baa-ti maa- ka-sab-tum wa-mim-maaa ʹakh-raj-naa la-kum- mi-nal- ʹarḍ. Wa-laa ta-yam-ma-mul- kha-bee-s̤a min-hu tuñ-fi-q̣oo-na wa-las-tum̃- bi-ʹaa-khi-ẓee-hi ʹil-laaa ʹañ tug̣-mi-ḍoo feeh. Waʻ-la-mooo ʹan-nal- laa-ha G̣a-niy-yun  Ḥa-meed.

2:268.text: ʹAsh-Shay-ṭaa-nu ya-ʻi-du-ku-mul- faq̣-ra wa-yaʹ-mu-ru-kum̃- bil-faḥ-shaaaʹ. Wal-laa-hu ya-ʻi-du-kum- mag̣-fi-ra-tam- min-hu wa-faḍ-laa. Wal-laa-hu Waa-si-ʻun ʻA-leem.

2:269.text: Yuʻ-til- Ḥik-ma-ta mañy- ya-shaaaʹ: Wa-mañy- yuʹ-tal- Ḥik-ma-ta fa-q̣ad ʹoo-ti-ya khay-rañ- ka-s̤ee-raa. Wa-maa yaẓ-ẓak-ka-ru ʹil-laaa ʹu-lul- ʹal-baab.

2:270.text: Wa-maaa ʹañ-faq̣-tum- min- na-fa-q̣a-tin ʹaw na-ẓar-tum- min- naẓ-riñ fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha yaʻ-la-muh. Wa-maa liz̤̣-z̤̣aa-li-mee-na min ʹañ-ṣaar.

2:271.text: ʹIñ- tub-duṣ- Ṣa-da-q̣aa-ti fa-ni-ʻim-maa hee; Wa-ʹiñ- tukh-foo-haa wa-tuʹ-too-hal- fu-q̣a-raaa-ʹa fa-hu-wa khay-rul- la-kum: wa-yu-kaf-fi-ru ʻan-kum- miñ- say-yi-ʹaa-ti-kum. Wal-laa-hu bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na Kha-beer.

2:272.text: Lay-sa ʻa-lay-ka hu-daa-hum wa-laa-kin-nal- laa-ha yah-dee mañy- ya-shaaaʹ. Wa-maa tuñ-fi-q̣oo min khay-riñ- fa-li-ʹañ-fu-si-kum: wa-maa tuñ-fi-q̣oo-na ʹil-lab- ti-g̣aaa-ʹa Waj-hil- laah. Wa-maa tuñ-fi-q̣oo min khay-riñy- yu-waf-fa ʹi-lay-kum waʹañ-tum laa- tuz̤̣-la-moon.

2:273.text: Lil-fu-q̣a-raaa-ʹil- la-ẓee-na ʹuḥ-ṣi-roo fee Sa-bee-li- laa-hi laa- yas-ta-ṭee-ʻoo-na ḍar-bañ- fil- ʹar-ḍi-yaḥ- sa-bu-hu-mul- jaa-hi-lu ʹag̣-ni-yaaa-ʹa mi-nat- ta-ʻaf-fuf. Taʻ-ri-fu-hum̃- bi-see-maa-hum laa- yas-ʹa-loo-nan- naa-sa ʹil-ḥaa-faa. Wa-maa tuñ-fi-q̣oo min khay-riñ fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha bi-hee ʻA-leem.

2:274.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na yuñ-fi-q̣oo-na ʹam-waa-la-hum̃- bil-lay-li wan-na-haa-ri sir-rañw- wa-ʻa-laa-ni-ya-tañ fa-la-hum ʹaj-ru-hum ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-him: wa-laa khaw-fun ʻa-lay-him wa-laa hum yaḥ-za-noon.

2:275.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na yaʹ-ku-loo-nar- Ri-baa laa- ya-q̣oo-moo-na ʹil-laa ka-maa ya-q̣oo-mul- la-ẓee ya-ta-khab-ba-ṭu-hush- Shay-ṭa-nu mi-nal- mass. Ẓaa-li-ka bi-ʹan-na-hum q̣a-looo ʹin-na-mal- Bay-ʻu mis̤-lur- Ri-ba. Wa-ʹa-ḥal-lal- laa-hul- Bay-ʻa wa-ḥar-ra-mar- Ri-ba. Fa-mañ- jaaa-ʹa-hoo maw-ʻi-z̤̣a-tum- mir- Rab-bi-hee fañ-ta-haa fa-la-hoo maa- sa-laf: wa-ʹam-ru-hooo ʹi-lal- laah. Wa-man ʻaa-da fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bun- Naar: hum fee-haa khaa-li-doon.

2:276.text: Yam-ḥa-q̣ul- laa-hur- Ri-baa wa-yur-biṣ- ṣa-da-q̣aat. Wal-laa-hu laa- yu-ḥib-bu kul-la kaf-faa-rin ʹa-s̤eem.

2:277.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti wa-ʹa-q̣aa-muṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta wa-ʹaa-ta-wuz- Za-kaa-ta la-hum ʹaj-ru-hum ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-him: wa-laa kaw-fun ʻa-lay-him wa-laa hum yaḥ-za-noon.

2:278.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nut- ta-q̣ul- laa-ha wa-ẓa-roo maa- ba-q̣i-ya mi-nar- Ri-baaa ʹiñ- kuñ-tum- Muʹ-mi-neen.

2:279.text: Fa-ʹil- lam taf-ʻa-loo faʹ-ẓa-noo bi-ḥar-bim- mi-nal- laa-hi wa-Ra-soo-lih: wa-ʹiñ- tub-tum fa-la-kum ru-ʹoo-su ʹam-waaa-li-kum: laa- taz̤̣-li-moo-na wa-laa tuz̤̣-la-moon.

2:280.text: Wa-ʹiñ- kaa-na ẓoo- ʻus-ra-tiñ fa-na-z̤̣i-ra-tun ʻi-laa may-sa-rah. Wa-ʹañ- ta-ṣad-da-q̣oo khay-rul- la-kum ʹiñ- kuñ-tum taʻ-la-moon.

2:281.text: Wat-ta-q̣oo Yaw-mañ- tur-ja-ʻoo-na fee-hi ʹi-lal- laah. S̤um-ma tu-waf-faa kul-lu naf-sim- maa ka-sa-bat wa-hum laa- yuz̤̣-la-moon.

2:282.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nooʹ i-ẓaa ta-daa-yañ-tum̃- bi-day-nin ʹi-laa ʹa-ja-lim- mu-sam-mañ- fak-tu-booh. Wal-yak-tub- bay-na-kum kaa-ti-bum- bil-ʻadl. Wa-laa yaʹ-ba kaa-ti-bun ʹañy- yak-tu-ba ka-maa ʻal-la-ma-hul- laa-hu fal-yak-tub. Wal-yum-li-lil- la-ẓee ʻa-lay-hil- ḥaq̣-q̣u wal-yat-ta-q̣il- laa-ha Rab-ba-hoo wa-laa yab-khas min-hu shay-ʹaa. Fa-ʹiñ- kaa-nal- la-zee ʻa-lay-hil- ḥaq̣-q̣u sa-fee-han, ʹaw ḍa-ʻee-fan ʹaw laa- yas-ta-ṭee-ʻu ʹañy- yu-mil-la hu-wa fal-yum-lil wa-liy-yu-hoo bil-ʻadl. Was-tash-hi-du sha-hee-day-ni mir- ri-jaa-li-kum: fa-ʹil- lam ya-koo-naa ra-ju-lay-ni fa-ra-ju-lunw- wam-ra-ʹa-taa-ni mim-mañ- tar-ḍaw-na mi-nash- shu-ha-daaa-ʹi ʹañ- ta-ḍil-la ʹiḥ-daa-hu-maa fa-tu-ẓak-ki-ra ʹiḥ-daa-hu-mal- ʹukh-raa. Wa-laa yaʹ-bash- shu-ha-daaa-ʹu ʹi-ẓaa maa- du-ʻoo. Wa-laa tas-ʹa-mooo ʹañ tak-tu-boo-hu ṣa-g̣ee-ran ʹaw ka-bee-ran ʹi-laa ʹa-ja-lih. Ẓaa-li-kum ʹaq̣-sa-ṭu ʻiñ-dal- laa-hi wa-ʹaq̣-wa-mu lish-sha-haa-da-ti wa-ʹad-naaa al-laa tar-taa-booo ʹil-laaa ʹañ- ta-koo-na ti-jaa-ra-tan ḥaa-ḍi-ra-tañ tu-dee-roo-na-haa bay-na-kum fa-lay-sa ʻa-lay-kum ju-naa-ḥun ʹal-laa tak-tu-boo-haa. Wa-ʹash-hi-dooo ʹi-ẓaa ta-baa-yaʻ-tum. Wa-laa yu-Z̤̣aaar-ra kaa-ti-buñw- wa-laa- sha-heed. Wa-ʹiñ- taf-ʻa-loo fa-ʹin-na-hoo fu-soo-q̣um- bi-kum. Wat-ta-q̣ul- laah: wa-yu-ʻal-li-mu-ku-mul- laah. Wal-laa-hu bi-kul-li shay-ʹin ʻA-leem.

2:283.text: Wa-ʹiñ- kuñ-tum ʻa-laa sa-fa-riñw- wa-lam ta-ji-doo ka-ti-bañ fa-ri-haa-num- maq̣-boo-ḍah. Fa-ʹin ʹa-mi-na baʻ-ḍu-kum baʻ-ḍañ- fal-yu-ʹad-dil- la-ẓiʹ- tu-mi-na ʹa-maa-na-ta-hoo wal-yat-ta-q̣il- laa-ha Rab-bah. Wa-laa tak-tu-mush- sha-haa-dah: wa-mañy- yak-tum-haa fa-ʹin-na-hooo ʹaa-s̤i-muñ- q̣al-buh. Wal-laa-hu bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na ʻA-leem.

2:284.text: Lil-laa-hi maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-maa fil- ʹarḍ. Wa-ʹiñ- tub-doo ma  feee ʹañ-fu-si-kum ʹaw tukh-foo-hu yu-ḥaa-sib-kum̃ bi-hil- laah. Fa-yag̣-fi-ru li-mañy- ya-shaaaʹ: wa-yu-ʻaz-zi-bu mañy- ya-shaaaʹ: wal-laa-hu ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Q̣a-deer.

2:285.text: ʹAa-ma-nar- Ra-soo-lu bi-maaa ʹuñ-zi-la ʹi-lay-hi mir- Rab-bi-hee wal-Muʹ-mi-noon. Kul-lun ʹaa-ma-na bil-laa-hi wa-ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-ti-hee wa-ku-tu-bi-hee wa-ru-su-lih. Laa- nu-far-ri-q̣u bay-na ʹa-ḥa-dim- mir- ru-su-lih. Wa-q̣aa-loo sa-miʻ-naa wa-ʹa-ṭaʻ-naa: G̣uf-raa-na-ka Rab-ba-naa wa-ʹi-lay-kal- ma-ṣeer.

2:286.text: Laa- yu-kal-li-ful- laa-hu naf-san ʹil-laa wus-ʻa-haa. La-haa maa- ka-sa-bat wa-ʻa-lay-haa mak- ta-sa-bat. Rab-ba-naa laa- tu-ʹaa-khiẓ-naaa ʹin- na-see-naaa ʹaw ʹakh-ṭaʹ-naa. Rab-ba-naa wa-laa taḥ-mil ʻa-lay-naaa ʹiṣ-rañ- ka-maaa ḥa-mal-ta-hoo ʻa-lal- la-ẓee-na miñ- q̣ab-li-naa. Rab-ba-naa wa-laa tu-ḥam-mil-naa maa laa- ṭaa-q̣a-ta la-naa bih. Waʻ-fu- ʻan-naa, wag̣h-fir la-naa, war-ḥam-naa. ʹAñ-ta Maw-laa-naa fañ-ṣur-naa ʻa-lal- q̣aw-mil- Kaa-fi-reen.

3:2.text: ʹAl-laa-hu laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-la Hu-wal- Ḥay-yul- Q̣ay-yoom.

3:3.text: Naz-za-la ʻa-lay-kal- Ki-taa-ba bil-Ḥaq̣-q̣i mu-ṣad-di-q̣al- li-maa bay-na ya-day-hi wa-ʹañ-za-lat- Taw-raa-ta wal-ʹIñ-jeel.

3:4.text: Miñ- q̣ab-lu Hu-dal- lin-naa-si wa-ʹañ-za-lal- Fur-q̣aan. ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo bi-ʹaa-yaa-til- laa-hi la-hum ʻa-ẓaa-buñ- sha-deed: wal-laa-hu ʻA-zee-zuñ- Ẓuñ- ti-q̣aam.

3:5.text: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha laa- yakh-faa ʻa-lay-hi shay-ʹuñ- fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-laa fis- sa-maaa;

3:6.text: Hu-wal- la-ẓeee yu-ṣaw-wi-ru-kum fil- ʹar-ḥaa-mi kay-fa ya-shaaaʹ. Laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa Hu-wal- ʻA-zee-zul- Ḥa-keem.

3:7.text: Hu-wal- la-ẓeeeʹ añ-za-la ʻa-lay-kal- Ki-taa-ba min-hu ʹaa-yaa-tum- Muḥ-ka-maa-tun hun-na ʹUm-mul- Ki-taa-bi wa-ʹu-kha-ru Mu-ta-shaa-bi-haat. Fa-ʹam-mal- la-ẓee-na fee q̣u-loo-bi-him zay-g̣uñ- fa-yat-ta-bi-ʻoo-na maa- ta-shaa-ba-ha min-hub- ti-g̣aaa- ʹal-fit-na-ti wab-ti-g̣aaa-ʹa taʹ-wee-lih. Wa-maa yaʻ-la-mu taʹ-wee-la-hooo ʹil-lal- lah. War-Raa-si-khoo-na fil- ʻil-mi ya-q̣oo-loo-na ʹaa-man-naa bi-hee kul-lum- min ʻiñ-di Rab-bi-naa: wa-maa yaẓ-ẓak-ka-ru ʹil-laaa ʹu-lul- ʹal-baab.

3:8.text: Rab-ba-naa laa- tu-zig̣ q̣u-loo-baba-na baʻ-da ʹiẓ ha-day-ta-naa wa-hab la-naa mil-la- duñ-ka raḥ-mah: ʹin-na-ka ʹAñ-tal- Wah-haab.

3:9.text: Rab-ba-naaa ʹin-na-ka jaa-mi-ʻun- naa-si li-Yaw-mil- laa ray-ba feeh: ʹin-nal- Laaha laa- yukh-li-ful- mee-ʻaad.

3:10.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo lañ- tug̣-ni-ya ʻan-hum ʹam-waa-lu-hum wa-laaa ʹaw-laa-du-hum- mi-nal- laa-hi shay-ʹaa: wa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hum wa-q̣oo-dun- Naar.

3:11.text: Ka-daʹ-abi ʹaa-li Fir-ʻaw-na wal-la-ẓee-na miñ- q̣ab-li-him. Kaẓ-ẓa-boo bi-ʹaa-yaa-ti-naa, fa-ʹa-kha-ẓa-hu-mul- la-hu bi-ẓu-noo-bi-him: wal-laa-hu Sha-dee-dul- ʻi-q̣aab.

3:12.text: Q̣ul- lil-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo sa-tug̣-la-boo-na wa-tuḥ-sha-roo-na ʹi-laa Ja-han-nam: wa-biʹ-sal- mi-haad!

3:13.text: Q̣ad kaa-na la-kum ʹA-ya-tuñ- fee fi-ʹa-tay-nil- ta-q̣a-taa: fi-ʹa-tuñ- tu-q̣aa-ti-lu fee Sa-bee-lil- laa-hi wa-ʹukh-raa kaa-fi-ra-tuñy- ya-raw-na-hum- mis̤-lay-him raʹ-yal- ʻayn. Wal-laa-hu yu-ʹay-yi-du bi-naṣ-ri-hee mañy- ya-shaaaʹ. ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʻib-ra-tal- li-ʹu-lil- ʹab-ṣaar.

3:14.text: Zuy-yi-na lin-naa-si ḥub-bush- sha-ha-waa-ti mi-nan- ni-saa-ʹi wal-ba-nee-na wal-q̣a-naa-ṭee-ril- mu-q̣añ-ṭa-ra-ti mi-naẓ- ẓa-ha-bi wal-fiḍ-ḍa-ti wal-khay-lil- mu-saw-wa-ma-ti wal-ʹan-ʻaa-mi wal-ḥars̤. Ẓaa-li-ka ma-taa-ʻul- ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa; wal-laa-hu ʻiñ-da-hoo ḥus-nul- ma-ʹaab.

3:15.text: Q̣ul ʹa-ʹu-nab-bi-ʹu-kum̃- bi-khay-rim- miñ- ẓaa-li-kum? Lil-la-ẓee-nat- ta-q̣aw ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-him Jan-naa-tuñ- taj-ree miñ- tah-ti-hal- ʹan-haa-ru khaa-li-dee-na fee-haa wa-ʹaz-waa-jum- mu-ṭah-ha-ra-tuñw- wa-riḍ-waa-num- mi-nal- laah. Wal-laa-hu Ba-ṣee-rum- bil-ʻi-baad,

3:16.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na ya-q̣oo-loo-na Rab-ba-naaa ʹin-na-naaa ʹaa-man-naa fag̣h-fir la-naa ẓu-noo-ba-naa wa-q̣i-naa ʻa-ẓaa-ban- Naar;

3:17.text: ʹAṣ-Ṣaa-bi-ree-na waṣ-Ṣaa-di-q̣ee-na wal-Q̣aa-ni-tee-na wal-Muñ-fi-q̣ee-na wal-Mus-tag̣-fi-ree-na bil-ʹas-ḥaar.

3:18.text: Sha-hi-dal- laa-hu ʹan-na-Hoo laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa Hu-wa wal-ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tu wa-ʹu-lul- ʻil-mi q̣aaa-ʹi-mam- bil-q̣isṭ. Laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa Hu-wal- ʻA-zee-zul- Ḥa-keem.

3:19.text: ʹIn-nad- Dee-na ʻiñ-dal- laa-hil- ʹIs-laam. Wa-makh- ta-la-fal- la-ẓee-na ʹoo-tul- Ki-taa-ba ʹil-laa mim- baʻ-di maa- jaaa-ʹa-hu-mul- ʻil-mu bag̣h-yam- bay-na-hum. Wa-mañy- yak-fur bi-ʹAa-yaa-til- la-hi fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha Sa-ree-ʻul- ḥi-saab.

3:20.text: Fa-ʹin ḥaaj-joo-ka fa-q̣ul ʹas-lam-tu waj-hi-ya lil-laa-hi wa-ma-nit- ta-ba-ʻan. Wa-q̣ul lil-la-ẓee-na ʹoo-tul- Ki-taa-ba wal-ʹum-miy-yee-na ʹa-ʹas-lam-tum? Fa-ʹin ʹas-la-moo fa-q̣a-dih- ta-daw. Wa-ʹiñ- ta-wal-law fa-ʹin-na-maa ʻa-lay-kal- ba-laag̣: wal-laa-hu Ba-ṣee-rum- bil-ʻi-baad.

3:21.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na yak-fu-roo-na bi-ʹAa-yaaa-til- laa-hi wa-yaq̣-tu-loo-nan- na-biy-yee-na bi-g̣ay-ri ḥaq̣-q̣iñw- wa-yaq̣-tu-loo-nal- la-ẓee-na yaʹ-mu-roo-na bil-q̣is-ṭi mi-nan- naa-si fa-bash-shir-hum̃- bi-ʻa-ẓaa-bin ʹa-leem.

3:22.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-kal- la-ẓee-na ḥa-bi-ṭat ʹa-ʻ-maa-lu-hum fid- dun-yaa wal-ʹaa-khi-ra-ti wa-maa la-hum- min- na-ṣi-reen.

3:23.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹi-lal- la-ẓee-na ʹoo-too na-ṣee-ban-  mi-nal- Ki-taa-bi yud-ʻaw-na ʹi-laa Ki-taa-bil- laa-hi li-yaḥ-ku-ma bay-na-hum s̤um-ma ya-ta-wal-laa fa-ree-q̣um- min-hum wa-hum- muʻ-ri-ḍoon.

3:24.text: Ẓaa-li-ka bi-ʹan-na-hum q̣aa-loo lañ- ta-mas-sa-nan- Naa-ru ʹil-laaa ʹay-yaa-man- maʻ-doo-daat: wa-g̣ar-ra-hum fee dee-ni-him- maa kaa-noo yaf-ta-roon.

3:25.text: Fa-kay-fa ʹi-ẓaa ja-maʻ-naa-hum li-yaw-mil- laa ray-ba feeh, wa-wuf-fi-yat kul-lu naf-sim- maa ka-sa-bat wa-hum laa- yuz̤̣-la-moon?

3:26.text: Q̣u-lil- laa-hum-ma Maa-li-kal- Mul-ki tuʹ-til- Mul-ka mañ- ta-shaa-ʹu wa-tañ-ẓi-ʻul- Mul-ka mim-mañ- ta-shaaaʹ. Wa-tu-ʻiz-zu mañ- ta-shaaa-ʹu wa-tu-ẓil-lu mañ- ta-shaaaʹ: bi-ya-di-kal- Khayr. ʹIn-na-ka ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ Q̣a-deer.

3:27.text: Too-li-jul- lay-la fin- na-haa-ri wa-too-li-jun- na-haa-ra fil- layl: wa-tukh-ri-jul- ḥay-ya mi-nal- may-yi-ti wa-tukh-ri-jul- may-yi-ta mi-nal- ḥay-yi wa-tar-zu-q̣u mañ- ta-shaa-ʹu bi-g̣ay-ri ḥi-saab.

3:28.text: Laa- yat-ta-khi-ẓil- Muʹ-mi-noo-nal- kaa-fi-ree-na ʹaw-li-yaaa-ʹa miñ- doo-nil- Muʹ-mi-neen. Wa-mañy- yaf-ʻal ẓaa-li-ka fa-lay-sa mi-nal- laa-hi fee shay-ʹin ʹil-laaa ʹañ- tat-ta-q̣oo min-hum tu-q̣aah. Wa-yu-ḥaẓ-ẓi-ru-ku-mul- laa-hu Naf-sah; wa-ʹi-lal- laa-hil- ma-ṣeer.

3:29.text: Q̣ul ʹiñ- tukh-foo maa- fee ṣu-doo-ri-kum ʹaw tub-doo-hu yaʻ-lam-hul- laah. Wa-yaʻ-la-mu maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-maa fil- ʹarḍ. Wal-laa-hu ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Q̣a-deer.

3:30.text: Yaw-ma ta-ji-du kul-lu naf-sim- maa ʻa-mi-lat min khay-rim- muḥ-ḍa-rañw- wa-maa- ʻa-mi-lat miñ- soooʹ.  Ta-wad-du law ʹan-na bay-na-haa wa-bay-na-hooo ʹa-ma-dam- ba-ʻee-daa. Wa-yu-haẓ-ẓi-ru-ku-mul- la-hu Naf-sah. Wal-laa-hu Ra-ʹoo-fum- bil-ʻi-baad.

3:31.text: Q̣ul ʹiñ- kuñ-tum tu-ḥib-boo-nal- laa-ha fat-ta-bi-ʻoo-nee yuḥ-bib-ku-mul- laa-hu wa-yag̣-fir la-kum ẓu-noo-ba-kum: wal-laa-hu G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

3:32.text: Q̣ul ʹa-ṭee-ʻul- laa-ha war-Ra-sool: fa-ʹiñ- ta-wal-law fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha laa- yu-ḥib-bul- Kaa-fi-reen.

3:33.text: ʹIn-nal- laa-haṣ- ṭa-faaa ʹAa-da-ma wa-Noo-ḥañw- waʹAa-la- ʹIb-raa-hee-ma wa-ʹAa-la- ʻIm-raa-na ʻa-lal- ʻaa-la-meen,

3:34.text: Ẓur-reey-ya-tam- baʻ-ḍu-haa mim- baʻ-ḍ: wal-laa-hu Sa-mee-ʻun ʻA-leem.

3:35.text: ʹIẓ q̣aa-la-t im-ra-ʹa-tu ʻIm-raa-na Rab-bi ʹin-nee na-ẓar-tu la-ka maa- fee baṭ-nee mu-ḥar-ra-rañ- fa-ta-q̣ab-bal min-nee: ʹin-na-ka ʹAñ-tas- Sa-mee-ʻul- ʻA-leem.

3:36.text: Fa-lam-maa wa-ḍa-ʻat-haa q̣aa-lat Rab-bi ʹin-nee wa-ḍaʻ-tu-haaa ʹuñ-s̤aa! Wal-laa-hu ʹAʻ-la-mu bi-maa wa-ḍa-ʻat wa-lay-saẓ- ẓa-ka-ru kal-ʹuñ-s̤aa. Waʹin-nee sam-may-tu-haa Mar-ya-ma waʹin-neee ʹu-ʻee-ẓu-haa bi-ka waẓur-ri-ya-ta-haa mi-nash- Shay-ṭaa-nir- Ra-jeem.

3:37.text: Fa-ta-q̣ab-ba-la-haa Rab-bu-haa bi-q̣a-boo-lin ḥa-sa-niñw- waʹam-ba-ta-haa na-baa-tan ḥa-sa-nañw- wa-kaf-fa-la-haa Za-ka-riy-yaa. Kul-la-maa da-kha-la ʻa-lay-haa Za-ka-riy-yal- Miḥ-raa-ba wa-ja-da ʻiñ-da-haa riz-q̣aa. Q̣aa-la yaa-Mar-ya-muʹ an-naa la-ki haa-ẓaa? Q̣aa-lat hu-wa min ʻiñ-dil- laah: ʹin-nal- la-ha yar-zu-q̣u mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu bi-g̣ay-ri ḥi-saab.

3:38.text: Hu-naa-li-ka da-ʻaa Za-ka-riy-yaa Rab-bah: q̣aa-la Rab-bi hab lee mil- la-duñ-ka ẓur-riy-ya-tañ- ṭay-yi-bah: ʹin-na-ka Sa-mee-ʻud- du-ʻaaaʹ.

3:39.text: Fan-naa-dat-hul- ma-laa-ʹi-ka-tu wa-hu-wa q̣aa-ʹi-muñy- yu-ṣal-lee fil- Miḥ-raa-bi ʹan-nal- laa-ha yu-bash-shi-ru-ka bi-Yaḥ-yaa mu-ṣad-diq̣am- bi-Kalimatim- minal laahi wa-sayyi-dañw- waḥaṣurañw- wa-Nabiyyam- mi-naṣ- ṣaaliḥeen.

3:40.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-bi ʹan-naa ya-koo-nu lee g̣u-laa-muñw- wa-q̣ad ba-la-g̣a-ni-yal- ki-ba-ru wam-ra-ʹa-tee- ʻaa-q̣ir? Q̣aa-la ka-ẓaa-li-kal- laa-hu yaf-ʻa-lu maa- ya-shaaʹ.

3:41.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-bij- ʻal- Leee ʹAa-yah! Q̣aa-la ʹAa-ya-tu-ka ʹal-laa tu-kal-li-man- naa-sa s̤a-laa-s̤a-ta ʹay-yaa-min ʹil-laa ram-zaa. Waẓ-kur- Rab-ba-ka ka-s̤ee-rañw- wa-sab-biḥ bil-ʻa-shiy-yi wal-ʹib-kaar.

3:42.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣aa-la-til- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tu yaa-Mar-ya-mu ʹin-nal- laa-haṣ- ṭa-faa-ki wa-ṭah-ha-ra-ki waṣ-ṭa-faa-ki ʻa-laa ni-saa-ʹil- ʻaa-la-meen.

3:43.text: Yaa-Mar-ya-mu uq̣-nu-tee li-Rab-bi-ki was-ju-dee war-ka-ʻee ma-ʻar- raa-ki-ʻeen.

3:44.text: Ẓaa-li-ka min ʹam-baaa-ʹil- g̣ay-bi noo-ḥee-hi ʹi-layk. Wa-maa kuñ-ta la-day-him ʹiẓ yul-q̣oo-na ʹaq̣-laa-ma-hum ʹay-yu-hum yak-fu-lu Mar-yam: wa-maa kuñ-ta la-day-him ʹiẓ yakh-ta-ṣi-moon.

3:45.text: ʹIẓ q̣aa-la-til- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tu yaa-Mar-ya-mu ʹin-nal- laa-ha yu-bash-shi-ru-ki bi-Ka-li-ma-tim- min-hus- mu-hul- Ma-see-ḥu ʻEe-sa-b nu- Mar-ya-ma wa-jee-hañ fid- dun-yaa wal-ʹAa-khi-ra-ti wa-mi-nal- Mu-q̣ar-ra-been.

3:46.text: Wa-yu-kal-li-mun- naa-sa fil- mah-di wa-kah-lañw- wa-mi-naṣ- ṣaa-li-heen.

3:47.text: Q̣aa-lat Rab-bi ʹan-naa ya-koo-nu lee wa-la-duñw- wa-lam yam-sas-nee ba-shar. Q̣aa-la ka-ẓaa-li-kil- laa-hu yakh-la-q̣u maa- ya-shaaaʹ:  ʹi-ẓaa q̣a-ẓaaa ʹam-rañ- fa-ʹin-na-maa ya-q̣oo-lu la-hoo ʻKUÑʹ- fa-ya-koon!

3:49.text: Wa-Ra-soo-lanʹ i-laa Ba-neee- ʹIs-raaa-ʹeel: ʹan-nee q̣ad jiʹ-tu-kum̃ bi-ʹaa-ya-tim- mir- Rab-bi-kum ʹan-neee ʹakh-ul-q̣u la-kum- mi-naṭ- ṭee-ni ka-hay-ʹa-tiṭ- ṭay-ri fa-ʹan-ñfu-khu fee-hi fa-ya-koo-nu ṭay-ram- bi-ʹiẓ-nil- laaḥ. Waʹub-ri-ʹul- ʹak-ma-ha wal-ʹab-ra-ṣa waʹuḥ-yil- maw-taa bi-ʹiẓ-nil- laah. Waʹu-nabbi-ʹu-kum̃ bimaa taʹ-kuloona wa-maa- tad-da-khi - fee ba-yoo-ti-kum. ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹaa-ya-tal- la-kum ʹiñ- kuñ-tum- Muʹ-mi-neen;

3:50.text: Wa-Mu-ṣad-di-q̣al- li-maa bay-na ya-day-ya mi-nat- Taw-raa-ti wa-li-ʹu-ḥil-la la-kum̃- baʻ-ḍal- la-ẓee ḥur-ri-ma ʻa-lay-kum wa-jiʹ-tu-kum̃- bi-ʹAa-ya-tim- mir- Rab-bi-kum, fat-ta-q̣ul- laa-ha waʹa-ṭee-ʻoon.

3:51.text: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha Rab-bee wa-Rab-bu-kum faʻ-bu-dooh. Haa-ẓaa Ṣi-ra-ṭum- mus-ta-q̣eem.

3:52.text: Fa-lam-maaa ʹa-ḥas-sa ʻEe-saa min-hu-mul- Kuf-ra q̣aa-la man ʹAñ-ṣaa-reee ʹi-lal- laah? Q̣aa-lal- Ḥa-waa-riy-yoo-na naḥ-nu ʹAñ-ṣaa-rul- laah: ʹaa-man-naa bil-laa-hi wash-had bi-ʹan-naa Mu-sli-moon.

3:53.text: Rab-ba-naaa ʹaa-man-naa bi-maaa ʹañ-zal-ta wat-ta-baʻ-nar- Ra-soo-la fak-tub-naa ma-ʻash- Shaa-hi-deen.

3:54.text: Wa-mak-roo wa-mak-ral- laah: wal-laa-hu Khay-rul- maa-ki-reen.

3:55.text: ʹIẓ q̣aa-lal- laa-hu yaa-ʻEe-saaa ʹin-nee mu-ta-waf-fi-ka wa-raa-fi-ʻu-ka ʹi-lay-ya wa-mu-ṭah-hi-ru-ka mi-nal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo wa-jaa-ʻi-lul- la-ẓee-nat- taa-ba-ʻoo-ka faw-q̣al- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-rooo ʹi-la Yaw-mil- Q̣i-yaa-mah. S̤um-ma ʹi-lay-ya mar-ji-ʻu-kum fa-ʹaḥ-ku-mu bay-na-kum fee-maa kuñ-tum fee-hi takh-ta-li-foon.

3:56.text: Fa-ʹam-mal- a-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo fa-ʹu-ʻaẓ-ẓi-bu-hum ʻa-ẓaa-bañ sha-dee-dañ fid- dun-yaa wal-ʹAa - wa-maa la-hum- min- naa-ṣi-reen.

3:57.text: Waʹam-mal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo waʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti fayu - ʹu-joo-ra-hum: wal-laa-hu laa- yu-ḥib-buz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen.

3:58.text: Ẓaa-li-ka nat-loo-hu ʻa-lay-ka mi-nal- ʹAa-yaa-ti waẓ-Ẓik-ril- Ḥa-keem.
