11:8.text: Wa-la-ʹin ʹakh-khar-naa ʻan-hu-mul- ʻa-ẓaa-ba ʹi-laaa ʹum-ma-tim- maʻ-doo-da-til- la-ya-q̣oo-lun-na maa- yaḥ-bi-suh? ʹA-laa yaw-ma yaʹ-tee-him lay-sa maṣ-roo-fan ʻan-hum wa-ḥaa-q̣a bi-him- maa kaa-noo bi-hee yas-tah-zi-ʹoon!

11:9.text: Wa-la-ʹin ʹa-ẓaq̣-nal- ʹiñ-saa-na min-naa Raḥ-ma-tañ- s̤um-ma na-zaʻ-naa-haa min-hu, ʹin-na-hoo la-ya-ʹoo-suñ- ka-foor.

11:10.text: Wa-la-ʹin ʹa-ẓaq̣-naa-hu naʻ-maaa-ʹa baʻ-da ḍar-raaa-ʹa mas-sat-hu la-ya-q̣oo-lan-na ẓa-ha-bas- say-yi-ʹaa-tu ʻan-nee: ʹin-na-hoo la-fa-ri-ḥuñ- fa-khoor.

11:11.text: Il-lal- la-ẓee-na ṣa-ba-roo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaat: ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka la-hum- mag̣-fi-ra-tuñw- wa-ʹaj-ruñ- Ka-beer.

11:12.text: Fa-la-ʻal-la-ka taa-ri-kum- baʻ-ḍa maa- yoo-ḥaaa ʹi-lay-ka wa-ḍaaa-ʹi-q̣um- bi-hee ṣad-ru-ka ʹañy- ya-q̣oo-loo laaa-law ʹuñ-zi-la ʻa-lay-hi kañ-zun ʹaw jaaa-ʹa ma-ʻa-hoo ma-lak? ʹIn-na-maaa ʹañ-ta na-ẓeer! Wal-laa-hu ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñw- Wa-keel!

11:13.text: ʹAm ya-q̣oo-loo-naf- ta-raah. Q̣ul faʹ-too bi-ʻash-ri Su-wa-rim- mis̤-li-hee muf-ta-ra-yaa-tiñw- wad-ʻoo ma-nis- ta-ṭaʻ-tum- miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi ʹiñ- kuñ-tum ṣaa-di-q̣een.

11:14.text: Fa-ʹil-lam yas-ta-jee-boo la-kum faʻ-la-mooo an-na-maaa ʹuñ-zi-la bi-ʻil-mil- laa-hi wa-ʹal- laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa Hoo! Fa-hal ʹañ-tum- Mus-li-moon?

11:15.text: Mañ- kaa-na yu-ree-dul- Ḥa-yaa-tad- Dun-yaa wa-zee-na-ta-haa nu-waf-fi ʹi-lay-him ʹaʻ-maa-la-hum fee-haa wa-hum fee-haa laa- yub-kha-soon.

11:16.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-kal- la-ẓee-na lay-sa la-hum fil- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti ʹil-lan- Naar: Wa-ḥa-bi-ṭa maa- ṣa-na-ʻoo fee-haa wa-baa-ṭi-lum- maa kaa-noo yaʻ-ma-loon!

11:17.text: ʹA-fa-mañ kaa-na ʻa-laa Bay-yi-na-tim- mir- Rab-bi-hee wa-yat-loo-hu Shaa-hi-dum- min-hu wa-miñ- q̣ab-li-hee Ki-taa-bu Moo-saaa ʹi-maa-mañw- Wa-raḥ-mah? ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka yuʹ-mi-noo-na bih. Wa-mañy- yak-fur bi-hee mi-nal- ʹAḥ-zaa-bi fan-naa-ru maw-ʻi-duh. Fa-laa ta-ku fee mir-ya-tim- minh: ʹin-na-hul- Ḥaq̣-q̣u mir- Rab-bi-ka wa-laa-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ran- naa-si laa- yuʹ-mi-noon!

11:18.text: Wa-man ʹaz̤̣-la-mu mim-ma-nif- ta-raa ʻa-lal- laa-hi ka-ẓi-baa? ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka yuʻ-ra-ḍoo-na ʻa-laa Rab-bi-him wa-ya-q̣oo-lul- ʹash-haa- Du-haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹil- la-ẓee-na ka-ẓa-boo ʻa-laa Rab-bi-him! ʹA-laa laʻ-na-tul- laa-hi ʻa-laz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen:

11:19.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na ya-ṣud-doo-na ʻañ- Sa-bee-lil- laa-hi wa-yab-g̣oo-na-haa ʻi-wa-jaa: wa-hum̃- bil- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti-hum kaa-fi-roon!

11:20.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka lam ya-koo-noo muʻ-ji-zee-na fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-maa kaa-na la-hum- miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi min ʹaw-li-yaaaʹ! Yu-ḍaa-ʻa-fu la-hu-mul- ʻa-ẓaab! Maa- kaa-noo yas-ta-ṭee-ʻoo-nas- sam-ʻa wa-maa kaa-noo yub-ṣi-roon.

11:21.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-kal- la-ẓee-na kha-si-rooo ʹañ-fu-sa-hum wa-ḍal-la ʻan-hum- maa kaa-noo yaf-ta-roon!

11:22.text: Laa- ja-ra-ma ʹan-na-hum fil- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti hu-mul- ʹakh-sa-roon!

11:23.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti wa-ʹakh-ba-tooo ʹi-laa Rab-bi-him ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bul- Jan-nah, hum fee-haa khaa-li-doon!

11:24.text: Ma-s̤a-lul- fa-ree-q̣ay-ni kal-ʹaʻ-maa wal-ʹa-ṣam-mi wal-ba-ṣee-ri was-sa-meeʻ. Hal yas-ta-wi-yaa-ni ma-s̤a-laa? ʹA-fa-laa ta-ẓak-ka-roon?

11:25.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹar-sal-naa Noo-ḥan ʹi-laa Q̣aw-mih: ʹin-nee la-kum na-ẓee-rum- mu-been:

11:26.text: ʹAl- laa taʻ-bu-dooo ʹil-lal- laah: ʹin-neee ʹa-khaa-fu ʻa-lay-kum ʻA-ẓaa-ba Yaw-min ʹA-leem.

11:27.text: Fa-q̣aa-lal- Ma-la-ʹul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo miñ- q̣aw-mi-hee maa- na-raa-ka ʹil-laa ba-sha-ram- mis̤-la-naa wa-maa na-raa-kat- ta-ba-ʻa-ka ʹil-lal- la-ẓee-na hum ʹa-raa-ẓi-lu-naa baa-di-yar- raʹy: wa-maa na-raa la-kum ʻa-lay-naa miñ- faḍ-lim- bal na-z̤̣un-nu-kum kaa-ẓi-been!

11:28.text: Q̣aa-la yaa-q̣aw-mi ʹa-ra-ʹay-tum ʹiñ- kuñ-tu ʻa-laa Bay-yi-na-tim- mir- Rab-bee wa-ʹaa-taa-nee Raḥ-ma-tam- min ʻIñ-di-hee fa-ʻum-mi-yat ʻa-lay-kum? ʹA-nul-zi-mu-ku-moo-haa wa-ʹañ-tum la-haa kaa-ri-hoon?

11:29.text: Wa-yaa-q̣aw-mi laaa ʹas-ʹa-lu-kum ʻa-lay-hi maa-laa: ʹin ʹaj-ri-ya ʹil-laa ʻa-lal- laa-hi wa-maaa ʹa-na bi-ṭaa-ri-dil- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo: ʹin-na-hum- mu-laa-q̣oo Rab-bi-him wa-laa-kin-neee ʹa-raa-kum q̣aw-mañ- taj-ha-loon!

11:30.text: Wa-yaa-q̣aw-mi mañy- yañ-ṣu-ru-nee mi-nal- laa-hi ʹiñ- ṭa-rat-tu-hum? ʹA-fa-laa ta-ẓak-ka-roon!

11:31.text: Wa-laaa ʹa-q̣oo-lu la-kum ʻiñ-dee kha-zaaa-ʹi-nul- laa-hi wa-laaa ʹaʻ-la-mul- g̣ay-ba wa-laaa ʹa-q̣oo-lu ʹin-nee ma-la-kuñw- wa-laaa ʹa-q̣oo-lu lil-la-ẓee-na taz-da-reee ʹaʻ-yu-nu-kum lañy- yuʹ-ti-ya-hu-mul- laa-hu khay-raa: ʹAl-laa-hu ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-maa feee ʹañ-fu-si-him: ʹin-neee ʹi-ẓal- la-mi-naz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen.

11:32.text: Q̣aa-loo yaa-Noo-ḥu q̣ad jaa-dal-ta-naa fa-ʹak-s̤ar-ta ji-daa-la-naa faʹ-ti-naa bi-maa ta-ʻi-du-naaa ʹiñ- kuñ-ta mi-naṣ- ṣaa-di-q̣een?

11:33.text: Q̣aa-la ʹin-na-maa yaʹ-tee-kum̃- bi-hil- laa-hu ʹiñ- shaa-ʹa wa-maaa ʹañ-tum̃- bi-muʻ-ji-zeen!

11:34.text: Wa-laa yañ-fa-ʻu-kum nuṣ-ḥeee ʹin ʹa-rat-tu ʹan ʹañ-ṣa-ḥa la-kum ʹiñ kaa-nal- laa-hu yu-ree-du ʹañy- yug̣-wi-ya-kum: Hu-wa Rab-bu-kum! wa-ʹi-lay-hi tur-ja-ʻoon!

11:35.text: ʹAm ya-q̣oo-loo-naf- ta-raah? Q̣ul ʹi-nif- ta-ray-tu-hoo fa-ʻa-lay-ya ʹij-raa-mee wa-ʹa-na ba-reee-ʹum- mim-maa tuj-ri-moon!

11:36.text: Wa-ʹoo-ḥi-ya ʹi-laa Noo-ḥin ʹan-na-hu lañy- yuʹ-mi-na miñ- q̣aw-mi-ka ʹil-laa mañ q̣ad ʹaa-ma-na fa-laa tab-ta-ʹis bi-maa kaa-noo yaf-ʻa-loon.

11:37.text: Waṣ-na-ʻil- Ful-ka bi-ʹaʻ-yu-ni-naa wa-Waḥ-yi-naa wa-laa tu-khaa-ṭib-nee fil- la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-moo: ʹin-na-hum- mug̣-ra-q̣oon.

11:38.text: Wa-yaṣ-na-ʻul- Fulk: wa-kul-la-maa mar-ra ʻa-lay-hi ma-la-ʹum- miñ- q̣aw-mi-hee sa-khi-roo minh. Q̣aa-la ʹiñ- tas-kha-roo min-naa fa-ʹin-naa nas-kha-ru miñ-kum ka-maa tas-kha-roon!

11:39.text: Fa-saw-fa taʻ-la-moo-na mañy- yaʹ-tee-hi ʻA-ẓaa-buñy- yukh-zee-hi wa-ya-ḥil-lu ʻa-lay-hi ʻa-ẓaa-bum- mu-q̣eem:

11:40.text: Ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa jaaa-ʹa ʹAm-ru-naa wa-faa-rat- tan-noo-ru q̣ul-naḥ- mil fee-haa miñ- kul-liñ- zaw-jay-nis̤- nay-ni wa-ʹah-la-ka ʹil-laa mañ- sa-ba-q̣a ʻa-lay-hil- Q̣aw-lu wa-man ʹaa-man. Wa-maaa ʹaa-ma-na ma-ʻa-hooo ʹil-laa q̣a-leel.

11:41.text: Wa-q̣aa-lar- ka-boo fee-ha bis-mil- laa-hi maj-rai-haa wa-mur-saa-haa! ʹIn-na Rab-bee la-G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem!

11:42.text: Wa-hi-ya taj-ree bi-him fee maw-jiñ- kal-ji-baal. Wa-naa-daa Noo-ḥu-nib- na-hoo wa-kaa-na fee maʻ-zi-liñy- yaa-bu-nay- yar-kam- ma-ʻa-naa wa-laa ta-kum- ma-ʻal- Kaa-fi-reen!

11:43.text: Q̣aa-la sa-ʹaa-weee ʹi-laa ja-ba-liñy- yaʻ-ṣi-mu-nee mi-nal- maaaʹ. Q̣aa-la laa- ʻaa-ṣi-mal- yaw-ma min ʹAm-ril- laa-hi ʹil-laa mar- ra-ḥim! Wa-ḥaa-la bay-na-hu-mal- maw-ju fa-kaa-na mi-nal- mug̣-ra-q̣een.

11:44.text: Wa-q̣ee-la yaaa-ʹar-ḍub- la-ʻee maaa-ʹa-ki wa-yaa-sa-maaa-ʹu ʹaq̣-li-ʻee wa-g̣ee-ḍal- maaa-ʹu wa-q̣u-ḍi-yal- ʹam-ru was-ta-wat ʻa-lal- joo-diy-yi wa-q̣ee-la buʻ-dal- lil-q̣aw-miz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen!

11:45.text: Wa-naa-daa Noo-ḥur- Rab-ba-hoo fa-q̣aa-la Rab-bi ʹin-nab- Nee min ʹah-lee wa-ʹin-na waʻ-da-kal- ḥaq̣-q̣u wa-ʹAñ-ta ʹaḥ-ka-mul- Ḥaa-ki-meen!

11:46.text: Q̣aa-la yaa-Noo-ḥu ʹin-na-hoo lay-sa min ʹah-lik: ʹin-na-hoo ʻa-ma-lun g̣ay-ru ṣaa-liḥ. Fa-laa tas-ʹal-ni maa- lay-sa la-ka bi-hee ʻilm! ʹIn-neee ʹa-ʻi-z̤̣u-ka ʹañ- ta-koo-na mi-nal- jaa-hi-leen!

11:47.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-bi ʹin-neee ʹa-ʻoo-ẓu bi-ka ʹan ʹas-ʹa-la-ka maa- lay-sa lee bi-hee ʻilm. Wa-ʹil-laa tag̣-fir lee wa-tar-ḥam-nee ʹa-kum- mi-nal- khaa-si-reen!

11:48.text: Q̣ee-la yaa-Noo-ḥuh- biṭ bi-Sa-laa-mim- min-naa wa-Ba-ra-kaa-tin ʻa-lay-ka wa-ʻa-laaa ʹU-ma-mim- mim-mam- ma-ʻak: wa-ʹu-ma-muñ- sa-nu-mat-ti-ʻu-hum s̤um-ma ya-mas-su-hum- min-naa ʻa-ẓaa-bun ʹa-leem.

11:49.text: Til-ka min ʹam-baaa-ʹil- g̣ay-bi noo-ḥee-haaa ʹi-layk: maa- kuñ-ta taʻ-la-mu-haaa ʹañ-ta wa-laa q̣aw-mu-ka miñ- q̣ab-li haa-ẓaa. Faṣ-bir ʹin-nal- ʻAa-q̣i-ba-ta lil-Mut-ta-q̣een.

11:50.text: Wa-ʹi-laa ʻAa-din ʹa-khaa-hum Hoo-daa. Q̣aa-la yaa-q̣aw-miʻ- bu-dul- laa-ha maa- la-kum- min ʹi-laa-hin g̣ay-ruh. ʹIn ʹañ-tum ʹil-laa muf-ta-roon!

11:51.text: Yaa-q̣aw-mi laaa ʹas-ʹa-lu-kum ʻa-lay-hi ʹaj-raa. ʹIn ʹaj-ri-ya ʹil-laa ʻa-lal- la-ẓee fa-ṭa-ra-nee: ʹa-fa-laa taʻ-q̣i-loon?

11:52.text: Wa-yaa-q̣aw-mis- tag̣-fi-roo Rab-ba-kum s̤um-ma too-booo ʹi-lay-hi yur-si-lis- sa-maaa-ʹa ʻa-lay-kum- mid-raa-rañw- wa-ya-zid-kum q̣uw-wa-tan ʹi-laa q̣uw-wa-ti-kum wa-laa ta-ta-wal-law muj-ri-meen!

11:53.text: Q̣aa-loo yaa-Hoo-du maa- jiʹ-ta-naa bi-Bay-yi-na-tiñw- wa-maa- naḥ-nu bi-taa-ri-keee ʹaa-li-ha-ti-naa ʻañ- q̣aw-li-ka wa-maa naḥ-nu la-ka bi-Muʹ-mi-neen!

11:54.text: ʹIn- na-q̣oo-lu ʹil-laʻ- ta-raa-ka baʻ-ḍu ʹaa-li-ha-ti-naa bi-soooʹ. Q̣aa-la ʹin-neee ʹush-hi-dul- laa-ha wash-ha-dooo ʹan-nee ba-reee-ʹum- mim-maa tush-ri-koon.

11:55.text: Miñ- doo-ni-hee fa-kee-doo-nee ja-mee-ʻañ- s̤um-ma laa- tuñ-z̤̣i-roon.

11:56.text: ʹIn-nee ta-wak-kal-tu ʻa-lal- laa-hi Rab-bee Wa-Rab-bi-kum! Maa- miñ- daaab-ba-tin ʹil-laa Hu-wa ʹaa-khi-ẓum- bi-naa-si-ya-ti-haa. ʹIn-na Rab-bee ʻa-laa Ṣi-raa-ṭim- Mus-ta-q̣eem.

11:57.text: Fa-ʹiñ- ta-wal-law fa-q̣ad ʹab-lag̣-tu-kum- maaa ʹur-sil-tu bi-heee ʹi-lay-kum. Wa-yas-takh-li-fu Rab-bee q̣aw-man g̣ay-ra-kum, wa-laa ta-ḍur-roo-na-hoo shay-ʹaa. ʹIn-na Rab-bee ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹin Ḥa-feez̤̣.

11:58.text: Wa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹa ʹam-ru-naa naj-jay-naa Hoo-dañw- wal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo ma-ʻa-hoo bi-Raḥ-ma-tim- min-naa: wa-naj-jay-naa-hum- min ʻa-ẓaa-bin g̣a-leez̤̣.

11:59.text: Wa-til-ka ʻAa-duñ ja-ḥa-doo bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti- Rab-bi-him wa-ʻa-ṣaw Ru-su-la-hoo wat-ta-ba-ʻooo ʹam-ra kul-li jab-baa-rin ʻa-need.

11:60.text: Wa-ʹut-bi-ʻoo fee haa-ẓi-hid- dun-yaa laʻ-na-tañw- wa-Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-mah. ʹA-laaa ʹin-na ʻAa-dañ- ka-fa-roo Rab-ba-hum! ʹA-laa buʻ-dal- li-ʻAa-diñ- Q̣aw-mi Hood!

11:61.text: Wa-ʹi-laa S̤a-moo-da ʹa-khaa-hum Ṣaa-li-ḥaa. Q̣aa-la yaa-q̣aw-miʻ- bu-dul- laa-ha maa- min la-kum ʹi-la-hin g̣ay-ruh. Hu-wa ʹañ-sha-ʹa-kum- mi-nal- ʹar-ḍi was-taʻ-ma-ra-kum fee-haa fas-tag̣-fi-roo-hu s̤um-ma too-booo ʹi-layh: ʹin-na Rab-bee Q̣a-ree-bum- Mu-jeeb.

11:62.text: Q̣aa-loo yaa-Ṣaa-li-ḥu q̣ad kuñ-ta fee-naa mar-juw-wañ- q̣ab-la haa-ẓaaa ʹa-tan-haa-naaa ʹan- naʻ-bu-da maa- yaʻ-bu-du ʹaa-baaa-ʹu-naa wa-ʹin-na-naa la-fee shak-kim- mim-maa tad-ʻoo-naaa ʹi-lay-hi mu-reeb.

11:63.text: Q̣aa-la yaa-q̣aw-mi ʹa-ra-ʹay-tum ʹiñ- kuñ-tu ʻa-laa Bay-yi-na-tim- mir- Rab-bee wa-ʹaa-taa-nee min-hu Raḥ-ma-tañ- fa-mañy- yañ-ṣu-ru-nee mi-nal- laa-hi ʹin ʻa-ṣay-tuh? Fa-maa ta-zee-du-na-nee g̣ay-ra takh-seeer?

11:64.text: Wa-yaa-q̣aw-mi haa-ẓi-hee naa-q̣a-tul- laa-hi la-kum ʹaa-ya-tañ fa-ẓa-roo-haa taʹ-kul feee ʹar-ḍil- laa-hi wa-laa ta-mas-soo-haa bi-sooo-ʹiñ- fa-yaʹ-khu-ẓa-kum ʻA-ẓaa-buñ- q̣a-reeb!

11:65.text: Fa-ʻa-q̣a-roo-haa fa-q̣aa-la ta-mat-ta-ʻoo fee daa-ri-kum s̤a-laa-s̤a-ta ʹay-yaam: ẓaa-li-ka waʻ-dun g̣ay-ru mak-ẓoob!

11:66.text: Fa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹa ʹAm-ru-naa naj-jay-naa Ṣaa-li-ḥañw- wal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo ma-ʻa-hoo bi-Raḥ-ma-tim- min-naa wa-min khiz-yi Yaw-mi-ʹiẓ. ʹIn-na Rab-ba-ka Hu-wal- Q̣a-wiy-yul- ʻA-zeez.

11:67.text: Wa-ʹa-kha-ẓal- la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-muṣ- Ṣay-ḥa-tu fa-ʹaṣ-ba-ḥoo fee di-yaa-ri-him jaa-s̤i-meen.

11:68.text: Ka-ʹal- lam yag̣-naw fee-haa. ʹA-laaa ʹin-na S̤a-moo-da ka-fa-roo Rab-ba-hum! ʹA-laa buʻ-dal- li-S̤a-mood.

11:69.text: Wa-la-q̣ad jaaa-ʹat Ru-su-lu-naaa ʹIb-raa-hee-ma bil-bush-raa q̣aa-loo Sa-laa-maa! Q̣aa-la Sa-laa-muñ- fa-maa la-bi-s̤a ʹañ- jaaa-ʻa ḥa-neeẓ. bi-ʻij-lin

11:70.text: Fa-lam-maa ra-ʹaaa ʹay-di-ya-hum laa- ta-ṣi-lu ʹi-lay-hi na-ki-ra-hum wa-ʹaw-ja-sa min-hum khee-fah. Q̣aa-loo laa- ta-khaf ʹin-naaa ʹur-sil-naaa ʹi-laa Q̣aw-mi Looṭ.

11:71.text: Wam-ra-ʹa-tu-hoo q̣aaa-ʹi-ma-tuñ- fa-ḍa-ḥi-kat fa-bash-shar-naa-haa bi-ʹIs-ḥaa-q̣a wa-miñw- wa-raaa-ʹi ʹIs-ḥaa-q̣a Yaʻ-q̣oob.

11:72.text: Q̣aa-lat yaa-way-la-taaa ʹa-ʹa-li-du wa-ʹa-na ʻa-joo-zuñw- Wa-haa-ẓaa baʻ-lee shay-khaa? ʹIn-na haa-ẓaa la-shay-ʹun ʻa-jeeb!

11:73.text: Q̣aa-looo ʹa-taʻ-ja-bee-na min ʹAm-ril- laa-hi Raḥ-ma-tul- laa-hi wa-Ba-ra-kaa-tu-hoo ʻa-lay-kum ʹAh-lal- Bayt! ʹIn-na-hoo Ḥa-mee-dum- Ma-jeed!

11:74.text: Fa-lam-maa ẓa-ha-ba ʻan ʹIb-raa-hee-mar- raw-ʻu wa-jaaa-ʹat- hul-bush-raa yu-jaa-di-lu-naa fee Q̣aw-mi Looṭ.

11:76.text: Yaaa-ʹIb-raa-hee-mu ʹaʻ-riḍ ʻan haa-ẓaa. ʹIn-na-hoo q̣ad jaaa-ʹa ʹam-ru Rab-bik: wa-ʹin-na-hum ʹaa-tee-him ʻa-ẓaa-bun g̣ay-ru mar-dood!

11:77.text: Wa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹat Ru-su-lu-naa Loo-ṭañ seee-ʹa bi-him wa-ḍaa-q̣a bi-him ẓar-ʻañw- wa-q̣aa-la haa-ẓaa yaw-mun ʻa-ṣeeb.

11:78.text: Wa-jaaa-ʹa-hoo q̣aw-mu-hoo yuh-ra-ʻoo-na ʹi-layh. Wa-miñ- q̣ab-lu kaa-noo yaʻ-ma-loo-nas- say-yi-ʹaat. Q̣aa-la yaa-q̣aw-mi haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi ba-naa-tee hun-na ʹaṭ-ha-ru la-kum fat-ta-q̣ul- laa-ha wa-laa tukh-zoo-ni fee ḍay-fee! ʹA-lay-sa miñ-kum ra-ju-lur- ra-sheed?

11:79.text: Q̣aa-loo la-q̣ad ʻa-lim-ta maa- la-naa fee ba-naa-ti-ka min ḥaq̣q̣: wa-ʹin-na-ka la-taʻ-la-mu maa- nu-reed!

11:80.text: Q̣aa-la law ʹan-na lee bi-kum q̣uw-wa-tan ʹaw aa-weee ʹi-laa ruk-niñ- sha-deed.

11:81.text: Q̣aa-loo Yaa-Loo-ṭu ʹin-naa Ru-su-lu Rab-bi-ka lañy- ya-ṣi-looo ʹi-layk: fa-ʹas-ri bi-ʹah-li-ka bi-q̣iṭ-ʻim- mi-nal- lay-li wa-laa yal-ta-fit miñ-kum ʹa-ḥa-dun ʹil-lam- ra-ʹa-tak: ʹin-na-hoo mu-ṣee-bu-haa maaa ʹa-ṣaa-ba-hum. ʹIn-na maw-ʻi-da-hu-muṣ- ṣubḥ. ʹA-lay-saṣ- ṣub-ḥu bi-q̣a-reeb?

11:82.text: Fa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹa ʹam-ru-naa ja-ʻal-naa ʻaa-li-ya-haa saa-fi-la-haa wa-ʹam-ṭar-naa ʻa-lay-haa ḥi-jaa-ra-tam- miñ- sij-jee-lim- mañ-ḍood,―

11:83.text: Mu-saw-wa-ma-tan ʻiñ-da Rab-bik: wa-maa hi-ya mi-naz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-mee-na bi-ba-ʻeed!

11:84.text: Wa-ʹi-laa Mad-ya-na ʹa-khaa-hum Shu-ʻay-baa: q̣aa-la yaa-q̣aw-miʻ- bu-dul- laa-ha maa- la-kum- min ʹi-laa-hin g̣ay-ruh. Wa-laa tañ-q̣u-ṣul- mik-yaa-la wal-mee-zaa-na ʹin-neee ʹa-raa-kum̃- bi-khay-riñw- wa-ʹin-neee ʹa-khaa-fu ʻa-lay-kum ʻa-ẓaa-ba Yaw-mim- Mu-ḥeeṭ.

11:85.text: Wa-yaa-q̣aw-mi ʹaw-ful- mik-yaa-la wal-mee-zaa-na bil-q̣is-ṭi wa-laa tab-kha-sun- naa-sa ʹash-yaaa-ʹa-hum wa-laa taʻ-s̤aw fil- ʹar-ḍi muf-si-deen.

11:86.text: Ba-q̣ee-ya-tul- laa-hi khay-rul- la-kum ʹiñ- kuñ-tum- Muʹ-mi-neen! Wa-maaa ʹa-na ʻa-lay-kum̃- bi-Ḥa-feez̤̣!

11:87.text: Q̣aa-loo yaa-Shu-ʻay-bu ʹa-ṣa-laa-tu-ka taʹ-mu-ru-ka ʹan- nat-ru-ka maa- yaʻ-bu-du ʹaa-baaa-ʹu-naaa ʹaw ʹan- naf-ʻa-la feee  ʹam-waa-li-naa maa- na-shaaaʹ? ʹIn-na-ka la-ʹañ-tal- ḥa-lee-mur- Ra-sheed!

11:88.text: Q̣aa-la yaa-q̣aw-mi ʹa-ra-ʹay-tum ʹiñ- kuñ-tu ʻa-laa Bay-yi-na-tim- mir- Rab-bee wa-ra-za-q̣a-nee min-hu riz-q̣an ḥa-sa-naa? Wa-maaa ʹu-ree-du ʹan ʹu-khaa-li-fa-kum ʹi-laa maaa ʹan-haa-kum ʻanh. ʹIn ʹu-ree-du ʹil-lal- ʹiṣ-laa-ḥa mas- ta-ṭaʻt; wa-maa taw-fee-q̣eee ʹil-laa bil-laah. ʻA-lay-hi ta-wak-kal-tu wa-ʹi-lay-hi ʹu-neeb.

11:89.text: Wa-yaa-q̣aw-mi laa- yaj-ri-man-na-kum shi-q̣aa-q̣eee ʹañy- yu-ṣee-ba-kum- mis̤-lu maaa ʹa-ṣaa-ba q̣aw-ma Noo-ḥin ʹaw q̣aw-ma Hoo-din ʹaw q̣aw-ma Ṣaa-liḥ: wa-maa q̣aw-mu Loo-ṭim- miñ-kum̃- bi-ba-ʻeed!

11:90.text: Was-tag̣-fi-roo Rab-ba-kum s̤um-maa too-booo ʹi-layh: ʹin-na Rab-bee Ra-ḥee-muñw- wa-dood.

11:91.text: Q̣aa-loo yaa-Shu-ʻay-bu maa- naf-q̣a-hu ka-s̤ee-ram- mim-maa ta-q̣oo-lu wa-ʹin-naa la-na-raa-ka fee-naa ḍa-ʻee-faa! Wa-law-laa- rah-ṭu-ka la-ra-jam-naak! Wa-maaa ʹañ-ta ʻa-lay-naa bi-ʻa-zeez!

11:92.text: Q̣aa-la yaa-q̣aw-mi ʹa-rah-ṭeee ʹa-ʻaz-zu ʻa-lay-kum- mi-nal- laah? Wat-ta-khaẓ-tu-moo-hu wa-raaa-ʹa-kum z̤̣ih-riy-yaa. ʹIn-na Rab-bee bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na Mu-ḥeeṭ!

11:93.text: Wa-yaa-q̣aw-miʻ- ma-loo ʻa-laa ma-kaa-na-ti-kum ʹin-nee ʻaa-mil: saw-fa taʻ-la-moo-na mañy- yaʹ-tee-hi ʻa-ẓaa-buñy- yukh-zee-hi wa-man hu-wa kaa-ẓib! War-ta-q̣i-booo ʹin-nee ma-ʻa-kum ra-q̣eeb.

11:94.text: Wa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹa ʹam-ru-naa naj-jay-naa Shu-ʻay-bañw wal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo ma-ʻa-hoo bi-Raḥ-ma-tim- min-naa wa-ʹa-kha-ẓa-til- la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-muṣ- Ṣay-ha-tu fa-ʹaṣ-ba-ḥoo fee di-yaa-ri-him jaa-s̤i-meen,―

11:95.text: Ka-ʹal- lam yag̣-naw fee-haa! ʹA-laa buʻ-dal- li-Mad-ya-na ka-maa ba-ʻi-dat S̤a-mood!

11:96.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹar-sal-naa Moo-saa bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa wa-sul-ṭaa-nim- mu-been.

11:97.text: ʹI-laa fir-ʻaw-na wa-ma-la-ʹi-hee fat-ta-ba-ʻooo ʹam-ra Fir-ʻaw-na, wa-maaa ʹam-ru Fir-ʻaw-na bi-Ra-sheed.

11:98.text: Yaq̣-du-mu q̣aw-ma-hoo Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti fa-ʹaw-ra-da-hu-mun- Naar: wa-biʹ-sal- wir-dul- maw-rood!

11:99.text: Wa-ʹut-bi-ʻoo fee haa-ẓi-hee laʻ-na-tañw- wa-Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaamah: biʹ-sar- rif-dul- mar-food!

11:100.text: Ẓaa-li-ka min ʹam-baaa-ʹil- q̣u-raa na-q̣uṣ-ṣu-hoo ʻa-lay-ka min-haa q̣aaa-ʹi-muñw- wa-ḥa-ṣeed.

11:101.text: Wa-maa z̤̣a-lam-naa-hum wa-laa-kiñ- z̤̣a-la-mooo ʹañ-fu-sa-hum fa-maaa ʹag̣-nat ʻan-hum ʹaa-li-ha-tu-hu-mul- la-tee yad-ʻoo-na miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi miñ- shay-ʹil- lam-maa jaaa-ʹa ʹam-ru Rab-bik: wa-maa zaa-doo-hum g̣ay-ra tat-beeb!

11:102.text: Wa-Ka-ẓaa-li-ka ʹakh-ẓu Rab-bi-ka ʹi-ẓaaa ʹa-kha-ẓal- q̣u-raa wa-hi-ya z̤̣aa-li-mah: ʹin-na ʹakh-ẓa-hooo ʹa-lee-muñ- sha-deed.

11:103.text: ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-ya-tal- li-man khaa-fa ʻa-ẓaa-bal- ʹAa-khi-rah: ẓaa-li-ka Yaw-mum- maj-moo-ʻul- la-hun- naa-su wa-ẓaa-li-ka Yaw-mum- Mash-hood.

11:105.text: Yaw-ma yaʹ-ti laa- ta-kal-la-mu naf-sun ʹil-laa bi-ʹiẓ-nih: fa-min-hum sha-q̣iy-yuñw- wa-sa-ʻeed.

11:106.text: Fa-ʹam-mal- la-ẓee-na sha-q̣oo fa-fin- naa-ri la-hum fee-haa za-fee-ruñw- wa-sha-heeq̣.

11:107.text: Khaa-li-dee-na fee-haa maa- daa-ma-tis- sa-maa-waa-tu wal-ʹar-ḍu ʹil-laa maa- shaaa-ʹa Rab-buk: ʹin-na Rab-ba-ka faʻ-ʻaa-lul- li-maa yu-reed.

11:108.text: Wa-ʹam-mal- la-ẓee-na su-ʻi-doo fa-fil- Jan-na-ti khaa-li-dee-na fee-haa maa- daa-ma-tis- sa-maa-waa-tu wal-ʹar-ḍu ʹil-laa maa- shaaa-ʹa Rab-buk: ʻa-ṭaaa-ʹan g̣ay-ra maj-ẓooẓ.

11:109.text: Fa-laa ta-ku fee mir-ya-tim- mim-maa yaʻ-bu-du haaa-ʹu-laaaʹ. Maa- yaʻ-bu-doo-na ʹil-laa ka-maa yaʻ-bu-du ʹaa-baaa-ʹuhum- miñ- q̣abl: wa-ʹin-naa la-mu-waf-foo-hum na-ṣee-ba-hum g̣ay-ra mañ-q̣ooṣ.

11:110.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹaa-tay-naa Moo-sal- Ki-taa-ba fakh-tu-li-fa feeh: wa-law-laa- ka-li-ma-tuñ- sa-ba-q̣at mir- Rab-bi-ka la-q̣u-ḍi-ya bay-na-hum: wa-ʹin-na-hum la-fee shak-kim- min-hu mu-reeb.

11:111.text: Wa-ʹin-na kul-lal- lam-maa la-yu-waf-fi-yan-na-hum Rab-bu-ka ʹaʻ-maa-la-hum: ʹin-na-hoo bi-maa yaʻ-ma-loo-na Kha-beer.

11:112.text: Fas-ta-q̣im ka-maaa ʹu-mir-ta wa-mañ- taa-ba ma-ʻa-ka wa-laa taṭ-g̣aw: ʹin-na-hoo bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na Ba-ṣeer.

11:113.text: Wa-laa tar-ka-nooo ʹi-lal- la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-moo fa-ta-mas-sa-ku-mun- Naa-ru,― wa-maa la-kum- miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi min ʹaw-li-yaaa-ʹa s̤um-ma laa- tuñ-ṣa-roon.

11:114.text: Wa-ʹa-q̣i-miṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta ṭa-ra-fa-yin- na-haa-ri wa-zu-la-fam- mi-nal- layl: ʹin-nal- ḥa-sa-naa-ti yuẓ-hib-nas- say-yi-ʹaat: ẓaa-li-ka ẓik-raa liẓ-ẓaa-ki-reen:

11:115.text: Waṣ-bir fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha laa- yu-ḍee-ʻu ʹaj-ral- Muḥ-si-neen.

11:116.text: Fa-law-laa- kaa-na mi-nal- q̣u-roo-ni miñ- q̣ab-li-kum ʹU-loo- ba-q̣iy-ya-tiñy- yan-haw-na ʻa-nil- fa-saa-di fil- ʹar-ḍi ʹil-laa q̣a-lee-lam- mim-man ʹañ-jay-naa min-hum? Wat-ta-ba-ʻal- la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-moo maaa ʹut-ri-foo fee-hi wa-kaa-noo muj-ri-meen.

11:117.text: Wa-maa kaa-na Rab-bu-ka li-yuh-li-kal- q̣u-raa bi-z̤̣ul-miñw- wa-ʹah-lu-haa muṣ-li-ḥoon.

11:118.text: Wa-law shaaa-ʹa Rab-bu-ka la-ja-ʻa-l an-naa-sa ʹUm-ma-tañw- waa-ḥi-da-tañw- wa-laa- ya-zaa-loo-na mukh-ta-li-feen.

11:119.text: ʹIl-laa mar- ra-ḥi-ma Rab-buk: wa-li-ẓaa-li-ka kha-la-q̣a-hum: wa-tam-mat Ka-li-ma-tu Rab-bi-ka la-ʹam-la-ʹan-na Ja-han-na-ma mi-nal- jin-na-ti wan-naa-si ʹaj-ma-ʻeen.

11:120.text: Wa-kul-lan- na-q̣uṣ-ṣu ʻa-lay-ka min ʹam-baaa-ʹir- ru-su-li maa- nu-s̤ab-bi-tu bi-hee fu-ʹaa-dak: wa-jaaa-ʹa-ka fee haa-ẓi-hil- Ḥaq̣-q̣u wa-maw-ʻi-z̤̣a-tuñw- wa-ẓik-raa lil-Muʹ-mi-neen.

11:121.text: Wa-q̣ul- lil-la-ẓee-na laa- yuʹ-mi-noo- naʻ-ma-loo ʻa-laa ma-kaa-na-ti-kum: ʹin-naa ʻaa-mi-loon;

11:123.text: Wa-lil-laa-hi g̣ay-bus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi wa-ʹi-lay-hi yur-ja-ʻul- ʹam-ru kul-lu-hoo faʻ-bud-hu wa-ta-wak-kal ʻa-layh: wa-maa Rab-bu-ka bi-g̣aa-fi-lin ʻam-maa taʻ-ma-loon.

12:2.text: ʹIn-naaa ʹañ-zal-naa-hu Q̣ur-ʹaa-nan ʻA-ra-biy-yal- la-ʻal-la-kum taʻ-q̣i-loon.

12:3.text: Naḥ-nu na-q̣uṣ-ṣu ʻa-lay-ka ʹaḥ-sa-nal- q̣a-ṣa-ṣi bi-maaa ʹaw-ḥay-naaa ʹi-lay-ka haa-ẓal- Q̣ur-ʹaan: wa-ʹiñ- kuñ-ta miñ- q̣ab-li-hee la-mi-nal- g̣aa-fi-leen.

12:4.text: ʹIẓ q̣aa-la Yoo-su-fu li-ʹa-bee-hi yaaa-ʹa-ba-ti ʹin-nee ra-ʹay-tu ʹa-ḥa-da ʻa-sha-ra kaw-ka-bañw- wash-sham-sa wal-q̣a-ma-ra ra-ʹay-tu-hum lee saa-ji-deen.

12:5.text: Q̣aa-la yaa-bu-nay-ya laa- taq̣-ṣuṣ ruʹ-yaa-ka ʻa-laaa ʹikh-wa-ti-ka fa-ya-kee-doo la-ka kay-daa! ʹIn-nash- shay-ṭaa-na lil-ʹiñ-saa-ni ʻa-duw-wum- mu-been!

12:6.text: Wa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka yaj-ta-bee-ka Rab-bu-ka wa-yu-ʻal-li-mu-ka miñ taʹ-wee-lil- ʹa-ḥaa-dee-s̤i wa-yu-tim-mu niʻ-ma-ta-hoo ʻa-lay-ka wa-ʻa-laaa ʹaa-li- Yaʻ-q̣oo-ba ka-maaa ʹa-tam-ma-haa ʻa-laaa ʹa-ba-way-ka miñ- q̣ab-lu ʹIb-raa-hee-ma wa-ʹis-ḥaaq̣! ʹIn-na Rab-ba-ka ʻA-lee-mun Ḥa-keem.

12:7.text: La-q̣ad kaa-na fee yoo-su-fa wa-ʹikh-wa-ti-hee ʹAa-yaa-tul- lis-saaa-ʹi-leen.

12:8.text: ʹIẓ q̣aa-loo la-Yoo-su-fu wa-ʹa-khoo-hu ʹa-ḥab-bu ʹi-laaa ʹa-bee-naa min-naa wa-naḥ-nu ʻuṣ-bah! ʹIn-na ʹa-baa-naa la-fee ḍa-laa-lim- mu-been!

12:9.text: ʹUq̣-tu-loo Yoo-su-fa ʹa-wiṭ-ra- ḥoo-hu ʹar-ḍañy- yakh-lu la-kum waj-hu ʹa-bee-kum wa-ta-koo-noo mim- baʻ-di-hee q̣aw-mañ- ṣaa-li-ḥeen!

12:10.text: Q̣aa-la q̣aaa-ʹi-lum- min-hum laa- taq̣-tu-loo Yoo-su-fa wa-ʹal-q̣oo-hu fee g̣a-yaa-ba-til- jub-bi yal-ta-q̣iṭ-hu baʻ-ḍus- say-yaa-ra-ti ʹiñ- kuñ-tum faa-ʻi-leen.

12:11.text: Q̣aa-loo yaaa-ʹa-baa-naa maa- la-ka laa- taʹ-man-naa ʻa-laa Yoo-su-fa wa-ʹin-naa la-hoo la-naa-ṣi-ḥoon?

12:12.text: ʹAr-sil-hu ma-ʻa-naa g̣a-dañy- yar-taʻwa- yal-ʻab wa-ʹin-naa la-hoo la-ḥaa-fi-z̤̣oon.

12:13.text: Q̣aa-la ʹin-nee la-yaḥ-zu-nu-neee ʹañ- taẓ-ha-boo bi-hee wa-ʹa-khaa-fu ʹañy- yaʹ-ku-la-huẓ- ẓiʹ-bu wa-ʹañ-tum ʻan-hu g̣aa-fi-loon.

12:14.text: Q̣aa-loo la-ʹin ʹa-ka-la-huẓ- ẓiʹ-bu wa-naḥ-nu ʻuṣ-ba-tun ʹin-naaa ʹi-ẓal- la-khaa-si-roon!

12:15.text: Fa-lam-maa ẓa-ha-boo bi-hee wa-ʹaj-ma-ʻooo ʹañy- yaj-ʻa-loo-hu fee g̣a-yaa-ba-til- jubb: wa-ʹaw-ḥay-naaa ʹi-lay-hi la-tu-nab-bi-ʹan-na-hum̃- bi-ʹam-ri-him haa-ẓaa wa-hum laa- yash-ʻu-roon.

12:17.text: Q̣aa-loo yaaa-ʹa-baa-naaa ʹin-naa ẓa-hab-naa nas-ta-bi-q̣u wa-ta-rak-naa Yoo-su-fa ʻiñ-da ma-taa-ʻi-naa fa-ʹa-ka-la-huẓ- ẓiʹb. Wa-maaa ʹañ-ta bi-muʹ-mi-nil- la-naa wa-law kun-naa ṣaa-di-q̣een.

12:18.text: Wa-jaaa-ʹoo ʻa-laa q̣a-mee-ṣi-hee bi-da-miñ- ka-ẓib. Q̣aa-la bal saw-wa-lat la-kum ʹañ-fu-su-kum ʹam-raa. Fa-ṣab-ruñ- ja-meel: wal-laa-hul- Mus-ta-ʻaa-nu ʻa-laa maa- ta-ṣi-foon.

12:19.text: Wa-jaaa-ʹat say-yaa-ra-tuñ- fa-ʹar-sa-loo waa-ri-da-hum fa-ʹad-laa dal-wah. Q̣aa-la yaa-bush-raa haa-ẓaa g̣u-laam! Wa-ʹa-sar-roo-hu bi-ḍaa-ʻah! Wal-laa-hu ʻa-lee-mum- bi-maa yaʻ-ma-loon!

12:20.text: Wa-sha-raw-hu bi-s̤a-ma-nim- bakh-siñ- da-raa-hi-ma maʻ-doo-dah: wa-kaa-noo fee-hi mi-naz- zaa-hi-deen!

12:21.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-ẓish- ta-raa-hu mim- Miṣ-ra lim-ra-ʹa-ti-heee ʹak-ri-mee mas̤-waa-hu ʻa-saaa ʹañy- yañ-fa-ʻa-naaa ʹaw nat-ta-khi-ẓa-hoo wa-la-daa. Wa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka mak-kan-naa li-Yoo-su-fa fil- ʹar-ḍi, wa-li-nu-ʻal-li-ma-hoo miñ- taʹ-wee-lil- ʹa-ḥaa-dees̤. Wal-laa-hu g̣aa-li-bun ʻa-laaa ʹam-ri-hee wa-laa-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ran- naa-si laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

12:22.text: Wa-lam-maa ba-la-g̣a ʹa-shud-da-hooo ʹaa-tay-naa-hu ḥuk-mañw- wa-ʻil-maa: wa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka naj-zil- Muḥ-si-neen.

12:23.text: Wa-raa-wa-dat-hul- la-tee hu-wa fee bay-ti-haa ʻan- naf-si-hee wa-g̣al-la-q̣a-til- ʹab-waa-ba wa-q̣aa-lat hay-ta lak! Q̣aa-la ma-ʻaa-ẓal- laa-hi ʹin-na-hoo rab-beee ʹaḥ-sa-na mas̤-waay! In-na-hoo laa- yuf-li-ḥuz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-moon!

12:24.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ham-mat bi-hee wa-ham-ma bi-haa laaa-law ʹar- ra-ʹaa bur-haa-na Rab-bih: Ka-ẓaa-li-ka li-naṣ-ri-fa ʻan-hus- sooo-ʹa wal-faḥ-shaaaʹ: ʹin-na-hoo min ʻi-baa-di-nal- Mukh-la-ṣeen.

12:25.text: Was-ta-ba-q̣al- baa-ba wa-q̣ad-dat q̣a-mee-ṣa-hoo miñ du-bu-riñw- wa-ʹal-fa-yaa say-yi-da-haa la-dal- baab. Q̣aa-lat maa- ja-zaaa-ʹu man ʹa-raa-da bi-ʹah-li-ka sooo-ʹan ʹil-laaa ʹañy- yus-ja-na ʹaw ʻa-ẓaa-bun ʹa-leem?

12:26.text: Q̣aa-la hi-ya raa-wa-dat-nee ʻan- naf-see wa-sha-hi-da shaa-hi-dum- min ʹah-li-haa: ʹiñ- kaa-na q̣a-mee-ṣu-hoo q̣ud-da miñ- q̣u-bu-liñ- fa-ṣa-da-q̣at wa-hu-wa mi-nal- kaa-ẓi-been!

12:27.text: Wa-ʹiñ- kaa-na q̣a-mee-ṣu-hoo q̣ud-da miñ- du-bu-riñ- fa-ka-ẓa-bat wa-hu-wa mi-naṣ- ṣaa-di-q̣een!

12:28.text: Fa-lam-maa ra-ʹaa q̣a-mee-ṣa-hoo q̣ud-da miñ- du-bu-riñ- q̣aa-la ʹin-na-hoo miñ- kay-di-kun-na! ʹIn-na kay-da-kun-na ʻa-z̤̣eem!

12:29.text: Yoo-su-fu ʹaʻ-riḍ ʻan haa-ẓaa was-tag̣-fi-ree li-ẓam-bi-ki ʹin-na-ki kuñ-ti mi-nal- khaa-ṭi-ʹeen!

12:30.text: Wa-q̣aa-la nis-wa-tuñ- fil- Ma-dee-na-tim- ra-ʹa-tul- ʻA-zee-zi tu-raa-wi-du fa-taa-haa ʻan- naf-sih: q̣ad sha-g̣a-fa-haa ḥub-baa: ʹin-naa la-na-raa-haa fee ḍa-laa-lim- mu-been.

12:31.text: Fa-lam-maa sa-mi-ʻat bi-mak-ri-hin-na ʹar-sa-lat ʹi-lay-hin-na wa-ʹaʻ-ta-dat la-hun-na mut-ta-ka-ʹañw- wa-ʹaa-tat kul-la waa-ḥi-da-tim- min-hun-na sik-kee-nañw- wa-q̣aa-la-tikh- ruj ʻa-lay-hinn. Fa-lam-maa ra-ʹay-na-hooo ʹak-bar-na-hoo wa-q̣aṭ-ṭaʻ-na ʹay-di-ya-hun-na wa-q̣ul-na ḥaa-sha lil-laa-hi maa- haa-ẓaa ba-sha-raa! ʹIn haa-ẓaaa ʹil-laa ma-la-kuñ- ka-reem!

12:32.text: Q̣aa-lat fa-ẓaa-li-kun-nal- la-ẓee lum-tun-na-nee feeh! Wa-la-q̣ad raa-wat-tu-hoo ʻan- naf-si-hee fas-taʻ-ṣam! Wa-la-ʹil- lam yaf-ʻal maaa ʹaa-mu-ru-hoo la-yus-ja-nan-na wa-la-ya-koo-nam- mi-naṣ- ṣaa-g̣i-reen!

12:33.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-bis- sij-nu ʹa-ḥab-bu ʹi-lay-ya mim-maa yad-ʻoo-na-neee ʹi-layh: wa-ʹil-laa taṣ-rif ʻan-nee kay-da-hun-na ʹaṣ-bu ʹi-lay-hin-na wa-ʹa-kum- mi-nal- jaa-hi-leen.

12:34.text: Fas-ta-jaa-ba la-hoo Rab-bu-hoo fa-ṣa-ra-fa ʻan-hu kay-da-hunn: ʹin-na-hoo Hu-was- Sa-mee-ʻul- ʻA-leem.

12:35.text: S̤um-ma ba-daa la-hum- mim- baʻ-di maa- ra-ʹa-wul- ʹAa-yaa-ti la-yas-ju-nun-na-hoo ḥat-taa ḥeen.

12:36.text: Wa-da-kha-la ma-ʻa- hus-sij-na fa-ta-yaan. Q̣aa-la ʹa-ḥa-du-hu-maaa ʹin-neee ʹa-raa-neee ʹaʻ-ṣi-ru kham-raa. Wa-q̣aa-lal- ʹaa-kha-ru ʹin-neee ʹa-raa-neee ʹaḥ-mi-lu faw-q̣a raʹ-see khub-zañ- taʹ-ku-luṭ- ṭay-ru minh. Nab-biʹ-naa bi-taʹ-wee-lih: ʹin-naa na-raa-ka mi-nal- Muḥ-si-neen.

12:37.text: Q̣aa-la laa- yaʹ-tee-ku-maa ṭa-ʻaa-muñ- tur-za-q̣aa-ni-heee ʹil-laa nab-baʹ-tu-ku-maa bi-taʹ-wee-li-hee q̣ab-la ʹañy- yaʹ-ti-ya-ku-maa: ẓaa-li-ku-maa mim-maa ʻal-la-ma-nee Rab-bee. ʹIn-nee ta-rak-tu mil-la-ta q̣aw-mil- laa yuʹ-mi-noo-na bil-laa-hi wa-hum̃- bil-ʹAa-khi-ra-ti hum kaa-fi-roon.

12:38.text: Wat-ta-baʻ-tu Mil-la-ta ʹaa-baaa-ʹeee ʹIb-raa-hee-ma wa-ʹIs-ḥaa-q̣a wa-Yaʻ-q̣oob; maa- kaa-na la-naaa ʹan- nush-ri-ka bil-laa-hi miñ- shayʹ: ẓaa-li-ka miñ- faḍ-lil- laa-hi ʻa-lay-naa wa-ʻa-lan- naa-si wa-laa-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ran- naa-si laa- yash-ku-roon.

12:39.text: Yaa-ṣaa-ḥi-ba-yis- sij-ni ʹa-ʹar-baa-bum- mu-ta-far-ri-q̣oo-na khay-run ʹa-mil- laa-hul- Waa-ḥi-dul- Q̣ah-haar?

12:40.text: Maa- taʻ-bu-doo-na miñ- doo-ni-heee ʹil-laaa ʹas-maaa-ʹañ- sam-may-tu-moo-haaa ʹañ-tum wa-ʹaa-baaa-ʹu-kum- maaa ʹañ-za-lal laa-hu bi-haa miñ- sul-ṭaan: ʹi-nil- Ḥuk-mu ʹil-laa lil-laah: ʹa-ma-ra ʹal-laa taʻ-bu-dooo ʹil-laaa ʹiy-yaah: ẓaa-li-kad- Dee-nul- Q̣ay-yi-mu wa-laa-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ran- naa-si laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

12:41.text: Yaa-ṣaa-ḥi-ba-yis- sij-ni ʹam-maaa ʹa-ḥa-du-ku-maa fa-yas-q̣ee rab-ba-hoo kham-raa: wa-ʹam-mal- ʹaa-kha-ru fa-yuṣ-la-bu fa-taʹ-ku-luṭ- ṭay-ru mir- raʹ-sih. Q̣u-ḍi-yal- ʹam-rul- la-ẓee fee-hi tas-taf-ti-yaan.

12:42.text: Wa-q̣aa-la lil-la-ẓee z̤̣an-na ʹan-na-hoo naa-jim- min-hu-maẓ- kur-nee ʻiñ-da rab-bik. Fa-ʹañ-saa-hush- Shay-ṭaa-nu ẓik-ra rab-bi-hee fa-la-bi-s̤a fis- sij-ni biḍ-ʻa si-neen.

12:43.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- ma-li-ku ʹin-neee ʹa-raa sab-ʻa ba-q̣a-raa-tiñ si-maa-niñy- yaʹ-ku-lu-hun-na sab-ʻun ʻi-jaa-fuñw- Wa-sab-ʻa sum-bu-laa-tin khuḍ-riñw- wa-ʹu-kha-ra yaa-bi-saat. Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- ma-la-ʹu ʹaf-too-nee fee ruʹ-yaa-ya ʹiñ kuñ-tum lir-ruʹ-yaa taʻ-bu-roon.

12:44.text: Q̣aa-looo ʹaḍ-g̣aa-s̤u ʹaḥ-laam: Wa-maa naḥ-nu bi-taʹ-wee-lil- ʹaḥ-laa-mi bi-ʻaa-li-meen.

12:45.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee na-jaa min-hu-maa wad-da-ka-ra baʻ-da ʹum-ma-tin ʹa-na ʹu-nab-bi-ʹu-kum̃- bi-taʹ-wee-li-hee fa-ʹar-si-loon.

12:46.text: Yoo-su-fu ʹay-yu-haṣ- Ṣid-dee-q̣u ʹaf-ti-naa fee sab-ʻi ba-q̣a-raa-tiñ si-maa-niñy- yaʹ-ku-lu-hun-na sab-ʻun ʻi-jaa-fuñw- Wa-sab-ʻi sum-bu-laa-tin khuḍ-riñw- wa-ʹu-kha-ra yaa-bi-saa-til- la-ʻal-leee ʹar-ji-ʻu ʹi-lan- naa-si la-ʻal-la-hum yaʻ-la-moon.

12:47.text: Q̣aa-la taz-ra-ʻoo-na sab-ʻa si-nee-na da-ʹa-baa: fa-maa ḥa-ṣat-tum fa-ẓa-roo-hu fee sum-bu-li-heee ʹil-laa q̣a-lee-lam- mim-maa taʹ-ku-loon.

12:48.text: S̤um-ma yaʹ-tee mim- baʻ-di ẓaa-li-ka sab-ʻuñ shi-daa-duñy- yaʹ-kul-na maa- q̣ad-dam-tum la-hun-na ʹil-laa q̣a-lee-lam- mim-maa tuḥ-ṣi-noon.

12:49.text: S̤um-ma yaʹ-tee mim- baʻ-di ẓaa-li-ka ʻaa-muñ- fee-hi yu-g̣aa-s̤un- naa-su wa-fee-hi yaʻ-ṣi-roon.

12:50.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- ma-li-kuʹ too-nee bih. Fa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹa-hur- ra-soo-lu q̣aa-lar- jiʻ ʹi-laa rab-bi-ka fas-ʹal-hu maa- baa-lun- nis-wa-til- laa-tee q̣aṭ-ṭaʻ-na ʹay-di-ya-hunn? ʹIn-na Rab-bee bi-kay-di-hin-na ʻA-leem.

12:51.text: Q̣aa-la maa- khaṭ-bu-kun-na ʹiẓ raa-wat-tun-na Yoo-su-fa ʻan- naf-sih? Q̣ul-na Ḥaa-sha lil-laa-hi maa- ʻa-lim-naa ʻa-lay-hi miñ soooʹ! Q̣aa-la-tim- ra-ʹa-tul- ʻA-zee-zil- ʹaa-na ḥaṣ-ḥa-ṣal- ḥaq̣q̣: ʹa-na raa-wat-tu-hoo ʻan- naf-si-hee wa-ʹin-na-hoo la-mi-naṣ- Ṣaa-di-q̣een.

12:52.text: Ẓaa-li-ka li-yaʻ-la-ma ʹan-nee lam ʹa-khun-hu bil-g̣ay-bi wa-ʹan-nal- laa-ha laa- yah-dee kay-dal- khaaa-ʹi-neen.

12:53.text: Wa-maaa ʹu-bar-ri-ʻu naf-see: ʹin-nan- naf-sa la-ʹam-maa-ra-tum- bis-sooo-ʹi ʹil-laa maa- ra-ḥi-ma Rab-bee: ʹin-na Rab-bee G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

12:54.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- ma-li-kuʹ- too-nee bi-heee ʹas-takh-liṣ-hu li-naf-see. Fa-lam-maa kal-la-ma-hoo q̣aa-la ʹin-na-kal- yaw-ma la-day-naa ma-kee-nun ʹa-meen!

12:55.text: Q̣aa-laj- ʻal-nee ʻa-laa kha-zaaa-ʹi-nil- ʹarḍ: ʹin-nee ḥa-fee-z̤̣un ʻa-leem.

12:56.text: Wa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka mak-kan-naa li-Yoo-su-fa fil- ʹar-ḍi ya-ta-baw-wa-ʹu min-haa ḥay-s̤u ya-shaaaʹ. Nu-ṣee-bu bi-Raḥ-ma-ti-naa man- na-shaaa-ʹu wa-laa nu-ḍee-ʻu ʹaj-ral- Muḥ-si-neen.

12:57.text: Wa-la-ʹaj-rul- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti khay-rul- lil-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-kaa-noo yat-ta-q̣oon.

12:58.text: Wa-jaaa-ʹa ʹikh-wa-tu Yoo-su-fa fa-da-kha-loo ʻa-lay-hi fa-ʻa-ra-fa-hum wa-hum la-hoo muñ-ki-roon.

12:59.text: Wa-lam-maa jah-ha-za-hum̃- bi-ja-haa-zi-him q̣aa-laʹ- too-nee bi-ʹa-khil- la-kum- min ʹa-bee-kum: ʹa-laa ta-raw-na ʹan-neee ʹoo-fil- kay-la wa-ʹa-na khay-rul- muñ-zi-leen?

12:60.text: Fa-ʹil- lam taʹ-too-nee bi-hee fa-laa kay-la la-kum ʻiñ-dee wa-laa taq̣-ra-boon.

12:61.text: Q̣aa-loo sa-nu-raa-wi-du ʻan-hu ʹa-baa-hu wa-ʹin-naa la-faa-ʻi-loon.

12:62.text: Wa-q̣aa-la li-fit-yaa-ni-hij- ʻa-loo bi-ḍaa-ʻa-ta-hum fee ri-ḥaa-li-him la-ʻal-la-hum yaʻ-ri-foo-na-haaa ʹi-ẓañ- q̣a-la-booo ʹi-laaa ʹah-li-him la-ʻal-la-hum yar-ji-ʻoon.

12:63.text: Fa-lam-maa ra-ja-ʻooo ʹi-laaa ʹa-bee-him q̣aa-loo yaaa-ʹa-baa-naa mu-ni-ʻa min-nal- kay-lu fa-ʹar-sil ma-ʻa-naaa ʹa-khaa-naa nak-tal wa-ʹin-naa la-hoo la-ḥaa-fi-z̤̣oon.

12:64.text: Q̣aa-la hal ʹaa-ma-nu-kum ʻa-lay-hi ʹil-laa ka-maaa ʹa-miñ-tu-kum ʻa-laaa ʹa-khee-hi miñ- q̣abl? Fal-laa-hu khay-run ḥaa-fi-z̤̣aa, wa-Hu-wa ʹAr-ḥa-mur- raa-ḥi-meen!

12:65.text: Wa-lam-maa fa-ta-ḥoo ma-taa-ʻa-hum wa-ja-doo bi-ḍaa-ʻa-ta-hum rud-dat ʹi-lay-him. Q̣aa-loo yaaa-ʹa-baa-naa maa- nab-g̣ee? Haa-ẓi-hee bi-ḍaa-ʻa-tu-naa rud-dat ʹi-lay-naa: wa-na-mee-ru ʹah-la-naa wa-naḥ-fa-z̤̣u ʹa-khaa-naa wa-naz-daa-du kay-la ba-ʻeer. Ẓaa-li-ka kay-luñy- ya-seer.

12:66.text: Q̣aa-la lan- ʹur-si-la-hoo ma-ʻa-kum ḥat-taa tuʹ-too-ni maw-s̤i-q̣am- mi-nal- laa-hi la-taʹ-tun-na-nee bi-heee ʹil-laaa ʹañy- yu-ḥaa-ṭa bi-kum. Fa-lam-maaa ʹaa-taw-hu maw-s̤i-q̣a-hum q̣aa-lal- laa-hu ʻa-laa maa- na-q̣oo-lu Wa-keel!

12:67.text: Wa-q̣aa-la yaa-ba-niy-ya laa- tad-khu-loo mim- baa-biñw- waa-ḥi-diñw- wad-khu-loo min ʹab-waa-bim- mu-ta-far-ri-q̣ah. Wa-maaa ʹug̣-nee ʻañ-kum- mi-nal- laa-hi miñ- shayʹ: ʹi-nil- ḥuk-mu ʹil-laa lil-laah: ʻa-lay-hi ta-wak-kalt: wa-ʻa-lay-hi fal-ya-ta-wak-ka-lil- Mu-ta-wak-ki-loon.

12:68.text: Wa-lam-maa da-kha-loo min ḥay-s̤u ʹa-ma-ra-hum ʹa-boo-hum; maa- kaa-na yug̣-nee ʻan-hum- mi-nal- laa-hi miñ- shay-ʹin ʹil-laa ḥaa-ja-tañ- fee naf-si Yaʻ-q̣oo-ba q̣a-ḍaa-haa. Wa-ʹin-na-hoo la-ẓoo- ʻil-mil- li-maa ʻal-lam-naa-hu wa-laa-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ran- naa-si laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

12:69.text: Wa-lam-maa da-kha-loo ʻa-laa Yoo-su-fa ʹaa-waaa ʹi-lay-hi ʹa-khaa-hu q̣aa-la ʹin-neee ʹa-na ʹa-khoo-ka fa-laa tab-ta-ʹis bi-maa kaa-noo yaʻ-ma-loon.

12:70.text: Fa-lam-maa jah-ha-za-hum̃- bi-ja-haa-zi-him ja-ʻa-las- si-q̣aa-ya-ta fee raḥ-li ʹa-khee-hi s̤um-ma ʹaẓ-ẓa-na Mu-ʹaẓ-ẓi-nun ʹay-ya-tu-hal- ʻee-ru ʹin-na-kum la-saa-ri-q̣oon!

12:72.text: Q̣aa-loo naf-q̣i-du ṣu-waa-ʻal- ma-li-ki wa-li-mañ- jaaa-ʹa bi-hee ḥim-lu ba-ʻee-riñw- wa-ʹa-na bi-hee za-ʻeem.

12:73.text: Q̣aa-loo tal-laa-hi la-q̣ad ʻa-lim-tum- maa jiʹ-naa li-nuf-si-da fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-maa kun-naa saa-ri-q̣een.

12:74.text: Q̣aa-loo fa-maa ja-zaaa-ʹu-hooo ʹiñ- kuñ-tum kaa-ẓi-been?

12:75.text: Q̣aa-loo ja-zaaa-ʹu-hoo mañw- wu-ji-da fee raḥ-li-hee fa-hu-wa ja-zaaa-ʹuh. Ka-ẓaa-li-ka naj-ziz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen!

12:76.text: Fa-ba-da-ʹa bi-ʹaw-ʻi-ya-ti-him q̣ab-la wi-ʻaaa-ʹi ʹa-khee-hi s̤um-mas- takh-ra-ja-haa miñw- wi-ʻaaa-ʹi ʹa-kheeh. Ka-ẓaa-li-ka kid-naa li-Yoo-suf. Maa- kaa-na li-yaʹ-khu-ẓa ʹa-khaa-hu fee dee-nil- ma-li-ki ʹil-laaa ʹañy- ya-shaaa-ʹal- laah. Nar-fa-ʻu da-ra-jaa-tim- man- na-shaaaʹ: wa-faw-q̣a kul-li- ẓee- ʻil-min ʻA-leem.

12:77.text: Q̣aa-looo ʹiñy- yas-riq̣ fa-q̣ad sa-ra-q̣a ʹa-khul- la-hoo miñ- q̣abl. Fa-ʹa-sar-ra-haa Yoo-su-fu fee naf-si-hee wa-lam yub-di-haa la-hum. Q̣aa-la ʹañ-tum shar-rum- ma-kaa-naa; wal-laa-hu ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-maa ta-ṣi-foon!

12:78.text: Q̣aa-loo yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- ʻA-zee-zu ʹin-na la-hooo ʹa-bañ- shay-khañ- ka-bee-rañ- fa-khuẓ- ʹa-ḥa-da-naa ma-kaa-nah; ʹin-naa na-raa-ka mi-nal- Muḥ-si-neen.

12:79.text: Q̣aa-la ma-ʻaa-ẓal- laa-hi ʹan- naʹ-khu-ẓa ʹil-laa mañw- wa-jad-naa ma-taa-ʻa-naa ʻiñ-da-hooo ʹin-naaa ʹi-ẓal- la-z̤̣aa-li-moon.

12:80.text: Fa-lam-mas- tay-ʹa-soo min-hu kha-la-ṣoo na-jiy-yaa. Q̣aa-la ka-bee-ru-hum ʹa-lam taʻ-la-mooo ʹan-na ʹa-baa-kum q̣ad ʹa-kha-ẓa ʻa-lay-kum- maw-s̤i-q̣am- mi-nal- laa-hi wa-miñ- q̣ab-lu maa- far-raṭ-tum fee Yoo-suf? Fa-lan ʹab-ra-ḥal- ʹar-ḍa ḥat-taa yaʹ-ẓa-na leee ʹa-beee ʹaw yaḥ-ku-mal- laa-hu lee; wa-hu-wa khay-rul- ḥaa-ki-meen.

12:81.text: ʹIr-ji-ʻooo ʹi-laaa ʹa-bee-kum fa-q̣oo-loo yaaa-ʹa-baa-naaa ʹin-nab- na-ka sa-raq̣! Wa-maa sha-hid-naaa ʹil-laa bi-maa ʻa-lim-naa wa-maa kun-naa lil-g̣ay-bi ḥaa-fi-z̤̣een!

12:82.text: Was-ʹa-lil- q̣ar-ya-tal- la-tee kun-naa fee-haa wal-ʻee-ral- la-teee ʹaq̣-bal-naa fee-haa, wa-ʹin-naa la-ṣaa-di-q̣oon.

12:83.text: Q̣aa-la bal saw-wa-lat la-kum ʹañ-fu-su-kum ʹam-raa. Fa-ṣab-ruñ- ja-meel. ʻA-sal- laa-hu ʹañy- yaʹ-ti-ya-nee bi-him ja-mee-ʻaa. ʹIn-na-Hoo Hu-wal- ʻA-lee-mul- Ḥa-keem.

12:84.text: Wa-ta-wal-laa ʻan-hum wa-q̣aa-la yaaa-ʹa-sa-faa ʻa-laa Yoo-su-fa wab-yaḍ-ḍat ʻay-naa-hu mi-nal- ḥuz-ni fa-hu-wa ka-z̤̣eem.

12:85.text: Q̣aa-loo tal-laa-hi taf-ta-ʹu taẓ-ku-ru Yoo-su-fa ḥat-taa ta-koo-na ḥa-ra-ḍan ʹaw ta-koo-na mi-nal- haa-li-keen!

12:86.text: Q̣aa-la ʹin-na-maaa ʹash-koo bas̤-s̤ee wa-ḥuz-neee ʹi-lal- laa-hi wa-ʹaʻ-la-mu mi-nal- laa-hi maa laa- taʻ-la-moon.

12:87.text: Yaa-ba-niy-yaẓ- ha-boo fa-ta-ḥas-sa-soo miñy- Yoo-su-fa wa-ʹa-khee-hi wa-laa tay-ʹa-soo mir- Raw-ḥil- laah: ʹin-na-hoo laa- yay-ʹa-su mir- Raw-ḥil- laa-hi ʹil-lal- q̣aw-mul- Kaa-fi-roon.

12:88.text: Fa-lam-maa da-kha-loo ʻa-lay-hi q̣aa-loo yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- ʻA-zee-zu mas-sa-naa wa-ʹah-la-naḍ- ḍur-ru wa-jiʹ-naa bi-bi-ḍaa-ʻa-tim- muz-jaa-tiñ- fa-ʹaw-fi la-nal- kay-la wa-ta-ṣad-daq̣ ʻa-lay-naa: ʹin-nal- laa-ha yaj-zil- Mu-ta-ṣad-di-q̣een.

12:89.text: Q̣aa-la hal ʻa-lim-tum- maa fa-ʻal-tum̃- bi-Yoo-su-fa wa-ʹa-khee-hi ʹiẓ ʹañ-tum jaa-hi-loon?

12:90.text: Q̣aa-looo ʹa-ʹin-na-ka la-ʹañ-ta Yoo-suf? Q̣aa-la ʹa-na Yoo-su-fu wa-haa-ẓaaa ʹa-khee; q̣ad man-nal- laa-hu ʻa-lay-naa. ʹIn-na-hoo mañy- yat-ta-q̣i wa-yaṣ-bir fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha laa- yu-ḍee-ʻu ʹaj-ral- Muḥ-si-neen.

12:91.text: Q̣aa-loo tal-laa-hi la-q̣ad- ʹaa-s̤a-ra-kal- laa-hu ʻa-lay-naa wa-ʹiñ- kun-naa la-khaa-ṭi-ʹeen!

12:92.text: Q̣aa-la laa- tas̤-ree-ba ʻa-lay-ku-mul- yawm. Yag̣-fi-rul- laa-hu la-kum wa-Hu-wa ʹAr-ḥa-mur- raa-ḥi-meen!

12:93.text: ʹIẓ-ha-boo bi-q̣a-mee-ṣee haa-ẓaa fa-ʹal-q̣oo-hu ʻa-laa waj-hi ʹa-bee yaʹ-ti ba-ṣee-raa. Waʹ-too-nee bi-ʹah-li-kum ʹaj-ma-ʻeen.

12:94.text: Wa-lam-maa fa-ṣa-la-til- ʻee-ru q̣aa-la ʹa-boo-hum ʹin-nee la-ʹa-ji-du ree-ḥa Yoo-su-fa Laaa-law ʹañ- tu-fan-ni-doon.

12:95.text: Q̣aa-loo tal-laa-hi ʹin-na-ka la-fee ḍa-laa-li-kal- q̣a-deem.

12:96.text: Fa-lam-maaa ʹañ- jaaa- ʹal-ba-shee-ru ʹal-q̣aa-hu ʻa-laa waj-hi-hee far-tad-da ba-ṣee-raa. Q̣aa-la ʹa-lam ʹa-q̣ul- la-kum. ʹin-neee ʹaʻ-la-mu mi-nal- laa-hi maa laa- taʻ-la-moon?

12:97.text: Q̣aa-loo yaaa-ʹa-baa-nas- tag̣-fir la-naa ẓu-noo-ba-naaa ʹin-naa kun-naa khaa-ṭi-ʹeen.

12:98.text: Q̣aa-la saw-fa ʹas-tag̣-fi-ru la-kum Rab-bee: ʹin-na-Hoo Hu-wal- G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

12:99.text: Fa-lam-maa da-kha-loo ʻa-laa Yoo-su-fa ʹaa-waaa ʹi-lay-hi ʹa-ba-way-hi wa-q̣aa-lad- khu-loo Miṣ-ra ʹiñ- shaaa- ʹal-laa-hu ʹaa-mi-neen.

12:100.text: Wa-ra-fa-ʻa ʹa-ba-way-hi ʻa-lal- ʻar-shi wa-khar-roo la-hoo suj-ja-daa. Wa-q̣aa-la yaaa-ʹa-ba-ti haa-ẓaa taʹ-wee-lu ruʹ-yaa-ya miñ q̣ab-lu q̣ad ja-ʻa-la-haa Rab-bee ḥaq̣-q̣aa! Wa-q̣ad ʹaḥ-sa-na beee ʹiẓ ʹakh-ra-ja-nee mi-nas- sij-ni wa-jaaa-ʹa bi-kum- mi-nal- bad-wi mim- baʻ-di ʹan- na-za-g̣ash- shay-ṭaa-nu bay-nee wa-bay-na ʹikh-wa-tee. ʹIn-na Rab-bee La-ṭee-ful- li-maa ya-shaaaʹ. ʹIn-na-Hoo Hu-wal- ʻA-lee-mul- Ḥa-keem.

12:101.text: Rab-bi q̣ad ʹaa-tay-ta-nee mi-nal- mul-ki wa-ʻal-lam-ta-nee miñ- taʹ-wee-lil- ʹa-ḥaa-dees̤,― Faa-ṭi-ras- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ! ʹAñ-ta Wa-liy-yee fid- dun-yaa wal-ʹAa-khi-rah. Ta-waf-fa-nee Mus-li-mañw- wa-ʹal-ḥiq̣-nee biṣ-Ṣaa-li-ḥeen.

12:102.text: Ẓaa-li-ka min ʹam-baaa-ʹil- g̣ay-bi noo-ḥee-hi ʹi-layk: wa-maa kuñ-ta la-day-him ʹiẓ ʹaj-ma-ʻooo ʹam-ra-hum wa-hum yam-ku-roon.

12:103.text: Wa-maaa ʹak-s̤a-run- naa-si wa-law ḥa-raṣ-ta bi-Muʹ-mi-neen.

12:104.text: Wa-maa tas-ʹa-lu-hum ʻa-lay-hi min ʹajr: ʹin hu-wa ʹil-laa Ẓik-rul- lil-ʻaa-la-meen.

12:105.text: Wa-ka-ʹay-yim- min ʹAa-ya-tiñ- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi ya-mur-roo-na ʻa-lay-haa wa-hum ʻan-haa muʻ-ri-ḍoon!

12:106.text: Wa-maa yuʹ-mi-nu ʹak-s̤a-ru-hum̃- bil-laa-hi ʹil-laa wa-hum- mush-ri-koon!

12:107.text: ʹA-fa-ʹa-mi-nooo ʹañ- taʹ-ti-ya-hum G̣aa-shi-ya-tum- min ʻa-ẓaa-bil- laa-hi ʹaw taʹ-ti-ya-hu-mus- saa-ʻa-tu wa-hum bag̣-ta-tañw- laa- yash-ʻu-roon?

12:108.text: Q̣ul haa-ẓi-hee sa-bee-leee ʹad-ʻooo ʹi-lal- laah:― ʻa-laa Ba-ṣee-ra-tin ʹa-na wa-ma-nit- ta-ba-ʻa-nee. Wa-Sub-ḥaa-nal- laa-hi wa-maaa ʹa-na mi-nal- mush-ri-keen!

12:109.text: Wa-maaa ʹar-sal-naa miñ- q̣ab-li-ka ʹil-laa ri-jaa-lan- noo-ḥeee ʹi-lay-him- min ʹah-lil- q̣u-raa. ʹA-fa-lam ya-see-roo fil- ʹar-ḍi Fa-yañ-z̤̣u-roo kay-fa kaa-na ʻaa-q̣i-ba-tul- la-ẓee-na miñ- q̣ab-li-him? Wa-la-Daa-rul- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti khay-rul- lil-la-ẓee-nat- ta-q̣aw. ʹA-fa-laa taʻ-q̣i-loon?

12:110.text: Ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓas- tay-ʹa-sar- ru-su-lu wa-z̤̣an-nooo ʹan-na-hum q̣ad ku-ẓi-boo jaaa-ʹa-hum naṣ-ru-naa fa-nuj-ji-ya man- na-shaaaʹ. Wa-laa yu-rad-du baʹ-su-naa ʻa-nil- q̣aw-mil- muj-ri-meen.

12:111.text: La-q̣ad kaa-na fee q̣a-ṣa-ṣi-him ʻib-ra-tul- li-ʹu-lil- ʹal-baab. Maa- kaa-na ḥa-dee-s̤añy- yuf-ta-raa wa-laa-kiñ- taṣ-dee-q̣al- la-ẓee bay-na ya-day-hi wa-taf-ṣee-la kul-li shay-ʹiñw- wa-Hu-dañw- wa-Raḥ-ma-tal- li-q̣aw-miñy- yuʹ-mi-noon.

13:1.text: ʹA-lif-Laaam-Meeem-Raa. Til-ka ʹAa-yaa-tul Ki-taab. Wal-la-ẓeee ʹuñ-zi-la ʹi-lay-ka mir- Rab-bi-kal- Ḥaq̣-q̣u wa-laa-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ran- naa-si laa- yuʹ-mi-noon.

13:2.text: ʹAl-laa-hul- la-ẓee ra-fa-ʻas- sa-maa-waa-ti bi-g̣ay-ri ʻa-ma-diñ- ta-raw-na-haa s̤um-mas- ta-waa ʻa-lal- ʻAr-shi wa-sakh-kha-rash- sham-sa wal-q̣a-mar! Kul-luñy- yaj-ree li-ʹa-ja-lim- mu-sam-maa. Yu-dab-bi-rul- ʹam-ra yu-faṣ-ṣi-lul- ʹAa-yaa-ti la-ʻal-la-kum̃- bi-li-q̣aaa-ʹi Rab-bi-kum too-q̣i-noon.

13:3.text: Wa-Hu-wal- la-ẓee mad-dal- ʹar-ḍa wa-ja-ʻa-la fee-haa ra-waa-si-ya wa-ʹan-haa-raa: wa-miñ- kul-lis̤- s̤a-ma-raa-ti ja-ʻa-la fee-haa zaw-jay-nis̤- nay-ni yug̣-shil- lay-lan- na-haar. ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yaa-til- li-q̣aw-miñy- ya-ta-fak-ka-roon.

13:4.text: Wa-fil- ʹar-ḍi q̣i-ṭa-ʻum- mu-ta-jaa-wi-raa-tuñw- wa-jan-naa-tum- min ʹaʻ-naa-biñw- Wa-zar-ʻuñw- Wa-na-khee-luñ- ṣin-waa-nuñw- wa-g̣ay-ru ṣin-waa-niñy- yus-q̣aa bi-maaa-ʹiñw- waa-ḥid. Wa-nu-faḍ-ḍi-lu baʻ-ḍa-haa ʻa-laa baʻ-ḍiñ- fil- ʹu-kul. ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yaa-til- li-q̣aw-miñy- yaʻ-q̣i-loon!

13:5.text: Wa-ʹiñ- taʻ-jab fa-ʻa-ja-buñ- q̣aw-lu-hum ʹa-ʹi-ẓaa kun-naa tu-raa-ban ʹa-ʹin-naa la-fee khal-q̣iñ- ja-deed? ʹU-laaa-ʹi-kal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo bi-Rab-bi-him! Wa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-kal- ʹag̣-laa-lu feee ʹaʻ-naa-q̣i-him: wa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bun- Naa-ri hum fee-haa khaa-li-doon!

13:6.text: Wa-yas-taʻ-ji-loo-na-ka Bis-say-yi-ʹa-ti q̣ab-lal- ḥa-sa-na-ti wa-q̣ad kha-lat miñ- q̣ab-li-hi-mul- Ma-s̤u-laat! Wa-ʹin-na Rab-ba-ka la-Ẓoo- Mag̣-fi-ra-til- lin-naa-si ʻa-laa z̤̣ul-mi-him, wa-ʹin-na Rab-ba-ka la-Sha-dee-dul- ʻi-q̣aab.

13:7.text: Wa-ya-q̣oo-lul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo law-laaa ʹuñ-zi-la ʻa-lay-hi ʹAa-ya-tum- mir- Rab-bih? ʹIn-na-maaa ʹañ-ta muñ-ẓi-ruñw- wa-li-kul-li q̣aw-min haad.

13:8.text: ʹAl-laa-hu yaʻ-la-mu maa- taḥ-mi-lu kul-lu ʹuñ-s̤aa wa-maa ta-g̣ee-ḍul- ʹar-ḥaa-mu wa-maa taz-daad. Wa-kul-lu shay-ʹin ʻiñ-da-hoo bi-miq̣-daar.

13:10.text: Sa-waaa-ʹum- miñ-kum- man ʹa-sar-ral- q̣aw-la wa-mañ- ja-ha-ra bi-hee wa-man hu-wa mus-takh-fim- bil-lay-li wa-saa-ri-bum- bin-na-haar.

13:11.text: La-hoo mu-ʻaq̣-q̣i-baa-tum- mim- bay-ni ya-day-hi wa-min khal-fi-hee yaḥ-fa-z̤̣oo-na-hoo min ʹam-ril- laah. ʹIn-nal- laa-ha laa- yu-g̣ay-yi-ru maa- bi-q̣aw-min ḥat-taa yu-g̣ay-yi-roo maa- bi-ʹañ-fu-si-him. Wa-ʹi-ẓaaa ʹa-raa-dal- laa-hu bi-q̣aw-miñ sooo-ʹañ- fa-laa- ma-rad-da la-hoo wa-maa la-hum- miñ- doo-ni-hee miñw- waal.

13:12.text: Hu-wal- la-ẓee yu-ree-ku-mul- bar-q̣a khaw-fañw- wa-ṭa-ma-ʻañw- wa-yuñ-shi-ʹus- sa-ḥaa-bas̤- s̤i-q̣aal!

13:13.text: Wa-yu-sab-bi-ḥur- RAʻ-DU bi-Ḥam-di-hee wal-ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tu min khee-fa-tih: wa-yur-si-luṣ- ṣa-waa-ʻi-q̣a fa-yu-ṣee-bu bi-haa mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu wa-hum yu-jaa-di-loo-na fil- laa-hi, wa-Hu-wa Sha-dee-dul- mi-ḥaal!

13:14.text: La-hoo daʻ-wa-tul- Ḥaq̣q̣: wal-la-ẓee-na yad-ʻoo-na miñ- doo-ni-hee laa- yas-ta-jee-boo-na la-hum̃- bi-shay-ʹin ʹil-laa ka-baa-si-ṭi kaf-fay-hi ʹi-lal- maaa-ʹi li-yab-lu-g̣a faa-hu wa-maa hu-wa bi-baa-li-g̣ih: wa-maa du-ʻaaa-ʹul- kaa-fi-ree-na ʹil-laa fee ḍa-laal.

13:15.text: Wa-lil-laa-hi yas-ju-du mañ fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi ṭaw-ʻañw- wa-kar-hañw- wa-z̤̣i-laa-lu-hum̃- bil-g̣u-duw-wi wal-ʹaa-ṣaal.

13:16.text: Q̣ul mar- Rab-bus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ? Q̣u-lil- laah. Q̣ul ʹa-fat-ta-khaẓ-tum- miñ doo-ni-heee ʹaw-li-yaaa-ʹa laa- yam-li-koo-na li-ʹañ-fu-si-him naf-ʻañw- wa-laa- ḍar-raa? Q̣ul hal yas-ta-wil- ʹaʻ-maa wal-ba-ṣeer. ʹAm hal tas-ta-wiz̤̣- z̤̣u-lu-maa-tu wan-noor? ʹAm ja-ʻa-loo lil-laa-hi shu-ra-kaaa-ʹa kha-la-q̣oo ka-khal-q̣i-hee fa-ta-shaa-ba-hal- khal-q̣u ʻa-lay-him? Q̣u-lil- laa-hu Khaa-li-q̣u kul-li shay-ʹiñw- wa-Hu-wal Waa-ḥi-dul- Q̣ah-haar.

13:17.text: ʹAñ-za-la mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi maaa-ʹañ fa-saa-lat ʹaw-di-ya-tum- bi-q̣a-da-ri-haa faḥ-ta-ma-las- say-lu za-ba-dar- raa-bi-yaa. Wa-mim-maa yoo-q̣i-doo-na ʻa-lay-hi fin- naa-rib- ti-g̣aaa-ʹa ḥil-ya-tin ʹaw ma-taa-ʻiñ za-ba-dum- mis̤-luh. Ka-ẓa-li-ka yaḍ-ri-bul- laa-hul- Ḥaq̣-q̣a wal-Baa-ṭil. Fa-ʹam-maz- za-ba-du fa-yaẓ-ha-bu ju-faaa-ʹaa. Waʹam-maa maa- yañ-fa-ʻun- naa-sa fa-yam-ku-s̤u fil- ʹarḍ. Ka-ẓaa-li-ka yaḍ-ri-bul- laa-hul- ʹam-s̤aal.

13:18.text: Lil-la-ẓee-nas- ta-jaa-boo li-Rab-bi-hi-mul- Ḥus-naa. Wal-la-ẓee-na lam yas-ta-jee-boo la-hoo law ʹan-na la-hum- maa fil- ʹar-ḍi ja-mee-ʻañw- wa-mis̤-la-hoo ma-ʻa-hoo laf-ta-daw bih. ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka la-hum sooo-ʹul- ḥi-saab: wa-maʹ-waa-hum ja-han-nam.― wa-biʹ-sal- mi-haad!

13:19.text: ʹA-fa-mañy- yaʻ-la-mu ʹan-na-maaa ʹuñ-zi-la ʹi-lay-ka mir- Rab-bi-kal- Ḥaq̣-q̣u ka-man hu-wa ʹaʻ-maa? ʹIn-na-maa ya-ta-ẓak-ka-ru ʹu-lul- ʹal-baab;―

13:20.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na yoo-foo-na bi-ʻAh-dil- laa-hi wa-laa yañ-q̣u-ḍoo-nal- Mee-s̤aaq̣;

13:21.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ya-ṣi-loo-na maaa ʹa-ma-ral- laa-hu bi-heee ʹañy- yoo-ṣa-la wa-yakh-shaw-na Rab-ba-hum wa-ya-khaa-foo-na sooo-ʹal- ḥi-saab;

13:22.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ṣa-ba-rub- ti-g̣aaa-ʹa Waj-hi Rab-bi-him wa-ʹa-q̣aa-muṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta wa-ʹañ-fa-q̣oo mim-maa ra-zaq̣-naa-hum sir-rañw- waʻa-laa-ni-ya-tañw- wa-yad-ra-ʹoo-na bil-ḥa-sa-na-tis- say-yi-ʹa-ta ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka la-hum ʻuq̣-bad- Daar,―

13:23.text: Jan-naa-tu ʻAd-niñy- yad-khu-loo-na-haa wa-mañ ṣa-la-ḥa min ʹaa-baaa-ʹi-him wa-ʹaz-waa-ji-him wa-ẓur-riy-yaa-ti-him wal-ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tu yad-khu-loo-na ʻa-lay-him- miñ- kul-li baab.

13:24.text: Sa-laa-mun ʻa-lay-kum̃- bi-maa ṣa-bar-tum fa-niʻ-ma ʻuq̣-bad- Daar!

13:25.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na yañ-q̣u-ḍoo-na ʻAh-dal- laa-hi mim- baʻ-di Mee-s̤aa-q̣i-hee wa-yaq̣-ṭa-ʻoo-na maaa ʹa-ma-ral- laa-hu bi-heee ʹañy- yoo-ṣa-la wa-yuf-si-doo-na fil- ʹar-ḍi ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka la-hu-mul- Laʻ-na-tu wa-la-hum sooo-ʹud- Daar!

13:26.text: ʹAl-laa-hu yab-su-ṭur- Riz-q̣a li-mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu wa-yaq̣-dir. Wa-fa-ri-ḥoo bil-ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa. Wa-mal- ḥa-yaa-tud- dun-yaa fil- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti ʹil-laa ma-taaʻ.

13:27.text: Wa-ya-q̣oo-lul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo laaa-law ʹuñ-zi-la ʻa-lay-hi ʹAa-ya-tum- mir- Rab-bih? Q̣ul ʹin-nal- laa-ha yu-ḍil-lu mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu wa-yah-deee ʹi-lay-hi man ʹa-naab.

13:28.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-taṭ-ma-ʹin-nu q̣u-loo-bu-hum̃- bi-ẓik-ril- laah. ʹA-laa bi-ẓik-ril- laa-hi taṭ-ma-ʹin-nul- q̣u-loob.

13:29.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- Ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti ṭoo-baa la-hum wa-ḥus-nu ma-ʹaab.

13:30.text: Ka-ẓaa-li-ka ʹar-sal-naa-ka feee ʹUm-ma-tiñ q̣ad kha-lat miñ q̣ab-li-haaa ʹU-ma-mul- li-tat-lu-wa ʻa-lay-hi-mul- la-ẓeee ʹaw-ḥay-naaa ʹi-lay-ka wa-hum yak-fu-roo-na bir-Raḥ-maan! Q̣ul Hu-wa Rab-bee Laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa Hoo! ʻA-lay-hi ta-wak-kal-tu wa-ʹi-lay-hi ma-taab!

13:31.text: Wa-law ʹan-na q̣ur-ʹaa-nañ suy-yi-rat bi-hil- ji-baa-lu ʹaw q̣uṭ-ṭi-ʻat bi-hil- ʹar-ḍu ʹaw kul-li-ma bi-hil- maw-taa, bal- lil-laa-hil- ʹAm-ru ja-mee-ʻaa! ʹA-fa-lam- yay-ʹa-sil- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nooo ʹal- law ya-shaaa- ʹul-laa-hu la-ha-dan- naa-sa ja-mee-ʻaa? Wa-laa ya-zaa-lul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo tu-ṣee-bu-hum̃- bi-maa ṣa-na-ʻoo Q̣aa-ri-ʻa-tun ʹaw ta-ḥul-lu q̣a-ree-bam- miñ daa-ri-him ḥat-taa yaʹ-ti-ya waʻ-dul- laah. ʹIn-nal- laa-ha laa- yukh-li-ful- mee-ʻaad.

13:32.text: Wa-la-q̣a-dis- tuh-zi-ʹa bi-ru-su-lim- miñ- q̣ab-li-ka fa-ʹam-lay-tu lil-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo s̤um-ma ʹa-khaẓ-tu-hum: fa-kay-fa kaa-na ʻi-q̣aab!

13:33.text: ʹA-fa-man Hu-wa q̣aaa-ʹi-mun ʻa-laa kul-li naf-sim- bi-maa Ka-sa-bat? Wa-ja-ʻa-loo lil-laa-hi shu-ra-kaaaʹ. Q̣ul sam-moo-hum! ʹAm tu-nab-bi-ʹoo-na-hoo bi-maa laa- yaʻ-la-mu fil- ʹar-ḍi ʹam- bi-z̤̣aa-hi-rim- mi-nal- q̣awl? Bal zuy-yi-na lil-la-zee-na ka-fa-roo mak-ru-hum wa-ṣud-doo ʻa-nis- Sa-beel. Wa-mañy- yuḍ-li-lil- laa-hu fa-maa la-hoo min haad.

13:34.text: La-hum ʻa-ẓaa-buñ- fil- ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa wa-la-ʻa-ẓaa-bul- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti ʹa-shaq̣q̣: wa-maa la-hum mi-nal- laa-hi miñw- waaq̣.

13:35.text: Ma-s̤a-lul- jan-na-til- la-tee wu-ʻi-dal- Mut-ta-q̣oon! taj-ree miñ taḥ-ti-hal- ʹan-haar: ʹu-ku-lu-haa daaa-ʹi-muñw- wa-z̤̣il-lu-haa: til-ka ʻUq̣-bal- la-ẓee-nat- ta-q̣aw: Wa-ʻUq̣-bal- kaa-fi-ree-nan- Naar.

13:36.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-tay-naa-hu-mul- Ki-taa-ba yaf-ra-ḥoo-na bi-maaa ʹuñ-zi-la ʹi-lay-ka wa-mi-nal- ʹaḥ-zaa-bi mañy- yuñ-ki-ru baʻ-ḍah. Q̣ul ʹin-na-maaa ʹu-mir-tu ʹan ʹaʻ-bu-dal- laa-ha wa-laaa ʹush-ri-ka bih. ʹI-lay-hi ʹad-ʻoo wa-ʹi-lay-hi ma-ʹaaab.

13:37.text: Wa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka ʹañ-zal-naa-hu Ḥuk-man ʻA-ra-biy-yaa. Wa-la-ʹi-nit- ta-baʻ-ta ʹah-waaa-ʹa-hum̃ baʻ-da-maa- jaaa-ʹa-ka mi-nal- ʻil-mi maa- la-ka mi-nal- laa-hi miñw- wa-liy-yiñw- wa-laa- waaq̣.

13:38.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹar-sal-naa ru-su-lam- miñ q̣ab-li-ka wa-ja-ʻal-naa la-hum ʹaz-waa-jañw- wa-ẓur-riy-yah: wa-maa kaa-na li-ra-soo-lin ʹañy- yaʹ-ti-ya bi-ʹAa-ya-tin ʹil-laa bi-ʹIẓ-nil- laah. Li-kul-li ʹa-ja-liñ- ki-taab.

13:39.text: Yam-ḥul- laa-hu maa- ya-shaaa-ʹu wa-yus̤-bi-tu ʻiñ-da-hooo ʹum-mul- Ki-taab.

13:40.text: Wa-ʹim- maa nu-ri-yan-na-ka baʻ-ḍal- la-ẓee na-ʻi-du-hum ʹaw na-ta-waf-fa-yan-na-ka fa-ʹin-na-maa ʻa-lay-kal- ba-laa-g̣u wa-ʻa-lay-nal- ḥi-saab.

13:41.text: ʹA-wa-lam ya-raw ʹan-naa naʹ-til- ʹar-ḍa nañ-q̣u-ṣu-haa min ʹaṭ-raa-fi-haa? Wal-laa-hu yaḥ-ku-mu laa- mu-ʻaq̣-q̣i-ba li-Ḥuk-mih: wa-Hu-wa Sa-ree-ʻul- ḥi-saab.

13:42.text: Wa-q̣ad ma-ka-ral- la-ẓee-na miñ q̣ab-li-him fa-lil-laa-hil- mak-ru ja-mee-ʻaa. Yaʻ-la-mu maa- tak-si-bu kul-lu nafs: wa-sa-yaʻ-la-mul- kuf-faa-ru li-man ʻUq̣-bad- Daar.

13:43.text: Wa-ya-q̣oo-lul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo las-ta mur-sa-laa. Q̣ul ka-faa bil-laa-hi sha-hee-dam- bay-nee wa-bay-na-kum wa-man ʻiñ-da-hoo ʻil-mul- Ki-taab.

14:1.text: ʹA-lif-Laaam-Raa. Ki-taa-bun ʹañ-zal-naa-hu ʹi-lay-ka li-tukh-ri-jan- naa-sa mi-naz̤̣- z̤̣u-lu-maa-ti ʹi-lan- Noo-ri― bi-ʹiẓ-ni Rab-bi-him ʹi-laa Ṣi-raa-ṭil- ʻA-zee-zil- Ḥa-meed!―

14:2.text: ʹAl-laa-hil- la-ẓee la-hoo maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-maa fil- ʹarḍ! Wa-way-lul- lil-kaa-fi-ree-na min ʻa-ẓaa-biñ- sha-deed!

14:3.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na yas-ta-ḥib-boo-nal- ḥa-yaa-tad- dun-yaa ʻa-lal- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti wa-ya-ṣud-doo-na ʻañ- sa-bee-lil- laa-hi wa-yab-g̣oo-na-haa ʻi-wa-jaa: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka fee ḍa-laa-lim- ba-ʻeed.

14:4.text: Wa-maaa ʹar-sal-naa mir- ra-soo-lin ʹil-laa bi-li-saa-ni q̣aw-mi-hee li-yu-bay-yi-na La-hum. Fa-yu-ḍil-lul- laa-hu mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu wa-yah-dee mañy- ya-shaaaʹ: wa-Hu-wal- ʻA-zee-zul- Ḥa-keem.

14:5.text: wa-la-q̣ad ʹar-sal-naa Moo-saa bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naaa ʹan ʹakh-rij q̣aw-ma-ka mi-naz̤̣- z̤̣u-lu-maa-ti ʹi-lan- Noo-ri, wa-ẓak-kir-hum̃- bi-ʹAy-yaa-mil- laah. ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yaa-til- li-kul-li ṣab-baa-riñ- sha-koor.

14:6.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣aa-la Moo-saa li-q̣aw-mi-hiẓ- ku-roo niʻ-ma-tal- laa-hi ʻa-lay-kum ʹiẓ ʹañ-jaa-kum- min ʹAa-li- Fir-ʻaw-na ya-soo-moo-na-kum sooo-ʹal- ʻa-ẓaa-bi wa-yu-ẓab-bi-ḥoo-na ʹab-naaa-ʹa-kum wa-yas-taḥ-yoo-na ni-saa-ʹa-kum: wa-fee ẓaa-li-kum ba-laaa-ʹum- mir- Rab-bi-kum ʻa-z̤̣eem.

14:7.text: Wa-ʹiẓ ta-ʹaẓ-ẓa-na Rab-bu-kum la-ʹiñ- sha-kar-tum la-ʹa-zee-dan-na-kum wa-la-ʹiñ- ka-far-tum ʹin-na ʻa-ẓaa-bee la-sha-deed.

14:8.text: Wa-q̣aa-la Moo-saaa ʹiñ- tak-fu-rooo ʹañ-tum wa-mañ- fil- ʹar-ḍi ja-mee-ʻañ fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha la-G̣a-niy-yun Ḥa-meed.

14:9.text: ʹA-lam yaʹ-ti-kum na-ba-ʹul- la-ẓee-na miñ- q̣ab-li-kum Q̣aw-mi Noo-ḥiñw- waʻAa-diñw- wa-S̤a-moo-da wal-la-ẓee-na mim- baʻ-di-him? Laa- yaʻ-la-mu-hum ʹil-lal-laah. Jaaa-ʹat- hum ru-su-lu-hum bil-bay-yi-naa-ti fa-rad-dooo ʹay-di-ya-hum feee ʹaf-waa-hi-him wa-q̣aa-looo ʹin-naa ka-far-naa bi-maaa ʹur-sil-tum̃- bi-hee wa-ʹin-naa la-fee shak-kim- mim-maa tad-ʻoo-na-naaa ʹi-lay-hi mu-reeb.

14:10.text: Q̣aa-lat ru-su-lu-hum ʹa-fil- laa-hi shak-kuñ Faa-ṭi-ris- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ? Yad-ʻoo-kum li-yag̣-fi-ra la-kum- miñ- ẓu-noo-bi-kum wa-yu-ʹakh-khi-ra-kum ʹi-laaa ʹa-ja-lim- mu-sam-maa! Q̣aa-looo ʹin ʹañ-tum ʹil-laa ba-sha-rum- mis̤-lu-naa! Tu-ree-doo-na ʹañ- ta-ṣud-doo-naa ʻam-maa kaa-na yaʻ-bu-du ʹaa-baaa-ʹu-naa faʹ-too-naa bi-sul-ṭaa-nim- mu-been.

14:11.text: Q̣aa-lat la-hum ru-su-lu-hum ʹin- naḥ-nu ʹil-laa ba-sha-rum- mis̤-lu-kum wa-laa-kin-nal- laa-ha ya-mun-nu ʻa-laa mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu min ʻi-baa-dih. Wa-maa kaa-na la-naaa ʹan- naʹ-ti-ya-kum̃- bi-sul-ṭaa-nin ʹil-laa bi-ʹiẓ-nil- laah. Wa-ʻa-lal- laa-hi fal-ya-ta-wak-ka-lil- Muʹ-mi-noon.

14:12.text: Wa-maa la-naaa ʹal-laa na-ta-wak-ka-la ʻa-lal- laa-hi wa-q̣ad ha-daa-naa Su-bu-la-naa. Wa-la-naṣ-bi-ran-na ʻa-laa maaa ʹaa-ẓay-tu-moo-naa. Wa-ʻa-lal- laa-hi fal-ya-ta-wak-ka-lil- Mu-ta-wak-ki-loon.

14:13.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo li-ru-su-li-him la-nukh-ri-jan-na-kum- min ʹar-ḍi-naaa ʹaw la-ta-ʻoo-dun-na fee mil-la-ti-naa. Fa-ʹaw-ḥaaa ʹi-lay-him Rab-bu-hum la-nuh-li-kan-naz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen!

14:14.text: Wa-la-nus-ki-nan-na-ku-mul- ʹar-ḍa mim- baʻ-di-him. Ẓaa-li-ka li-man khaa-fa Ma-q̣aa-mee wa-khaa-fa wa-ʻeed.

14:16.text: Miñw- wa-raaa-ʹi-hee Ja-han-na-mu wa-yus-q̣aa mim- maaa-ʹiñ- ṣa-deed.

14:17.text: Ya-ta-jar-ra-ʻu-hoo wa-laa ya-kaa-du yu-see-g̣u-hoo wa-yaʹ-tee-hil- maw-tu miñ- kul-li- ma-kaa-niñw- wa-maa- hu-wa bi-may-yit: wa-miñw- wa-raaa-ʹi-hee ʻa-ẓaa-bun g̣a-leez̤̣.

14:18.text: Ma-s̤a-lul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo bi-Rab-bi-him ʹaʻ-maa-lu-hum ka-ra-maa-di-nish- tad-dat bi-hir- ree-ḥu fee yaw-min- ʻaa-ṣif: laa- yaq̣-di-roo-na mim-maa ka-sa-boo ʻa-laa shayʹ: ẓaa-li-ka hu-waḍ- ḍa-laa-lul- ba-ʻeed.

14:19.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹan-nal- laa-ha kha-la-q̣as- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa bil-Ḥaq̣q̣? ʹIñy- ya-shaʹ yuẓ-hib-kum wa-yaʹ-ti bi-khal-q̣iñ- ja-deed.

14:21.text: Wa-ba-ra-zoo lil-laa-hi ja-mee-ʻañ- fa-q̣aa-laḍ- ḍu-ʻa-faaa-ʹu lil-la-ẓee-nas- tak-ba-rooo ʹin-naa kun-naa la-kum ta-ba-ʻañ- fa-hal ʹañ-tum- mug̣-noo-na ʻan-naa min ʻA-ẓaa-bil- laa-hi miñ- shayʹ? Q̣aa-loo law ha-daa-nal- laa-hu la-ha-day-naa-kum! Sa-waaa-ʹun ʻa-lay-naaa ʹa-ja-ziʻ-naaa ʹam ṣa-bar-naa maa- la-naa mim- ma-ḥeeṣ.

14:22.text: Wa-q̣aa-lash- shay-ṭaa-nu lam-maa q̣u-ḍi-yal- ʹam-ru ʹin-nal- laa-ha wa-ʻa-da-kum waʻ-dal- Ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-wa-ʻat-tu-kum fa-ʹakh-laf-tu-kum. Wa-maa kaa-na li-ya ʻa-lay-kum- miñ- sul-ṭaa-nin ʹil-laaa ʹañ- da-ʻaw-tu-kum fas-ta-jab-tum lee: fa-laa ta-loo-moo-nee wa-loo-mooo ʹañ-fu-sa-kum. Maaa ʹa-na bi-muṣ-ri-khi-kum wa-maaa ʹañ-tum bi-muṣ-ri-khiyy. ʹIn-nee ka-far-tu bi-maaa ʹash-rak-tu-moo-ni miñ- q̣abl. ʹIn-naz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-mee-na la-hum ʻa-ẓaa-bun ʹa-leem.

14:23.text: Wa-ʹud-khi-lal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti Jan-naa-tiñ- taj-ree miñ- taḥ-ti-hal- ʹan-haa-ru khaa-li-dee-na fee-haa bi-ʹiẓ-ni- Rab-bi-him. Ta-ḥiy-ya-tu-hum fee-haa sa-laam!

14:24.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra kay-fa ḍa-ra-bal- laa-hu ma-s̤a-lañ- Ka-li-ma-tañ- Ṭay-yi-ba-tañ- ka-sha-ja-ra-tiñ- ṭay-yi-ba-tin ʹaṣ-lu-haa s̤aa-bi-tuñw- wa-far-ʻu-haa fis- sa-maaaʹ,―

14:25.text: Tuʹ-teee ʹu-ku-la-haa kul-la ḥee-nim- bi-ʹiẓ-ni Rab-bi-haa. Wa-yaḍ-ri-bul- laa-hul- ʹam-s̤aa-la lin-naa-si la-ʻal-la-hum ya-ta-ẓak-ka-roon.

14:26.text: Wa-ma-s̤a-lu ka-li-ma-tin kha-bee-s̤a-tiñ- ka-sha-ja-ra-tin kha-bee-s̤a-ti-nij- tus̤-s̤at miñ- faw-q̣il- ʹar-ḍi maa- la-haa miñ- q̣a-raar.

14:27.text: Yu-s̤ab-bi-tul- laa-hul- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo bil-Q̣aw-lis̤- S̤aa-bi-ti fil- ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa wa-fil- ʹAa-khi-rah; wa-yu-ḍil-lul- laa-huz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-mee-na wa-yaf-ʻa-lul- laa-hu maa- ya-shaaaʹ.

14:28.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹi-lal- la-ẓee-na bad-da-loo niʻ-ma-tal- laa-hi kuf-rañw- wa-ʹa-ḥal-loo q̣aw-ma-hum Daa-ral- Ba-waar.―

14:30.text: Wa-ja-ʻa-loo lil-laa-hi ʹañ-daa-dal- li-yu-ḍil-loo ʻañ- Sa-bee-lih! Q̣ul ta-mat-ta-ʻoo fa-ʹin-na ma-ṣee-ra-kum ʹi-lan- Naar!

14:31.text: Q̣ul- li-ʻi-baa-di-yal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo yu-q̣ee-muṣ- ṣa-laa-ta wa-yuñ-fi-q̣oo mim-maa ra-zaq̣-naa-hum sir-rañw- wa-ʻa-laa-ni-ya-tam- miñ- q̣ab-li ʹañy- yaʹ-ti-ya Yaw-mul- laa bay-ʻuñ- fee-hi wa-laa khi-laal.

14:32.text: ʹAl-laa-hul- la-ẓee kha-la-q̣as- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa wa-ʹañ-za-la mi-nas- sa-maa-ʹi maaa-ʹañ- fa-ʹakh-ra-ja bi-hee mi-nas̤- s̤a-ma-raa-ti riz-q̣al- la-kum: wa-sakh-kha-ra la-ku-mul- ful-ka li-taj-ri-ya fil- baḥ-ri bi-ʹAm-rih: wa-sakh-kha-ra la-ku-mul- ʹan-haar.

14:33.text: Wa-sakh-kha-ra la-ku-mush- sham-sa wal-q̣a-ma-ra daaa-ʹi-bay-ni; wa-sakh-kha-ra la-ku-mul- lay-la wan-Na-haar.

14:34.text: Waʹaa-taa-kum- miñ- kul-li maa- sa-ʹal-tu-mooh. Wa-ʹiñ- ta-ʻud-doo niʻ-ma-tal- laa-hi laa- tuḥ-ṣoo-haa. ʹIn-nal- ʹiñ-saa-na la-z̤̣a-loo-muñ- kaf-faar.

14:35.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣aa-la ʹIb-raa-hee-mu Rab-bij- ʻal haa-ẓal- Ba-la-da ʹaa-mi-nañw- waj-nub-nee wa-ba-niy-ya ʹan- naʻ-bu-dal- ʹaṣ-naam.

14:36.text: Rab-bi ʹin-na-hun-na ʹaḍ-lal-na ka-s̤ee-ram- mi-nan- naas; fa-mañ- ta-bi-ʻa-nee fa-ʹin-na-hoo min-nee, wa-man ʻa-ṣaa-nee fa-ʹin-na-ka G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

14:37.text: Rab-ba-naaa ʹin-neee ʹas-kañ-tu miñ- ẓur-riy-ya-tee bi-waa-din g̣ay-ri ẓee zar-ʻin ʻiñ-da Bay-ti-kal- Mu-ḥar-ra-mi Rab-ba-naa li-yu-q̣ee-mus- Ṣa-laa-ta faj-ʻal ʹaf-ʹi-da-tam- mi-nan- naa-si tah-weee ʹi-lay-him war-zuq̣-hum- mi-nas̤- s̤a-ma-raa-ti la-ʻal-la-hum yash-ku-roon.

14:38.text: Rab-ba-naaa ʹin-na-ka taʻ-la-mu maa- nukh-fee wa-maa nuʻ-lin: wa-maa yakh-faa ʻa-lal- laa-hi miñ- shay-ʹiñ- fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-laa fis- sa-maaaʹ.

14:39.text: ʹAl-Ḥam-du lil-laa-hil- la-ẓee wa-ha-ba lee ʻa-lal- ki-ba-ri ʹIs-maa-ʻee-la wa-ʹIs-ḥaaq̣: ʹIn-na Rab-bee la-Sa-mee-ʻud- du-ʻaaaʹ!

14:40.text: Rab-bij- ʻal-nee mu-q̣ee-maṣ- Ṣa-laa-ti wa-miñ ẓur-riy-ya-tee, Rab-ba-naa wa-ta-q̣ab-bal Du-ʻaaaʹ.

14:41.text: Rab-ba-nag̣- fir lee wa-li-waa-li-day-ya wa-lil-Muʹ-mi-nee-na Yaw-ma ya-q̣oo-mul- Ḥi-saab!

14:42.text: Wa-laa taḥ-sa-ban-nal- laa-ha g̣aa-fi-lan ʻam-maa yaʻ-ma-luz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-moon. ʹIn-na-maa yu-ʹakh-khi-ru-hum li-Yaw-miñ- tash-kha-ṣu fee-hil- ʹab-ṣaar,―

14:43.text: Muh-ṭi-ʻee-na muq̣-ni-ʻee ru-ʹoo-si-him laa- yar-tad-du ʹi-lay-him ṭar-fu-hum, wa-ʹaf-ʹi-da-tu-hum ha-waaaʹ!

14:44.text: Wa-ʹañ-ẓi-rin- naa-sa Yaw-ma yaʹ-tee-hi-mul- ʻA-ẓaa-bu fa-ya-q̣oo-lul- la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-moo Rab-ba-naaa ʹakh-khir-naaa ʹi-laaa ʹa-ja-liñ- q̣a-ree-bin- nu-jib Daʻ-wa-ta-ka wa-nat-ta-bi-ʻir- ru-sul! ʹA-wa-lam ta-koo-nooo ʹaq̣-sam-tum- miñ- q̣ab-lu maa- la-kum- miñ- za-waal?

14:45.text: Wa-sa-kañ-tum fee ma-saa-ki-nil- la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-mooo ʹañ-fu-sa-hum wa-ta-bay-ya-na la-kum kay-fa fa-ʻal-naa bi-him wa-ḍa-rab-naa la-ku-mul- ʹAm-s̤aal!

14:46.text: Wa-q̣ad ma-ka-roo mak-ra-hum: wa-ʻin-dal- laa-hi mak-ru-hum: wa-ʹiñ kaa-na mak-ru-hum li-ta-zoo-la min-hul- ji-baal!

14:47.text: Fa-laa taḥ-sa-ban-nal- laa-ha mukh-li-fa waʻ-di-hee ru-su-lah: ʹin-nal- laa-ha ʻA-zee-zuñ- Ẓuñ- ti-q̣aam.

14:48.text: Yaw-ma tu-bad-da-lul- ʹAr-ḍu g̣ay-ral- ʹAr-ḍi was-Sa-maa-waa-tu wa-ba-ra-zoo lil-laa-hil- Waa-ḥi-dil- Q̣ah-haar;

14:49.text: Wa-ta-ral- Muj-ri-mee-na yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓim- mu-q̣ar-ra-nee-na fil- ʹaṣ-faad;

14:50.text: Sa-raa-bee-lu-hum- miñ- q̣a-ṭi-raa-niñw- wa-tag̣-shaa wu-joo-ha-hu-mun- Naar:

14:51.text: Li-yaj-zi-yal- laa-hu kul-la naf-sim- maa ka-sa-bat; ʹin-nal- laa-ha Sa-ree-ʻul- Ḥi-saab.

14:52.text: Haa-ẓaa Ba-laa-g̣ul- lin-naa-si wa-li-yuñ-ẓa-roo bi-hee wa-li-yaʻ-la-mooo ʹan-na-maa Hu-wa ʹI-laa-huñw- Waa-ḥi-duñw- Wa-li-yaẓ-ẓak-ka-ra ʹu-lul- ʹal-baab.

15:1.text: ʹA-lif-Laaam-Raa. Til-ka ʹAa-yaa-tul- Ki-taa-bi wa-Q̣ur-ʹaa-nim- Mu-been.

15:2.text: Ru-ba-maa ya-wad-dul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo law kaa-noo Mus-li-meen.

15:3.text: Ẓar-hum yaʹ-ku-loo wa-ya-ta-mat-ta-ʻoo wa-yul-hi-hi-mul- ʹa-ma-lu fa-saw-fa yaʻ-la-moon.

15:4.text: Wa-maaa ʹah-lak-naa miñ q̣ar-ya-tin ʹil-laa wa-la-haa ki-taa-bum- maʻ-loom.

15:5.text: Maa- tas-bi-q̣u min ʹum-ma-tin ʹA-ja-la-haa wa-maa yas-taʹ-khi-roon.

15:6.text: Wa-q̣aa-loo yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee nuz-zi-la ʻa-lay-hiẓ- Ẓik-ru ʹin-na-ka la-maj-noon.

15:7.text: Law maa- taʹ-tee-naa bil-ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-ti ʹiñ- kuñ-ta mi-naṣ- Ṣaa-di-q̣een?

15:8.text: Maa- nu-naz-zi-lul- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-ta bil-Ḥaq̣-q̣i il-laa wa-maa kaa-nooo ʹi-ẓam- muñ-z̤̣a-reen!

15:9.text: ʹIn-naa Naḥ-nu naz-zal-naẓ- Ẓik-ra wa-ʹin-naa la-hoo la-Ḥaa-fi-z̤̣oon.

15:10.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹar-sal-naa miñ q̣ab-li-ka fee shi-ya-ʻil- ʹaw-wa-leen:

15:11.text: Wa-maa yaʹ-tee-him- mir- ra-soo-lin ʹil-laa kaa-noo bi-hee yas-tah-zi-ʹoon.

15:13.text: Laa- yuʹ-mi-noo-na bi-hee wa-q̣ad kha-lat sun-na-tul- ʹaw-wa-leen.

15:14.text: Wa-law fa-taḥ-naa ʻa-lay-him baa-bam- mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi fa-z̤̣al-loo fee-hi yaʻ-ru-joon.

15:15.text: La-q̣aa-looo ʹin-na-maa suk-ki-rat ʹab-ṣaa-ru-naa bal naḥ-nu q̣aw-mum- mas-ḥoo-roon.

15:16.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ja-ʻal-naa fis- sa-maaa-ʹi Bu-roo-jañw- Wa-zay-yan-naa-haa lin-naa-z̤̣i-reen;

15:18.text: ʹIl-laa ma-nis- ta-ra-q̣as- sam-ʻa fa-ʹat-ba-ʻa-hoo shi-haa-bum- mu-been.

15:19.text: Wal-ʹar-ḍa ma-dad-naa-haa wa-ʹal-q̣ay-naa fee-haa ra-waa-si-ya wa-ʹam-bat-naa fee-haa miñ kul-li shay-ʹim- maw-zoon.

15:20.text: Wa-ja-ʻal-naa la-kum fee-haa ma-ʻaa-yi-sha wa-mal- las-tum la-hoo bi-raa-zi-q̣een.

15:21.text: Wa-ʹim- miñ- shay-ʹin ʹil-laa ʻiñ-da-naa kha-zaaa-ʹi-nuh; wa-maa nu-naz-zi-lu-hooo ʹil-laa bi-q̣a-da-rim- maʻ-loom.

15:22.text: Wa-ʹar-sal-nar- ri-yaa-ḥa la-waa-q̣i-ḥa fa-ʹañ-zal-naa mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi maaa-ʹañ fa-ʹas-q̣ay-naa-ku-mooh: wa-maaa ʹañ-tum la-hoo bi-khaa-zi-neen.

15:23.text: Wa-ʹin-naa la-naḥ-nu nuḥ-yee wa-nu-mee-tu wa-naḥ-nul- waa-ri-s̤oon.

15:24.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʻa-lim-nal- mus-taq̣-di-mee-na miñ-kum wa-la-q̣ad ʻa-lim-nal- mus-taʹ-khi-reen.

15:25.text: Wa-ʹin-na Rab-ba-ka Hu-wa yaḥ-shu-ru-hum: ʹin-na-hoo Ḥa-kee-mun ʻA-leem.

15:26.text: Wa-la-q̣ad kha-laq̣-nal- ʹiñ-saa-na miñ- ṣal-ṣaa-lim- min ḥa-ma-ʹim- mas-noon:

15:27.text: Wal-jaaan-na kha-laq̣-naa-hu miñ- q̣ab-lu min- naa-ris- sa-moom.

15:28.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣aa-la Rab-bu-ka lil-ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-ti ʹin-nee khaa-li-q̣um- ba-sha-ram- miñ- ṣal-ṣaa-lim- min ḥa-ma-ʹim- mas-noon;

15:29.text: Fa-ʹi-ẓaa saw-way-tu-hoo wa-na-fakh-tu fee-hi mir- Roo-ḥee fa-q̣a-ʻoo la-hoo saa-ji-deen.

15:31.text: ʹIl-laaa ʹIb-lees: ʹa-baaa ʹañy- ya-koo-na ma-ʻas- Saa-ji-deen.

15:32.text: Q̣aa-la yaaa-ʹIb-lee-su maa- la-ka ʹal-laa ta-koo-na ma-ʻas- Saa-ji-deen?

15:33.text: Q̣aa-la lam ʹa-kul- li-ʹas-ju-da li-ba-sha-rin kha-laq̣-ta-hoo miñ ṣal-ṣaa-lim- min ḥa-ma-ʹim- mas-noon.

15:35.text: Wa-ʹin-na ʻa-lay-kal- laʻ-na-ta ʹi-laa Yaw-mid- Deen.

15:36.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-bi fa-ʹañ-z̤̣ir-neee ʹi-laa Yaw-mi yub-ʻa-s̤oon.

15:39.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-bi bi-maaa ʹag̣-way-ta-nee la-ʹu-zay-yi-nan-na la-hum fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-la-ʹug̣-wi-yan-na-hum ʹaj-ma-ʻeen,―

15:42.text: ʹIn-na ʻi-baa-dee lay-sa la-ka ʻa-lay-him sul-ṭaa-nun ʹil-laa ma-nit- ta-ba-ʻa-ka mi-nal- g̣aa-ween.

15:44.text: La-haa sab-ʻa-tu ʹAb-waab: li-kul-li Baa-bim- min-hum juz-ʹum- maq̣-soom.

15:47.text: Wa-na-zaʻ-naa maa- fee ṣu-doo-ri-him- min g̣il-lin ʹikh-waa-nan ʻa-laa su-ru-rim- mu-ta-q̣aa-bi-leen.

15:48.text: Laa- ya-mas-su-hum fee-haa na-ṣa-buñw- wa-maa- hum- min-haa bi-mukh-ra-jeen.

15:49.text: Nab-biʹ ʻi-baa-deee ʹan-neee ʹa-n al-G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem;

15:52.text: ʹIẓ da-kha-loo ʻa-lay-hi fa-q̣aa-loo Sa-laa-maa! Q̣aa-la ʹin-naa miñ-kum wa-ji-loon!

15:53.text: Q̣aa-loo laa- taw-jal ʹin-naa nu-bash-shi-ru-ka bi-g̣u-laa-min ʻa-leem.

15:54.text: Q̣aa-la ʹa-bash-shar-tu-moo-nee ʻa-laaa ʹam- mas-sa-ni-yal- ki-ba-ru fa-bi-ma tu-bash-shi-roon?

15:55.text: Q̣aa-loo bash-shar-naa-ka bil-ḥaq̣-q̣i fa-laa ta-kum- mi-nal- q̣aa-ni-ṭeen!

15:56.text: Q̣aa-la wa-mañy- yaq̣-na-ṭu mir- Raḥ-ma-ti Rab-bi-heee ʹil-laḍ- ḍaaal-loon?

15:58.text: Q̣aa-looo ʹin-naaa ʹur-sil-naaa ʹi-laa q̣aw-mim- muj-ri-meen.

15:59.text: ʹIl-laa ʹAa-la- Looṭ: ʹin-naa la-mu-naj-joo-hum ʹaj-ma-ʻeen,―

15:60.text: ʹIl-lam- ra-ʹa-ta-hoo q̣ad-dar-naaa ʹin-na-haa la-mi-nal- g̣aa-bi-reen.

15:63.text: Q̣aa-loo bal jiʹ-naa-ka bi-maa kaa-noo fee-hi yam-ta-roon.

15:65.text: Fa-ʹas-ri bi-ʹah-li-ka bi-q̣iṭ-ʻim- mi-nal- lay-li wat-ta-biʻ ad-baa-ra-hum wa-laa yal-ta-fit miñ-kum ʹa-ḥa-duñw- wam-ḍoo ḥay-s̤u tuʹ-ma-roon.

15:66.text: Wa-q̣a-ḍay-naaa ʹi-lay-hi ẓaa-li-kal- ʹam-ra ʹan-na daa-bi-ra haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi maq̣-ṭoo-ʻum- muṣ-bi-ḥeen.

15:68.text: Q̣aa-la ʹin-na haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi ḍay-fee fa-laa taf-ḍa-ḥoon:

15:71.text: Q̣aa-la haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi ba-naa-teee ʹiñ- kuñ-tum faa-ʻi-leen.

15:74.text: Fa-ja-ʻal-naa ʻaa-li-ya-haa saa-fi-la-haa wa-ʹam-ṭar-naa ʻa-lay-him ḥi-jaa-ra-tam- miñ sij-jeel.

15:82.text: Wa-kaa-noo yan-ḥi-too-na mi-nal- ji-baa-li bu-yoo-tan ʹaa-mi-neen.

15:84.text: Fa-maaa ʹag̣-naa ʻan-hum- maa kaa-noo yak-si-boon!

15:85.text: Wa-maa kha-laq̣-nas- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa wa-maa bay-na-hu-maaa ʹil-laa bil-ḥaq̣q̣. Wa-ʹin-nas- Saa-ʻa-ta la-ʹaa-ti-ya-tuñ faṣ-fa-ḥiṣ- ṣaf-ḥal- ja-meel.

15:87.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹaa-tay-naa-ka Sab-ʻam- mi-nal- ma-s̤aa-nee wal-Q̣ur-ʹaa-nal- ʻA-z̤̣eem.

15:88.text: Laa- ta-mud-dan-na ʻay-nay-ka ʹi-laa maa- mat-taʻ-naa bi-heee ʹaz-waa-jam- min-hum wa-laa taḥ-zan ʻa-lay-him wakh-fiḍ ja-naa-ḥa-ka lil-Muʹ-mi-neen.

15:94.text: Faṣ-daʻ bi-maa tuʹ-ma-ru wa-ʹaʻ-riḍ ʻa-nil- mush-ri-keen.

15:96.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na yaj-ʻa-loo-na ma-ʻal- laa-hi ʹi-laa-han ʹaa-khar: fa-saw-fa yaʻ-la-moon.

15:97.text: Wa-la-q̣ad naʻ-la-mu ʹan-na-ka ya-ḍee-q̣u ṣad-ru-ka bi-maa ya-q̣oo-loon.

15:98.text: Fa-sab-biḥ bi-ḥam-di- Rab-bi-ka wa-kum- mi-nas- Saa-ji-deen.

16:1.text: ʹA-taaa ʹAm-rul- laa-hi fa-laa tas-taʻ-ji-looh: Sub-ḥaa-na-hoo wa-ta-ʻaa-laa ʻam-maa yush-ri-koon.

16:2.text: Yu-naz-zi-lul- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-ta bir-roo-ḥi min ʹAm-ri-hee ʻa-laa mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu min ʻi-baa-di-heee ʹan ʹañ-ẓi-rooo ʹan-na-hoo Laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laaa ʹa-na fat-ta-q̣oon.

16:3.text: Kha-la-q̣as sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa bil-ḥaq̣q̣: Ta-ʻaa-laa ʻam-maa yush-ri-koon!

16:4.text: Kha-la-q̣al- ʹiñ-saa-na min- nuṭ-fa-tiñ- fa-ʹi-ẓaa hu-wa kha-ṣee-mum- mu-been!

16:5.text: Wal-ʹan-ʻaa-ma kha-la-q̣a-haa la-kum fee-haa dif-ʹuñw wa-ma-naa-fi-ʻu wa-min-haa taʹ-ku-loon.

16:6.text: Wa-la-kum fee-haa ja-maa-lun ḥee-na tu-ree-ḥoo-na wa-ḥee-na tas-ra-ḥoon.

16:7.text: Wa-taḥ-mi-lu ʹas̤-q̣aa-la-kum ʹi-laa ba-la-dil- lam ta-koo-noo baa-li-g̣ee-hi ʹil-laa bi-shiq̣-q̣il- ʹañ-fus: ʹin-na Rab-ba-kum la-Ra-ʹoo-fur- Ra-ḥeem.

16:8.text: Wal-khay-la wal-bi-g̣aa-la wal-ḥa-mee-ra li-tar-ka-boo-haa wa-zee-nah; wa-yakh-lu-q̣u maa laa- taʻ-la-moon.

16:9.text: Wa-ʻa-lal- laa-hi q̣aṣ-dus- Sa-bee-li wa-min-haa jaaa-ʹir: wa-law shaaa-ʹa la-ha-daa-kum ʹaj-ma-ʻeen.

16:10.text: Hu-wal- la-ẓeee ʹañ-za-la mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi maaa-ʹal- la-kum- min-hu sha-raa-buñw- wa-min-hu sha-ja-ruñ- fee-hi tu-see-moon.

16:11.text: Yum-bi-tu la-kum̃- bi-hiz- zar-ʻa waz-zay-too-na wan-na-khee-la wal-ʹaʻ-naa-ba wa-miñ kul-lis̤- s̤a-ma-raat: ʹin-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-ya-tal- li-q̣aw-miñy- ya-ta-fak-ka-roon.

16:12.text: Wa-sakh-kha-ra la-ku-mul- lay-la wan-na-haa-ra wash-sham-sa wal-q̣a-mar; wan-nu-joo-mu mu-sakh-kha-raa-tum- bi-ʹAm-rih: ʹin-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yaa-til- li-q̣aw-miñy- yaʻ-q̣i-loon.

16:13.text: Wa-maa ẓa-ra-ʹa la-kum fil- ʹar-ḍi mukh-ta-li-fan ʹal-waa-nuh: ʹin-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹaa-ya-tal- li-q̣aw-miñy- yaẓ-ẓak-ka-roon.

16:14.text: Wa-Hu-wal- la-ẓee sakh-kha-ral- baḥ-ra li-taʹ-ku-loo min-hu laḥ-mañ- ṭa-riy-yañw- wa-tas-takh-ri-joo min-hu ḥil-ya-tañ tal-ba-soo-na-haa: wa-ta-ral- ful-ka ma-waa-khi-ra fee-hi wa-li-tab-ta-g̣oo miñ- faḍ-li-hee wa-la-ʻal-la-kum tash-ku-roon.

16:15.text: Wa-ʹal-q̣aa fil- ʹar-ḍi ra-waa-si-ya ʹañ- ta-mee-da bi-kum wa-ʹan-haa-rañw- wa-su-bu-lal- la-ʻal-la-kum tah-ta-doon:

16:17.text: ʹA-fa-mañy- yakh-lu-q̣u ka-mal- laa yakh-luq̣? ʹA-fa-laa ta-ẓak-ka-roon?

16:18.text: Wa-ʹiñ- ta-ʻud-doo niʻ-ma-tal- laa-hi laa- tuḥ-ṣoo-haa: ʹin-nal- laa-ha la-G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

16:19.text: Wal-laa-hu yaʻ-la-mu maa- tu-sir-roo-na wa-maa tuʻ-li-noon.

16:20.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na yad-ʻoo-na miñ doo-nil- laa-hi laa- yakh-lu-q̣oo-na shay-ʹañw- wa-hum yukh-la-q̣oon.

16:21.text: ʹAm-waa-tun g̣ay-ru ʹaḥ-yaaaʹ: wa-maa yash-ʻu-roo-na ʹay-yaa-na yub-ʻa-s̤oon.

16:22.text: ʹI-laa-hu-kum ʹI-laa-huñw- Waa-ḥid: fal-la-ẓee-na laa- yuʹ-mi-noo-na bil-ʹAa-khi-ra-ti q̣u-loo-bu-hum- muñ-ki-ra-tuñw- wa-hum- mus-tak-bi-roon.

16:23.text: Laa- ja-ra-ma ʹan-nal- laa-ha yaʻ-la-mu maa- yu-sir-roo-na wa-maa yuʻ-li-noon: ʹin-na-hoo laa- yu-ḥib-bul- mus-tak-bi-reen.

16:24.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa q̣ee-la la-hum- maa-ẓaaa ʹañ-za-la Rab-bu-kum q̣aa-looo ʹa-saa-ṭee-rul- ʹaw-wa-leen?

16:25.text: Li-yaḥ-mi-looo ʹaw-zaa-ra-hum kaa-mi-la-tañy- Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti wa-min ʹaw-zaa-ril- la-ẓee-na yu-ḍil-loo-na-hum̃- bi-g̣ay-ri ʻilm. ʹA-laa saaa-ʹa maa- ya-zi-roon!

16:26.text: Q̣ad ma-ka-ral- la-ẓee-na miñ q̣ab-li-him fa-ʹa-tal- laa-hu bun-yaa-na-hum- mi-nal- q̣a-waa-ʻi-di fa-khar-ra ʻa-lay-hi-mus- saq̣-fu miñ- faw-q̣i-him wa-ʹa-taa-hu-mul- ʻa-ẓaa-bu min ḥay-s̤u laa- yash-ʻu-roon.

16:27.text: S̤um-ma Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti yukh-zee-him wa-ya-q̣oo-lu ʹay-na shu-ra-kaaa-ʹi-yal- la-ẓee-na kuñ-tum tu-shaaaq̣-q̣oo-na fee-him? Q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na ʹoo-tul- ʻil-ma ʹin-nal- khiz-yal- yaw-ma was-sooo-ʹa ʻa-lal- kaa-fi-reen,―

16:28.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na ta-ta-waf-faa-hu-mul- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tu z̤̣aa-li-meee ʹañ-fu-si-him. Fa-ʹal-q̣a-wus- sa-la-ma maa- kun-naa naʻ-ma-lu miñ soooʹ. Ba-laaa ʹIn-nal- laa-ha ʻA-lee-mum- bi-maa kun-tum taʻ-ma-loon.

16:29.text: Fad-khu-looo ʹab-waa-ba Ja-han-na-ma khaa-li-dee-na fee-ha. Fa-la-biʹ-sa mas̤-wal- mu-ta-kab-bi-reen.

16:30.text: Wa-q̣ee-la lil-la-ẓee-nat- ta-q̣aw maa-ẓaaa ʹañ-za-la Rab-bu-kum? Q̣aa-loo khay-raa. Lil-la-ẓee-na ʹaḥ-sa-noo fee haa-ẓi-hid- dun-yaa ḥa-sa-nah. Wa-la-Daa-rul- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti khayr. Wa-la-niʻ-ma Daa-rul- Mut-ta-q̣een,―

16:31.text: Jan-naa-tu ʻAd-niñy- yad-khu-loo-na-haa taj-ree miñ- taḥ-ti-hal- ʹan-haa-ru la-hum fee-haa maa- ya-shaaa-ʹoon: ka-ẓaa-li-ka yaj-zil- laa-hul- Mut-ta-q̣een,―

16:32.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na ta-ta-waf-faa-hu-mul- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tu ṭay-yi-bee-na ya-q̣oo-loo-na Sa-laa-mun ʻa-lay-ku-mud- khu-lul- Jan-na-ta bi-maa kuñ-tum taʻ-ma-loon.

16:33.text: Hal yañ-z̤̣u-roo-na ʹil-laaa ʹañ taʹ-ti-ya-hu-mul- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tu ʹaw yaʹ-ti-ya ʹAm-ru Rab-bik? Ka-ẓaa-li-ka fa-ʻa-lal- la-ẓee-na miñ q̣ab-li-him. Wa-maa z̤̣a-la-ma-hu-mul- laa-hu wa-laa-kiñ- kaa-nooo ʹañ-fu-sa-hum yaz̤̣-li-moon.

16:34.text: Fa-ʹa-ṣaa-ba-hum say-yi-ʹaa-tu maa- ʻa-mi-loo wa-ḥaa-q̣a bi-him- maa kaa-noo bi-hee yas-tah-zi-ʹoon.

16:35.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na ʹash-ra-koo law shaaa-ʹal- laa-hu maa- ʻa-bad-naa miñ- doo-ni-hee miñ- shay-ʹin- naḥ-nu wa-laaa ʹaa-baaa-ʹu-naa wa-laa ḥar-ram-naa miñ- doo-ni-hee miñ- shayyʹ. Ka-ẓaa-li-ka fa-ʻa-lal- la-ẓee-na miñ q̣ab-li-him Fa-hal ʻa-lar- ru-su-li ʹil-lal- Ba-laa-g̣ul- Mu-been?

16:36.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ba-ʻas̤-naa fee kul-li ʹum-ma-tir- ra-soo-lan ʹa-niʻ- bu-dul- laa-ha waj-ta-ni-buṭ- Ṭaa-g̣oot; fa-min-hum- man ha-dal- laa-hu wa-min-hum- man ḥaq̣-q̣at ʻa-lay-hiḍ- ḍa-laa-lah. Fa-see-roo fil- ʹar-ḍi fañ-z̤̣u-roo kay-fa kaa-na ʻaa-q̣i-ba-tul- mu-kaẓ-ẓi-been.

16:37.text: ʹIñ- taḥ-riṣ ʻa-laa hu-daa-hum fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha laa- yah-dee mañy- yu-ḍil-lu wa-maa la-hum- min- naa-ṣi-reen.

16:38.text: Wa-ʹaq̣-sa-moo bil-laa-hi jah-da ʹay-maa-ni-him laa- yab-ʻa-s̤ul- laa-hu mañy- ya-moot: ba-laa waʻ-dan ʻa-lay-hi ḥaq̣-q̣añw- wa-laa-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ran- naa-si laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

16:39.text: Li-yu-bay-yi-na la-hu-mul- la-ẓee yakh-ta-li-foo-na fee-hi wa-li-yaʻ-la-mal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-rooo ʹan-na-hum kaa-noo kaa-ẓi-been.

16:40.text: ʹIn-na-maa q̣aw-lu-naa li-shay-ʹin ʹi-ẓaaa ʹa-rad-naa-hu ʹan- na-q̣oo-la la-hoo Kuñ- Fa-ya-koon.

16:41.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na haa-ja-roo fil- laa-hi mim- baʻ-di maa- z̤̣u-li-moo la-nu-baw-wi-ʹan-na-hum fid- dun-yaa ḥa-sa-nah; wa-la-ʹaj-rul- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti ʹak-bar. Law kaa-noo yaʻ-la-moon!

16:43.text: Wa-maaa ʹar-sal-naa miñ q̣ab-li-ka ʹil-laa ri-jaa-lan- noo-ḥeee ʹi-lay-him, fas-ʹa-looo ʹah-laẓ- Ẓik-ri ʹiñ- kuñ-tum laa- taʻ-la-moon,―

16:44.text: Bil-Bay-yi-naa-ti waz-Zu-bur; wa-ʹañ-zal-naaa ʹi-lay-kaẓ- Ẓik-ra li-tu-bay-yi-na lin-naa-si maa- nuz-zi-la ʹi-lay-him wa-la-ʻal-la-hum ya-ta-fak-ka-roon.

16:45.text: ʹA-fa-ʹa-mi-nal- la-ẓee-na ma-ka-rus- say-yi-ʹaa-ti ʹañy- yakh-si-fal- laa-hu bi-hi-mul- ʹar-ḍa ʹaw yaʹ-ti-ya-hu-mul- ʻa-ẓaa-bu min ḥay-s̤u laa- yash-ʻu-roon?

16:46.text: ʹAw yaʹ-khu-ẓa-hum fee ta-q̣al-lu-bi-him fa-maa hum̃- bi-muʻ-ji-zeen?―

16:47.text: ʹAw yaʹ-khu-ẓa-hum ʻa-laa ta-khaw-wuf: fa-ʹin-na Rab-ba-kum la-Ra-ʹoo-fur- Ra-ḥeem.

16:48.text: ʹA-wa-lam ya-raw ʹi-laa maa- kha-la-q̣al- laa-hu miñ- shay-ʹiñy- ya-ta-fay-ya-ʹu z̤̣i-laa-lu-hoo ʻa-nil- ya-mee-ni wash-sha-maaa-ʹi-li suj-ja-dal- lil-laa-hi wa-hum daa-khi-roon?

16:49.text: Wa-lil-laa-hi yas-ju-du maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-maa fil- ʹar-ḍi miñ daaab-ba-tiñw- wal-ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tu wa-hum laa- yas-tak-bi-roon,

16:50.text: Ya-khaa-foo-na Rab-ba-hum- miñ- faw-q̣i-him wa-yaf-ʻa-loo-na maa- yuʹ-ma-roon.

16:51.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- laa-hu laa- tat-ta-khi-ẓooo ʹi-laa-hay-nis̤- nayn: ʹin-na-maa Hu-wa ʹI-laa-huñw- Waa-ḥid: fa-ʹiy-yaa-ya far-ha-boon.

16:52.text: Wa-la-hoo maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi wa-la-hud- Dee-nu waa-ṣi-baa: ʹa-fa-g̣ay-ral- laa-hi tat-ta-q̣oon?

16:53.text: Wa-maa bi-kum- min- niʻ-ma-tiñ- fa-mi-nal- laa-hi s̤um-ma ʹi-ẓaa mas-sa-ku-muḍ- ḍur-ru fa-ʹi-lay-hi taj-ʹa-roon;

16:54.text: S̤um-ma ʹi-ẓaa ka-sha-faḍ- ḍur-ra ʻañ-kum ʹi-ẓaa fa-ree-q̣um- miñ-kum̃- bi-Rab-bi-him yush-ri-koon.

16:55.text: Li-yak-fu-roo bi-maaa ʹaa-tay-naa-hum! Fa-ta-mat-ta-ʻoo; fa-saw-fa taʻ-la-moon!

16:56.text: Wa-yaj-ʻa-loo-na li-maa laa- yaʻ-la-moo-na na-ṣee-bam- mim-maa ra-zaq̣-naa-hum! Tal-laa-hi la-tus-ʹa-lu-nna ʻam-maa kuñ-tum taf-ta-roon.

16:57.text: Wa-yaj-ʻa-loo-na lil-laa-hil- ba-naa-ti Sub-ḥaa-na-hoo wa-la-hum- maa yash-ta-hoon!

16:58.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa bush-shi-ra ʹa-ḥa-du-hum̃- bil-ʹuñ-s̤aa z̤̣al-la waj-hu-hoo mus-wad-dañw- wa-hu-wa ka-z̤̣eem!

16:59.text: Ya-ta-waa-raa mi-nal- q̣aw-mi miñ- sooo-ʹi maa- bush-shi-ra bih! ʹA-yum-si-ku-hoo ʻa-laa hoo-nin ʹam ya-dus-su-hoo fit- tu-raab? ʹA-laa saaa-ʹa maa- yaḥ-ku-moon?

16:60.text: Lil-la-ẓee-na laa- yuʹ-mi-noo-na bil-ʹAa-khi-ra-ti ma-s̤a-lus- sawʹ: wa-lil-laa-hil- Ma-s̤a-lul- ʹAʻ-laa: wa-Hu-wal- ʻA-zee-zul- Ḥa-keem.

16:61.text: Wa-law yu-ʹaa-khi-ẓul- laa-hun- naa-sa bi-z̤̣ul-mi-him- maa ta-ra-ka ʻa-lay-haa miñ- daaab-ba-tiñw- wa-laa-kiñy- yu-ʹakh-khi-ru-hum ʹi-laaa ʹa-ja-lim- mu-sam-maa: fa-ʹi-ẓaa jaaa-ʹa ʹa-ja-lu-hum laa- yas-taʹ-khi-roo-na saa-ʻa-tañw- wa-laa- yas-taq̣-di-moon.

16:62.text: Wa-yaj-ʻa-loo-na lil-laa-hi maa- yak-ra-hoo-na wa-ta-ṣi-fu ʹal-si-na-tu-hu-mul- ka-ẓi-ba ʹan-na la-hu-mul- ḥus-naa: laa- ja-ra-ma ʹan-na la-hu-mun- Naa-ra wa-ʹan-na-hum- muf-ra-ṭoon!

16:63.text: Tal-laa-hi la-q̣ad ʹar-sal-naaa ʹi-laaa ʹu-ma-mim- miñ- q̣ab-li-ka fa-zay-ya-na la-hu-mush- Shay-ṭaa-nu ʹaʻ-maa-la-hum fa-hu-wa wa-liy-yu-hu-mul- yaw-ma wa-la-hum ʻa-ẓaa-bun ʹa-leem.

16:64.text: Wa-maaa ʹañ-zal-naa ʻa-lay-kal- Ki-taa-ba ʹil-laa li-tu-bay-yi-na la-hu-mul- la-ẓikh- ta-la-foo fee-hi wa-hu-dañw- wa-raḥ-ma-tal- li-q̣aw-miñy- yuʹ-mi-noon.

16:65.text: Wal-laa-hu ʹañ-za-la mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi maaa-ʹañ- fa-ʹaḥ-yaa bi-hil- ʹar-ḍa baʻ-da maw-ti-haa: ʹin-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-ya-tal- li-q̣aw-miñy- yas-ma-ʻoon.

16:66.text: Wa-ʹin-na la-kum fil- ʹan-ʻaa-mi la-ʻIb-rah. Nus-q̣ee-kum- mim-maa fee bu-ṭoo-ni-hee mim- bay-ni far-s̤iñw- wa-da-mil- la-ba-nan khaa-li-ṣañ- saaa-ʹi-g̣al-lish- shaa-ri-been.

16:67.text: Wa-miñ- s̤a-ma-raa-tin- na-khee-li wal-ʹaʻ-naa-bi tat-ta-khi-ẓoo-na min-hu sa-ka-rañw- wa-riz-q̣an ḥa-sa-naa: ʹin-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-ya-tal- li-q̣aw-miñy- yaʻ-q̣i-loon.

16:68.text: Wa-ʹaw-ḥaa Rab-bu-ka ʹi-lan- NAḤ-LI ʹa-nit- ta-khi-ẓee mi-nal- ji-baa-li bu-yoo-tañw- wa-mi-nash- sha-ja-ri wa-mim-maa yaʻ-ri-shoon;

16:69.text: S̤um-ma ku-lee miñ kul-lis̤- s̤a-ma-raa-ti fas-lu-kee su-bu-la Rab-bi-ki ẓu-lu-laa. Yakh-ru-ju mim- bu-ṭoo-ni-haa sha-raa-bum- mukh-ta-li-fun ʹal-waa-nu-hoo fee-hi shi-faaa-ʹul- lin-naas: ʹin-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-ya-tal- li-q̣aw-miñy- ya-ta-fak-ka-roon.

16:70.text: Wal-laa-hu kha-la-q̣a-kum s̤um-ma ya-ta-waf-faa-kum wa-miñ-kum- mañy- yu-rad-du ʹi-laaa ʹar-ẓa-lil- ʻu-mu-ri li-kay laa- yaʻ-la-ma baʻ-da ʻil-miñ shay-ʹaa: ʹin-nal- laa-ha ʻA-lee-muñ- Q̣a-deer.

16:71.text: Wal-laa-hu faḍ-ḍa-la baʻ-ḍa-kum ʻa-laa baʻ-ḍiñ- fir- rizq̣: fa-mal- la-ẓee-na fuḍ-ḍi-loo bi-raaad-dee riz-q̣i-him ʻa-laa maa- ma-la-kat ʹay-maa-nu-hum fa-hum fee-hi sa-waaaʹ. ʹA-fa-bi-niʻ-ma-til- laa-hi yaj-ḥa-doon?

16:72.text: Wal-laa-hu ja-ʻa-la la-kum- min ʹañ-fu-si-kum ʹaz-waa-jañw- Wa-ja-ʻa-la la-kum- min ʹaz-waa-ji-kum ba-nee-na wa-ḥa-fa-da-tañw- wa-ra-za-q̣a-kum- mi-naṭ- ṭay-yi-baat: ʹa-fa-bil-baa-ṭi-li yuʹ-mi-noo-na wa-bi-niʻ-ma-til- laa-hi hum yak-fu-roon?―

16:73.text: Wa-yaʻ-bu-doo-na miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi maa laa- yam-li-ku la-hum riz-q̣am- mi-nas- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi shay-ʹañw- wa-laa- yas-ta-ṭee-ʻoon?

16:74.text: Fa-laa taḍ-ri-boo lil-laa-hil- ʹam-s̤aal: ʹin-nal- laa-ha yaʻ-la-mu waʹañ-tum laa- taʻ-la-moon.

16:75.text: Ḍa-ra-bal- laa-hu Ma-s̤a-lan ʻab-dam- mam-loo-kal- laa yaq̣-di-ru ʻa-laa shay-ʹiñw- wa-mar- ra-zaq̣-naa-hu min-naa riz-q̣an ḥa-sa-nañ- fa-hu-wa yuñ-fi-q̣u min-hu sir-rañw- wa-jah-raa: hal yas-ta-woon? ʹAl-Ḥam-du lil-laah. Bal ʹak-s̤a-ru-hum laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

16:76.text: Wa-ḍa-ra-bal- laa-hu Ma-s̤a-lar- ra-ju-lay-ni ʹa-ḥa-du-hu-maaa ʹab-ka-mu laa- yaq̣-di-ru ʻa-laa shay-ʹiñw- wa- hu-wa kal-lun ʻa-laa maw-laa-hu ʹay-na-maa yu-waj-jih-hu laa- yaʹ-ti bi-khayr: hal yas-ta-wee hu-wa wa-mañy- yaʹ-mu-ru bil-ʻad-li wa-hu-wa ʻa-laa Ṣi-raa-ṭim Mus-ta-q̣eem?

16:77.text: Wa-lil-laa-hi g̣ay-bus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ. Wa-maaa ʹam-rus- Saa-ʻa-ti ʹil-laa ka-lam-ḥil- ba-ṣa-ri ʹaw hu-wa ʹaq̣-rab: ʹin-nal- laa-ha ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Q̣a-deer.

16:78.text: Wal-laa-hu ʹakh-ra-ja-kum- mim- bu-ṭoo-ni ʹum-ma-haa-ti-kum laa- taʻ-la-moo-na shay-ʹañw- wa-ja-ʻa-la la-ku-mus- sam-ʻa wal-ʹab-ṣaa-ra wal-ʹaf-ʹi-da-ta la-ʻal-la-kum tash-ku-roon.

16:79.text: ʹA-lam ya-raw ʹi-laṭ- ṭay-ri mu-sakh-kha-raa-tiñ- fee jaw-wis- sa-maaaʹ? Maa- yum-si-ku-hun-na ʹil-lal- laah. ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yaa-til- li-q̣aw-miñy- yuʹ-mi-noon.

16:80.text: Wal-laa-hu ja-ʻa-la la-kum- mim- bu-yoo-ti-kum sa-ka-nañw- wa-ja-ʻa-la la-kum- miñ- ju-loo-dil- ʹan-ʻaa-mi bu-yoo-tañ- tas-ta-khif-foo-na-haa yaw-ma z̤̣aʻ-ni-kum wa-yaw-ma ʻi-q̣aa-ma-ti-kum wa-min- aṣ-waa-fi-haa wa-ʹaw-baa-ri-haa wa-ʹash-ʻaa-ri-haaa ʹa-s̤aa-s̤añw- Wa-ma-taa-ʻan ʹi-laa ḥeen.

16:81.text: Wal-laa-hu ja-ʻa-la la-kum- mim-maa kha-la-q̣a z̤̣i-laa-lañw- wa-ja-ʻa-la la-kum- mi-nal- ji-baa-li ʹak-naa-nañw- Wa-ja-ʻa-la la-kum sa-raa-bee-la ta-q̣ee-ku-mul- ḥar-ra wa-sa-raa-bee-la ta-q̣ee-kum̃- baʹ-sa-kum. Ka-ẓaa-li-ka yu-tim-mu niʻ-ma-ta-hoo ʻa-lay-kum la-ʻal-la-kum tus-li-moon.

16:82.text: Fa-ʹiñ- ta-wal-law fa-ʹin-na-maa ʻa-lay-kal- Ba-laa-g̣ul- Mu-been.

16:83.text: Yaʻ-ri-foo-na niʻ-ma-tal- laa-hi s̤um-ma yuñ-ki-roo-na-haa wa-ʹak-sa-ru-hu-mul- kaa-fi-roon.

16:84.text: Wa-yaw-ma nab-ʻa-s̤u miñ- kul-li ʹum-ma-tiñ Sha-hee-dañ- s̤um-ma laa- yuʹ-ẓa-nu lil-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo wa-laa hum yus-taʻ-ta-boon.

16:85.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa ra- ʹal-la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-mul- ʻA-ẓaa-ba fa-laa yu-khaf-fa-fu ʻan-hum wa-laa hum yuñ-z̤̣a-roon.

16:86.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa ra- ʹal-la-ẓee-na ʹash-ra-koo shu-ra-kaaa-ʹa-hum q̣aa-loo Rab-ba-naa haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi shu-ra-kaaa-ʹu-nal- la-ẓee-na kun-naa nad-ʻoo miñ- doo-nik. Fa-ʹal-q̣aw ʹi-lay-hi-mul- q̣aw-la ʹin-na-kum la-kaa-ẓi-boon!

16:87.text: Wa-ʹal-q̣aw ʹi-lal- laa-hi yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓi-nis- sa-la-ma wa-ḍal-la ʻan-hum- maa kaa-noo yaf-ta-roon.

16:88.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo wa-ṣad-doo ʻañ Sa-bee-lil- laa-hi zid-naa-hum ʻA-ẓaa-bañ faw-q̣al- ʻa-ẓaa-bi bi-maa kaa-noo yuf-si-doon.

16:89.text: Wa-yaw-ma nab-ʻa-s̤u fee kul-li ʹum-ma-tiñ sha-hee-dan ʻa-lay-him- min ʹañ-fu-si-him wa-jiʹ-naa bi-ka sha-hee-dan ʻa-laa haaa-ʹu-laaaʹ. Wa-naz-zal-naa ʻa-lay-kal- Ki-taa-ba tib-yaa-nal- li-kul-li- shay-ʹiñw- wa-Hu-dañw- wa-Raḥ-ma-tañw- wa-Bush-raa lil-Mus-li-meen.

16:90.text: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha yaʹ-mu-ru bil-ʻad-li- wal-ʹiḥ-saa-ni wa-ʹee-taaa-ʹi ẓil- q̣ur-baa wa-yan-haa ʻa-nil- faḥ-shaaa-ʹi wal-muñ-ka-ri wal-bag̣-yi: ya-ʻi-Z̤̣u-kum la-ʻal-la-kum ta-ẓak-ka-roon.

16:91.text: Wa-ʹaw-foo bi-ʻAh-dil- laa-hi ʹi-ẓaa ʻaa-hat-tum wa-laa tañ-q̣u-ḍul- ʹay-maa-na baʻ-da taw-kee-di-haa wa-q̣ad ja-ʻal-tu-mul- laa-ha ʻa-lay-kum ka-fee-laa: ʹin-nal- laa-ha yaʻ-la-mu maa- taf-ʻa-loon.

16:92.text: Wa-laa ta-koo-noo kal-la-tee na-q̣a-ḍat g̣az-la-haa mim- baʻ-di q̣uw-wa-tin ʹañ-kaa-s̤aa.
