Tat-ta-khi-ẓoo-na ʹay-maa-na-kum da-kha-lam- bay-na-kum ʹañ- ta-koo-na ʹum-ma-tun hi-ya ʹar-baa min ʹum-mah; ʹin-na-maa yab-loo-ku-mul- laa-hu bih; wa-la-yu-bay-yi-nan-na la-kum Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti maa- kuñ-tum fee-hi takh-ta-li-foon.

16:93.text: Wa-law shaaa-ʹal- laa-hu la-ja-ʻa-la-kum ʹum-ma-tañw- waa-ḥi-da-tañw- wa-laa-kiñy- yu-ḍil-lu mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu wa-yah-dee- mañy- ya-shaaaʹ: wa-la-tus-ʹa-lun-na ʻam-maa kuñ-tum taʻ-ma-loon.

16:94.text: Wa-laa tat-ta-khi-ẓooo ʹay-maa-na-kum da-kha-lam- bay-na-kum fa-ta-zil-la q̣a-da-mum- baʻ-da s̤u-boo-ti-haa wa-ta-ẓoo-q̣us- sooo-ʹa bi-maa ṣa-dat-tum ʻañ- Sa-bee-lil- laa-hi wa-la-kum ʻa-ẓaa-bun ʻa-z̤̣eem.

16:95.text: Wa-laa tash-ta-roo bi-ʻAh-dil- laa-hi s̤a-ma-nañ- q̣a-lee-laa: ʹin-na-maa ʻiñ-dal- laa-hi hu-wa khay-rul- la-kum ʹiñ- kuñ-tum taʻ-la-moon.

16:96.text: Maa- ʻiñ-da-kum yañ-fa-du wa-maa ʻiñ-dal- laa-hi baaq̣. Wa-la-naj-zi-yan-nal- la-ẓee-na ṣa-ba-rooo ʹaj-ra-hum̃- bi-ʹaḥ-sa-ni maa- kaa-noo- yaʻ-ma-loon.

16:97.text: Man ʻa-mi-la ṣaa-li-ḥam- miñ- ẓa-ka-rin ʹaw ʹuñ-s̤aa wa-hu-wa Muʹ-mi-nuñ- fa-la-nuḥ-yi-yan-na-hoo Ḥa-yaa-tañ- Ṭay-yi-bah, wa-la-naj-zi-yan-na-hum ʹaj-ra-hum̃- bi-ʹaḥ-sa-ni maa- kaa-noo yaʻ-ma-loon.

16:98.text: Fa-ʹi-ẓaa q̣a-raʹ-tal- Q̣ur-ʹaa-na fas-ta-ʻiẓ bil-laa-hi mi-nash- Shay-ṭaa-nir- Ra-jeem.

16:99.text: ʹIn-na-hoo lay-sa la-hoo sul-ṭaa-nun ʻa-lal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-laa Rab-bi-him ya-ta-wak-ka-loon.

16:100.text: ʹIn-na-maa sul-ṭaa-nu-hoo ʻa-lal- la-ẓee-na ya-ta-wal-law-na-hoo wal-la-ẓee-na hum̃- bi-hee mush-ri-koon.

16:101.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa bad-dal-naaa ʹaa-ya-tam- ma-kaa-na ʹaa-ya-tiñw- wal-laa-hu ʹAʻ-la-mu bi-maa yu-naz-zi-lu q̣aa-looo ʹin-na-maaa ʹañ-ta muf-tar: bal- ʹak-s̤a-ru-hum laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

16:102.text: Q̣ul naz-za-la-hoo Roo-ḥul- Q̣u-du-si mir- Rab-bi-ka bil-Ḥaq̣-q̣i li-yu-s̤ab-bi-tal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo Bush-raa wa-Hu-dañw-wa lil-Mus-li-meen.

16:103.text: Wa-la-q̣ad naʻ-la-mu ʹan-na-hum ya-q̣oo-loo-na ʹin-na-maa yu-ʻal-li-mu-hoo ba-shar. Li-saa-nul- la-ẓee yul-ḥi-doo-na ʹi-lay-hi ʹaʻ-ja-miy-yuñw- Wa-haa-ẓaa li-saa-nun- ʻA-ra-biy-yum- mu-been.

16:104.text: ʹIn-nal- la-zee-na laa- yuʹ-mi-noo-na bi-ʹaa-yaa-til- la-hi laa- yah-dee-hi-mul- laa-hu wa-la-hum ʻa-ẓaa-bun ʹa-leem.

16:105.text: ʹIn-na-maa yaf-ta-ril- ka-ẓi-bal- la-ẓee-na laa- yuʹ-mi-noo-na bi-ʹaa-yaa-til- laa-hi wa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- kaa-ẓi-boon.

16:106.text: Mañ- ka-fa-ra bil-laa-hi mim- baʻ-di ʹee-maa-ni-heee ʹil-laa man ʹuk-ri-ha wa-q̣al-bu-hoo muṭ-ma-ʹin-num- bil-ʹEe-maa-ni wa-laa-kim- mañ- sha-ra-ḥa bil-kuf-ri ṣad-rañ- fa-ʻa-lay-him g̣a-ḍa-bum- mi-nal- laa-hi wa-la-hum ʻa-ẓaa-bun ʻa-z̤̣eem.

16:107.text: Ẓaa-li-ka bi-ʹan-na-hu-mus- ta-ḥab-bul- ḥa-yaa-tad- dun-yaa ʻa-lal- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti wa-ʹan-nal- laa-ha laa- yah-dil- Q̣aw-mal- kaa-fi-reen.

16:108.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-kal- la-ẓee-na ṭa-ba-ʻal- laa-hu ʻa-laa q̣u-loo-bi-him wa-sam-ʻi-him wa-ʹab-ṣaa-ri-him wa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- G̣aa-fi-loon.

16:109.text: Laa- ja-ra-ma ʹan-na-hum fil- ʹaa-khi-ra-ti hu-mul- khaa-si-roon.

16:110.text: S̤um-ma ʹin-na Rab-ba-ka lil-la-ẓee-na haa-ja-roo mim- baʻ-di maa- fu-ti-noo s̤um-ma jaa-ha-doo wa-ṣa-ba-rooo ʹin-na Rab-ba-ka mim- baʻ-di-haa G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

16:111.text: Yaw-ma taʹ-tee kul-lu naf-siñ- tu-jaa-di-lu ʻan- naf-si-haa wa-tu-waf-faa kul-lu naf-sim- maa ʻa-mi-lat Wa-hum laa- yuz̤̣-la-moon.

16:112.text: Wa-ḍa-ra-bal- laa-hu Ma-s̤a-lañ- q̣ar-ya-tañ- kaa-nat ʹaa-mi-na-tam- muṭ-ma-ʹin-na-tañy- yaʹ-tee-haa riz-q̣u-haa ra-g̣a-dam- miñ- kul-li ma-kaa-niñ- fa-ka-fa-rat bi-ʹan-ʻu-mil- laa-hi fa-ʹa-ẓaa-q̣a-hal- laa-hu li-baa-sal- joo-ʻi wal-khaw-fi bi-maa kaa-noo yaṣ-na-ʻoon.

16:113.text: Wa-la-q̣ad jaaa-ʹa-hum Ra-soo-lum- min-hum fa-kaẓ-ẓa-boo-hu fa-ʹa-kha-ẓa-hu-mul- ʻa-ẓaa-bu wa-hum z̤̣aa-li-moon.

16:114.text: Fa-ku-loo mim-maa ra-za-q̣a-ku-mul- laa-hu Ḥa-laa-lañ- Ṭay-yi-baa; wash-ku-roo niʻ-ma-tal- laa-hi ʹiñ- kuñ-tum ʹiy-yaa-hu taʻ-bu-doon.

16:115.text: ʹIn-na-maa ḥar-ra-ma ʻa-lay-ku-mul- may-ta-ta wad-da-ma wa-laḥ-mal- khiñ-zee-ri wa-maaa ʹu-hil-la li-g̣ay-ril- laa-hi bih. Fa-ma-niḍ- ṭur-ra g̣ay-ra baa-g̣iñw- wa-laa- ʻaa-diñ- fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

16:116.text: wa-laa ta-q̣oo-loo li-maa ta-ṣi-fu ʹal-si-na-tu-ku-mul- ka-ẓi-ba haa-ẓaa ḥa-laa-luñw- wa-haa-ẓaa ḥa-raa-mul- li-taf-ta-roo ʻa-lal- laa-hil- ka-ẓib. ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na yaf-ta-roo-na ʻa-lal- laa-hil- ka-ẓi-ba laa- yuf-li-ḥoon.

16:118.text: Wa-ʻa-lal- la-ẓee-na haa-doo ḥar-ram-naa maa- q̣a-ṣaṣ-naa ʻa-lay-ka miñ- q̣abl: wa-maa z̤̣a-lam-naa-hum wa-laa-kiñ kaa-nooo ʹañ-fu-sa-hum yaz̤̣-li-moon.

16:119.text: S̤um-ma ʹin-na Rab-ba-ka lil-la-ẓee-na ʻa-mi-lus- sooo-ʹa bi-ja-haa-la-tiñ s̤um-ma taa-boo mim- baʻ-di ẓaa-li-ka wa-ʹaṣ-la-ḥooo ʹin-na Rab-ba-ka mim- baʻ-di-haa la-G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

16:120.text: ʹIn-na ʹIb-raa-hee-ma kaa-na ʹum-ma-tañ- q̣aa-ni-tal- lil-laa-hi ḥa-nee-faa: wa-lam ya-ku mi-nal- mush-ri-keen:

16:121.text: Shaa-ki-ral- li-ʹan-ʻu-mih: ʹij-ta-baa-hu wa-ha-daa-hu ʹi-laa Ṣi-raa-tim- Mus-ta-q̣eem.

16:122.text: Wa-ʹaa-tay-naa-hu fid- dun-yaa Ḥa-sa-nah: wa-ʹin-na-hoo fil- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti la-mi-naṣ- Ṣaa-li-ḥeen.

16:123.text: S̤um-ma aw-ḥay-naaa ʹi-lay-ka ʹa-nit- ta-biʻ Mil-la-ta ʹIb-raa-hee-ma Ḥa-nee-faa, wa-maa kaa-na mi-nal- mush-ri-keen.

16:124.text: In-na-maa ju-ʻi-las- Sab-tu ʻa-lal- la-ẓee-nakh- ta-la-foo feeh: wa-ʹin-na Rab-ba-ka la-yaḥ-ku-mu bay-na-hum Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti fee-maa kaa-noo fee-hi yakh-ta-li-foon.

16:125.text: ʹUd-ʻu ʹi-laa sa-bee-li Rab-bi-ka bil-ḥik-ma-ti wal-maw-ʻi-z̤̣a-til- ḥa-sa-na-ti wa-jaa-dil-hum̃- bil-la-tee hi-ya ʹaḥ-san: ʹIn-na Rab-ba-ka Hu-wa ʹAʻ-la-mu bi-mañ- ḍal-la ʻañ- Sa-bee-li-hee wa-Hu-wa ʹaʻ-la-mu bil-Muh-ta-deen.

16:126.text: Wa-ʹin ʻaa-q̣ab-tum fa-ʻaa-q̣i-boo bi-mis̤-li maa- ʻoo-q̣ib-tum̃ -bih: wa-la-ʹiñ- ṣa-bar-tum la-hu-wa khay-rul- liṣ-Ṣaa-bi-reen.

16:127.text: Waṣ-bir wa-maa ṣab-ru-ka ʹil-laa bil-laa-hi wa-laa taḥ-zan ʻa-lay-him wa-laa ta-ku fee ḍay-q̣im- mim-maa yam-ku-roon.

16:128.text: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha ma-ʻal laẓeenat taq̣aw wal-la-ẓee-na hum- Muḥ-sinoon.

17:1.text: Sub-ḥaa-nal- la-ẓeee ʹas-raa bi-ʻAb-di-hee lay-lam- mi-nal- Mas-ji-dil- Ḥa-raa-mi ʹi-lal- Mas-ji-dil- ʹAq̣-ṣal- la-ẓee baa-rak-naa ḥaw-la-hoo li-nu-ri-ya-hoo min ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa: ʹin-na-hoo Hu-was- Sa-mee-ʻul- Ba-ṣeer.

17:2.text: Wa-ʹaa-tay-naa Moo-sal- Ki-taa-ba wa-ja-ʻal-naa-hu Hu-dal- li-Ba-neee ʹIs-raaa-ʹee-la ʹal-laa tat-ta-khi-ẓoo miñ- doo-nee wa-kee-laa.

17:3.text: Ẓur-riy-ya-ta man ḥa-mal-naa ma-ʻa Nooḥ! ʹIn-na-hoo kaa-na ʻab-dañ- sha-koo-raa.

17:4.text: Wa-q̣a-ḍay-naaa ʹi-laa Ba-neee ʹIs-raaa-ʹee-la fil- ki-taa-bi la-tuf-si-dun-na fil- ʹar-ḍi mar-ra-tay-ni wa-la-taʻ-lun-na ʻu-luw-wañ- ka-bee-raa!

17:5.text: Fa-ʹi-ẓaa jaaa-ʹa waʻ-du ʹu-laa-hu-maa ba-ʻas̤-naa ʻa-lay-kum ʻi-baa-dal- la-naaa ʹu-lee baʹ-siñ sha-dee-diñ fa-jaa-soo khi-laa-lad- di-yaar; wa-kaa-na waʻ-dam- maf-ʻoo-laa.

17:6.text: S̤um-ma ra-dad-naa la-ku-mul- kar-ra-ta ʻa-lay-him wa-ʹam-dad-naa-kum̃ bi-ʹam-waa-liñw- wa-ba-nee-na wa-ja-ʻal-naa-kum ʹak-s̤a-ra na-fee-raa.

17:7.text: ʹIn ʹaḥ-sañ-tum ʹaḥ-sañ-tum li-ʹañ-fu-si-kum; wa-in ʹa-saʹ-tum fa-la-haa. Fa-ʹi-ẓaa jaaa-ʹa waʻ-dul- ʹaa-khi-ra-ti li-ya-sooo-ʹu wu-joo-ha-kum wa-li-yad-khu-lul- Mas-ji-da ka-maa da-kha-loo-hu ʹaw-wa-la mar-ra-tiñw- wa-li-yu-tab-bi-roo maa- ʻa-law tat-bee-raa.

17:8.text: ʻA-saa Rab-bu-kum ʹañy- yar-ḥa-ma-kum; wa-ʹin ʻut-tum ʻud-naa. Wa-ja-ʻal-naa Ja-han-na-ma lil-kaa-fi-ree-na ḥa-ṣee-raa.

17:9.text: ʹIn-na haa-ẓal- Q̣ur-ʹaa-na yah-dee lil-la-tee hi-ya ʹaq̣-wa-mu wa-yu-bash-shi-rul- Muʹ-mi-nee-nal- la-ẓee-na yaʻ-ma-loo-naṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti ʹan-na la-hum ʹaj-rañ- ka-bee-raa;

17:10.text: Waʹan-nal- la-ẓee-na laa- yuʹ-mi-noo-na bil-ʹAa-khi-ra-ti ʹaʻ-tad-naa la-hum ʻA-ẓaa-ban ʹa-lee-maa.

17:11.text: Wa-yad-ʻul- ʹiñ-saa-nu bish-shar-ri du-ʻaa-ʹa-hoo bil-khayr; wa-kaa-nal- ʹiñ-saa-nu ʻa-joo-laa.

17:12.text: Wa-ja-ʻal-nal- Lay-la wan-Na-haa-ra ʹAa-ya-tay-ni fa-ma-ḥaw-naaa ʹAa-ya-tal- Lay-li wa-ja-ʻal-naaa ʹAa-ya-tan- Na-haa-ri mub-ṣi-ra-tal- li-tab-ta-g̣oo faḍ-lam- mir- rab-bi-kum wa-li-taʻ-la-moo ʻa-da-das- si-nee-na wal-ḥi-saab: wa-kul-la shay-ʹiñ faṣ-ṣal-naa-hu taf-ṣee-laa.

17:13.text: Wa-kul-la ʹiñ-saa-nin ʹal-zam-naa-hu ṭaaa-ʹi-ra-hoo fee ʻu-nu-q̣ih: wa-nukh-ri-ju la-hoo Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti ki-taa-bañy- yal-q̣aa-hu mañ-shoo-raa.

17:14.text: ʹIq̣-raʹ ki-taa-ba-ka ka-faa bi-naf-si-kal- yaw-ma ʻa-lay-ka ḥa-see-baa.

17:15.text: Ma-nih- ta-daa fa-ʹin-na-maa yah-ta-dee li-naf-sih: Wa-mañ ḍal-la fa-ʹin-na-maa ya-ḍil-lu ʻa-lay-haa: wa-laa ta-zi-ru waa-zi-ra-tuñw- wiz-ra ʹukh-raa: wa-maa kun-naa mu-ʻaẓ-ẓi-bee-na ḥat-taa nab-ʻa-s̤a ra-soo-laa.

17:16.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaaa ʹa-rad-naaa ʹan- nuh-li-ka q̣ar-ya-tan ʹa-mar-naa mut-ra-fee-haa fa-fa-sa-q̣oo fee-haa fa-ḥaq̣-q̣a ʻa-lay-hal- q̣aw-lu fa-dam-mar-naa-haa tad-mee-raa.

17:17.text: Wa-kam ʹah-lak-naa mi-nal- q̣u-roo-ni mim- baʻ-di Nooḥ? Wa-ka-faa bi-Rab-bi-ka bi-ẓu-noo-bi ʻi-baa-di-hee Kha-bee-ram- Ba-ṣee-raa.

17:18.text: Mañ- kaa-na yu-ree-dul- ʻaa-ji-la-ta ʻaj-jal-naa la-hoo fee-haa maa- na-shaaa-ʹu li-man- nu-ree-du s̤um-ma ja-ʻal-naa la-hoo Ja-han-nam: yaṣ-laa-haa maẓ-moo-mam- mad-ḥoo-raa.

17:19.text: Wa-man ʹa-raa-dal- ʹAa-khi-ra-ta wa-sa-ʻaa la-haa saʻ-ya-haa wa-hu-wa Muʹ-mi-nuñ- fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka kaa-na saʻ-yu-hum- mash-koo-raa.

17:20.text: kul-lan- nu-mid-du haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi wa-haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi min ʻa-ṭaaa-ʹi rab-bik: Wa-maa kaa-na ʻa-ṭaaa-ʹu Rab-bi-ka maḥ-z̤̣oo-raa.

17:21.text: ʹUñ-z̤̣ur kay-fa faḍ-ḍal-naa baʻ-ḍa-hum ʻa-laa baʻḍ: wa-lal-ʹAa-khi-ra-tu ʹak-ba-ru da-ra-jaa-tiñw- wa-ʹak-ba-ru taf-ḍee-laa.

17:22.text: Laa- taj-ʻal ma-ʻal- laa-hi ʹi-laa-han ʹaa-kha-ra fa-taq̣-ʻu-da maẓ-moo-mam- makh-ẓoo-laa.

17:23.text: Wa-q̣a-ḍaa Rab-bu-ka ʹal-laa taʻ-bu-dooo ʹil-laaa ʹiy-yaa-hu wa-bil-waa-li-day-ni ʹiḥ-saa-naa. ʹIm-maa yab-lu-g̣an-na ʻiñ-da-kal- ki-ba-ra ʹa-ḥa-du-hu-maaa aw ki-laa-hu-maa fa-laa ta-q̣ul- la-hu-maaa ʹuf-fiñw- Wa-laa- tan-har-hu-maa wa-q̣ul- la-hu-maa q̣aw-lañ- ka-ree-maa.

17:24.text: Wakh-fiḍ la-hu-maa ja-naa-ḥaẓ- ẓul-li mi-nar- raḥ-ma-ti wa-q̣ur- Rab-bir- ḥam-hu-maa ka-maa rab-ba-yaa-ni ṣa-g̣ee-raa.

17:25.text: Rab-bu-kum ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-maa fee nu-foo-si-kum: ʹiñ- ta-koo-noo ṣaa-li-ḥee-na fa-ʹin-na-hoo kaa-na lil-ʹaw-wa-bee-na G̣a-foo-raa.

17:26.text: Wa-ʹaa-ti ẓal- q̣ur-baa ḥaq̣-q̣a-hoo wal-mis-kee-na wab-nas- sa-bee-li wa-laa tu-baẓ-ẓir tab-ẓee-raa.

17:27.text: ʹIn-nal- mu-baẓ-ẓi-ree-na kaa-nooo ʹikh-waa-nash- sha-yaa-ṭeen; wa-kaa-nash- Shay-ṭaa-nu li-Rab-bi-hee ka-foo-raa.

17:28.text: Wa-ʹim-maa tuʻ-ri-ḍan-na ʻan-hu-m ub-ti-g̣aaa-ʹa Raḥ-ma-tim- mir- Rab-bi-ka tar-joo-haa fa-q̣ul-la-hum raa. q̣aw-lam- may-soo

17:29.text: Wa-laa taj-ʻal ya-da-ka mag̣-loo-la-tan ʹi-laa ʻu-nu-q̣i-ka wa-laa tab-suṭ-haa kul-lal- bas-ṭi fa-taq̣-ʻu-da ma-loo-mam- maḥ-soo-raa.

17:30.text: ʹIn-na Rab-ba-ka yab-su-ṭur- riz-q̣a li-mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu wa-yaq̣-dir. ʹIn-na-hoo kaa-na bi-ʻi-baa-di-hee Kha-bee-ram- Ba-ṣee-raa.

17:31.text: Wa-laa taq̣-tu-looo ʹaw-laa-da-kum khash-ya-ta ʹim-laaq̣: Naḥ-nu nar-zu-q̣u-hum wa-ʹiy-yaa-kum ʹIn-na q̣at-la-hum kaa-na khiṭ-ʹañ- ka-bee-raa.

17:32.text: Wa-laa taq̣-ra-buz- zi-naaa ʹin-na-hoo kaa-na faa-ḥi-shah: wa-saaa-ʹa sa-bee-laa.

17:33.text: Wa-laa taq̣-tu-lun- naf-sal- la-tee ḥar-ra-mal- laa-hu ʹil-laa bil-ḥaq̣q̣. Wa-mañ- q̣u-ti-la maz̤̣-loo-mañ fa-q̣ad ja-ʻal-naa li-wa-liy-yi-hee sul-ṭaa-nañ- fa-laa yus-rif- fil- q̣atl; ʹin-na-hoo kaa-na mañ-ṣoo-raa.

17:34.text: Wa-laa taq̣-ra-boo maa-lal- ya-tee-mi ʹil-laa bil-la-tee hi-ya ʹaḥ-sa-nu ḥat-taa yab-lu-g̣a ʹa-shud-dah; wa-ʹaw-foo bil-ʻahd: ʹin-nal- ʻah-da kaa-na mas-ʹoo-laa.

17:35.text: Wa-ʹaw-ful- kay-la ʹi-ẓaa kil-tum wa-zi-noo bil-q̣is-ṭaa-sil- mus-ta-q̣eem: ẓaa-li-ka khay-ruñw- waʹaḥ-sa-nu taʹ-wee-laa.

17:36.text: Wa-laa taq̣-fu maa- lay-sa la-ka bi-hee ʻilm; ʹin-nas- sam-ʻa wal-ba-ṣa-ra wal-fu-ʹaa-da kul-lu ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka kaa-na ʻan-hu mas-ʹoo-laa.

17:37.text: Wa-laa tam-shi fil- ʹar-ḍi ma-ra-ḥaa: ʹin-na-ka lañ- takh-ri-q̣al- ʹar-ḍa wa-lañ- tab-lu-g̣al- ji-baa-la ṭoo-laa.

17:38.text: Kul-lu ẓaa-li-ka kaa-na say-yi-ʹu-hoo ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-ka mak-roo-haa.

17:39.text: Ẓaa-li-ka mim-maaa ʹaw-ḥaaa ʹi-lay-ka Rab-bu-ka mi-nal- ḥik-mah. wa-laa taj-ʻal ma-ʻal- laa-hi ʹi-laa-han ʹaa-kha-ra fa-tul-q̣aa fee Ja-han-na-ma ma-loo-mam- mad-ḥoo-raa.

17:40.text: ʹA-fa-ʹaṣ-faa-kum Rab-bu-kum̃ bil-ba-nee-na wat-ta-kha-ẓa mi-nal- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-ti ʹi-naa-s̤aa? ʹIn-na-kum la-ta-q̣oo-loo-na q̣aw-lan ʻa-z̤̣ee-maa!

17:41.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ṣar-raf-naa fee haa-ẓal- Q̣ur-ʹaa-ni li-yaẓ-ẓak-ka-roo: wa-maa ya-zee-du-hum ʹil-laa nu-foo-raa!

17:42.text: Q̣ul- law kaa-na ma-ʻa-hooo ʹaa-li-ha-tuñ- ka-maa ya-q̣oo-loo-na ʹi-ẓal- lab-ta-g̣aw ʹi-laa Ẓil- ʻAr-shi sa-bee-laa!

17:43.text: Sub-ḥaa-na-hoo wa-Ta-ʻaa-laa ʻam-maa ya-q̣oo-loo-na ʻU-luw-wañ Ka-bee-raa!

17:44.text: Tu-sab-bi-ḥu la-hus- sa-maa-waa-tus- sab-ʻu wal-ʹar-ḍu wa-mañ fee-hinn: wa-ʹim- miñ- shay-ʹin ʹil-laa yu-sab-bi-ḥu bi-Ḥam-di-hee wa-laa-kil- laa taf-q̣a-hoo-na tas-bee-ḥa-hum: ʹIn-na-hoo kaa-na Ḥa-lee-man G̣a-foo-raa!

17:45.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa q̣a-raʹ-tal- Q̣ur-ʹaa-na ja-ʻal-naa bay-na-ka wa-bay-nal- la-ẓee-na laa- yuʹ-mi-noo-na bil-ʹAa-khi-ra-ti ḥi-jaa-bam- mas-too-raa;

17:46.text: Wa-ja-ʻal-naa ʻa-laa q̣u-loo-bi-him ʹa-kin-na-tan ʹañy- yaf-q̣a-hoo-hu wa-feee ʹaa-ẓaa-ni-him waq̣-raa: wa-ʹi-ẓaa ẓa-kar-ta Rab-ba-ka fil- Q̣ur-ʹaa-ni Waḥ-da-hoo wal-law ʻa-laaa ʹad-baa-ri-him nu-foo-raa.

17:47.text: Naḥ-nu ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-maa yas-ta-mi-ʻoo-na bi-heee ʹiẓ yas-ta-mi-ʻoo-na ʹi-lay-ka wa-ʹiẓ hum naj-waaa ʹiẓ ya-q̣oo-luz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-moo-na ʹiñ- tat-ta-bi-ʻoo-na ʹil-laa ra-ju-lam- mas-ḥoo-raa.

17:48.text: ʹUñ-z̤̣ur kay-fa ḍa-ra-boo la-kal- ʹam-s̤aa-la fa-ḍal-loo fa-laa yas-ta-ṭee-ʻoo-na sa-bee-laa.

17:49.text: Wa-q̣aa-looo ʹa-ʹi-ẓaa kun-naa ʻi-z̤̣aa-mañw- Wa-ru-faa-tan ʹa-ʹin-naa la-mab-ʻoo-s̤oo-na khal-q̣añ- ja-dee-daa?

17:51.text: ʹAw khal-q̣am- mim-maa yak-bu-ru fee ṣu-doo-ri-kum! Fa-sa-ya-q̣oo-loo-na mañy- yu-ʻee-du-naa? Q̣u-lil- la-ẓee fa-ṭa-ra-kum ʹaw-wa-la mar-rah! Fa-sa-yun-g̣i-ḍoo-na ʹi-lay-ka ru-ʹoo-sa-hum wa-ya-q̣oo-loo-na ma-taa hu? Q̣ul ʻa-saaa ʹañy- ya-koo-na q̣a-ree-baa!

17:52.text: Yaw-ma yad-ʻoo-kum fa-tas-ta-jee-boo-na bi-Ḥam-di-hee wa-ta-un-noo-na ʹil- la-bis̤-tum ʹil-laa q̣a-lee-laa!

17:53.text: Wa-q̣ul- li-ʻi-baa-dee ya-q̣oo-lul- la-tee hi-ya ʹaḥ-san: ʹin-nash- shay-ṭaa-na yañ-za-g̣u bay-na-hum: ʹin-nash- Shay-ṭaa-na kaa-na lil-ʹiñ-saa-ni ʻa-duw-wam- mu-bee-naa.

17:54.text: Rab-bu-kum ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-kum: ʹiñy- ya-shaʹ yar-ḥam-kum ʹaw ʹiñy- ya-shaʹ yu-ʻaẓ-ẓib-kum: wa-maaa ʹar-sal-naa-ka ʻa-lay-him wa-kee-laa.

17:55.text: Wa-Rab-bu-ka ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-mañ- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ: wa-la-q̣ad faḍ-ḍal-naa baʻ-ḍan- na-biy-yee-na ʻa-laa baʻ-ḍiñw- wa-ʹaa-tay-naa Daa-woo-da Za-boo-raa.

17:56.text: Q̣u-lid- ʻul- la-ẓee-na za-ʻam-tum- miñ- doo-ni-hee fa-laa yam-li-koo-na kash-faḍ- ḍur-ri ʻañ-kum wa-laa taḥ-wee-laa.

17:57.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-kal- la-ẓee-na yad-ʻoo-na yab-ta-g̣oo-na ʹi-laa Rab-bi-hi-mul- Wa-see-la-ta ʹay-yu-hum ʹaq̣-ra-bu wa-yar-joo-na Raḥ-ma-ta-hoo wa-ya-kha-foo-na ʻA-ẓaa-bah: ʹin-na ʻA-ẓaa-ba Rab-bi-ka kaa-na maḥ-ẓoo-raa.

17:58.text: Wa-ʹim- miñ- q̣ar-ya-tin ʹil-laa Naḥ-nu muh-li-koo-haa q̣ab-la yaw-mil- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti ʹaw mu-ʻaẓ-ẓi-boo-haa ʻa-ẓaa-bañ sha-dee-daa: kaa-na ẓaa-li-ka fil- Ki-taa-bi mas-ṭoo-raa.

17:59.text: Wa-maa ma-na-ʻa-naaa ʹañ- nur-si-la bil-ʹaa-yaa-ti ʹil-laaa ʹañ- kaẓ-ẓa-ba bi-hal- ʹaw-wa-loon: wa-ʹaa-tay-naa S̤a-moo-dan- Naa-q̣a-ta mub-ṣi-ra-tañ- fa-a-la-moo bi-haa: wa-maa nur-si-lu bil-ʹAa-yaa-ti ʹil-laa takh-wee-faa.

17:60.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣ul-naa la-ka ʹin-na Rab-ba-ka ʹa-ḥaa-ṭa bin-naas: wa-maa ja-ʻal-nar- ruʹ-yal- la-teee ʹa-ray-naa-ka ʹil-laa fit-na-tal- lin-naa-si wash-Sha-ja-ra-tal- Mal-ʻoo-na-ta fil- Q̣ur-ʹaan: wa-nu-khaw-wi-fu-hum fa-maa ya-zee-du-hum ʹil-laa ṭug̣-yaa-nañ- ka-bee-raa.

17:61.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣ul-naa lil-ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tis- ju-doo li-ʹAa-da-ma fa-sa-ja-dooo ʹil-laaa ʹIb-lees: q̣aa-la ʹa-ʹas-ju-du li-man kha-laq̣-ta ṭee-naa?

17:62.text: Q̣aa-la ʹa-ra-ʹay-ta-ka haa-ẓal- la-ẓee kar-ram-ta ʻa-layy! La-ʹin ʹakh-khar-ta-ni ʹi-laa Yaw-mil- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti la-ʹaḥ-ta-ni-kan-na ẓur-riy-ya-ta-hooo ʹil-laa q̣a-lee-laa!

17:63.text: Q̣aa-laẓ- hab fa-mañ ta-bi-ʻa-ka min-hum fa-ʹin-na Ja-han-na-ma ja-zaaa-ʹu-kum ja-zaaa-ʹam- maw-foo-raa.

17:64.text: Was-taf-ziz ma-nis- ta-ṭaʻ-ta min-hum̃ bi-ṣaw-ti-ka wa-ʹaj-lib ʻa-lay-him̃- bi-khay-li-ka wa-ra-ji-li-ka wa-shaa-rik-hum fil- ʹam-waa-li wal-ʹaw-laa-di wa-ʻid-hum. Wa-maa ya-ʻi-du-hu-mush- Shay-ṭaa-nu ʹil-laa g̣u-roo-raa.

17:65.text: ʹIn-na ʻi-baa-di lay-sa la-ka ʻa-lay-him sul-ṭaan: wa-ka-faa bi-Rab-bi-ka Wa-kee-laa.

17:66.text: Rab-bu-ku-mul- la-ẓee yuz-jee la-ku-mul- Ful-ka fil- baḥ-ri li-tab-ta-g̣oo miñ- faḍ-lih ʹIn-na-hoo kaa-na bi-kum Ra-ḥee-maa.

17:67.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa mas-sa-ku-muḍ- ḍur-ru fil- baḥ-ri ḍal-la mañ- tad-ʻoo-na ʹil-laaa ʹiy-yaah! Fa-lam-maa naj-jaa-kum ʹi-lal- bar-ri ʹaʻ-raḍ-tum. Wa-kaa-nal- ʹiñ-saa-nu ka-foo-raa!

17:68.text: ʹA-fa-ʹa-miñ-tum ʹañy- yakh-si-fa bi-kum jaa-ni-bal- bar-ri ʹaw yur-si-la ʻa-lay-kum ḥaa-si-bañ- s̤um-ma laa- ta-ji-doo la-kum wa-kee-laa?

17:69.text: ʹAm ʹa-miñ-tum ʹañy- yu-ʻee-da-kum fee-hi taa-ra-tan ʹukh-raa fa-yur-si-la ʻa-lay-kum q̣aa-ṣi-fam- mi-nar- ree-ḥi fa-yug̣-ri-q̣a-kum̃- bi-maa ka-far-tum s̤um-ma laa- ta-ji-doo la-kum ʻa-lay-naa bi-hee ta-bee-ʻaa?

17:70.text: Wa-la-q̣ad kar-ram-naa Ba-neee ʹAa-da-ma wa-ḥa-mal-naa-hum fil- bar-ri wal-baḥ-ri wa-ra-zaq̣-naa-hum- mi-naṭ- ṭay-yi-baa-ti wa-faḍ-ḍal-naa-hum ʻa-laa ka-s̤ee-rim- mim-man kha-laq̣-naa taf-ḍee-laa.

17:71.text: Yaw-ma nad-ʻoo kul-la ʹu-naa-sim- bi-ʹI-maa-mi-him: fa-man ʹoo-ti-ya ki-taa-ba-hoo bi-ya-mee-ni-hee fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka yaq̣-ra-ʹoo-na ki-taa-ba-hum wa-laa yuz̤̣-la-moo-na fa-tee-laa.

17:72.text: Wa-mañ- kaa-na fee haa-ẓi-heee ʹaʻ-maa fa-hu-wa fil- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti ʹaʻ-maa wa-ʹa-ḍal-lu Sa-bee-laa.

17:73.text: Wa-ʹiñ- kaa-doo la-yaf-ti-noo-na-ka ʻa-nil- la-ẓeee ʹaw-ḥay-naaa ʹi-lay-ka li-taf-ta-ri-ya ʻa-lay-naa g̣ay-rah: wa-ʹi-ẓal-lat- ta-kha-ẓoo-ka kha-lee-laa!

17:74.text: Wa-law-laaa ʹañ- s̤ab-bat-naa-ka la-q̣ad kit-ta tar-ka-nu ʹi-lay-him shay-ʹañ- q̣a-lee-laa.

17:75.text: ʹI-ẓal- la-ʹa-ẓaq̣-naa-ka ḍiʻ-fal- ḥa-yaa-ti wa-ḍiʻ-fal- ma-maa-ti s̤um-ma laa- ta-ji-du la-ka ʻa-lay-naa na-ṣee-raa!

17:76.text: Wa-ʹiñ kaa-doo la-yas-ta-fiz-zoo-na-ka mi-nal- ʹar-ḍi li-yukh-ri-joo-ka min-haa wa-ʹi-ẓal- laa yal-ba-s̤oo-na khi-laa-fa-ka ʹil-laa q̣a-lee-laa.

17:77.text: Sun-na-ta mañ- q̣ad ʹar-sal-naa q̣ab-la-ka mir- ru-su-li-naa wa-laa ta-ji-du li-Sun-na-ti-naa taḥ-wee-laa.

17:78.text: ʹA-q̣i-miṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta li-du-loo-kish- sham-si ʹi-laa g̣a-sa-q̣il- lay-li wa-q̣ur-ʹaa-nal- Fajr: ʹin-na q̣ur-ʹaa-nal- Faj-ri kaa-na mash-hoo-daa.

17:79.text: Wa-mi-nal- lay-li fa-ta-haj-jad bi-hee naa-fi-la-tal- lak: ʻa-saaa ʹañy- yab-ʻa-s̤a-ka Rab-bu-ka Ma-q̣aa-mam- Maḥ-moo-daa!

17:80.text: Wa-q̣ur- Rab-bi ʹad-khil-nee Mud-kha-la Ṣid-q̣iñw- Wa-ʹakh-rij-nee Mukh-ra-ja Ṣid-q̣iñw- waj-ʻal- lee mil- la-duñ-ka sul-ṭaa-nan- na-see-raa.

17:81.text: Wa-q̣ul jaaa-ʹal- Ḥaq̣-q̣u wa-za-ha-q̣al- Baa-ṭil: ʹin-nal- Baa-ṭi-la kaa-na za-hoo-q̣aa.

17:82.text: Wa-nu-naz-zi-lu mi-nal- Q̣ur-ʹaa-ni maa- hu-wa Shi-faaa-ʹuñw- Wa-Raḥ-ma-tul-lil- Muʹ-mi-nee-na wa-laa ya-zee-duz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-mee-na ʹil-laa kha-saa-raa.

17:83.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaaa ʹan-ʻam-naa ʻa-lal- ʹiñ-saa-ni ʹaʻ-ra-ḍa wa-na-ʹaa bi-jaa-ni-bih; wa-ʹi-ẓaa mas-sa-hush- shar-ru kaa-na ya-ʹoo-saa!

17:84.text: Q̣ul kul-luñy- yaʻ-ma-lu ʻa-laa Shaa-ki-la-tih: fa-Rab-bu-kum ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-man hu-wa ʹah-daa Sa-bee-laa.

17:85.text: Wa-yas-ʹa-loo-na-ka ʻa-nir- Rooḥ Q̣u-lir- Roo-ḥu min ʹAm-ri Rab-bee wa-maaa ʹoo-tee-tum- mi-nal- ʻil-mi ʹil-laa q̣a-lee-laa.

17:86.text: Wa-la-ʹiñ- shiʹ-naa la-naẓ-ha-ban-na bil-la-ẓeee ʹaw-ḥay-naaa ʹi-lay-ka s̤um-ma laa- ta-ji-du la-ka bi-hee ʻa-lay-naa wa-kee-laa,―

17:87.text: ʹIl-laa Raḥ-ma-tam- mir- Rab-bi-ka ʹin-na Faḍ-la-hoo kaa-na ʻa-lay-ka ka-bee-raa.

17:88.text: Q̣ul- la-ʹi-nij- ta-ma-ʻa-til- ʹIñ-su wal-Jin-nu ʻa-laaa ʹañy- yaʹ-too bi-mis̤-li haa-ẓal- Q̣ur-ʹaa-ni laa- yaʹ-too-na bi-mis̤-li-hee wa-law kaa-na baʻ-ḍu-hum li-baʻ-ḍiñ- z̤̣a-hee-raa.

17:89.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ṣar-raf-naa lin-naa-si fee haa-ẓal- Q̣ur-ʹaa-ni miñ- kul-li ma-s̤al: fa-ʹa-baaa ʹak-s̤a-run- naa-si ʹil-laa ku-foo-raa!

17:90.text: Wa-q̣aa-loo lan- nuʹ-mi-na la-ka ḥat-taa taf-ju-ra la-naa mi-nal- ʹar-ḍi yam-boo-ʻaa;

17:91.text: ʹAw ta-koo-na la-ka jan-na-tum- min- na-khee-liñw- wa-ʻi-na-biñ fa-tu-faj-ji-ral- ʹan-haa-ra khi-laa-la-haa taf-jee-raa;

17:92.text: ʹAw tus-q̣i-ṭas- sa-maaa-ʹa ka-maa za-ʻam-ta ʻa-lay-naa ki-sa-fan ʹaw taʹ-ti-ya bil-laa-hi wal-ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-ti q̣a-bee-laa;

17:93.text: ʹAw ya-koo-na la-ka bay-tum- miñ- zukh-ru-fin ʹaw tar-q̣aa fis- sa-maaaʹ. Wa-lan- nuʹ-mi-na li-ru-q̣iy-yi-ka ḥat-taa tu-naz-zi-la ʻa-lay-naa ki-taa-ban- naq̣-ra-ʹuh. Q̣ul Sub-ḥaa-na Rab-bee hal kuñ-tu ʹil-laa ba-sha-rar- Ra-soo-laa?

17:94.text: Wa-maa ma-na-ʻan- naa-sa ʹañy- yuʹ-mi-nooo ʹiẓ jaaa-ʹa-hu-mul- Hu-daaa ʹil-laaa ʹañ- q̣aa-looo ʹa-ba-ʻa-s̤al- laa-hu ba-sha-rar Ra-soo-laa?

17:95.text: Q̣ul- law kaa-na fil- ʹar-ḍi ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tuñy- yam-shoo-na muṭ-ma-ʹin-nee-na la-naz-zal-naa ʻa-lay-him- mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi ma-la-kar- ra-soo-laa.

17:96.text: Q̣ul ka-faa bil-laa-hi sha-hee-dam- bay-nee wa-bay-na-kum: ʹin-na-hoo kaa-na bi-ʻi-baa-di-hee kha-bee-ram- Ba-ṣee-raa.

17:97.text: Wa-mañy- yah-dil- laa-hu fa-hu-wal- muh-tad; wa-mañy- yuḍ-lil fa-lañ- ta-ji-da la-hum ʹaw-li-yaaa-ʹa miñ doo-nih. Wa-naḥ-shu-ru-hum Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti ʻa-laa wu-joo-hi-him ʻum-yañw- Wa-buk-mañw wa-ṣum-maa: maʹ-waa-hum Ja-han-nam: kul-la-maa kha-bat zid-naa-hum Sa-ʻee-raa.

17:98.text: Ẓaa-li-ka ja-zaaa-ʹu-hum̃- bi-ʹan-na-hum ka-fa-roo bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa wa-q̣aa-looo ʹa-ʹi-ẓaa kun-naa ʻi-Z̤̣aa-mañw- Wa-ru-faa-tan ʹa-ʹin-naa la-mab-ʻoo-s̤oo-na khal-q̣añ- ja-dee-daa?

17:99.text: ʹA-wa-lam ya-raw ʹan-nal- laa-hal- la-ẓee kha-la-q̣as- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa Q̣aa-di-run ʻa-laaa ʹañy- yakh-lu-q̣a mis̤-la-hum wa-ja-ʻa-la la-hum ʹa-ja-lal- laa ray-ba feeh. Fa-ʹa-baz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-moo-na ʹil-laa ku-foo-raa.

17:100.text: Q̣ul- law ʹañ-tum tam-li-koo-na kha-zaaa-ʹi-na Raḥ-ma-ti Rab-beee ʹi-ẓal- la-ʹam-sak-tum khash-ya-tal- ʹiñ-faaq̣: wa-kaa-nal- ʹiñ-saa-nu q̣a-too-raa.

17:101.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹaa-tay-naa Moo-saa tis-ʻa ʹAa-yaa-tim- Bay-yi-naa-tiñ- fas-ʹal Ba-neee- ʹIs-raaa-ʹee-la ʹiẓ jaaa-ʹa-hum fa-q̣aa-la la-hoo Fir-ʻaw-nu ʹin-nee la-ʹa-z̤̣un-nu-ka yaa-Moo-saa mas-ḥoo-raa.

17:102.text: Q̣aa-la la-q̣ad ʻa-lim-ta maaa ʹañ-za-la haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi ʹil-laa Rab-bus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi ba-ṣaaa-ʹir: wa-ʹin-nee la-ʹa-z̤̣un-nu-ka yaa-Fir-ʻaw-nu mas̤-boo-raa!

17:103.text: Fa-ʹa-raa-da ʹañy- yas-ta-fiz-za-hum- mi-nal- ʹar-ḍi fa-ʹag̣-raq̣-naa-hu wa-mam- ma-ʻa-hoo ja-mee-ʻaa.

17:104.text: Wa-q̣ul-naa mim- baʻ-di-hee li-Ba-neee- ʹIs-raaa-ʹee-las- ku-nul- ʹar-ḍa fa-ʹi-ẓaa jaaa-ʹa Waʻ-dul- ʹaa-khi-ra-ti jiʹ-naa bi-kum la-fee-faa.

17:105.text: Wa-bil-Ḥaq̣-q̣i ʹañ-zal-naa-hu wa-bil-Ḥaq̣-q̣i na-zal: wa-maaa ʹar-sal-naa-ka ʹil-laa Mu-bash-shi-rañw- Wa-Na-ẓee-raa.

17:106.text: Wa-Q̣ur-ʹaa-nañ- fa-raq̣-naa-hu li-taq̣-ra-ʹa-hoo ʻa-lan- naa-si ʻa-laa muk-s̤iñw- wa-naz-zal-naa-hu tañ-zee-laa.

17:107.text: Q̣ul ʹaa-mi-noo bi-heee ʹaw laa- tuʹ-mi-noo: ʹin-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹoo-tul- ʻil-ma miñ q̣ab-li-heee ʹi-ẓaa yut-laa ʻa-lay-him ya-khir-roo-na lil-ʹaẓ-q̣aa-ni suj-ja-daa,

17:108.text: Wa-ya-q̣oo-loo-na Sub-ḥaa-na Rab-bi-naaa ʹiñ- kaa-na waʻ-du Rab-bi-naa la-maf-ʻoo-laa!

17:110.text: Q̣u-lid- ʻul- laa-ha ʹa-wid- ʻur- Raḥ-maan: ʹay-yam- maa tad-ʻoo fa-la-hul- ʹAs-maaa-ʹul- Ḥus-naa. Wa-laa taj-har bi-Ṣa-laa-ti-ka wa-laa tu-khaa-fit bi-haa wab-ta-g̣i bay-na ẓaa-li-ka Sa-bee-laa.

17:111.text: Wa-q̣u-lil- Ḥam-du lil-laa-hil- la-ẓee lam yat-ta-khiẓ wa-la-dañw- wa-lam ya-kul- la-hoo sha-ree-kuñ fil- mul-ki wa-lam ya-kul- la-hoo wa-liy-yum- mi-naẓ- ẓul-li wa-kab-bir-hu tak-bee-raa.

18:1.text: ʹAl-Ḥam-du lil-laa-hil- la-ẓeee ʹañ-za-la ʻa-laa ʻAb-di-hil- Ki-taa-ba wa-lam yaj-ʻal- la-hoo ʻi-wa-jaa―

18:2.text: Q̣ay-yi-mal- li-yuñ-ẓi-ra Baʹ-sañ- sha-dee-dam- mil- la-dun-hu wa-yu-bash-shi-ral- Muʹ-mi-nee-nal- la-ẓee-na yaʻ-ma-loo-naṣ- ṣaa-li-haa-ti ʹan-na la-hum ʹAj-ran ḥa-sa-naa,

18:4.text: Wa-yuñ-ẓi-ral- la-ẓee-na q̣aa-lut- ta-kha-ẓal- laa-hu wa-la-daa:

18:5.text: Maa- la-hum̃- bi-hee min ʻil-miñw wa-laa li-ʹaa-baaa-ʹi-him. Ka-bu-rat ka-li-ma-tañ- takh-ru-ju min ʹaf-waa-hi-him. ʹIñy- ya-q̣oo-loo-na ʹil-laa ka-ẓi-baa.

18:6.text: Fa-la-ʻal-la-ka baa-khi-ʻun- naf-sa-ka ʻa-laaa ʹaa-s̤aa-ri-him ʹil- lam yuʹ-mi-noo bi-haa-ẓal- Ḥa-dee-s̤i ʹa-sa-faa.

18:7.text: ʹIn-naa ja-ʻal-naa maa- ʻa-lal- ʹar-ḍi zee-na-tal- la-haa li-nab-lu-wa-hum ʹay-yu-hum ʹaḥ-sa-nu ʻa-ma-laa.

18:8.text: Wa-ʹin-naa la-jaa-ʻi-loo-na maa- ʻa-lay-haa ṣa-ʻee-dañ- ju-ru-zaa.

18:9.text: ʹAm ḥa-sib-ta ʹan-na ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bal- Kah-fi war-Ra-q̣ee-mi kaa-noo min ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa ʻa-ja-baa?

18:10.text: ʹIẓ ʹa-wal- fit-ya-tu ʹi-lal- Kah-fi fa-q̣aa-loo Rab-ba-naaa ʹaa-ti-naa mil- la-duñ-ka Raḥ-ma-tañw- Wa-hay-yiʹ la-naa min ʹam-ri-naa ra-sha-daa!

18:11.text: Fa-ḍa-rab-naa ʻa-laaa ʹaa-ẓaa-ni-him fil- Kah-fi si-nee-na ʻa-da-daa:

18:12.text: S̤um-ma ba-ʻas̤-naa-hum li-naʻ-la-ma ʹay-yul- ḥiz-bay-ni ʹaḥ-ṣaa li-maa la-bi-s̤ooo ʹa-ma-daa!

18:13.text: Naḥ-nu na-q̣uṣ-ṣu ʻa-lay-ka na-ba-ʹa-hum̃- bil-Ḥaq̣q̣: ʹin-na-hum fit-ya-tun ʹaa-ma-noo bi-Rab-bi-him wa-zid-naa-hum hu-daa:

18:14.text: Wa-ra-baṭ-naa ʻa-laa q̣u-loo-bi-him ʹiẓ q̣aa-moo fa-q̣aa-loo Rab-bu-naa Rab-bus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi lan- nad-ʻu-wa miñ doo-ni-heee ʹi-laa-hal- la-q̣ad q̣ul-naaa ʹi-ẓañ- sha-ṭa-ṭaa!

18:15.text: Haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi q̣aw-mu-nat- ta-kha-ẓoo miñ- doo-ni-heee ʹaa-li-hah: Law-laa- yaʹ-too-na ʻa-lay-him̃- bi-sul-ṭaa-nim- bay-yin? Fa-man ʹaz̤̣-la-mu mim-ma-nif- ta-raa ʻa-lal- laa-hi ka-ẓi-baa?

18:16.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓiʻ-ta-zal- tu-moo-hum wa-maa yaʻ-bu-doo-na ʹil-lal- laa-ha faʹ-wooo ʹi-lal- Kah-fi yañ-shur la-kum Rab-bu-kum- mir- raḥ-ma-ti-hee wa-yu-hay-yiʹ la-kum- min ʹam-ri-kum- mir-fa-q̣aa.

18:17.text: Wa-ta-rash- sham-sa ʹi-ẓaa ṭa-la-ʻat- ta-zaa-wa-ru ʻañ- Kah-fi-him ẓaa-tal- ya-mee-ni wa-ʹi-ẓaa g̣a-ra-bat- taq̣-ri-ḍu-hum ẓaa-tash- shi-maa-li wa-hum fee faj-wa-tim- minh. Ẓaa-li-ka min ʹAa-yaa-til- laah: mañy- yah-dil- laa-hu fa-hu-wal- muh-tad; wa-mañy- yuḍ-lil fa-lañ- ta-ji-da la-hoo wa-liy-yam- mur-shi-daa.

18:18.text: Wa-taḥ-sa-bu-hum ʹay-q̣aa-z̤̣añw- Wa-hum ru-q̣ood: wa-nu-q̣al-li-bu-hum ẓaa-tal- ya-mee-ni wa-ẓaa-tash- shi-maal: wa-kal-bu-hum̃ baa-si-ṭuñ- ẓi-raa-ʻay-hi bil-wa-ṣeed: la-wiṭ- ṭa-laʻ-ta ʻa-lay-him la-wal-lay-ta min-hum fi-raa-rañw- wa-la-Mu-liʹ-ta min-hum ruʻ-baa.

18:19.text: Wa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka ba-ʻas̤-naa-hum li-ya-ta-saaa-ʹa-loo bay-na-hum. Q̣aa-la q̣aaa-ʹi-lum- min-hum kam la-bis̤-tum? Q̣aa-loo la-bis̤-naa yaw-man ʹaw baʻ-ḍa yawm. Q̣aa-loo Rab-bu-kum ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-maa la-bis̤-tum.... Fab-ʻa-s̤ooo ʹa-ḥa-da-kum̃ bi-wa-ri-q̣i-kum haa-ẓi-heee ʹi-lal- ma-dee-na-ti fal-yañ-z̤̣ur ʹay-yu-haaa ʹaz-kaa ṭa-ʻaa-mañ- fal-yaʹ-ti-kum̃- bi-riz-q̣im- min-hu wal-ya-ta-laṭ-ṭaf wa-laa yush-ʻi-ran-na bi-kum ʹa-ḥa-daa.

18:20.text: ʹIn-na-hum ʹiñy- yaz̤̣-ha-roo ʻa-lay-kum yar-ju-moo-kum ʹaw yu-ʻee-doo-kum fee mil-la-ti-him wa-lañ- tuf-li-ḥooo ʹi-ẓan ʹa-ba-daa.

18:21.text: Wa-ka-ẓa-li-ka ʹaʻ-s̤ar-naa ʻa-lay-him li-yaʻ-la-mooo ʹan-na waʻ-dal- laa-hi ḥaq̣-q̣uñw- wa-ʹan-nas- Saa-ʻa-ta laa- ray-ba fee-haa. ʹIẓ ya-ta-naa-za-ʻoo-na bay-na-hum ʹam-ra-hum fa-q̣aa-lub- noo ʻa-lay-him̃ bun-yaa-naa: Rab-bu-hum ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-him: q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na g̣a-la-boo ʻa-laaa ʹam-ri-him la-nat-ta-khi-ẓan-na ʻa-lay-him- mas-ji-daa.

18:22.text: Sa-ya-q̣oo-loo-na s̤a-laa-s̤a-tur- raa-bi-ʻu-hum kal-bu-hum: wa-ya-q̣oo-loo-na kham-sa-tuñ- saa-di-su-hum kal-bu-hum raj-mam- bil-g̣ayb; wa-ya-q̣oo-loo-na sab-ʻa-tuñw- wa-s̤aa-mi-nu-hum kal-bu-hum. Q̣ur- Rab-beee ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-ʻid-da-ti-him- maa yaʻ-la-mu-hum ʹil-laa q̣a-leel. Fa-laa tu-maa-ri fee-him ʹil-laa mi-raaa-ʹañ- z̤̣aa-hi-raa, wa-laa tas-taf-ti fee-him- min-hum ʹa-ḥa-daa.

18:23.text: Wa-laa ta-q̣oo-lan-na li-shay-ʹin ʹin-nee faa-ʻi-luñ- ẓaa-li-ka g̣a-daa,

18:24.text: ʹIl-laaa ʹañy- ya-shaaa-ʹal- laah! Waẓ-kur- Rab-ba-ka ʹi-ẓaa na-see-ta wa-q̣ul ʻa-saaa ʹañy- yah-di-ya-ni Rab-bee li-ʹaq̣-ra-ba min haa-ẓaa ra-sha-daa.

18:25.text: Wa-la-bi-s̤oo fee Kah-fi-him s̤a-laa-s̤a mi-ʹa-tiñ- si-nee-na waz-daa-doo tis-ʻaa.

18:26.text: Q̣u-lil- laa-hu ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-maa la-bi-s̤oo: la-hoo g̣ay-bus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ: ʹab-ṣir bi-hee waʹas-miʻ! Maa- la-hum- miñ- doo-ni-hee miñw- wa-liyy; wa-laa yush-ri-ku fee Ḥuk-mi-heee ʹa-ḥa-daa.

18:27.text: Wat-lu maaa ʹoo-ḥi-ya ʹi-lay-ka miñ- Ki-taa-bi Rab-bik: laa- mu-bad-di-la li-Ka-li-maa-tih: wa-lañ- ta-ji-da miñ- doo-ni-hee mul-ta-ḥa-daa.

18:28.text: Waṣ-bir naf-sa-ka ma-ʻal- la-ẓee-na yad-ʻoo-na Rab-ba-hum̃- bil-g̣a-daa-ti wal-ʻa-shiy-yi yu-ree-doo-na Waj-ha-hoo wa-laa taʻ-du ʻay-naa-ka ʻan-hum: tu-ree-du zee-na-tal- Ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa; wa-laa tu-ṭiʻ man ʹag̣-fal-naa q̣al-ba-hoo ʻañ- ẓik-ri-naa wat-ta-ba-ʻa ha-waa-hu wa-kaa-na ʹam-ru-hoo fu-ru-ṭaa.

18:29.text: Wa-q̣u-lil- Ḥaq̣-q̣u mir- Rab-bi-kum: fa-mañ- shaaa-ʹa fal-yuʹ-miñw- wa-mañ- shaaa-ʹa fal-yak-fur: ʹin-naaa ʹaʻ-tad-naa liz̤̣-z̤̣aa-li-mee-na Naa-ran ʹa-ḥaa-ṭa bi-him su-raa-di-q̣u-haa: wa-ʹiñy- yas-ta-g̣ee-s̤oo yu-g̣aa-s̤oo bi-maaa-ʹiñ kal-muh-li yash-wil- wu-jooh. Biʹ-sash- sha-raab! wa-saaa-ʹat mur-ta-fa-q̣aa!

18:30.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti ʹin-naa laa- nu-ḍee-ʻu ʹaj-ra man ʹaḥ-sa-na ʻa-ma-laa.

18:31.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka la-hum Jan-naa-tu ʻAd-niñ taj-ree miñ taḥ-ti-hi-mul- ʹan-haa-ru yu-ḥal-law-na fee-haa min ʹa-saa-wi-ra miñ ẓa-ha-biñw- wa-yal-ba-soo-na s̤i-yaa-ban khuḍ-ram- miñ- suñ-du-siñw- wa-ʹis-tab-ra-q̣im- mut-ta-ki-ʹee-na fee-haa ʻa-lal- ʹa-raaa-ʹik. Niʻ-mas̤- s̤a-waab! Wa-ḥa-su-nat mur-ta-fa-q̣aa!

18:32.text: Waḍ-rib la-hum- ma-s̤a-lar- ra-ju-lay-ni ja-ʻal-naa li-ʹa-ḥa-di-hi-maa jan-na-tay-ni min ʹaʻ-naa-biñw- Wa-ḥa-faf-naa-hu-maa bi-nakh-liñw- wa-ja-ʻal-naa bay-na-hu-maa zar-ʻaa.

18:33.text: Kil-tal- jan-na-tay-ni ʹaa-tat ʹu-ku-la-haa wa-lam taz̤̣-lim- min-hu shay-ʹañw- wa-faj-jar-naa khi-laa-la-hu-maa- na-ha-raa,

18:34.text: Wa-kaa-na la-hoo s̤a-mar: fa-q̣aa-la li-ṣaa-ḥi-bi-hee wa-hu-wa yu-ḥaa-wi-ru-hooo ʹa-na ʹak-s̤a-ru miñ-ka maa-lañw- wa-ʹa-ʻaz-zu na-fa-raa.

18:35.text: Wa-da-kha-la jan-na-ta-hoo wa-hu-wa z̤̣aa-li-mul- li-naf-sih: q̣aa-la maaa ʹa-z̤̣un-nu ʹañ- ta-bee-da haa-ẓi-heee ʹa-ba-daa.

18:36.text: Wa-maaa ʹa-z̤̣un-nus- saa-ʻa-ta q̣aaa-ʹi-ma-tañw- wa-la-ʹir- ru-dit-tu ʹi-laa Rab-bee la-ʹa-ji-dan-na khay-ram- min-haa muñ-q̣a-la-baa.

18:37.text: Q̣aa-la la-hoo ṣaa-ḥi-bu-hoo wa-hu-wa yu-ḥaa-wi-ru-hooo ʹa-ka-far-ta bil-la-ẓee kha-la-q̣a-ka miñ tu-raa-biñ- s̤um-ma min- nuṭ-fa-tiñ- s̤um-ma saw-waa-ka ra-ju-laa?

18:38.text: Laa-kin-na Hu-wal- laa-hu Rab-bee wa-laaa ʹush-ri-ku bi-Rab-beee ʹa-ḥa-daa.

18:39.text: Wa-law-laaa ʹiẓ da-khal-ta jan-na-ta-ka q̣ul-ta maa- shaaa-ʹal- laa-hu Laa- q̣uw-wa-ta ʹil-laa bil-laah! ʹIñ- ta-ra-ni ʹa-na ʹa-q̣al-la miñ-ka maa-lañw- wa-wa-la-daa.

18:40.text: Fa-ʻa-saa Rab-beee ʹañy- yuʹ-ti-ya-ni khay-ram- miñ- jan-na-ti-ka wa-yur-si-la ʻa-lay-haa ḥus-baa-nam- mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi fa-tuṣ-bi-ḥa ṣa-ʻee-dañ- za-la-q̣aa!―

18:41.text: ʹAw yuṣ-bi-ḥa maaa-ʹu-haa g̣aw-rañ- fa-lañ- tas-ta-ṭee-ʻa la-hoo ṭa-la-baa.

18:42.text: Wa-ʹu-ḥee-ṭa bi-s̤a-ma-ri-hee fa-ʹaṣ-ba-ḥa yu-q̣al-li-bu kaf-fay-hi ʻa-laa maaa ʹañ-fa-q̣a fee-haa wa-hi-ya khaa-wi-ya-tun ʻa-laa ʻu-roo-shi-haa wa-ya-q̣oo-lu yaa-lay-ta-nee lam ʹush-rik bi-Rab-beee ʹa-ḥa-daa!

18:43.text: Wa-lam ta-kul- la-hoo fi-ʹa-tuñy- yañ-ṣu-roo-na-hoo miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi wa-maa kaa-na muñ-ta-ṣi-raa.

18:44.text: Hu-naa-li-kal- wa-laa-ya-tu lil-laa-hil- Ḥaq̣q̣. Hu-wa Khay-run s̤a-waa-bañw- wa-Khay-ruñ- ʻuq̣-baa.

18:45.text: Waḍ-rib la-hum- ma-s̤a-lal- ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa ka-maaa-ʹin ʹañ-zal-naa-hu mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi fakh-ta-la-ṭa bi-hee na-baa-tul- ʹar-ḍi fa-ʹaṣ-ba-ḥa ha-shee-mañ- taẓ-roo-hur- ri-yaaḥ: wa-kaa-nal- laa-hu ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹim- Muq̣-ta-di-raa.

18:46.text: ʹAl-maa-lu wal-ba-noo-na zee-na-tul- ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa: wal-baa-q̣i-yaa-tuṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-tu khay-run ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-ka s̤a-waa-bañw- wa-khay-run ʹa-ma-laa.

18:47.text: Wa-yaw-ma nu-say-yi-rul- ji-baa-la wa-ta-ral- ʹar-ḍa baa-ri-za-tañw- wa-ḥa-shar-naa-hum fa-lam nu-g̣aa-dir min-hum ʹa-ḥa-daa.

18:48.text: Wa-ʻu-ri-ḍoo ʻa-laa Rab-bi-ka ṣaf-faa. La-q̣ad jiʹ-tu-moo-naa ka-maa kha-laq̣-naa-kum ʹaw-wa-la mar-ra-tim- bal za-ʻam-tum ʹal-lan- naj-ʻa-la la-kum- maw-ʻi-daa:

18:49.text: Wa-wu-ḍi-ʻal- Ki-taa-bu fa-ta-ral- muj-ri-mee-na mush-fi-q̣ee-na mim-maa fee-hi wa-ya-q̣oo-loo-na yaa-way-la-ta-naa maa- li-haa-ẓal- ki-taa-bi laa- yu-g̣aa-di-ru ṣa-g̣ee-ra-tañw- wa-laa- ka-bee-ra-tan ʹil-laaa ʹaḥ-ṣaa-haa! Wa-wa-ja-doo maa- ʻa-mi-loo ḥaa-ḍi-raa: wa-laa yaz̤̣-li-mu Rab-bu-ka ʹa-ḥa-daa.

18:50.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣ul-naa lil-ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tis- ju-doo li-ʹAa-da-ma fa-sa-ja-dooo ʹil-laaa ʹIb-lees. Kaa-na mi-nal- Jin-ni fa-fa-sa-q̣a ʻan ʹAm-ri Rab-bih. ʹA-fa-tat-ta-khi-ẓoo-na-hoo wa-ẓur-riy-ya-ta-hooo ʹaw-li-yaaa-ʹa miñ- doo-nee wa-hum la-kum ʻa-duww! Biʹ-sa liz̤̣-z̤̣aa-li-mee-na ba-da-laa!

18:51.text: Maaa ʹash-hat-tu-hum khal-q̣as- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi wa-laa khal-q̣a ʹañ-fu-si-him: wa-maa kuñ-tu mut-ta-khi-ẓal- mu-ḍil-lee-na ʻa-ḍu-daa!

18:52.text: Wa-Yaw-ma ya-q̣oo-lu naa-doo shu-ra-kaaa-ʹi- yal-la-ẓee-na za-ʻam-tum fa-da-ʻaw-hum fa-lam yas-ta-jee-boo la-hum wa-ja-ʻal-naa bay-na-hum- maw-bi-q̣aa.

18:53.text: Wa-ra- ʹal-muj-ri-moo-nan- Naa-ra fa-z̤̣an-nooo ʹan-na-hum- mu-waa-q̣i-ʻoo-haa wa-lam ya-ji-doo ʻan-haa maṣ-ri-faa.

18:54.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ṣar-raf-naa fee haa-ẓal- Q̣ur-ʹaa-ni lin-naa-si miñ- kul-li ma-s̤al: wa-kaa-nal- ʹIñ-saa-nu ʹak-s̤a-ra shay-ʹiñ- ja-da-laa.

18:55.text: Wa-maa ma-na-ʻan- naa-sa ʹañy- yuʹ-mi-nooo ʹiẓ jaaa-ʹa-hu-mul- Hu-daa wa-yas-tag̣-fi-roo Rab-ba-hum ʹil-laaa ʹañ- taʹ-ti-ya-hum sun-na-tul- ʹaw-wa-lee-na ʹaw yaʹ-ti-ya-hu-mul- ʻA-ẓaa-bu q̣u-bu-laa?

18:56.text: Wa-maa nur-si-lul- mur-sa-lee-na ʹil-laa mu-bash-shi-ree-na wa-muñ-ẓi-reen: wa-yu-jaa-di-lul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo bil-baa-ṭi-li li-yud-ḥi-ḍoo bi-hil- Ḥaq̣q̣: wat-ta-kha-ẓooo ʹAa-yaa-tee wa-maaa ʹuñ-ẓi-roo hu-zu-waa!

18:57.text: Wa-man ʹaz̤̣-la-mu mim-mañ- ẓuk-ki-ra bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti Rab-bi-hee fa-ʹaʻ-ra-ḍa ʻan-haa Wa-na-si-ya maa- q̣ad-da-mat ya-daah? ʹIn-naa ja-ʻal-naa ʻa-laa q̣u-loo-bi-him ʹa-kin-na-tan ʹañy- yaf-q̣a-hoo-hu wa-feee ʹaa-ẓaa-ni-him waq̣-raa. Wa-ʹiñ tad-ʻu-hum ʹi-lal- Hu-daa fa-lañy- yah-ta-dooo ʹi-ẓan ʹa-ba-daa.

18:58.text: Wa-Rab-bu-kal- G̣a-foo-ru Ẓur- Raḥ-mah. Law yu-ʹaa-khi-ẓu-hum̃- bi-maa ka-sa-boo la-ʻaj-ja-la la-hu-mul- ʻa-ẓaab: bal- la-hum -maw-ʻi-dul- lañy- ya-ji-doo miñ- doo-ni-hee maw-ʹi-laa.

18:59.text: Wa-til-kal- q̣u-raaa ʹah-lak-naa-hum lam-maa z̤̣a-la-moo wa-ja-ʻal-naa li-mah-li-ki-him- maw-ʻi-daa.

18:60.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣aa-la Moo-saa li-fa-taa-hu laaa ʹab-ra-ḥu ḥat-taaa ʹab-lu-g̣a maj-ma-ʻal- baḥ-ray-ni ʹaw ʹam-ḍi-ya ḥu-q̣u-baa.

18:61.text: Fa-lam-maa ba-la-g̣aa maj-ma-ʻa bay-ni-hi-maa na-si-yaa ḥoo-ta-hu-maa fat-ta-kha-ẓa sa-bee-la-hoo fil- baḥ-ri sa-ra-baa.

18:62.text: Fa-lam-maa jaa-wa-zaa q̣aa-la li-fa-taa-hu ʹaa-ti-naa g̣a-daaa-ʹa-naa la-q̣ad la-q̣ee-naa miñ- sa-fa-ri-naa haa-ẓaa na-ṣa-baa.

18:63.text: Q̣aa-la ʹa-ra-ʹay-ta ʹiẓ ʹa-way-naaa ʹi-laṣ- ṣakh-ra-ti fa-ʹin-nee na-see-tul- ḥoot? wa-maaa ʹañ-saa-nee-hu ʹil-lash- Shay-ṭaa-nu ʹan ʹaẓ-ku-rah: wat-ta-kha-ẓa sa-bee-la-hoo fil- baḥ-ri ʻa-ja-baa!

18:64.text: Q̣aa-la ẓaa-li-ka maa- kun-naa nab-g̣i far-tad-daa ʻa-laaa ʹaa-s̤aa-ri-hi-maa q̣a-ṣa-ṣaa.

18:65.text: Fa-wa-ja-daa ʻAb-dam- min ʻi-baa-di-naaa ʹaa-tay-naa-hu Raḥ-ma-tam- min ʻiñ-di-naa wa-ʻal-lam-naa-hu mil- la-dun-na ʻIl-maa.

18:66.text: Q̣aa-la la-hoo Moo-saa hal ʹat-ta-bi-ʻu-ka ʻa-laaa ʹañ- tu-ʻal-li-ma-ni mim-maa ʻul-lim-ta rush-daa?

18:67.text: Q̣aa-la ʹin-na-ka lañ- tas-ta-ṭee-ʻa ma-ʻi-ya ṣab-raa!

18:68.text: Wa-kay-fa taṣ-bi-ru ʻa-laa maa- lam tu-ḥiṭ bi-hee khub-raa?

18:69.text: Q̣aa-la sa-ta-ji-du-neee ʹiñ- shaaa- ʹal-laa-hu ṣaa-bi-rañw- wa-laaa ʹaʻ-ṣee la-ka ʹam-raa.

18:70.text: Q̣aa-la fa-ʹi-nit- ta-baʻ-ta-nee fa-laa tas-ʻal-nee ʻañ shay-ʹin ḥat-taaa ʹuḥ-di-s̤a la-ka min-hu ẓik-raa.

18:71.text: Fañ-ṭa-la-q̣aa: ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa ra-ki-baa fis- sa-fee-na-ti kha-ra-q̣a-haa. Q̣aa-la ʹa-kha-raq̣-ta-haa li-tug̣-ri-q̣a ʹah-la-haa? La-q̣ad jiʹ-ta shay-ʹan ʹim-raa!

18:72.text: Q̣aa-la ʹa-lam ʹa-q̣ul ʹin-na-ka lañ- tas-ṭa-tee-ʻa ma-ʻi-ya ṣab-raa?

18:73.text: Q̣aa-la laa- tu-ʹaa-khiẓ-nee bi-maa na-see-tu wa-laa tur-hiq̣-nee min ʹam-ree ʻus-raa.

18:74.text: Fañ-ṭa-la-q̣aa: ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa la-q̣i-yaa g̣u-laa-mañ- fa-q̣a-ta-la-hoo q̣aa-la ʹa-q̣a-tal-ta naf-sañ- za-kiy-ya-tam- bi-g̣ay-ri nafs? La-q̣ad jiʹ-ta shay-ʹan- nuk-raa!

18:75.text: Q̣aa-la ʹa-lam ʹa-q̣ul- la-ka ʹin-na-ka lañ- tas-ta-ṭee-ʻa ma-ʻi-ya ṣab-raa?

18:76.text: Q̣aa-la ʹiñ- sa-ʹal-tu-ka ʻañ shay-ʹim- baʻ-da-haa fa-laa tu-ṣaa-ḥib-nee: q̣ad ba-lag̣-ta mil- la-dun-nee ʻuẓ-raa.

18:77.text: Fañ-ṭa-la-q̣aa: Ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaaa ʹa-ta-yaaa ʹah-la- q̣ar-ya-ti-nis- taṭ-ʻa-maaa ʹah-la-haa fa-ʹa-baw ʹañy- yu-ḍay-yi-foo-hu-maa fa-wa-ja-daa fee-haa ji-daa-rañy- yu-ree-du ʹañy- yañ-q̣aḍ-ḍa fa-ʹa-q̣aa-mah. Q̣aa-la law shiʹ-ta lat-ta-khaẓ-ta ʻa-lay-hi ʹaj-raa.

18:78.text: Q̣aa-la haa-ẓaa fi-raa-q̣u bay-nee wa-bay-nik: sa-ʹu-nab-bi-ʹu-ka bi-taʹ-wee-li maa- lam tas-ta-ṭiʻ ʻa-lay-hi ṣab-raa.

18:79.text: ʹAm-mas- sa-fee-na-tu fa-kaa-nat li-ma-saa-kee-na yaʻ-ma-loo-na fil- baḥ-ri fa-ʹa-rat-tu ʹan ʹa-ʻee-ba-haa wa-kaa-na wa-raaa-ʹa-hum- ma-li-kuñy- yaʹ-khu-ẓu kul-la sa-fee-na-tin g̣aṣ-baa.

18:80.text: Wa-ʹam-mal- g̣u-laa-mu fa-kaa-na ʹa-ba-waa-hu Muʹ-mi-nay-ni fa-kha-shee-naaa ʹañy- yur-hi-q̣a-hu-maa ṭug̣-yaa-nañw- wa-kuf-raa.

18:81.text: Fa-ʹa-rad-naaa ʹañy- yub-di-la-hu-maa Rab-bu-hu-maa khay-ram- min-hu za-kaa-tañw- wa-ʹaq̣-ra-ba ruḥ-maa.

18:82.text: Wa-ʹam-mal- ji-daa-ru fa-kaa-na li-g̣u-laa-may-ni ya-tee-may-ni fil- Ma-dee-na-ti wa-kaa-na taḥ-ta-hoo kañ-zul- la-hu-maa wa-kaa-na ʹa-boo-hu-maa ṣaa-li-ḥaa: fa-ʹa-raa-da Rab-bu-ka ʹañy- yab-lu-g̣aaa ʹa-shud-da-hu-maa wa-yas-takh-ri-jaa kañ-za-hu-maa raḥ-ma-tam- mir- Rab-bik. Wa-maa fa-ʻal-tu-hoo ʻan ʹam-ree. Ẓaa-li-ka taʹ-wee-lu maa- lam tas-ṭiʻ ʻa-lay-hi ṣab-raa.

18:83.text: Wa-yas-ʹa-loo-na-ka ʻañ- Ẓil- Q̣ar-nayn. Q̣ul sa-ʹat-loo ʻa-lay-kum- min-hu ẓik-raa.

18:84.text: ʹIn-naa mak-kan-naa la-hoo fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-ʹaa-tay-naa-hu miñ kul-li shay-ʹiñ- sa-ba-baa.

18:86.text: Ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa ba-la-g̣a mag̣-ri-bash- sham-si wa-ja-da-haa tag̣-ru-bu fee ʻay-nin ḥa-mi-ʹa-tiñw- wa-wa-ja-da ʻiñ-da-haa Q̣aw-maa. Q̣ul-naa yaa-Ẓal- Q̣ar-nay-ni ʹim-maaa ʹañ tu-ʻaẓ-ẓi-ba wa-ʹim-maaa ʹañ tat-ta-khi-ẓa fee-him ḥus-naa.

18:87.text: Q̣aa-la ʹam-maa mañ z̤̣a-la-ma fa-saw-fa nu-ʻaẓ-ẓi-bu-hoo s̤um-ma yu-rad-du ʹi-laa Rab-bi-hee fa-yu-ʻaẓ-ẓi-bu-hoo ʻa-ẓaa-ban- nuk-raa.

18:88.text: Wa-ʹam-maa man ʹaa-ma-na wa-ʻa-mi-la ṣaa-li-ḥañ- fa-la-hoo ja-zaaa-ʹa-nil- ḥus-naa, wa-sa-na-q̣oo-lu la-hoo min ʹam-ri-naa yus-raa.

18:90.text: Ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa ba-la-g̣a maṭ-li-ʻash- sham-si wa-ja-da-haa taṭ-lu-ʻu ʻa-laa q̣aw-mil- lam- naj-ʻal- la-hum- miñ- doo-ni-haa sit-raa.

18:91.text: Ka-ẓaa-li-ka wa-q̣ad ʹa-ḥaṭ-naa bi-maa la-day-hi khub-raa.

18:93.text: Ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa ba-la-g̣a bay-nas- sad-day-ni wa-ja-da miñ- doo-ni-hi-maa q̣aw-mal- laa ya-kaa-doo-na yaf-q̣a-hoo-na q̣aw-laa.

18:94.text: Q̣aa-loo yaa-Ẓal- Q̣ar-nay-ni ʹin-na Yaʹ-joo-ja wa-Maʹ-joo-ja muf-si-doo-na fil- ʹar-ḍi fa-hal naj-ʻa-lu la-ka khar-jan ʻa-laaa ʹañ- taj-ʻa-la bay-na-naa wa-bay-na-hum sad-daa?

18:95.text: Q̣aa-la maa- mak-kan-nee fee-hi Rab-bee khay-ruñ- fa-ʹa-ʻee-noo-nee bi-q̣uw-wa-tin ʹaj-ʻal bay-na-kum wa-bay-na-hum rad-maa:

18:96.text: ʹAa-too-nee zu-ba-ral- ḥa-deed. Ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa saa-waa bay-naṣ- ṣa-da-fay-ni q̣aa-lañ- fu-khoo: ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa ja-ʻa-la-hoo naa-rañ q̣aa-la ʹaa-too-neee ʹuf-rig̣ ʻa-lay-hi q̣iṭ-raa.

18:97.text: Fa-mas- ṭaa-ʻooo ʹañy- yaz̤̣-ha-roo-hu wa-mas- ta-ṭaa-ʻoo la-hoo naq̣-baa.

18:98.text: Q̣aa-la haa-ẓaa raḥ-ma-tum- mir- Rab-bee: fa-ʹi-ẓaa jaaa-ʹa waʻ-du Rab-bee ja-ʻa-la-hoo dak-kaaaʹ; wa-kaa-na waʻ-du Rab-bee ḥaq̣-q̣aa.

18:99.text: Wa-ta-rak-naa baʻ-ḍa-hum Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓiñy- ya-moo-ju fee baʻ-ḍiñw- wa-nu-fi-kha fiṣ- Ṣoo-ri fa-ja-maʻ-naa-hum jam-ʻaa.

18:101.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na kaa-nat ʹaʻ-yu-nu-hum fee g̣i-ṭaaa-ʹin ʻañ ẓik-ree wa-kaa-noo laa- yas-ta-ṭee-ʻoo-na sam-ʻaa.

18:102.text: ʹA-fa-ḥa-si-bal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-rooo ʹañy- yat-ta-khi-ẓoo ʻi-baa-dee miñ- doo-neee ʹaw-li-yaaaʹ? ʹIn-naaa ʹaʻ-tad-naa Ja-han-na-ma lil-kaa-fi-ree-na nu-zu-laa.

18:104.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na ḍal-la saʻ-yu-hum fil- ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa wa-hum yaḥ-sa-boo-na ʹan-na-hm yuḥ-si-noo-na ṣun-ʻaa?

18:105.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-kal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti Rab-bi-him wa-Li-q̣aaa-ʹi-hee fa-ḥa-bi-ṭat ʹaʻ-maa-lu-hum fa-laa nu-q̣ee-mu la-hum Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti waz-naa.

18:106.text: Ẓaa-li-ka ja-zaaa-ʹu-hum Ja-han-na-mu bi-maa ka-fa-roo wat-ta-kha-ẓooo ʹAa-yaa-tee wa-Ru-su-lee hu-zu-waa.

18:107.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti kaa-nat la-hum Jan-naa-tul- Fir-daw-si nu-zu-laa,

18:108.text: Khaa-li-dee-na fee-haa laa- yab-g̣oo-na ʻan-haa ḥi-wa-laa.

18:109.text: Q̣ul- law kaa-nal- baḥ-ru mi-daa-dal- li-Ka-li-maa-ti Rab-bee la-na-fi-dal- baḥ-ru q̣ab-la ʹañ- tañ-fa-da Ka-li-maa-tu Rab-bee wa-law jiʹ-naa bi-mis̤-li-hee ma-da-daa.

18:110.text: Q̣ul ʹin-na-maaa ʹa-na ba-sha-rum- mis̤-lu-kum yoo-ḥaaa ʹi-lay-ya ʹan-na-maaa ʹI-laa-hu-kum ʹI-laa-huñw- Waa-ḥid: fa-mañ kaa-na yar-joo Li-q̣aaa-ʹa Rab-bi-hee fal-yaʻ-mal ʻa-ma-lañ ṣaa-li-hañw wa-laa- yush-rik bi-ʻi-baa-da-ti Rab-bi-heee ʹa-ḥa-daa.

19:4.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-bi ʹin-nee wa-ha-nal- ʻaz̤̣-mu min-nee wash-ta-ʻa-lar- raʹ-su shay-bañw- wa-lam ʹa-kum- bi-du-ʻaaa-ʹi-ka Rab-bi sha-q̣iy-yaa!

19:5.text: Wa-ʹin-nee khif-tul- ma-waa-li-ya miñw- wa-raaa-ʹee wa-kaa-na-t im-ra-ʹa-tee ʻaa-q̣i-rañ- fa-hab lee mil- la-duñ-ka wa-liy-yaa,―

19:6.text: Ya-ri-s̤u-nee wa-ya-ri-s̤u min ʹaa-li Yaʻ-q̣oo-ba waj-ʻal-hu Rab-bi ra-ḍiy-yaa!

19:7.text: Yaa-Za-ka-riy-yaaa ʹin-naa nu-bash-shi-ru-ka bi-g̣u-laa-mi-n is-mu-hoo Yaḥ-yaa lam naj-ʻal- la-hoo miñ- q̣ab-lu sa-miy-yaa.

19:8.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-bi ʹan-naa ya-koo-nu lee g̣u-laa-muñw- wa-kaa-na-tim- ra-ʹa-tee ʻaa-q̣i-rañw- Wa-q̣ad ba-lag̣-tu mi-nal- ki-ba-ri ʻi-tiy-yaa?

19:9.text: Q̣aa-la ka-ẓaa-lik: q̣aa-la Rab-bu-ka hu-wa ʻa-lay-ya hay-yi-nuñw- wa-q̣ad kha-laq̣-tu-ka miñ- q̣ab-lu wa-lam ta-ku shay-ʹaa!

19:10.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-bij- ʻal- leee ʹAa-yah. Q̣aa-la ʹAa-ya-tu-ka ʹal-laa tu-kal-li-man- naa-sa s̤a-laa-s̤a la-yaa-liñ- sa-wiy-yaa.

19:11.text: Fa-kha-ra-ja ʻa-laa q̣aw-mi-hee mi-nal- miḥ-raa-bi fa-ʹaw-ḥaaa ʹi-lay-him ʹañ sab-bi-ḥoo buk-ra-tañw- wa-ʻa-shiy-yaa.

19:12.text: Yaa-Yaḥ-yaa khu-ẓil- Ki-taa-ba bi-q̣uw-wah: wa-ʹaa-tay-naa-hul- Ḥuk-ma ṣa-biy-yaa.

19:13.text: Wa-ḥa-naa-nam- mil- la-dun-naa wa-za-kaah: wa-kaa-na ta-q̣iy-yaa,

19:14.text: Wa-bar-ram- bi-waa-li-day-hi wa-lam ya-kuñ jab-baa-ran ʻa-ṣiy-yaa.

19:15.text: Wa-Sa-laa-mun ʻa-lay-hi yaw-ma wu-li-da wa-yaw-ma ya-moo-tu wa-yaw-ma yub-ʻa-s̤u ḥay-yaa!

19:16.text: Waẓ-kur fil- Ki-taa-bi Mar-yam. ʹI-ẓiñ- ta-ba-ẓat min ʹah-li-haa ma-kaa-nañ- shar-q̣iy-yaa.

19:17.text: Fat-ta-kha-ẓat miñ doo-ni-him ḥi-jaa-baa. Fa-ʹar-sal-naaa ʹi-lay-haa roo-ḥa-naa fa-ta-mas̤-s̤a-la la-haa ba-sha-rañ- sa-wiy-yaa.

19:18.text: Q̣aa-lat ʹin-neee ʹa-ʻoo-ẓu bir-Raḥ-maa-ni miñ-ka ʹiñ- kuñ-ta ta-q̣iy-yaa.

19:19.text: Q̣aa-la ʹin-na-maaa ʹa-na ra-soo-lu Rab-bi-ki li-ʹa-ha-ba la-ki g̣u-laa-mañ- za-kiy-yaa.

19:20.text: Q̣aa-lat ʹan-naa ya-koo-nu lee g̣u-laa-muñw- wa-lam yam-sas-nee ba-sha-ruñw- wa-lam ʹa-ku ba-g̣iy-yaa?

19:21.text: Q̣aa-la ka-ẓaa-lik: q̣aa-la Rab-bu-ki hu-wa ʻa-lay-ya hay-yin: wa-li-naj-ʻa-la-hooo ʹAa-ya-tal- lin-naa-si wa-Raḥ-ma-tam- min-naa: wa-kaa-na ʹam-ram- maq̣-ḍiy-yaa.

19:23.text: Fa-ʹa-jaaa-ʹa-hal- ma-khaa-ḍu ʹi-laa jiẓ-ʻin- nakh-lah; q̣aa-lat yaa-lay-ta-nee mit-tu q̣ab-la haa-ẓaa wa-kuñ-tu nas-yam- mañ-siy-yaa!

19:24.text: Fa-naa-daa-haa miñ- taḥ-ti-haaa ʹal-laa taḥ-za-nee q̣ad ja-ʻa-la Rab-bu-ki taḥ-ta-ki sa-riy-yaa;

19:25.text: Wa-huz-zeee ʹi-lay-ki bi-jiẓ-ʻin- nakh-la-ti tu-saa-q̣iṭ ʻa-lay-ki ru-ṭa-bañ- ja-niy-yaa.

19:26.text: Fa-ku-lee wash-ra-bee wa-q̣ar-ree ʻay-naa. Fa-ʹim-maa ta-ra-yin-na mi-nal- ba-sha-ri ʹa-ḥa-dañ fa-q̣oo-leee ʹin-nee na-ẓar-tu lir-Raḥ-maa-ni ṣaw-mañ- fa-lan ʹu-kal-li-mal- yaw-ma ʹiñ-siy-yaa.

19:27.text: Fa-ʹa-tat bi-hee q̣aw-maa-haa taḥ-mi-luh. Q̣aa-loo yaa-Mar-ya-mu la-q̣ad jiʹ-ti shay-ʹañ- fa-riy-yaa.

19:28.text: Yaaa-ʹukh-ta- Haa-roo-na maa- kaa-na ʹa-boo-kim- ra-ʹa saw-ʹiñw- wa-maa- kaa-nat ʹum-mu-ki ba-g̣iy-yaa!

19:29.text: Fa-ʹa-shaa-rat ʹi-layh. Q̣aa-loo kay-fa nu-kal-li-mu mañ- kaa-na fil- mah-di ṣa-biy-yaa?

19:30.text: Q̣aa-la ʹin-nee ʻAb-dul- laah: ʹaa-taa-ni-yal- Ki-taa-ba wa-ja-ʻa-la-nee Na-biy-yaa;

19:31.text: Wa-ja-ʻa-la-nee mu-baa-ra-kan ʹay-na- maa kuñ-tu, wa-ʹaw-ṣaa-nee biṣ-Ṣa-laa-ti waz-Za-kaa-ti maa- dum-tu ḥay-yaa:

19:32.text: Wa-bar-ram- bi-waa-li-da-tee wa-lam yaj-ʻal-nee jab-baa-rañ sha-q̣iy-yaa;

19:33.text: Was-Sa-laa-mu ʻa-lay-ya yaw-ma wu-lit-tu wa-yaw-ma ʹa-moo-tu wa-yaw-ma ʹub-ʻa-s̤u ḥay-yaa!

19:34.text: Ẓaa-li-ka ʻEe-sab- nu- Mar-yam: q̣aw-lal- ḥaq̣-q̣il- la-ẓee fee-hi yam-ta-roon.

19:35.text: Maa- kaa-na lil-laa-hi ʹañy- yat-ta-khi-ẓa miñw- wa-la-diñ Sub-ḥaa-nah! ʹI-ẓaa q̣a-ḍaaa ʹam-rañ fa-ʹin-na-maa ya-q̣oo-lu la-hoo Kuñ- Fa-ya-koon.˺

19:36.text: Wa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha Rab-bee wa-Rab-bu-kum faʻ-bu-dooh: haa-ẓaa Ṣi-raa-ṭum- Mus-ta-q̣eem.

19:37.text: Fakh-ta-la-fal- ʹaḥ-zaa-bu mim- bay-ni-him: fa-way-lul- lil-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo mim- Mash-ha-di yaw-min ʻa-z̤̣eem!

19:38.text: ʹAs-miʻ bi-him wa-ʹab-ṣir Yaw-ma yaʹ-too-na-naa laa-ki-niz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-moo-nal- yaw-ma fee ḍa-laa-lim- mu-been!

19:39.text: Wa-ʹañ-ẓir-hum Yaw-mal- Ḥas-ra-ti ʹiẓ q̣u-ḍi-yal- ʹamr. Wa-hum fee g̣af-la-tiñw- wa-hum laa- yuʹ-mi-noon!

19:40.text: ʹIn-naa Naḥ-nu na-ri-s̤ul- ʹar-ḍa wa-man ʻa-lay-haa wa-ʹi-lay-naa yur-ja-ʻoon.

19:41.text: Waẓ-kur fil- Ki-taa-bi ʹIb-raa-heem: ʹin-na-hoo kaa-na Ṣid-dee-q̣an- Na-biy-yaa.

19:42.text: ʹIẓ q̣aa-la li-ʹa-bee-hi yaaa-ʹa-ba-ti li-ma taʻ-bu-du maa laa- yas-ma-ʻu wa-laa yub-ṣi-ru wa-laa yug̣-nee ʻañ-ka shay-ʹaa?

19:43.text: Yaaa-ʹa-ba-ti ʹin-nee q̣ad jaaa-ʹa-nee mi-nal- ʻil-mi maa- lam yaʹ-ti-ka fat-ta-biʻ-neee ʹah-di-ka Ṣi-raa-ṭañ- sa-wiy-yaa.

19:44.text: Yaaa-ʹa-ba-ti laa- taʻ-bu-dish- Shay-ṭaan: ʹin-nash- Shay-ṭaa-na kaa-na lir-Raḥ-maa-ni ʻa-ṣiy-yaa.

19:45.text: Yaaa-ʹa-ba-ti ʹin-neee ʹa-khaa-fu ʹañy- ya-mas-sa-ka ʻA-ẓaa-bum- mi-nar- Raḥ-maa-ni fa-ta-koo-na lish-Shay-ṭaa-ni wa-liy-yaa.

19:46.text: Q̣aa-la ʹa-raa-g̣i-bun ʹañ-ta ʻan ʹaa-li-ha-tee yaaa-ʹIb-raa-heem? La-ʹil- lam tañ-ta-hi la-ʹar-ju-man-na-ka wah-jur-nee ma-liy-yaa!

19:47.text: Q̣aa-la Sa-laa-mun ʻa-layk: sa-ʹas-tag̣-fi-ru la-ka Rab-bee: ʹin-na-hoo kaa-na bee Ḥa-fiy-yaa.

19:48.text: Wa-ʹaʻ-ta-zi-lu-kum wa-maa tad-ʻoo-na miñ doo-nil- laa-hi wa-ʹad-ʻoo Rab-bee ʻa-saaa ʹal-laaa ʹa-koo-na bi-du-ʻaaa-ʹi Rab-bee sha-q̣iy-yaa.

19:49.text: Fa-lam-maʻ- ta-za-la-hum wa-maa yaʻ-bu-doo-na miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi wa-hab-naa la-hooo ʹIs-ḥaa-q̣a wa-Yaʻ-q̣oob: wa-kul-lañ ja-ʻal-naa na-biy-yaa.

19:50.text: Wa-wa-hab-naa la-hum- mir- Raḥ-ma-ti-naa wa-ja-ʻal-naa la-hum li-saa-na ṣid-q̣in ʻa-liy-yaa.

19:51.text: Waẓ-kur fil- Ki-taa-bi Moo-saaa ʹin-na-hoo kaa-na mukh-la-ṣañw- wa-kaa-na Ra-soo-lan- Na-biy-yaa.

19:52.text: Wa-naa-day-naa-hu miñ- jaa-ni-biṭ- Ṭoo-ril- ʹay-ma-ni wa-q̣ar-rab-naa-hu na-jiy-yaa.

19:53.text: Wa-wa-hab-naa la-hoo mir Raḥ-ma-ti-naaa ʹa-khaa-hu Haa-roo-na Na-biy-yaa.

19:54.text: Waẓ-kur fil- Ki-taa-bi ʹIs-maa-ʻeel; ʹin-na-hoo kaa-na ṣaa-di-q̣al- waʻ-di wa-kaa-na Ra-soo-lan- Na-biy-yaa.

19:55.text: Wa-kaa-na yaʹ-mu-ru ʹah-la-hoo biṣ-Ṣa-laa-ti waz-Za-kaah; wa-kaa-na ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-hee mar-ḍiy-yaa.

19:56.text: Waẓ-kur fil- Ki-taa-bi ʹId-rees: ʹin-na-hoo kaa-na ṣid-dee-q̣an- Na-biy-yaa:

19:58.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-kal- la-ẓee-na ʹan-ʻa-mal- laa-hu ʻa-lay-him- mi-nan- na-biy-yee-na miñ- ẓur-riy-ya-ti ʹAa-da-ma, wa-mim-man- ḥa-mal-naa ma-ʻa Nooḥ, wa-miñ ẓur-riy-ya-ti ʹIb-raa-hee-ma wa-ʹIs-raaa-ʹee-la wa-mim-man ha-day-naa waj-ta-bay-naa. ʹI-ẓaa tut-laa ʻa-lay-him ʹAa-yaa-tur- Raḥ-maa-ni khar-roo suj-ja-dañw- wa-bu-kiy-yaa.

19:59.text: Fa-kha-la-fa mim- baʻ-di-him khal-fun ʹa-ḍaa-ʻuṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta wat-ta-ba-ʻush- sha-ha-waa-ti fa-saw-fa yal-q̣aw-na g̣ay-yaa.

19:60.text: ʹIl-laa mañ- taa-ba wa-ʹaa-ma-na wa-ʻa-mi-la ṣaa-li-ḥañ- fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka yad-khu-loo-nal- Jan-na-ta wa-laa yuz̤̣-la-moo-na shay-ʹaa,

19:61.text: Jan-naa-ti ʻAd-ni-nil- la-tee wa-ʻa-dar- Raḥ-maa-nu ʻi-baa-da-hoo bil-G̣ayb: ʹin-na-hoo kaa-na waʻ-du-hoo maʹ-tiy-yaa.

19:62.text: Laa- yas-ma-ʻoo-na fee-haa lag̣-wan ʹil-laa Sa-laa-maa: wa-la-hum riz-q̣u-hum fee-haa buk-ra-tañw- wa-ʻa-shiy-yaa.

19:63.text: Til-kal- Jan-na-tul- la-tee noo-ri-s̤u min ʻi-baa-di-naa mañ- kaa-na ta-q̣iy-yaa.

19:64.text: Wa-maa na-ta-naz-za-lu ʹil-laa bi-ʹam-ri Rab-bik: la-hoo maa- bay-na ʹay-dee-naa wa-maa khal-fa-naa wa-maa bay-na ẓaa-li-ka: wa-maa kaa-na Rab-bu-ka na-siy-yaa,

19:65.text: Rab-bus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi wa-maa bay-na-hu-maa faʻ-bud-hu waṣ-ṭa-bir li-ʻi-baa-da-tih: hal taʻ-la-mu la-hoo sa-miy-yaa?

19:66.text: Wa-ya-q̣oo-lul- ʹiñ-saa-nu ʹa-ʹi-ẓaa- maa- mit-tu la-saw-fa ʹukh-ra-ju ḥay-yaa?

19:67.text: ʹA-wa-laa yaẓ-ku-rul- ʹiñ-saa-nu ʹan-naa kha-laq̣-naa-hu miñ- q̣ab-lu wa-lam ya-ku shay-ʹaa?

19:68.text: Fa-wa-Rab-bi-ka la-naḥ-shu-ran-na-hum wash-sha-yaa-ṭee-na s̤um-ma la-nuḥ-ḍi-ran-na-hum ḥaw-la Ja-han-na-ma ji-s̤iy-yaa;

19:69.text: S̤um-ma la-nañ-zi-ʻan-na miñ kul-li shee-ʻa-tin ʹay-yu-hum ʹa-shad-du ʻa-lar- Raḥ-maa-ni ʻi-tiy-yaa.

19:70.text: S̤um-ma la-naḥ-nu ʹaʻ-la-mu bil-la-ẓee-na hum ʹaw-laa bi-haa ṣi-liy-yaa.

19:71.text: Wa-ʹim- miñ-kum ʹil-laa waa-ri-du-haa: kaa-na ʻa-laa Rab-bi-ka Ḥat-mam- maq̣-ḍiy-yaa.

19:72.text: S̤um-ma nu-naj-jil- la-ẓee-nat- ta-q̣aw- wa-na-ẓa-ruz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-mee-na fee-haa ji-s̤iy-yaa.

19:73.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa tut-laa ʻa-lay-him ʹAa-yaa-tu-naa bay-yi-naa-tiñ- q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo lil-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nooo ʹay-yul- fa-ree-q̣ay-ni khay-rum- Ma-q̣aa-mañw- Wa-ʹaḥ-sa-nu Na-diy-yaa?

19:74.text: Wa-kam ʹah-lak-naa q̣ab-la-hum- miñ- q̣ar-nin hum ʹaḥ-sa-nu ʹa-s̤aa-s̤añw- Wa-riʹ-yaa?

19:75.text: Q̣ul mañ- kaa-na fiḍ- ḍa-laa-la-ti fal-yam-dud la-hur- Raḥ-maa-nu mad-daa: ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa ra-ʹaw maa- yoo-ʻa-doo-na ʹim-mal- ʻa-ẓaa-ba wa-ʹim-mas- Saa-ʻah. Fa-sa-yaʻ-la-moo-na man hu-wa shar-rum- ma-kaa-nañw- wa-ʹaḍ-ʻa-fu juñ-daa!

19:76.text: Wa-ya-zee-dul- laa-hul- la-ẓee-nah- ta-daw Hu-daa; wal-Baa-q̣i-yaa-tuṣ- Ṣaa-li-ḥaa-tu khay-run ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-ka s̤a-waa-bañw- wa-khay-rum- ma-rad-daa.

19:77.text: ʹA-fa-ra-ʹay-tal- la-ẓee ka-fa-ra bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa wa-q̣aa-la la-ʹoo-ta-yan-na maa-lañw- wa-wa-la-daa?

19:78.text: ʹAṭ-ṭa-la-ʻal- G̣ay-ba ʹa-mit- ta-kha-ẓa ʻiñ-dar- Raḥ-maa-ni ʻah-daa?

19:79.text: Kal-laa! Sa-nak-tu-bu maa- ya-q̣oo-lu wa-na-mud-du la-hoo mi-nal- ʻa-ẓaa-bi mad-daa.

19:81.text: Wat-ta-kha-ẓoo miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi ʹaa-li-ha-tal- li-ya-koo-noo la-hum ʻiz-zaa!

19:82.text: Kal-laa! sa-yak-fu-roo-na bi-ʻi-baa-da-ti-him wa-ya-koo-noo-na ʻa-lay-him ḍid-daa.

19:83.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹan-naaa ʹar-sal-nash- sha-yaa-ṭee-na ʻa-lal- kaa-fi-ree-na ta-ʹuz-zu-hum ʹaz-zaa?

19:84.text: Fa-laa taʻ-jal ʻa-lay-him: ʹin-na-maa na-ʻud-du la-hum ʻad-daa.

19:85.text: Yaw-ma naḥ-shu-rul- Mut-ta-q̣ee-na ʹi-lar- Raḥ-maa-ni waf-daa,

19:87.text: Laa- yam-li-koo-nash- sha-faa-ʻa-ta ʹil-laa ma-nit- ta-kha-ẓa ʻiñ-dar- Raḥ-maa-ni ʻah-daa.

19:90.text: Ta-kaa-dus- sa-maa-waa-tu ya-ta-faṭ-ṭar-na min-hu wa-tañ-shaq̣- q̣ul-ʹar-ḍu wa-ta-khir-rul- ji-baa-lu had-daa,

19:92.text: Wa-maa yam-ba-g̣ee lir-Raḥ-maa-ni ʹañy- yat-ta-khi-ẓa wa-la-daa.

19:93.text: ʹIñ- kul-lu mañ- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi ʹil-laaa ʹaa-tir- Raḥ-maa-ni ʻab-daa.

19:96.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti sa-yaj-ʻa-lu la-hu-mur- Raḥ-maa-nu wud-daa.

19:97.text: Fa-ʹin-na-maa yas-sar-naa-hu bi-li-saa-ni-ka li-tu-bash-shi-ra bi-hil- Mut-ta-q̣ee-na wa-tuñ-ẓi-ra bi-hee q̣aw-mal- lud-daa.

19:98.text: Wa-kam ʹah-lak-naa q̣ab-la-hum- miñ- q̣arn? Hal tu-ḥis-su min-hum- min ʹa-ḥa-din ʹaw tas-ma-ʻu la-hum rik-zaa?

20:4.text: Tañ-zee-lam- mim-man kha-la-q̣al- ʹar-ḍa was-sa-maa-waa-til- ʻu-laa.

20:6.text: La-hoo maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-maa fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-maa bay-na-hu-maa wa-maa taḥ-tas̤- s̤a-raa.

20:7.text: Wa-ʹiñ- taj-har bil-q̣aw-li fa-ʹin-na-hoo yaʻ-la-mus- sir-ra wa-ʹakh-faa.

20:8.text: ʹAl-laa-hu laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa Hoo! La-hul- ʹAs-maaa-ʹul- Ḥus-naa.

20:10.text: ʹIẓ ra-ʹaa naa-rañ- fa-q̣aa-la li-ʹah-li-him- ku-s̤ooo ʹin-neee ʹaa-nas-tu naa-ral- la-ʻal-leee ʹaa-tee-kum- min-haa bi-q̣a-ba-sin ʹaw ʹa-ji-du ʻa-lan- naa-ri hu-daa.

20:12.text: ʹIn-neee ʹA-na Rab-bu-ka fakh-laʻ naʻ-layk: ʹIn-na-ka bil-waa-dil- mu-q̣ad-da-si Ṭu-waa.

20:14.text: ʹIn-na-neee ʹA-nal- laa-hu laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laaa ʹA-na faʻ-bud-nee wa-ʹa-q̣i-miṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta li-ẓik-ree.

20:15.text: ʹIn-nas- Saa-ʻa-ta ʹaa-ti-ya-tun ʹa-kaa-du ʹukh-fee-haa li-tuj-zaa kul-lu naf-sim- bi-maa tas-ʻaa.

20:16.text: Fa-laa ya-ṣud-dan-na-ka ʻan-haa mal- laa yuʹ-mi-nu bi-haa wat-ta-ba-ʻa ha-waa-hu fa-tar-daa!

20:18.text: Q̣aa-la hi-ya ʻa-ṣaa-ya ʹa-ta-wak-ka-ʹu ʻa-lay-haa wa-ʹa-hush-shu bi-haa ʻa-laa g̣a-na-mee wa-li-ya fee-haa ma-ʹaa-ri-bu ʹukh-raa.

20:21.text: Q̣aa-la khuẓ-haa wa-laa ta-khaf, sa-nu-ʻee-du-haa see-ra-ta-hal- ʹoo-laa.

20:22.text: Waḍ-mum ya-da-ka ʹi-laa ja-naa-ḥi-ka takh-ruj bay-ḍaaa-ʹa min g̣ay-ri sooo-ʹin ʹAa-ya-tan ʹukh-raa,

20:38.text: ʹIẓ ʹaw-ḥay-naaa ʹi-laaa ʹum-mi-ka maa- yoo-ḥaa,

20:39.text: ʹA-ni q̣-ẓi-fee-hi fit- taa-boo-ti faq̣-ẓi-fee-hi fil- yam-mi fal-yul-q̣i-hil- yam-mu bis-saa-ḥi-li yaʹ-khuẓ-hu ʻa-duw-wul- lee wa-ʻa-duw-wul- lah: wa-ʹal-q̣ay-tu ʻa-lay-ka ma-ḥab-ba-tam- min-nee: wa-li-tuṣ-na-ʻa ʻa-laa ʻay-nee.

20:40.text: ʹIẓ tam-sheee ʹukh-tu-ka fa-ta-q̣oo-lu hal ʹa-dul-lu-kum ʻa-laa mañy- yak-fu-luh? Fa-ra-jaʻ-naa-ka ʹi-laaa ʹum-mi-ka kay ta-q̣ar-ra ʻay-nu-haa wa-laa taḥ-zan. Wa-q̣a-tal-ta naf-sañ- fa-naj-jay-naa-ka mi-nal- g̣am-mi wa-fa-tan-naa-ka fu-too-naa. Fa-la-bis̤-ta si-nee-na feee ʹah-li Mad-yan: S̤um-ma jiʹ-ta ʻa-laa- q̣a-da-riñy- Yaa-Moo-saa!

20:42.text: ʹIẓ-hab ʹañ-ta wa-ʹa-khoo-ka bi-ʹAa-yaa-tee wa-laa ta-ni-yaa fee ẓik-ree.

20:44.text: Fa-q̣oo-laa la-hoo q̣aw-lal- lay-yi-nal- la-ʻal-la-hoo ya-ta-ẓak-ka-ru ʹaw yakh-shaa.

20:45.text: Q̣aa-laa Rab-ba-naaa ʹin-na-naa na-khaa-fu ʹañy- yaf-ru-ṭa ʻa-lay-naaa ʹaw ʹañy- yaṭ-g̣aa.

20:46.text: Q̣aa-la laa- ta-khaa-faaa ʹin-na-nee ma-ʻa-ku-maaa ʹas-ma-ʻu wa-ʹa-raa.

20:47.text: Faʹ-ti-yaa-hu fa-q̣oo-laaa ʹin-naa Ra-soo-laa Rab-bi-ka fa-ʹar-sil ma-ʻa-naa Ba-neee ʹIs-raaa-ʹeel: wa-laa tu-ʻaẓ-ẓib-hum: q̣ad jiʹ-naa-ka bi-ʹAa-ya-tim- mir- Rab-bik! Was-Sa-laa-mu ʻa-laa ma-nit- ta-ba-ʻal- Hu-daa!

20:48.text: ʹIn-naa q̣ad ʹoo-ḥi-ya ʹi-lay-naaa ʹan-nal- ʻA-ẓaa-ba ʻa-laa mañ kaẓ-ẓa-ba wa-ta-wal-laa.

20:50.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-bu-nal- la-ẓeee ʹaʻ-ṭaa kul-la shay-ʹin khal-q̣a-hoo s̤um-ma ha-daa.

20:52.text: Q̣aa-la ʻil-mu-haa ʻiñ-da Rab-bee fee Ki-taab: laa- ya-ḍil-lu Rab-bee wa-laa yañ-saa,

20:53.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee ja-ʻa-la la-ku-mul- ʹar-ḍa mah-dañw- wa-sa-la-ka la-kum fee-haa su-bu-lañw- wa-ʹañ-za-la mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi maaa-ʹaa. Fa-ʹakh-raj-naa bi-heee ʹaz-waa-jam- min- na-baa-tiñ- shat-taa.

20:54.text: Ku-loo war-ʻaw ʹan-ʻaa-ma-kum: ʹin-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yaa-til- li-ʹu-lin- nu-haa.

20:55.text: Min-haa kha-laq̣-naa-kum wa-fee-haa nu-ʻee-du-kum wa-min-haa nukh-ri-ju-kum taa-ra-tan ʹukh-raa.

20:56.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹa-ray-naa-hu ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa kul-la-haa fa-kaẓ-ẓa-ba wa-ʹa-baa.

20:57.text: Q̣aa-la ʹa-jiʹ-ta-naa li-tukh-ri-ja-naa min ʹar-ḍi-naa bi-siḥ-ri-ka yaa-Moo-saa?

20:58.text: Fa-la-naʹ-ti-yan-na-ka bi-siḥ-rim- mis̤-li-hee faj-ʻal bay-na-na wa-bay-na-ka maw-ʻi-dal- laa nukh-li-fu-hoo naḥ-nu wa-laaa ʹañ-ta ma-kaa-nañ- su-waa.

20:59.text: Q̣aa-la maw-ʻi-du-kum yaw-muz- zee-na-ti wa-ʹañy- yuḥ-sha-ran- naa-su ḍu-ḥaa.

20:60.text: Fa-ta-wal-laa fir-ʻaw-nu fa-ja-ma-ʻa kay-da-hoo s̤um-ma ʹa-taa.

20:61.text: Q̣aa-la la-hum- Moo-saa way-la-kum laa- taf-ta-roo ʻa-lal- laa-hi ka-ẓi-bañ- fa-yus-ḥi-ta-kum̃- bi-ʻa-ẓaab: wa-q̣ad khaa-ba ma-nif- ta-raa!

20:63.text: Q̣aa-looo ʹin haa-ẓaa-ni la-saa-ḥi-raa-ni yu-ree-daa-ni ʹañy- yukh-ri-jaa-kum- min ʹar-ḍi-kum̃- bi-siḥ-ri-hi-maa wa-yaẓ-ha-baa bi-ṭa-ree-q̣a-ti-ku-mul- mus̤-laa.

20:64.text: Fa-ʹaj-mi-ʻoo kay-da-kum s̤um-maʹ- too ṣaf-faa: wa-q̣ad ʹaf-la-ḥal- yaw-ma ma-nis- taʻ-laa.

20:65.text: Q̣aa-loo yaa-Moo-saaa ʹim-maaa ʹañ- tul-q̣i-ya wa-ʹim-maaa ʹan- na-koo-na ʹaw-wa-la man ʹal-q̣aa?

20:66.text: Q̣aa-la bal ʹal-q̣oo! Fa-ʹi-ẓaa ḥi-baa-lu-hum wa-ʻi-ṣiy-yu-hum yu-khay-ya-lu ʹi-lay-hi miñ- siḥ-ri-him ʹan-na-haa tas-ʻaa!

20:68.text: Q̣ul-naa laa- ta-khaf ʹin-na-ka ʹan-tal- ʹaʻ-laa:

20:69.text: Waʹal-q̣i maa- fee ya-mee-ni-ka tal-q̣af maa- ṣa-na-ʻoo. ʹIn-na-maa ṣa-na-ʻoo kay-du saa-ḥir: wa-laa yuf-li-ḥus- saa-ḥi-ru ḥay-s̤u ʹa-taa.

20:70.text: Fa-ʹul-q̣i-yas- sa-ha-ra-tu suj-ja-dañ q̣aa-looo ʹaa-man-naa bi-Rab-bi Haa-roo-na wa-Moo-saa.

20:71.text: Q̣aa-la ʹaa-mañ-tum la-hoo q̣ab-la ʹan ʹaa-ẓa-na la-kum? ʹIn-na-hoo la-ka-bee-ru-ku-mul- la-ẓee ʻal-la-ma-ku-mus- siḥr! Fa-la-ʹu-q̣aṭ-ṭi-ʻan-na ʹay-di-ya-kum wa-ʹar-ju-la-kum- min khi-laa-fiñw- wa-la-ʹu-ṣal-li-ban-na-kum fee ju-ẓoo-ʻin- nakhl: wa-la-taʻ-la-mun-na ʹay-yu-naaa ʹa-shad-du ʻa-ẓaa-bañw- Wa-ʹab-q̣aa!

20:72.text: Q̣aa-loo lan- nuʹ-s̤i-ra-ka ʻa-laa maa- jaaa-ʹa-naa mi-nal- Bay-yi-naa-ti wal-la-ẓee fa-ṭa-ra-naa faq̣-ḍi maaa ʹañ-ta q̣aaḍ. ʹIn-na-maa taq̣-ḍee haa-ẓi-hil- ḥa-yaa-tad- dun-yaa.

20:73.text: ʹIn-naaa ʹaa-man-naa bi-Rab-bi-naa li-yag̣-fi-ra la-naa kha-ṭaa-yaa-naa wa-maaa ʹak-rah-ta-naa ʻa-lay-hi mi-nas- siḥr: wal-laa-hu Khay-ruñw- Wa-ʹAb-q̣aa.

20:74.text: ʹIn-na-hoo mañy- yaʹ-ti Rab-ba-hoo muj-ri-mañ fa-ʹin-na la-hoo Ja-han-nam: laa- ya-moo-tu fee-haa wa-laa yaḥ-yaa.

20:75.text: Wa-mañy- yaʹ-ti-hee Muʹ-mi-nañ- q̣ad ʻa-mi-laṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka la-hu-mud- da-ra-jaa-tul- ʻu-laa,

20:76.text: Jan-naa-tu ʻAd-niñ- taj-ree miñ- taḥ-ti-hal- ʹan-haa-ru khaa-li-dee-na fee-haa: wa-ẓaa-li-ka ja-zaaa-ʹu mañ- ta-zak-kaa.

20:77.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹaw-ḥay-naaa ʹi-laa Moo-saaa ʹan ʹas-ri bi-ʻi-baa-dee faḍ-rib la-hum ṭa-ree-q̣añ fil- baḥ-ri ya-ba-sal- laa ta-khaa-fu da-ra-kañw- wa-laa- takh-shaa.

20:78.text: Fa-ʹat-ba-ʻa-hum Fir-ʻaw-nu bi-ju-noo-di-hee fa-g̣a-shi-ya-hum- mi-nal- yam-mi maa- g̣a-shi-ya-hum.

20:80.text: Yaa-Ba-neee ʹIs-raaa-ʹee-la q̣ad ʹañ-jay-naa-kum- min ʻa-duw-wi-kum wa-waa-ʻad-naa-kum jaa-ni-baṭ- Ṭoo-ril- ʹay-mana wa-naz-zal-naa ʻa-lay-ku-mul- Man-na was-Sal-waa:

20:81.text: Ku-loo miñ- ṭay-yi-baa-ti maa- ra-zaq̣-naa-kum wa-laa taṭ-g̣aw fee-hi fa-ya-ḥil-la ʻa-lay-kum g̣a-ḍa-bee: wa-mañy- yaḥ-lil ʻa-lay-hi g̣a-ḍa-bee fa-q̣ad ha-waa!

20:82.text: Wa-ʹin-nee la-G̣af-faa-rul- li-mañ- taa-ba wa-ʹaa-ma-na wa-ʻa-mi-la ṣaa-li-ḥañ- s̤um-mah- ta-daa

20:84.text: Q̣aa-la hum ʹu-laaa-ʹi ʻa-laaa ʹa-s̤a-ree wa-ʻa-jil-tu ʹi-lay-ka Rab-bi li-tar-ḍaa.

20:85.text: Q̣aa-la fa-ʹin-naa q̣ad fa-tan-naa q̣aw-ma-ka mim- baʻ-di-ka wa-ʹa-ḍal-la-hu-mus- Saa-mi-riyy.

20:86.text: fa-ra-ja-ʻa Moo-saaa ʹi-laa q̣aw-mi-hee g̣aḍ-baa-na ʹa-si-faa. Q̣aa-la Yaa-q̣aw-mi ʹa-lam ya-ʻid-kum Rab-bu-kum waʻ-dan ḥa-sa-naa? ʹA-fa-ṭaa-la ʻa-lay-ku-mul- ʻah-du ʹam ʹa-rat-tum ʹañy- ya-ḥil-la ʻa-lay-kum g̣a-ḍa-bum- mir- Rab-bi-kum fa-ʹakh-laf-tum- maw-ʻi-dee?

20:87.text: Q̣aa-loo maaa ʹakh-laf-naa maw-ʻi-da-ka bi-mal-ki-naa wa-laa-kin-naa ḥum-mil-naaa ʹaw-zaa-ram- miñ- zee-na-til- q̣aw-mi fa-q̣a-ẓaf-naa-haa fa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka ʹal-q̣as- Saa-mi-riyy.

20:88.text: Fa-ʹakh-ra-ja la-hum ʻij-lañ- ja-sa-dal- la-hoo khu-waa-ruñ- fa-q̣aa-loo haa-ẓaaa ʹi-laa-hu-kum wa-ʹi-laa-hu Moo-saa, fa-na-see!

20:89.text: ʹA-fa-laa ya-raw-na ʹal-laa yar-ji-ʻu ʹi-lay-him q̣aw-laa: wa-laa yam-li-ku la-hum ḍar-rañw- wa-laa- naf-ʻaa.

20:90.text: Wa-la-q̣ad q̣aa-la la-hum Haa-roo-nu miñ- q̣ab-lu yaa-q̣aw-mi ʹin-na-maa fu-tiñ-tum bih: wa-ʹin-na Rab-ba-ku-mur- Raḥ-maa-nu fat-ta-bi-ʻoo-nee wa-ʹa-ṭee-ʻooo ʹam-ree.

20:91.text: Q̣aa-loo lan- nab-ra-ḥa ʻa-lay-hi ʻaa-ki-fee-na ḥat-taa yar-ji-ʻa ʹi-lay-naa Moo-saa.

20:92.text: Q̣aa-la yaa-Haa-roo-nu maa ma-na-ʻa-ka ʹiẓ ra-ʹay-ta-hum ḍal-loo.

20:94.text: Q̣aa-la yab-na-ʹum-ma laa- taʹ-khuẓ bi-liḥ-ya-tee wa-laa bi-raʹ-see! ʹIn-nee kha-shee-tu ʹañ ta-q̣oo-la far-raq̣-ta bay-na Ba-neee- ʹIs-raaa-ʹee-la wa-lam tar-q̣ub q̣aw-lee!

20:96.text: Q̣aa-la ba-ṣur-tu bi-maa lam yab-ṣu-roo bi-hee fa-q̣a-baḍ-tu q̣ab-ḍa-tam- min ʹa-s̤a-rir- Ra-soo-li fa-na-baẓ-tu-haa wa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka saw-wa-lat lee naf-see.

20:97.text: Q̣aa-la faẓ-hab fa-ʹin-na la-ka fil- ḥa-yaa-ti ʹañ- ta-q̣oo-la Laa- Mi-saas˺: wa-ʹin-na la-ka maw-ʻi-dal- lañ- tukh-la-fah: wañ-z̤̣ur ʹi-laaa ʹi-laa-hi-kal- la-ẓee z̤̣al-ta ʻa-lay-hi ʻaa-ki-faa: la-nu-ḥar-ri-q̣an-na-hoo s̤um-ma la-nañ-si-fan-na-hoo fil- yam-mi nas-faa!

20:98.text: ʹIn-na-maaa ʹI-laa-hu-ku-mul- laa-hul- la-ẓee Laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa Hoo: wa-si-ʻa kul-la shay-ʹin ʻil-maa.

20:99.text: Ka-ẓaa-li-ka na-q̣uṣ-ṣu ʻa-lay-ka min ʹam-baaa-ʹi maa- q̣ad sa-baq̣: wa-q̣ad ʹaa-tay-naa-ka mil- la-dun-naa Ẓik-raa.

20:100.text: Man ʹaʻ-ra-ḍa ʻan-hu fa-ʹin-na-hoo yaḥ-mi-lu Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti wiz-raa;

20:101.text: Khaa-li-dee-na feeh: wa-saaa-ʹa la-hum Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti ḥim-laa,

20:102.text: Yaw-ma yuñ-fa-khu fiṣ- Ṣoo-ri wa-naḥ-shu-rul- muj-ri-mee-na Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓiñ- zur-q̣aa.

20:103.text: Ya-ta-khaa-fa-too-na bay-na-hum ʹil- la-bis̤-tum ʹil-laa ʻash-raa;

20:104.text: Naḥ-nu ʹAʻ-la-mu bi-maa ya-q̣oo-loo-na ʹiẓ ya-q̣oo-lu ʹam-s̤a-lu-hum Ṭa-ree-q̣a-tan ʹil- la-bis̤-tum ʹil-laa yaw-maa!

20:105.text: Wa-yas-ʹa-loo-na-ka ʻa-nil- ji-baa-li fa-q̣ul yañ-si-fu-haa Rab-bee nas-faa:

20:107.text: Laa- ta-raa fee-haa ʻi-wa-jañw- Wa-laaa ʹam-taa.

20:108.text: Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓiñy- yat-ta-bi-ʻoo-nad- Daa-ʻi-ya laa- ʻi-wa-ja lah: wa-kha-sha-ʻa-til- ʹaṣ-waa-tu lir-Raḥ-maa-ni fa-laa tas-ma-ʻu ʹil-laa ham-saa.

20:109.text: Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓil- laa tañ-fa-ʻush- Sha-faa-ʻa-tu ʹil-laa man ʹa-ẓi-na la-hur- Raḥ-maa-nu wa-ra-ḍi-ya la-hoo q̣aw-laa.

20:110.text: Yaʻ-la-mu maa- bay-na ʹay-dee-him wa-maa khal-fa-hum wa-laa yu-ḥee-ṭoo-na bi-hee ʻil-maa.

20:111.text: Wa-ʻa-na-til- wu-joo-hu lil-Ḥay-yil- Q̣ay-yoom: wa-q̣ad khaa-ba man ḥa-ma-la z̤̣ul-maa.

20:112.text: Wa-mañy- yaʻ-mal mi-naṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti wa-hu-wa Muʹ-mi-nuñ- fa-laa ya-khaa-fu z̤̣ul-mañw- wa-laa- haḍ-maa.

20:113.text: Wa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka ʹañ-zal-naa-hu Q̣ur-ʹaa-nan ʻA-ra-biy-yañw- wa-ṣar-raf-naa fee-hi mi-nal- wa-ʻee-di la-ʻal-la-hum yat-ta-q̣oo-na ʹaw yuḥ-di-s̤u la-hum ẓik-raa.

20:114.text: Fa-ta-ʻaa-lal- laa-hul- Ma-li-kul- Ḥaq̣q̣! Wa-laa taʻ-jal bil-q̣ur-ʹaa-ni miñ- q̣ab-li ʹañy- yuq̣-ḍaaa ʹi-lay-ka waḥ-yuh: wa-q̣ur- Rab-bi zid-nee ʻil-maa.

20:115.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʻa-hid-naaa ʹi-laaa ʹAa-da-ma miñ- q̣ab-lu fa-na-si-ya wa-lam na-jid la-hoo ʻaz-maa.

20:116.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣ul-naa lil-ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tis- ju-doo li-ʹAa-dama fa-sa-ja-dooo ʹil-laaa ʹIb-lee-sa ʹa-baa.

20:117.text: Fa-q̣ul-naa Yaaa-ʹAa-da-mu ʹin-na haa-ẓaa ʻa-duw-wul- la-ka wa-li-zaw-ji-ka fa-laa yukh-ri-jan-na-ku-maa mi-nal- Jan-na-ti fa-tash-q̣aa.

20:118.text: ʹIn-na la-ka ʹal-laa ta-joo-ʻa fee-haa wa-laa taʻ-raa,

20:119.text: Wa-ʹan-na-ka laa- taz̤̣-ma-ʹu fee-haa wa-laa taḍ-ḥaa.

20:120.text: Fa-was-wa-sa ʹi-lay-hish- Shay-ṭaa-nu q̣aa-la Yaaa-ʹAa-da-mu hal ʹa-dul-lu-ka ʻa-laa Sha-ja-ra-til- khul-di wa-mul-kil- laa yab-laa.

20:121.text: Fa-ʹa-ka-laa min-haa fa-ba-dat la-hu-maa saw-ʹaa-tu-hu-maa wa-ṭa-fi-q̣aa yakh-ṣi-faa-ni ʻa-lay-hi-maa miñw- wa-ra-q̣il- Jan-nah: wa-ʻa-ṣaaa ʹAa-da-mu Rab-ba-hoo fa-g̣a-waa.

20:122.text: S̤um-maj- ta-baa-hu Rab-bu-hoo fa-taa-ba ʻa-lay-hi wa-ha-daa.

20:123.text: Q̣aa-lah- bi-ṭaa min-haa ja-mee-ʻam- baʻ-ḍu-kum li-baʻ-ḍin ʻa-duww: fa-ʹim-maa yaʹ-ti-yan-na-kum- min-nee Hu-dañ fa-ma-nit- ta-ba-ʻa Hu-daa-ya fa-laa ya-ḍil-lu wa-laa yash-q̣aa.

20:124.text: Wa-man ʹaʻ-ra-ḍa ʻañ- Ẓik-ree fa-ʹin-na la-hoo ma-ʻee-sha-tañ- ḍañ-kañw- wa-naḥ-shu-ru-hoo Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti ʹaʻ-maa.

20:125.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-bi li-ma ḥa-shar-ta-neee ʹaʻmaa- wa-q̣ad kuñ-tu ba-ṣee-raa?

20:126.text: Q̣aa-la ka-ẓaa-li-ka ʹa-tat-ka ʹAa-yaa-tu-naa fa-na-see-ta-haa: wa-ka-ẓaa-li-kal- yaw-ma tuñ-saa.

20:127.text: Wa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka naj-zee man ʹas-ra-fa wa-lam yuʹ-mim- bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti Rab-bih: wa-la-ʻa-ẓaa-bul- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti ʹa-shad-du wa-ʹab-q̣aa.

20:128.text: ʹA-fa-lam yah-di la-hum kam ʹah-lak-naa q̣ab-la-hum- mi-nal- q̣u-roo-ni yam-shoo-na fee ma-saa-ki-ni-him? ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yaa-til- li-ʹu-lin- nu-haa.

20:129.text: Wa-law-laa- Ka-li-ma-tuñ- sa-ba-q̣at mir- Rab-bi-ka la-kaa-na li-zaa-mañw- wa-ʹa-ja-lum- mu-sam-maa.

20:130.text: Faṣ-bir ʻa-laa maa- ya-q̣oo-loo-na wa-sab-biḥ bi-Ḥam-di Rab-bi-ka q̣ab-la ṭu-loo-ʻish- sham-si wa-q̣ab-la g̣u-roo-bi-haa; wa-min ʹaa-naaa-ʹil- lay-li fa-sab-biḥ wa-ʹaṭ-raa-fan- na-haa-ri la-ʻal-la-ka tar-ḍaa.

20:131.text: Wa-laa ta-mud-dan-na ʹay-nay-ka ʹi-laa maa- mat-taʻ-naa bi-heee ʹaz-waa-jam- min-hum zah-ra-tal- ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa, li-naf-ti-na-hum feeh: wa-riz-q̣u Rab-bi-ka khay-ruñw- wa-ʹab-q̣aa.

20:132.text: Waʹ-mur ʹah-la-ka biṣ-Ṣa-laa-ti waṣ-ṭa-bir ʻa-lay-haa. Laa- nas-ʹa-lu-ka riz-q̣aa: Naḥ-nu nar-zu-q̣uk. Wal-ʻAa-q̣i-ba-tu lit-Taq̣-waa.

20:133.text: Wa-q̣aa-loo Law-laa- yaʹ-tee-naa bi-ʹAa-ya-tim- mir- Rab-bih? ʹA-wa-lam taʹ-ti-him̃- Bay-yi-na-tu maa- fiṣ- Ṣu-ḥu-fil- ʹoo-laa?

20:134.text: Wa-law ʹan-naaa ʹah-lak-naa-hum̃- bi-ʻa-ẓaa-bim- miñ- q̣ab-li-hee la-q̣aa-loo Rab-ba-naa Law-laaa ʹar-sal-ta ʹi-lay-naa Ra-soo-lañ- fa-nat-ta-bi-ʻa ʹAa-yaa-ti-ka Miñ q̣ab-li ʹan- na-ẓil-la wa-nakh-zaa.

20:135.text: Q̣ul kul-lum- mu-ta-rab-bi-ṣuñ fa-ta-rab-ba-ṣoo: fa-sa-taʻ-la-moo-na man ʹAṣ-ḥaa-buṣ- Ṣi-raa-ṭis- sa-wiy-yi wa-ma-nih- ta-daa.

21:1.text: ʹIq̣-ta-ra-ba lin-naa-si Ḥi-saa-bu-hum wa-hum fee g̣af-la-tim- muʻ-ri-ḍoon.

21:2.text: Maa- yaʹ-tee-him- miñ- Ẓik-rim- mir- Rab-bi-him- muḥ-da-s̤in ʹil-las- ta-ma-ʻoo-hu wa-hum yal-ʻa-boon,

21:3.text: Laa-hi-ya-tañ- q̣u-loo-bu-hum. Wa-ʹa-sar-run- naj-wal- la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-moo hal haa-ẓaaa ʹil-laa ba-sha-rum- mis̤-lu-kum? ʹA-fa-taʹ-too-nas- siḥ-ra wa-ʹañ-tum tub-ṣi-roon?

21:4.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-bee yaʻ-la-mul- Q̣aw-la fis- sa-maaa-ʹi wal-ʹarḍ: wa-Hu-was- Sa-mee-ʻul- ʻA-leem.

21:5.text: Bal q̣aa-looo ʹaḍ-g̣aa-s̤u ʹaḥ-laa-mim- ba-l if-ta-raa-hu bal hu-wa shaa-ʻir! fal-yaʹ-ti-naa bi-ʹAa-ya-tiñ- ka-maaa ʹur-si-lal- ʹaw-wa-loon!

21:6.text: Maaa ʹaa-ma-nat q̣ab-la-hum- miñ q̣ar-ya-tin ʹah-lak-naa-haa: ʹa-fa-hum yuʹ-mi-noon?

21:7.text: Wa-maaa ʹar-sal-naa q̣ab-la-ka ʹil-laa ri-jaa-lan- noo-ḥeee ʹi-lay-him fas-ʹa-looo ʹAh-laẓ- Ẓik-ri ʹiñ kuñ-tum laa- taʻ-la-moon.

21:8.text: Wa-maa ja-ʻal-naa-hum ja-sa-dal- laa yaʹ-ku-loo-naṭ- ṭa-ʻaa-ma wa-maa kaa-noo khaa-li-deen.

21:9.text: S̤um-ma ṣa-daq̣-naa-hu-mul- waʻ-da fa-ʹañ-jay-naa-hum wa-man- na-shaaa-ʹu wa-ʹah-lak-nal- mus-ri-feen.

21:10.text: La-q̣ad ʹañ-zal-naaa ʹi-lay-kum Ki-taa-bañ- fee-hi Ẓik-ru-kum: ʹa-fa-laa taʻ-q̣i-loon?

21:11.text: Wa-kam q̣a-ṣam-naa miñ q̣ar-ya-tiñ- kaa-nat z̤̣aa-li-ma-tañw- wa-ʹañ-shaʹ-naa baʻ-da-haa q̣aw-man ʹaa-kha-reen?

21:12.text: Fa-lam-maaa ʹa-ḥas-soo baʹ-sa-naaa ʹi-ẓaa hum- min-haa yar-ku-ḍoon.

21:13.text: Laa- tar-ku-ḍoo war-ji-ʻooo ʹi-laa maaa ʹut-rif-tum fee-hi wa-ma-saa-ki-ni-kum la-ʻal-la-kum tus-ʹa-loon.

21:15.text: Fa-maa zaa-lat- til-ka daʻ-waa-hum ḥat-taa ja-ʻal-naa-hum ḥa-ṣee-dan khaa-mi-deen.

21:16.text: Wa-maa kha-laq̣-nas- sa-maaa-ʹa wal-ʹar-ḍa wa-maa bay-na-hu-maa laa-ʻi-been!

21:17.text: Law ʹa-rad-naaa ʹan- nat-ta-khi-ẓa lah-wal- lat-ta-khaẓ-naa-hu mil- la-dun-naaa ʹiñ kun-naa faa-ʻi-leen!

21:18.text: Bal naq̣-ẓi-fu bil-Ḥaq̣-q̣i ʻa-lal- baa-ṭi-li fa-yad-ma-g̣u-hoo fa-ʹi-ẓaa hu-wa zaa-hiq̣! Wa-la-ku-mul- way-lu mim-maa ta-ṣi-foon.

21:19.text: Wa-la-hoo mañ- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ: wa-man ʻiñ-da-hoo laa- yas-tak-bi-roo-na ʻan ʻi-baa-da-ti-hee wa-laa yas-taḥ-si-roon.

21:21.text: ʹA-mit- ta-kha-ẓooo ʹaa-li-ha-tam- mi-nal- ʹar-ḍi hum yuñ-shi-roon?

21:22.text: Law kaa-na fee-hi-maaa ʹaa-li-ha-tun ʹil-lal- laa-hu la-fa-sa-da-taa! Fa-Sub-ḥaa-nal- laa-hi Rab-bil- ʻAr-shi ʻam-maa ya-ṣi-foon!

21:23.text: Laa- yus-ʹa-lu ʻam-maa yaf-ʻa-lu wa-hum yus-ʹa-loon.

21:24.text: ʹA-mit- ta-kha-ẓoo miñ- doo-ni-heee ʹaa-li-hah? Q̣ul haa-too bur-haa-na-kum: haa-ẓaa Ẓik-ru mam- ma-ʻi-ya wa-Ẓik-ru mañ- q̣ab-lee Bal ʹak-s̤a-ru-hum laa- yaʻ-la-moo-nal- Ḥaq̣-q̣a fa-hum- muʻ-ri-ḍoon.

21:25.text: Wa-maaa ʹar-sal-naa miñ- q̣ab-li-ka mir- ra-soo-lin ʹil-laa noo-ḥeee ʹi-lay-hi ʹan-na-hoo Laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laaa ʹA-na faʻ-bu-doon.

21:26.text: Wa-q̣aa-lut- ta-kha-ẓar- Raḥ-maa-nu wa-la-dañ- Sub-ḥaa-nah! Bal ʻi-baa-dum- muk-ra-moon.

21:27.text: Laa- yas-bi-q̣oo-na-hoo bil-q̣aw-li wa-hum̃- bi-ʹam-ri-hee yaʻ-ma-loon.

21:28.text: Yaʻ-la-mu maa- bay-na ʹay-dee-him wa-maa khal-fa-hum wa-laa yash-fa-ʻoo-na ʹil-laa li-ma-nir- ta-ḍaa wa-hum- min khash-ya-ti-hee mush-fi-q̣oon.

21:29.text: Wa-mañy- ya-q̣ul min-hum ʹin-neee ʹi-laa-hum- miñ- doo-ni-hee fa-ẓaa-li-ka naj-zee-hi Ja-han-nam: Ka-ẓaa-li-ka naj-ziz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen.

21:30.text: ʹA-wa-lam ya-ral- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-rooo ʹan-nas- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa kaa-na-taa rat-q̣añ- fa-fa-taq̣-naa-hu-maa? Wa-ja-ʻal-naa mi-nal- maaa-ʹi kul-la shay-ʹin ḥayy. ʹA-fa-laa yuʹ-mi-noon?

21:31.text: Wa-ja-ʻal-naa fil- ʹar-ḍi ra-waa-si-ya ʹañ- ta-mee-da bi-him wa-ja-ʻal-naa fee-haa fi-jaa-jañ- su-bu-lal- la-ʻal-la-hum yah-ta-doon.

21:32.text: Wa-ja-ʻal-nas- sa-maaa-ʹa saq̣-fam- maḥ-foo-z̤̣aa: wa-hum ʻan ʹAa-yaa-ti-haa muʻ-ri-ḍoon!

21:33.text: Wa-Hu-wal- la-ẓee kha-la-q̣al- Lay-la wan-Na-haa-ra wash-sham-sa wal-q̣a-mar: kul-luñ- fee fa-la-kiñy- yas-ba-ḥoon.

21:34.text: Wa-maa ja-ʻal-naa li-ba-sha-rim- miñ- q̣ab-li-kal- khuld: ʹa-fa- ʹim-mit-ta fa-hu-mul- khaa-li-doon?

21:35.text: Kul-lu naf-siñ- ẓaaa-ʹi-q̣a-tul- mawt: wa-nab-loo-kum̃- bish-shar-ri wal-khay-ri fit-nah. Wa-ʹi-lay-naa tur-ja-ʻoon.

21:36.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa ra-ʹaa-kal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-rooo ʹiñy- yat-ta-khi-ẓoo-na-ka ʹil-laa hu-zu-waa. ʹA-haa-ẓal- la-ẓee yaẓ-ku-ru ʹaa-li-ha-ta-kum? Wa-hum̃- bi-ẓik-rir- Raḥ-maa-ni hum kaa-fi-roon!

21:37.text: Khu-li-q̣al- ʹiñ-saa-nu min ʻa-jal: sa-ʹu-ree-kum ʹAa-yaa-tee fa-laa tas-taʻ-ji-loon!

21:38.text: Wa-ya-q̣oo-loo-na ma-taa haa-ẓal- waʻ-du ʹiñ- kuñ-tum ṣaa-di-q̣een?

21:39.text: Law yaʻ-la-mul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo ḥee-na laa- ya-kuf-foo-na ʻañw- wu-joo-hi-hi-mun- Naa-ra wa-laa ʻañ- z̤̣u-hoo-ri-him wa-laa hum yuñ-ṣa-roon!

21:40.text: Bal taʹ-tee-him̃ bag̣-ta-tañ- fa-tab-ha-tu-hum fa-laa yas-ta-ṭee-ʻoo-na rad-da-haa wa-laa hum yuñ-z̤̣a-roon.

21:41.text: Wa-la-q̣a-dis- tuh-zi-ʹa bi-ru-su-lim- miñ- q̣ab-li-ka fa-ḥaa-q̣a bil-la-ẓee-na sa-khi-roo min-hum- maa kaa-noo bi-hee yas-tah-zi-ʹoon.

21:42.text: Q̣ul mañy- yak-la-ʹu-kum̃- bil-lay-li wan-na-haa-ri mi-nar- Raḥ-maan? Bal hum ʻañ- ẓik-ri- Rab-bi-him- muʻ-ri-ḍoon.

21:43.text: ʹAm la-hum ʹaa-li-ha-tuñ tam-na-ʻu-hum- miñ- doo-ni-naa? Laa- yas-ta-ṭee-ʻoo-na naṣ-ra ʹañ-fu-si-him wa-laa hum- min-naa yuṣ-ḥa-boon.

21:44.text: Bal mat-taʻ-naa haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi wa-ʹaa-baaa-ʹa-hum ḥat-taa ṭaa-la ʻa-lay-hi-mul- ʻu-mur; ʹa-fa-laa ya-raw-na ʹan-naa naʹ-til- ʹar-ḍa nañ-q̣u-ṣu-haa min ʹaṭ-raa-fi-haa? ʹA-fa-hu-mul- g̣aa-li-boon?

21:45.text: Q̣ul ʹin-na-maaa ʹuñ-ẓi-ru-kum̃ bil-waḥ-yi wa-laa yas-ma-ʻuṣ- ṣum-mud- du-ʻaaa-ʹa ʹi-ẓaa maa- yuñ-ẓa-roon.

21:46.text: Wa-la-ʹim- mas-sat-hum naf-ḥa-tum- min ʻA-ẓaa-bi Rab-bi-ka la-ya-q̣oo-lun-na yaa-way-la-naaa ʹin-naa kun-naa z̤̣aa-li-meen!

21:47.text: Wa-na-ḍa-ʻul- ma-waa-zee-nal- q̣is-ṭa li-Yaw-mil- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti fa-laa tuz̤̣-la-mu naf-suñ- shay-ʹaa. Wa-ʹiñ- kaa-na mis̤-q̣aa-la ḥab-ba-tim- min khar-da-lin ʹa-tay-naa bi-haa: wa-ka-faa bi-naa ḥaa-si-been.

21:48.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹaa-tay-naa Moo-saa wa-Haa-roo-nal- Fur-q̣aa-na wa-Ḍi-yaaa-ʹañw- wa-Ẓik-ral- lil-Mut-ta-q̣een,

21:49.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na yakh-shaw-na Rab-ba-hum̃- bil-g̣ay-bi wa-hum- mi-nas- Saa-ʻa-ti mush-fi-q̣oon.

21:50.text: Wa-haa-ẓaa Ẓik-rum- Mu-baa-ra-kun ʹañ-zal-naah: ʹa-fa-ʹañ-tum la-hoo muñ-ki-roon.

21:51.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹaa-tay-naaa ʹIb-raa-hee-ma rush-da-hoo miñ- q̣ab-lu wa-kun-naa bi-hee ʻaa-li-meen.

21:52.text: ʹIẓ q̣aa-la li-ʹa-bee-hi wa-q̣aw-mi-hee maa- haa-ẓi-hit- ta-maa-s̤ee-lul- la-teee ʹañ-tum la-haa ʻaa-ki-foon.

21:54.text: Q̣aa-la la-q̣ad kuñ-tum ʹañ-tum wa-ʹaa-baaa-ʹu-kum fee ḍa-laa-lim- mu-been.

21:55.text: Q̣aa-looo ʹa-jiʹ-ta-naa bil-Ḥaq̣-q̣i ʹam ʹañ-ta mi-nal- laa-ʻi-been.

21:56.text: Q̣aa-la bar- Rab-bu-kum Rab-bus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍil- la-ẓee fa-ṭa-ra-hunn: Wa-ʹa-na ʻa-laa ẓaa-li-kum- mi-nash- shaa-hi-deen.

21:57.text: Wa-tal-laa-hi la-ʹa-kee-dan-na ʹaṣ-naa-ma-kum baʻ-da ʹañ- tu-wal-loo mud-bi-reen.

21:58.text: Fa-ja-ʻa-la-hum ja-ẓaa-ẓan ʹil-laa ka-bee-ral- la-hum la-ʻal-la-hum ʹi-lay-hi yar-ji-ʻoon.

21:59.text: Q̣aa-loo mañ- fa-ʻa-la haa-ẓaa bi-ʹaa-li-ha-ti-naaa ʹin-na-hoo la-mi-naz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen!

21:60.text: Q̣aa-loo sa-miʻ-naa fa-tañy- yaẓ-ku-ru-hum yu-q̣aa-lu la-hooo ʹIb-raa-heem.

21:61.text: Q̣aa-loo faʹ-too bi-hee ʻa-laaa ʹaʻ-yu-nin- naa-si la-ʻal-la-hum yash-ha-doon.

21:62.text: Q̣aa-looo ʹa-ʹañ-ta fa-ʻal-ta haa-ẓaa bi-ʹaa-li-ha-ti-naa yaaa-ʹIb-raa-heem?

21:63.text: Q̣aa-la bal fa-ʻa-la-hoo ka-bee-ru-hum haa-ẓaa fas-ʹa-loo-hum ʹiñ- kaa-noo yañ-ṭi-q̣oon!

21:64.text: Fa-ra-ja-ʻooo ʹi-laaa ʹañ-fu-si-him fa-q̣aa-looo ʹin-na-kum ʹañ-tu-muz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-moon.

21:65.text: S̤um-ma nu-ki-soo ʻa-laa ru-ʹoo-si-him: la-q̣ad ʻa-lim-ta maa- haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi yañ-ṭi-q̣oon!

21:66.text: Q̣aa-la ʹa-fa-taʻ-bu-doo-na miñ doo-nil- laa-hi maa laa- yañ-fa-ʻu-kum shay-ʹañw- wa-laa- ya-ḍur-ru-kum?

21:67.text: ʹUf-fil- la-kum wa-li-maa taʻ-bu-doo-na miñ- doo-nil- laah! ʹA-fa-laa taʻ-q̣i-loon?

21:68.text: Q̣aa-loo ḥar-ri-q̣oo-hu wañ-ṣu-rooo ʹaa-li-ha-ta-kum ʹiñ- kuñ-tum faa-ʻi-leen!

21:69.text: Q̣ul-naa yaa-Naa-ru koo-nee bar-dañw- wa-sa-laa-man ʻa-laaa ʹIb-raa-heem!

21:71.text: Wa-naj-jay-naa-hu wa-Loo-ṭan ʹi-lal- ʹar-ḍil- la-tee baa-rak-naa fee-haa lil-ʻaa-la-meem.

21:72.text: Wa-wa-hab-naa la-hooo ʹIs-ḥaaq̣: wa-Yaʻ-q̣oo-ba naa-fi-lah: wa-kul-lañ- ja-ʻal-naa Ṣaa-li-ḥeen.

21:73.text: Wa-ja-ʻal-naa-hum ʹA-ʹim-ma-tañy- yah-doo-na bi-ʹAm-ri-naa wa-ʹaw-ḥay-naaa ʹi-lay-him fiʻ-lal- khay-raa-ti wa-ʹi-q̣aa-maṣ- Ṣa-laa-ti wa-ʹee-taaa-ʹaz- Za-kaah; wa-kaa-noo la-naa ʻaa-bi-deen.

21:74.text: Wa-Loo-ṭan ʹaa-tay-naa-hu Ḥuk-mañw- Wa-ʻIl-mañw- Wa-naj-jay-naa-hu mi-nal- q̣ar-ya-til- la-tee kaa-nat- taʻ-ma-lul- kha-baaa-ʹis̤. ʹin-na-hum kaa-noo q̣aw-ma Saw-ʹiñ- faa-si-q̣een.

21:75.text: Wa-ʹad-khal-naa-hu fee Raḥ-ma-ti-naa: ʹin-na-hoo mi-naṣ- Ṣaa-li-ḥeen.

21:76.text: Wa-Noo-ḥan ʹiz naa-daa miñ- q̣ab-lu fas-ta-jab-naa la-hoo fa-naj-jay-naa-hu wa-ʹah-la-hoo mi-nal- kar-bil- ʻa-z̤̣eem.

21:77.text: Wa-na-ṣar-naa-hu mi-nal- q̣aw-mil- la-ẓee-na kaẓ-ẓa-boo bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa: ʹin-na-hum kaa-noo q̣aw-ma Saw-ʹiñ- fa-ʹag̣-raq̣-naa-hum ʹaj-ma-ʻeen.

21:78.text: Wa-Daa-woo-da wa-Su-lay-maa-na ʹiẓ yaḥ-ku-maa-ni fil- ḥar-s̤i ʹiẓ na-fa-shat fee-hi g̣a-na-mul- q̣awm: wa-kun-naa li-ḥuk-mi-him Shaa-hi-deen.

21:79.text: Fa-fah-ham-naa-haa Su-lay-maan: wa-kul-lan ʹaa-tay-naa Ḥuk-mañw- waʻIl-maa; wa-sakh-khar-naa ma-ʻa Daa-woo-dal- ji-baa-la yu-sab-biḥ-na waṭ-ṭayr: wa-kun-naa faa-ʻi-leen.

21:80.text: Wa-ʻal-lam-naa-hu ṣan-ʻa-ta la-boo-sil- la-kum li-tuḥ-ṣi-na-kum- mim- baʹ-si-kum: fa-hal ʹañ-tum shaa-ki-roon?

21:81.text: Wa-li-Su-lay-maa-nar- ree-ḥa ʻaa-ṣi-fa-tañ taj-ree bi-ʹam-ri-heee ʹi-lal- ʹar-ḍil- la-tee baa-rak-naa fee-haa: wa- kun-naa bi-kul-li shay-ʹin ʻaa-li-meen.

21:82.text: Wa-mi-nash- sha-yaa-ṭee-ni mañy- ya-g̣oo-ṣoo-na la-hoo wa-yaʻ-ma-loo-na ʻa-ma-lañ- doo-na ẓaa-lik; wa-kun-naa la-hum Ḥaa-fi-z̤̣een.

21:83.text: Wa-ʹAy-yoo-ba ʹiẓ naa-daa Rab-ba-hooo ʹan-nee mas-sa-ni-yaḍ- ḍur-ru wa-ʹAñ-ta ʹAr-ḥa-mur- raa-ḥi-meen.

21:84.text: Fas-ta-jab-naa la-hoo fa-ka-shaf-naa maa- bi-hee miñ- ḍur-riñw- wa-ʹaa-tay-naa-hu ʹah-la-hoo wa-mis̤-la-hum- ma-ʻa-hum Raḥ-ma-tam- min ʻIñ-di-naa wa-ẓik-raa lil-ʻaa-bi-deen.

21:85.text: Wa-ʹIs-maa-ʻee-la wa-ʹId-ree-sa wa-Ẓal- kifl: kul-lum- mi-naṣ- Ṣaa-bi-reen;

21:86.text: Wa-ʹad-khal-naa-hum fee Raḥ-ma-ti-naa: ʹin-na-hum- mi-naṣ- Ṣaa-li-ḥeen.

21:87.text: Wa-Ẓan- Noo-ni ʹiẓ- ẓa-ha-ba mu-g̣aa-ḍi-bañ fa-Z̤̣an-na ʹal- lan- naq̣-di-ra ʻa-lay-hi fa-naa-daa fiz̤̣- z̤̣u-lu-maa-ti ʹal- ˹Laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laaa ʹAñ-ta Sub-ḥaa-na-ka ʹin-nee kuñ-tu mi-naz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen˺!

21:88.text: Fas-ta-jab-naa la-hoo wa-naj-jay-naa-hu mi-nal- g̣amm: wa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka nuñ-jil- Muʹ-mi-neen.

21:89.text: Wa-Za-ka-riy-yaaa ʹiẓ naa-daa Rab-ba-hoo Rab-bi laa- ta-ẓar-nee far-dañw- waʹAñ-ta Khay-rul- waa-ri-s̤een.

21:90.text: Fas-ta-jab-naa la-hoo wa-wa-hab-naa la-hoo Yaḥ-yaa wa-ʹaṣ-laḥ-naa la-hoo zaw-jah. ʹIn-na-hum kaa-noo yu-saa-ri-ʻoo-na fil- khay-raa-ti wa-yad-ʻoo-na-naa ra-g̣a-bañw- wa-ra-ha-baa: wa-kaa-noo la-naa khaa-shi-ʻeen.

21:91.text: Wal-la-teee ʹaḥ-ṣa-nat far-ja-haa fa-na-fakh-naa fee-haa mir- Roo-ḥi-naa wa-ja-ʻal-naa-haa wab-na-haaa ʹAa-ya-tal- lil-ʻaa-la-meen.

21:92.text: ʹIn-na haa-ẓi-heee ʹum-ma-tu-kum ʹUm-ma-tañw- Waa-ḥi-da-tañw- Wa-ʹA-na Rab-bu-kum faʻ-bu-doon.

21:93.text: Wa-ta-q̣aṭ-ṭa-ʻooo ʹam-ra-hum̃- bay-na-hum: kul-lun ʹi-lay-naa raa-ji-ʻoon.

21:94.text: Fa-mañy- yaʻ-mal mi-naṣ- Ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti wa-hu-wa Muʹ-mi-nuñ fa-laa kuf-raa-na li-saʻ-yih: wa-ʹIn-naa la-hoo ka-ti-boon.

21:95.text: Wa-ḥa-raa-mun ʻa-laa q̣ar-ya-tin ʹah-lak-naa-haaa ʹan-na-hum laa- yar-ji-ʻoon.

21:96.text: Hat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa fu-ti-ḥat Yaʹ-joo-ju wa-Maʹ-joo-ju wa-hum- miñ- kul-li ḥa-da-biñy- yañ-si-loon.

21:97.text: Waq̣-ta-ra-bal- Waʻ-dul- Ḥaq̣-q̣u fa-ʹi-ẓaa hi-ya shaa-khi-ṣa-tun ʹab-ṣaa-rul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo: yaa-way-la-naa q̣ad kun-naa fee g̣af-la-tim- min haa-ẓaa bal kun-naa z̤̣aa-li-meen!

21:98.text: ʹIn-na-kum wa-maa taʻ-bu-doo-na miñ doo-nil- laa-hi ḥa-ṣa-bu Ja-han-nam! ʹañ-tum la-haa waa-ri-doon!

21:99.text: Law kaa-na haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi ʹaa-li-ha-tam- maa wa-ra-doo-haa! wa-kul-luñ- fee-haa khaa-li-doon.

21:100.text: La-hum fee-haa za-fee-ruñw- wa-hum fee-haa laa- yas-ma-ʻoon.

21:101.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na sa-ba-q̣at la-hum- min-nal- Ḥus-naaa ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka ʻan-haa mub-ʻa-doon.

21:102.text: Laa- yas-ma-ʻoo-na ḥa-see-sa-haa: wa-hum fee mash- ta-hat ʹañ-fu-su-hum khaa-li-doon.

21:103.text: Laa- yaḥ-zu-nu-hu-mul- Fa-za-ʻul- ʹAk-ba-ru wa-ta-ta-laq̣-q̣aa-hu-mul- ma-laaa-ʹi-kah: haa-ẓaa Yaw-mu-ku-mul- la-ẓee kuñ-tum too-ʻa-doon.

21:104.text: Yaw-ma naṭ-wis- sa-maaa-ʹa ka-ṭay-yis- si-jil-li lil-ku-tub: ka-maa ba-daʹ-naaa ʹaw-wa-la khal-q̣in- nu-ʻee-duh: waʻ-dan ʻa-lay-naa: ʹIn-naa kun-naa faa-ʻi-leen.

21:105.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ka-tab-na fiz- Za-boo-ri mim- baʻ-diẓ- Ẓik-ri ʹan-nal- ʹar-ḍa ya-ri-s̤u-haa ʻI-baa-di-yaṣ- Ṣaa-li-ḥoon.

21:106.text: ʹIn-na fee haa-ẓaa la-Ba-laa-g̣al- li-q̣aw-min ʻAa-bi-deen.

21:108.text: Q̣ul ʹin-na-maa yoo-ḥaaa ʹi-lay-ya ʹan-na-maaa ʹI-laa-hu-kum ʹI-laa-huñw- Waa-ḥid: fa-hal ʹañ-tum- Mus-li-moon?

21:109.text: Fa-ʹiñ- ta-wal-law fa-q̣ul ʹaa-ẓañ-tu-kum ʻa-laa sa-waaaʹ; wa-ʹin ʹad-reee ʹa-q̣a-ree-bun ʹam̃- ba-ʻee-dum- maa too-ʻa-doon.
