21:110.text: ʹIn-na-hoo yaʻ-la-mul- jah-ra mi-nal- q̣aw-li wa-yaʻ-la-mu maa- tak-tu-moon.

21:111.text: Wa-ʹin ʹad-ree la-ʻal-la-hoo fit-na-tul- la-kum wa-ma-taa-ʻun ʹi-laa ḥeen.

21:112.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-biḥ- kum̃- bil-Ḥaq̣q̣! Wa-Rab-bu-nar- Raḥ-maa-nul- Mus-ta-ʻaa-nu ʻa-laa maa- ta-ṣi-foon!

22:1.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-han- naa-sut- ta-q̣oo Rab-ba-kum! ʹIn-na zal-za-la-tas- Saa-ʻa-ti shay-ʹun ʻa-z̤̣eem!

22:2.text: Yaw-ma ta-raw-na-haa taẓ-ha-lu kul-lu mur-ḍi-ʻa-tin ʻam-maaa ʹar-ḍa-ʻat wa-ta-ḍa-ʻu kul-lu ẓaa-ti ḥam-lin ḥam-la-haa wa-ta-ran- naa-sa su-kaa-raa wa-maa hum̃- bi-su-kaa-raa wa-laa-kin-na ʻa-ẓaa-bal- laa-hi sha-deed.

22:3.text: Wa-mi-nan- naa-si mañy- yu-jaa-di-lu fil- laa-hi bi-g̣ay-ri ʻil-miñw- Wa-yat-ta-bi-ʻu kul-la shay-ṭaa-nim- ma-reed!

22:4.text: Ku-ti-ba ʻa-lay-hi ʹan-na-hoo mañ- ta-wal-laa-hu fa-ʹan-na-hoo yu-ḍil-lu-hoo wa-yah-dee-hi ʹi-laa ʻA-ẓaa-bis- Sa-ʻeer.

22:5.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-han- naa-su ʹiñ kuñ-tum fee ray-bim- mi-nal- Baʻ-s̤i fa-ʹin-naa kha-laq̣-naa-kum- miñ- tu-raa-biñ- s̤um-ma min- nuṭ-fa-tiñ s̤um-ma min ʻa-la-q̣a-tiñ s̤um-ma mim- muḍ-g̣a-tim- mu-khal-la-q̣a-tiñw- wa-g̣ay-ri mu-khal-la-q̣a-til- li-nu-bay-yi-na la-kum. Wa-nu-q̣ir-ru fil- ʹar-ḥaa-mi maa- na-shaaa-ʹu ʹi-laaa ʹa-ja-lim- mu-sam-mañ- s̤um-ma nukh-ri-ju-kum ṭif-lañ- s̤um-ma li-tab-lu-g̣ooo ʹa-shud-da-kum; wa-miñ-kum- mañy- yu-ta-waf-faa wa-miñ-kum mañy- yu-rad-du ʹi-laaa ʹar-ẓa-lil- ʻu-mu-ri li-kay-laa yaʻ-la-ma mim- baʻ-di ʻil-miñ- shay-ʹaa. Wa-ta-ral- ʹar-ḍa haa-mi-da-tañ- fa-ʹi-ẓaaa ʹañ-zal-naa ʻa-lay-hal- maaa-ʹah- taz-zat wa-ra-bat wa-ʹam-ba-tat miñ- kul-li zaw-jim- ba-heej.

22:6.text: Ẓaa-li-ka bi-ʹan-nal- laa-ha Hu-wal- Ḥaq̣-q̣u wa-ʹan-na-hoo yuḥ-yil- maw-taa wa-ʹan-na-hoo ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ Q̣a-deer.

22:7.text: Wa-ʹan-nas- Saa-ʻa-ta ʹaa-ti-ya-tul- laa ray-ba fee-ha wa-ʹan-nal- laa-ha yab-ʻa-s̤u mañ- fil- q̣u-boor.

22:8.text: Wa-mi-nan- naa-si mañy- yu-jaa-di-lu fil- laa-hi bi-g̣ay-ri ʻil-miñw- wa-laa- Hu-dañw- Wa-laa- Kit-ta-bim- Mu-neer,

22:9.text: S̤aa-ni-ya ʻiṭ-fi-hee li-yu-ḍil-la ʻañ Sa-bee-lil- laah: la-hoo fid- dun-yaa khiz-yuñw- wa-nu-ẓee-q̣u-hoo Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti ʻA-ẓaa-bal- Ḥa-reeq̣.

22:10.text: Ẓaa-li-ka bi-maa q̣ad-da-mat ya-daa-ka wa-ʹan-nal- laa-ha lay-sa bi-z̤̣al-laa-mil- lil-ʻa-beed.

22:11.text: Wa-mi-nan- naa-si mañy- yaʻ-bu-dul- laa-ha ʻa-laa ḥarf: fa-ʹin ʹa-ṣaa-ba-hoo khay-ru-niṭ- ma-ʹan-na bih; wa-ʹin ʹa-ṣaa-bat-hu fit-na-tu-niñ- q̣a-la-ba ʻa-laa waj-hih; kha-si-rad- dun-yaa wal-ʹAa-khi-rah; ẓaa-li-ka hu-wal- khus-raa-nul- Mu-been.

22:12.text: Yad-ʻoo miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi maa laa- ya-ḍur-ru-hoo wa-maa- laa- yañ-fa-ʻuh: ẓaa-li-ka hu-waḍ- ḍa-laa-lul- ba-ʻeed!

22:13.text: Yad-ʻoo la-mañ ḍar-ru-hooo ʹaq̣-ra-bu min- naf-ʻih: la-biʹ-sal- maw-laa wa-la-biʹ-sal- ʻa-sheer!

22:14.text: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha yud-khi-lul- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- Ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti Jan-naa-tiñ taj-ree miñ taḥ-ti-hal- ʹan-haar: ʹin-nal- laa-ha yaf-ʻa-lu maa- yu-reed.

22:15.text: Mañ kaa-na ya-z̤̣un-nu ʹal- lañy- yañ-ṣu-ra-hul- laa-hu fid- dun-yaa wal-ʹAa-khi-ra-ti fal-yam-dud bi-sa-ba-bin ʹi-las- sa-maaa-ʹi s̤um-mal- yaq̣-ṭaʻ fal-yañ-z̤̣ur hal yuẓ-hi-ban-na kay-du-hoo maa- ya-g̣eez̤̣!

22:16.text: Wa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka ʹañ-zal-naa-hu ʹAa-yaa-tim- Bay-yi-naa-tiñw- Wa-ʹan-nal- laa-ha yah-dee mañy- yu-reed!

22:17.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wal-la-ẓee-na haa-doo waṣ-Ṣaa-bi-ʹee-na wan-Na-ṣaa-raa wal-Ma-joo-sa wal-la-ẓee-na ʹash-ra-kooo ʹin-nal- laa-ha yaf-ṣi-lu bay-na-hum Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-mah: ʹin-nal- laa-ha ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ Sha-heed.

22:18.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹan-nal- laa-ha yas-ju-du la-hoo mañ fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-mañ fil- ʹar-ḍi wash-sham-su wal-q̣a-ma-ru wan-nu-joo-mu wal-ji-baa-lu wash-sha-ja-ru wad-da-waaab-bu wa-ka-s̤ee-rum- mi-nan- naas? Wa-ka-s̤ee-run ḥaq̣-q̣a ʻa-lay-hil- ʻA-ẓaab. Wa-mañy- yu-hi-nil- laa-hu fa-maa la-hoo mim- muk-rim: ʹin-nal- laa-ha yaf-ʻa-lu maa- ya-shaaaʹ.

22:19.text: Haa-ẓaa-ni khaṣ-maa-nikh- ta-ṣa-moo fee Rab-bi-him: fal-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo q̣uṭ-ṭi-ʻat la-hum s̤i-yaa-bum- min- Naar: yu-ṣab-bu miñ- faw-q̣i ru-ʹoo-si-hi-mul- ḥa-meem.

22:20.text: Yuṣ-ha-ru bi-hee maa- fee bu-ṭoo-ni-him wal-ju-lood.

22:22.text: Kul-la-maaa ʹa-raa-dooo ʹañy- yakh-ru-joo min-haa min g̣am-min ʹu-ʻee-doo fee-haa wa-ẓoo-q̣oo ʻa-ẓaa-bal- Ḥa-reeq̣!

22:23.text: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha yud-khi-lul- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- Ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti Jan-naa-tiñ taj-ree miñ- taḥ-ti-hal- ʹan-haa-ru yu-ḥal-law-na fee-haa min ʹa-saa-wi-ra miñ- ẓa-ha-biñw- wa-luʹ-lu-ʹaa: wa-li-baa-su-hum fee-haa ḥa-reer.

22:24.text: Wa-hu-dooo ʹi-laṭ- Ṭay-yi-bi mi-nal- Q̣aw-li wa-hu-dooo ʹi-laa Ṣi-raa-ṭil- Ḥa-meed.

22:25.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo wa-ya-ṣud-doo-na ʻañ- Sa-bee-lil- laa-hi wal-Mas-ji-dil- Ḥa-raa-mil- la-ẓee ja-ʻal-naa-hu lin-naa-si sa-waaa-ʹa-nil- ʻaa-ki-fu fee-hi wal-baad. Wa-mañy- yu-rid fee-hi bi-ʹil-ḥaa-dim- bi-z̤̣ul-min- nu-ẓiq̣-hu min ʻA-ẓaa-bin ʹa-leem.

22:26.text: Wa-ʹiẓ baw-waʹ-naa li-ʹIb-raa-hee-ma Ma-kaa-nal- Bay-ti ʹal- laa tush-rik bee shay-ʹañw- wa-ṭah-hir Bay-ti-ya liṭ-Ṭaaa-ʹi-fee-na wal-Q̣aaa-ʹi-mee-na war-Ruk-ka-ʻis- Su-jood.

22:27.text: Wa-ʹaẓ-ẓin fin- naa-si bil-Ḥaj-ji yaʹ-too-ka ri-jaa-lañw- wa-ʻa-laa kul-li ḍaa-mi-riñy- yaʹ-tee-na miñ- kul-li faj-jin ʻa-meeq̣;

22:28.text: Li-yash-ha-doo ma-naa-fi-ʻa la-hum wa-yaẓ-ku-rus- mal- laa-hi feee ʹAy-yaa-mim- Maʻ-loo-maa-tin ʻa-laa maa- ra-za-q̣a-hum- mim- ba-hee-ma-til- ʹan-ʻaam: fa-ku-loo min-haa wa-ʹaṭ-ʻi-mul- baaa-ʹi-sal- fa-q̣eer.

22:29.text: S̤um-mal- yaq̣-ḍoo ta-fa-s̤a-hum wal-yoo-foo nu-ẓoo-ra-hum wal-yaṭ-ṭaw-wa-foo bil-Bay-til- ʻA-teeq̣.

22:30.text: Ẓaa-li-ka wa-mañy- yu-ʻaz̤̣-z̤̣im Ḥu-ru-maa-til- laa-hi fa-hu-wa khay-rul- la-hoo ʻiñ-da Rab-bih. Wa-ʹu-ḥil-lat la-ku-mul- ʹan-ʻaa-mu ʹil-laa maa- yut-laa ʻa-lay-kum faj-ta-ni-bur- rij-sa mi-nal- ʹaw-s̤aa-ni waj-ta-ni-boo q̣aw-laz- zoor

22:31.text: Ḥu-na-faaa-ʹa lil-laa-hi g̣ay-ra mush-ri-kee-na bih: wa-mañy- yush-rik bil-laa-hi fa-ka-ʹan-na-maa khar-ra mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi fa-takh-ṭa-fu-hut- ṭay-ru ʹaw tah-wee bi-hir- ree-ḥu fee ma-kaa-niñ- sa-ḥeeq̣.

22:32.text: Ẓaa-lik: wa-mañy- yu-ʻaz̤̣-z̤̣im sha-ʻaaa-ʹi-ral- laa-hi fa-ʹin-na-haa miñ- taq̣-wal- q̣u-loob.

22:33.text: la-kum fee-haa ma-naa-fi-ʻu ʹi-laaa ʹa-ja-lim- mu-sam-mañ- s̤um-ma ma-ḥil-lu-haaa ʹi-lal- Bay-til- ʻA-teeq̣.

22:34.text: Wa-li-kul-li ʹum-ma-tiñ- ja-ʻal-naa mañ-sa-kal- li-yaẓ-ku-rus- mal- laa-hi ʻa-laa maa- ra-za-q̣a-hum- mim- ba-hee-ma-til- ʹan-ʻaam. Fa-ʹI-laa-hu-kum ʹI-laa-huñw- Waa-ḥi-duñ- fa-la-hooo ʹas-li-moo: wa-bash-shi-ril- Mukh-bi-teen,

22:35.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na ʹi-ẓaa ẓu-ki-ral- laa-hu wa-ji-lat q̣u-loo-bu-hum waṣ-Ṣaa-bi-ree-na ʻa-laa maaa ʹa-ṣaa-ba-hum wal-mu-q̣ee-miṣ- Ṣa-laa-ti wa-mim-maa ra-zaq̣-naa-hum yuñ-fi-q̣oon.

22:36.text: Wal-bud-na ja-ʻal-naa-haa la-kum- miñ- Sha-ʻaaa-ʹi-ril- laa-hi la-kum fee-haa khayr: faẓ-ku-rus- mal- laa-hi ʻa-lay-haa ṣa-waaaff: fa-ʹi-ẓaa wa-ja-bat ju-noo-bu-haa fa-ku-loo min-haa wa-ʹaṭ-ʻi-mul- q̣aa-ni-ʻa wal-muʻ-tarr: ka-ẓaa-li-ka sakh-khar-naa-haa la-kum la-ʻal-la-kum tash-ku-roon.

22:37.text: Lañy- ya-naa-lal- laa-ha lu-ḥoo-mu-haa wa-laa di-maaa-ʹu-haa wa-laa-kiñy- ya-naa-lu-hut- Taq̣-waa miñ-kum; ka-ẓaa-li-ka sakh-kha-ra-haa la-kum li-tu-kab-bi-rul- laa-ha ʻa-laa maa- ha-daa-kum: wa-bash-shi-ril- Muḥ-si-neen.

22:38.text: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha yu-daa-fi-ʻu ʻa-nil- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo: ʹin-nal- laa-ha laa- yu-ḥib-bu kul-la khaw-waa-niñ- ka-foor.

22:39.text: ʹU-ẓi-na lil-la-ẓee-na yu-q̣aa-ta-loo-na bi-ʹan-na-hum z̤̣u-li-moo; wa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha ʻa-laa naṣ-ri-him la-Q̣a-deer;

22:40.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na ʹukh-ri-joo miñ- di-yaa-ri-him̃- bi-g̣ay-ri ḥaq̣-q̣in ʹil-laaa ʹañy- ya-q̣oo-loo Rab-bu-nal-laah. Wa-law laa- daf-ʻul- laa-hin- naa-sa baʻ-ḍa-hum̃- bi-baʻ-ḍil- la-hud-di-mat ṣa-waa-mi-ʹu wa-bi-ya-ʻuñw- wa-ṣa-la-waa-tuñw- wa-ma-saa-ji-du yuẓ-ka-ru fee-has- mul- laa-hi ka-s̤ee-raa. Wa-la-yañ-ṣu-ran-nal- laa-hu mañy- yañ-ṣu-ruh; ʹin-nal- laa-ha la-Q̣a-wiy-yun ʻA-zeez.

22:41.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na ʹim- mak-kan-naa-hum fil- ʹar-ḍi ʹa-q̣aa-muṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta wa-ʹaa-ta-wuz- Za-kaa-ta wa-ʹa-ma-roo bil-maʻ-roo-fi wa-na-haw ʻa-nil- muñ-kar: wa-lil-laa-hi ʻaa-q̣i-ba-tul- ʹu-moor.

22:42.text: Wa-ʹiñy- yu-kaẓ-ẓi-boo-ka fa-q̣ad kaẓ-ẓa-bat q̣ab-la-hum Q̣aw-mu Noo-ḥiñw- waʻAa-duñw- wa-S̤a-mood;

22:44.text: Wa-ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bu mad-yan; wa-kuẓ-ẓi-ba Moo-saa fa-ʹam-lay-tu lil-kaa-fi-ree-na s̤um-ma ʹa-khaẓ-tu-hum: fa-kay-fa kaa-na na-keer!

22:45.text: Fa-ka-ʹay-yim- miñ- q̣ar-ya-tin ʹah-lak-naa-haa wa-hi-ya z̤̣aa-li-ma-tuñ- fa-hi-ya khaa-wi-ya-tun ʻa-laa ʻu-roo-shi-haa wa-biʹ-rim- mu-ʻaṭ-ṭa-la-tiñw- wa-q̣aṣ-rim- ma-sheed?

22:46.text: ʹA-fa-lam ya-see-roo fil- ʹar-ḍi fa-ta-koo-na la-hum q̣u-loo-buñy- yaʻ-q̣i-loo-na bi-haaa ʹaw ʹaa-ẓaa-nuñy- yas-ma-ʻoo-na bi-haa? Fa-ʹin-na-haa laa- taʻ-mal- ʹab-ṣaa-ru wa-laa-kiñ taʻ-mal- q̣u-loo-bul- la-tee fiṣ- ṣu-door.

22:47.text: Wa-yas-taʻ-ji-loo-na-ka bil-ʻA-ẓaa-bi wa-lañy- yukh-li-fal- laa-hu waʻ-daḥ Wa-ʹin-na yaw-man ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-ka ka-ʹal-fi sa-na-tim- mim-maa ta-ʻud-doon.

22:48.text: Wa-ka-ʹay-yim- miñ- q̣ar-ya-tin ʹam-lay-tu la-haa wa-hi-ya z̤̣aa-li-ma-tuñ s̤um-ma ʹa-khaẓ-tu-haa. Wa-ʹi-lay-yal- ma-ṣeer.

22:49.text: Q̣ul Yaaa-ʹay-yu-han- naa-su ʹin-na-maaa ʹa-na la-kum na-ẓee-rum- mu-been.

22:50.text: Fal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- Ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti la-hum- mag̣h-fi-ra-tuñw- wa-riz-q̣uñ- ka-reem.

22:51.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na sa-ʻaw feee ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa mu-ʻaa-ji-zee-na ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bul- Ja-ḥeem.

22:52.text: Wa-maaa ʹar-sal-naa miñ q̣ab-li-ka mir- ra-soo-liñw- wa-laa- na-biy-yin ʹil-laaa ʹi-ẓaa ta-man-naaa ʹal-q̣ash- Shay-ṭaa-nu feee ʹum-niy-ya-tih: fa-yañ-sa-khul- laa-hu maa- yul-q̣ish- Shay-ṭaa-nu s̤um-ma yuḥ-ki-mul- laa-hu ʹAa-yaa-tih: wal-laa-hu ʻA-lee-mun Ḥa-keem:

22:53.text: Li-yaj-ʻa-la maa- yul-q̣ish- Shay-ṭaa-nu fit-na-tal- lil-la-z̤̣ee-na fee q̣u-loo-bi-him- ma-ra-ḍuñw- wal-q̣aa-si-ya-ti q̣u-loo-bu-hum: wa-ʹin-naz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-mee-na la-fee shi-q̣aa-q̣im- ba-ʻeed:

22:54.text: Wa-li-yaʻ-la-mal- la-ẓee-na ʹoo-tul- ʻll-ma ʹan-na-hul- Ḥaq̣-q̣u mir- Rab-bi-ka fa-yuʹ-mi-noo bi-hee fa-tukh-bi-ta la-hoo q̣u-loo-bu-hum: wa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha la-Haa-dil- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nooo ʹi-laa Ṣi-raa-ṭim- Mus-ta-q̣eem.

22:55.text: Wa-laa ya-zaa-lul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo fee mir-ya-tim- min-hu ḥat-taa taʹ-ti-ya-hu-mus- Saa-ʻa-tu bag̣-ta-tan ʹaw yaʹ-ti-ya-hum ʹa-ẓaa-bu Yaw-min ʻA-q̣eem.

22:56.text: ʹAl-Mul-ku Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓil- lil-laah: yaḥ-ku-mu bay-na-hum: fal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- Ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti fee Jan-naa-tin- Na-ʻeem.

22:57.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo wa-kaẓ-ẓa-boo bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka la-hum ʻA-ẓaa-bum- mu-heen.

22:58.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na haa-ja-roo fee Sa-bee-lil- laa-hi s̤um-ma q̣u-ti-looo ʹaw maa-too la-yar-zu-q̣an-na-hu-mul- laa-hu Riz-q̣an ḥa-sa-naa: wa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha la-Hu-wa Khay-rur- raa-zi-q̣een.

22:59.text: La-yud-khi-lan-na-hum- mud-kha-lañy- yar-ḍaw-nah: wa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha la-ʻA-lee-mun Ḥa-leem.

22:60.text: Ẓaa-li-ka. Wa-man ʻaa-q̣a-ba bi-mis̤-li maa- ʻoo-q̣i-ba bi-hee s̤um-ma bu-g̣i-ya ʻa-lay-hi la-yañ-ṣu-ran-na-hul- laah: ʹin-nal- laa-ha la-ʻA-fuw-wun G̣a-foor.

22:61.text: Ẓaa-li-ka bi-ʹan-nal- laa-ha yoo-li-jul- lay-la fin- na-haa-ri wa-yoo-li-jun- na-haa-ra fil- lay-li wa-ʹan-nal- laa-ha Sa-mee-ʻum- Ba-ṣeer.

22:62.text: Ẓaa-li-ka bi-ʹan-nal- laa-ha Hu-wal- Ḥaq̣-q̣u wa-ʹan-na maa- yad-ʻoo-na miñ- doo-ni-hee hu-wal- Baa-ṭi-lu wa-ʹan-nal- laa-ha Hu-wal- ʻA-liy-yul- Ka-beer.

22:63.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹan-nal- laa-ha ʹañ-za-la mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi maaa-ʹañ- fa-tuṣ-bi-ḥul- ʹar-ḍu mukh-ḍar-rah? ʹIn-nal- laa-ha La-ṭee-fun Kha-beer.

22:64.text: La-hoo Maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-maa fil- ʹarḍ: wa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha la-Hu-wal- G̣a-niy-yul- Ḥa-meed.

22:65.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹan-nal- laa-ha sakh-kha-ra la-kum- maa fil- ʹar-ḍi wal-ful-ka taj-ree fil- baḥ-ri bi-ʹam-rih? Wa-yum-si-kus- sa-maaa-ʹa ʹañ- ta-q̣a-ʻa ʻa-lal- ʹar-ḍi ʹil-laa bi-ʹiẓ-nih: ʹin-nal- laa-ha bin-naa-si la-Ra-ʹoo-fur- Ra-ḥeem.

22:66.text: Wa-Hu-wal- la-ẓeee ʹaḥ-yaa-kum s̤um-ma yu-mee-tu-kum s̤um-ma yuḥ-yee-kum: ʹin-nal- ʹiñ-saa-na la-ka-foor!

22:67.text: Li-kul-li ʹum-ma-tiñ- ja-ʻal-naa mañ-sa-kan hum naa-si-koo-hu fa-laa yu-naa-zi-ʻun-na-ka fil- ʹam-ri wad-ʻu ʹi-laa Rab-bik; ʹin-na-ka la-ʻa-laa Hu-dam- Mus-ta-q̣eem.

22:68.text: Wa-ʹiñ- jaa-da-loo-ka fa-q̣u-lil- laa-hu ʹAʻ-la-mu bi-maa taʻ-ma-loon.

22:69.text: ʹAl-laa-hu yaḥ-ku-mu bay-na-kum Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti fee-ma kuñ-tum fee-hi takh-ta-li-foon.

22:70.text: ʹA-lam taʻ-lam ʹan-nal- laa-ha yaʻ-la-mu maa- fis- sa-maaa-ʹi wal-ʹarḍ? ʹIn-na ẓaa-li-ka fee Ki-taab: ʹin-na ẓaa-li-ka ʻa-lal- laa-hi ya-seer.

22:71.text: Wa-yaʻ-bu-doo-na miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi maa- lam yu-naz-zil bi-hee sul-ṭaa-nañw- wa-maa- lay-sa la-hum̃- bi-hee ʻilm: wa-maa liz̤̣-z̤̣aa-li-mee-na min- na-ṣeer.

22:72.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa tut-laa ʻa-lay-him ʹAa-yaa-tu-naa Bay-yi-naa-tiñ- taʻ-ri-fu fee wu-joo-hil- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-rul- muñ-kar! Ya-kaa-doo-na yas-ṭoo-na bil-la-ẓee-na yat-loo-na ʻa-lay-him ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa. Q̣ul ʹa-fa-ʹu-nab-bi-ʹu-kum̃- bi-shar-rim- miñ- ẓaa-li-kum? ʹAn-Naar! Wa-ʻa-da-hal- laa-hul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo! Wa-biʹ-sal- ma-ṣeer.

22:73.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-han- naa-su ḍu-ri-ba ma-s̤a-luñ- fas-ta-mi-ʻoo lah! ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na tad-ʻoo-na miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi lañy- yakh-lu-q̣oo ẓu-baa-bañw- wa-la-wij- ta-ma-ʻoo lah! Wa-ʹiñy- yas-lub-hu-muẓ- ẓu-baa-bu shay-ʹal- laa yas-tañ-q̣i-ẓoo-hu minh. Ḍa-ʻu-faṭ- ṭaa-li-bu wal-maṭ-loob!

22:74.text: Maa- q̣a-da-rul- laa-ha ḥaq̣-q̣a q̣ad-rih: ʹin-nal- laa-ha la-Q̣a-wiy-yun ʻA-zeez!

22:75.text: ʹAl-laa-hu yas-ṭa-fee mi-nal- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-ti Ru-su-lañw- Wa-mi-nan naas: ʹin-nal- laa-ha Sa-mee-ʻum- Ba-ṣeer.

22:76.text: Yaʻ-la-mu maa- bay-na ʹay-dee-him wa-maa khal-fa-hum: wa-ʹi-lal- laa-hi tur-ja-ʻul- ʹu-moor.

22:77.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nur- ka-ʻoo was-ju-doo waʻ-bu-doo Rab-ba-kum waf-ʻa-lul- khay-ra la-ʻal-la-kum tuf-li-ḥoon.

22:78.text: Wa-jaa-hi-doo fil- laa-hi ḥaq̣-q̣a ji-haa-dih. Hu-waj- ta-baa-kum wa-maa ja-ʻa-la ʻa-lay-kum fid- dee-ni min ḥa-raj; Mil-la-ta ʹa-bee-kum ʹIb-raa-heem. Hu-wa sam-maa-ku-mul- Mus-li-meen. Miñ q̣ab-lu wa-fee haa-ẓaa li-ya-koo-nar- Ra-soo-lu sha-hee-dan ʻa-lay-kum wa-ta-koo-noo shu-ha-daaa-ʹa ʻa-lan- naas! Fa-ʹa-q̣ee-muṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta wa-ʹaa-tuz- Za-kaa-ta waʻ-ta-ṣi-moo bil-laah! Hu-wa Maw-laa-kum fa-niʻ-mal- Maw-laa wa-niʻ-man- Na-ṣeer.

23:6.text: ʹIl-laa ʻa-laaa ʹaz-waa-ji-him ʹaw maa- ma-la-kat ʹay-maa-nu-hum fa-ʹin-na-hum g̣ay-ru ma-loo-meen.

23:7.text: Fa-ma-nib- ta-g̣aa wa-raaa-ʹa ẓaa-li-ka fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- ʻaa-doon;

23:11.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na ya-ri-s̤oo-nal- Fir-daws: hum fee-haa khaa-li-doon.

23:12.text: Wa-la-q̣ad kha-laq̣-nal- ʹiñ-saa-na miñ- su-laa-la-tim- miñ- ṭeen;

23:13.text: S̤um-ma ja-ʻal-naa-hu nuṭ-fa-tañ- fee q̣a-raa-rim- ma-keen;

23:14.text: S̤um-ma kha-laq̣-nan- nuṭ-fa-ta ʻa-la-q̣a-tañ- fa-kha-laq̣-nal- ʻa-la-q̣a-ta muḍ-g̣a-tañ- fa-kha-laq̣-nal- muḍ-g̣a-ta ʻi-z̤̣aa-mañ- fa-ka-saw-nal- ʻi-z̤̣aa-ma laḥ-maa; s̤um-ma ʹañ-shaʹ-naa-hu khal-q̣an ʹaa-khar. Fa-ta-baa-ra-kal- laa-hu ʹAḥ-sa-nul- khaa-li-q̣een!

23:17.text: Wa-la-q̣ad kha-laq̣-naa faw-q̣a-kum sab-ʻa ṭa-raaa-ʹi-q̣a wa-maa kun-naa ʻa-nil- khal-q̣i g̣aa-fi-leen.

23:18.text: Wa-ʹañ-zal-naa mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi maaa-ʹam- bi-q̣a-da-riñ fa-ʹas-kan-naa-hu fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-ʹIn-naa ʻa-laa ẓa-haa-bim- bi-hee la-Q̣aa-di-roon.

23:19.text: Fa-ʹañ-shaʹ-naa la-kum̃- bi-hee jan-naa-tim- min- na-khee-liñw- wa-ʹaʻ-naab. La-kum fee-haa fa-waa-ki-hu ka-s̤ee-ra-tuñw- wa-min-haa taʹ-ku-loon,

23:20.text: Wa-sha-ja-ra-tañ- takh-ru-ju miñ- Ṭoo-ri Say-naaa-ʹa tam-bu-tu bid-duh-ni wa-ṣib-g̣il-lil- ʹaa-ki-leen.

23:21.text: Wa-ʹin-na la-kum fil- ʹan-ʻaa-mi la-ʻib-rah: nus-q̣ee-kum- mim-maa fee bu-ṭoo-ni-haa wa-la-kum fee-haa ma-naa-fi-ʻu ka-s̤ee-ra-tuñw- wa-min-haa taʹ-ku-loon;

23:23.text: Wa-la-q̣ad. ʹar-sal-naa Noo-ḥan ʹi-laa q̣aw-mi-hee fa-q̣aa-la yaa- q̣aw-miʻ-bu-dul- laa-ha maa- la-kum- min ʹi-laa-hin g̣ay-ruh. ʹA-fa-laa tat-ta-q̣oon?

23:24.text: Fa-q̣aa-lal- ma-la-ʹul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo miñ q̣aw-mi-hee maa- haa-ẓaaa ʹil-laa ba-sha-rum- mis̤-lu-kum yu-ree-du ʹañy- ya-ta-faḍ-ḍa-la ʻa-lay-kum: wa-law shaaa-ʹal- laa-hu la-ʹañ-za-la ma-laaa-ʹi-kah: maa- sa-miʻ-naa bi-haa-ẓaa feee ʹaa-baaa-ʹi-nal- ʹaw-wa-leen.

23:25.text: ʹIn hu-wa ʹil-laa ra-ju-lum- bi-hee jin-na-tuñ fa-ta-rab-ba-ṣoo bi-hee ḥat-taa ḥeen.

23:27.text: Fa-ʹaw-ḥay-naaa ʹi-lay-hi ʹa-niṣ- na-ʻil- Ful-ka bi-ʹaʻ-yu-ni-naa wa-waḥ-yi-naa fa-ʹi-ẓaa jaaa-ʹa ʹAm-ru-naa wa-faa-rat- tan-noo-ru fas-luk fee-haa miñ- kul-liñ- zaw-jay-nis̤- nay-ni wa-ʹah-la-ka ʹil-laa mañ sa-ba-q̣a ʻa-lay-hil- Q̣aw-lu min-hum: wa-laa tu-khaa-ṭib-nee fil- la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-moo; ʹin-na-hum- mug̣-ra-q̣oon.

23:28.text: Fa-ʹi-ẓas- ta-way-ta ʹañ-ta wa-mam- ma-ʻa-ka ʻa-lal- Ful-ki fa-q̣u-lil- Ḥam-du lil-laa-hil- la-ẓee naj-jaa-naa mi-nal- q̣aw-miz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen.

23:29.text: Wa-q̣ur- Rab-bi ʹañ-zil-nee muñ-za-lam- mu-baa-ra-kañw- wa-ʹAñ-ta Khay-rul- Muñ-zi-leen.

23:30.text: ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yaa-tiñw- wa-ʹiñ- kun-naa la-mub-ta-leen.

23:31.text: S̤um-ma ʹañ-shaʹ-naa mim- baʻ-di-him q̣ar-nan ʹaa-kha-reen.

23:32.text: Fa-ʹar-sal-naa fee-him ra-soo-lam- min-hum ʹa-niʻ- bu-dul- laa-ha maa- la-kum- min ʹi-laa-hin g̣ay-ruh. ʹA-fa-laa tat-ta-q̣oon?

23:33.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- ma-la-ʹu miñ q̣aw-mi-hil- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo wa-kaẓ-ẓa-boo bi-Li-q̣aaa-ʹil- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti wa-ʹat-raf-naa-hum fil- ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa maa- haa-ẓaaa ʹil-laa ba-sha-rum- mis̤-lu-kum yaʹ-ku-lu mim-maa taʹ-ku-loo-na min-hu wa-yash-ra-bu mim-maa tash-ra-boon.

23:34.text: Wa-la-ʹin ʹa-ṭaʻ-tum̃- ba-sha-ram- mis̤-la-kum ʹin-na-kum ʹi-ẓal- la-khaa-si-roon.

23:35.text: ʹA-ya-ʻi-du-kum ʹan-na-kum ʹi-ẓaa mit-tum wa-kuñ-tum tu-raa-bañw- wa-ʻi-z̤̣aa-man ʹan-na-kum- mukh-ra-joon?

23:37.text: ʹIn hi-ya ʹil-laa ḥa-yaa-tu-nad- dun-yaa na-moo-tu wa-naḥ-yaa wa-maa naḥ-noo bi-mab-ʻoo-s̤een!

23:38.text: ʹIn hu-wa ʹil-laa ra-ju-lu-nif- ta-raa ʻa-lal- laa-hi ka-ẓi-bañw- wa-maa- naḥ-nu la-hoo bi-muʹ-mi-neen!

23:41.text: Fa-ʹa-kha-ẓat-hu-muṣ- Ṣay-ḥa-tu bil-ḥaq̣-q̣i fa-ja-ʻal-naa-hum g̣u-s̤aaa-ʹaa! Fa-buʻ-dal- lil-q̣aw-miz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen!

23:42.text: S̤um-ma ʹañ-shaʹ-naa mim- baʻ-di-him q̣u-roo-nan ʹaa-kha-reen.

23:43.text: Maa- tas-bi-q̣u min ʹum-ma-tin ʹa-ja-la-haa wa-maa yas-taʹ-khi-roon.

23:44.text: S̤um-ma ʹar-sal-naa ru-su-la-naa tat-raa. Kul-la- maa jaaa-ʹa ʹum-ma-tar- ra-soo-lu-haa kaẓ-ẓa-boo-hu fa-ʹat-baʻ-naa baʻ-ḍa-hum baʻ-ḍañw- wa-ja-ʹal-naa-hum ʹa-ḥaa-dees̤: fa-buʻ-dal- li-q̣aw-mil- laa yuʹ-mi-noon!

23:45.text: S̤um-ma ʹar-sal-naa Moo-saa wa-ʹa-khaa-hu Haa-roo-na bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa wa-sul-ṭaa-nim- mu-been.

23:46.text: ʹI-laa Fir-ʻaw-na wa-ma-la-ʹi-hee fas-tak-ba-roo wa-kaa-noo q̣aw-man ʻaa-leen.

23:47.text: Fa-q̣aa-looo ʹa-nuʹ-mi-nu li-ba-sha-ray-ni mis̤-li-naa wa-q̣aw-mu-hu-maa la-naa ʻaa-bi-doon?

23:49.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹaa-tay-naa Moo-sal- Ki-taa-ba la-ʻal-la-hum yah-ta-doon.

23:50.text: Wa-ja-ʻal-nab- na Mar-ya-ma wa-ʹum-ma-hooo ʹAa-ya-tañw- Wa-ʹaa-way-naa-hu-maaa ʹi-laa rab-wa-tiñ ẓaa-ti q̣a-raa-riñw- wa-ma-ʻeen.

23:51.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-har- ru-su-lu ku-loo mi-naṭ- ṭay-yi-baa-ti waʻ-ma-loo ṣaa-li-ḥaa: ʹin-nee bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na ʻA-leem.

23:52.text: Wa-ʹin-na haa-ẓi-heee ʹum-ma-tu-kum ʹum-ma-tañw- Waa-ḥi-da-tañw- Wa-ʹA-na Rab-bu-kum fat-ta-q̣oon.

23:53.text: Fa-ta-q̣aṭ-ṭa-ʻooo ʹam-ra-hum̃- bay-na-hum zu-bu-raa: kul-lu ḥiz-bim- bi-maa la-day-him fa-ri-ḥoon.

23:55.text: ʹA-yaḥ-sa-boo-na ʹan-na-maa nu-mid-du-hum̃- bi-hee mim- maa-liñw- wa-ba-neen,

23:56.text: Nu-saa-ri-ʻu la-hum fil- khay-raat? Bal- laa yash-ʻu-roon.

23:57.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na hum- min khash-ya-ti Rab-bi-him- mush-fi-q̣oon;

23:60.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na yuʹ-too-na maaa ʹaa-taw- Wa-q̣u-loo-bu-hum wa-ji-la-tun ʹan-na-hum ʹi-laa Rab-bi-him raa-ji-ʻoon;

23:61.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka yu-saa-ri-ʻoo-na fil- khay-raa-ti wa-hum la-haa saa-bi-q̣oon.

23:62.text: Wa-laa nu-kal-li-fu naf-san ʹil-laa wus-ʻa-haa wa-la-day-naa Ki-taa-buñy- yañ-ṭi-q̣u bil-ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-hum laa- yuz̤̣-la-moon.

23:63.text: Bal q̣u-loo-bu-hum fee g̣am-ra-tim- min haa-ẓaa wa-la-hum ʹaʻ-maa-lum- miñ- doo-ni ẓaa-li-ka hum la-haa ʻaa-mi-loon,

23:64.text: Ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaaa ʹa-khaẓ-naa mut-ra-fee-him̃- bil-ʻA-ẓaa-bi ʹi-ẓaa hum yaj-ʹa-roon!

23:65.text: Laaa taj-ʹa-rul- yawm: ʹin-na-kum- min-naa laa- tuñ-ṣa-roon.

23:66.text: Q̣ad kaa-nat ʹAa-yaa-tee tut-laa ʻa-lay-kum fa-kuñ-tum ʻa-laaa ʹaʻ-q̣aa-bi-kum tañ-ki-ṣoon.

23:68.text: ʹA-fa-lam yad-dab-ba-rul- Q̣aw-la ʹam jaaa-ʹa-hum- maa lam yaʹ-ti ʹaa-baaa-ʹa-hu-mul- ʹaw-wa-leen?

23:69.text: ʹAm lam yaʻ-ri-foo Ra-soo-la-hum fa-hum la-hoo muñ-ki-roon?

23:70.text: ʹAm ya-q̣oo-loo-na bi-hee jin-nah? Bal jaaa-ʹa-hum̃- bil-Ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-ʹak-s̤a-ru-hum lil-Ḥaq̣-q̣i kaa-ri-hoon.

23:71.text: Wa-la-wit- ta-ba-ʻal- Ḥaq̣-q̣u ʹah-waaa-ʹa-hum la-fa-sa-da-tis- sa-maa-waa-tu wal-ʹar-ḍu wa-mañ- fee-hinn! Bal ʹa-tay-naa-hum̃- bi-ẓik-ri-him fa-hum ʻañ- ẓik-ri-him- muʻ-ri-ḍoon.

23:72.text: ʹAm tas-ʹa-lu-hum khar-jañ- fa-kha-raa-ju Rab-bi-ka khayr: wa-Hu-wa Khay-rur- raa-zi-q̣een.

23:74.text: Waʹin-nal- la-ẓee-na laa- yuʹ-mi-noo-na bil-ʹAa-khi-ra-ti ʻa-niṣ- Ṣi-raa-ṭi la-naa-ki-boon.

23:75.text: Wa-law ra-ḥim-naa-hum wa-ka-shaf-naa maa- bi-him- miñ- ḍur-ril- la-laj-joo fee ṭug̣-yaa-ni-him yaʻ-ma-hoon.

23:76.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹa-khaẓ-naa-hum̃- bil-ʻA-ẓaa-bi fa-mas- ta-kaa-noo li-Rab-bi-him wa-maa ya-ta-ḍar-ra-ʻoon,

23:77.text: Ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa fa-taḥ-naa ʻa-lay-him baa-bañ ẓaa ʻa-ẓaa-biñ sha-dee-din ʹi-ẓaa hum fee-hi mub-li-soon!

23:78.text: Wa-Hu-wal- la-ẓeee ʹañ-sha-ʹa la-ku-mus- sam-ʻa wal-ʹab-ṣaa-ra wal-ʹaf-ʹi-dah: q̣a-lee-lam- maa tash-ku-roon!

23:79.text: Wa-Hu-wal- la-ẓee ẓa-ra-ʹa-kum fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-ʹi-lay-hi tuḥ-sha-roon.

23:80.text: Wa-Hu-wal- la-ẓee yuḥ-yee wa-yu-mee-tu wa-la-hukh- ti-laa-ful- lay-li wan-na-haar: ʹa-fa-laa taʻ-q̣i-loon?

23:81.text: Bal q̣aa-loo mis̤-la maa- q̣aa-lal- ʹAw-wa-loon.

23:82.text: Q̣aa-looo ʹa-ʹi-ẓaa mit-naa wa-kun-naa tu-raa-bañw- wa-ʻi-z̤̣aa-man ʹa-ʹin-naa la-mab-ʻoo-s̤oon?

23:83.text: La-q̣ad wu-ʻid-naa naḥ-nu wa-ʹaa-baaa-ʹu-naa haa-ẓaa miñ q̣ab-lu ʹin haa-ẓa il-laaa ʹa-saa-ṭee-rul- ʹaw-wa-leen!

23:84.text: Q̣ul- li-ma-nil- ʹar-ḍu wa-mañ- fee-haaa ʹiñ- kuñ-tum taʻ-la-moon?

23:86.text: Q̣ul mar- Rab-bus- sa-maa-waa-tis- sab-ʻi wa-Rab-bul- ʻAr-shil- ʻA-z̤̣eem?

23:88.text: Q̣ul mam- bi-ya-di-hee Ma-la-koo-tu kul-li shay-ʹiñw- wa-Hu-wa yu-jee-ru wa-laa yu-jaa-ru ʻa-lay-hi ʹiñ- kuñ-tum taʻ-la-moon?

23:91.text: Mat- ta-kha-ẓal- laa-hu miñw- wa-la-diñw- wa-maa- kaa-na ma-ʻa-hoo min ʹi-laa-hin ʹi-ẓal- la-ẓa-ha-ba kul-lu ʹi-laa-him- bi-maa kha-la-q̣a wa-la-ʻa-laa baʻ-ḍu-hum ʻa-laa baʻḍ! Sub-ḥaa-nal- laa-hi ʻam-maa ya-ṣi-foon!

23:92.text: ʻAa-li-mil- g̣ay-bi wash-sha-haa-da-ti fa-ta-ʻaa-laa ʻam-maa yush-ri-koon!

23:93.text: Q̣ur- Rab-bi ʹim-maa tu-ri-yan-nee maa- yoo-ʻa-doon,

23:94.text: Rab-bi fa-laa taj-ʻal-nee fil- q̣aw-miz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen!

23:95.text: Wa-ʹin-naa ʻa-laaa ʹan- nu-ri-ya-ka maa- na-ʻi-du-hum la-Q̣aa-di-roon.

23:96.text: ʹId-faʻ bil-la-tee hi-ya ʹaḥ-sa-nus- say-yi-ʹah: Naḥ-nu ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-maa ya-ṣi-foon.

23:97.text: Wa-q̣ur- Rab-bi ʹa-ʻoo-ẓu bi-ka min ha-ma-zaa-tish- sha-yaa-ṭeen.

23:99.text: Ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa jaaa-ʹa ʹa-ḥa-da-hu-mul- maw-tu q̣aa-la Rab-bir- ji-ʻoon,

23:100.text: La-ʻal-leee ʹaʻ-ma-lu ṣaa-li-ḥañ- fee-maa ta-rak-tu kal-laa! ʹIn-na-haa ka-li-ma-tun hu-wa q̣aaa-ʹi-lu-haa. Wa-miñw- wa-raaa-ʹi-him Bar-za-khun ʹi-laa Yaw-mi yub-ʻa-s̤oon.

23:101.text: Fa-ʹi-ẓaa nu-fi-kha fiṣ- Ṣoo-ri fa-laaa ʹañ-saa-ba bay-na-hum Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓiñw- Wa-laa- ya-ta-saaa-ʹa-loon!

23:102.text: Fa-mañ- s̤a-q̣u-lat ma-waa-zee-nu-hoo fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- Muf-li-ḥoon:

23:103.text: Wa-man khaf-fat ma-waa-zee-nu-hoo fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-kal- la-ẓee-na kha-si-rooo ʹañ-fu-sa-hum fee Ja-han-na-ma khaa-li-doon.

23:104.text: Tal-fa-ḥu wu-joo-ha-hu-mun- Naa-ru wa-hum fee-haa kaa-li-ḥoon.

23:105.text: ʹA-lam ta-kun ʹAa-yaa-tee tut-laa ʻa-lay-kum fa-kuñ-tum̃- bi-haa tu-kaẓ-ẓi-boon?

23:106.text: Q̣aa-loo Rab-ba-naa g̣a-la-bat ʻa-lay-naa shiq̣-wa-tu-naa wa-kun-naa q̣aw-mañ ḍaaal-leen!

23:107.text: Rab-ba-naaa ʹakh-rij-naa min-haa fa-ʹin ʻud-naa fa-ʹin-naa z̤̣aa-li-moon!

23:109.text: ʹIn-na-hoo kaa-na fa-ree-q̣um- min ʻi-baa-dee ya-q̣oo-loo-na ˹Rab-ba-naaa ʹaa-man-naa fag̣-fir la-naa war-ḥam-naa wa-ʹAñ-ta Khay-rur- raa-ḥi-meen˺!

23:110.text: Fat-ta-khaẓ-tu-moo-hum sikh-riy-yan ḥat-taaa ʹañ-saw-kum Ẓik-ree wa-kuñ-tum- min-hum taḍ-ḥa-koon!

23:111.text: ʹIn-nee ja-zay-tu-hu-mul- yaw-ma bi-maa ṣa-ba-rooo ʹan-na-hum hu-mul- Faaa-ʹi-zoon.

23:112.text: Q̣aa-la kam la-bis̤-tum fil- ʹar-ḍi ʻa-da-da si-neen?

23:113.text: Q̣aa-loo la-bis̤-naa yaw-man ʹaw baʻ-ḍa yaw-miñ fas-ʹa-lil- ʻaaad-deen.

23:114.text: Q̣aa-la ʹil- la-bis̤-tum ʹil-laa q̣a-lee-lal- law ʹan-na-kum kuñ-tum taʻ-la-moon!

23:115.text: ʹA-fa-ḥa-sib-tum ʹan-na-maa kha-laq̣-naa-kum ʻa-ba-s̤añw- Wa-ʹan-na-kum ʹi-lay-naa laa- tur-ja-ʻoon?

23:116.text: Fa-ta-ʻaa-lal- laa-hul- Ma-li-kul- Ḥaq̣q̣: Laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa Hoo: Rab-bul- ʻAr-shil- Ka-reem!

23:117.text: Wa-mañy- yad-ʻu ma-ʻal- laa-hi ʹi-laa-han ʹaa-kha-ra laa- bur-haa-na la-hoo bi-hee fa-ʹin-na-maa ḥi-saa-bu-hoo ʻiñ-da Rab-bih! ʹIn-na-hoo laa- yuf-li-ḥul- Kaa-fi-roon!

23:118.text: Wa-q̣ur- Rab-big̣- fir war-ḥam wa-ʹAñ-ta Khay-rur- raa-ḥi-meen!

24:1.text: Soo-ra-tun ʹañ-zal-naa-haa wa-fa-raḍ-naa-haa wa-ʹañ-zal-naa fee-haaa ʹAa-yaa-tim- Bay-yi-naa-til- la-ʻal-la-kum ta-ẓak-ka-roon.

24:2.text: ʹAz-zaa-ni-ya-tu waz-zaa-nee faj-li-doo kul-la waa-ḥi-dim- min-hu-maa mi-ʹa-ta jal-dah; wa-laa taʹ-khuẓ-kum̃- bi-hi-maa raʹ-fa-tuñ fee Dee-nil- laa-hi ʹiñ- kuñ-tum tuʹ-mi-noo-na bil-laa-hi wal-Yaw-mil- ʹAa-khir: wal-yash-had ʻa-ẓaa-ba-hu-maa ṭaaa-ʹi-fa-tum- mi-nal- Muʹ-mi-neen.

24:3.text: ʹAz-zaa-nee laa- yañ-ki-ḥu ʹil-laa zaa-ni-ya-tan ʹaw mush-ri-kah: waz-zaa-ni-ya-tu laa- yañ-ki-ḥu-haaa ʹil-laa zaa-nin ʹaw mush-rik: wa-ḥur-ri-ma ẓaa-li-ka ʻa-lal- Muʹ-mi-neen.

24:4.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na yar-moo-nal- muḥ-ṣa-naa-ti s̤um-ma lam yaʹ-too bi-ʹar-ba-ʻa-ti shu-ha-daaa-ʹa faj-li-doo-hum s̤a-maa-nee-na jal-da-tañw- wa-laa- taq̣-ba-loo la-hum sha-haa-da-tan ʹa-ba-daa: wa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- faa-si-q̣oon;

24:5.text: ʹIl-lal- la-ẓee-na taa-boo mim- baʻ-di ẓaa-li-ka wa-ʹaṣ-la-ḥoo; fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

24:6.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na yar-moo-na ʹaz-waa-ja-hum wa-lam ya-kul- la-hum shu-ha-daaa-ʹu ʹil-laaa ʹañ-fu-su-hum fa-sha-haa-da-tu ʹa-ḥa-di-him ʹar-ba-ʻu sha-haa-daa-tim- bil-laa-hi ʹin-na-hoo la-mi-naṣ- ṣaa-di-q̣een;

24:7.text: Wal-khaa-mi-sa-tu ʹan-na laʻ-na-tal- laa-hi ʻa-lay-hi ʹiñ- kaa-na mi-nal- kaa-ẓi-been.

24:8.text: Wa-yad-ra-ʹu ʻan-hal- ʻa-ẓaa-ba ʹañ tash-ha-da ʹar-ba-ʻa sha-haa-daa-tim- bil-laa-hi ʹin-na-hoo la-mi-nal- kaa-ẓi-been;

24:9.text: Wal-khaa-mi-sa-ta ʹan-na g̣a-ḍa-bal- laa-hi ʻa-lay-haaa ʹiñ- kaa-na mi-naṣ- ṣaa-di-q̣een.

24:10.text: Wa-law-laa- faḍ-lul- laa-hi ʻa-lay-kum wa-raḥ-ma-tu-hoo wa-ʹan-nal- laa-ha Taw-waa-bun Ha-keem.

24:11.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na jaaa-ʹoo bil-ʹif-ki ʻuṣ-ba-tum- miñ-kum: laa- taḥ-sa-boo-hu shar-ral- la-kum: bal hu-wa khay-rul- la-kum: li-kul-lim- ri-ʹim- min-hum- mak- ta-sa-ba mi-nal- ʹis̤m, wal-la-ẓee ta-wal-laa kib-ra-hoo min-hum la-hoo ʻA-ẓaa-bun ʻa-z̤̣eem.

24:12.text: Law-laaa ʹiẓ sa-miʻ-tu-moo-hu z̤̣an-nal- Muʹ-mi-noo-na wal-Muʹ-mi-naa-tu bi-ʹañ-fu-si-him khay-rañw- wa-q̣aa-loo haa-ẓaaa ʹif-kum- mu-been?

24:13.text: Law-laa- jaaa-ʹoo ʻa-lay-hi bi-ʹar-ba-ʻa-ti shu-ha-daaaʹ? Fa-ʹiẓ lam yaʹ-too bish-shu-ha-daaa-ʹi fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka ʻiñ-dal- laa-hi hu-mul- kaa-ẓi-boon!

24:14.text: Wa-law-laa- faḍ-lul- laa-hi ʻa-lay-kum wa-raḥ-ma-tu-hoo fid-dun-yaa wal- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti la-mas-sa-kum fee maaa ʹa-faḍ-tum fee-hi ʻa-ẓaa-bun ʹa-z̤̣eem.

24:15.text: ʹIẓ ta-laq̣-q̣aw-na-hoo bi-ʹal-si-na-ti-kum wa-ta-q̣oo-loo-na bi-ʹaf-waa-hi-kum- maa lay-sa la-kum̃- bi-hee ʻil-muñw- Wa-taḥ-sa-boo-na-hoo hay-yi-nañw- wa-hu-wa ʻiñ-dal- laa-hi ʻa-z̤̣eem.

24:16.text: Wa-law-laaa ʹiẓ sa-miʻ-tu-moo-hu q̣ul-tum- maa ya-koo-nu la-naaa ʹan- na-ta-kal-la-ma bi-haa-ẓaa: Sub-ḥaa-na-ka haa-ẓaa buh-taa-nun ʻa-z̤̣eem!

24:17.text: Ya-ʻi-z̤̣u-ku-mul- laa-hu ʹañ- ta-ʻoo-doo li-mis̤-li-heee ʹa-ba-dan ʹiñ- kuñ-tum- Muʹ-mi-neen.

24:18.text: Wa-yu-bay-yi-nul- laa-hu la-ku-mul- ʹAa-yaat: wal-laa-hu ʻA-lee-mun Ḥa-keem.

24:19.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na yu-ḥib-boo-na ʹañ- ta-shee-ʻal- faa-ḥi-sha-tu fil- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo la-hum ʻa-ẓaa-bun ʹa-lee-muñ- fid- dun-yaa wal-ʹAa-khi-rah: wal-laa-hu yaʻ-la-mu waʹañ-tum laa- taʻ-la-moon.

24:20.text: Wa-law-laa- faḍ-lul- laa-hi ʻa-lay-kum wa-raḥ-ma-tu-hoo wa-ʹan-nal- laa-ha Ra-ʹoo-fur- Ra-ḥeem.

24:21.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo laa- tat-ta-bi-ʻoo khu-ṭu-waa-tish- Shay-ṭaan: wa-mañy- yat-ta-biʻ khu-ṭu-waa-tish- Shay-ṭaa-ni fa-ʹin-na-hoo yaʹ-mu-ru bil-faḥ-shaaa-ʹi wal-muñ-kar: wa-law-laa- faḍ-lul- laa-hi ʻa-lay-kum Wa-raḥ-ma-tu-hoo maa- za-kaa miñ-kum- min ʹa-ḥa-din ʹa-ba-dañw- wa-laa-kin-nal- laa-ha yu-zak-kee mañy- ya-shaaaʹ: wal-laa-hu Sa-mee-ʻun ʻA-leem.

24:22.text: Wa-laa yaʹ-ta-li ʹu-lul- faḍ-li miñ-kum was-sa-ʻa-ti ʹañy- yuʹ-tooo ʹu-lil- q̣ur-baa wal-ma-saa-kee-na wal-Mu-haa-ji-ree-na fee Sa-bee-lil- laah: wal-yaʻ-foo wal-yaṣ-fa-ḥoo. ʹA-laa tu-ḥib-boo-na ʹañy- yag̣-fi-ral- laa-hu la-kum? Wal-laa-hu G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

24:23.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na yar-moo-nal- muḥ-ṣa-naa-til- g̣aa-fi-laa-til- Muʹ-mi-naa-ti lu-ʻi-noo fid- dun-yaa wal-ʹAa-khi-rah: wa-la-hum ʻA-ẓaa-bun ʻa-z̤̣eem,

24:24.text: Yaw-ma tash-ha-du ʻa-lay-him ʹal-si-na-tu-hum wa-ʹay-dee-him wa-ʹar-ju-lu-hum̃- bi-maa kaa-noo yaʻ-ma-loon.

24:25.text: Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓiñy- yu-waf-fee-hi-mul- laa-hu dee-na-hu-mul- ḥaq̣-q̣a wa-yaʻ-la-moo-na ʹan-nal- laa-ha Hu-wal- Ḥaq̣-q̣ul- Mu-been.

24:26.text: ʹAl-kha-bee-s̤aa-tu lil-kha-bee-s̤ee-na wal-kha-bee-s̤oo-na lil-kha-bee-s̤aat; waṭ-ṭay-yi-baa-tu liṭ-ṭay-yi-bee-na waṭ-ṭay-yi-boo-na liṭ-ṭay-yi-baat: ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka mu-bar-ra-ʹoo-na mim-maa ya-q̣oo-loon: la-hum- mag̣-fi-ra-tuñw- wa-riz-q̣uñ- ka-reem.

24:27.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo laa- tad-khu-loo bu-yoo-tan g̣ay-ra bu-yoo-ti-kum ḥat-taa tas-taʹ-ni-soo wa-tu-sal-li-moo ʻa-laaa ʹah-li-haa: ẓaa-li-kum khay-rul- la-kum la-ʻal-la-kum ta-ẓak-ka-roon.

24:28.text: Fa-ʹil- lam ta-ji-doo fee-haaa ʹa-ḥa-dañ fa-laa tad-khu-loo-haa ḥat-taa yuʹ-ẓa-na la-kum: wa-ʹiñ- q̣ee-la la-ku-mur- ji-ʻoo far-ji-ʻoo hu-wa ʹaz-kaa la-kum: wal-laa-hu bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na ʻA-leem.

24:29.text: Lay-sa ʻa-lay-kum ju-naa-ḥun ʹañ tad-khu-loo bu-yoo-tan g̣ay-ra mas-koo-na-tiñ- fee-ha ma-taa-ʻul- la-kum: wal-laa-hu yaʻ-la-mu maa- tub-doo-na wa-maa tak-tu-moon.

24:30.text: Q̣ul- lil-Muʹ-mi-nee-na ya-g̣uḍ-ḍoo min ʹab-ṣaa-ri-him wa-yaḥ-fa-z̤̣oo fu-roo-ja-hum: ẓaa-li-ka ʹaz-kaa la-hum: ʹin-nal- laa-ha kha-bee-rum- bi-maa yaṣ-na-ʻoon.

24:31.text: Wa-q̣ul- lil-Muʹ-mi-naa-ti yag̣-ḍuḍ-na min ʹab-ṣaa-ri-hin-na wa-yaḥ-faz̤̣-na fu-roo-ja-hun-na wa-laa yub-dee-na zee-na-ta-hun-na ʹil-laa maa- z̤̣a-ha-ra min-haa wal-yaḍ-rib-na bi-khu-mu-ri-hin-na ʻa-laa ju-yoo-bi-hinn; wa-laa yub-dee-na zee-na-ta-hun-na ʹil-laa li-bu-ʻoo-la-ti-hin-na ʹaw ʹaa-baaa-ʹi-hin-na ʹaw ʹaa-baaa-ʹi bu-ʻoo-la-ti-hin-na ʹaw ʹab-naaa-ʹi-hin-na ʹaw ʹab-naaa-ʹi bu-ʻoo-la-ti-hin-na ʹaw ʹikh-waa-ni-hin-na ʹaw ba-neee ʹikh-waa-ni-hin-na ʹaw ba-neee ʹa-kha-waa-ti-hin-na ʹaw ni-saaa-ʹi-hin-na ʹaw maa- ma-la-kat ʹay-maa-nu-hun-na ʹa-wit- taa-bi-ʻee-na g̣ay-ri ʹu-lil- ʹir-ba-ti mi-nar- ri-jaa-li ʹa-wiṭ- ṭif-lil- la-ẓee-na! lam yaz̤̣-ha-roo ʻa-laa ʻaw-raa-tin- ni-saaaʹ; wa-laa yaḍ-rib-na bi-ʹar-ju-li-hin-na li-yuʻ-la-ma maa- yukh-fee-na miñ- zee-na-ti-hinn. Wa-too-booo ʹi-lal- laa-hi ja-mee-ʻan ʹay-yu-hal- Muʹ-mi-noo-na la-ʻal-la-kum tuf-li-ḥoon.

24:32.text: Wa-añ-ki-ḥul- ʹa-yaa-maa miñ-kum waṣ-ṣaa-li-ḥee-na min ʻi-baa-di-kum wa-ʹi-maaa-ʹi-kum: ʹiñy- ya-koo-noo fu-q̣a-raaa-ʹa yug̣-ni-hi-mul- laa-hu miñ- faḍ-lih: wal-laa-hu Waa-si-ʻun ʻA-leem.

24:33.text: Wal-yas-taʻ-fi-fil- la-ẓee-na laa- ya-ji-doo-na ni-kaa-ḥan ḥat-taa yug̣-ni-ya-hu-mul- laa-hu miñ- faḍ-liḥ. Wal-la-ẓee-na yab-ta-g̣oo-nal- Ki-taa-ba mim-maa ma-la-kat ʹay-maa-nu-kum fa-kaa-ti-boo-hum ʹin ʻa-lim-tum fee-him khay-rañw- waʹaa-too-hum- mim- maa-lil- laa-hil- la-ẓeee ʹaa-taa-kum. Wa-laa tuk-ri-hoo fa-ta-yaa-ti-kum ʻa-lal- bi-g̣aaa-ʹi ʹin ʹa-rad-na ta-ḥaṣ-ṣu-nal- li-tab-ta-g̣oo ʻa-ra-ḍal- ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa. Wa-mañy- yuk-rih-hun-na fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha mim- baʻ-di ʹik-raa-hi-hin-na G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

24:34.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹañ-zal-naaa ʹi-lay-kum ʹaa-yaa-tim- mu-bay-yi-naa-tiñw- wa-ma-s̤a-lam- mi-nal- la-ẓee-na kha-law miñ- q̣ab-li-kum wa-maw-ʻi-z̤̣a-tal- lil-Mut-ta-q̣een.

24:35.text: ʹAl-laa-hu Noo-rus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ: Ma-s̤a-lu Noo-ri-hee ka-Mish-kaa-tiñ- fee-haa Miṣ-baaḥ: ʹAl-Miṣ-baa-ḥu fee Zu-jaa-jah: ʹaz-zu-jaa-ja-tu ka-ʹan-na-haa kaw-ka-buñ dur-riy-yuñy- yoo-q̣a-du miñ Sha-ja-ra-tim- mu-baa-ra-ka-tiñ- Zay-too-na-til- laa Shar-q̣iy-ya-tiñw- Wa-laa- G̣ar-biy-ya-tiñy- ya-kaa-du Zay-tu-haa yu-ḍeee-ʹu wa-law lam tam-sas-hu naar: Noo-run ʻa-laa Noor! Yah-dil- laa-hu li-Noo-ri-hee mañy- ya-shaaaʹ: wa-yaḍ-ri-bul- laa-hul- ʹam-s̤aa-la lin-naas: wal-laa-hu bi-kul-li shay-ʹin ʻA-leem.

24:36.text: Fee bu-yoo-tin ʹa-ẓi-nal- laa-hu ʹañ- tur-fa-ʻa wa-yuẓ-ka-ra fee-has- mu-hoo yu-sab-bi-ḥu la-hoo fee-haa bil-g̣u-duw-wi wal-ʹaa-ṣaal.

24:37.text: Ri-jaa-lul- laa tul-hee-him ti-jaa-ra-tuñw- wa-laa- bay-ʻun ʻañ- ẓik-ril- laa-hi wa-ʹi-q̣aa-miṣ- Ṣa-laa-ti wa-ʹee-taaa-ʹiz- Za-kaa-ti ya-khaa-foo-na Yaw-mañ- ta-taq̣al-la-bu fee-hil- q̣u-loo-bu wal-ʹab-ṣaar,

24:38.text: Li-yaj-zi-ya-hu-mul- laa-hu ʹaḥ-sa-na maa- ʻa-mi-loo wa-ya-zee-da-hum- miñ- faḍ-lih; wal-laa-hu yar-zu-q̣u mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu bi-g̣ay-ri hi-saab.

24:39.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-rooo ʹaʻ-maa-lu-hum ka-sa-raa-bim- bi-q̣ee-ʻa-tiñy- yaḥ-sa-bu-huz̤̣- z̤̣am-ʹaa-nu maaa-ʹaa; ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa jaaa-ʹa-hoo lam ya-jid-hu shay-ʹañw- wa-wa-ja-dal- laa-ha ʻiñ-da-hoo fa-waf-faa-hu ḥi-saa-bah: wal-laa-hu Sa-ree-ʻul- ḥi-saab.

24:40.text: ʹAw ka-z̤̣u-lu-maa-tiñ fee baḥ-ril- luj-jiy-yiñy- yag̣-shaa-hu maw-jum- miñ- faw-q̣i-hee maw-jum- miñ- faw-q̣i-hee sa-ḥaab: z̤̣u-lu-maa-tum- baʻ-ḍu-haa faw-q̣a baʻḍ: ʹi-ẓaaa ʹakh-ra-ja ya-da-hoo lam ya-kad ya-raa-haa! wa-mal- lam yaj-ʻa-lil- laa-hu la-hoo noo-rañ- fa-maa la-hoo min- noor!

24:41.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹan-nal- laa-ha yu-sab-bi-ḥu la-hoo mañ- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi waṭ-ṭay-ru ṣaaaf-faat? Kul-luñ- q̣ad ʻa-li-ma ṣa-laa-ta-hoo wa-tas-bee-ḥah. Wal-laa-hu ʻA-lee-mum bi-maa yaf-ʻa-loon.

24:42.text: Wa-lil-laa-hi mul-kus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ! wa-ʹi-lal- laa-hil- ma-ṣeer.

24:43.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹan-nal- laa-ha yuz-jee sa-ḥaa-bañ s̤um-ma yu-ʹal-li-fu bay-na-hoo s̤um-ma yaj-ʻa-lu-hoo ru-kaa-mañ- fa-ta-ral- wad-q̣a yakh-ru-ju min khi-laa-lih. Wa-yu-naz-zi-lu mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi miñ ji-baa-liñ fee-haa mim- ba-ra-diñ fa-yu-ṣee-bu bi-hee mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu wa-yaṣ-ri-fu-hoo ʻam- mañy- ya-shaaaʹ. Ya-kaa-du sa-naa bar-q̣i-hee yaẓ-ha-bu bil-ʹab-ṣaar.

24:44.text: Yu-q̣al-li-bul- laa-hul- lay-la wan-na-haar: ʹin-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʻib-ra-tal- li-ʹu-lil- ʹab-ṣaar!

24:45.text: Wal-laa-hu kha-la-q̣a kul-la daaab-ba-tim- mim- maaaʹ: fa-min-hum- mañy- yam-shee ʻa-laa baṭ-nih; wa-min-hum- mañy- yam-shee ʻa-laa rij-layn; wa-min-hum- mañy- yam-shee ʻa-laaa ʹar-baʻ. Yakh-lu-q̣ul- laa-hu maa- ya-shaaaʹ; ʹin-nal- laa-ha ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Q̣a-deer.

24:46.text: La-q̣ad ʹañ-zal-naaa ʹAa-yaa-tim- mu-bay-yi-naat: wal-laa-hu yah-dee mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu ʹi-laa Ṣi-raa-ṭim- Mus-ta-q̣eem.

24:47.text: Wa-ya-q̣oo-loo-na ʹaa-man-naa bil-laa-hi wa-bir-Ra-soo-li wa-ʹa-ṭaʻ-naa s̤um-ma ya-ta-wal-laa fa-ree-q̣um- min-hum- mim- baʻ-di ẓaa-lik: wa-maaa ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka bil-Muʹ-mi-neen.

24:48.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa du-ʻooo ʹi-lal- laa-hi wa-Ra-soo-li-hee li-yaḥ-ku-ma bay-na-hum ʹi-ẓaa fa-ree-q̣um- min-hum- muʻ-ri-ḍoon.

24:49.text: Wa-ʹiñy- ya-kul- la-hu-mul- ḥaq̣-q̣u yaʹ-tooo ʹi-lay-hi muẓ-ʻi-neen.

24:50.text: ʹA-fee q̣u-loo-bi-him- ma-ra-ḍun ʹa-mir- taa-booo ʹam ya-khaa-foo-na ʹañy- ya-ḥee-fal- laa-hu ʻa-lay-him wa-Ra-soo-luh? Bal ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-muz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-moon.

24:51.text: ʹIn-na-maa kaa-na q̣aw-lal- Muʹ-mi-nee-na ʹi-ẓaa du-ʻooo ʹi-lal- laa-hi wa-Ra-soo-li-hee li-yaḥ-ku-ma bay-na-hum añy- ya-q̣oo-loo ˹Sa-miʻ-naa wa-ʹa-ṭaʻ-naa:˺ wa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- Muf-li-ḥoon.

24:52.text: Wa-mañy- yu-ṭi-ʻil- laa-ha wa-Ra-soo-la-hoo wa-yakh-shal- laa-ha wa-yat-taq̣-hi fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- Faaa-ʹi-zoon.

24:53.text: Wa-ʹaq̣-sa-moo bil-laa-hi jah-da ʹay-maa-ni-him la-ʹin ʹa-mar-ta-hum la-yakh-ru-junn. Q̣ul laa- tuq̣-si-moo; ṭaa-ʻa-tum- maʻ-roo-fah; ʹin-nal- laa-ha kha-bee-rum- bi-maa taʻ-ma-loon.

24:54.text: Q̣ul ʹa-ṭee-ʻul- laa-ha wa-ʹa-ṭee-ʻur- Ra-sool: fa-ʹiñ- ta-wal-law fa-ʹin-na-maa ʻa-lay-hi maa- ḥum-mi-la wa-ʻa-lay-kum- maa ḥum-mil-tum. Wa-ʹiñ tu-ṭee-ʻoo-hu tah-ta-doo. Wa-maa ʻa-lar- Ra-soo-li ʹil-lal- Ba-laa-g̣ul- mu-been.

24:55.text: Wa-ʻa-dal- laa-hul- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo miñ-kum wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti la-yas-takh-li-fan-na-hum fil- ʹar-ḍi ka-mas-takh- la-fal- la-ẓee-na miñ q̣ab-li-him: wa-la-yu-mak-ki-nan-na la-hum dee-na-hu-mul- la-ẓir- ta-ḍaa la-hum wa-la-yu-bad-di-lan-na-hum mim- baʻ-di khaw-fi-him ʹam-naa: yaʻ-bu-doo-na-nee laa- yush-ri-koo-na bee shay-ʹaa. Wa-mañ ka-fa-ra baʻ-da ẓaa-li-ka fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- fa-si-q̣oon.

24:56.text: Wa-ʹa-q̣ee-muṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta wa-ʹaa-tuz- Za-kaa-ta wa-ʹa-ṭee-ʻur- Ra-soo-la la-ʻal-la-kum tur-ḥa-moon.

24:57.text: Laa- taḥ-sa-ban-nal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo muʻ-ji-zee-na fil- ʹarḍ: wa-maʹ-waa-hu-mun- Naar: wa-la-biʹ-sal- ma-ṣeer!

24:58.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo li-yas-taʹ-ẓiñ-ku-mul- la-ẓee-na ma-la-kat ʹay-maa-nu-kum wal-la-ẓee-na lam yab-lu-g̣ul- ḥu-lu-ma miñ-kum s̤a-laa-s̤a mar-raat: miñ- q̣ab-li Ṣa-laa-til- faj-ri wa-ḥee-na ta-ḍa-ʻoo-na s̤i-yaa-ba-kum- mi-naz̤̣- z̤̣a-hee-ra-ti wa-mim- baʻ-di Ṣa-laa-til- ʻI-shaaaʹ; s̤a-laa-s̤u ʻaw-raa-til- la-kum: Lay-sa ʻa-lay-kum wa-laa ʻa-lay-him ju-naa-ḥum- baʻ-da-hunn: ṭaw-waa-foo-na ʻa-lay-kum baʻ-ḍu-kum ʻa-laa baʻḍ: ka-ẓaa-li-ka yu-bay-yi-nul- laa-hu la-ku-mul- ʹAa-yaat: wal-laa-hu ʻA-lee-mun Ḥa-keem.

24:59.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa ba-la-g̣al- ʹaṭ-faa-lu miñ-ku-mul ḥu-lu-ma fal-yas-taʹ-ẓi-noo ka-mas- taʹ-ẓa-nal- la-ẓee-na miñ- q̣ab-li-him; ka-ẓaa-li-ka yu-bay-yi-nul- laa-hu la-kum ʹAa-yaa-tih: wal-laa-hu ʻA-lee-mun Ḥa-keem.

24:60.text: Wal-q̣a-waa-ʻi-du mi-nan- ni-saaa-ʹil- laa-tee laa- yar-joo-na ni-kaa-hañ- fa-lay-sa ʻa-lay-hin-na ju-naa-ḥun ʹañy- ya-ḍaʻ-na s̤i-yaa-ba-hun-na g̣ay-ra mu-ta-bar-ri-jaa-tim- bi-zee-nah: wa-ʹañy- yas-taʻ-fif-na khay-rul- la-hunn: wal-laa-hu Sa-mee-ʻun ʻA-leem.

24:61.text: Lay-sa ʻa-lal- ʹaʻ-maa ḥa-ra-juñw- wa-laa- ʻa-lal- ʹaʻ-ra-ji ḥa-ra-juñw- wa-laa- ʻa-lal- ma-ree-ḍi ḥa-ra-juñw- wa-laa- ʻa-laaa ʹañ-fu-si-kum ʹañ- taʹ-ku-loo mim- bu-yoo-ti-kum ʹaw bu-yoo-ti ʹaa-baaa-ʹi-kum ʹaw bu-yoo-ti ʹum-ma-haa-ti-kum ʹaw bu-yoo-ti ʹikh-waa-ni-kum ʹaw bu-yoo-ti ʹa-kha-waa-ti-kum ʹaw bu-yoo-ti ʹaʻ-maa-mi-kum ʹaw bu-yoo-ti ʻam-maa-ti-kum ʹaw bu-yoo-ti ʹakh-waa-li-kum ʹaw bu-yoo-ti khaa-laa-ti-kum ʹaw maa- ma-lak-tum- ma-faa-ti-ḥa-hooo ʹaw ṣa-dee-q̣i-kum: lay-sa ʻa-lay-kum ju-naa-ḥun ʹañ- taʹ-ku-loo ja-mee-ʻan ʹaw ʹash-taa-taa. Fa-ʹi-ẓaa da-khal-tum̃- bu-yoo-tañ fa-sal-li-moo ʻa-laaa ʹañ-fu-si-kum ta-ḥiy-ya-tam- min ʻiñ-dil- laa-hi mu-baa-ra-ka-tañ- ṭay-yi-bah. Ka-ẓaa-li-ka yu-bay-yi-nul- laa-hu la-ku-mul- ʹAa-ya-ti la-ʻal-la-kum taʻ-q̣i-loon.

24:62.text: ʹIn-na-mal- Muʹ-mi-noo-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo bil-laa-hi wa-Ra-soo-li-hee wa-ʹi-ẓaa kaa-noo ma-ʻa-hoo ʻa-laaa ʹam-riñ- jaa-mi-ʻil- lam yaẓ-ha-boo ḥat-taa yas-taʹ-ẓi-nooh: ʹin-nal- la-ẓee-na yas-taʹ-ẓi-noo-na-ka ʹu-laaa-ʹi-kal- la-ẓee-na yuʹ-mi-noo-na bil-laa-hi wa-Ra-soo-lih; fa-ʹi-ẓas- taʹ-ẓa-noo-ka li-baʻ-ḍi shaʹ-ni-him faʹ-ẓal- li-mañ- shiʹ-ta min-hum was-tag̣-fir la-hu-mul- laah: ʹin-nal- laa-ha G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

24:63.text: Laa- taj-ʻa-loo du-ʻaaa-ʹar- Ra-soo-li bay-na-kum ka-du-ʻaaa-ʹi baʻ-ḍi-kum̃ baʻ-ḍaa: q̣ad yaʻ-la-mul- laa-hul- la-ẓee-na ya-ta-sal-la-loo-na miñ-kum li-waa-ẓaa: fal-yaḥ-ẓa-ril- la-ẓee-na yu-kha-li-foo-na ʻan ʹam-ri-heee ʹañ tu-ṣee-ba-hum fit-na-tun ʹaw yu-ṣee-ba-hum ʻa-ẓaa-bun ʹa-leem.

24:64.text: ʹA-laaa ʹin-na lil-laa-hi maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ. Q̣ad yaʻ-la-mu maaa ʹañ-tum ʻa-layh: wa-yaw-ma yur-ja-ʻoo-na ʹi-lay-hi fa-yu-nab-bi-ʹu-hum̃- bi-maa ʻa-mi-loo: wal-laa-hu bi-kul-li shay-ʹin ʻA-leem.

25:1.text: Ta-baa-ra-kal- la-ẓee naz-za-lal- Fur-q̣aa-na ʻa-laa ʻAb-di-hee li-ya-koo-na lil-ʻaa-la-mee-na na-ẓee-raa;

25:2.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee la-hoo mul-kus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi wa-lam yat-ta-khiẓ wa-la-dañw- wa-lam ya-kul- la-hoo sha-ree-kuñ- fil- mul-ki wa-kha-la-q̣a kul-la shay-ʹiñ- fa-q̣ad-da-ra-hoo taq̣-dee-raa.

25:3.text: Wat-ta-kha-ẓoo miñ- doo-ni-heee ʹaa-li-ha-tal- laa yakh-lu-q̣oo-na shay-ʹañw- wa-hum yukh-la-q̣oo-na wa-laa yam-li-koo-na li-ʹañ-fu-si-him ḍar-rañw- wa-laa- naf-ʻañw- wa-laa- yam-li-koo-na Maw-tañw- Wa-laa- Ḥa-yaa-tañw- Wa-laa- Nu-Shoo-raa.

25:4.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- laa-ẓee-na ka-fa-rooo ʹin haa-ẓaaa ʹil-laaa ʹif-ku-nif- ta-raa-hu wa-ʹa-ʻaa-na-hoo ʻa-lay-hi q̣aw-mun ʹaa-kha-roo-na fa-q̣ad jaaa-ʹoo z̤̣ul-mañw- wa-zoo-raa.

25:5.text: Wa-q̣aa-looo ʹa-saa-ṭee-rul- ʹaw-wa-lee-nak- ta-ta-ba-haa fa-hi-ya tum-laa ʻa-lay-hi buk-ra-tañw- wa-ʹa-ṣee-laa.

25:6.text: Q̣ul ʹañ-za-la-hul- la-ẓee yaʻ-la-mus- Sir-ra fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ: ʹin-na-hoo kaa-na G̣a-foo-rar- Ra-ḥee-maa.

25:7.text: Wa-q̣aa-loo maa-li haa-ẓar- Ra-soo-li yaʹ-ku-luṭ- ṭa-ʻaa-ma wa-yam-shee fil- ʹas-waaq̣? Law-Laaa- ʹuñ-zi-la ʹi-lay-hi ma-la-kuñ- fa-ya-koo-na ma-ʻa-hoo na-ẓee-raa?

25:8.text: ʹAw yul-q̣aaa ʹi-lay-hi kañ-zun ʹaw ta-koo-nu la-hoo jan-na-tuñy- yaʹ-ku-lu min-haa? Wa-q̣aa-laz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-moo-na ʹiñ- tat-ta-bi-ʻoo-na ʹil-laa ra-ju-lam- mas-ḥoo-raa.

25:9.text: ʹUñ-z̤̣ur kay-fa ḍa-ra-boo la-kal- ʹam-s̤aa-la fa-ḍal-loo fa-laa yas-ta-ṭee-ʻoo-na sa-bee-laa!

25:10.text: Ta-baa-ra-kal- la-ẓeee ʹiñ- shaaa-ʹa ja-ʻa-la la-ka khay-ram- miñ ẓaa-li-ka Jan-naa-tin taj-ree miñ taḥ-ti-hal- ʹan-haa-ru wa-yaj-ʻal- la-ka Q̣u-ṣoo-raa.

25:11.text: Bal kaẓ-ẓa-boo bis-Saa-ʻa-ti wa-ʹaʻ-tad-naa li-mañ- kaẓ-ẓa-ba bis-Saa-ʻa-ti Sa-ʻee-raa:

25:12.text: ʹI-ẓaa ra-ʹat-hum- mim- ma-kaa-nim- ba-ʻee-diñ- sa-mi-ʻoo la-haa ta-g̣ay-yu-z̤̣añw- wa-za-fee-raa.

25:13.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaaa ʹul-q̣oo min-haa ma-kaa-nañ ḍay-yi-q̣am- mu-q̣ar-ra-nee-na da-ʻaw hu-naa-li-ka s̤u-boo-raa!

25:14.text: Laa- tad-ʻul- yaw-ma s̤u-boo-rañw- waa-ḥi-dañw- wad-ʻoo s̤u-boo-rañ- ka-s̤ee-raa!

25:15.text: Q̣ul ʹa-ẓaa-li-ka khay-run ʹam jan-na-tul- khul-dil- la-tee wu-ʻi-dal- Mut-ta-q̣oon? Kaa-nat la-hum ja-zaaa-ʹañw- wa-ma-see-raa.

25:16.text: La-hum fee-haa maa- ya-shaaa-ʹoo-na khaa-li-deen: kaa-na ʻa-laa Rab-bi-ka waʻ-dam- mas-ʹoo-laa.

25:17.text: Wa-Yaw-ma yaḥ-shu-ru-hum wa-maa yaʻ-bu-doo-na miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi fa-ya-q̣oo-lu ʹA-ʹañ-tum ʹaḍ-lal-tum ʻi-baa-dee haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi ʹam hum ḍal-lus- Sa-beel?˺

25:18.text: Q̣aa-loo ˹Sub-ḥaa-na-ka maa- kaa-na yam-ba-g̣ee la-naaa ʹan- nat-ta-khi-ẓa miñ- doo-ni-ka min ʹaw-li-yaaa-ʹa wa-laa-kim- mat-taʻ-ta-hum wa-ʹaa-baaa-ʹa-hum ḥat-taa na-suẓ- Ẓikr: wa-kaa-noo q̣aw-mam- boo-raa.

25:19.text: Fa-q̣ad kaẓ-ẓa-boo-kum̃- bi-maa ta-q̣oo-loo-na fa-maa tas-ta-ṭee-ʻoo-na ṣar-fañw- wa-laa- naṣ-raa. Wa-mañy- yaz̤̣-lim- miñ-kum nu-ẓiq̣-hu ʻA-ẓaa-bañ- ka-bee-raa.

25:20.text: Wa-maaa ʹar-sal-naa q̣ab-la-ka mi-nal- mur-sa-lee-na ʹil-laaa ʹin-na-hum la-yaʹ-ku-loo-naṭ- ṭa-ʻaa-ma wa-yam-shoo-na fil- ʹas-waaq̣: wa-ja-ʻal-naa baʻ-ḍa-kum li-baʻ-ḍiñ fit-nah: ʹa-taṣ-bi-roon? Wa-kaa-na Rab-bu-ka Ba-ṣee-raa.

25:21.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na laa- yar-joo-na Li-q̣aaa-ʹa-naa Law-laaa ʹuñ-zi-la ʻa-lay-nal- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tu ʹaw na-raa Rab-ba-naa? La-q̣a-dis- tak-ba-roo feee ʹañ-fu-si-him wa-ʻa-taw ʻu-tuw-wañ- ka-bee-raa!

25:22.text: Yaw-ma ya-raw-nal- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-ta laa- bush-raa Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓil- lil-muj-ri-mee-na wa-ya-q̣oo-loo-na ḥij-ram- maḥ-joo-raa!

25:23.text: Wa-q̣a-dim-naaa ʹi-laa maa- ʻa-mi-loo min ʻa-ma-liñ fa-ja-ʻal-naa-hu ha-baaa-ʹam- mañ-s̤oo-raa.

25:24.text: ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bul- Jan-na-ti Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓin khay-rum- mus-ta-q̣ar-rañw- wa-ʹaḥ-sa-nu ma-q̣ee-laa.

25:25.text: Wa-Yaw-ma ta-shaq̣-q̣a-q̣us- sa-maaa-ʹu bil-g̣a-maa-mi wa-nuz-zi-lal- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tu tañ-zee-laa,

25:26.text: ʹAl-mul-ku Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓi-nil- ḥaq̣-q̣u lir-Raḥ-maan: wa-kaa-na Yaw-man ʻa-lal- kaa-fi-ree-na ʻa-see-raa.

25:27.text: Wa-Yaw-ma ya-ʻaḍ-ḍuz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-mu ʻa-laa ya-day-hi ya-q̣oo-lu yaa-lay-ta-nit- ta-khaẓ-tu ma-ʻar- Ra-soo-li sa-bee-laa!

25:28.text: Yaa-way-la-taa lay-ta-nee lam ʹat-ta-khiẓ fu-laa-nan kha-lee-laa!

25:29.text: La-q̣ad ʹa-ḍal-la-nee ʻa-niẓ- Ẓik-ri baʻ-da ʹiẓ jaaa-ʹa-nee! Wa-kaa-nash- Shay-ṭaa-nu lil-ʹiñ-saa-ni kha-ẓoo-laa!

25:30.text: Wa-q̣aa-lar- Ra-soo-lu yaa-Rab-bi ʹin-na q̣aw-mit- ta-kha-ẓoo haa-ẓal- Q̣ur-ʹaa-na mah-joo-raa.

25:31.text: Wa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka ja-ʻal-naa li-kul-li na-biy-yin ʻa-duw-wam- mi-nal- muj-ri-meen: wa-ka-faa bi-Rab-bi-ka Haa-di-yañw- Wa-Na-ṣee-raa.

25:32.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo law-laa- nuz-zi-la ʻa-lay-hil- Q̣ur-ʹaa-nu jum-la-tañw- Waa-ḥi-dah? Ka-ẓaa-li-ka li-nu-s̤ab-bi-ta bi-hee fu-ʹaa-da-ka wa-rat-tal-naa-hu tar-tee-laa.

25:33.text: Wa-laa yaʹ-too-na-ka bi-ma-s̤a-lin ʹil-laa jiʹ-naa-ka bil-Ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-ʹaḥ-sa-na taf-see-raa.

25:34.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na yuḥ-sha-roo-na ʻa-laa wu-joo-hi-him ʹi-laa Ja-han-na-ma ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka shar-rum- ma-ka-nañw- wa-ʹa-ḍal-lu Sa-bee-laa.

25:35.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹaa-tay-naa Moo-sal- Ki-taa-ba wa-ja-ʻal-naa ma-ʻa-hooo ʹa-khaa-hu Haa-roo-na Wa-zee-raa;

25:36.text: Fa-q̣ul-naẓ- ha-baaa ʹi-lal- q̣aw-mil- la-ẓee-na kaẓ-ẓa-boo bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa: fa-dam-mar-naa-hum tad-mee-raa.

25:37.text: Wa-q̣aw-ma Noo-ḥil- lam-maa kaẓ-ẓa-bur- ru-su-la ʹag̣-raq̣-naa-hum wa-ja-ʻal-naa-hum lin-naa-si ʹAa-yah; wa-ʹaʻ-tad-naa liz̤̣-z̤̣aa-li-mee-na ʻA-ẓaa-ban ʹa-lee-maa;

25:38.text: Wa-ʻAa-dañw- Wa-S̤a-moo-da wa-ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bar- Ras-si wa-q̣u-roo-nam- bay-na ẓaa-li-ka ka-s̤ee-raa.

25:39.text: Wa-kul-lañ ḍa-rab-naa la-hul- ʹam-s̤aa-la wa-kul-lañ- tab-bar-naa tat-bee-raa.

25:40.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹa-taw ʻa-lal- q̣ar-ya-til- la-teee ʹum-ṭi-rat ma-ṭa-ras- sawʹ: ʹa-fa-lam ya-koo-noo ya-raw-na-haa? Bal kaa-noo laa- yar-joo-na Nu-shoo-raa.

25:41.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa ra-ʹaw-ka ʹiñy- yat-ta-khi-ẓoo-na-ka il-laa hu-zu-waa:˹ ʹa-haa-ẓal- la-ẓee ba-ʻa-s̤al- laa-hu ra-soo-laa?

25:42.text: ʹIñ kaa-da la-yu-ḍil-lu-naa ʻan ʹaa-li-ha-ti-naa Law-laaa ʹañ- ṣa-bar-naa ʻa-lay-haa!˺ Wa-saw-fa yaʻ-la-moo-na ḥee-na ya-raw-nal- ʻA-ẓaa-ba man ʹa-ḍal-lu Sa-bee-laa!

25:43.text: ʹA-ra-ʹay-ta ma-nit- ta-kha-ẓa ʹi-laa-ha-hoo ha-waah? ʹA-fa-ʹañ-ta ta-koo-nu ʻa-lay-hi wa-kee-laa?

25:44.text: ʹAm taḥ-sa-bu ʹan-na ʹak-s̤a-ra-hum yas-ma-ʻoo-na ʹaw yaʻ-q̣i-loon? ʹIn hum ʹil-laa kal-ʹan-ʻaa-mi bal hum ʹa-ḍal-lu Sa-bee-laa.

25:45.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹi-laa Rab-bi-ka kay-fa mad-daz̤̣- Z̤̣ill! Wa-law shaaa-ʹa la-ja-ʻa-la-hoo saa-ki-naa! S̤um-ma ja-ʻal-nash- sham-sa ʻa-lay-hi da-lee-laa;

25:47.text: Wa-Hu-wal- la-ẓee ja-ʻa-la la-ku-mul- Lay-la li-baa-sañw- wan-Naw-ma su-baa-tañw- wa-ja-ʻa-lan- Na-haa-ra Nu-shoo-raa.

25:48.text: Wa-Hu-wal- la-ẓeee ʹar-sa-lar- Ri-yaa-ḥa bush-ram- bay-na ya-day Raḥ-ma-tih, wa-ʹañ-zal-naa mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi maaa-ʹañ- ṭa-hoo-raa,

25:49.text: Li-nuḥ-yi-ya bi-hee bal-da-tam- may-tañw- wa-nus-q̣i-ya-hoo mim-maa kha-laq̣-naaa ʹan-ʻaa-mañw- Wa-ʹa-naa-siy-ya ka-s̤ee-raa.

25:50.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ṣar-raf-naa-hu bay-na-hum li-yaẓ-ẓak-ka-roo, fa-ʹa-baaa ʹak-s̤a-run- naa-si ʹil-laa ku-foo-raa.

25:51.text: Wa-law shiʹ-naa la-ba-ʻas̤-naa fee kul-li q̣ar-ya-tin- na-ẓee-raa.

25:52.text: Fa-laa tu-ṭi-ʻil- kaa-fi-ree-na wa-jaa-hid-hum̃- bi-hee ji-haa-dañ- ka-bee-raa.

25:53.text: Wa-Hu-wal- la-ẓee ma-ra-jal- baḥ-ray-ni haa-ẓaa ʻaẓ-buñ- fu-raa-tuñw- wa-haa-ẓaa mil-ḥun ʹu-jaaj; wa-ja-ʻa-la bay-na-hu-maa Bar-za-khañw- Wa-ḥij-ram- maḥ-joo-raa.

25:54.text: Wa-Hu-wal- la-ẓee kha-la-q̣a mi-nal- maaa-ʹi ba-sha-rañ- fa-ja-ʻa-la-hoo na-sa-bañw- wa-ṣih-raa: wa-kaa-na Rab-bu-ka Q̣a-dee-raa.

25:55.text: Wa-yaʻ-bu-doo-na miñ doo-nil- laa-hi maa laa- yañ-fa-ʻu-hum wa-laa ya-ḍur-ru-hum: wa-kaa-nal- kaa-fi-ru ʻa-laa Rab-bi-hee z̤̣a-hee-raa!

25:57.text: Q̣ul maaa ʹas-ʹa-lu-kum ʻa-lay-hi min ʹaj-rin ʹil-laa mañ shaaa-ʹa ʹañy- yat-ta-khi-ẓa ʹi-laa Rab-bi-hee Sa-bee-laa.

25:58.text: Wa-ta-wak-kal ʻa-lal- Ḥay-yil- la-ẓee laa- ya-moo-tu wa-sab-biḥ bi-Ḥam-dih; wa-ka-faa bi-hee bi-ẓu-noo-bi ʻi-baa-di-hee kha-bee-raa;

25:59.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee kha-la-q̣as- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa wa-maa bay-na-hu-maa fee sit-ta-ti ʹay-yaa-miñ s̤um-ma s-ta-waa ʻa-lal- ʻArsh, ʹAr-Raḥ-maa-nu fas-ʹal bi-hee kha-bee-raa.

25:60.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa q̣ee-la la-hu-mus- ju-doo lir-Raḥ-maa-ni q̣aa-loo wa-mar- Raḥ-maan? ʹA-nas-ju-du li-maa taʹ-mu-ru-naa wa-zaa-da-hum nu-foo-raa.

25:61.text: Ta-baa-ra-kal- la-ẓee ja-ʻa-la fis- sa-maaa-ʹi Bu-roo-jañw- Wa-ja-ʻa-la fee-haa si-raa-jañw- wa-q̣a-ma-ram- mu-nee-raa!

25:62.text: Wa-Hu-wal- la-ẓee ja-ʻa-lal- lay-la wan-na-haa-ra khil-fa-tal- li-man ʹa-raa-da ʹañy- yaẓ-ẓak-ka-ra aw ʹa-raa-da shu-koo-raa.

25:63.text: Wa-ʻi-baa-dur- Raḥ-maa-nil- la-ẓee-na yam-shoo-na ʻa-lal- ʹar-ḍi haw-nañw- wa-ʹi-ẓaa khaa-ṭa-ba-hu-mul- jaa-hi-loo-na q̣aa-loo ˹Sa-laa-maa!˺

25:65.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ya-q̣oo-loo-na Rab-ba-naṣ- rif ʻan-naa ʻA-ẓaa-ba Ja-han-na-ma ʹin-na ʻA-ẓaa-ba-haa kaa-na g̣a-raa-maa,

25:67.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ʹi-ẓaaa ʹañ-fa-q̣oo lam yus-ri-foo wa-lam yaq̣-tu-roo wa-kaa-na bay-na ẓaa-li-ka q̣a-waa-maa.

25:68.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na laa- yad-ʻoo-na ma-ʻal- laa-hi ʹi-laa-han ʹaa-kha-ra wa-laa yaq̣-tu-loo-nan- naf-sal- la-tee ḥar-ra-mal- laa-hu ʹil-laa bil-ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-laa yaz-noon; wa-mañy- yaf-ʻal ẓaa-li-ka yal-q̣a ʹa-s̤aa-maa,

25:69.text: Yu-ḍaa-ʻaf la-hul- ʻA-ẓaa-bu Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti wa-yakh-lud fee-hee mu-haa-naa,

25:70.text: ʹIl-laa mañ taa-ba wa-ʹaa-ma-na wa-ʻa-mi-la ʻa-ma-lañ- ṣaa-li-ḥañ fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka yu-bad-di-lul- laa-hu say-yi-ʹaa-ti-him ḥa-sa-naat: wa-kaa-nal- laa-hu G̣a-foo-rar- Ra-ḥee-maa.

25:71.text: Wa-mañ taa-ba wa-ʻa-mi-la ṣaa-li-ḥañ fa-ʹin-na-hoo ya-too-bu ʹi-lal- laa-hi ma-taa-baa.

25:72.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na laa- yash-ha-doo-naz- zoo-ra wa-ʹi-ẓaa mar-roo bil-lag̣-wi mar-roo ki-raa-maa.

25:73.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ʹi-ẓaa ẓuk-ki-roo bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti Rab-bi-him lam ya-khir-roo ʻa-lay-haa ṣum-mañw- wa-ʻum-yaa-naa.

25:74.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ya-q̣oo-loo-na Rab-ba-naa hab la-naa min ʹaz-waa-ji-naa wa-ẓur-ri-yaa-ti-naa q̣ur-ra-ta ʹaʻ-yu-niñw- waj-ʻal-naa lil-Mut-ta-q̣ee-na ʹI-maa-maa.

25:75.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka yuj-zaw-nal- g̣ur-fa-ta bi-maa ṣa-ba-roo wa-yu-laq̣-q̣aw-na fee-haa ta-ḥiy-ya-tañw- wa-sa-laa-maa,

25:77.text: Q̣ul maa- yaʻ-ba-ʹu bi-kum Rab-bee Law-laa- du-ʻaaa-ʹu-kum: fa-q̣ad kaẓ-ẓab-tum fa-saw-fa ya-koo-nu li-zaa-maa!

26:3.text: La-ʻal-la-ka baa-khi-ʻun- naf-sa-ka ʹal-laa ya-koo-noo Muʹ-mi-neen.

26:4.text: ʹIn- na-shaʹ nu-naz-zil ʻa-lay-him- mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi ʹAa-ya-tañ- fa-z̤̣al-lat ʹaʻ-naa-q̣u-hum la-haa khaa-ḍi-ʻeen.

26:5.text: Wa-maa yaʹ-tee-him- miñ- Ẓik-rim- mi-nar- Raḥ-maa-ni muḥ-da-s̤in ʹil-laa kaa-noo ʻan-hu muʻ-ri-ḍeen.

26:6.text: Fa-q̣ad kaẓ-ẓa-boo fa-sa-yaʹ-tee-him ʹam-baaa-ʹu maa- kaa-noo bi-hee yas-tah-zi-ʹoon!

26:7.text: ʹA-wa-lam ya-raw ʹi-lal- ʹar-ḍi kam ʹam-bat-naa fee-haa miñ kul-li zaw-jiñ- ka-reem?

26:8.text: ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yah: wa-maa kaa-na ʹak-s̤a-ru-hum- Muʹ-mi-neen.

26:10.text: Wa-ʹiẓ naa-daa Rab-bu-ka Moo-saaa ʹa-niʹ- til- q̣aw-maz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen,

26:12.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-bi ʹin-neee ʹa-khaa-fu ʹañy- yu-kaẓ-ẓi-boon:

26:13.text: Wa-ya-ḍee-q̣u ṣad-ree wa-laa yañ-ṭa-li-q̣u li-saa-nee fa-ʹar-sil ʹi-laa Haa-roon.

26:14.text: Wa-la-hum ʻa-lay-ya ẓam-buñ fa-ʹa-khaa-fu ʹañy- yaq̣-tu-loon.

26:15.text: Q̣aa-la kal-laa! faẓ-ha-baa bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naaa ʹin-naa ma-ʻa-kum mus-ta-mi-ʻoon.

26:16.text: Faʹ-ti-yaa Fir-ʻaw-na fa-q̣oo-laaa ʹin-naa Ra-soo-lu Rab-bil- ʻaa-la-meen,

26:18.text: Q̣aa-la ʹa-lam nu-rab-bi-ka fee-naa wa-lee-dañw- wa-la-bis̤-ta fee-naa min ʻu-mu-ri-ka si-neen?

26:19.text: Wa-fa-ʻal-ta faʻ-la-ta-kal- la-tee fa-ʻal-ta wa-ʹañ-ta mi-nal- kaa-fi-reen!

26:20.text: Q̣aa-la fa-ʻal-tu-haaa ʹi-ẓañw- Wa-ʹa-na mi-naḍ- ḍaaal-leen.

26:21.text: Fa-fa-rar-tu miñ-kum lam-maa khif-tu-kum fa-wa-ha-ba lee Rab-bee ḥuk-mañw- wa-ja-ʻa-la-nee mi-nal- mur-sa-leen.

26:22.text: Wa-til-ka niʻ-ma-tuñ ta-mun-nu-haa ʻa-lay-ya ʹan ʻab-bat-ta Ba-neee ʹIs-raaa-ʹeel!

26:24.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-bus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi wa-maa bay-na-hu-maa, ʹiñ kuñ-tum- Moo-q̣i-neen.

26:27.text: Q̣aa-la ʹin-na ra-soo-la-ku-mul- la-ẓeee ʹur-si-la ʹi-lay-kum la-maj-noon!

26:28.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-bul- mash-ri-q̣i wal-mag̣-ri-bi wa-maa bay-na-hu-maa! ʹiñ kuñ-tum taʻ-q̣i-loon!

26:29.text: Q̣aa-la la-ʹi-nit- ta-khaẓ-ta ʹi-laa-han g̣ay-ree la-ʹaj-ʻa-lan-na-ka mi-nal- mas-joo-neen!

26:31.text: Q̣aa-la faʹ-ti bi-heee ʹiñ- kuñ-ta mi-naṣ- ṣaa-di-q̣een!

26:32.text: Fa-ʹal-q̣aa ʻa-ṣaa-hu fa-ʹi-ẓaa hi-ya s̤uʻ-baa-num- mu-been!

26:33.text: Wa-na-za-ʻa ya-da-hoo fa-ʹi-ẓaa hi-ya bay-ḍaaa-ʹu lin-naa-z̤̣i-reen!

26:34.text: Q̣aa-la lil-ma-la-ʹi ḥaw-la-hooo ʹin-na haa-zaa la-saa-ḥi-run ʻa-leem:

26:35.text: Yu-ree-du ʹañy- yukh-ri-ja-kum- min ʹar-ḍi-kum̃- bi-siḥ-ri-hee fa-maa-ẓaa taʹ-mu-roon?

26:36.text: Q̣aa-looo ʹar-jih wa-ʹa-khaa-hu wab-ʻas̤ fil- Ma-daaa-ʹi-ni ḥaa-shi-reen―

26:40.text: La-ʻal-la-naa nat-ta-bi-ʻus- sa-ḥa-ra-ta ʹiñ kaa-noo hu-mul- g̣aa-li-been?

26:41.text: Fa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹas- sa-ḥa-ra-tu q̣aa-loo li-Fir-ʻaw-na ʹa-ʹin-na la-naa la-ʹaj-ran ʹiñ kun-naa naḥ-nul- g̣aa-li-been?

26:42.text: Q̣aa-la na-ʻam wa-ʹin-na-kum ʹi-ẓal- la-mi-nal- mu-q̣ar-ra-been.

26:43.text: Q̣aa-la la-hum- Moo-saaa ʹal-q̣oo maaa ʹañ-tum- mul-q̣oon!

26:44.text: Fa-ʹal-q̣aw ḥi-baa-la-hum wa-ʻi-ṣiy-ya-hum wa-q̣aa-loo bi-ʻiz-za-ti Fir-ʻaw-na ʹin-naa la-naḥ-nul- g̣aa-li-boon!

26:45.text: Fa-ʹal-q̣aa Moo-saa ʻa-ṣaa-hu fa-ʹi-ẓaa hi-ya tal-q̣a-fu maa- yaʹ-fi-koon!

26:49.text: Q̣aa-la ʹaa-mañ-tum la-hoo q̣ab-la ʹan ʹaa-ẓa-na la-kum? ʹIn-na-hoo la-ka-bee-ru-ku-mul- la-ẓee ʻal-la-ma-ku-mus- siḥr! Fa-la-saw-fa taʻ-la-moon! La-ʹu-q̣aṭ-ṭi-ʻan-na ʹay-di-ya-kum wa-ʹar-ju-la-kum- min khi-laa-fiñw- wa-la-ʹu-ṣal-li-ban-na-kum ʹaj-ma-ʻeen!

26:50.text: Q̣aa-loo laa- ḍay-ra ʹin-naaa ʹi-laa Rab-bi-naa muñ-q̣a-li-boon!

26:51.text: ʹIn-naa naṭ-ma-ʻu ʹañy- yag̣-fi-ra la-naa Rab-bu-naa kha-ṭaa-yaa-naaa ʹañ- kun-naaa ʹaw-wa-lal- Muʹ-mi-neen!

26:52.text: Wa-ʹaw-ḥay-naaa ʹi-laa Moo-saaa ʹan- ʹas-ri bi-ʻi-baa-deee ʹin-na-kum- mut-ta-ba-ʻoon.

26:61.text: Faa-lam-maa ta-raaa-ʹal- jam-ʻaa-ni q̣aa-la ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bu- Moo-saaa ʹin-naa la-mud-ra-koon.

26:62.text: Q̣aa-la kal-laa! ʹIn-na ma-ʻi-ya Rab-bee sa-yah-deen!

26:63.text: Fa-ʹaw-ḥay-naaa ʹi-laa Moo-saaa ʹa-niḍ- rib- bi-ʻa-ṣaa-kal- baḥr. Fañ-fa-la-q̣a fa-kaa-na kul-lu fir-q̣iñ kaṭ-ṭaw-dil- ʻa-z̤̣eem.

26:67.text: ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yah: wa-maa kaa-na ʹak-s̤a-ru-hum- Muʹ-mi-neen.

26:70.text: ʹIẓ q̣aa-la li-ʹa-bee-hi wa-q̣aw-mi-hee maa- taʻbu-doon?

26:71.text: Q̣aa-loo naʻ-bu-du ʹaṣ-naa-mañ- fa-na-z̤̣al-lu la-haa ʻaa-ki-feen.

26:74.text: Q̣aa-loo bal wa-jad-naaa ʹaa-baaa-ʹa-naa ka-ẓaa-li-ka yaf-ʻa-loon.

26:77.text: Fa-ʹin-na-hum ʻa-duw-wul- leee ʹil-laa Rab-bal- ʻaa-la-meen;

26:82.text: Wal-la-ẓeee ʹaṭ-ma-ʻu añy- yag̣-fi-ra lee kha-ṭeee-ʹa-tee Yaw-mad- Deen...

26:83.text: Rab-bi hab lee ḥuk-mañw- wa-ʹal-ḥiq̣-nee biṣ-Ṣaa-li-ḥeen;

26:84.text: Waj-ʻal- lee li-saa-na ṣid-q̣iñ- fil- ʹaa-khi-reen;

26:86.text: Wag̣-fir li-ʹa-beee ʹin-na-hoo kaa-na mi-naḍ- ḍaaal-leen;

26:88.text: Yaw-ma laa- yañ-fa-ʻu maa-luñw- wa-laa- ba-noon,

26:89.text: Il-laa man ʹa-tal- laa-ha bi-q̣al-biñ- sa-leem.

26:92.text: Wa-q̣ee-la la-hum ʹay-na maa- kuñ-tum taʻ-bu-doon.

26:93.text: Miñ- doo-nil- laah? Hal yañ-ṣu-roo-na-kum ʹaw yañ-ta-ṣi-roon?

26:97.text: Tal-laa-hi ʹiñ kun-naa la-fee ḍa-laa-lim- mu-been.

26:102.text: Fa-law ʹan-na la-naa kar-ra-tañ- fa-na-koo-na mi-nal- Muʹ-mi-neen!

26:103.text: ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yah: wa-maa kaa-na ʹak-s̤a-ru-hum- Muʹ-mi-neen.

26:106.text: ʹIẓ q̣aa-la la-hum ʹa-khoo-hum Noo-ḥun ʹa-laa tat-ta-q̣oon?

26:109.text: Wa-maaa ʹas-ʹa-lu-kum ʻa-lay-hi min ʹajr; ʹin ʹaj-ri-ya ʹil-laa ʻa-laa Rab-bil- ʻAa-la-meen.

26:112.text: Q̣aa-la wa-maa ʻil-mee Bi-maa- kaa-noo yaʻ-ma-loon?

26:113.text: ʹIn ḥi-saa-bu-hum ʹil-laa ʻa-laa Rab-bee law tash-ʻu-roon.

26:116.text: Q̣aa-loo la-ʹil- lam tañ-ta-hi yaa-Noo-ḥu la-ta-koo-nan-na mi-nal- mar-joo-meen.

26:118.text: Faf-taḥ bay-nee wa-bay-na-hum fat-hañw- wa-naj-ji-nee wa-mam- ma-ʻi-ya mi-nal- Muʹ-mi-neen.

26:119.text: Fa-ʹañ-jay-naa-hu wa-mam- ma-ʻa-hoo fil- ful-kil- mash-ḥoon.

26:121.text: ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yah; wa-maa kaa-na ʹak-s̤a-ru-hum- Muʹ-mi-neen.

26:124.text: ʹIẓ q̣aa-la la-hum ʹa-khoo-hum Hoo-dun ʹa-laa tat-ta-q̣oon?

26:127.text: Wa-maaa ʹas-ʹa-lu-kum ʻa-lay-hi min ʹajr; ʹin ʹaj-ri-ya ʹil-laa ʻa-laa Rab-bil- ʻAa-la-meen.

26:135.text: ʹIn-neee ʹa-khaa-fu ʻa-lay-kum ʻA-ẓaa-ba Yaw-min ʻa-z̤̣eem.

26:136.text: Q̣aa-loo sa-waaa-ʹun ʻa-lay-naaa ʹa-wa-ʻaz̤̣-ta ʹam lam ta-kum- mi-nal- waa-ʻi-z̤̣een!

26:139.text: Fa-kaẓ-ẓa-boo-hu fa-ʹah-lak-naa-hum. ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yah: wa-maa kaa-na ʹak-s̤a-ru-hum- Muʹ-mi-neen.

26:142.text: ʹIẓ q̣aa-la la-hum ʹa-khoo-hum Ṣaa-li-ḥun ʹa-laa tat-ta-q̣oon?

26:145.text: Wa-maaa ʹas-ʹa-lu-kum ʻa-lay-hi min ʹajr: ʹin ʹaj-ri-ya ʹil-laa ʻa-laa Rab-bil- ʻAa-la-meen.

26:152.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na yuf-si-doo-na fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-laa yuṣ-li-ḥoon.

26:154.text: Maaa ʹañ-ta ʹil-laa ba-sha-rum- mis̤-lu-naa: faʹ-ti bi-ʹAa-ya-tin ʹiñ kuñ-ta mi-naṣ- Ṣaa-di-q̣een!

26:155.text: Q̣aa-la ha-ẓi-hee naa-q̣a-tul- la-haa shir-buñw- wa-la-kum shir-bu yaw-mim- maʻ-loom.

26:156.text: Wa-laa ta-mas-soo-haa bi-sooo-ʹiñ fa-yaʹ-khu-ẓa-kum ʻA-ẓaa-bu yaw-min ʻa-z̤̣eem.

26:158.text: Fa-ʹa-kha-ẓa-hu-mul- ʻA-ẓaab. ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yah: wa-maa kaa-na ʹak-s̤a-ru-hum- Muʹ-mi-neen.

26:161.text: ʹIẓ q̣aa-la la-hum ʹa-khoo-hum Loo-ṭun ʹa-laa tat-ta-q̣oon?

26:164.text: Wa-maaa ʹas-ʹa-lu-kum ʻa-lay-hi min ʹajr: ʹIn ʹaj-ri-ya ʹil-laa ʻa-laa Rab-bil- ʻAa-la-meen.

26:166.text: Wa-ta-ẓa-roo-na maa- kha-la-q̣a- la-kum Rab-bu-kum- min ʹaz-waa-ji-kum? bal ʹañ-tum q̣aw-mun ʻaa-doon!

26:167.text: Q̣aa-loo la-ʹil- lam tañ-ta-hi yaa-Loo-ṭu la-ta-koo-nan-na mi-nal- mukh-ra-jeen!

26:173.text: Wa-ʹam-ṭar-naa ʻa-lay-him- ma-ṭa-raa: fa-saaa-ʹa ma-ṭa-rul- muñ-ẓa-reen!

26:174.text: ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yah: wa-maa kaa-na ʹak-s̤a-ru-hum- Muʹ-mi-neen.

26:177.text: ʹIẓ q̣aa-la la-hum Shu-ʻay-bun ʹa-laa tat-ta-q̣oon?

26:180.text: Wa-maaa ʹas-ʹa-lu-kum ʻa-lay-hi min ʹajr: ʹin ʹaj-ri-ya ʹil-laa ʻa-laa Rab-bil- ʻAa-la-meen.

26:181.text: ʹAw-ful- kay-la wa-laa ta-koo-noo mi-nal- mukh-si-reen.

26:183.text: Wa-laa tab-kha-sun- naa-sa ʹash-yaaa-ʹa-hum wa-laa taʻ-s̤aw fil- ʹar-ḍi muf-si-deen.

26:186.text: Wa-maaa ʹañ-ta ʹil-laa ba-sha-rum- mis̤-lu-naa wa-ʹin- na-z̤̣un-nu-ka la-mi-nal- kaa-ẓi-been!

26:187.text: Fa-ʹas-q̣iṭ ʻa-lay-naa ki-sa-fam- mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi ʹiñ- kuñ-ta mi-naṣ- ṣaa-di-q̣een!

26:189.text: Fa-kaẓ-ẓa-boo-hu fa-ʹa-kha-ẓa-hum ʻa-ẓaa-bu Yaw-miz̤̣- z̤̣ul-lah: ʹin-na-hoo kaa-na ʻa-ẓaa-ba Yaw-min ʻA-z̤̣eem.

26:190.text: ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yah: wa-maa kaa-na ʹak-s̤a-ru-hum- Muʹ-mi-neen.

26:197.text: ʹA-wa-lam ya-kul- la-hum ʹAa-ya-tan ʹañy- yaʻ-la-ma-hoo ʻu-la-maaa-ʹu Ba-neee- ʹIs-raaa-ʹeel?

26:199.text: Fa-q̣a-ra-ʹa-hoo ʻa-lay-him- maa kaa-noo bi-hee muʹ-mi-neen.

26:201.text: Laa- yuʹ-mi-noo-na bi-hee ḥat-taa ya-ra-wul- ʻa-ẓa-bal- ʹa-leem;

26:207.text: Maaa ʹag̣-naa ʻan-hum- maa kaa-noo yu-mat-ta-ʻoon!

26:208.text: Wa-maaa ʹah-lak-naa miñ- q̣ar-ya-tin ʹil-laa la-haa muñ-ẓi-roon.

26:213.text: Fa-laa tad-ʻu ma-ʻal- laa-hi ʹi-laa-han ʹaa-kha-ra fa-ta-koo-na mi-nal- mu-ʻaẓ-ẓa-been.

26:215.text: Wakh-fiḍ ja-naa-ḥa-ka li-ma-nit- ta-ba-ʻa-ka mi-nal- Muʹ-mi-neen.

26:216.text: Fa-ʹin ʻa-ṣaw-ka fa-q̣ul ʹin-nee ba-reee-ʹum- mim-maa taʻ-ma-loon!

26:221.text: Hal ʹu-nab-bi-ʹu-kum ʻa-laa mañ- ta-naz-za-lush- sha-yaa-ṭeen?

26:225.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹan-na-hum fee kul-li waa-diñy- ya-hee-moon.

26:227.text: ʹIl-lal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti wa-ẓa-ka-rul- laa-ha ka-s̤ee-rañw- wañ-ta-ṣa-roo mim- baʻ-di maa- z̤̣u-li-moo. Wa-sa-yaʻ-la-mul- la-z̤̣ee-na z̤̣a-la-mooo ʹay-ya muñ-q̣a-la-biñy- yañ-q̣a-li-boon!

27:1.text: Ṭaa-Seeen. Til-ka ʹAa-yaa-tul- Q̣ur-ʹaa-ni wa-ki-taa-bim- mu-been;

27:3.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na yu-q̣ee-moo-naṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta wa-yuʹ-too-naz- Za-kaa-ta wa-hum̃- bil-ʹAa-khi-ra-ti hum yoo-q̣i-noon.

27:4.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na laa- yuʹ-mi-noo-na bil-ʹAa-khi-ra-ti Zay-yan-naa la-hum ʹaʻ-maa-la-hum fa-hum yaʻ-ma-hoon.

27:5.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-kal- la-ẓee-na la-hum sooo-ʹul- ʻa-ẓaa-bi wa-hum fil- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti hu-mul- ʹakh-sa-roon.

27:6.text: Wa-ʹin-na-ka la-tu-laq̣-q̣al- Q̣ur-ʹaa-na mil- la-dun Ḥa-kee-min ʻA-leem.

27:7.text: ʹIẓ q̣aa-la Moo-saa li-ʹah-li-heee ʹin-neee ʹaa-nas-tu naa-raa; sa-ʹaa-tee-kum- min-haa bi-kha-ba-rin ʹaw ʹaa-tee-kum̃- bi-shi-haa-biñ- q̣a-ba-sil- la-ʻal-la-kum taṣ-ṭa-loon.

27:8.text: Fa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹa-haa noo-di-ya ʹam- boo-ri-ka mañ- fin- Naa-ri wa-man ḥaw-la-haa: wa-Sub-ḥaa-nal- laa-hi Rab-bil- ʻAa-la-meen.

27:9.text: Yaa-Moo-saaa ʹin-na-hooo ʹA-nal- laa-hul- ʻA-zee-zul- Ḥa-keem!

27:10.text: Wa-ʹal-q̣i ʻa-ṣaak! fa-lam-maa ra-ʹaa-haa tah-taz-zu ka-ʹan-na-haa jaaan-nuñw- wal-laa mud-bi-rañw- wa-lam yu-ʻaq̣-q̣ib yaa-Moo-saa laa- ta-khaf: ʹin-nee laa- ya-khaa-fu la-day-yal- mur-sa-loon,

27:11.text: ʹIl-laa mañ- z̤̣a-la-ma s̤um-ma bad-da-la ḥus-nam- baʻ-da sooo-ʹiñ fa-ʹin-nee G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

27:12.text: Wa-ʹad-khil ya-da-ka fee jay-bi-ka takh-ruj bay-ḍaaa-ʹa min- g̣ay-ri soooʹ: fee tis-ʻi ʹAa-yaa-tin ʹi-laa Fir-ʻaw-na wa-q̣aw-mih: ʹin-na-hum kaa-noo q̣aw-mañ- faa-si-q̣een.

27:13.text: Fa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹat-hum ʹAa-yaa-tu-naa mub-ṣi-ra-tañ q̣aa-loo haa-ẓaa siḥ-rum- mu-been!

27:14.text: Wa-ja-ḥa-doo bi-haa was-tay-q̣a-nat-haaa ʹañ-fu-su-hum z̤̣ul-mañw- wa-ʻu-luw-waa; fañ-z̤̣ur kay-fa kaa-na ʻaa-q̣i-ba-tul- muf-si-deen!

27:15.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹaa-tay-naa Daa-woo-da wa-Su-lay-maa-na ʻil-maa: Wa-q̣aa-lal- Ḥam-du- lil-laa-hil- la-ẓee faḍ-ḍal-naa ʻa-laa ka-s̤ee-rim- min ʻi-baa-di-hil- Muʹ-mi-neen!

27:16.text: Wa-wa-ri-s̤a Su-lay-maa-nu Daa-woo-da wa-q̣aa-la yaaa-ʹay-yu-han- naa-su ʻul-lim-naa Mañ-ṭi-q̣aṭ- Ṭay-ri wa-ʹoo-tee-naa miñ- kul-li shayʹ: ʹin-na haa-ẓaa la-hu-wal- Faḍ-lul- mu-been.

27:17.text: Wa-ḥu-shi-ra li-Su-lay-maa-na ju-noo-du-hoo mi-nal- jin-ni wal-ʹiñ-si waṭ-ṭay-ri fa-hum yoo-za-ʹoon;

27:18.text: Ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaaa ʹa-taw ʻa-laa Waa-din- nam-li q̣aa-lat nam-la-tuñy- yaaa-ʹay-yu-han- nam-lud- khu-loo ma-saa-ki-na-kum, laa- yaḥ-ṭi-man-na-kum Su-lay-maa-nu wa-ju-noo-du-hoo wa-hum laa- yash-ʻu-roon.

27:19.text: Fa-ta-bas-sa-ma ḍaa-ḥi-kam- miñ- q̣aw-li-haa wa-q̣aa-la Rab-bi ʹaw-ziʻ-neee ʹan ʹash-ku-ra niʻ-ma-ta-kal- la-teee ʹan-ʻam-ta ʻa-lay-ya wa-ʻa-laa waa-li-day-ya wa-ʹan ʹaʻ-ma-la ṣaa-li-ḥañ- tar-ḍaa-hu wa-ʹad-khil-nee bi-Raḥ-ma-ti-ka fee ʻi-baa-di-kaṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥeen.

27:20.text: Wa-ta-faq̣-q̣a-daṭ- Ṭay-ra fa-q̣aa-la maa- li-ya laaa ʹa-r al-Hud-hu-da ʹam kaa-na mi-nal- g̣aaa-ʹi-been?

27:21.text: La-ʹu-ʻaẓ-ẓi-ban-na-hoo ʻa-ẓaa-bañ sha-dee-dan ʹaw la-ʹaẓ-ba-ḥan-na-hooo ʹaw la-yaʹ-ti-yan-nee bi-sul-ṭaa-nim- mu-been.

27:22.text: Fa-ma-ka-s̤a g̣ay-ra ba-ʻee-diñ fa-q̣aa-la ʹa-ḥa-tu bi-maa lam tu-ḥiṭ bi-hee wa-jiʹ-tu-ka miñ- Sa-ba-ʹim- bi-na-ba-ʹiñy- ya-q̣een.

27:23.text: ʹIn-nee wa-jat-tum- ra-ʹa-tañ tam-li-ku-hum wa-ʹoo-ti-yat miñ kul-li shay-ʹiñw- wa-la-haa ʻar-shun ʻa-z̤̣eem.

27:24.text: Wa-jat-tu-haa wa-q̣aw-ma-haa yas-ju-doo-na lish-sham-si miñ doo-nil- laa-hi wa-zay-ya-na la-hu-mush- Shay-ṭaa-nu ʹaʻ-maa-la-hum fa-ṣad-da-hum ʻa-nis- Sa-bee-li fa-hum laa- yah-ta-doon;

27:25.text: ʹAl-laa yas-ju-doo lil-laa-hil- la-ẓee yukh-ri-jul- khab-ʹa fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi wa-yaʻ-la-mu maa- tukh-foo-na wa-maa tuʻ-li-noon.

27:26.text: ʹAl-laa-hu laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa Hu-wa Rab-bul- ʻAr-shil- ʻA-z̤̣eem!

27:27.text: Q̣aa-la sa-nañ-z̤̣u-ru ʹa-ṣa-daq̣-ta ʹam kuñ-ta mi-nal- kaa-ẓi-been!

27:28.text: ʹIẓ-hab- bi-Ki-taa-bee haa-ẓaa fa-ʹal-q̣ih ʹi-lay-him s̤um-ma ta-wal-la ʻan-hum fañ-z̤̣ur maa-ẓaa yar-ji-ʻoon.

27:29.text: Q̣aa-lat yaa-ʹay-yu-hal- ma-la-ʹu ʹin-neee ʹul-q̣i-ya ʹi-lay-ya ki-taa-buñ- ka-reem.

27:30.text: ʹIn-na-hoo miñ- Su-lay-maa-na wa-ʹin-na-hoo ˹Bis-mil- laa-hir- Raḥ-maa-nir- Ra-ḥeem:˺

27:32.text: Q̣aa-lat yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- ma-la-ʹu af-too-nee feee ʹam-ree: maa- kuñ-tu q̣aa-ṭi-ʻa-tan ʹam-ran ḥat-taa tash-ha-doon.

27:33.text: Q̣aa-loo naḥ-nu ʹu-loo q̣uw-wa-tiñw- wa-ʹu-loo baʹ-siñ- sha-deed: wal-ʹam-ru ʹi-lay-ki fañ-z̤̣u-ree maa-ẓaa taʹ-mu-reen.

27:34.text: Q̣aa-lat ʹin-nal- mu-loo-ka ʹi-ẓaa da-kha-loo q̣ar-ya-tan ʹaf-sa-doo-haa wa-ja-ʻa-looo ʹa-ʻiz-za-ta ʹah-li-haaa ʹa-ẓil-lah: wa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka yaf-ʻa-loon.

27:35.text: Wa-ʹin-nee mur-si-la-tun ʹi-lay-him bi-ha-diy-ya-tiñ fa-naa-z̤̣i-ra-tum- bi-ma yar-ji-ʻul- mur-sa-loon.

27:36.text: Fa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹa Su-lay-maa-na q̣aa-la ʹa-tu-mid-doo-na-ni bi-maal? Fa-maaa ʹaa-taa-ni-yal- laa-hu khay-rum- mim-maaa ʹaa-taa-kum! Bal ʹañ-tum̃- bi-ha-diy-ya-ti-kum taf-ra-ḥoon!

27:37.text: ʹIr-jiʻ ʹi-lay-him fa-la-naʹ-ti-yan-na-hum̃- bi-ju-noo-dil- laa q̣i-ba-la la-hum̃- bi-haa wa-la-nukh-ri-jan-na-hum- min-haaa ʹa-ẓil-la-tañw- Wa-hum ṣaa-g̣i-roon.

27:38.text: Q̣aa-la yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- ma-la-ʹu ʹay-yu-kum yaʹ-tee-nee bi-ʻar-shi-haa q̣ab-la ʹañy- yaʹ-too-nee mus-li-meen?

27:39.text: Q̣aa-la ʻIf-ree-tum- mi-nal- jin-ni ʹa-na ʹaa-tee-ka bi-hee q̣ab-la ʹañ ta-q̣oo-ma mim- ma-q̣aa-mik: wa-ʹin-nee ʻa-lay-hi la-q̣a-wiy-yun ʹa-meen.

27:40.text: Q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee ʻiñ-da-hoo ʻil-mum- mi-nal- Ki-taa-bi ʹa-na ʹaa-tee-ka bi-hee q̣ab-la ʹañy- yar-tad-da ʹi-lay-ka ṭar-fuk! Fa-lam-maa ra-ʹaa-hu mus-ta-q̣ir-ran ʻiñ-da-hoo q̣aa-la haa-ẓaa miñ- faḍ-li Rab-bee li-yab-lu-wa-neee ʹa-ʹash-ku-ru ʹam ʹak-fur! Wa-mañ- sha-ka-ra fa-ʹin-na-maa yash-ku-ru li-naf-sih; wa-mañ- ka-fa-ra fa-ʹin-na Rab-bee G̣a-niy-yuñ- Ka-reem!...

27:41.text: Q̣aa-la nak-ki-roo la-haa ʻar-sha-haa nañ-z̤̣ur ʹa-tah-ta-deee ʹam ta-koo-nu mi-nal- la-ẓee-na laa- yah-ta-doon.

27:42.text: Fa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹat q̣ee-la ʹa-haa-ka-ẓaa ʻar-shuk? Q̣aa-lat ka-ʹan-na-hoo hoo; wa-ʹoo-tee-nal- ʻil-ma miñ- q̣ab-li-haa wa-kun-naa Mus-li-meen.

27:43.text: Wa-ṣad-da-haa maa- kaa-nat- taʻ-bu-du miñ- doo-nil- laah: ʹin-na-haa kaa-nat miñ- q̣aw-miñ kaa-fi-reen.

27:44.text: Q̣ee-la la-had- khu-liṣ- ṣarḥ: fa-lam-maaنَ ra-ʹat-hu ḥa-si-bat-hu luj-ja-tañw- wa-ka-sha-fat ʻañ- saa-q̣ay-haa. Q̣aa-la ʹin-na-hoo ṣar-ḥum- mu-mar-ra-dum- miñ- q̣a-waa-reer. Q̣aa-lat Rab-bi ʹin-nee z̤̣a-lam-tu naf-see wa-ʹas-lam-tu ma-ʻa Su-lay-maa-na lil-laa-hi Rab-bil- ʻAa-la-meen.

27:45.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹar-sal-naaa ʹi-laa S̤a-moo-da ʹa-khaa-hum Ṣaa-li-ḥan ʹa-niʻ- bu-dul- laa-ha fa-ʹi-ẓaa hum fa-ree-q̣aa-ni yakh-ta-ṣi-moon.

27:46.text: Q̣aa-la yaa-q̣aw-mi li-ma tas-taʻ-ji-loo-na bis-say-yi-ʹa-ti q̣ab-lal- ḥa-sa-nah? Law-laa- tas-tag̣-fi-roo-nal- laa-ha la-ʻal-la-kum tur-ḥa-moon.

27:47.text: Q̣aa-luṭ- ṭay-yar-naa bi-ka wa-bi-mam- ma-ʻak. Q̣aa-la ṭaaa-ʹi-ru-kum ʻiñ-dal- laa-hi bal ʹañ-tum q̣aw-muñ- tuf-ta-noon.

27:48.text: Wa-kaa-na fil- ma-dee-na-ti tis-ʻa-tu rah-ṭiñy- yuf-si-doo-na fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-laa yuṣ-li-ḥoon.

27:49.text: Q̣aa-loo ta-q̣aa-sa-moo bil-laa-hi la-nu-bay-yi-tan-na-hoo wa-ʹah-la-hoo s̤um-ma la-na-q̣oo-lan-na li-wa-liy-yi-hee maa- sha-hid-naa mah-li-ka ʹah-li-hee wa-ʹin-naa la-ṣaa-di-q̣oon.

27:50.text: Wa-ma-ka-roo mak-rañw- wa-ma-kar-naa mak-rañw- wa-hum laa- yash-ʻu-roon.

27:51.text: Fañ-z̤̣ur kay-fa kaa-na ʻaa-q̣i-ba-tu mak-ri-him ʹan-naa dam-mar-naa-hum wa-q̣aw-ma-hum ʹaj-ma-ʻeen.

27:52.text: Fa-til-ka bu-yoo-tu-hum khaa-wi-ya-tam- bi-maa z̤̣a-la-moo. ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-ya-tal- li-q̣aw-miñy- yaʻ-la-moon.

27:54.text: Wa-Loo-ṭan ʹiẓ q̣aa-la li-q̣aw-mi-heee ʹa-taʹ-too-nal- faa-ḥi-sha-ta wa-ʹañ-tum tub-ṣi-roon?

27:55.text: ʹA-ʹin-na-kum la-taʹ-too-nar- ri-jaa-la shah-wa-tam- miñ- doo-nin- ni-saaaʹ? Bal ʹañ-tum q̣aw-muñ taj-ha-loon!

27:56.text: Fa-maa kaa-na ja-waa-ba q̣aw-mi-heee ʹil-laaa ʹañ q̣aa-looo ʹakh-ri-jooo ʹaa-la- Loo-ṭim- miñ- q̣ar-ya-ti-kum: ʹin-na-hum ʹu-naa-suñy- ya-ta-ṭah-ha-roon!

27:57.text: Fa-ʹañ-jay-naa-hu wa-ʹah-la-hooo ʹil-lam- ra-ʹa-tah: q̣ad-dar-naa-haa mi-nal- g̣aa-bi-reen.

27:58.text: Wa-ʹam-ṭar-naa ʻa-lay-him- ma-ṭa-raa: fa-saaa-ʹa ma-ṭa-rul- muñ-ẓa-reen!

27:59.text: Q̣u-lil- Ḥam-du lil-laa-hi wa-Sa-laa-mun ʻa-laa ʻi-baa-di-hil- la-ẓee-naṣ- ṭa-faa. ʹAaal-laa-hu khay-run ʻam-maa yush-ri-koon?

27:60.text: ʹAm-man kha-la-q̣as- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa wa-ʹañ-za-la la-kum- mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi maaa-ʹaa? Fa-ʹam-bat-naa bi-hee ḥa-daaa-ʹi-q̣a ẓaa-ta bah-jah: maa- kaa-na la-kum ʹañ- tum-bi-too sha-ja-ra-haa. ʹA-ʹi-laa-hum- ma-ʻal- laah? Bal hum q̣aw-muñy- yaʻ-di-loon.

27:61.text: ʹAm-mañ- ja-ʻa-lal- ʹar-ḍa q̣a-raa-rañw- wa-ja-ʻa-la khi-laa-la-haaa ʹan-haa-rañw- Wa-ja-ʻa-la la-haa ra-waa-si-ya wa-ja-ʻa-la bay-nal- baḥ-ray-ni ḥaa-ji-zaa? ʹA-ʹi-laa-hum- ma- ʻal-laah? Bal ʹak-s̤a-ru-hum laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

27:62.text: ʹAm-mañy- yu-jee-bul- muḍ-ṭar-ra ʹi-ẓaa da-ʻaa-hu wa-yak-shi-fus- sooo-ʹa wa-yaj-ʻa-lu-kum khu-la-faaa- ʹal-ʹarḍ? ʹA-ʹi-laa-hum- ma-ʻal- laah? Q̣a-lee-lam- maa ta-ẓak-ka-roon!

27:63.text: ʹAm-mañy- yah-dee-kum fee z̤̣u-lu-maa-til- bar-ri wal-baḥ-ri wa-mañy- yur-si-lur- ri-yaa-ḥa bush-ram- bay-na ya-day Raḥ-ma-tih? ʹA-ʹi-laa-hum- ma-ʻal- laah? Ta-ʻaa-lal- laa-hu ʻam-maa yush-ri-koon!

27:64.text: ʹAm-mañy- yab-da-ʹul- khal-q̣a s̤um-ma yu-ʻee-du-hoo wa-mañy- yar-zu-q̣u-kum- mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi wal- ʹarḍ? ʹA-ʹi-laa-hum- ma-ʻal-laah? Q̣ul haa-too bur-haa-na-kum ʹiñ- kuñ-tum ṣaa-di-q̣een!

27:65.text: Q̣ul- laa yaʻ-la-mu mañ- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍil- g̣ay-ba ʹil-lal- laah: wa-maa yash-ʻu-roo-na ʹay-yaa-na yub-ʻa-s̤oon.

27:66.text: Ba-lid- daa-ra-ka ʻil-mu-hum fil- ʹAa-khi-rah: bal hum fee shak-kim- min-haa; bal hum- min-haa ʻa-moon!

27:67.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-rooo ʹa-ʹi-ẓaa kun-naa tu-raa-bañw- wa-ʹaa-baaa-ʹu-naaa ʹa-ʹin-naa la-mukh-ra-joon?

27:68.text: La-q̣ad wu-ʻid-naa haa-ẓaa naḥ-nu wa-ʹaa-baaa-ʹu-naa miñ- q̣ab-lu ʹin haa-ẓaaa ʹil-laaa ʹa-saa-ṭee-rul- ʹaw-wa-leen.

27:69.text: Q̣ul see-roo fil- ʹar-ḍi fañ-z̤̣u-roo kay-fa kaa-na ʻaa-q̣i-ba-tul- muj-ri-meen.

27:70.text: Wa-laa taḥ-zan ʻa-lay-him wa-laa ta-kuñ- fee ḍay-q̣im- mim-maa yam-ku-roon.

27:71.text: Wa-ya-q̣oo-loo-na ma-taa haa-ẓal- waʻ-du ʹiñ- kuñ-tum ṣaa-di-q̣een?

27:72.text: Q̣ul ʻa-saaa ʹañy- ya-koo-na ra-di-fa la-kum baʻ-ḍul- la-ẓee tas-taʻ-ji-loon!

27:73.text: Wa-ʹin-na Rab-ba-ka la-Ẓoo- faḍ-lin ʻa-lan- naa-si wa-laa-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ra-hum laa- yash-ku-roon.

27:74.text: Wa-ʹin-na Rab-ba-ka la-yaʻ-la-mu maa- tu-kin-nu ṣu-doo-ru-hum wa-maa yuʻ-li-noon.

27:75.text: Wa-maa min g̣aaa-ʹi-ba-tiñ- fis- sa-maaa-ʹi wal-ʹar-ḍi ʹil-laa fee ki-taa-bim- mu-been.

27:76.text: ʹIn-na haa-ẓal- Q̣ur-ʹaa-na ya-q̣uṣ-ṣu ʻa-laa Ba-neee- ʹIs-raaa-ʹee-la ʹak-s̤a-ral- la-ẓee hum fee-hi yakh-ta-li-foon.

27:78.text: ʹIn-na Rab-ba-ka yaq̣-ḍee bay-na-hum̃- bi-Ḥuk-mih: wa-Hu-wal- ʻA-zee-zul- ʻA-leem.

27:79.text: Fa-ta-wak-kal ʻa-lal- laah: ʹin-na-ka ʻa-lal- Ḥaq̣-q̣il- mu-been.

27:80.text: ʹIn-na-ka laa- tus-mi-ʻul- maw-taa wa-laa tus-mi-ʻuṣ- ṣum-mad- du-ʻaaa-ʹa ʹi-ẓaa wal-law mud-bi-reen.

27:81.text: Wa-maaa ʹañ-ta bi-haa-dil- ʻum-yi ʻañ- ḍa-laa-la-ti-him: ʹiñ- tus-mi-ʻu ʹil-laa mañy- yuʹ-mi-nu bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa fa-hum- Mus-li-moon.

27:82.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa wa-q̣a-ʻal- Q̣aw-lu ʻa-lay-him ʹakh-raj-naa la-hum Daaab-ba-tam- mi-nal- ʹar-ḍi tu-kal-li-mu-hum ʹan-nan- naa-sa kaa-noo bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa laa- yoo-q̣i-noon.

27:83.text: Wa-Yaw-ma naḥ-shu-ru miñ kul-li ʹum-ma-tiñ- faw-jam- mim-mañy- yu-kaẓ-ẓi-bu bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa fa-hum yoo-za-ʻoon,

27:84.text: Ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa jaaa-ʹoo q̣aa-la ʹa-kaẓ-ẓab-tum̃- bi-ʹAa-yaa-tee wa-lam tu-ḥee-ṭoo bi-haa ʻil-man ʹam-maa-ẓaa kuñ-tum taʻ-ma-loon?

27:85.text: Wa-wa-q̣a-ʻal- Q̣aw-lu ʻa-lay-him̃- bi-maa z̤̣a-la-moo fa-hum laa- yañ-ṭi-q̣oon.

27:86.text: ʹA-lam ya-raw ʹan-naa ja-ʻal-nal- Lay-la li-yas-ku-noo fee-hi wan-Na-haa-ra mub-ṣi-raa? ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yaa-til- li-q̣aw-miñy- yuʹ-mi-noon!

27:87.text: Wa-Yaw-ma yuñ-fa-khu fiṣ- Ṣoo-ri fa-fa-zi-ʻa mañ- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-mañ- fil- ʹar-ḍi ʹil-laa mañ- shaaa-ʹal- laah: wa-kul-lun ʹa-taw-hu daa-khi-reen.

27:88.text: Wa-ta-ral- ji-baa-la taḥ-sa-bu-haa jaa-mi-da-tañw- wa-hi-ya ta-mur-ru mar-ras- sa-ḥaab: ṣun-ʻal- laa-hil- la-ẓeee ʹat-q̣a-na kul-la shayʹ: in-na-hoo kha-bee-rum- bi-maa taf-ʻa-loon.

27:89.text: Mañ- jaaa-ʹa bil-ḥa-sa-na-ti fa-la-hoo khay-rum- min-haa; wa-hum- miñ- fa-za-ʻiñy- Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓin ʹaa-mi-noon.

27:90.text: Wa-mañ- jaaa-ʹa bis-say-yi-ʹa-ti fa-kub-bat wu-joo-hu-hum fin- Naar: hal tuj-zaw-na ʹil-laa maa- kuñ-tum taʻ-ma-loon?

27:91.text: ʹIn-na-maaa ʹumir-tu ʹan ʹaʻ-bu-da Rab-ba haa-ẓi-hil- Bal-da-til-l a-ẓee ḥar-ra-ma-haa wa-la-hoo kul-lu shay-ʹiñw- wa-ʹu-mir-tu ʹan ʹa-koo-na mi-nal- Mus-li-meen,

27:92.text: Wa-ʹan ʹat-lu-wal- Q̣ur-ʹaan: fa-ma-nih- ta-daa fa-ʹin-na-maa yah-ta-dee li-naf-sih: wa-mañ- ḍal-la fa-q̣ul ʹin-na-maaa ʹa-na mi-nal- muñ-ẓi-reen.

27:93.text: Wa-q̣u-lil- Ḥam-du lil-laa-hi sa-yu-ree-kum ʹAa-yaa-ti-hee fa-taʻ-ri-foo-na-haa; wa-maa Rab-bu-ka bi-g̣aa-fi-lin ʻa-maa taʻ-ma-loon.

28:3.text: Nat-loo ʻa-lay-ka min- na-ba-ʹi Moo-saa wa-Fir-ʻaw-na bil-Ḥaq̣-q̣i li-q̣aw-miñy- yuʹ-mi-noon.

28:4.text: ʹIn-na fir-ʻaw-na ʻa-laa fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-ja-ʻa-la ʹah-la-haa shi-ya-ʻañy- yas-taḍ-ʻi-fu ṭaaa-ʹi-fa-tam- min-hum yu-ẓab-bi-ḥu ʹab-naaa-ʹa-hum wa-yas-taḥ-yee ni-saaa-ʹa-hum: ʹin-na-hoo kaa-na mi-nal- muf-si-deen.

28:5.text: Wa-nu-ree-du ʹan- na-mun-na ʻa-lal- la-ẓee-nas- tuḍ-ʻi-foo fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-naj-ʻa-la-hum ʹa-ʹim-ma-tañw- Wa-naj-ʻa-la-hu-mul- waa-ri-s̤een,

28:6.text: Wa-nu-mak-ki-na la-hum fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-nu-ri-ya Fir-ʻaw-na wa-Haa-maa-na wa-ju-noo-da-hu-maa min-hum- maa kaa-noo yaḥ-ẓa-roon.

28:7.text: Wa-ʹaw-ḥay-naaa ʹi-laaa ʹum-mi Moo-saaa ʹan ʹar-ḍi-ʻeeh: fa-ʹi-ẓaa khif-ti ʻa-lay-hi fa-ʹal-q̣ee-hi fil- yam-mi wa-laa ta-khaa-fee wa-laa taḥ-za-nee: ʹin-naa raaad-doo-hu ʹi-lay-ki wa-jaa-ʻi-loo-hu mil-nal- mur-sa-leen.

28:8.text: Fal-ta-q̣a-ṭa-hooo ʹaa-lu Fir-ʻaw-na li-ya-koo-na la-hum ʻa-duw-wañw- Wa-ḥa-za-naa: ʹIn-na Fir-ʻaw-na wa-Haa-maa-na wa-ju-noo-da-hu-maa kaa-noo khaa-ṭi-ʹeen.

28:9.text: Wa-q̣aa-la-tim- ra-ʹa-tu Fir-ʻaw-na q̣ur-ra-tu ʻay-nil- lee wa-lak: laa- taq̣-tu-loo-hu ʻa-saaa ʹañy- yañ-fa-ʻa-naaa ʹaw nat-ta-khi-ẓa-hoo wa-la-dañw- wa-hum laa- yash-ʻu-roon!

28:10.text: Wa-ʹaṣ-ba-ḥa fu-ʹaa-du ʹum-mi Moo-saa faa-ri-g̣aa: ʹiñ- kaa-dat la-tub-dee bi-hee law laaa ʹar-ra-baṭ-naa ʻa-laa q̣al-bi-haa li-ta-koo-na mi-nal- Muʹ-mi-neen.

28:11.text: Wa-q̣aa-lat li-ʹukh-ti-hee q̣uṣ-ṣeeh. Fa-ba-ṣu-rat bi-hee ʻañ- ju-nu-biñw- wa-hum laa- yash-ʻu-roon.

28:12.text: wa-ḥar-ram-naa ʻa-lay-hil- ma-raa-ḍi-ʻa miñ q̣ab-lu fa-q̣aa-lat hal ʹa-dul-lu-kum ʻa-laaa ʹah-li bay-tiñy- yak-fu-loo-na-hoo la-kum wa-hum la-hoo naa-ṣi-ḥoon?...

28:13.text: Fa-ra-dad-naa-hu ʹi-laaa ʹum-mi-hee kay ta-q̣ar-ra ʻay-nu-haa wa-laa taḥ-za-na wa-li-taʻ-la-ma ʹan-na waʻ-dal- laa-hi ḥaq̣-q̣uñw- wa-laa-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ra-hum laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

28:14.text: Wa-lam-maa ba-la-g̣a ʹa-shud-da-hoo was-ta-waaa ʹaa-tay-naa-hu ḥuk-mañw- wa-ʻil-maa: wa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka naj-zil- Muḥ-si-neen.

28:15.text: Wa-da-kha-lal- Ma-dee-na-ta ʻa-laa ḥee-ni g̣af-la-tim- min ʹah-li-haa fa-wa-ja-da fee-ha ra-ju-lay-ni yaq̣-ta-ti-laa-ni haa-ẓaa miñ shee-ʻa-ti-hee wa-haa-ẓaa min ʻa-duw-wih. Fas-ta-g̣aa-s̤a-hul- la-ẓee miñ shee-ʻa-ti-hee ʻa-lal- la-ẓee min ʻa-duw-wi-hee fa-wa-ka-za-hoo Moo-saa fa-q̣a-ḍaa ʻa-layh. Q̣aa-la haa-ẓaa min ʻa-ma-lish- shay-ṭaan: ʹin-na-hoo ʻa-duw-wum- mu-ḍil-lum- mu-been!

28:16.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-bi ʹin-nee z̤̣a-lam-tu naf-see fag̣-fir lee fa-g̣a-fa-ra lah: in-na-hoo Hu-wal- G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

28:17.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-bi bi-maaa ʹan-ʻam-ta ʻa-lay-ya fa-lan ʹa-koo-na z̤̣a-hee-ral- lil-muj-ri-meen.

28:18.text: Fa-ʹaṣ-ba-ḥa fil- Ma-dee-na-ti khaaa-ʹi-fañy- ya-ta-raq̣-q̣a-bu fa-ʹi-ẓal- la-ẓis- tañ-ṣa-ra-hoo bil-ʹam-si yas-taṣ-ri-khuh. Q̣aa-la la-hoo Moo-saaa ʹin-na-ka la-g̣a-wiy-yum- mu-been!

28:19.text: Fa-lam-maaa ʹan ʹa-raa-da ʹañy- yab-ṭi-sha bil-la-ẓee hu-wa ʻa-duw-wul- la-hu-maa q̣aa-la yaa-Moo-saaa ʹa-tu-ree-du ʹañ taq̣-tu-la-nee ka-maa q̣a-tal-ta naf-sam- bil-ʹams? ʹIñ tu-ree-du ʹil-laaa ʹañ- ta-koo-na jab-baa-rañ fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-maa tu-ree-du ʹañ- ta-koo-na mi-nal- Muṣ-li-ḥeen!

28:20.text: Wa-jaaa-ʹa ra-ju-lum- min ʹaq̣-ṣal- Ma-dee-na-ti yas-ʻaa. Q̣aa-la yaa-Moo-saaa ʹin-nal- ma-la-ʹa yaʹ-ta-mi-roo-na bi-ka li-yaq̣-tu-loo-ka fakh-ruj ʹin-nee la-ka mi-nan- naa-ṣi-ḥeen.

28:21.text: Fa-kha-ra-ja min-haa khaaa-ʹi-fañy- ya-ta-raq̣-q̣ab: Q̣aa-la Rab-bi naj-ji-nee mi-nal- q̣aw-miz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen.

28:22.text: Wa-lam-maa ta-waj-ja-ha til-q̣aaa-ʹa Mad-ya-na q̣aa-la ʻa-saa Rab-beee ʹañy- yah-di-ya-nee sa-waaa-ʹas- sa-beel.

28:23.text: Wa-lam-maa wa-ra-da maaa-ʹa Mad-ya-na wa-ja-da ʻa-lay-hi ʹum-ma-tam- mi-nan- naa-si yas-q̣oo-na wa-wa-ja-da miñ- doo-ni-hi-mum- ra-ʹa-tay-ni ta-ẓoo-daan. Q̣aa-la maa- khaṭ-bu-ku-maa? Q̣aa-la-taa laa- nas-q̣ee ḥat-taa yuṣ-di-rar- ri-ʻaaa-ʹu wa-ʹa-boo-naa shay-khuñ ka-beer.

28:24.text: Fa-sa-q̣aa la-hu-maa s̤um-ma ta-wal-laaa ʹi-laz̤̣- z̤̣il-li fa-q̣aa-la Rab-bi ʹin-nee li-maaa añ-zal-ta ʹi-lay-ya min khay-riñ- fa-q̣eer!..

28:25.text: Fa-jaaa-ʹat-hu ʹiḥ-daa-hu-maa tam-shee ʻa-las- tiḥ-yaaaʹ, Q̣aa-lat ʹin-na ʹa-bee yad-ʻoo-ka li-yaj-zi-ya-ka ʹaj-ra maa- sa-q̣ay-ta la-naa. Fa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹa-hoo wa-q̣aṣ-ṣa ʻa-lay-hil- q̣a-ṣa-ṣa q̣aa-la laa- ta-khaf: na-jaw-ta mi-nal- q̣aw-miz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen.

28:26.text: Q̣aa-lat ʹiḥ-daa-hu-maa yaaa-ʹa-ba-tis- taʹ-jirh; ʹin-na khay-ra ma-nis- taʹ-jar-tal- q̣a-wiy-yul- ʹa-meen.

28:27.text: Q̣aa-la ʹin-neee ʹu-ree-du ʹan ʹuñ-ki-ḥa-ka ʹiḥ-dab- na-tay-ya haa-tay-ni ʻa-laaa ʹañ- taʹ-ju-ra-nee s̤a-maa-ni-ya ḥi-jaj; fa-ʹin ʹat-mam-ta ʻash-rañ- fa-min ʻiñ-dik. Wa-maaa ʹu-ree-du ʹan ʹa-shuq̣-q̣a ʻa-layk: sa-ta-ji-du-neee ʹiñ- shaaa-ʹal- laa-hu mi-naṣ- Ṣaa-li-ḥeen.

28:28.text: Q̣aa-la ẓaa-li-ka bay-nee wa-bay-nak: ʹay-ya-mal- ʹa-ja-lay-ni q̣a-ḍay-tu fa-laa ʻud-waa-na ʻa-layy. Wal-laa-hu ʻa-laa maa- na-q̣oo-lu Wa-keel.

28:29.text: Fa-lam-maa q̣a-ḍaa Moo-sal- ʹa-ja-la wa-saa-ra bi-ʹah-li-heee ʹaa-na-sa miñ- jaa-ni-biṭ- Ṭoo-ri naa-raa. Q̣aa-la li-ʹah-li-him- ku-s̤ooo ʹin-neee ʹaa-nas-tu naa-ral- la-ʻal-leee ʹaa-tee-kum- min-haa bi-kha-ba-rin ʹaw jaẓ-wa-tim- mi-nan- naa-ri la-ʻal-la-kum taṣ-ṭa-loon.

28:30.text: Fa-lam-maaa ʹa-taa-haa noo-di-ya miñ shaa-ṭi-ʹil- waa-dil- ʹay-ma-ni fil- buq̣-ʻa-til- mu-baa-ra-ka-ti mi-nash- sha-ja-ra-ti ʹañy- yaa-Moo-saaa ʹin-neee ʹA-nal- laa-hu Rab-bul- ʻAa-la-meen.

28:31.text: Wa-ʹan ʹal-q̣i ʻa-ṣaak! Fa-lam-maa ra-ʹaa-haa tah-taz-zu ka-ʹan-na-haa jaaan-nuñw- wal-laa mud-bi-rañw- wa-lam yu-ʻaq̣-q̣ib: Yaa-Moo-saaa ʹaq̣-bil wa-laa ta-khaf: ʹin-na-ka mi-nal- ʹaa-mi-neen.

28:32.text: ʹUs-luk ya-da-ka fee jay-bi-ka takh-ruj bay-ḍaaa-ʹa min g̣ay-ri soooʹ: waḍ-mum ʹi-lay-ka ja-naa-ḥa-ka mi-nar- rah-bi fa-zaa-ni-ka bur-haa-naa-ni mir- Rab-bi-ka ʹi-laa Fir-ʻaw-na wa-ma-la-ʹih: ʹin-na-hum kaa-noo q̣aw-mañ- faa-si-q̣een.
