28:33.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-bi ʹin-nee q̣a-tal-tu min-hum naf-sañ- fa-ʹa-khaa-fu ʹañy- yaq̣-tu-loon.

28:34.text: Wa-ʹa-khee Haa-roo-nu hu-wa ʹaf-ṣa-ḥu min-nee li-saa-nañ- fa-ʹar-sil-hu ma-ʻi-ya rid-ʹañy- yu-ṣad-di-q̣u-nee; ʹin-neee ʹa-khaa-fu ʹañy- yu-kaẓ-ẓi-boon.

28:35.text: Q̣aa-la sa-na-shud-du ʻa-ḍu-da-ka bi-ʹa-khee-ka wa-naj-ʻa-lu la-ku-maa sul-ṭaa-nañ fa-laa ya-ṣi-loo-na ʹi-lay-ku-maa: bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naaa ʹañ-tu-maa wa-ma-nit- ta-ba-ʻa-ku-mal- g̣aa-li-boon.

28:36.text: Fa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹa-hum- Moo-saa bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa bay-yi-naa-tiñ- q̣aa-loo maa- haa-ẓaaa ʹil-laa siḥ-rum- muf-ta-rañw- wa-maa- sa-miʻ-naa bi-haa-ẓaa feee ʹaa-baaa-ʹi-nal- ʹaw-wa-leen!

28:37.text: Wa-q̣aa-la Moo-saa Rab-beee ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-mañ jaaa-ʹa bil-Hu-daa min ʻiñ-di-hee wa-mañ ta-koo-nu la-hoo ʻAa-q̣i-ba-tud- daar: ʹin-na-hoo laa- yuf-li-ḥuz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-moon.

28:38.text: Wa-q̣aa-la Fir-ʻaw-nu yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- ma-la-ʹu maa- ʻa-lim-tu la-kum- min ʹi-laa-hin g̣ay-ree: fa-ʹaw-q̣id lee yaa-Haa-maa-nu ʻa-laṭ- ṭee-ni faj-ʻal lee ṣar-ḥal- la-ʻal-leee ʹaṭ-ṭa-li-ʻu ʹi-laaa ʹi-laa-hi Moo-saa wa-ʹin-nee la-ʹa-z̤̣un-nu-hoo mi-nal- kaa-ẓi-been!

28:39.text: Was-tak-ba-ra hu-wa wa-ju-noo-du-hoo fil- ʹar-ḍi bi-g̣ay-ril- ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-z̤̣an-nooo ʹan-na-hum ʹi-lay-naa laa- yur-ja-ʻoon!

28:40.text: Fa-ʹa-khaẓ-naa-hu wa-ju-noo-da-hoo fa-na-baẓ-naa-hum fil- yamm: fañ-z̤̣ur kay-fa kaa-na ʻAa-q̣i-ba-tuz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen!

28:41.text: Wa-ja-ʻal-naa-hum ʹa-ʹim-ma-tañy- yad-ʻoo-na ʹi-lan- Naar; Wa-Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti laa- yuñ-ṣa-roon.

28:42.text: Wa-ʹat-baʻ-naa-hum fee haa-ẓi-hid- dun-yaa Laʻ-nah; wa-Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti hum- mi-nal- maq̣-boo-ḥeen.

28:43.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹaa-tay-naa Moo-sal- Ki-taa-ba mim- baʻ-di maaa ʹah-lak-nal- q̣u-roo-nal- ʹoo-laa Ba-ṣaaa-ʹi-ra lin-naa-si wa-Hu-dañw- wa-Raḥ-ma-tal- la-ʻal-la-hum ya-ta-ẓak-ka-roon.

28:44.text: Wa-maa kuñ-ta bi-jaa-ni-bil- G̣ar-biy-yi ʹiẓ q̣a-ḍay-naaa ʹi-laa Moo-sal- ʹAm-ra wa-maa kuñ-ta mi-nash- shaa-hi-deen.

28:45.text: Wa-laa-kin-naaa ʹañ-shaʹ-naa q̣u-roo-nañ fa-ta-ṭaa-wa-la ʻa-lay-hi-mul- ʻu-mur; wa-maa kuñ-ta s̤aa-wi-yañ- feee ʹah-li Mad-ya-na tat-loo ʻa-lay-him ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa wa-laa-kin-naa kun-naa mur-si-leen.

28:46.text: Wa-maa kuñ-ta bi-jaa-ni-biṭ- Ṭoo-ri ʹiẓ naa-day-naa wa-laa-kir- Raḥ-ma-tam- mir- Rab-bi-ka li-tuñ-ẓi-ra q̣aw-mam- maaa ʹa-taa-hum- min- na-ẓee-rim- miñ q̣ab-li-ka la-ʻal-la-hum ya-ta-ẓak-ka-roon.

28:47.text: Wa-law-laaa ʹañ- tu-ṣee-ba-hum mu-ṣee-ba-tum- bi-maa q̣ad-da-mat ʹay-dee-him fa-ya-q̣oo-loo Rab-ba-naa Law-laaa ʹar-sal-ta ʹi-lay-naa ra-soo-lañ- fa-nat-ta-bi-ʻa ʹAa-yaa-ti-ka wa-na-koo-na mi-nal- Muʹ-mi-neen!

28:48.text: Fa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹa-hu-mul- Ḥaq̣-q̣u min ʻiñ-di-naa q̣aa-loo law-laaa ʹoo-ti-ya mis̤-la maaa ʹoo-ti-ya Moo-saa? ʹA-wa-lam yak-fu-roo bi-maaa ʹoo-ti-ya Moo-saa miñ- q̣abl? Q̣aa-loo siḥ-raa-ni ta-z̤̣aa-ha-raa! Wa-q̣aa-looo ʹin-naa bi-kul-liñ- kaa-fi-roon!

28:49.text: Q̣ul faʹ-too bi-Ki-taa-bim- min ʻiñ-dil- laa-hi hu-wa ʹah-daa min-hu-maaa ʹat-ta-biʻ-hu ʹiñ- kuñ-tum ṣaa-di-q̣een!

28:50.text: Fa-ʹil- lam yas-ta-jee-boo la-ka faʻ-lam ʹan-na-maa yat-ta-bi-ʻoo-na ʹah-waaa-ʹa-hum: wa-man ʹa-ḍal-lu mim-ma-nit- ta-ba-ʻa ha-waa-hu bi-g̣ay-ri hu-dam- mi-nal- laah? ʹIn-nal- laa-ha laa- yah-dil- q̣aw-maz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen.

28:51.text: Wa-la-q̣ad waṣ-ṣal-naa la-hu-mul- Q̣aw-la la-ʻal-la-hum ya-ta-ẓak-ka-roon.

28:52.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-tay-naa-hu-mul- Ki-taa-ba miñ- q̣ab-li-hee hum̃- bi-hee yuʹ-mi-noon;

28:53.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa yut-laa ʻa-lay-him q̣aa-looo ʹaa-man-naa bi-heee ʹin-na-hul- Ḥaq̣-q̣u mir- Rab-bi-naaa ʹin-naa kun-naa miñ- q̣ab-li-hee Mus-li-meen.

28:54.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka yuʹ-taw-na ʹaj-ra-hum- mar-ra-tay-ni bi-maa ṣa-ba-roo wa-yad-ra-ʹoo-na bil-ḥa-sa-na-tis- say-yi-ʹa-ta wa-mim-maa ra-zaq̣-naa-hum yuñ-fi-q̣oon.

28:55.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa sa-mi-ʻul- lag̣-wa ʹaʻ-ra-ḍoo ʻan-hu wa-q̣aa-loo la-naaa ʹaʻ-maa-lu-naa wa-la-kum ʹaʻ-maa-lu-kum; Sa-laa-mun ʻa-lay-kum: laa- nab-ta-g̣il- jaa-hi-leen.

28:56.text: ʹIn-na-ka laa- tah-dee man ʹaḥ-bab-ta wa-laa-kin-nal- laa-ha yah-dee mañy- ya-shaaaʹ: wa-Hu-wa ʹaʻ-la-mu bil-muh-ta-deen.

28:57.text: Wa-q̣aa-looo ʹin- nat-ta-bi-ʻil- hu-daa ma-ʻa-ka nu-ta-khaṭ-ṭaf min ʹar-ḍi-naa. ʹA-wa-lam nu-mak-kil- la-hum Ḥa-ra-man ʹaa-mi-nañy- yuj-baaa ʹi-lay-hi s̤a-ma-raa-tu kul-li shay-ʹir- riz-q̣am- mil- la-dun-naa wa-laa-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ra-hum laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

28:58.text: Wa-kam ʹah-lak-naa miñ- q̣ar-ya-tim- ba-ṭi-rat ma-ʻee-sha-ta-haa! Fa-til-ka ma-saa-ki-nu-hum lam tus-kam- mim- baʻ-di-him ʹil-laa q̣a-lee-laa! Wa-kun-naa Naḥ-nul- waa-ri-s̤een!

28:59.text: Wa-maa kaa-na Rab-bu-ka muh-li-kal- q̣u-raa ḥat-taa yab-ʻa-s̤a feee ʹum-mi-haa ra-soo-lañy- yat-loo ʻa-lay-him ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa; wa-maa kun-naa muh-li-kil- q̣u-raaa ʹil-laa wa-ʹah-lu-haa z̤̣aa-li-moon.

28:60.text: Wa-maaa ʹoo-tee-tum- miñ shay-ʹiñ fa-ma-taa-ʻul- ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa wa-zee-na-tu-haa; wa-maa ʻiñ-dal- laa-hi khay-ruñw- wa-ʹab-q̣aa: ʹa-fa-laa taʻ-q̣i-loon?

28:61.text: ʹA-fa-mañw- wa-ʻad-naa-hu waʻ-dan ḥa-sa-nañ fa-hu-wa laa-q̣ee-hi ka-mam- mat-taʻ-naa-hu ma-taa-ʻal- ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa s̤um-ma hu-wa Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti mi-nal- muḥ-ḍa-reen?

28:62.text: Wa-Yaw-ma yu-naa-dee-him fa-ya-q̣oo-lu ʹay-na shu-ra-kaaa-ʹi-yal- la-ẓee-na kuñ-tum taz-ʻu-moon?

28:63.text: Q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na ḥaq̣-q̣a ʻa-lay-hi-mul- q̣aw-lu Rab-ba-naa haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹil- la-ẓee-na ʹag̣-way-naa: ʹag̣-way-naa-hum ka-maa g̣a-way-naa: ta-bar-raʹ-naaa ʹi-lay-ka maa- kaa-nooo ʹiy-yaa-naa yaʻ-bu-doon.

28:64.text: Wa-q̣ee-lad- ʻoo shu-ra-kaaa-ʹa-kum fa-da-ʻaw-hum fa-lam yas-ta-jee-boo la-hum wa-ra-ʹa-wul- ʻa-ẓaa-ba law ʹan-na-hum kaa-noo yah-ta-doon!

28:65.text: Wa-Yaw-ma yu-naa-dee-him fa-ya-q̣oo-lu maa-ẓaaa ʹa-jab-tu-mul- mur-sa-leen?

28:66.text: Fa-ʻa-mi-yat ʻa-lay-hi-mul- ʹam-baaa-ʹu Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓiñ fa-hum laa- ya-ta-saaa-ʹa-loon!

28:67.text: Fa-ʹam-maa mañ taa-ba wa-ʹaa-ma-na wa-ʻa-mi-la ṣaa-li-ḥañ- fa-ʻa-saaa ʹañy- ya-koo-na mi-nal- Muf-li-ḥeen.

28:68.text: Wa-Rab-bu-ka yakh-lu-q̣u maa- ya-shaaa-ʹu wa-yakh-taar: maa- kaa-na la-hu-mul- khi-ya-rah: Sub-ḥaa-nal- laa-hi wa-ta-ʻaa-laa ʻam-maa yush-ri-koon!

28:69.text: Wa-Rab-bu-ka yaʻ-la-mu maa- tu-kin-nu ṣu-doo-ru-hum wa-maa yuʻ-li-noon.

28:70.text: Wa-Hu-wal- laa-hu laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa Hoo. La-hul- Ḥam-du fil- ʹoo-laa wal-ʹaa-khi-rah: wa-la-hul- Ḥuk-mu wa-ʹi-lay-hi tur-ja-ʻoon.

28:71.text: Q̣ul ʹa-ra-ʹay-tum ʹiñ- ja-ʻa-lal- laa-hu ʻa-lay-ku-mul- Lay-la sar-ma-dan ʹi-laa Yaw-mil- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti man ʹi-laa-hun g̣ay-rul- laa-hi yaʹ-tee-kum̃- bi-ḍi-yaaaʹ? ʹA-fa-laa tas-ma-ʻoon?

28:72.text: Q̣ul ʹa-ra-ʹay-tum ʹiñ- ja-ʻa-lal- laa-hu ʻa-lay-ku-mun- Na-haa-ra sar-ma-dan ʹi-laa Yaw-mil- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti man ʹi-laa-hun g̣ay-rul- laa-hi yaʹ-tee-kum̃- bi-Lay-liñ tas-ku-noo-na feeh? ʹA-fa-laa tub-ṣi-roon?

28:73.text: Wa-mir- Raḥ-ma-ti-hee ja-ʻa-la la-ku-mul- Lay-la wan-Na-haa-ra li-tas-ku-noo fee-hi wa-li-tab-ta-g̣oo miñ- Faḍ-li-hee wa-la-ʻal-la-kum tash-ku-roon.

28:74.text: Wa-Yaw-ma yu-naa-dee-him fa-ya-q̣oo-lu ʹay-na shu-ra-kaaa-ʹi-yal- la-ẓee-na kuñ-tum taz-ʻu-moon?

28:75.text: Wa-na-zaʻ-naa miñ- kul-li ʹum-ma-tiñ- sha-hee-dañ fa-q̣ul-naa haa-too bur-haa-na-kum fa-ʻa-li-mooo ʹan-nal- Ḥaq̣-q̣a lil-laa-hi wa-ḍal-la ʻan-hum- maa kaa-noo yaf-ta-roon.

28:76.text: ʹIn-na Q̣aa-roo-na kaa-na miñ- q̣aw-mi Moo-saa fa-ba-g̣aa ʻa-lay-him: wa-ʹaa-tay-naa-hu mi-nal- ku-noo-zi maaa ʹin-na ma-faa-ti-ḥa-hoo la-ta-nooo-ʹu bil-ʻuṣ-ba-ti ʹu-lil- q̣uw-wah. ʹIẓ q̣aa-la la-hoo q̣aw-mu-hoo laa- taf-raḥ ʹin-nal- laah laa- yu-ḥib-bul- fa-ri-ḥeen.

28:77.text: Wab-ta-g̣i fee-maaa ʹaa-taa-kal- laa-hud- Daa-ral- ʹAa-khi-ra-ta wa-laa tañ-sa na-ṣee-ba-ka mi-nad- dun-yaa wa-ʹaḥ-sin ka-maaa ʹaḥ-sa-nal- laa-hu ʹi-lay-ka wa-laa tab-g̣il- fa-saa-da fil- ʹarḍ: ʹin-nal- laa-ha laa- yu-ḥib-bul- muf-si-deen.

28:78.text: Q̣aa-la ʹin-na-maaa ʹoo-tee-tu-hoo ʻa-laa ʻil-min ʻiñ-dee. ʹA-wa-lam yaʻ-lam ʹan-nal- laa-ha q̣ad ʹah-la-ka miñ q̣ab-li-hee mi-nal- q̣u-roo-ni man hu-wa ʹa-shad-du min-hu q̣uw-wa-tañw- wa-ʹak-s̤a-ru jam-ʻaa? Wa-laa yus-ʹa-lu ʻañ ẓu-noo-bi-hi-mul- muj-ri-moon.

28:79.text: Fa-kha-ra-ja ʻa-laa q̣aw-mi-hee fee zee-na-tih. Q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na yu-ree-doo-nal- Ḥa-yaa-tad- Dun-yaa yaa-lay-ta la-naa miṣ-la maaa ʹoo-ti-ya Q̣aa-roo-nu ʹin-na-hoo ḥaz̤̣-z̤̣in la-ẓoo ʻa-z̤̣eem!

28:80.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na ʹoo-tul- ʻil-ma way-la-kum s̤a-waa-bul- laa-hi khay-rul- li-man ʹaa-ma-na wa-ʻa-mi-la ṣaa-li-ḥaa: wa-laa yu-laq̣-q̣aa-haaa ʹil-laṣ- Ṣaa-bi-roon.

28:81.text: Fa-kha-saf-naa bi-hee wa-bi-daa-ri-hil- ʹarḍ; fa-maa kaa-na la-hoo miñ- fi-ʹa-tiñy- yañ-ṣu-roo-na-hoo miñ doo-nil- laa-hi wa-maa kaa-na mi-nal- muñ-ta-ṣi-reen.

28:82.text: Wa-ʹaṣ-ba-ḥal- la-ẓee-na ta-man-naw ma-kaa-na-hoo bil-ʹam-si ya-q̣oo-loo-na way-ka-ʹan-nal- laa-ha yab-su-ṭur- riz-q̣a li-mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu min ʻi-baa-di-hee wa-yaq̣-dir! Law-laaa ʹam- man-nal- laa-hu ʻa-lay-naa la-kha-sa-fa bi-naa! Way-ka-ʹan-na-hoo laa- yuf-li-ḥul- kaa-fi-roon!

28:83.text: Til-kad- Daa-rul- ʹAa-khi-ra-tu naj-ʻa-lu-haa lil-la-ẓee-na laa- yu-ree-doo-na ʻu-luw-wañ- fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-laa fa-saa-daa: wal-ʻaa-q̣i-ba-tu lil-Mut-ta-q̣een.

28:84.text: Mañ- jaaa-ʹa bil-ḥa-sa-na-ti fa-la-hoo khay-rum- min-haa; wa-mañ jaaa-ʹa bis-say-yi-ʹa-ti fa-laa yuj-zal- la-ẓee-na ʻa-mi-lus- say-yi-ʹaa-ti ʹil-laa maa- kaa-noo yaʻ-ma-loon.

28:85.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee fa-ra-ḍa ʻa-lay-kal- Q̣ur-ʹaa-na la-raaad-du-ka ʹi-laa Ma-ʻaad. Q̣ur- Rab-beee ʹaʻ-la-mu mañ jaaa-ʹa bil-hu-daa wa-man hu-wa fee ḍa-laa-lim- mu-been.

28:86.text: Wa-maa kuñ-ta tar-jooo ʹañy- yul-q̣aaa ʹi-lay-kal- Ki-taa-bu ʹil-laa Raḥ-ma-tam- mir- Rab-bi-ka fa-laa ta-koo-nan-na z̤̣a-hee-ral- lil-kaa-fi-reen.

28:87.text: Wa-laa ya-ṣud-dun-na-ka ʻan ʹAa-yaa-til- laa-hi baʻ-da ʹiẓ ʹuñ-zi-lat ʹi-layk: wad-ʻu ʹi-laa Rab-bi-ka wa-laa ta-koo-nan-na mi-nal- mush-ri-keen.

28:88.text: Wa-laa tad-ʻu ma-ʻal- laa-hi ʹi-laa-han ʹaa-khar. Laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa Hoo. Kul-lu shay-ʹin haa-li-kun ʹil-laa Waj-hah. La-hul- Ḥuk-mu wa-ʹi-lay-hi tur-ja-ʻoon.

29:2.text: ʹA-ḥa-si-ban- naa-su ʹañy- yut-ra-kooo ʹañy- ya-q̣oo-looo ʹaa-man-naa Wa-hum laa- yuf-ta-noon?

29:3.text: Wa-la-q̣ad fa-tan-nal- la-ẓee-na miñ- q̣ab-li-him fa-la-yaʻ-la-man-nal- laa-hul- la-ẓee-na ṣa-da-q̣oo wa-la-yaʻ-la-man-nal- kaa-ẓi-been.

29:4.text: ʹAm ḥa-si-bal- la-ẓee-na yaʻ-ma-loo-nas- say-yi-ʹaa-ti ʹañy- yas-bi-q̣oo-naa? Saaa-ʹa maa- yaḥ-ku-moon!

29:5.text: Mañ- Kaa-na yar-joo li-q̣aaa- ʹal-laa-hi fa-ʹin-na ʹA-ja-lal- laa-hi la-ʹaat; wa-Hu-was- Sa-mee-ʻul- ʻA-leem.

29:6.text: Wa-mañ- jaa-ha-da fa-ʹin-na-maa yu-jaa-hi-du li-naf-sih; ʹin-nal- laa-ha la-G̣a-niy-yun ʻa-nil- ʻaa-la-meen.

29:7.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti la-nu-kaf-fi-ran-na ʻan-hum say-yi-ʹaa-ti-him wa-la-naj-zi-yan-na-hum ʹaḥ-sa-nal- la-ẓee kaa-noo yaʻ-ma-loon.

29:8.text: Wa-waṣ-ṣay-nal- ʹiñ-saa-na bi-waa-li-day-hi ḥus-naa: wa-ʹiñ jaa-ha-daa-ka li-tush-ri-ka bee maa- lay-sa la-ka bi-hee ʻil-muñ- fa-laa tu-ṭiʻ-hu-maa. ʹI-lay-ya mar-ji-ʻu-kum fa-ʹu-nab-bi-ʹu-kum̃- bi-maa kuñ-tum taʻ-ma-loon.

29:9.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti la-nud-khi-lan-na-hum fiṣ- Ṣaa-li-ḥeen.

29:10.text: Wa-mi-nan- naa-si mañy- ya-q̣oo-lu ʹaa-man-naa bil-laa-hi fa-ʹi-ẓaaa ʹoo-ẓi-ya fil- laa-hi ja-ʻa-la fit-na-tan- naa-si ka-ʻA-ẓaa-bil- laah! Wa-la-ʹiñ jaaa-ʹa naṣ-rum- mir- Rab-bi-ka la-ya-q̣oo-lun-na ʹin-naa kun-naa ma-ʻa-kum! ʹA-wa-lay-sal- laa-hu bi-ʹaʻ-la-ma bi-maa fee ṣu-doo-ril- ʻaa-la-meen?

29:11.text: Wa-la-yaʻ-la-man-nal- laa-hul- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-la-yaʻ-la-man-nal- Mu-naa-fi-q̣een.

29:12.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo lil-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nut- ta-bi-ʻoo sa-bee-la-naa wal-naḥ-mil kha-ṭaa-yaa-kum. Wa-maa hum̃- bi-ḥaa-mi-lee-na min kha-ṭaa-yaa-hum- miñ- shayʹ; ʹin-na-hum la-kaa-ẓi-boon!

29:13.text: Wa-la-yaḥ-mi-lun-na ʹas̤-q̣aa-la-hum wa-ʹas̤-q̣aa-lam- ma-ʻa ʹas̤-q̣aa-li-him, wa-la-yus-ʹa-lun-na Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti ʻam-maa kaa-noo yaf-ta-roon.

29:14.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹar-sal-naa Noo-ḥan ʹi-laa q̣aw-mi-hee fa-la-bi-s̤a fee-him ʹal-fa sa-na-tin ʹil-laa kham-see-na ʻaa-maa; fa-ʹa-kha-ẓa-hu-muṭ- Ṭoo-faa-nu wa-hum z̤̣aa-li-moon.

29:15.text: Fa-ʹañ-jay-naa-hu wa-ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bas- Sa-fee-na-ti wa-ja-ʻal-naa-haaa ʹAa-ya-tal- lil-ʻAa-la-meen!

29:16.text: Wa-ʹIb-raa-hee-ma ʹiẓ q̣aa-la li-q̣aw-mi-hiʻ- bu-dul- laa-ha wat-ta-q̣ooh. Ẓaa-li-kum khay-rul- la-kum ʹiñ- kuñ-tum taʻ-la-moon!

29:17.text: ʹIn-na-maa taʻ-bu-doo-na miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi ʹaw-s̤aa-nañw-wa takh-lu-q̣oo-na ʹif-kaa. ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na taʻ-bu-doo-na miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi laa- yam-li-koo-na la-kum riz-q̣añ- fab-ta-g̣oo ʻiñ-dal- laa-hir- riz-q̣a waʻ-bu-doo-hu wash-ku-roo lah. ʹI-lay-hi tur-ja-ʻoon.

29:18.text: Wa-ʹiñ- tu-kaẓ-ẓi-boo fa-q̣ad kaẓ-ẓa-ba ʹu-ma-mum- miñ- q̣ab-li-kum. Wa-maa ʻa-lar- ra-soo-li ʹil-lal- ba-laa-g̣ul- mu-been.

29:19.text: ʹA-wa-lam ya-raw kay-fa yub-di-ʹul- laa-hul- khal-q̣a s̤um-ma yu-ʻee-duh? ʹIn-na ẓaa-li-ka ʻa-lal- laa-hi ya-seer.

29:20.text: Q̣ul see-roo fil- ʹar-ḍi fañ-z̤̣u-roo kay-fa ba-da-ʹal- khal-q̣a s̤um-mal- laa-hu yuñ-shi-ʹun- nash-ʹa-tal- ʹAa-khi-rah: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Q̣a-deer.

29:21.text: Yu-ʻaẓ-ẓi-bu mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu wa-yar-ḥa-mu mañy- ya-shaaaʹ, wa-ʹi-lay-hi tuq̣-la-boon.

29:22.text: Wa-maaa ʹañ-tum̃- bi-muʻ-ji-zee-na fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-laa fis- sa-maaa-ʹi wa-maa la-kum- miñ doo-nil- laa-hi miñw- wa-liy-yiñw- wa-laa- na-ṣeer.

29:23.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo bi-ʹAa-yaa-til- laa-hi wa-Li-q̣aaa-ʹi-heee ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka ya-ʹi-soo mir- raḥ-ma-tee wa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka la-hum ʻA-ẓaa-bun ʹa-leem.

29:24.text: Fa-maa kaa-na ja-waa-ba q̣aw-mi-heee ʹil-laaa ʹañ- q̣aa-luq̣- tu-loo-hu ʹaw ḥar-ri-q̣oo-hu fa-ʹañ-jaa-hul- laa-hu mi-nan- Naar. ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yaa-til- li-q̣aw-miñy- yuʹ-mi-noon.

29:25.text: Wa-q̣aa-la ʹin-na-mat- ta-khaẓ-tum- miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi ʹaw-s̤aa-nam- ma-wad-da-ta bay-ni-kum fil- ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa; s̤um-ma yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti yak-fu-ru baʻ-ḍu-kum̃- bi-baʻ-ḍiñw- wa-yal-ʻa-nu baʻ-ḍu-kum̃ baʻ-ḍaa; wa-maʹ-waa-ku-mun- Naa-ru wa-maa la-kum- min- naa-ṣi-reen.

29:26.text: Fa-ʹaa-ma-na la-hoo Looṭ. Wa-q̣aa-la ʹin-nee mu-haa-ji-run ʹi-laa Rab-bee; ʹin-na-hoo Hu-wal- ʻA-zee-zul- Ḥa-keem.

29:27.text: Wa-wa-hab-naa la-hooo ʹIs-ḥaa-q̣a wa-Yaʻ-q̣oo-ba wa-ja-ʻal-naa fee ẓur-riy-ya-ti-hin- Nu-buw-wa-ta wal-Ki-taa-ba wa-ʹaa-tay-naa-hu ʹaj-ra-hoo fid- dun-yaa; wa-ʹin-na-hoo fil- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti la-mi-naṣ- Ṣaa-li-ḥeen:

29:28.text: Wa-Loo-ṭan ʹiẓ q̣aa-la li-q̣aw-mi-heee ʹin-na-kum la-taʹ-too-nal- faa-ḥi-sha-ta maa- sa-ba-q̣a-kum̃- bi-haa min ʹa-ḥa-dim- mi-nal- ʻAa-la-meen.

29:29.text: ʹA-ʹin-na-kum la-taʹ-too-nar- ri-jaa-la wa-taq̣-ṭa-ʻoo-nas- sa-beel? Wa-taʹ-too-na fee naa-dee-ku-mul- muñ-kar? Fa-maa kaa-na ja-waa-ba q̣aw-mi-heee ʹil-laaa ʹañ- q̣aa-luʹ- ti-naa bi-ʻA-ẓaa-bil- laa-hi ʹiñ- kuñ-ta mi-naṣ- ṣaa-di-q̣een.

29:30.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-biñ- ṣur-nee ʻa-lal- q̣aw-mil- muf-si-deen!

29:31.text: Wa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹat Ru-su-lu-naaa ʹIb-raa-hee-ma bil-bush-raa q̣aa-looo ʹin-naa muh-li-kooo ʹah-li haa-ẓi-hil- q̣ar-yah: ʹin-na ʹah-la-haa kaa-noo z̤̣aa-li-meen.

29:32.text: Q̣aa-la ʹin-na fee-ha Loo-ṭaa. Q̣aa-loo naḥ-nu ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-mañ fee-haa. La-nu-naj-ji-yan-na-hoo wa-ʹah-la-hooo ʹil-lam- ra-ʹa-ta-hoo kaa-nat mi-nal- g̣aa-bi-reen!

29:33.text: Wa-lam-maaa ʹañ- jaaa-ʹat Ru-su-lu-naa Loo-ṭañ- seee-ʹa bi-him wa-ḍaa-q̣a bi-him ẓar-ʻañw- wa-q̣aa-loo laa- ta-khaf wa-laa taḥ-zan: ʹin-naa mu-naj-joo-ka wa-ʹah-la-ka ʹil-lam- ra-ʹa-ta-ka kaa-nat mi-nal- g̣aa-bi-reen.

29:34.text: ʹIn-naa muñ-zi-loo-na ʻa-laaa ʹah-li Haa-ẓi-hil- q̣ar-ya-ti Rij-zam- mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi bi-maa kaa-noo yaf-su-q̣oon.

29:35.text: Wa-la-q̣at- ta-rak-naa min-haaa ʹAa-ya-tam- bay-yi-na-tal- li-q̣aw-miñy- yaʻ-q̣i-loon.

29:36.text: Wa-ʹi-laa Mad-ya-na ʹa-khaa-hum shu-ʻay-bañ- fa-q̣aa-la yaa-q̣aw-miʻ- bu-dul- laa-ha war-jul- Yaw-mal- ʹAa-khi-ra wa-laa taʻ-s̤aw fil- ʹar-ḍi muf-si-deen.

29:37.text: Fa-kaẓ-ẓa-boo-hu fa-ʹa-kha-ẓat-hu-mur- raj-fa-tu fa-ʹaṣ-ba-ḥoo fee daa-ri-him jaa-s̤i-meen.

29:38.text: Wa-ʻAa-dañw- Wa-S̤a-moo-da wa-q̣at- ta-bay-ya-na la-kum- mim- ma-saa-ki-ni-him. Wa-zay-ya-na la-hu-mush- Shay-ṭaa-nu ʹaʻ-maa-la-hum fa-ṣad-da-hum ʻa-nis- Sa-bee-li wa-kaa-noo Mus-tab-ṣi-reen.

29:39.text: Wa-Q̣aa-roo-na wa-Fir-ʻaw-na wa-Haa-maan: wa-la-q̣ad jaaa-ʹa-hum- Moo-saa bil-Bay-yi-naa-ti fas-tak-ba-roo fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-maa kaa-noo saa-bi-q̣een.

29:40.text: Fa-kul-lan ʹa-khaẓ-naa bi-ẓam-bih: fa-min-hum- man ʹar-sal-naa ʻa-lay-hi ḥaa-ṣi-baa; wa-min-hum- man ʹa-kha-ẓat-huṣ- Ṣay-ḥah; wa-min-hum- man kha-saf-naa bi-hil- ʹarḍ: wa-min-hum- man ʹag̣-raq̣-naa: wa-maa kaa-nal- laa-hu li-yaz̤̣-li-ma-hum wa-laa-kiñ- kaa-nooo ʹañ-fu-sa-hum yaz̤̣-li-moon.

29:41.text: Ma-s̤a-lul- la-ẓee-nat- ta-kha-ẓoo miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi ʹaw-li-yaaa-ʹa ka-ma-s̤a-lil- ʻAñ-ka-boot: ʹit-ta-kha-ẓat bay-taa! Wa-ʹin-na ʹaw-ha-nal- bu-yoo-ti la-bay-tul- ʻAñ-ka-boot. Law kaa-noo yaʻ-la-moon.

29:42.text: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha yaʻ-la-mu maa- yad-ʻoo-na miñ- doo-ni-hee miñ- shayʹ: wa-Hu-wal- ʻA-zee-zul- Ḥa-keem.

29:43.text: Wa-til-kal- ʹAm-s̤aa-lu naḍ-ri-bu-haa lin-naa-si wa-maa yaʻ-q̣i-lu-haaa ʹil-lal- ʻAa-li-moon.

29:44.text: Kha-la-q̣al- laa-hus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa bil-ḥaq̣q̣. ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-ya-tal- lil-Muʹ-mi-neen.

29:45.text: ʹUt-lu maaa ʹoo-ḥi-ya ʹi-lay-ka mi-nal- Ki-taa-bi wa-ʹa-q̣i-miṣ- Ṣa-laah: ʹin-naṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta tan-haa ʻa-nil- faḥ-shaaa-ʹi wal-muñ-kar; wa-la-Ẓik-rul- laa-hi ʹAk-bar. Wal-laa-hu yaʻ-la-mu maa- taṣ-na-ʻoon.

29:46.text: Wa-laa tu-jaa-di-looo ʹAh-lal- Ki-taa-bi ʹil-laa bil-la-tee hi-ya ʹaḥ-sa-nu ʹil-lal- la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-moo min-hum wa-q̣oo-looo ʹaa-man-naa bil-la-ẓeee ʹuñ-zi-la ʹi-lay-naa wa-ʹuñ-zi-la ʹi-lay-kum wa-ʹI-laa-hu-naa wa-ʹI-laa-hu-kum Waa-ḥi-duñw-wa naḥ-nu la-hoo Mus-li-moon.

29:47.text: Wa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka ʹañ-zal-naaa ʹi-lay-kal- Ki-taab. Fal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-tay-naa-hu-mul- Ki-taa-ba yuʹ-mi-noo-na bi-hee wa-min haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi mañy- yuʹ-mi-nu bih: wa-maa yaj-ḥa-du bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naaa ʹil-lal- kaa-fi-roon.

29:48.text: Wa-maa kuñ-ta tat-loo miñ q̣ab-li-hee miñ ki-taa-biñw- wa-laa- ta-khuṭ-ṭu-hoo bi-ya-mee-ni-ka ʹi-ẓal- lar-taa-bal- mub-ṭi-loon.

29:49.text: Bal hu-wa ʹAa-yaa-tum- bay-yi-naa-tuñ fee ṣu-doo-ril- la-ẓee-na ʹoo-tul- ʻilm: wa-maa yaj-ḥa-du bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naaa ʹil-laz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-moon.

29:50.text: Wa-q̣aa-loo Law-laaa ʹuñ-zi-la ʻa-lay-hi ʹAa-yaa-tum- mir- Rab-bih? Q̣ul ʹin-na-mal- ʹAa-yaa-tu ʻiñ-dal- laah: wa-ʹin-na-maaa ʹa-na na-ẓee-rum- mu-been.

29:51.text: ʹA-wa-lam yak-fi-him ʹan-naaa ʹañ-zal-naa ʻa-lay-kal- Ki-taa-ba yut-laa ʻa-lay-him? ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-Raḥ-ma-tañw- wa-Ẓik-raa li-q̣aw-miñy- yuʹ-mi-noon.

29:52.text: Q̣ul ka-faa bil-laa-hi bay-nee wa-bay-na-kum Sha-hee-daa: yaʻ-la-mu maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ. Wal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo bil-baa-ṭi-li wa-ka-fa-roo bil-laa-hi ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- khaa-si-roon.

29:53.text: Wa-yas-taʻ-ji-loo-na-ka bil-ʻA-ẓaab: Wa-law-laaa ʹa-ja-lum- mu-sam-mal- la-jaaa-ʹa-hu-mul- ʻA-ẓaab: wa-la-yaʹ-ti-yan-na-hum̃- bag̣-ta-tañw- wa-hum laa- yash-ʻu-roon!

29:54.text: Yas-taʻ-ji-loo-na-ka bil-ʻA-ẓaab: wa-ʹin-na Ja-han-na-ma la-mu-ḥee-ṭa-tum- bil-kaa-fi-reen!

29:55.text: Yaw-ma yag̣-shaa-hu-mul- ʻa-ẓaa-bu miñ- faw-q̣i-him wa-miñ taḥ-ti ʹar-ju-li-him wa-ya-q̣oo-lu ẓoo-q̣oo maa- kuñ-tum taʻ-ma-loon.

29:56.text: Yaa-ʻi-baa-di-yal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nooo ʹin-na ʹar-ḍee waa-si-ʻa-tuñ- fa-ʹiy-yaa-ya faʻ-bu-doon!

29:57.text: Kul-lu naf-siñ- ẓaaa-ʹi-q̣a-tul- Mawt: s̤um-ma ʹi-lay-naa tur-ja-ʻoon.

29:58.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- Ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti la-nu-baw-wi-ʹan-na-hum- mi-nal- Jan-na-ti g̣u-ra-fañ- taj-ree miñ- taḥ-ti-hal- ʹan-haa-ru khaa-li-dee-na fee-haa;― niʻ-ma ʹaj-rul- ʻaa-mi-leen!

29:60.text: Wa-ka-ʹay-yim- miñ- daaab-ba-til- laa taḥ-mi-lu riz-q̣a-haa? ʹAl-laa-hu yar-zu-q̣u-haa wa-ʹiy-yaa-kum wa-Hu-was- Sa-mee-ʻul- ʻA-leem.

29:61.text: Wa-la-ʹiñ- sa-ʹal-ta-hum- man kha-la-q̣as- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa wa-sakh-kha-rash- sham-sa wal-q̣a-ma-ra la-ya-q̣oo-lun-nal- laa-hu fa-ʹan-naa yuʹ-fa-koon?

29:62.text: ʹAl-laa-hu yab-su-ṭur- riz-q̣a li-mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu min ʻi-baa-di-hee wa-yaq̣-di-ru lah: ʹin-nal- laa-ha bi-kul-li shay-ʹin ʻA-leem.

29:63.text: Wa-la-ʹiñ- sa-ʹal-ta-hum- man- naz-za-la mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi maaa-ʹañ- fa-ʹaḥ-yaa bi-hil- ʹar-ḍa mim- baʻ-di maw-ti-haa la-ya-q̣oo-lun-nal- laah! Q̣u-lil- Ḥam-du- lil-laah! Bal ʹak-s̤a-ru-hum laa- yaʻ-q̣i-loon.

29:64.text: Wa-maa haa-ẓi-hil- ḥa-yaa-tud- dun-yaaa ʹil-laa lah-wuñw- wa-la-ʻib? Wa-ʹin-nad- Daa-ral- ʹAa-khi-ra-ta la-hi-yal- Ḥa-ya-waan. Law kaa-nu yaʻ-la-moon.

29:65.text: Fa-ʹi-ẓaa ra-ki-boo fil- ful-ki da-ʻa-wul- laa-ha mukh-li-ṣee-na la-hud- deen: fa-lam-maa naj-jaa-hum ʹi-lal- bar-ri ʹi-ẓaa hum yush-ri-koon!

29:66.text: Li-yak-fu-roo bi-maaa ʹaa-tay-naa-hum, wa-li-ya-ta-mat-ta-ʻoo! fa-saw-fa yaʻ-la-moon.

29:67.text: ʹA-wa-lam ya-raw ʹan-naa ja-ʻal-naa Ḥa-ra-man ʹaa-mi-nañw- Wa-yu-ta-khaṭ-ṭa-fun- naa-su min ḥaw-li-him? ʹA-fa-bil-baa-ṭi-li yuʹ-mi-noo-na wa-bi-niʻ-ma-til- laa-hi yak-fu-roon?

29:68.text: Wa-man ʹaz̤̣-la-mu mim-ma- nif-ta-raa ʻa-lal- laa-hi ka-ẓi-ban ʹaw kaẓ-ẓa-ba bil-Ḥaq̣-q̣i lam-maa jaaa-ʹah? ʹA-lay-sa fee Ja-han-na-ma mas̤-wal- lil-kaa-fi-reen?

29:69.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na jaa-ha-doo fee-naa la-nah-di-yan-na-hum Su-bu-la-naa; wa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha la-ma-ʻal- Muḥ-si-neen.

30:3.text: Feee ʹad-nal- ʹar-ḍi wa-hum- mim- baʻ-di g̣a-la-bi-him sa-yag̣-li-boon.

30:4.text: Fee biḍ-ʻi si-neen. Lil-laa-hil- ʹAm-ru miñ- q̣ab-lu wa-mim- baʻd: Wa-yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓiñy- yaf-ra-ḥul- Muʹ-mi-noon.

30:5.text: Bi-naṣ-ril- laah. Yañ-ṣu-ru mañy- ya-shaaaʹ: wa-Hu-wal- ʻA-zee-zur- Ra-ḥeem.

30:6.text: Waʻ-dal- laah. Laaʹ- yukh-li-ful- laa-hu waʻ-da-hu wa-laa-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ran- naa-si laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

30:7.text: Yaʻ-la-moo-na z̤̣aa-hi-ram- mi-nal- ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa wa-hum ʻa-nil- ʹAa-ki-ra-ti hum g̣aa-fi-loon.

30:8.text: ʹA-wa-lam ya-ta-fak-ka-roo feee ʹañ-fu-si-him? Maa- kha-la-q̣al- laa-hus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa wa-maa bay-na-hu-maaa ʹil-laa bil-ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-ʹa-ja-lim- mu-sam-maa: wa-ʹin-na ka-s̤ee-ram- mi-nan- naa-si bi-li-q̣aaa-ʹi Rab-bi-him la-kaa-fi-roon!

30:9.text: ʹA-wa-lam ya-see-roo fil- ʹar-ḍi fa-yañ-z̤̣u-roo kay-fa kaa-na ʻAa-q̣i-ba-tul- la-ẓee-na miñ q̣ab-li-him? Kaa-nooo ʹa-shad-da min-hum q̣uw-wa-tañw- wa-ʹa-s̤aa-rul- ʹar-ḍa wa-ʻa-ma-roo-haaa ʹak-s̤a-ra mim-maa ʻa-ma-roo-haa wa-jaaa-ʹat-hum ru-su-lu-hum̃- bil-Bay-yi-naat: fa-maa kaa-nal- laa-hu li-yaz̤̣-li-ma-hum wa-laa-kiñ- kaa-nooo ʹañ-fu-sa-hum yaz̤̣-li-moon.

30:10.text: S̤um-ma kaa-na ʻAa-q̣i-ba-tal- la-ẓee-na ʹa-saaa-ʹus- sooo-ʹaaa ʹañ kaẓ-ẓa-boo bi-ʹAa-yaa-til- laa-hi wa-kaa-noo bi-haa yas-tah-zi-ʹoon.

30:11.text: ʹAl-laa-hu yab-da-ʹul- khal-q̣a s̤um-ma yu-ʻee-du-hoo s̤um-ma ʹi-lay-hi tur-ja-ʻoon.

30:13.text: Wa-lam ya-kul- la-hum- miñ Shu-ra-kaaa-ʹi-him shu-fa-ʻaaa-ʹu wa-kaa-noo bi-Shu-ra-kaaa-ʹi-him kaa-fi-reen.

30:15.text: Fa-ʹam-mal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti fa-hum fee Raw-ḍa-tiñy- yuḥ-ba-roon.

30:16.text: Wa-ʹam-mal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo wa-kaẓ-ẓa-boo bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa wa-li-q̣aaa-ʹil- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka fil- ʻa-ẓaa-bi muḥ-ḍa-roon.

30:17.text: Fa-Sub-ḥaa-nal- laa-hi ḥee-na tum-soo-na wa-ḥee-na tuṣ-bi-ḥoon.

30:18.text: Wa-la-hul- Ḥam-du fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi wa-ʻa-shiy-yañw- wa-ḥee-na tuz̤̣-hi-roon.

30:19.text: Yukh-ri-jul- ḥay-ya mi-nal- may-yi-ti wa-yukh-ri-jul- may-yi-ta mi-nal- ḥay-yi wa-yuḥ-yil- ʹar-ḍa baʻ-da maw-ti-haa: wa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka tukh-ra-joon.

30:20.text: Wa-min ʹAa-yaa-ti-heee ʹan kha-la-q̣a-kum- miñ- tu-raa-biñ- s̤um-ma ʹi-ẓaaa ʹañ-tum̃- ba-sha-ruñ- tañ-ta-shi-roon!

30:21.text: Wa-min ʹAa-yaa-ti-heee ʹan kha-la-q̣a la-kum- min ʹañ-fu-si-kum ʹaz-waa-jal- li-tas-ku-nooo ʹi-lay-haa wa-ja-ʻa-la bay-na-kum- ma-wad-da-tañw- wa-raḥ-mah: ʹin-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yaa-til- li-q̣aw-miñy- ya-ta-fak-ka-roon.

30:22.text: Wa-min- ʹAa-yaa-ti-hee khal-q̣us- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi wakh-ti-laa-fu ʹal-si-na-ti-kum wa-ʹal-waa-ni-kum: ʹin-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yaa-til- lil-ʻaa-li-meen.

30:23.text: Wa-min ʹAa-yaa-ti-hee ma-naa-mu-kum̃- bil-lay-li wan-na-haa-ri wab-ti-g̣aaa-ʹu-kum- miñ- faḍ-lih: ʹin-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yaa-til- li-q̣aw-miñy- yas-ma-ʻoon.

30:24.text: Wa-min ʹAa-yaa-ti-hee yu-ree-ku-mul- bar-q̣a khaw-fañw- wa-ṭa-ma-ʻañw- wa-yu-naz-zi-lu mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi maaa-ʹañ- fa-yuḥ-yee bi-hil- ʹar-ḍa baʻ-da maw-ti-haa: ʹin-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yaa-til- li-q̣aw-miñy- yaʻ-q̣i-loon.

30:25.text: Wa-min ʹAa-yaa-ti-heee ʹañ- ta-q̣oo-mas- sa-maaa-ʹu wal-ʹar-ḍu bi-ʹAm-rih: s̤um-ma ʹi-ẓaa da-ʻaa-kum daʻ-wa-tam- mi-nal- ʹar-ḍi ʹi-ẓaaa ʹañ-tum takh-ru-joon.

30:26.text: Wa-la-hoo mañ- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ: kul-lul- la-hoo q̣aa-ni-toon.

30:27.text: Wa-Hu-wal- la-ẓee yab-da-ʹul- khal-q̣a s̤um-ma yu-ʻee-du-hoo wa-hu-wa ʹah-wa-nu ʻa-layh. wa-la-hul- Ma-s̤a-lul- ʹAʻ-laa fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ: wa-Hu-wal- ʻA-zee-zul- Ḥa-keem.

30:28.text: Ḍa-ra-ba la-kum- ma-s̤a-lam- min ʹañ-fu-si-kum: hal- la-kum- mim- maa ma-la-kat ʹay-maa-nu-kum- miñ- shu-ra-kaaa-ʹa fee maa- ra-zaq̣-naa-kum fa-ʹañ-tum fee-hi sa-waaa-ʹuñ- ta-khaa-foo-na-hum ka-khee-fa-ti-kum ʹañ-fu-sa-kum? Ka-ẓaa-li-ka nu-faṣ-ṣi-lul- ʹAa-yaa-ti li-q̣aw-miñy- yaʻ-q̣i-loon.

30:29.text: Ba-lit- ta-ba-ʻal- la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-mooo ʹah-waaa-ʹa-hum̃- bi-g̣ay-ri ʻilm. fa-mañy- yah-dee man ʹa-ḍal-lal- laah? Wa-maa la-hum- min- naa-ṣi-reen.

30:30.text: Fa-ʹa-q̣im waj-ha-ka lid-Dee-ni ḥa-nee-faa: Fiṭ-ra-tal- laa-hil- la-tee fa-ṭa-ran- naa-sa ʻa-lay-haa: laa- tab-dee-la li-khal-q̣il- laah: ẓaa-li-kad- Dee-nul- Q̣ay-yi-mu wa-laa-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ran- naa-si laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

30:31.text: Mu-nee-bee-na ʹi-lay-hi wat-ta-q̣oo-hu wa-ʹa-q̣ee-muṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta wa-laa ta-koo-noo mi-nal- mush-ri-keen;

30:32.text: Mi-nal- la-ẓee-na far-ra-q̣oo Dee-na-hum wa-kaa-noo Shi-ya-ʻaa: kul-lu ḥiz-bim- bi-maa la-day-him fa-ri-ḥoon!

30:33.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa mas-san- naa-sa ḍur-ruñ da-ʻaw Rab-ba-hum- mu-nee-bee-na ʹi-lay-hi s̤um-ma ʹi-ẓaaa ʹa-ẓaa-q̣a-hum- min-hu Raḥ-ma-tan ʹi-ẓaa fa-ree-q̣um- min-hum̃- bi-Rab-bi-him yush-ri-koon,―

30:34.text: Li-yak-fu-roo bi-maaa ʹaa-tay-naa-hum! Fa-ta-mat-ta-ʻoo: fa-saw-fa taʻ-la-moon.

30:35.text: ʹAm ʹañ-zal-naa ʻa-lay-him Sul-ṭaa-nañ- fa-hu-wa ya-ta-kal-la-mu bi-maa kaa-noo bi-hee yush-ri-koon?

30:36.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaaa ʹa-ẓaq̣-nan- naa-sa Raḥ-ma-tañ- fa-ri-ḥoo bi-haa: wa-ʹiñ- tu-ṣib-hum say-yi-ʹa-tum- bi-maa q̣ad-da-mat ʹay-dee-him ʹi-ẓaa hum yaq̣-na-ṭoon!

30:37.text: ʹA-wa-lam ya-raw ʹan-nal- laa-ha yab-su-ṭur- riz-q̣a li-mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu wa-yaq̣-dir? ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yaa-til- li-q̣aw-miñy- yuʹ-mi-noon.

30:38.text: Fa-ʹaa-ti ẓal- q̣ur-baa ḥaq̣-q̣a-hoo wal-mis-kee-na wab-nas- sa-beel. Ẓaa-li-ka khay-rul- lil-la-ẓee-na yu-ree-doo-na Waj-hal- laa-hi wa-ʹu-laa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- Muf-li-ḥoon.

30:39.text: Wa-maaa ʹaa-tay-tum- mir- Ri-bal- li-yar-bu-wa feee ʹam-waa-lin- naa-si fa-laa yar-boo ʻiñ-dal- laah; wa-maaa ʹaa-tay-tum- miñ Za-kaa-tiñ- tu-ree-doo-na Waj-hal- laa-hi fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- muḍ-ʻi-foon.

30:40.text: ʹAl-laa-hul- la-ẓee kha-la-q̣a-kum s̤um-ma ra-za-q̣a-kum s̤um-ma yu-mee-tu-kum s̤um-ma yuḥ-yee-kum. Hal miñ Shu-ra-kaaa-ʹi-kum mañy- yaf-ʻa-lu miñ ẓaa-li-kum- miñ- shayʹ? Sub-ḥaa-na-hoo wa-ta-ʻaa-laa ʻam-maa yush-ri-koon!

30:41.text: Z̤̣a-ha-ral- fa-saa-du fil- bar-ri wal-baḥ-ri bi-maa ka-sa-bat ʹay-din- naa-si li-yu-ẓee-q̣a-hum baʻ-ḍal- la-ẓee ʻa-mi-loo la-ʻal-la-hum yar-ji-ʻoon.

30:42.text: Q̣ul see-roo fil- ʹar-ḍi fañ-z̤̣u-roo kay-fa kaa-na ʻAa-q̣i-ba-tul- la-ẓee-na miñ- q̣abl. Kaa-na ʹak-s̤a-ru-hum- mush-ri-keen.

30:43.text: Fa-ʹa-q̣im waj-ha-ka lid-Dee-nil- Q̣ay-yi-mi miñ- q̣ab-li ʹañy- yaʹ-ti-ya yaw-mul- laa ma-rad-da la-hoo mi-nal- laa-hi Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓiñy- yaṣ-ṣad-da-ʻoon.

30:44.text: Mañ- ka-fa-ra fa-ʻa-lay-hi kuf-ruh: wa-man ʻa-mi-la ṣaa-li-ḥañ- fa-li-ʹañ-fu-si-him yam-ha-doon:

30:45.text: Li-yaj-zi-yal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti miñ- faḍ-lih. ʹIn-na-hoo laa- yu-ḥib-bul- kaa-fi-reen.

30:46.text: Wa-min ʹAa-yaa-ti-heee ʹañy- yur-si-lar- ri-yaa-ḥa mu-bash-shi-raa-tiñw wa-li-yu-ẓee-q̣a-kum- mir- Raḥ-ma-ti-hee wa-li-taj-ri-yal- ful-ku bi-ʹAm-ri-hee wa-li-tab-ta-g̣oo miñ- Faḍ-li-hee wa-la-ʻal-la-kum tash-ku-roon.

30:47.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹar-sal-naa miñ- q̣ab-li-ka ru-su-lan ʹi-laa q̣aw-mi-him fa-jaaa-ʹoo-hum̃- bil-bay-yi-naa-ti fañ-ta-q̣am-naa mi-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaj-ra-moo: wa-kaa-na ḥaq̣-q̣an ʻa-lay-naa naṣ-rul- Muʹ-mi-neen.

30:48.text: ʹAl-laa-hul- la-ẓee yur-si-lur- ri-yaa-ḥa fa-tu-s̤ee-ru sa-ḥaa-bañ fa-yab-su-ṭu-hoo fis- sa-maaa-ʹi kay-fa ya-shaaa-ʹu wa-yaj-ʻa-lu-hoo ki-sa-fañ fa-ta-ral- wad-q̣a yakh-ru-ju min khi-laa-lih: fa-ʹi-ẓaaa ʹa-ṣaa-ba bi-hee mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu min ʻi-baa-di-heee ʹi-ẓaa hum yas-tab-shi-roon!―

30:49.text: Wa-iñ- kaa-noo miñ- q̣ab-li- ʹañy- yu-naz-za-la ʻa-lay-him- miñ- q̣ab-li-hee la-mub-li-seen!

30:50.text: Fañ-z̤̣ur ʹi-laaa ʹaa-s̤aa-ri Raḥ-ma-til- laa-hi kay-fa yuḥ-yil- ʹar-ḍa baʻ-da maw-ti-haa! ʹin-na Ẓaa-li-ka la-Muḥ-yil- maw-taa: wa-Hu-waa ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Q̣a-deer.

30:51.text: Wa-la-ʹin ar-sal-naa ree-ḥañ- fa-ra-ʹaw-hu muṣ-far-ral- la-z̤̣al-loo mim- baʻ-di-hee yak-fu-roon!

30:52.text: Fa-ʹin-na-ka laa- tus-mi-ʻul- maw-taa wa-laa tus-mi-ʻuṣ- ṣum-mad- du-ʻaaa-ʹa ʹi-ẓaa wal-law mud-bi-reen.

30:53.text: Wa-maaa ʹañ-ta bi-haa-dil- ʻum-yi ʻañ- ḍa-laa-la-ti-him: ʹiñ tus-mi-ʻu il-laa mañy- yuʹ-mi-nu bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa fa-hum- Mus-li-moon.

30:54.text: ʹAl-laa-hul- la-ẓee kha-la-q̣a-kum- miñ- ḍaʻ-fiñ- sum-ma ja-ʻa-la mim- baʻ-di ḍaʻ-fiñ- q̣uw-wa-tañ- s̤um-ma ja-ʻa-la mim- baʻ-di q̣uw-wa-tiñ- ḍaʻ-fañw- wa-shay-bah: yakh-lu-q̣u maa- ya-shaaa-ʹu wa-Hu-wal- ʻA-lee-mul- Q̣a-deer.

30:55.text: Wa-Yaw-ma ta-q̣oo-mus- Saa-ʻa-tu yuq̣-si-mul- muj-ri-moo-na maa- la-bi-s̤oo g̣ay-ra saa-ʻah: ka-ẓaa-li-ka kaa-noo yuʹ-fa-koon!

30:56.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na ʹoo-tul- ʻil-ma wal-ʹee-maa-na la-q̣ad la-bis̤-tum fee Ki-taa-bil- laa-hi ʹi-laa Yaw-mil- Baʻs̤: fa-haa-ẓaa Yaw-mul- Baʻ-s̤i wa-laa-kin-na-kum kuñ-tum laa- taʻ-la-moon!

30:57.text: Fa-Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓil- laa yañ-fa-ʻul- la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-moo maʻ-ẓi-ra-tu-hum wa-laa hum yus-taʻ-ta-boon.

30:58.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ḍa-rab-naa lin-naa-si fee haa-ẓal- Q̣UR-ʹAA-NI miñ kul-li ma-s̤al: wa-la-ʹiñ- jiʹ-ta-hum̃- bi-ʹAa-ya-til- la-ya-q̣oo-lan-nal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-rooo ʹin ʹañ-tum ʹil-laa mub-ṭi-loon.

30:59.text: Ka-ẓaa-li-ka yaṭ-ba-ʻul- laa-hu ʻa-laa q̣u-loo-bil- la-ẓee-na laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

30:60.text: Faṣ-bir ʹin-na waʻ-dal- laa-hi ḥaq̣-q̣uñw- wa-laa- yas-ta-khif-fan-na-kal- la-ẓee-na laa- yoo-q̣i-noon.

31:4.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na yu-q̣ee-moo-naṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta wa-yuʹ-too-naz- Za-kaa-ta wa-hum̃- bil-ʹAa-khi-ra-ti hum yoo-q̣i-noon.

31:5.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka ʻa-laa Hu-dam- mir- Rab-bi-him wa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- Muf-li-ḥoon.

31:6.text: Wa-mi-nan- naa-si mañy- yash-ta-ree lah-wal- ḥa-dee-s̤i li-yu-ḍil-la ʻañ Sa-bee-lil- laa-hi bi-g̣ay-ri ʻil-miñw- Wa-yat-ta-khi-ẓa-haa hu-zu-waa: ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka la-hum ʻA-ẓaa-bum- mu-heen.

31:7.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa tut-laa ʻa-lay-hi ʹAa-yaa-tu-naa wal-laa mus-tak-bi-rañ- ka-ʹal- lam yas-maʻ-haa ka-ʹan-na feee ʹu-ẓu-nay-hi waq̣-raa: fa-bash-shir-hu bi-ʻA-ẓaa-bin ʹa-leem.

31:8.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti la-hum Jan-naa-tun- Na-ʻeem.―

31:9.text: Khaa-li-dee-na fee-haa. Waʻ-dal- laa-hi ḥaq̣-q̣aa: wa-Hu-wal- ʻA-zee-zul- Ḥa-keem.

31:10.text: Kha-la-q̣as- sa-maa-waa-ti bi-g̣ay-ri ʻa-ma-diñ- ta-raw-na-haa wa-ʹal-q̣aa fil- ʹar-ḍi ra-waa-si-ya ʹañ ta-mee-da bi-kum wa-bas̤-s̤a fee-haa miñ kul-li daaab-bah. Wa-ʹañ-zal-naa mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi maaa-ʹañ- fa-ʹam-bat-naa fee-haa miñ- kul-li zaw-jiñ- ka-reem.

31:11.text: Haa-ẓaa khal-q̣ul- laa-hi fa-ʹa-roo-nee maa-ẓaa kha-la-q̣al- la-ẓee-na miñ- doo-nih: ba-liz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-moo-na fee ḍa-laa-lim- mu-been.

31:12.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹaa-tay-naa Luq̣-maa-nal- Ḥik-ma-ta ʹa-nish- kur lil-laah. Wa-mañy- yash-kur fa-ʹin-na-maa yash-ku-ru li-naf-sih: wa-mañ- ka-fa-ra fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha G̣a-niy-yun Ḥa-meed.

31:13.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣aa-la Luq̣-maa-nu lib-ni-hee wa-hu-wa ya-ʻi-z̤̣u-hoo yaa-bu-nay-ya laa- tush-rik bil-laah. ʹIn-nash- shir-ka la-z̤̣ul-mun ʻa-z̤̣eem.

31:14.text: Wa-waṣ-ṣay-nal- ʹiñ-saa-na bi-waa-li-dayh: ḥa-ma-lat-hu ʹum-mu-hoo wah-nan ʻa-laa wah-niñw- wa-fi-ṣaa-lu-hoo fee ʻaa-may-ni ʹa-nish- kur lee wa-li-waa-li-day-ka ʹi-lay-yal- Ma-ṣeer.

31:15.text: Wa-ʹiñ- jaa-ha-daa-ka ʻa-laaa ʹañ tush-ri-ka bee maa- lay-sa la-ka bi-hee ʻil-muñ fa-laa tu-ṭiʻ-hu-maa wa-ṣaa-ḥib-hu-maa fid- dun-yaa maʻ-roo-fañw- wat-ta-biʻ sa-bee-la man ʹa-naa-ba ʹi-layy: s̤um-ma ʹi-lay-ya mar-ji-ʻu-kum fa-ʹu-nab-bi-ʹu-kum̃- bi-maa kuñ-tum taʻ-ma-loon.

31:16.text: Yaa-bu-nay-ya ʹin-na-haaa ʹiñ ta-ku mis̤-q̣aa-la ḥab-ba-tim- min khar-da-liñ- fa-ta-kuñ fee ṣakh-ra-tin ʹaw fis- sa-maa-waa-ti ʹaw fil- ʹar-ḍi yaʹ-ti bi-hal- laah: ʹin-nal- laa-ha La-ṭee-fun Kha-beer.

31:17.text: Yaa- bu-ny-ya ʹa-q̣i-miṣ-Ṣa-laa-ta waʹ-mur bil-maʻ-roo-fi wan-ha ʻa-nil- muñ-ka-ri waṣ-bir ʻa-laa maaa ʹa-ṣaa-bak: ʹin-na ẓaa-li-ka min ʻaz-mil- ʹu-moor.

31:18.text: Wa-laa tu-ṣaʻ-ʻir khad-da-ka lin-naa-si wa-laa tam-shi fil- ʹar-ḍi ma-ra-ḥaa; ʹIn-nal- laa-ha laa- yu-ḥib-bu kul-la mukh-taa-liñ- fa-khoor.

31:19.text: Waq̣-ṣid fee mash-yi-ka wag̣-ḍuḍ miñ- ṣaw-tik; ʹin-na ʹañ-ka-ral- ʹaṣ-waa-ti la-ṣaw-tul- ḥa-meer.

31:20.text: ʹA-lam ta-raw ʹan-nal- laa-ha sakh-kha-ra la-kum- maa fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-maa fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-ʹas-ba-g̣a ʻa-lay-kum ni-ʻa-ma-hoo z̤̣aa-hi-ra-tañw- wa- baa-ṭi-nah? Wa-mi-nan- naa-si mañy- yu-jaa-di-lu fil- laa-hi bi-g̣ay-ri ʻil-miñw- wa-laa- hu-dañw- wa-laa- ki-taa-bim- mu-neer.

31:21.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa q̣ee-la la-hu-mut- ta-bi-ʻoo maaa ʹañ-za-lal- laa-hu q̣aa-loo bal nat-ta-bi-ʻu maa- wa-jad-naa ʻa-lay-hi ʹaa-baaa-ʹa-naa. ʹA-wa-law kaa-nash- Shay-ṭaa-nu yad-ʻoo-hum ʹi-laa ʻa-ẓaa-bis- Sa-ʻeer?

31:22.text: Wa-mañy- yus-lim waj-ha-hooo ʹi-lal- laa-hi wa-hu-wa Muḥ-si-nuñ- fa-q̣a-dis- tam-sa-ka bil-ʻur-wa-til- wus̤-q̣aa: wa-ʹi-lal- laa-hi ʻAa-q̣i-ba-tul- ʹu-moor.

31:23.text: Wa-mañ- ka-fa-ra fa-laa yaḥ-zuñ-ka kuf-ruh: ʹi-lay-naa Mar-ji-ʻu-hum fa-nu-nab-bi-ʹu-hum̃- bi-maa ʻa-mi-loo: ʹin-nal- laa-ha ʻA-lee-mum- bi-ẓaa-tiṣ- ṣu-door.

31:24.text: Nu-mat-ti-ʻu-hum q̣a-lee-lañ- s̤um-ma naḍ-ṭar-ru-hum ʹi-laa ʻa-ẓaa-bin g̣a-leez̤̣.

31:25.text: Wa-la-ʹiñ- sa-ʹal-ta-hum- man kha-la-q̣as- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa la-ya-q̣oo-lun-nal- laah. Q̣u-lil- Ḥam-du- lil-laah! Bal ʹak-s̤a-ru-hum laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

31:26.text: Lil-laa-hi maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ: ʹin-nal- laa-ha Hu-wal- G̣a-niy-yul- Ḥa-meed.

31:27.text: Wa-law ʹan-na-maa- fil- ʹar-ḍi miñ- sha-ja-ra-tin ʹaq̣-laa-muñw- wal-baḥ-ru ya-mud-du-hoo mim- baʻ-di-hee sab-ʻa-tu ʹab-ḥu-rim- maa na-fi-dat Ka-li-maa-tul- laah: ʹin-nal- laa-ha ʻA-zee-zun Ḥa-keem.

31:28.text: Maa- khal-q̣u-kum wa-laa baʻ-s̤u-kum ʹil-laa ka-naf-siñw- waa-ḥi-dah: ʹin-nal- laa-ha Sa-mee-ʻum- Ba-ṣeer.

31:29.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹan-nal- laa-ha yoo-li-jul- lay-la fin- na-haa-ri wa-yoo-li-jun- na-haa-ra fil- lay-li wa-sakh-kha-rash- sham-sa wal-q̣a-mar: kul-luñy- yaj-reee ʹi-laaa ʹa-ja-lim- mu-sam-mañw- wa-ʹan-nal- laa-ha bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na kha-beer?

31:30.text: Ẓaa-li-ka bi-ʹan-nal- laa-ha Hu-wal- Ḥaq̣-q̣u waʹan-na maa- yad-ʻoo-na miñ- doo-ni-hil- Baa-ṭi-lu wa-ʹan-nal- laa-ha Hu-wal- ʻA-liy-yul- Ka-beer.

31:31.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹan-nal- ful-ka taj-ree fil- baḥ-ri bi-niʻ-ma-til- laa-hi li-yu-ri-ya-kum- min ʹAa-yaa-tih? ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yaa-til- li-kul-li ṣab-baa-riñ- sha-koor.

31:32.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa g̣a-shi-ya-hum- maw-juñ- kaz̤̣-z̤̣u-la-li da-ʻa-wul- laa-ha Mukh-li-ṣee-na la-hud- deen. Fa-lam-maa naj-jaa-hum ʹi-lal- bar-ri fa-min-hum- muq̣-ta-ṣid. Wa-maa yaj-ḥa-du bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naaa ʹil-laa kul-lu khat-ta-riñ- ka-foor!

31:33.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-han- naa-sut- ta-q̣oo Rab-ba-kum wakh-shaw yaw-mal- laa yaj-zee waa-li-dun ʻañw- wa-la-di-hee wa-laa maw-loo-dun hu-wa jaa-zin ʻañw- waa-li-di-hee shay-ʹaa. ʹIn-na waʻ-dal- laa-hi ḥaq̣-q̣uñ- fa-laa ta-g̣ur-ran-na-ku-mul- ḥa-yaa-tud- dun-yaa: wa-laa ya-g̣ur-ran-na-kum̃- bil-laa-hil- G̣a-roor.

31:34.text: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha ʻiñ-da-hoo ʻil-mus- Saa-ʻah. Wa-yu-naz-zi-lul- g̣ay-s̤a wa-yaʻ-la-mu maa- fil- ʹar-ḥaam. Wa-maa tad-ree naf-sum- maa-ẓaa tak-si-bu g̣a-daa: wa-maa tad-ree naf-sum- bi-ʹay-yi ʹar-ḍiñ- ta-moot. ʹIn-nal- laa-ha ʻA-lee-mun kha-beer.

32:2.text: Tañ-zee-lul- Ki-taa-bi laa- ray-ba fee-hi mir- Rab-bil- ʻAa-la-meen.

32:3.text: ʹAm ya-q̣oo-loo-naf- ta-raah? Bal hu-wal- Ḥaq̣-q̣u mir- Rab-bi-ka li-tuñ-ẓi-ra q̣aw-mam- maaa ʹa-taa-hum- min- na-ẓee-rim- miñ- q̣ab-li-ka la-ʻal-la-hum yah-ta-doon.

32:4.text: ʹAl-laa-hul- la-ẓee kha-la-q̣as- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa wa-maa bay-na-hu-maa fee sit-ta-ti ʹAy-yaa-miñ s̤um-mas- ta-waa ʻa-lal- ʻArsh: maa- la-kum- miñ- doo-ni-hee miñw- wa-liy-yiñw- wa-laa- sha-feeʻ: ʹa-fa-laa ta-ta-ẓak-ka-roon?

32:5.text: Yu-dab-bi-rul- ʹam-ra mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi ʹi-lal- ʹar-ḍi s̤um-ma yaʻ-ru-ju ʹi-lay-hi fee yaw-miñ- kaa-na miq̣-daa-ru-hooo ʹal-fa sa-na-tim- mim-maa ta-ʻud-doon.

32:6.text: Ẓaa-li-ka ʻAa-li-mul- g̣ay-bi wash-sha-haa-da-til- ʻA-zee-zur- Ra-ḥeem;―

32:7.text: ʹAl-la-ẓeee ʹaḥ-sa-na kul-la shay-ʹin kha-la-q̣a-hoo wa-ba-da-ʹa khal-q̣al- ʹiñ-saa-ni miñ- ṭeen;

32:8.text: S̤um-ma ja-ʻa-la nas-la-hoo miñ- su-laa-la-tim- mim- maaa-ʹim- ma-heen:

32:9.text: S̤um-ma saw-waa-hu wa-na-fa-kha fee-hi mir- Roo-ḥi-hee wa-ja-ʻa-la la-ku-mus- sam-ʻa wal-ʹab-ṣaa-ra wal-ʹaf-ʹi-dah: q̣a-lee-lam- maa tash-ku-roon!

32:10.text: Wa-q̣aa-looo ʹa-ʹi-ẓaa ḍa-lal-naa fil- ʹar-ḍi ʹa-ʹin-naa la-fee khal-q̣iñ- ja-deed? Bal hum̃- bi-Li-q̣aaa-ʹi Rab-bi-him kaa-fi-roon!

32:11.text: Q̣ul ya-ta-waf-faa-kum- Ma-la-kul- Maw-til- la-ẓee wuk-ki-la bi-kum s̤um-ma ʹi-laa Rab-bi-kum tur-ja-ʻoon.

32:12.text: Wa-law ta-raaa ʹi-ẓil- muj-ri-moo-na naa-ki-soo ru-ʹoo-si-him ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-him: Rab-ba-naaa ʹab-ṣar-naa wa-sa-miʻ-naa far-jiʻ-naa naʻ-mal ṣaa-li-ḥan ʹin-naa moo-q̣i-noon.

32:13.text: Wa-law shiʹ-naa la-ʹaa-tay-naa kul-la naf-sin hu-daa-haa wa-laa-kin ḥaq̣-q̣al- Q̣aw-lu min-nee la-ʹam-la-ʹan-na Ja-han-na-ma mi-nal- jin-na-ti wan-naa-si ʹaj-ma-ʻeen.

32:14.text: fa-ẓoo-q̣oo bi-maa na-see-tum Li-q̣aaa-ʹa Yaw-mi-kum haa-ẓaa. ʹIn-naa na-see-naa-kum wa-ẓoo-q̣oo ʻA-ẓaa-bal- khul-di bi-maa kuñ-tum taʻ-ma-loon!

32:15.text: ʹIn-na-maa yuʹ-mi-nu bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹi-ẓaa ẓuk-ki-roo bi-haa khar-roo sab-ba-ḥoo suj-ja-dañw-wa bi-Ḥam-di Rab-bi-him Wa-hum laa- yas-tak-bi-roon.

32:16.text: Ta-ta-jaa-faa ju-noo-bu-hum ʻa-nil- ma-ḍaa-ji-ʻi yad-ʻoo-na Rab-ba-hum khaw-fañw- wa-ṭa-ma-ʻaa: wa-mim-maa ra-zaq̣-naa-hum yuñ-fi-q̣oon.

32:17.text: Fa-laa taʻ-la-mu naf-sum- maaa ʹukh-fi-ya la-hum- miñ- q̣ur-ra-ti ʹaʻ-yun: ja-zaaa-ʹam- bi-maa kaa-noo yaʻ-ma-loon.

32:18.text: ʹA-fa-mañ kaa-na muʹ-mi-nañ- ka-mañ- kaa-na faa-si-q̣aa? Laa- yas-ta-woon.

32:19.text: ʹAm-mal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti fa-la-hum Jan-naa-tul- maʹ-waa, nu-zu-lam- bi-maa kaa-noo yaʻ-ma-loon.

32:20.text: Wa-ʹam-mal- la-ẓee-na fa-sa-q̣oo fa-maʹ-waa-hu-mun- Naar: kul-la-maaa ʹa-raa-dooo ʹañy- yakh-ru-joo min-haaa ʹu-ʻee-doo fee-haa wa-q̣ee-la la-hum ẓoo-q̣oo ʻA-ẓaa-ban- Naa-ril- la-ẓee kuñ-tum̃- bi-hee tu-kaẓ-ẓi-boon.

32:21.text: Wa-la-nu-ẓee-q̣an-na-hum- mi-nal- ʻA-ẓaa-bil- ʹad-naa doo-nal- ʻA-ẓaa-bil- ʹak-ba-ri la-ʻal-la-hum yar-ji-ʻoon.

32:22.text: Wa-man ʹaz̤̣-la-mu mim-mañ- ẓuk-ki-ra bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti Rab-bi-hee s̤um-ma ʹaʻ-ra-ḍa ʻan-haa? ʹIn-naa mi-nal- muj-ri-mee-na muñ-ta-q̣i-moon.

32:23.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹaa-tay-naa Moo-sal- Ki-taa-ba fa-laa ta-kuñ fee mir-ya-tim- mil- li-q̣aaa-ʹi-hee wa-ja-ʻal-naa-hu hu-dal- li-Ba-neee- ʹIs-raaa-ʹeel.

32:24.text: Wa-ja-ʻal-naa min-ḥum ʹA-ʹim-ma-tañy- yah-doo-na bi-ʹAm-ri-naa lam-maa ṣa-ba-roo; wa-kaa-noo bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa yoo-q̣i-noon.

32:25.text: ʹIn-na Rab-ba-ka Hu-wa yaf-ṣi-lu bay-na-hum Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti fee-maa kaa-noo fee-hi yakh-ta-li-foon.

32:26.text: ʹA-wa-lam yah-di la-hum kam ʹah-lak-naa miñ q̣ab-li-him- mi-nal- q̣u-roo-ni yam-shoo-na fee ma-saa-ki-ni-him? ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yaat: ʹa-fa-laa yas-ma-ʻoon?

32:27.text: ʹA-wa-lam ya-raw ʹan-naa na-soo-q̣ul- maaa-ʹa ʹi-lal- ʹar-ḍil- ju-ru-zi fa-nukh-ri-ju bi-hee zar-ʻañ taʹ-ku-lu min-hu ʹan-ʻaa-mu-hum wa-ʹañ-fu-su-hum? ʹA-fa-laa yub-ṣi-roon?

32:28.text: Wa-ya-q̣oo-loo-na ma-taa haa-ẓal- Fat-ḥu ʹiñ kuñ-tum ṣaa-di-q̣een?

32:29.text: Q̣ul Yaw-mal- Fat-ḥi laa- yañ-fa-ʻul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-rooo ʹee-maa-nu-hum wa-laa hum yuñ-z̤̣a-roon.

33:1.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-han- Na-biy-yut- ta-q̣il- laa-ha wa-laa tu-ṭi-ʻil- kaa-fi-ree-na wal-Mu-naa-fi-q̣een: ʹin-nal- laa-ha kaa-na ʻA-lee-man Ḥa-kee-maa.

33:2.text: Wat-ta-biʻ maa- yoo-ḥaaa ʹi-lay-ka mir- Rab-bik: ʹin-nal- laa-ha kaa-na bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na kha-bee-raa.

33:3.text: Wa-ta-wak-kal ʻa-lal- laah: wa-ka-faa bil-laa-hi Wa-kee-laa.

33:4.text: Maa- ja-ʻa-lal- laa-hu li-ra-ju-lim- miñ- q̣al-bay-ni fee jaw-fih: wa-maa ja-ʻa-la ʹaz-waa-ja-ku-mul- laaa-ʹee tu-z̤̣aa-hi-roo-na min-hun-na ʹum-ma-haa-ti-kum: wa-maa ja-ʻa-la ʹad-ʻi-yaaa-ʹa-kum ʹab-naaa-ʹa-kum. Ẓaa-li-kum q̣aw-lu-kum̃- bi-ʹaf-waa-hi-kum. Wal-laa-hu ya-q̣oo-lul- Ḥaq̣-q̣a wa-Hu-wa yah-dis- Sa-beel.

33:5.text: ʹUd-ʻoo-hum li-ʹaa-baaa-ʹi-him hu-wa ʹaq̣-sa-ṭu ʻiñ-dal- laah. Fa-ʹil- lam taʻ-la-mooo ʹaa-baaa-ʹa-hum fa-ʹikh-waa-nu-kum fid- dee-ni wa-ma-waa-lee-kum. Wa-lay-sa ʻa-lay-kum ju-naa-ḥuñ- fee-maaa ʹakh-ṭaʹ-tum̃ bi-hee wa-laa-kim- maa ta-ʻam-ma-dat q̣u-loo-bu-kum: wa-kaa-nal- laa-hu G̣a-foo-rar- Ra-ḥee-maa.

33:6.text: ʹAn-Na-biy-yu ʹaw-laa bil-Muʹ-mi-nee-na min ʹañ-fu-si-him wa-ʹaz-waa-ju-hooo ʹum-ma-haa-tu-hum. Wa-ʹu-lul- ʹar-ḥaa-mi baʻ-ḍu-hum ʹaw-laa bi-baʻ-ḍiñ- fee Ki-taa-bil- laa-hi mi-nal- Muʹ-mi-nee-na wal-Mu-haa-ji-ree-na ʹil-laaa ʹañ taf-ʻa-looo ʹi-laaa ʹaw-li-yaaa-ʹi-kum- maʻ-roo-faa: kaa-na ẓaa-li-ka fil- Ki-taa-bi mas-ṭoo-raa.

33:7.text: Wa-ʹiẓ ʹa-khaẓ-naa mi-nan- Na-biy-yee-na Mee-s̤aa-q̣a-hum wa-miñ-ka wa-min- Noo-ḥiñw- Wa-ʹIb-raa-hee-ma wa-Moo-saa wa-ʻEe-sab- ni- Mar-yam: wa-ʹa-khaẓ-naa min-hum- Mee-s̤aa-q̣an g̣a-lee-z̤̣aa:

33:8.text: Li-yas-ʹa-laṣ- Ṣaa-di-q̣ee-na ʻañ Ṣid-q̣i-him: wa-ʹa-ʻad-da lil-kaa-fi-ree-na ʻA-ẓaa-ban ʹa-lee-maa.

33:9.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nuẓ- ku-roo Niʻ-ma-tal- laa-hi ʻa-lay-kum ʹiẓ jaaa-ʹat-kum ju-noo-duñ- fa-ʹar-sal-naa ʻa-lay-him ree-ḥañw- wa-ju-noo-dal- lam ta-raw-haa: wa-kaa-nal- laa-hu bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na Ba-ṣee-raa.

33:10.text: ʹIẓ jaaa-ʹoo-kum- miñ- faw-q̣i-kum wa-min ʹas-fa-la miñ-kum wa-ʹiẓ zaa-g̣a-til- ʹab-ṣaa-ru wa-ba-la-g̣a-til- q̣u-loo-bul- ḥa-naa-ji-ra wa-ta-z̤̣un-noo-na bil-laa-hiz̤̣- z̤̣u-noo-naa!

33:11.text: Hu-naa-li-kab- tu-li-yal- Muʹ-mi-noo-na wa-zul-zi-loo zil-zaa-lañ sha-dee-daa.

33:12.text: Wa-ʹiẓ ya-q̣oo-lul- Mu-naa-fi-q̣oo-na wal-la-ẓee-na fee q̣u-loo-bi-him- ma-ra-ḍum- maa wa-ʻa-da-nal- laa-hu wa-Ra-soo-lu-hooo ʹil-laa g̣u-roo-raa!

33:13.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣aa-laṭ- ṭaaa-ʹi-fa-tum- min-hum yaaa-ʹAh-la- Yas̤-ri-ba laa- mu-q̣aa-ma la-kum far-ji-ʻoo! Wa-yas-taʹ-ẓi-nu fa-ree-q̣um- min-hu-mun- Na-biy-ya ya-q̣oo-loo-na ʹin-na bu-yoo-ta-naa ʻaw-rah. Wa-maa hi-ya bi-ʻaw-ra-tin ʹiñy- yu-ree-doo-na ʹil-laa fi-raa-raa.

33:14.text: Wa-law du-khi-lat ʻa-lay-him- min ʹaq̣-ṭaa-ri-haa s̤um-ma su-ʹi-lul- fit-na-ta la-ʹaa-taw-haa wa-maa ta-lab-ba-s̤oo bi-haaa ʹil-laa ya-see-raa!

33:15.text: Wa-la-q̣ad kaa-noo ʻaa-ha-dul- laa-ha miñ- q̣ab-lu laa- yu-wal-loo-nal- ʹad-baar: wa-kaa-na ʻah-dul- laa-hi mas-ʹoo-laa.

33:16.text: Q̣ul- lañy- yañ-fa-ʻa-ku-mul- fi-raa-ru ʹiñ- fa-rar-tum- mi-nal- maw-ti ʹa-wil- q̣at-li wa-ʹi-ẓal- laa tu-mat-ta-ʻoo-na ʹil-laa q̣a-lee-laa!

33:17.text: Q̣ul mañ- ẓal- la-ẓee yaʻ-ṣi-mu-kum- mi-nal- laa-hi ʹin ʹa-raa-da bi-kum Sooo-ʹan ʹaw ʹa-raa-da bi-kum Raḥ-mah? Wa-laa ya-ji-doo-na la-hum- miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi wa-liy-yañw- wa-laa- na-ṣee-raa.

33:18.text: Q̣ad yaʻ-la-mul- laa-hul- mu-ʻaw-wi-q̣ee-na miñ-kum wal-q̣aaa-ʹi-lee-na li-ʹikh-waa-ni-him ha-lum-ma ʹi-lay-naa, wa-laa yaʹ-too-nal- baʹ-sa ʹil-laa q̣a-lee-laa,

33:19.text: ʹA-shiḥ-ḥa-tan ʻa-lay-kum. Fa-ʹi-ẓaa jaaa-ʹal- khaw-fu ra-ʹay-ta-hum yañ-z̤̣u-roo-na ʹi-lay-ka ta-doo-ru ʹaʻ-yu-nu-hum kal-la-ẓee yug̣-shaa ʻa-lay-hi mi-nal- mawt: Fa-ʹi-ẓaa ẓa-ha-bal- khaw-fu sa-la-q̣oo-kum̃- bi-ʹal-si-na-tin ḥi-daa-din ʹa-shiḥ-ḥa-tan ʻa-lal- khayr. ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka lam yuʹ-mi-noo fa-ʹaḥ-ba-ṭal- laa-hu ʹaʻ-maa-la-hum: wa-kaa-na ẓaa-li-ka ʻa-lal- laa-hi ya-see-raa.

33:20.text: Yaḥ-sa-boo-nal- ʹAḤ-ZAA-BA lam yaẓ-ha-boo; wa-ʹiñy- yaʹ-til- ʹAḥ-zaa-bu ya-wad-doo law ʹan-na-hum̃- baa-doo-na fil- ʹAʻ-raa-bi yas-ʹa-loo-na ʻan ʹam-baaa-ʹi-kum; wa-law kaa-noo fee-kum- maa q̣aa-ta-looo ʹil-laa q̣a-lee-laa.

33:21.text: La-q̣ad kaa-na la-kum fee Ra-soo-lil- laa-hi ʹUs-wa-tun Ḥa-sa-na-tul- li-mañ kaa-na yar-jul- laa-ha wal-Yaw-mal- ʹAa-khi-ra wa-ẓa-ka-ral- laa-ha ka-s̤ee-raa.

33:22.text: Wa-lam-maa ra- ʹal-Muʹ-mi-noo-nal- ʹAḥ-zaa-ba q̣aa-loo haa-ẓaa maa- wa-ʻa-da-nal- laa-hu wa-Ra-soo-lu-hoo wa-ṣa-da-q̣al- laa-hu wa-Ra-soo-luh. Wa-maa zaa-da-hum ʹil-laaa ʹee-maa-nañw- Wa-tas-lee-maa.

33:23.text: Mi-nal- Muʹ-mi-nee-na ri-jaa-luñ- ṣa-da-q̣oo maa- ʻaa-ha-dul- laa-ha ʻa-layh: fa-min-hum- mañ- q̣a-ḍaa naḥ-ba-hoo wa-min-hum- mañy- yañ-ta-z̤̣ir: wa-maa bad-da-loo tab-dee-laa:

33:24.text: Li-yaj-zi-yal- laa-huṣ- Ṣaa-di-q̣ee-na bi-Ṣid-q̣i-him wa-yu-ʻaẓ-ẓi-bal- Mu-naa-fi-q̣ee-na ʹiñ- shaaa-ʹa ʹaw ya-too-ba ʻa-lay-him: ʹin-nal- laa-ha kaa-na G̣a-foo-rar- Ra-ḥee-maa.

33:25.text: Wa-rad-dal- laa-hul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo bi-g̣ay-z̤̣i-him lam ya-naa-loo khay-raa; wa-ka-fal- laa-hul- Muʹ-mi-nee-nal- q̣i-taal. Wa-kaa-nal- laa-hu Q̣a-wiy-yan ʻA-zee-zaa.

33:26.text: Wa-ʹañ-za-lal- la-ẓee-na z̤̣aa-ha-roo-hum- min ʹah-lil- Ki-taa-bi miñ ṣa-yaa-ṣee-him wa-q̣a-ẓa-fa fee q̣u-loo-bi-hi- mur-ruʻ-ba fa-ree-q̣añ taq̣-tu-loo-na wa-taʹ-si-roo-na fa-ree-q̣aa.

33:27.text: Wa-ʹaw-ra-s̤a-kum ʹar-ḍa-hum wa-di-yaa-ra-hum wa-ʹam-waa-la-hum wa-ʹar-ḍal- lam ta-ṭa-ʹoo-haa. Wa-kaa-nal- laa-hu ʻa-laa kul-li shay-iñ Q̣a-dee-raa.

33:28.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-han- Na-biy-yu q̣ul li-ʹaz-waa-ji-ka ʹiñ- kuñ-tun-na tu-rid-nal- ḥa-yaa-tad- dun-yaa wa-zee-na-ta-haa fa-ta-ʻaa-lay-na ʹu-mat-tiʻ-kun-na wa-ʹu-sar-riḥ-kun-na sa-raa-hañ- ja-mee-laa.

33:29.text: Wa-ʹiñ- kuñ-tun-na tu-rid-nal- laa-ha wa-Ra-soo-la-hoo wad-Daa-ral- ʹAa-khi-ra-ta fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha ʹa-ʻad-da lil-Muḥ-si-naa-ti miñ-kun-na ʹaj-ran ʻa-z̤̣ee-maa.

33:30.text: Yaa-Ni-saaa-ʹan Na-biy-yi mañy- yaʹ-ti miñ-kun-na bi-faa-ḥi-sha-tim- mu-bay-yi-na-tiñy- yu-ḍaa-ʻaf la-hal- ʻA-ẓaa-bu ḍiʻ-fayn: wa-kaa-na ẓaa-li-ka ʻa-lal- laa-hi ya-see-raa.

33:31.text: Wa-mañy- yaq̣-nut miñ-kun-na lil-laa-hi wa-Ra-soo-li-hee wa-taʻ-mal ṣaa-li-ḥan- nuʹ-ti-haaa ʹaj-ra-haa mar-ra-tay-ni wa-ʹaʻ-tad-naa la-haa Riz-q̣añ- ka-ree-maa.

33:32.text: Yaa-Ni-saaa-ʹan- Na-biy-yi las-tun-na ka-ʹa-ḥa-dim- mi-nan- ni-saaa-ʹi ʹi-nit- ta-q̣ay-tun-na fa-laa takh-ḍaʻ-na bil-q̣aw-li fa-yaṭ-ma-ʻal- la-ẓee fee q̣al-bi-hee ma-ra-ḍuñw- wa-q̣ul-na q̣aw-lam- maʻ-roo-faa.

33:33.text: Wa-q̣ar-na fee bu-yoo-ti-kun-na wa-laa ta-bar-raj-na ta-bar-ru-jal- Jaa-hi-liy-ya-til- ʹoo-laa wa-ʹa-q̣im-naṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta wa-ʹaa-tee-naz- Za-kaa-ta wa-ʹa-ṭiʻ-nal- laa-ha wa-Ra-soo-lah. ʹIn-na-maa yu-ree-dul- laa-hu li-yuẓ-hi-ba ʻañ-ku-mur- rij-sa ʹAh-lal- Bay-ti wa-yu-ṭah-hi-ra-kum taṭ-hee-raa.

33:34.text: Waẓ-kur-na maa- yut-laa fee bu-yoo-ti-kun-na min ʹAa-yaa-til- laa-hi wal-Ḥik-mah: ʹin-nal- laa-ha kaa-na La-ṭee-fan kha-bee-raa.

33:35.text: ʹIn-nal- Mus-li-mee-na wal-Mus-li-maa-ti wal-muʹ-mi-nee-na wal-muʹ-mi-naa-ti wal-q̣aa-ni-tee-na wal-q̣aa-ni-taa-ti waṣ-ṣaa-di-q̣ee-na waṣ-ṣaa-di-q̣aa-ti waṣ-ṣaa-bi-ree-na waṣ-ṣaa-bi-raa-ti wal-khaa-shi-ʻee-na wal-khaa-shi-ʻaa-ti wal-mu-ta-ṣad-di-q̣ee-na wal-mu-ta-ṣad-di-q̣aa-ti waṣ-ṣaaa-ʹi-mee-na waṣ-ṣaaa-ʹi-maa-ti wal-ḥaa-fi-z̤̣ee-na fu-roo-ja-hum wal-ḥaa-fi-z̤̣aa-ti waẓ-ẓaa-ki-ree-nal- laa-ha ka-s̤ee-rañw- waẓ-ẓaa-ki-raa-ti ʹa-ʻad-dal- laa-hu la-hum- mag̣-fi-ra-tañw- wa-ʹaj-ran ʻa-z̤̣ee-maa.

33:36.text: Wa-maa kaa-na li-Muʹ-mi-niñw- wa-laa- Muʹ-mi-na-tin ʹi-ẓaa q̣a-ḍal- laa-hu wa-Ra-soo-lu-hooo ʹam-ran ʹañy- ya-koo-na la-hu-mul- khi-ya-ra-tu min ʹam-ri-him: wa-mañy- yaʻ-ṣil- laa-ha wa-Ra-soo-la-hoo fa-q̣ad ḍal-la ḍa-laa-lam- mu-bee-naa.

33:37.text: Wa-ʹiẓ ta-q̣oo-lu lil-la-ẓeee ʹan-ʻa-mal- laa-hu ʻa-lay-hi wa-ʹan-ʻam-ta ʻa-lay-hi ʹam-sik ʻa-lay-ka zaw-ja-ka wat-ta-q̣il- laa-ha wa-tukh-fee fee naf-si-ka mal- laa-hu mub-dee-hi wa-takh-shan- naas. Wal-laa-hu ʹa-ḥaq̣-q̣u ʹañ- takh-shaah. Fa-lam-maa q̣a-ḍaa Zay-dum- min-haa wa-ṭa-rañ- zaw-waj-naa-ka-haa li-kay laa- ya-koo-na ʻa-lal- Muʹ-mi-nee-na ḥa-ra-juñ- feee ʹaz-waa-ji ʹad-ʻi-yaaa-ʹi-him ʹi-ẓaa q̣a-ḍaw min-hun-na wa-ṭa-raa. Wa-kaa-na ʹam-rul- laa-hi maf-ʻoo-laa.

33:38.text: Maa- kaa-na ʻa-lan- Na-biy-yi min ḥa-ra-jiñ fee-maa fa-ra-ḍal- laa-hu lah. Sun-na-tal- laa-hi fil- la-ẓee-na kha-law miñ q̣abl. Wa-kaa-na ʹam-rul- laa-hi q̣a-da-ram- maq̣-doo-raa.

33:39.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na yu-bal-li-g̣oo-na Ri-saa-laa-til- laa-hi wa-yakh-shaw-na-hoo wa-laa yakh-shaw-na ʹa-ḥa-dan ʹil-lal- laah. Wa-ka-faa bil-laa-hi Ḥa-see-baa.

33:40.text: Maa- kaa-na Mu-ḥam-ma-dun ʹa-baaa ʹa-ḥa-dim- mir- ri-jaa-li-kum wa-laa-kir- Ra-soo-lal- laa-hi wa-Khaa-ta-man- Na-biy-yeen: wa-kaa-nal- laa-hu bi-kul-li shay-ʹin ʻA-lee-maa.

33:41.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nuẓ- ku-rul- laa-ha ẓik-rañ- ka-s̤ee-raa;

33:43.text: Hu-wal- la-ẓee yu-ṣal-lee ʻa-lay-kum wa-ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tu-hoo li-yukh-ri-ja-kum- mi-naz̤̣- Z̤̣u-lu-maa-ti ʹi-lan- Noor: wa-kaa-na bil-Muʹ-mi-nee-na Ra-ḥee-maa.

33:44.text: Ta-ḥiy-ya-tu-hum Yaw-ma yal-q̣aw-na-hoo Sa-laam; wa-ʹa-ʻad-da la-hum ʹAj-rañ- Ka-ree-maa.

33:45.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-han- Na-biy-yu ʹin-naaa ʹar-sal-naa-ka Shaa-hi-dañw- Wa-Mu-bash-shi-rañw- Wa-Na-ẓee-raa,

33:46.text: Wa-Daa-ʻi-yan ʹi-lal- laa-hi bi-ʹiẓ-ni-hee wa-Si-raa-jam- Mu-nee-raa.

33:47.text: Wa-bash-shi-ril- Muʹ-mi-nee-na bi-ʹan-na la-hum- mi-nal- laa-hi Faḍ-lañ- ka-bee-raa.

33:48.text: Wa-laa tu-ṭi-ʻil- kaa-fi-ree-na wal-Mu-naa-fi-q̣ee-na wa-daʻ ʹa-ẓaa-hum wa-ta-wak-kal ʻa-lal- laah. Wa-ka-faa bil-laa-hi Wa-kee-laa.

33:49.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nooo ʹi-ẓaa na-kaḥ-tu-mul- Muʹ-mi-naa-ti s̤um-ma ṭal-laq̣-tu-moo-hun-na miñ q̣ab-li ʹañ-t a-mas-soo-hun-na fa-maa la-kum ʻa-lay-hin-na min ʻId-da-tiñ taʻ-tad-doo-na-haa fa-mat-ti-ʻoo-hun-na wa-sar-ri-ḥoo-hun-na sa-raa-ḥañ ja-mee-laa.

33:50.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-han- Na-biy-yu ʹin-naaa ʹaḥ-lal-naa la-ka ʹaz-waa-ja-kal- laa-teee ʹaa-tay-ta ʹu-joo-ra-hun-na wa-maa ma-la-kat ya-mee-nu-ka mim-maaa ʹa-faaa-ʹal- laa-hu ʻa-lay-ka wa-ba-naa-ti ʻam-mi-ka wa-ba-naa-ti ʻam-maa-ti-ka wa-ba-naa-ti khaa-li-ka wa-ba-naa-ti khaa-laa-ti-kal- laa-tee haa-jar-na ma-ʻak: wam-ra-ʹa-tam- Muʹ-mi-na-tan ʹiñw- wa-ha-bat naf-sa-haa lin-Na-biy-yi ʹin ʹa-raa-dan- Na-biy-yu ʹañy- yas-tañ-ki-ḥa-haa;― khaa-li-ṣa-tal- la-ka miñ doo-nil- Muʹ-mi-neen; q̣ad ʻa-lim-naa maa- fa-raḍ-naa ʻa-lay-him feee ʹaz-waa-ji-him wa-maa ma-la-kat ʹay-maa-nu-hum li-kay-laa ya-koo-na ʻa-lay-ka ḥa-raj. Wa-kaa-nal- laa-hu G̣a-foo-rar- Ra-ḥee-maa.

33:51.text: Tur-jee mañ- ta-shaaa-ʹu min-hun-na wa-tuʹ-weee ʹi-lay-ka mañ- ta-shaaaʹ: wa-ma-nib- ta-g̣ay-ta mim-man ʻa-zal-ta fa-laa ju-naa-ḥa ʻa-layk. Ẓaa-li-ka ʹad-naaa ʹañ- ta-q̣ar-ra ʹaʻyu-nu-hun-na wa-laa yaḥ-zan-na wa-yar-ḍay-na bi-maaa ʹaa-tay-ta-hun-na kul-lu-hunn: wal-laa-hu yaʻ-la-mu maa- fee q̣u-loo-bi-kum: wa-kaa-nal- laa-hu ʻA-lee-man Ḥa-lee-maa.

33:52.text: Laa- ya-ḥil-lu la-kan- ni-saaa-ʹu mim- baʻ-du wa-laaa ʹañ- ta-bad-da-la bi-hin-na min ʹaz-waa-jiñw- Wa-law ʹaʻ-ja-ba-ka ḥus-nu-hun-na ʹil-laa maa- ma-la-kat ya-mee-nuk: wa-kaa-nal- laa-hu ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹir- Ra-q̣ee-baa.

33:53.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo laa- tad-khu-loo bu-yoo-tan- Na-biy-yi ʹil-laaa ʹañy- yuʹ-ẓa-na la-kum ʹi-laa ṭa-ʻaa-min g̣ay-ra naa-z̤̣i-ree-na ʹi-naa-hu wa-laa-kin ʹi-ẓaa du-ʻee-tum fad-khu-loo fa-ʹi-ẓaa ṭa-ʻim-tum fañ-ta-shi-roo wa-laa mus-taʹ-ni-see-na li-ḥa-dees̤. ʹIn-na ẓaa-li-kum kaa-na yuʹ-ẓin- Na-biy-ya fa-yas-taḥ-yee miñ-kum; wal-laa-hu laa- yas-taḥ-yee mi-nal- ḥaq̣q̣. Wa-ʹi-ẓaa sa-ʹal-tu-moo-hun-na ma-taa-ʻañ fas-ʹa-loo-hun-na miñw- wa-raaa-ʹi ḥi-jaab: ẓaa-li-kum ʹaṭ-ha-ru li-q̣u-loo-bi-kum wa-q̣u-loo-bi-hinn. Wa-maa kaa-na la-kum ʹañ- tuʹ-ẓoo Ra-soo-lal- laa-hi wa-laaa ʹañ- tañ-ki-ḥooo ʹaz-waa-ja-hoo mim- baʻ-di-heee ʹa-ba-daa. ʹIn-na ẓaa-li-kum kaa-na ʻiñ-dal- laa-hi ʻa-z̤̣ee-maa.

33:54.text: ʹIñ- tub-doo shay-ʹan ʹaw tukh-foo-hu fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha kaa-na bi-kul-li shay-ʹin ʻa-lee-maa.

33:55.text: Laa- ju-naa-ḥa ʻa-lay-hin-na feee ʹaa-baaa-ʹi-hin-na wa-laaa ʹab-naaa-ʹi-hin-na wa-laaa ʹikh-waa-ni-hin-na wa-laaa ʹab-naaa-ʹi ʹikh-waa-ni-hin-na wa-laaa ʹab-naaa-ʹi ʹa-kha-waa-ti-hin-na wa-laa ni-saaa-ʹi-hin-na wa-laa- maa- ma-la-kat ʹay-maa-nu-hunn. Wat-ta-q̣ee-nal- laah; ʹin-nal- laa-ha kaa-na ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Sha-hee-daa.

33:56.text: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha wa-Ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-ta-hoo yu-ṣal-loo-na ʻa-lan- Na-biyy: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo ṣal-loo ʻa-lay-hi wa-sal-li-moo tas-lee-maa.

33:57.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na yuʹ-ẓoo-nal- laa-ha wa-Ra-soo-la-hoo la-ʻa-na-hu-mul- laa-hu fid- dun-yaa wal-ʹAa-khi-ra-ti wa-ʹa-ʻad-da la-hum ʻA-ẓaa-bam- mu-hee-naa.

33:58.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na yuʹ-ẓoo-nal- Muʹ-mi-nee-na wal-Muʹ-mi-naa-ti bi-g̣ay-ri mak- ta-sa-boo fa-q̣a-diḥ- ta-ma-loo buh-taa-nañw- wa-ʹis̤-mam- mu-bee-naa.

33:59.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-han- Na-biy-yu q̣ul- li-ʹaz-waa-ji-ka wa-ba-naa-ti-ka wa-ni-saaa-ʹil- Muʹ-mi-nee-na yud-nee-na ʻa-lay-hin-na miñ ja-laa-bee-bi-hinn: ẓaa-li-ka ʹad-naaa ʹañy- yuʻ-raf-na fa-laa yuʹ-ẓayn. Wa-kaa-nal- laa-hu G̣a-foo-rar- Ra-ḥee-maa.

33:60.text: La-ʹil- lam yañ-ta-hil- Mu-naa-fi-q̣oo-na wal-la-ẓee-na fee q̣u-loo-bi-him- ma-ra-ḍuñw- wal-mur-ji-foo-na fil- Ma-dee-na-ti la-nug̣-ri-yan-na-ka bi-him s̤um-ma laa- yu-jaa-wi-roo-na-ka fee-haaa ʹil-laa q̣a-lee-laa:

33:61.text: Mal-ʻoo-nee-na ʹay-na-maa s̤u-q̣i-fooo ʹu-khi-ẓoo wa-q̣ut-ti-loo taq̣-tee-laa.

33:62.text: Sun-na-tal- laa-hi fil- la-ẓee-na kha-law miñ q̣abl: wa-lañ ta-ji-da li-Sun-na-til- laa-hi tab-dee-laa.

33:63.text: Yas-ʹa-lu-kan- naa-su ʻa-nis- Saa-ʻah: q̣ul ʹin-na-maa ʻil-mu-haa ʻiñ-dal- laah: wa-maa yud-ree-ka la-ʻal-las- Saa-ʻa-ta ta-koo-nu q̣a-ree-baa!

33:64.text: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha la-ʻa-nal- Kaa-fi-ree-na wa-ʹa-ʻad-da la-hum Sa-ʻee-raa,―

33:65.text: Khaa-li-dee-na fee-haaa ʹa-ba-daa: laa- ya-ji-doo-na wa-liy-yañw- wa-laa- na-ṣee-raa.

33:66.text: Yaw-ma tu-q̣al-la-bu wu-joo-hu-hum fin- Naa-ri ya-q̣oo-loo-na yaa-lay-ta-naaa ʹa-ṭaʻ-nal- laa-ha wa-ʹa-ṭaʻ-nar- Ra-soo-laa!

33:67.text: Wa-q̣aa-loo Rab-ba-naaa ʹin-naaa ʹa-ṭaʻ-naa saa-da-ta-naa wa-ku-ba-raaa-ʹa-naa fa-ʹa-ḍal-loo-nas- sa-bee-laa.

33:68.text: Rab-ba-naaa ʹaa-ti-him ḍiʻ-fay-ni mi-nal- ʻA-ẓaa-bi wal-ʻan-hum Laʻ-nañ- ka-bee-raa!

33:69.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na aa-ma-noo laa-ʹ ta-koo-noo kal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ẓaw Moo-saa fa-bar-ra-ʹa-hul- laa-hu mim-maa q̣aa-loo: wa-kaa-na ʻiñ-dal- laa-hi wa-jee-haa.

33:70.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nut- ta-q̣ul- laa-ha wa-q̣oo-loo q̣aw-lañ- sa-dee-daa:

33:71.text: Yuṣ-liḥ la-kum ʹaʻ-maa-la-kum wa-yag̣-fir la-kum ẓu-noo-ba-kum: wa-mañy- yu-ṭi-ʻil- laa-ha wa-Ra-soo-la-hoo fa-q̣ad faa-za faw-zan ʻa-z̤̣ee-maa.

33:72.text: ʹIn-naa ʻa-raḍ-nal- ʹA-maa-na-ta ʻa-las- Sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹAr-ḍi wal-Ji-baa-li fa-ʻa-bay-na ʹañy- yaḥ-mil-na-haa wa-ʹash-faq̣-na min-haa wa-ḥa-ma-la-hal- ʹIñ-saan: ʹin-na-hoo kaa-na z̤̣a-loo-mañ- ja-hoo-laa;―

33:73.text: Li-yu-ʻaẓ-ẓi-bal- laa-hul- Mu-na-fi-q̣ee-na wal-Mu-naa-fi-q̣aa-ti wal-Mush-ri-kee-na wal-Mush-ri-kaa-ti wa-ya-too-bal- laa-hu ʻa-lal- Muʹ-mi-nee-na wal-Muʹ-mi-naat: wa-kaa-nal- laa-hu G̣a-foo-rar- Ra-ḥee-maa.

34:1.text: ʹAl-Ḥam-du- lil-laa-hil- la-ẓee la-hoo maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-maa fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-la-hul- Ḥam-du fil- ʹAa-khi-rah: wa-Hu-wal- Ḥa-kee-mul- Kha-beer.

34:2.text: Yaʻ-la-mu maa- ya-li-ju fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-maa yakh-ru-ju min-haa wa-maa yañ-zi-lu mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi wa-maa yaʻ-ru-ju fee-ha: wa-Hu-war- Ra-ḥee-mul- G̣a-foor.

34:3.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo laa- taʹ-tee-nas- Saa-ʻah: q̣ul ba-laa wa-Rab-bee la-taʹ-ti-yan-na-kum ʻAa-li-mil- g̣ayb. Laa- yaʻ-zu-bu ʻan-hu mis̤-q̣aa-lu ẓar-ra-tiñ- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-laa fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-laaa ʹaṣ-g̣a-ru miñ ẓaa-li-ka wa-laaa ʹak-ba-ru ʹil-laa fee ki-taa-bim- mu-been:

34:4.text: Li-yaj-zi-yal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaat: ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka la-hum- Mag̣-fi-ra-tuñw- Wa-Riz-q̣uñ ka-reem.

34:5.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na sa-ʻaw feee ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa mu-ʻaa-ji-zee-na ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka la-hum ʻa-ẓaa-bum- mir- rij-zin ʹa-leem.

34:6.text: Wa-ya-ral- la-ẓee-na ʹoo-tul- ʻil-mal- la-ẓeee ʹuñ-zi-la ʹi-lay-ka mir- Rab-bi-ka hu-wal- Ḥaq̣-q̣a wa-yah-deee ʹi-laa Ṣi-raa-ṭil- ʻA-zee-zil- Ḥa-meed.

34:7.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-zee-na ka-fa-roo hal na-dul-lu-kum ʻa-laa ra-ju-liñy- yu-nab-bi-ʹu-kum ʹi-ẓaa muz-ziq̣-tum kul-la mu-maz-za-q̣in ʹin-na-kum la-fee khal-q̣iñ ja-deed?

34:8.text: ʹAf-ta-raa ʻa-lal- laa-hi ka-ẓi-ban ʹam̃- bi-hee jin-nah? Ba-lil- la-ẓee-na laa- yuʹ-mi-noo-na bil-ʹAa-khi-ra-ti fil-ʻA-ẓaa-bi waḍ- Ḍa-laa-lil- ba-ʻeed.

34:9.text: ʹA-fa-lam ya-raw ʹi-laa maa- bay-na ʹay-dee-him wa-maa khal-fa-hum- mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi wal-ʹarḍ? ʹIn- na-shaʹ nakh-sif bi-hi-mul- ʹar-ḍa ʹaw nus-q̣iṭ ʻa-lay-him ki-sa-fam- mi-nas- sa-maaaʹ. ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-ya-tal- li-kul-li ʻab-dim- mu-neeb.

34:10.text: Wa-la-q̣ad- ʹaa-tay-naa Daa-woo-da min-naa Faḍ-laa: yaa-Ji-baa-lu ʹaw-wi-bee ma-ʻa-hoo waṭ-ṭayr! Wa-ʹa-lan-naa la-hul- ḥa-deed:―

34:11.text: ʹA-niʻ- mal saa-bi-g̣aa-tiñw- wa-q̣ad-dir fis- sar-di waʻ-ma-loo ṣaa-li-ḥaa; ʹin-nee bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na Ba-ṣeer.

34:12.text: Wa-li-Su-lay-maa-nar- ree-ḥa g̣u-duw-wu-haa shah-ruñw- wa-ra-waa-ḥu-haa shahr. Wa-ʹa-sal-naa la-hoo ʻay-nal- q̣iṭr; wa-mi-nal- jin-ni mañy- yaʻ-ma-lu bay-na ya-day-hi bi-ʹiẓ-ni Rab-bih. Wa-mañy- ya-zig̣ min-hum ʻan ʹam-ri-naa nu-ẓiq̣-hu min ʻA-ẓaa-bis- sa-ʻeer.

34:13.text: Yaʻ-ma-loo-na la-hoo maa- ya-shaaa-ʹu mim- ma-ḥaa-ree-ba wa-ta-maa-s̤ee-la wa-ji-faa-niñ- kal-ja-waa-bi wa-q̣u-doo-rir- raa-si-yaat. ʹIʻ-ma-looo ʹAa-la Daa-woo-da shuk-raa! Wa-q̣a-lee-lum- min ʻi-baa-di-yash- sha-koor!

34:14.text: Fa-lam-maa q̣a-ḍay-naa ʻa-lay-hil- maw-ta maa- dal-la-hum ʻa-laa maw-ti-heee ʹil-laa daaab-ba-tul- ʹar-ḍi taʹ-ku-lu miñ-sa-ʹa-tah: fa-lam-maa khar-ra ta-bay-ya-na-til- Jin-nu ʹal- law kaa-noo yaʻ-la-moo-nal- g̣ay-ba maa- la-bi-s̤oo fil- ʻa-ẓaa-bil- mu-heen.

34:15.text: La-q̣ad kaa-na li-Sa-ba-ʹiñ- fee mas-ka-ni-him ʹAa-yah: Jan-na-taa-ni ʻañy- ya-mee-niiñw- wa-shi-maal. Ku-loo mir- Riz-q̣i Rab-bi-kum wash-ku-roo lah: Bal-da-tuñ- ṭay-yi-ba-tuñw- wa-Rab-bun G̣a-foor!

34:16.text: Fa-ʹaʻ-ra-ḍoo fa-ʹar-sal-naa ʻa-lay-him say-lal- ʻA-ri-mi wa-bad-dal-naa-hum̃- bi-jan-na-tay-him jan-na-tay-ni ẓa-waa-tay ʹu-ku-lin kham-ṭiñw- waʹas̤-liñw- wa-shay-ʹim- miñ- sid-riñ- q̣a-leel.

34:17.text: Ẓaa-li-ka ja-zay-naa-hum̃- bi-maa ka-fa-roo: wa-hal nu-jaa-zeee ʹil-lal- ka-foor.

34:18.text: Wa-ja-ʻal-naa bay-na-hum wa-bay-nal- Q̣u-ral- la-tee baa-rak-naa fee-haa q̣u-rañ z̤̣aa-hi-ra-tañw- wa-q̣ad-dar-naa fee-has- sayr: see-roo fee-haa la-yaa-li-ya wa-ʹay-yaa-man ʹaa-mi-neen.

34:19.text: Fa-q̣aa-loo Rab-ba-naa baa-ʻid bay-na ʹas-faa-ri-naa wa-z̤̣a-la-mooo ʹañ-fu-sa-hum fa-ja-ʻal-naa-hum ʹa-ḥaa-dee-s̤a wa-maz-zaq̣-naa-hum kul-la mu-maz-zaq̣. ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yaa-til- li-kul-li Ṣab-baa-riñ- Sha-koor.

34:20.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ṣad-da-q̣a ʻa-lay-him ʹIb-lee-su z̤̣an-na-hoo fat-ta-ba-ʻoo-hu ʹil-laa fa-ree-q̣am- mi-nal- Muʹ-mi-neen.

34:21.text: Wa-maa kaa-na la-hoo ʻa-lay-him- miñ sul-ṭaa-nin ʹil-laa li-naʻ-la-ma mañy- yuʹ-mi-nu bil-ʹAa-khi-ra-ti mim-man hu-wa min-haa fee shakk: wa-Rab-bu-ka ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹin Ḥa-feez̤̣.

34:22.text: Q̣u-lid- ʻul- la-ẓee-na za-ʻam-tum- miñ- doo-nil- laah: laa- yam-li-koo-na mis̤-q̣aa-la ẓar-ra-tiñ- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-laa fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-maa la-hum fee-hi-maa miñ shir-kiñw- wa-maa- la-hoo min-hum- miñ- z̤̣a-heer.

34:23.text: Wa-laa tañ-fa-ʻush- sha-faa-ʻa-tu ʻiñ-da-hooo ʹil-laa li-man ʹa-ẓi-na lah. Ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa fuz-zi-ʻa ʻañ- q̣u-loo-bi-him q̣aa-loo maa-ẓaa q̣aa-la Rab-bu-kum? Q̣aa-lul- Ḥaq̣q̣; wa-Hu-wal- ʻA-liy-yul- Ka-beer.

34:24.text: Q̣ul mañy- yar-zu-q̣u-kum- mi-nas- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ? Q̣u-lil- laa-hu wa-ʹin-naaa ʹaw ʹiy-yaa-kum la-ʻa-laa hu-dan ʹaw fee ḍa-laa-lim- mu-been!

34:25.text: Q̣ul- laa tus-ʹa-loo-na ʻam-maaa aj-ram-naa wa-laa nus-ʹa-lu ʻam-maa taʻ-ma-loon.

34:26.text: Q̣ul yaj-ma-ʻu bay-na-naa Rab-bu-naa s̤um-ma yaf-ta-ḥu bay-na-naa bil-ḥaq̣q̣: wa-Hu-wal- Fat-taa-ḥul- ʻA-leem.

34:27.text: Q̣ul ʹa-roo-ni-yal- la-ẓee-na ʹal-ḥaq̣-tum̃- bi-hee shu-ra-kaaa-ʹa kal-laa. Bal Hu-wal- laa-hul- ʻA-zee-zul- Ḥa-keem.

34:28.text: Wa-maaa ʹar-sal-naa-ka ʹil-laa kaaaf-fa-tal- lin-naa-si ba-shee-rañw- wa-na-ẓee-rañw- wa-laa-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ran- naa-si laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

34:29.text: Wa-ya-q̣oo-loo-na ma-taa haa-ẓal- waʻ-du ʹiñ- kuñ-tum ṣaa-di-q̣een?

34:30.text: Q̣ul- la-kum- mee-ʻaa-du Yaw-mil- laa tas-taʹ-khi-roo-na ʻan-hu saa-ʻa-tañw- wa-laa- tas-taq̣-di-moon.

34:31.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo lan- nuʹ-mi-na bi-haa-ẓal- Q̣ur-ʹaa-ni wa-laa bil-la-ẓee bay-na ya-dayh. Wa-law ta-raaa ʹi-ẓiz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-moo-na maw-q̣oo-foo-na ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-him yar-ji-ʻu baʻ-ḍu-hum ʹi-laa baʻ-ḍi-nil- q̣awl. Ya-q̣oo-lul- la-ẓee-nas- tuḍ-ʻi-foo lil-la-ẓee-nas- tak-ba-roo law-laaa ʹañ-tum la-kun-naa Muʹ-mi-neen!

34:32.text: Q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-nas- tak-ba-roo lil-la-ẓee-nas- tuḍ-ʻi-fooo ʹa-naḥ-nu ṣa-dad-naa-kum ʻa-nil- Hu-daa baʻ-da ʹiẓ jaaa-ʹa-kum bal kuñ-tum- muj-ri-meen.

34:33.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-nas- tuḍ-ʻi-foo lil-la-ẓee-nas- tak-ba-roo bal mak-rul- lay-li wan-na-haa-ri ʹiẓ taʹ-mu-roo-na-naaa ʹan- nak-fu-ra bil-laa-hi wa-naj-ʻa-la la-hooo ʹañ-daa-daa! Wa-ʹa-sar-run- na-daa-ma-ta lam-maa ra-ʹa-wul- ʻA-ẓaab. Wa-ja-ʻal-nal- ʹag̣-laa-la feee ʹaʻ-naa-q̣il- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo: hal yuj-zaw-na ʹil-laa maa- kaa-noo yaʻ-ma-loon.

34:34.text: Wa-maaa ʹar-sal-naa fee q̣ar-ya-tim- min- Na-ẓee-rin ʹil-laa q̣aa-la mut-ra-foo-haaa ʹin-naa bi-maaa ʹur-sil-tum̃ bi-hee kaa-fi-roon.

34:35.text: Wa-q̣aa-loo naḥ-nu ʹak-s̤a-ru ʹaw-laa-dañw- waʹam-waa-lañw- wa-maa- naḥ-nu bi-mu-ʻaẓ-ẓa-been.

34:36.text: Q̣ul ʹin-na Rab-bee yab-su-ṭur- Riz-q̣a li-mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu wa-yaq̣-di-ru wa-laa-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ran- naa-si laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

34:37.text: Wa-maaa ʹam-waa-lu-kum wa-laaa ʹaw-laa-du-kum bil-la-tee tu-q̣ar-ri-bu-kum ʻiñ-da-naa zul-faaa ʹil-laa man ʹaa-ma-na wa-ʻa-mi-la ṣaa-li-ḥaa. Fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka la-hum Ja-zaaa-ʹuḍ- ḍiʻ-fi bi-maa ʻa-mi-loo wa-hum fil- g̣u-ru-faa-ti ʹaa-mi-noon!

34:38.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na yas-ʻaw-na feee ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa mu-ʻaa-ji-zee-na ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka fil- ʻA-ẓaa-bi muḥ-ḍa-roon.

34:39.text: Q̣ul ʹin-na Rab-bee yab-su-ṭur- Riz-q̣a li-mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu min ʻi-baa-di-hee wa-yaq̣-di-ru lah. Wa-maaa ʹañ-faq̣-tum- miñ- shay-ʹiñ- fa-Hu-wa yukh-li-fuh: wa-Hu-wa Khay-rur- Raa-zi-q̣een.

34:40.text: Wa-Yaw-ma yaḥ-shu-ru-hum ja-mee-ʻañ s̤um-ma ya-q̣oo-lu lil-ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-ti ʹa-haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi ʹiy-yaa-kum kaa-noo yaʻ-bu-doon?

34:41.text: Q̣aa-loo Sub-ḥaa-na-ka ʹAñ-ta Wa-liy-yu-naa miñ- doo-ni-him. Bal kaa-noo yaʻ-bu-doo-nal- Jinn: ʹak-s̤a-ru-hum̃- bi-him- Muʹ-mi-noon.

34:42.text: Fal-Yaw-ma laa- yam-li-ku baʻ-ḍu-kum li-baʻ-ḍin- naf-ʻañw- wa-laa- ḍar-raa: wa-na-q̣oo-lu lil-la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-moo ẓoo-q̣oo ʻA-ẓaa-ban- Naa-ril- la-tee kuñ-tum̃ bi-haa tu-kaẓ-ẓi-boon!

34:43.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa tut-laa ʻa-lay-him ʹAa-yaa-tu-naa Bay-yi-naa-tiñ q̣aa-loo maa- haa-ẓaaa ʹil-laa ra-ju-luñy- yu-ree-du ʹañy- ya-ṣud-da-kum ʻam-maa kaa-na yaʻ-bu-du ʹaa-baaa-ʹu-kum. Wa-q̣aa-loo maa- haa-ẓaaa ʹil-laaa ʹif-kum- muf-ta-raa! Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo lil-Ḥaq̣-q̣i lam-maa jaaa-ʹa-hum ʹin haa-ẓaaa ʹil-laa siḥ-rum- mu-been!

34:44.text: Wa-maaa ʹaa-tay-naa-hum- miñ- Ku-tu-biñy- yad-ru-soo-na-haa wa-maaa ʹar-sal-naaa ʹi-lay-him q̣ab-la-ka min- Na-ẓeer.

34:45.text: Wa-kaẓ-ẓa-bal- la-ẓee-na miñ q̣ab-li-him wa-maa ba-la-g̣oo miʻ-shaa-ra maaa ʹaa-tay-naa-hum fa-kaẓ-ẓa-boo ru-su-lee: fa-kay-fa kaa-na na-keer!

34:46.text: Q̣ul ʹin-na-maaa ʹa-ʻi-z̤̣u-kum̃- bi-waa-ḥi-dah: ʹañ- ta-q̣oo-moo lil-laa-hi mas̤-naa wa-fu-raa-daa s̤um-ma ta-ta-fak-ka-roo: maa- bi-Ṣaa-ḥi-bi-kum- miñ- Jin-nah: ʹin hu-wa ʹil-laa Na-ẓee-rul- la-kum̃- bay-na ya-day ʻA-ẓaa-biñ sha-deed.

34:47.text: Q̣ul maa- sa-ʹal-tu-kum- min ʹaj-riñ fa-hu-wa la-kum: ʹin ʹaj-ri-ya ʹil-laa ʻa-lal- laah: wa-Hu-wa ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Sha-heed.

34:48.text: Q̣ul ʹin-na Rab-bee yaq̣-ẓi-fu bil-Ḥaq̣-q̣i ʻAl-laa-mul- g̣u-yoob.

34:49.text: Q̣ul jaaa-ʹal- Ḥaq̣-q̣u wa-maa yub-di-ʹul- Baa-ṭi-lu wa-maa yu-ʻeed.

34:50.text: Q̣ul ʹiñ ḍa-lal-tu fa-ʹin-na-maaa ʹa-ḍil-lu ʻa-laa naf-see: wa-ʹi-nih- ta-day-tu fa-bi-maa yoo-ḥeee ʹi-lay-ya Rab-bee: ʹin-na-hoo Sa-mee-ʻuñ- Q̣a-reeb.

34:51.text: Wa-law ta-raaa ʹiẓ fa-zi-ʻoo fa-laa faw-ta wa-ʹu-khi-ẓoo mim- ma-kaa-niñ- q̣a-reeb,

34:52.text: Wa-q̣aa-looo ʹaa-man-naa bih; wa-ʹan-naa la-hu-mut- ta-naa-wu-shu mim- ma-kaa-nim- ba-ʻeed,―

34:53.text: Wa-q̣ad ka-fa-roo bi-hee miñ q̣ab-lu wa-yaq̣-ẓi-foo-na bil-g̣ay-bi mim- ma-kaa-nim- ba-ʻeed?

34:54.text: Wa-ḥee-la bay-na-hum wa-bay-na maa- yash-ta-hoo-na ka-maa fu-ʻi-la bi-ʹash-yaa-ʻi-him- miñ- q̣abl: ʹin-na-hum kaa-noo fee shak-kim- mu-reeb.

35:1.text: ʹAl-Ḥam-du lil-laa-hi Faa-ṭi-ris- Sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi jaa-ʻi-lil- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-ti ru-su-lan ʹu-leee- ʹaj-ni-ḥa-tim- mas̤-naa wa-s̤u-laa-s̤a wa-ru-baaʻ: ya-zee-du fil- khal-q̣i maa- ya-shaaaʹ: ʹin-nal- laa-ha ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Q̣a-deer.

35:2.text: Maa- yaf-ta-ḥil- laa-hu lin-naa-si mir- Raḥ-ma-tiñ fa-laa mum-si-ka la-haa: wa-maa yum-sik fa-laa mur-si-la la-hoo mim- baʻ-dih: wa-Hu-wal- ʻA-zee-zul- Ḥa-keem.

35:3.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-han- naa-suẓ- ku-roo niʻ-ma-tal- laa-hi ʻa-lay-kum! Hal min Khaa-li-q̣in g̣ay-rul- laa-hi yar-zu-q̣u-kum- mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi wal-ʹarḍ? Laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa Hoo! Fa-ʹan-naa tuʹ-fa-koon?

35:4.text: Wa-ʹiñy- yu-kaẓ-ẓi-boo-ka fa-q̣ad kuẓ-ẓi-bat ru-su-lum- miñ q̣ab-lik: wa-ʹi-lal- laa-hi tur-ja-ʻul- ʹu-moor.

35:5.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-han- naa-su ʹin-na waʻ-dal- laa-hi ḥaq̣-q̣uñ- fa-laa ta-g̣ur-ran-na-ku-mul- ḥa-yaa-tud- dun-yaa: wa-laa ya-g̣ur-ran-na-kum̃- bil-laa-hil- G̣a-roor.

35:6.text: ʹIn-nash- Shay-ṭaa-na la-kum ʻa-duw-wuñ- fat-ta-khi-ẓoo-hu ʻa-duw-waa. ʹIn-na-maa yad-ʻoo ḥiz-ba-hoo li-ya-koo-noo min ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bis- Sa-ʻeer.

35:7.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo la-hum ʻA-ẓaa-buñ- sha-deed! Wal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti la-hum- mag̣-fi-ra-tuñw- waʹAj-ruñ ka-beer.

35:8.text: ʹA-fa-mañ zuy-yi-na la-hoo sooo-ʹu ʻa-ma-li-hee fa-ra-ʹaa-hu ḥa-sa-naa? Fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha yu-ḍil-lu mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu wa-yah-dee mañy- ya-shaaaʹ. Fa-laa taẓ-hab naf-su-ka ʻa-lay-him ḥa-sa-raat. ʹIn-nal- laa-ha ʻA-lee-mum- bi-maa yaṣ-na-ʻoon!

35:9.text: Wal-laa-hul- la-ẓeee ʹar-sa-lar- ri-yaa-ḥa fa-tu-s̤ee-ru sa-ḥaa-bañ- fa-suq̣-naa-hu ʹi-laa ba-la-dim- may-yi-tiñ- fa-ʹaḥ-yay-naa bi-hil- ʹar-da baʻ-da maw-ti-haa. Ka-ẓaa-li-kan- Nu-shoor!

35:10.text: Mañ kaa-na yu-ree-dul- ʻiz-za-ta fa-lil-la-hil- ʻiz-za-tu ja-mee-ʻaa. ʹI-lay-hi yaṣ-ʻa-dul- Ka-li-muṭ- Ṭay-yi-bu wal-ʻA-ma-luṣ- Ṣaa-li-ḥu yar-fa-ʻuh. Wal-la-ẓee-na yam-ku-roo-nas- say-yi-ʹaa-ti la-hum ʻA-ẓaa-buñ- sha-deed; wa-mak-ru ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-wa ya-boor.

35:11.text: Wal-laa-hu kha-la-q̣a-kum- miñ- tu-raa-biñ s̤um-ma min- nuṭ-fa-tiñ s̤um-ma ja-ʻa-la-kum ʹaz-waa-jaa. Wa-maa taḥ-mi-lu min ʹuñ-s̤aa. wa-laa ta-ḍa-ʻu ʹil-laa bi-ʻil-mih. Wa-maa yu-ʻam-ma-ru mim- mu-ʻam-ma-riñw- wa-laa- yuñ-q̣a-ṣu min ʻu-mu-ri-heee ʹil-laa fee Ki-taab. ʹIn-na ẓaa-li-ka ʻa-lal- laa-hi ya-seer.

35:12.text: Wa-maa yas-ta-wil- baḥ-raa-ni haa-ẓaa ʻaẓ-buñ- fu-raa-tuñ- saaa-ʹi-g̣uñ- sha-raa-bu-hoo wa-haa-ẓaa mil-ḥun ʹu-jaaj. Wa-miñ kul-liñ taʹ-ku-loo-na laḥ-mañ ṭa-riy-yañw- wa-tas-takh-ri-joo-na ḥil-ya-tañ tal-ba-soo-na-haa; wa-ta-ral- ful-ka fee-hi ma-waa-khi-ra li-tab-ta-g̣oo miñ Faḍ-li-hee wa-la-ʻal-la-kum tash-ku-roon.

35:13.text: Yoo-li-jul- lay-la fin- na-haa-ri wa-yoo-li-jun- na-haa-ra fil- lay-li wa-sakh-kha-rash- sham-sa wal-q̣a-mar: Kul-luñy- yaj-ree li-ʹa-ja-lim- mu-sam-maa. Ẓaa-li-ku-mul- laa-hu Rab-bu-kum la-hul- Mulk. Wal-la-ẓee-na tad-ʻoo-na miñ doo-ni-hee maa- yam-li-koo-na miñ- q̣iṭ-meer.

35:14.text: ʹIñ tad-ʻoo-hum laa- yas-ma-ʻoo du-ʻaaa-ʹa-kum. Wa-law sa-mi-ʻoo mas- ta-jaa-boo la-kum. Wa-Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti yak-fu-roo-na bi-shir-ki-kum. Wa-laa yu-nab-bi-ʹu-ka mis̤-lu kha-beer.

35:15.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-han- naa-su ʹañ-tu-mul- fu-q̣a-raaa-ʹu ʹi-lal- laah: wal-laa-hu Hu-wal- G̣a-niy-yul- Ḥa-meed.

35:16.text: ʹIñy- ya-shaʹ yuẓ-hib-kum wa-yaʹ-ti bi-Khal-q̣iñ- Ja-deed.

35:18.text: Wa-laa ta-zi-ru waa-zi-ra-tuñw- wiz-ra ʹukh-raa. Wa-ʹiñ tad-ʻu mus̤-q̣a-la-tun ʹi-laa ḥim-li-haa laa- yuḥ-mal min-hu shay-ʹuñw- wa-law kaa-na ẓaa- q̣ur-baa. ʹIn-na-maa tuñ-ẓi-rul- la-ẓee-na yakh-shaw-na Rab-ba-hum̃- bil-g̣ay-bi wa-ʹa-q̣aa-muṣ- Ṣa-laah. Wa-mañ ta-zak-kaa fa-ʹin-na-maa ya-ta-zak-kaa li-naf-sih: wa-ʹi-lal- laa-hil- ma-ṣeer.

35:22.text: Wa-maa yas-ta-wil- ʹaḥ-yaaa-ʹu wa-lal- ʹam-waat. ʹIn-nal- laa-ha yus-mi-ʻu mañy- ya-shaaaʹ; wa-maaa ʹañ-ta bi-mus-mi-ʻim- mañ- fil- q̣u-boor.

35:24.text: ʹIn-naaa ʹar-sal-naa-ka bil-ḥaq̣-q̣i ba-shee-rañw- wa-na-ẓee-raa: wa-ʹim- min ʹum-ma-tin ʹil-laa kha-laa fee-haa na-ẓeer.

35:25.text: Wa-ʹiñy- yu-kaẓ-ẓi-boo-ka fa-q̣ad kaẓ-ẓa-bal- la-ẓee-na miñ- q̣ab-li-him: jaaa-ʹat-hum ru-su-lu-hum̃- bil-Bay-yi-naa-ti wa-biz-Zu-bu-ri wa-bil-Ki-taa-bil- Mu-neer.

35:26.text: S̤um-ma ʹa-khaẓ-tul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo fa-kay-fa kaa-na na-keer.

35:27.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹan-nal- laa-ha ʹañ-za-la mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi maaa-ʹaa? Fa-ʹakh-raj-naa bi-hee s̤a-ma-raa-tim- mukh-ta-li-fan ʹal-waa-nu-haa. Wa-mi-nal- ji-baa-li ju-da-dum bee-ḍuñw- wa-ḥum-rum- mukh-ta-li-fun ʹal-waa-nu-haa wa-g̣a-raa-bee-bu sood.

35:28.text: Wa-mi-nan- naa-si wad-da-waaab-bi wal-ʹan-ʻaa-mi mukh-ta-li-fun ʹal-waa-nu-hoo ka-ẓaa-lik. ʹIn-na-maa yakh-shal- laa-ha min ʻI-baa-di-hil- ʻu-la-maaaʹ: ʹin-nal- laa-ha ʻA-zee-zun G̣a-foor.

35:29.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na yat-loo-na Ki-taa-bal- laa-hi wa-ʹa-q̣aa-muṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta wa-ʹañ-fa-q̣oo mim-maa ra-zaq̣-naa-hum sir-rañw- waʻa-laa-ni-ya-tañy- yar-joo-na Ti-jaa-ra-tal- lañ- ta-boor:

35:30.text: Li-yu-waf-fi-ya-hum ʹu-joo-ra-hum wa-ya-zee-da-hum- miñ- Faḍ-lih: ʹin-na-hoo G̣a-foo-ruñ- Sha-koor.

35:31.text: Wal-la-ẓeee ʹaw-ḥay-naaa ʹi-lay-ka mi-nal- Ki-taa-bi hu-wal- Ḥaq̣-q̣u mu-ṣad-di-q̣al- li-maa bay-na ya-dayh: ʹin-nal- laa-ha bi-ʻI-baa-di-hee la-Kha-bee-rum- Ba-ṣeer.

35:32.text: S̤um-ma ʹaw-ras̤-nal- Ki-taa-bal- la-ẓee-naṣ- ṭa-fay-naa min ʻi-baa-di-naa: fa-min-hum z̤̣aa-li-mul- li-naf-sih; wa-min-hum- muq̣-ta-ṣid; wa-min-hum saa-bi-q̣um- bil-khay-raa-ti bi-ʹiẓ-nil- laah; ẓaa-li-ka hu-wal- Faḍ-lul- Ka-beer.

35:33.text: Jan-naa-tu ʻAd-niñy- yad-khu-loo-na-haa yu-ḥal-law-na fee-haa min ʹa-saa-wi-ra miñ- ẓa-ha-biñw- wa-luʹ-lu-ʹaa; wa-li-baa-su-hum fee-haa ḥa-reer.

35:34.text: Wa-q̣aa-lul- Ḥam-du lil-laa-hil- la-ẓeee ʹaẓ-ha-ba ʻan-nal- ḥa-zan: ʹin-na Rab-ba-naa la-G̣a-foo-ruñ- Sha-koor:

35:35.text: ʹAl-la-ẓeee ʹa-ḥal-la-naa Daa-ral- mu-q̣aa-ma-ti miñ Faḍ-lih: laa- ya-mas-su-naa fee-haa na-ṣa-buñw- wa-laa- ya-mas-su-naa fee-haa lu-g̣oob.

35:36.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo la-hum Naa-ru Ja-han-nam; laa- yuq̣-ḍaa ʻa-lay-him fa-ya-moo-too wa-laa yu-khaf-fa-fu ʻan-hum- min ʻA-ẓaa-bi-haa. Ka-ẓaa-li-ka naj-zee kul-la ka-foor!

35:37.text: Wa-hum yaṣ-ṭa-ri-khoo-na fee-haa: Rab-ba-naaa ʹakh-rij-naa naʻ-mal ṣaa-li-ḥan g̣ay-ral- la-ẓee kun-naa naʻ-mal! ʹA-wa-lamnu- ʻam-mir-kum- maa ya-ta-ẓak-ka-ru fee-hi mañ ta-ẓak-ka-ra wa-jaaa-ʹa-ku-mun- na-ẓeer. Fa-ẓoo-q̣oo fa-maa liz̤̣-z̤̣aa-li-mee-na min- na-ṣeer.

35:38.text: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha ʻAa-li-mu g̣ay-bis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹard: ʹIn-na-hoo ʻA-lee-mum- bi-ẓaa-tiṣ- ṣu-door.

35:39.text: Hu-wal- la-ẓee ja-ʻa-la-kum kha-laaa-ʹi-fa fil- ʹarḍ: fa-mañ ka-fa-ra fa-ʻa-lay-hi kuf-ruh: wa-laa ya-zee-dul- kaa-fi-ree-na kuf-ru-hum ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-him ʹil-laa maq̣-taa: wa-laa ya-zee-dul- kaa-fi-ree-na kuf-ru-hum ʹil-laa kha-saa-raa.

35:40.text: Q̣ul ʹa-ra-ʹay-tum shu-ra-kaaa-ʹa-ku-mul- la-ẓee-na tad-ʻoo-na miñ doo-nil- laah? ʹA-roo-nee maa-ẓaa kha-la-q̣oo mi-nal- ʹar-ḍi ʹam la-hum shir-kuñ- fis- sa-maa-waat? ʹAm ʹaa-tay-naa-hum Ki-taa-bañ fa-hum ʻa-laa Bay-yi-na-tim- minh?― Bal ʹiñy- ya-ʻi-duz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-moo-na baʻ-ḍu-hum̃ baʻ-ḍan ʹil-laa g̣u-roo-raa.

35:41.text: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha yum-si-kus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa ʹañ- ta-zoo-laa: wa-la-ʹiñ zaa-la-taaa ʹin ʹam-sa-ka-hu-maa min ʹa-ḥa-dim- mim- baʻ-dih: ʹin-na-hoo kaa-na Ḥa-lee-man G̣a-foo-raa!

35:42.text: Wa-ʹaq̣-sa-moo bil-laa-hi jah-da ʹay-maa-ni-him la-ʹiñ jaaa-ʹa-hum na-ẓee-rul- la-ya-koo-nun-na ʹah-daa min ʹiḥ-dal- ʹU-ma-mi fa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹa-hum na-ẓee-rum- maa zaa-da-hum ʹil-laa nu-foo-raa,―

35:43.text: ʹIs-tik-baa-rañ- fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-mak-ras- Say-yiʹ. Wa-laa ya-ḥee-q̣ul- mak-rus- Say-yi-ʹu ʹil-laa bi-ʹah-lih. Fa-hal yañ-z̤̣u-roo-na ʹil-laa sun-na-tal- ʹaw-wa-leen? Fa-lañ ta-ji-da li-Sun-na-til- laa-hi tab-dee-laa: wa-lañ ta-ji-da li-Sun-na-til- laa-hi taḥ-wee-laa.

35:44.text: ʹA-wa-lam ya-see-roo fil- ʹar-ḍi fa-yañ-z̤̣u-roo kay-fa kaa-na ʻAa-q̣i-ba-tul- la-ẓee-na miñ q̣ab-li-him wa-kaa-nooo ʹa-shad-da min-hum q̣uw-wah? Wa-maa kaa-nal- laa-hu li-yuʻ-ji-za-hoo miñ shay-ʹiñ fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-laa fil- ʹarḍ: ʹin-na-hoo kaa-na ʻA-lee-mañ- Q̣a-dee-raa.

35:45.text: Wa-law yu-ʹaa-khi-ẓul- laa-hun- naa-sa bi-maa ka-sa-boo maa- ta-ra-ka ʻa-laa z̤̣ah-ri-haa miñ daaab-ba-tiñw- wa-laa-kiñy- yu-ʹakh-khi-ru-hum ʹi-laaa ʹa-ja-lim- mu-sam-maa: Fa-ʹi-ẓaa jaaa-ʹa ʹA-ja-lu-hum fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha kaa-na bi-ʻi-baa-di-hee Ba-ṣee-raa.

36:6.text: Li-tuñ-ẓi-ra q̣aw-mam- maaa ʹuñ-ẓi-ra ʹaa-baaa-ʹu-hum fa-hum g̣aa-fi-loon.

36:7.text: La-q̣ad ḥaq̣-q̣al- Q̣aw-lu ʻa-laaa ʹak-s̤a-ri-him fa-hum laa- yuʹ-mi-noon.

36:8.text: ʹIn-naa ja-ʻal-naa feee ʹaʻ-naa-q̣i-him ʹag̣-laa-lañ fa-hi-ya ʹi-lal- ʹaẓ-q̣aa-ni fa-hum- muq̣-ma-ḥoon.

36:9.text: Wa-ja-ʻal-naa mim- bay-ni ʹay-dee-him sad-dañw- wa-min khal-fi-him sad-dañ- fa-ʹag̣-shay-naa-hum fa-hum laa- yub-ṣi-roon.

36:10.text: Wa-sa-waaa-ʹun ʻa-lay-him ʹa-ʹañ-ẓar-ta-hum ʹam lam tuñ-ẓir-hum laa- yuʹ-mi-noon.

36:11.text: ʹIn-na-maa tuñ-ẓi-ru ma-nit- ta-ba- ʻaẓ-Ẓik-ra wa-kha-shi-yar- Raḥ-maa-na bil-g̣ayb: fa-bash-shir-hu bi-Mag̣-fi-ra-tiñw- wa-ʹAj-riñ- Ka-reem.

36:12.text: ʹIn-naa Naḥ-nu nuḥ-yil- maw-taa wa-nak-tu-bu maa- q̣ad-da-moo wa-ʹaa-s̤aa-ra-hum: wa-kul-la shay-ʹin ʹaḥ-ṣay-naa-hu feee ʹI-maa-mim- mu-been.

36:13.text: Waḍ-rib la-hum- ma-s̤a-lan ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bal- Q̣ar-yah. ʹIẓ jaaa-ʹa-hal- mur-sa-loon.

36:14.text: ʹIẓ ʹar-sal-naaa ʹi-lay-hi-mus̤- nay-ni fa-kaẓ-ẓa-boo-hu-maa fa-ʻaz-zaz-naa bi-s̤aa-li-s̤iñ- fa-q̣aa-looo ʹin-naaa ʹi-lay-kum- mur-sa-loon.

36:15.text: Q̣aa-loo maaa ʹañ-tum ʹil-laa ba-sha-rum- mis̤-lu-naa wa-maaa ʹañ-za-lar- Raḥ-maa-nu miñ- shay-ʹin ʹin ʹañ-tum ʹil-laa tak-ẓi-boon.

36:16.text: Q̣aa-loo Rab-bu-naa yaʻ-la-mu ʹin-naaa ʹi-lay-kum la-mur-sa-loon:

36:18.text: Q̣aa-looo ʹin-naa ta-ṭay-yar-naa bi-kum: la-ʹil- lam tañ-ta-hoo la-nar-ju-man-na-kum wa-la-ya-mas-san-na-kum- min-naa ʻa-ẓaa-bun ʹa-leem.

36:19.text: Q̣aa-loo ṭaaa-ʹi-ru-kum- ma-ʻa-kum: ʹa-ʹiñ ẓuk-kir-tum? Bal ʹañ-tum q̣aw-mum- mus-ri-foon!

36:20.text: Wa-jaaa-ʹa min ʹaq̣-ṣal- Ma-dee-na-ti ra-ju-luñy- yas-ʻaa q̣aa-la yaa-q̣aw-mit- ta-bi-ʻul- mur-sa-leen:

36:21.text: ʹIt-ta-bi-ʻoo mal- laa yas-ʹa-lu-kum ʹaj-rañw- Wa-hum- muh-ta-doon.

36:22.text: Wa-maa li-ya laaa ʹaʻ-bu-dul- la-ẓee fa-ṭa-ra-nee wa-ʹi-lay-hi tur-ja-ʻoon.

36:23.text: ʹA-ʹat-ta-khi-ẓu miñ- doo-ni-heee ʹaa-li-ha-tan ʹiñy- yu-rid-nir- Raḥ-maa-nu bi-ḍur-ril- laa tug̣-ni ʻan-nee sha-faa-ʻa-tu-hum shay-ʹañw- wa-laa- yuñ-q̣i-ẓoon.

36:26.text: Q̣ee-lad- khu-lil- Jan-nah. Q̣aa-la yaa-lay-ta Q̣aw-mee yaʻ-la-moon,

36:27.text: Bi-maa lee g̣a-fa-ra Rab-bee wa-ja-ʻa-la-nee mi-nal- muk-ra-meen!

36:28.text: Wa-maaa ʹañ-zal-naa ʻa-laa Q̣aw-mi-hee mim- baʻ-di-hee miñ juñ-dim- mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi wa-maa kun-naa muñ-zi-leen.

36:29.text: ʹIñ kaa-nat ʹil-laa ṣay-ḥa-tañw- waa-ḥi-da-tañ- fa-ʹi-ẓaa hum khaa-mi-doon.

36:30.text: Yaa-ḥas-ra-tan ʻa-lal- ʻi-baad! Maa- yaʹ-tee-him- mir- ra-soo-lin ʹil-laa kaa-noo bi-hee yas-tah-zi-ʹoon!

36:31.text: ʹA-lam ya-raw kam ʹah-lak-naa q̣ab-la-hum- mi-nal- q̣u-roo-ni ʹan-na-hum i-lay-him laa-ʹ yar-ji-ʻoon?

36:32.text: Wa-ʹiñ kul-lul- lam-maa ja-mee-ʻul- la-day-naa muḥ-ḍa-roon.

36:33.text: Wa-ʹAa-ya-tul- la-hu-mul- ʹar-ḍul- may-tah: ʹaḥ-yay-naa-haa wa-ʹakh-raj-naa min-haa ḥab-bañ fa-min-hu yaʹ-ku-loon.

36:34.text: Wa-ja-ʻal-naa fee-haa jan-naa-tim- min- na-khee-liñw- waʹaʻ-naa-biñw- wa-faj-jar-naa fee-haa mi-nal- ʻu-yoon:

36:35.text: Li-yaʹ-ku-loo miñ s̤a-ma-ri-hee, wa-maa ʻa-mi-lat-hu ʹay-dee-him: ʹa-fa-laa yash-ku-roon?

36:36.text: Sub-ḥaa-nal- la-ẓee kha-la-q̣al- ʹaz-waa-ja kul-la-haa mim-maa tum-bi-tul- ʹar-ḍu wa-min ʹañ-fu-si-him Wa-mim-maa laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

36:37.text: Wa-ʹAa-ya-tul- la-hu-mul- Lay-lu nas-la-khu min-hun- Na-haa-ra fa-ʹi-ẓaa hum- muz̤̣-li-moon;

36:38.text: Wash-Sham-su taj-ree li-mus-ta-q̣ar-ril- la-haa: ẓaa-li-ka taq̣-dee-rul- ʻA-zee-zil- ʻA-leem.

36:39.text: Wal-Q̣a-ma-ra q̣ad-dar-naa-hu ma-naa-zi-la ḥat-taa ʻaa-da kal-ʻur-joo-nil- q̣a-deem.

36:40.text: Lash- Sham-su yam-ba-g̣ee la-haaa ʹañ tud-ri-kal- Q̣a-ma-ra wa-lal- Lay-lu saa-bi-q̣un- Na-haar: wa-kul-luñ- fee fa-la-kiñy- yas-ba-ḥoon.

36:41.text: Wa-ʹAa-ya-tul- la-hum ʹan-naa ḥa-mal-naa ẓur-riy-ya-ta-hum fil- ful-kil mash-ḥoon;

36:42.text: Wa-kha-laq̣-naa la-hum- mim- mis̤-li-hee maa- yar-ka-boon.

36:43.text: Wa-ʹin- na-shaʹ nug̣-riq̣-hum fa-laa ṣa-ree-kha la-hum wa-laa hum yuñ-q̣a-ẓoon,

36:44.text: ʹIl-laa Raḥ-ma-tam- min-naa wa-ma-taa-ʻan ʹi-laa ḥeen.

36:45.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa q̣ee-la la-hu-mut- ta-q̣oo Maa- bay-na ʹay-dee-kum wa-maa khal-fa-kum la-ʻal-la-kum tur-ḥa-moon.

36:46.text: Wa-maa taʹ-tee-him- min ʹAa-ya-tim- min ʹAa-yaa-ti Rab-bi-him ʹil-laa kaa-noo ʻan-haa muʻ-ri-ḍeen.

36:47.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa q̣ee-la la-hum ʹañ-fi-q̣oo mim-maa ra-za-q̣a-ku-mul- laa-hu q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo lil-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nooo ʹa-nuṭ-ʻi-mu mal- law ya-shaaa-ʹul- laa-hu ʹaṭ-ʻa-mah?― ʹIn ʹañ-tum ʹil-laa fee ḍa-laa-lim- mu-been.

36:48.text: Wa-ya-q̣oo-loo-na ma-taa haa-ẓal- waʻ-du ʹiñ- kuñ-tum ṣaa-di-q̣een?

36:49.text: Maa- yañ-z̤̣u-roo-na ʹil-laa Ṣay-ḥa-tañw- waa-ḥi-da-tañ taʹ-khu-ẓu-hum wa-hum ya-khiṣ-ṣi-moon!

36:50.text: Fa-laa yas-ta-ṭee-ʻoo-na taw-ṣi-ya-tañw- wa-laaa ʹi-laaa ʹah-li-him yar-ji-ʻoon!

36:51.text: Wa-nu-fi-kha fiṣ- Ṣoo-ri fa-ʹi-ẓaa hum- mi-nal- ʹaj-daa-s̤i ʹi-laa Rab-bi-him yañ-si-loon!

36:52.text: Q̣aa-loo yaa-way-la-naa mam- ba-ʻa-s̤a-naa mim- mar-q̣a-di-naa Haa-ẓaa maa- wa-ʻa-dar- Raḥ-maa-nu wa-ṣa-da-q̣al- mur-sa-loon!

36:53.text: ʹIñ- kaa-nat ʹil-laa Ṣay-ḥa-tañw- waa-ḥi-da-tañ fa-ʹi-ẓaa hum ja-mee-ʻul- la-day-naa muḥ-ḍa-roon!

36:54.text: Fal-Yaw-ma laa- tuz̤̣-la-mu naf-suñ shay-ʹañw-wa laa- tuj-zaw-na ʹil-laa maa- kuñ-tum taʻ-ma-loon.

36:55.text: ʹIn-na ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bal- Jan-na-til- Yaw-ma fee shu-g̣u-liñ- faa-ki-hoon;

36:56.text: Hum wa-ʹaz-waa-ju-hum fee z̤̣i-laa-lin ʻa-lal- ʹa-raaa-ʹi-ki mut-ta-ki-ʹoon;

36:57.text: La-hum fee-haa faa-ki-ha-tuñw- wa-la-hum- maa yad-da-ʻoon;

36:60.text: ʹA-lam ʹaʻ-had ʹi-lay-kum yaa- Ba-neee ʹAa-da-ma ʹal-laa taʻ-bu-dush- Shay-ṭaan; ʹin-na-hoo la-kum ʻa-duw-wum- mu-been?―
