36:62.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹa-ḍal-la miñ-kum ji-bil-lañ- ka-s̤ee-raa. ʹA-fa-lam ta-koo-noo taʻ-q̣i-loon?

36:65.text: ʹAl-Yaw-ma nakh-ti-mu ʻa-laaa ʹaf-waa-hi-him wa-tu-kal-li-mu-naaa ʹay-dee-him wa-tash-ha-du ʹar-ju-lu-hum̃- bi-maa kaa-noo yak-si-boon.

36:66.text: Wa-law na-shaaa-ʹu la-ṭa-mas-naa ʻa-laaa ʹaʻ-yu-ni-him fas-ta-ba-q̣uṣ- Ṣi-raa-ṭa fa-ʹan-naa yub-ṣi-roon?

36:67.text: Wa-law na-shaaa-ʹu la-ma-sakh-naa-hum ʻa-laa ma-kaa-na-ti-him fa-mas- ta-ṭaa-ʻoo mu-ḍiy-yañw-wa laa- yar-ji-ʻoon.

36:68.text: Wa-man- nu-ʻam-mir-hu nu-nak-kis-hu fil- khalq̣: ʹa-fa-laa yaʻ-q̣i-loon?

36:69.text: Wa-maa ʻal-lam-naa-hush- Shiʻ-ra wa-maa yam-ba-g̣ee lah: ʹin hu-wa ʹil-laa Ẓik-ruñw-wa Q̣ur-ʹaa-num- Mu-been:

36:70.text: Li-yuñ-ẓi-ra mañ kaa-na ḥay-yañw- wa-ya-ḥiq̣-q̣al- q̣aw-lu ʻa-lal- kaa-fi-reen.

36:71.text: ʹA-wa-lam ya-raw ʹan-naa kha-laq̣-naa la-hum- mim-maa ʻa-mi-lat ʹay-dee-naaa ʹan-ʻaa-mañ fa-hum la-haa maa-li-koon?―

36:72.text: Wa-ẓal-lal-naa-haa la-hum fa-min-haa ra-koo-bu-hum wa-min-haa yaʹ-ku-loon:

36:73.text: Wa-la-hum fee-haa ma-naa-fi-ʻu wa-ma-shaa-rib. ʹA-fa-laa yash-ku-roon?

36:74.text: Wat-ta-kha-ẓoo miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi ʹaa-li-ha-tal- la-ʻal-la-hum yuñ-ṣa-roon!

36:75.text: Laa- yas-ta-ṭee-ʻoo-na naṣ-ra-hum wa-hum la-hum juñ-dum- muḥ-ḍa-roon.

36:76.text: Fa-laa yaḥ-zuñ-ka q̣aw-lu-hum. ʹIn-naa naʻ-la-mu maa- yu-sir-roo-na wa-maa yuʻ-li-noon.

36:77.text: ʹA-wa-lam ya-ral- ʹiñ-saa-nu ʹan-naa kha-laq̣-naa-hu min- nuṭ-fa-tiñ fa-ʹi-ẓaa hu-wa kha-ṣee-mum- mu-been!

36:78.text: Wa-ḍa-ra-ba la-naa ma-s̤a-lañw- wa-na-si-ya khal-q̣ah: q̣aa-la mañy- yuḥ-yil- ʻi-z̤̣aa-ma wa-hi-ya ra-meem?

36:79.text: Q̣ul yuḥ-yee-hal- la-ẓeee ʹañ-sha-ʹa-haaa ʹaw-wa-la mar-rah! Wa-Hu-wa bi-kul-li khal-q̣in ʻA-leem!

36:80.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee ja-ʻa-la la-kum- mi-nash- sha-ja-ril- ʹakh-ḍa-ri naa-rañ fa-ʹi-ẓaaa ʹañ-tum- min-hu too-q̣i-doon!

36:81.text: ʹA-wa-lay-sal- la-ẓee kha-la-q̣as- sa-maa-waa-ti wal- ʹar-ḍa bi-Q̣aa-di-rin ʻa-laaa ʹañy-yakh-lu-q̣a mis̤-la-hum?― Ba-laa! wa-Hu-wal- Khal-laa-q̣ul- ʻA-leem!

36:82.text: ʹIn-na-maaa ʹAm-ru-hooo ʹi-ẓaaa ʹa-raa-da shay-ʹan ʹañy- ya-q̣oo-la la-hoo ˹KUÑ˺ fa-ya-koon!

36:83.text: Fa-Sub-ḥaa-nal- la-ẓee bi-ya-di-hee Ma-la-koo-tu kul-li shay-ʹiñw- wa-ʹi-lay-hi tur-ja-ʻoon

37:5.text: Rab-bus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi wa-maa bay-na-hu-maa wa-Rab-bul- ma-shaa-riq̣!

37:6.text: ʹIn-naa zay-yan-nas- sa-maaa- ʹad-dun-yaa bi-zee-na-ti-nil- ka-waa-kib,―

37:8.text: Laa- yas-sam-ma-ʻoo-na ʹi-lal- Ma-la-ʹil- ʹAʻ-laa wa-yuq̣-ẓa-foo-na miñ kul-li jaa-nib,

37:10.text: ʹIl-laa man kha-ṭi-fal- khaṭ-fa-ta fa-ʹat-ba-ʻa-hoo shi-haa-buñ- s̤aa-q̣ib.

37:11.text: Fas-taf-ti-him ʹa-hum ʹa-shad-du khal-q̣an ʹam- man kha-laq̣-naa? ʹIn-naa kha-laq̣-naa-hum- miñ ṭee-nil- laa-zib!

37:15.text: Wa-q̣aa-looo ʹin haa-ẓaaa ʹil-laa siḥ-rum- mu-been!

37:16.text: ʹA-ʹi-ẓaa mit-naa wa-kun-naa tu-ra-bañw- wa-ʻi-z̤̣aa-man ʹa-ʹin-naa la-mab-ʻoo-s̤oon.

37:19.text: Fa-ʹin-na-maa hi-ya zaj-ra-tuñw- waa-ḥi-da-tuñ fa-ʹi-ẓaa hum yañ-z̤̣u-roon!

37:21.text: Haa-ẓaa Yaw-mul- Faṣ-lil- la-ẓee kuñ-tum̃- bi-hee tu-kaẓ-ẓi-boon!

37:22.text: ʹUḥ-shu-rul- la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-moo wa-ʹaz-waa-ja-hum wa-maa kaa-noo yaʻ-bu-doon.

37:23.text: Miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi fah-doo-hum ʹi-laa Ṣi-raa-ṭil- Ja-ḥeem!

37:28.text: Q̣aa-looo ʹin-na-kum kuñ-tum taʹ-too-na-naa ʻa-nil- ya-meen!

37:30.text: Wa-maa kaa-na la-naa ʻa-lay-kum- miñ sul-ṭaan. Bal kuñ-tum q̣aw-mañ ṭaa-g̣een!

37:31.text: Fa-ḥaq̣-q̣a ʻa-lay-naa Q̣aw-lu Rab-bi-naaa ʹin-naa la-ẓaaa-ʹi-q̣oon.

37:35.text: ʹIn-na-hum kaa-nooo ʹi-ẓaa q̣ee-la la-hum ˹Laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-lal- laa-hu˺ yas-tak-bi-roon,

37:36.text: Wa-ya-q̣oo-loo-na ʹa-ʹin-naa la-taa-ri-kooo ʹaa-li-ha-ti-naa li-shaa-ʻi-rim- maj-noon?

37:39.text: Wa-maa tuj-zaw-na ʹil-laa maa- kuñ-tum taʻ-ma-loon;-

37:47.text: Laa- fee-haa g̣aw-luñw- wa-laa- hum ʻan-haa yuñ-za-foon.

37:51.text: Q̣aa-la q̣aaa-ʹi-lum- min-hum ʹin-nee kaa-na lee q̣a-reen,

37:53.text: ʹA-ʹi-ẓaa mit-naa wa-kun-naa tu-raa-bañw- wa-ʻi-z̤̣aa-man ʹa-ʹin-naa la-ma-dee-noon?

37:57.text: Wa-law-laa- Niʻ-ma-tu Rab-bee la-kuñ-tu mi-nal- muḥ-ḍa-reen!

37:59.text: ʹIl-laa maw-ta-ta-nal- ʹoo-laa wa-maa naḥ-nu bi-mu-ʻaẓ-ẓa-been?

37:62.text: ʹA-ẓaa-li-ka khay-run- nu-zu-lan ʹam Sha-ja-ra-tuz- Zaq̣-q̣oom?

37:64.text: ʹIn-na-haa sha-ja-ra-tuñ takh-ru-ju feee ʹaṣ-lil- Ja-ḥeem:

37:66.text: Fa-ʹin-na-hum la-ʹaa-ki-loo-na min-haa fa-maa-li-ʹoo-na min-hal- bu-ṭoon.

37:67.text: S̤um-ma ʹin-na la-hum ʻa-lay-haa la-shaw-bam- min ḥa-meem.

37:85.text: ʹIẓ q̣aa-la li-ʹa-bee-hi wa-q̣aw-mi-hee maa-ẓaa taʻ-bu-doon?

37:91.text: Fa-raa-g̣a ʹi-laaa ʹaa-li-ha-ti-him fa-q̣aa-la ʹa-laa taʹ-ku-loon?...

37:97.text: Q̣aa-lub- noo la-hoo bun-yaa-nañ fa-ʹal-q̣oo-hu fil- Ja-ḥeem!

37:99.text: Wa-q̣aa-la ʹin-nee ẓaa-hi-bun ʹi-laa Rab-bee sa-yah-deen!

37:102.text: Fa-lam-maa ba-la-g̣a ma-ʻa-hus- saʻ-ya q̣aa-la yaa-bu-nay-ya ʹin-neee ʹa-raa fil- ma-naa-mi ʹan-neee ʹaẓ-ba-ḥu-ka fañ-z̤̣ur maa-ẓaa ta-raa! Q̣aa-la yaaa-ʹa-ba-tif- ʻal maa- tuʹ-mar: sa-ta-ji-du-neee ʹiñ- shaaa- ʹal-laa-hu mi-naṣ- Ṣaa-bi-reen!

37:105.text: Q̣ad ṣad-daq̣-tar- ruʹ-yaa! ʹIn-naa ka-ẓaa-li-ka naj-zil- Muḥ-si-neen.

37:113.text: Wa-baa-rak-naa ʻa-lay-hi wa-ʻa-laaa ʹIs-ḥaaq̣: wa-miñ- ẓur-riy-ya-ti-hi-maa muḥ-si-nuñw- wa-z̤̣aa-li-mul- li-naf-si-hee mu-been.

37:144.text: La-la-bi-s̤a fee baṭ-ni-heee ʹi-laa Yaw-mi yub-ʻa-s̤oon.

37:147.text: Wa-ʹar-sal-naa-hu ʹi-laa mi-ʹa-ti ʹal-fin ʹaw ya-zee-doon.

37:150.text: ʹAm kha-laq̣-nal- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-ta ʹi-naa-s̤añw- Wa-hum shaa-hi-doon?

37:158.text: Wa-ja-ʻa-loo bay-na-hoo wa-bay-nal- Jin-na-ti na-sa-baa: wa-la-q̣ad ʻa-li-ma-til- Jin-na-tu ʹin-na-hum la-muḥ-ḍa-roon!

37:164.text: Wa-maa min-naaa ʹil-laa la-hoo ma-q̣aa-mum- maʻ-loom;

37:168.text: Law ʹan-na ʻiñ-da-naa Ẓik-ram- mi-nal- ʹaw-wa-leen,

37:177.text: Fa-ʹi-ẓaa na-za-la bi-saa-ḥa-ti-him fa-saaa-ʹa ṣa-baa-ḥul- muñ-ẓa-reen!

37:180.text: Sub-ḥaa-na Rab-bi-ka Rab-bil- ʻIz-za-ti ʻam-maa ya-ṣi-foon!

38:2.text: Ba-lil- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo fee ʻiz-za-tiñw- Wa-shi-q̣aaq̣.

38:3.text: Kam ʹah-lak-naa miñ- q̣ab-li-him- miñ- q̣ar-niñ- fa-naa-daw- wa-laa-ta ḥee-na ma-naaṣ!

38:4.text: Wa-ʻa-ji-booo ʹañ jaaa-ʹa-hum- Muñ-ẓi-run- min-hum! Wa-q̣aa-lal- Kaa-fi-roon-na haa-ẓaa saa-ḥi-ruñ- kaẓ-ẓaab!

38:5.text: ʹA-ja-ʻa-lal- ʹaa-li-ha-ta ʹI-laa-hañw- Waa-ḥi-daa? ʹIn-na haa-ẓaa la-shay-ʹun ʻu-jaab!

38:6.text: Wañ-ṭa-la-q̣al- ma-la-ʹu min-hum ʻa-nim- shoo waṣ-bi-roo ʻa-laaa ʹaa-li-ha-ti-kum! ʹIn-na haa-ẓaa la-shay-ʹuñy- yu-raad!

38:7.text: Maa- sa-miʻ-naa bi-haa-ẓaa fil- mil-la-til- ʹaa-khi-rah: ʹin haa-ẓaaa ʹil-lakh- ti-laaq̣!

38:8.text: ʹA-ʹuñ-zi-la ʻa-lay-hiẓ- Ẓik-ru mim- bay-ni-naa? Bal hum fee shak-kim- miñ- Ẓik-ree! Bal- lam-maa ya-ẓoo-q̣oo ʻA-ẓaab!

38:9.text: ʹAm ʻiñ-da-hum kha-zaaa-ʹi-nu Raḥ-ma-ti Rab-bi-kal- ʻA-zee-zil- Wah-haab?

38:10.text: ʹAm la-hum- mul-kus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi wa-maa bay-na-hu-maa? Fal-yar-ta-q̣oo fil- ʹas-baab!

38:11.text: Juñ-dum- maa hu-naa-li-ka mah-zoo-mum- mi-nal- ʹaḥ-zaab.

38:12.text: Kaẓ-ẓa-bat q̣ab-la-hum Q̣aw-mu Noo-ḥiñw- Wa-ʻAa-duñw- Wa-Fir-ʻaw-nu Ẓul- ʹaw-taad,

38:13.text: Wa-S̤a-moo-du wa-Q̣aw-mu Loo-ṭiñw- waʹAṣ-ḥaa-bul- ʹAy-kah;― ʹu-laaa-ʹi-kal- ʹAḥ-zaab.

38:14.text: ʹIñ- kul-lun ʹil-laa kaẓ-ẓa-bar- ru-su-la fa-ḥaq̣-q̣a ʻI-q̣aab.

38:15.text: Wa-maa yañ-z̤̣u-ru haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi ʹil-laa Ṣay-ḥa-tañw- waa-ḥi-da-tam- maa la-haa miñ- fa-waaq̣.

38:16.text: Wa-q̣aa-loo Rab-ba-naa ʻaj-jil- la-naa q̣iṭ-ṭa-naa q̣ab-la Yaw-mil- Ḥi-saab!

38:17.text: ʹIṣ-bir ʻa-laa maa- ya-q̣oo-loo-na waẓ-kur ʻAb-da-naa Daa-woo-da- Ẓal- ʹayd: ʹin-na-hooo ʹaw-waab.

38:18.text: ʹIn-naa sakh-khar-nal- ji-baa-la ma-ʻa-hoo yu-sab-biḥ-na bil-ʻa-shiy-yi wal-ʹish-raaq̣,

38:20.text: Wa-sha-dad-naa mul-ka-hoo wa-ʹaa-tay-naa-hul- ḥik-ma-ta wa-faṣ-lal- khi-ṭaab.

38:21.text: Wa-hal ʹa-taa-ka na-ba-ʹul- khaṣm?- ʹIẓ ta-saw-wa-rul- miḥ-raab;

38:22.text: ʹIẓ da-kha-loo ʻa-laa Daa-woo-da fa-fa-zi-ʻa min-hum q̣aa-loo laa- ta-khaf: khaṣ-maa-ni ba-g̣aa baʻ-ḍu-naa ʻa-laa baʻ-ḍiñ- faḥ-kum̃ bay-na-naa bil-ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-laa tush-ṭiṭ wah-di-naaa ʹi-laa sa-waaa-ʹiṣ- ṣi-raaṭ...

38:23.text: ʹIn-na haa-ẓaaa ʹa-khee: la-hoo tis-ʻuñw- wa-tis-ʻoo-na naʻ-ja-tañw- wa-li-ya naʻ-ja-tuñw- waa-ḥi-dah: fa-q̣aa-la ʹak-fil-nee-haa wa-ʻaz-za-nee fil- khi-ṭaab.

38:24.text: Q̣aa-la la-q̣ad z̤̣a-la-ma-ka bi-su-ʹaa-li naʻ-ja-ti-ka ʹi-laa ni-ʻaa-jih: wa-ʹin-na ka-s̤ee-ram- mi-nal- khu-la-ṭaaa-ʹi la-yab-g̣ee baʻ-ḍu-hum ʻa-laa baʻ-ḍin ʹil-lal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti wa-q̣a-lee-lum- maa hum! Wa-z̤̣an-na Daa-woo-du ʹan-na-maa fa-tan-naa-hu fas-tag̣-fa-ra Rab-ba-hoo wa-khar-ra raa-ki-ʻañw- wa-ʹa-naab.

38:25.text: Fa-g̣a-far-naa la-hoo ẓaa-lik: wa-ʹin-na la-hoo ʻiñ-da-naa la-zul-faa wa-ḥus-na ma-ʹaab.

38:26.text: Yaa-Daa-woo-du ʹin-naa ja-ʻal-naa-ka Kha-lee-fa-tañ- fil- ʹar-ḍi faḥ-kum̃- bay-nan- naa-si bil-ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-laa tat-ta-bi-ʻil- ha-waa fa-yu-ḍil-la-ka ʻañ Sa-bee-lil- laah: ʹin-nal- la-ẓee-na ya-ḍil-loo-na ʻañ Sa-bee-lil- laa-hi la-hum ʻa-ẓaa-buñ sha-dee-dum- bi-maa na-soo Yaw-mal- Ḥi-saab.

38:27.text: Wa-maa kha-laq̣-nas- sa-maaa-ʹa wal-ʹar-ḍa wa-maa bay-na-hu-maa baa-ṭi-laa! Ẓaa-li-ka z̤̣an-nul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo! Fa-way-lul- lil-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo mi-nan- Naar!

38:28.text: ʹAm naj-ʻa-lul- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti kal-muf-si-dee-na fil- ʹarḍ? ʹAm naj-ʻa-lul mut-ta-q̣ee-na kal-fuj-jaar?

38:29.text: Ki-taa-bun ʹañ-zal-naa-hu ʹi-lay-ka mu-baa-ra-kul- li-yad-dab-ba-rooo ʹAa-yaa-ti-hee wa-li-ya-ta-ẓak-ka-ra ʹu-lul- ʹal-baab.

38:30.text: Wa-wahab-naa li-Daa-woo-da Su-lay-maan: niʻ-mal- ʻAbd! ʹIn-na-hooo ʹaw-waab!

38:31.text: ʹIẓ ʻu-ri-ḍa ʻa-lay-hi bil-ʻa-shiy-yiṣ- ṣaa-fi-naa-tul- ji-yaad;

38:32.text: Fa-q̣aa-la ʹin-neee ʹaḥ-bab-tu ḥub-bal- khay-ri ʻañ ẓik-ri Rab-bee,― ḥat-taa ta-waa-rat bil-ḥi-jaab:

38:33.text: Rud-doo-haa ʻa-layy. fa-ṭa-fi-q̣a mas-ḥam- bis-soo-q̣i wal-ʹaʻ-naaq̣.

38:34.text: Wa-la-q̣ad fa-tan-naa Su-lay-maa-na wa-ʹal-q̣ay-naa ʻa-laa kur-siy-yi-hee ja-sa-dañ s̤um-ma ʹa-naab:

38:35.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-big̣- fir lee wa-hab lee Mul-kal- laa yam-ba-g̣ee li-ʹa-ḥa-dim- mim- baʻ-dee: ʹin-na-ka ʹAñ-tal- Wah-haab.

38:36.text: Fa-sakh-khar-naa la-hur- Ree-ḥa taj-ree bi-ʹam-ri-hee ru-khaaa-ʹan ḥay-s̤u ʹa-ṣaab,―

38:39.text: Haa-ẓaa ʻA-ṭaaa-ʹu-naa fam-nun ʹaw ʹam-sik bi-g̣ay-ri ḥi-saab.

38:40.text: Wa-ʹin-na la-hoo ʻiñ-da-naa la-zul-faa wa-ḥus-na ma-ʹaab.

38:41.text: Waẓ-kur ʻAb-da-naaa ʹAy-yoob. ʹIẓ naa-daa Rab-ba-hooo ʹan-nee mas-sa-ni-yash- shay-ṭaa-nu bi-nuṣ-biñw- wa-ʻa-ẓaab!

38:42.text: ʹUr-kuḍ bi-rij-lik: haa-ẓaa mug̣-ta-sa-lum- baa-ri-duñw- wa-sha-raab.

38:43.text: Wa-wa-hab-naa la-hooo ʹah-la-hoo wa-mis̤-la-hum- ma-ʻa-hum Raḥ-ma-tam- min-naa wa-ẓik-raa li-ʹU-lil- ʹal-baab.

38:44.text: Wa-khuẓ bi-ya-di-ka ḍig̣-s̤añ faḍ-rib- bi-hee wa-laa taḥ-nas̤. ʹIn-naa wa-jad-naa-hu ṣaa-bi-raa. Niʻ-mal- ʻAbd! ʹIn-na-hooo ʹaw-waab!

38:45.text: Waẓ-kur ʻI-baa-da-naaa ʹIb-raa-hee-ma wa-ʹIs-ḥaa-q̣a wa-Yaʻ-q̣oo-ba ʹU-lil- ʹAy-dee wal-ʹAb-ṣaar.

38:48.text: Waẓ-kur ʹIs-maa-ʻee-la wal- ya-sa-ʻa wa-Ẓal-Kifl: wa-kul-lum- mi-nal- ʹAkh-yaar.

38:49.text: Haa-ẓaa Ẓikr: wa-ʹin-na lil-Mut-ta-q̣ee-na la-ḥus-na ma-ʹaab.

38:51.text: Mut-ta-ki-ʹee-na fee-haa yad-ʻoo-na fee-haa bi-faa-ki-ha-tiñ- ka-s̤ee-ra-tiñw- wa-sha-raab;

38:54.text: ʹIn-na haa-ẓaa la-Riz-q̣u-naa maa- la-hoo min- na-faad.

38:59.text: Haa-ẓaa faw-jum- muq̣-ta-ḥi-mum- ma-ʻa-kum! Laa- mar-ḥa-bam- bi-him! ʹIn-na-hum ṣaa-lun- Naar!

38:60.text: Q̣aa-loo bal ʹañ-tum! Laa- mar-ḥa-bam- bi-kum! ʹAñ-tum q̣ad-dam-tu-moo-hu la-naa! Fa-biʹ-sal- q̣a-raar!

38:61.text: Q̣aa-loo Rab-ba-naa mañ- q̣ad-da-ma la-naa haa-ẓaa fa-zid-hu ʻA-ẓaa-bañ- ḍiʻ-fañ- fin- Naar!

38:62.text: Wa-q̣aa-loo maa- la-naa laa- na-raa ri-jaa-lañ- kun-naa na-ʻud-du-hum- mi-nal- ʹash-raar?

38:63.text: ʹAt-ta-khaẓ-naa-hum sikh-riy-yan ʹam zaa-g̣at ʻan-hu-mul- ʹab-ṣaar?

38:64.text: ʹIn-na ẓaa-li-ka la-ḥaq̣-q̣uñ- ta-khaa-ṣu-mu ʹAh-lin- Naar!

38:65.text: Q̣ul ʹIn-na-maaa ʹa-na Muñ-ẓir: wa-maa min ʹi-laa-hin ʹil-lal- laa-hul- Waa-ḥi-dul- Q̣ah-haar,―

38:66.text: Rab-bus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi wa-maa bay-na-hu-mal- ʻA-zee-zul- G̣af-faar.

38:69.text: Maa- kaa-na li-ya min ʻil-mim- bil-ma-la-ʹil- ʹaʻ-laaa ʹiẓ yakh-ta-ṣi-moon.

38:70.text: ʹIñy- yoo-ḥaaa ʹi-lay-ya ʹil-laaa ʹan-na-maaa ʹa-na Na-ẓee-rum- mu-been.

38:71.text: ʹIẓ q̣aa-la Rab-bu-ka lil-ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-ti ʹin-nee khaa-li-q̣um- basha-ram- miñ- ṭeen.

38:72.text: Fa-ʹi-ẓaa saw-way-tu-hoo wa-na-fakh-tu fee-hi mir- Roo-ḥee fa-q̣a-ʻoo la-hoo saa-ji-deen.

38:74.text: ʹIl-laaa ʹIb-lees; ʹis-tak-ba-ra wa-kaa-na mi-nal- kaa-fi-reen.

38:75.text: Q̣aa-la Yaaa-ʹIb-lee-su maa- ma-na-ʻa-ka ʹañ- tas-ju-da li-maa kha-laq̣-tu bi-ya-dayy? ʹAs-tak-bar-ta ʹam kuñ-ta mi-n al-ʻaa-leen?

38:76.text: Q̣aa-la ʹa-na khay-rum- minh: kha-laq̣-ta-nee min- naa-riñw- wa-kha-laq̣-ta-hoo miñ- ṭeen.

38:78.text: Wa-ʹin-na ʻa-lay-ka laʻ-na-teee ʹi-laa Yaw-mid- Deen.

38:79.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-bi fa-ʹañ-z̤̣ir-neee ʹi-laa Yaw-mi yub-ʻa-s̤oon.

38:85.text: La-ʹam-la-ʹan-na Ja-han-na-ma miñ-ka wa-mim-mañ ta-bi-ʻa-ka min-hum ʹaj-ma-ʻeen.

38:86.text: Q̣ul maaa ʹas-ʹa-lu-kum ʻa-lay-hi min ʹaj-riñw- Wa-maaa ʹa-na mi-nal- mu-ta-kal-li-feen.

39:1.text: Tañ-zee-lul- Ki-taa-bi mi-nal- laa-hil- ʻA-zee-zil- Ḥa-keem.

39:2.text: ʹIn-naaa ʹañ-zal-naaa ʹi-lay-kal- Ki-taa-ba bil-Ḥaq̣-q̣i faʻ-bu-dil- laa-ha mukh-li-ṣal- la-hud- deen.

39:3.text: ʹA-laa lil-laa-hid- dee-nul- khaa-liṣ? Wal-la-ẓee-nat- ta-kha-ẓoo miñ doo-ni-heee ʹaw-li-yaaaʹ. Maa- naʻ-bu-du-hum ʹil-laa li-yu-q̣ar-ri-boo-naaa ʹi-lal- laa-hi zul-faa. ʹIn-nal- laa-ha yaḥ-ku-mu bay-na-hum fee maa- hum fee-hi yakh-ta-li-foon. ʹIn-nal- laa-ha laa- yah-dee man hu-wa kaa-ẓi-buñ- kaf-faar.

39:4.text: Law ʹaa-raa-dal- laa-hu ʹañy- yat-ta-khi-ẓa wa-la-dal- laṣ-ṭa-faa mim-maa yakh-lu-q̣u maa- ya-shaaa-ʹu Sub-ḥaa-nah! Hu-wal- laa-hul- Waa-ḥi-dul- Q̣ah-haar.

39:5.text: Kha-la-q̣as- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa bil-ḥaq̣q̣: yu-kaw-wi-rul- lay-la ʻa-lan- na-haa-ri wa-yu-kaw-wi-run- na-haa-ra ʻa-lal- lay-li wa-sakh-kha-rash- sham-sa wal-q̣a-mar: kul-luñy- yaj-ree li-ʹa-ja-lim- mu-sam-maa. ʹA-laa Hu-wal- ʻA-zee-zul- G̣af-faar.

39:6.text: Kha-la-q̣a-kum- min- naf-siñw- waa-ḥi-da-tiñ s̤um-ma ja-ʻa-la min-haa zaw-ja-haa wa-ʹañ-za-la la-kum- mi-nal- ʹan-ʻaa-mi s̤a-maa-ni-ya-ta ʹaz-waaj: yakh-lu-q̣u-kum fee bu-ṭoo-ni ʹum-ma-haa-ti-kum kha-la-q̣am- mim- baʻdi khal-q̣iñ fee ẓu-lu-maa-tiñ s̤a-laas̤. Ẓaa-li-ku-mul- laa-hu Rab-bu-kum la-hul- mulk. Laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa Hoo. Fa-ʹan-naa tuṣ-ra-foon?

39:7.text: ʹIñ- tak-fu-roo fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha G̣a-niy-yun ʻañ-kum: wa-laa yar-ḍaa li-ʻi-baa-di-hil- kufr: wa-ʹiñ- tash-ku-roo yar-ḍa-hu la-kum. Wa-laa ta-zi-ru waa-zi-ra-tuñw- wiz-ra ʹukh-raa. S̤um-ma ʹi-laa Rab-bi-kum- Mar-ji-ʻu-kum fa-yu-nab-bi-ʹu-kum̃- bi-maa kuñ-tum taʻ-ma-loon. ʹIn-na-hoo ʻA-lee-mum- bi-ẓaa-tiṣ- ṣu-door.

39:8.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa mas-sal- ʹiñ-saa-na ḍur-ruñ- da-ʻaa Rab-ba-hoo mu-nee-ban ʹi-lay-hi s̤um-ma ʹi-ẓaa khaw-wa-la-hoo niʻ-ma-tam- min-hu na-si-ya maa- kaa-na yad-ʻooo ʹi-lay-hi miñ q̣ab-lu wa-ja-ʻa-la lil-laa-hi ʹañ-daa-dal- li-yu-ḍil-la ʻañ Sa-bee-lih. Q̣ul ta-mat-taʻ bi-kuf-ri-ka q̣a-lee-lan ʹin-na-ka min ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bin- Naar!

39:9.text: ʹAm-man hu-wa q̣aa-ni-tun ʹaa-naaa-ʹal- lay-li saa-ji-dañw- wa-q̣aaa-ʹi-mañy- yaḥ-ẓa-rul- ʹAa-khi-ra-ta wa-yar-joo Raḥ-ma-ta Rab-bih? Q̣ul hal yas-ta-wil- la-ẓee-na yaʻ-la-moo-na wal-la-ẓee-na la yaʻ-la-moon? ʹIn-na-maa ya-ta-ẓak-ka-ru ʹu-lul- ʹal-baab.

39:10.text: Q̣ul yaa-ʻi-baa-dil- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nut- ta-q̣oo Rab-ba-kum. Lil-la-ẓee-na ʹaḥ-sa-noo fee haa-ẓi-hid- dun-yaa ḥa-sa-nah. Wa-ʹar-ḍul- laa-hi waa-si-ʻah! ʹIn-na-maa yu-waf-faṣ- ṣaa-bi-roo-na ʹaj-ra-hum̃- bi-g̣ay-ri ḥi-saab!

39:11.text: Q̣ul ʹin-neee ʹu-mir-tu ʹan ʹaʻ-bu-dal- laa-ha mukh-li-ṣal- la-hud- deen;

39:13.text: Q̣ul ʹin-neee ʹa-khaa-fu ʹin ʻa-ṣay-tu Rab-bee ʻa-ẓaa-ba Yaw-min ʻa-z̤̣eem.

39:14.text: Q̣u-lil- laa-ha ʹaʻ-bu-du mukh-li-ṣal- la-hoo dee-nee:

39:15.text: Faʻ-bu-doo maa- shiʹ-tum- miñ- doo-nih. Q̣ul ʹin-nal- khaa-si-ree-nal- la-ẓee-na kha-si-rooo ʹañ-fu-sa-hum wa-ʹah-lee-him Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-mah: ʹa-laa ẓaa-li-ka hu-wal- khus-raa-nul- mu-been!

39:16.text: La-hum- miñ- faw-q̣i-him z̤̣u-la-lum- mi-nañ- Naa-ri wa-miñ taḥ-ti-him z̤̣u-lal. Ẓaa-li-ka yu-khaw-wi-ful- laa-hu bi-hee ʻI-baa-dah: yaa-ʻI-baa-di fat-ta-q̣oon.

39:17.text: Wal-la-ẓee-naj- ta-na-buṭ- Ṭaa-g̣oo-ta ʹañy- yaʻ-bu-doo-haa wa-ʹa-naa-booo ʹi-lal- laa-hi la-hu-mul- Bush-raa: fa-bash-shir ʻI-baad,―

39:18.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na yas-ta-mi-ʻoo-nal- Q̣aw-la fa-yat-ta-bi-ʻoo-na ʹaḥ-sa-nah: ʹu-laaa-ʹi-kal- la-ẓee-na ha-daa-hu-mul- laa-hu wa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hum ʹu-lul- ʹal-baab.

39:19.text: ʹA-fa-man ḥaq̣-q̣a ʻa-lay-hi ka-li-ma-tul- ʻA-ẓaab? ʹA-fa-ʹañ-ta tuñ-q̣i-ẓu mañ- fin- Naar?

39:20.text: Laa-ki-nil- la-ẓee-nat- ta-q̣aw Rab-ba-hum la-hum g̣u-ra-fum- miñ- faw-q̣i-haa g̣u-ra-fum- mab-niy-ya-tuñ- taj-ree miñ taḥ-ti-hal- ʹan-haar; Waʻ-dal- laah: laa- yukh-li-ful- laa-hul- mee-ʻaad.

39:21.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹan-nal- laa-ha ʹañ-za-la mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi maaa-ʹañ- fa-sa-la-ka-hoo ya-naa-bee-ʻa fil- ʹar-ḍi s̤um-ma yukh-ri-ju bi-hee zar-ʻam- mukh-ta-li-fan ʹal-waa-nu-hoo s̤um-ma ya-hee-ju fa-ta-raa-hu muṣ-far-rañ s̤um-ma yaj-ʻa-lu-hoo ḥu-ṭaa-maa. ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-Ẓik-raa li-ʹu-lil- ʹal-baab.

39:22.text: ʹA-fa-mañ- sha-ra-ḥal- laa-hu ṣad-ra-hoo lil-ʹIs-laa-mi fa-hu-wa ʻa-laa Noo-rim- mir- Rab-bih? Fa-way-lul- lil-q̣aa-si-ya-ti q̣u-loo-bu-hum- miñ ẓik-ril- laah! ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka fee ḍa-laa-lim- mu-been!

39:23.text: ʹAl-laa-hu naz-za-la ʹaḥ-sa-nal- Ḥa-dee-s̤i Ki-taa-bam- mu-ta-shaa-bi-ham- ma-s̤aa-ni-ya taq̣-sha-ʻir-ru min-hu ju-loo-dul- la-ẓee-na yakh-shaw-na Rab-ba-hum; s̤um-ma ta-lee-nu ju-loo-du-hum wa-q̣u-loo-bu-hum ʹi-laa Ẓik-ril- laah. Ẓaa-li-ka hu-dal- laa-hi yah-dee bi-hee mañy- ya-shaaaʹ; wa-mañy- yuḍ-li-lil- laa-hu fa-maa la-hoo min haad.

39:24.text: ʹA-fa-mañy- yat-ta-q̣ee bi-waj-hi-hee sooo-ʹal- ʻa-ẓaa-bi Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-mah? Wa-q̣ee-la liz̤̣-z̤̣aa-li-mee-na ẓoo-q̣oo maa- kuñ-tum tak-si-boon!

39:25.text: Kaẓ-ẓa-bal- la-ẓee-na miñ- q̣ab-li-him fa-ʹa-taa-hu-mul- ʻA-ẓaa-bu min ḥay-s̤u laa- yash-ʻu-roon.

39:26.text: Fa-ʹa-ẓaa-q̣a-hu-mul- laa-hul- khiz-ya fil- ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa wa-la-ʻA-ẓaa-bul- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti ʹak-bar. Law kaa-noo yaʻ-la-moon!

39:27.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ḍa-rab-naa lin-naa-si fee haa-ẓal- Q̣ur-ʹaa-ni miñ kul-li Ma-s̤a-lil- la-ʻal-la-hum ya-ta-ẓak-ka-roon.

39:28.text: Q̣ur-ʹaa-nan ʻA-ra-biy-yan g̣ay-ra ẓee ʻi-wa-jil- la-ʻal-la-hum yat-ta-q̣oon.

39:29.text: Ḍa-ra-bal- laa-hu Ma-s̤a-lar- ra-ju-lañ- fee-hi shu-ra-kaaa-ʹu mu-ta-shaa-ki-soo-na wa-ra-ju-lañ- sa-la-mal- li-ra-jul: Hal yas-ta-wi-yaa-ni ma-s̤a-laa? ʹAl-Ḥam-du lil-laah! Bal ʹak-s̤a-ru-hum laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

39:31.text: S̤um-ma ʹin-na-kum Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-kum takh-ta-ṣi-moon.

39:32.text: Fa-man ʹaz̤̣-la-mu mim-mañ- ka-ẓa-ba ʻa-lal- laa-hi wa-kaẓ-ẓa-ba biṣ-Ṣid-q̣i ʹiẓ jaaa-ʹah? ʹA-lay-sa fee Ja-han-na-ma mas̤-wal- lil-kaa-fi-reen?

39:33.text: Wal-la-ẓee jaaa-ʹa biṣ-Ṣid-q̣i wa-ṣad-da-q̣a bi-heee ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- Mut-ta-q̣oon.

39:34.text: La-hum- maa ya-shaaa-ʹoo-na ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-him: ẓaa-li-ka ja-zaaa-ʹul- Muḥ-si-neen,

39:35.text: Li-yu-kaf-fi-ral- laa-hu ʻan-hum ʹas-wa- ʹal-la-ẓee ʻa-mi-loo wa-yaj-zi-ya-hum ʹaj-ra-hum̃- bi-ʹaḥ-sa-nil- la-ẓee kaa-noo yaʻ-ma-loon.

39:36.text: ʹA-lay-sal- laa-hu bi-Kaa-fin ʻab-dah? Wa-yu-khaw-wi-foo-na-ka bil-la-ẓee-na miñ- doo-nih! Wa-mañy- yuḍ-li-lil- laa-hu fa-maa la-hoo min haad.

39:37.text: Wa-mañy- yah-dil- laa-hu fa-maa la-hoo mim- mu-ḍill. ʹA-lay-sal- laa-hu bi-ʻA-zee-ziñ- Ẓiñ- ti-q̣aam?

39:38.text: Wa-la-ʹiñ- sa-ʹal-ta-hum- man kha-la-q̣as- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa la-ya-q̣oo-lun-nal- laah. Q̣ul- ʹa-fa-ra-ʹay-tum- maa tad-ʻoo-na miñ doo-nil- laa-hi ʹin ʹa-raa-da-ni-yal- laa-hu bi-ḍur-rin hal hun-na kaa-shi-faa-tu ḍur-ri-heee ʹaw ʹa-raa-da-nee bi-Raḥ-ma-tin hal hun-na mum-si-kaa-tu Raḥ-ma-tih? Q̣ul ḥas-bi-yal- laah! ʻA-lay-hi ya-ta-wak-ka-lul- Mu-ta-wak-ki-loon.

39:39.text: Q̣ul yaa- q̣aw-miʻ-ma-loo ʻa-laa ma-kaa-na-ti-kum ʹin-nee ʻaa-mil: fa-saw-fa taʻ-la-moon.

39:40.text: Mañy- yaʹ-tee-hi ʻa-ẓaa-buñy- yukh-zee-hi wa-ya-ḥil-lu ʻa-lay-hi ʻa-ẓaa-bum- mu-q̣eem.

39:41.text: ʹIn-naaa ʹañ-zal-naa ʻa-lay-kal- Ki-taa-ba lin-naa-si bil-Ḥaq̣q̣. fa-ma-nih- ta-daa fa-li-naf-sih: wa-mañ- ḍal-la fa-ʹin-na-maa ya-ḍil-lu ʻa-lay-haa. Wa-maaa ʹañ-ta ʻa-lay-him̃- bi-wa-keel.

39:42.text: ʹAl-laa-hu ya-ta-waf-fal- ʹañ-fu-sa ḥee-na maw-ti-haa wal-la-tee lam ta-mut fee ma-naa-mi-haa: fa-yum-si-kul- la-tee q̣a-ḍaa ʻa-lay-hal- maw-ta wa-yur-si-lul- ʹukh-raaa ʹi-laaa ʹa-ja-lim- mu-sam-maa. ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yaa-til- li-q̣aw-miñy- ya-ta-fak-ka-roon.

39:43.text: ʹA-mit- ta-kha-ẓoo miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi shu-fa-ʻaaaʹ? Q̣ul ʹa-wa-law kaa-noo laa- yam-li-koo-na shay-ʹañw- wa-laa- yaʻ-q̣i-loon?

39:44.text: Q̣ul- lil-laa-hish- Sha-faa-ʻa-tu ja-mee-ʻaa: la-hoo mul-kus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ: s̤um-ma ʹi-lay-hi tur-ja-ʻoon.

39:45.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa ẓu-ki-ral- laa-hu Waḥ-da-hush- ma-ʹaz-zat q̣u-loo-bul- la-ẓee-na laa- yuʹ-mi-noo-na bil-ʹAa-khi-rah; wa-ʹi-ẓaa ẓu-ki-ral- la-ẓee-na miñ- doo-ni-heee ʹi-ẓaa hum yas-tab-shi-roon!

39:46.text: Q̣u-lil- laa-hum-ma Faa-ṭi-ras- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi ʻAa-li-mal- g̣ay-bi wash-sha-haa-da-ti ʹAñ-ta taḥ-ku-mu bay-na ʻi-baa-di-ka Fee maa- kaa-noo fee-hi yakh-ta-li-foon.

39:47.text: Wa-law ʹan-na lil-la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-moo maa- fil- ʹar-ḍi ja-mee-ʻañw- wa-mis̤-la-hoo ma-ʻa-hoo laf-ta-daw bi-hee miñ- sooo-ʹil- ʻa-ẓaa-bi Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-mah: wa-ba-daa la-hum- mi-nal- laa-hi maa- lam ya-koo-noo yaḥ-ta-si-boon!

39:48.text: Wa-ba-daa la-hum say-yi-ʹaa-tu maa- ka-sa-boo wa-ḥaa-q̣a bi-him- maa kaa-noo bi-hee yas-tah-zi-ʹoon!

39:49.text: Fa-ʹi-ẓaa mas-sal- ʹiñ-saa-na ḍur-ruñ da-ʻaa-naa: s̤um-ma ʹi-ẓaa khaw-wal-naa-hu niʻ-ma-tam- min-naa q̣aa-la ʹin-na-maaa ʹoo-tee-tu-hoo ʻa-laa ʻilm! Bal hi-ya fit-na-tuñw- wa-laa-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ra-hum laa- yaʻ-la-moon!

39:50.text: Q̣ad q̣aa-la-hal- la-ẓee-na miñ q̣ab-li-him fa-maaa ʹag̣-naa ʻan-hum- maa kaa-noo yak-si-boon.

39:51.text: Fa-ʹa-ṣaa-ba-hum say-yi-ʹaa-tu maa- ka-sa-boo. Wal-la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-moo min haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi sa-yu-ṣee-bu-hum say-yi-ʹaa-tu maa- ka-sa-boo wa-maa hum̃- bi-muʻ-ji-zeen!

39:52.text: ʹA-wa-lam yaʻ-la-mooo ʹan-nal- laa-ha yab-su-ṭur- riz-q̣a li-mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu wa-yaq̣-dir? ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yaa-til- li-q̣aw-miñy- yuʹ-mi-noon!

39:53.text: Q̣ul yaa-ʻI-baa-di-yal- la-ẓee-na ʹas-ra-foo ʻa-laaa ʹañ-fu-si-him laa- taq̣-na-ṭoo mir- Raḥ-ma-til- laah: ʹin-nal- laa-ha yag̣-fi-ruẓ- ẓu-noo-ba ja-mee-ʻaa. ʹIn-na-hoo Hu-wal- G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

39:54.text: Wa-ʹa-nee-booo ʹi-laa Rab-bi-kum wa-ʹas-li-moo la-hoo miñ- q̣ab-li ʹañy- yaʹ-ti-ya-ku-mul- ʻA-ẓaa-bu s̤um-ma laa- tuñ-ṣa-roon.

39:55.text: Wat-ta-bi-ʻooo ʹaḥ-sa-na maaa ʹuñ-zi-la ʹi-lay-kum- mir- Rab-bi-kum- miñ- q̣ab-li ʹañy- yaʹ-ti-ya-ku-mul- ʻa-ẓaa-bu bag̣-ta-tañw- wa-ʹañ-tum laa- tash-ʻu-roon!―

39:56.text: ʹAñ ta-q̣oo-la naf-suñy- yaa-ḥas-ra-taa ʻa-laa maa- far-raṭ-tu fee jam-bil- laa-hi wa-ʹiñ- kuñ-tu la-mi-nas- saa-khi-reen!

39:57.text: ʹAw ta-q̣oo-la law ʹan-nal- laa-ha ha-daa-nee la-kuñ-tu mi-nal- Mut-ta-q̣een!

39:58.text: ʹAw ta-q̣oo-la ḥee-na ta-ral- ʻa-ẓaa-ba law ʹan-na lee kar-ra-tañ fa-ʹa-koo-na mi-nal- Muḥ-si-neen!

39:59.text: Ba-laa q̣ad jaaa-ʹat-ka ʹAa-yaa-tee fa-kaẓ-ẓab-ta bi-haa was-tak-bar-ta wa-kuñ-ta mi-nal- kaa-fi-reen.

39:60.text: Wa-Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti ta-ral- la-ẓee-na ka-ẓa-boo ʻa-lal- laa-hi wu-joo-hu-hum mus-wad-dah: ʹa-lay-sa fee Ja-han-na-ma mas̤-wal- lil-mu-ta-kab-bi-reen?

39:61.text: Wa-yu-naj-jil- laa-hul- la-ẓee-nat- ta-q̣aw Bi-ma-faa-za-ti-him laa- ya-mas-su-hu-mus- sooo-ʹu wa-laa hum yaḥ-za-noon.

39:62.text: ʹAl-laa-hu khaa-li-q̣u kul-li shayʹ: wa-Hu-wa ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñw- Wa-keel.

39:63.text: La-hoo ma-q̣aa-lee-dus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ: wal-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo bi-ʹAa-yaa-til- laa-hi ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- khaa-si-roon.

39:64.text: Q̣ul ʹa-fa-g̣ay-ral- laa-hi taʹ-mu-rooon-neee ʹaʻ-bu-du ʹay-yu-hal- jaa-hi-loon?

39:65.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹoo-ḥi-ya ʹi-lay-ka wa-ʹi-lal- la-ẓee-na miñ- q̣ab-lik: la-ʹin ʹash-rak-ta la-yaḥ-ba-ṭan-na ʻa-ma-lu-ka wa-la-ta-koo-nan-na mi-nal- khaa-si-reen.

39:66.text: Ba-lil- laa-ha faʻ-bud wa-kum- mi-nash- shaa-ki-reen.

39:67.text: Wa-maa q̣a-da-rul- laa-ha ḥaq̣-q̣a q̣ad-ri-hee wal-ʹar-ḍu ja-mee-ʻañ- q̣ab-ḍa-tu-hoo Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti was-sa-maa-waa-tu maṭ-wiy-yaa-tum- bi-ya-mee-nih: Sub-ḥaa-na-hoo wa-Ta-ʻaa-laa ʻam-maa yush-ri-koon!

39:68.text: Wa-nu-fi-kha fiṣ- Ṣoo-ri fa-ṣa-ʻi-q̣a mañ fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-mañ fil- ʹar-ḍi ʹil-laa mañ- shaaa-ʹal- laah. S̤um-ma nu-fi-kha fee-hi ʹukh-raa fa-ʹi-ẓaa hum q̣i-yaa-muñy- yañ-z̤̣u-roon!

39:69.text: Wa-ʹash-ra-q̣a-til- ʹar-ḍu bi-noo-ri Rab-bi-haa wa-wu-ḍi-ʻal- Ki-taa-bu wa-jeee-ʹa bin-na-biy-yee-na wash-shu-ha-daaa-ʹi wa-q̣u-ḍi-ya bay-na-hum̃- bil-ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-hum laa- yuz̤̣-la-moon.

39:70.text: Wa-wuf-fi-yat kul-lu naf-sim- maa ʻa-mi-lat wa-Hu-wa ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-maa yaf-ʻa-loon.

39:71.text: Wa-see-q̣al- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-rooo ʹi-laa Ja-han-na-ma zu-ma-raa: Ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa jaaa-ʹoo-haa fu-ti-ḥat ʹab-waa-bu-haa wa-q̣aa-la la-hum kha-za-na-tu-haaa ʹa-lam yaʹ-ti-kum ru-su-lum- miñ-kum yat-loo-na ʻa-lay-kum ʹAa-yaa-ti Rab-bi-kum wa-yuñ-ẓi-roo-na-kum Li-q̣aaa-ʹa Yaw-mi-kum haa-ẓaa? Q̣aa-loo ba-laa wa-laa-kin ḥaq̣-q̣at Ka-li-ma-tul- ʻA-ẓaa-bi ʻa-lal- kaa-fi-reen!

39:72.text: Q̣ee-lad- khu-looo ʹab-waa-ba Ja-han-na-ma khaa-li-dee-na fee-haa: fa-biʹ-sa mas̤-wal- mu-ta-kab-bi-reen!

39:73.text: Wa-see-q̣al- la-ẓee-nat- ta-q̣aw Rab-ba-hum ʹi-lal- Jan-na-ti zu-ma-raa: ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa jaaa-ʹoo-ha wa-fu-ti-ḥat ʹab-waa-bu-haa wa-q̣aa-la la-hum kha-za-na-tu-haa ʻʻSa-laa-mun ʻa-lay-kum ṭib-tum fad-khu-loo-haa khaa-li-deen.ʹʹ

39:74.text: Wa-q̣aa-lul- Ḥam-du-lil-laa-hil- la-ẓee ṣa-da-q̣a-naa Waʻ-da-hoo wa-ʹaw-ra-s̤a-nal- ʹar-ḍa na-ta-baw- wa-ʹu mi-nal- Jan-na-ti ḥay-s̤u Na-shaaaʹ: Fa-niʻ-ma ʹaj-rul- ʻaa-mi-leen!

39:75.text: Wa-ta-ral- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-ta ḥaaaf-fee-na Min ḥaw-lil- ʻAr-shi yu-sab-bi-ḥoo-na bi-Ḥam-di Rab-bi-him. Wa-q̣u-ḍi-ya bay-na-hum̃- bil-ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-q̣ee-lal- Ḥam-du lil-laa-hi Rab-bil- ʻAa-la-meen!

40:2.text: Tañ-zee-lul- Ki-taa-bi mi-nal- laa-hil- ʻA-zee-zil- ʻA-leem,―

40:3.text: G̣aa-fi-riẓ- Ẓam-bi wa-Q̣aa-bi-lit- Taw-bi Sha-dee-dil- ʻI-q̣aa-bi Ẓiṭ- Ṭawl. Laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa Hoo: ʹi-lay-hil- Ma-ṣeer.

40:4.text: Maa- yu-jaa-di-lu feee ʹAa-yaa-til- laa-hi ʹil-lal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo fa-laa yag̣-rur-ka ta-q̣al-lu-bu-hum fil- bi-laad!

40:5.text: Kaẓ-ẓa-bat q̣ab-la-hum Q̣aw-mu Noo-ḥiñw- wal-ʹAḥ-zaa-bu mim- baʻ-di-him; wa-ham-mat kul-lu ʹum-ma-tim- bi-ra-soo-li-him li-yaʹ-khu-ẓoo-hu wa-jaa-da-loo bil-baa-ṭi-li li-yud-ḥi-ḍoo bi-hil- Ḥaq̣-q̣a fa-ʹa-khaẓ-tu-hum! Fa-kay-fa kaa-na ʻI-q̣aab!

40:6.text: Wa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka ḥaq̣-q̣at Ka-li-ma-tu Rab-bi-ka ʻa-lal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-rooo ʹan-na-hum ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bun- Naar!

40:7.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na yaḥ-mi-loo-nal- ʻAr-sha wa-man ḥaw-la-hoo yu-sab-bi-ḥoo-na bi-Ḥam-di Rab-bi-him wa-yuʹ-mi-noo-na bi-hee wa-yas-tag̣-fi-roo-na lil-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo: Rab-ba-naa wa-siʻ-ta kul-la shay-ʹir- Raḥ-ma-tañw- wa-ʻil-mañ- fag̣-fir lil-la-ẓee-na taa-boo wat-ta-ba-ʻoo Sa-bee-la-ka wa-q̣i-him ʻA-ẓaa-bal- Ja-ḥeem!

40:8.text: Rab-ba-naa wa-ʹad-khil-hum Jan-naa-ti ʻAd-ni-nil- la-tee wa-ʻat-ta-hum wa-mañ- ṣa-la-ḥa min ʹaa-baaa-ʹi-him wa-ʹaz-waa-ji-him wa-ẓur-riy-yaa-ti-him! ʹIn-na-ka ʹAñ-tal- ʻA-zee-zul- Ḥa-keem.

40:9.text: Wa-q̣i-hi-mus- say-yi-ʹaat; wa-mañ ta-q̣is- say-yi-ʹaa-ti Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓiñ- fa-q̣ad ra-ḥim-tah: wa-zaa-li-ka hu-wal- Faw-zul- ʻa-z̤̣eem.

40:10.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo yu-naa-daw-na la-maq̣-tul- laa-hi ʹak-ba-ru mim- maq̣-ti-kum ʹañ-fu-sa-kum ʹiẓ tud-ʻaw-na ʹi-lal- ʹee-maa-ni fa-tak-fu-roon.

40:11.text: Q̣aa-loo Rab-ba-naaa ʹa-mat- ta-nas̤-na-tay-ni wa-ʹaḥ-yay-ta-nas̤- na-tay-ni faʻ-ta-raf-naa bi-ẓu-noo-bi-naa fa-hal- ʹi-laa khu-roo-jim- miñ- sa-beel?

40:12.text: Ẓaa-li-kum̃- bi-ʹan-na-hooo ʹi-ẓaa du-ʻi-yal- laa-hu waḥ-da-hoo ka-far-tum, wa-ʹiñy- yush-rak bi-hee tuʹ-mi-noo! Fal-Ḥuk-mu lil-laa-hil- ʻA-liy-yil- Ka-beer!

40:13.text: Hu-wal- la-ẓee yu-ree-kum ʹAa-yaa-ti-hee wa-yu-naz-zi-lu la-kum- mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi Riz-q̣aa: wa-maa ya-ta-ẓak-ka-ru ʹil-laa mañy- yu-neeb.

40:14.text: Fad-ʻul- laa-ha mukh-li-ṣee-na la-hud- dee-na wa-law ka-ri-hal- kaa-fi-roon.

40:15.text: Ra-fee-ʻud- da-ra-jaa-ti Ẓul- ʻArsh: yul-q̣ir- roo-ḥa min ʹAm-ri-hee ʻa-laa mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu min ʻi-baa-di-hee li-yuñ-ẓi-ra Yaw-mat- Ta-laaq̣,―

40:16.text: Yaw-ma hum̃- baa-ri-zoon: laa- yakh-faa ʻa-lal- laa-hi min-hum shayʹ. Li-ma-nil- Mul-kul- Yawm? Lil-laa-hil- Waa-ḥi-dil- Q̣ah-haar!

40:17.text: ʹAl-Yaw-ma tuj-zaa kul-lu naf-sim- bi-maa Ka-sa-bat laa- z̤̣ul-mal- Yawm. ʹIn-nal- laa-ha Sa-ree-ʻul- Ḥi-saab.

40:18.text: Wa-ʹañ-ẓir-hum Yaw-mal- ʹAa-zi-fa-ti ʹi-ẓil- q̣u-loo-bu la-dal- ḥa-naa-ji-ri kaa-z̤̣i-meen; maa- liz̤̣-z̤̣aa-li-mee-na min ḥa-mee-miñw- wa-laa- sha-fee-ʻiñy- yu-ṭaaʻ.

40:19.text: Yaʻ-la-mu khaaa-ʹi-na-tal- ʹaʻ-yu-ni wa-maa tukh-fiṣ- ṣu-door.

40:20.text: Wal-laa-hu yaq̣-ḍee bil-Ḥaq̣q̣: wal-la-ẓee-na yad-ʻoo-na miñ- doo-ni-hee laa- yaq̣-ḍoo-na bi-shayʹ ʹIn-nal- laa-ha Hu-was- Sa-mee-ʻul- Ba-ṣeer.

40:21.text: ʹA-wa-lam ya-see-roo fil- ʹar-ḍi fa-yañ-z̤̣u-roo kay-fa kaa-na ʻAa-q̣i-ba-tul- la-ẓee-na kaa-noo miñ- q̣ab-li-him? Kaa-noo hum ʹa-shad-da min-hum q̣uw-wa-tañw- waʹaa-s̤aa-rañ- fil- ʹar-ḍi fa-ʹa-kha-ẓa-hu-mul- laa-hu bi-ẓu-noo-bi-him: wa-maa kaa-na la-hum- mi-nal- laa-hi miñw- waaq̣.

40:22.text: Ẓaa-li-ka bi-ʹan-na-hum kaa-nat- taʹ-tee-him ru-su-lu-hum̃- bil-bay-yi-naa-ti fa-ka-fa-roo fa-ʹa-kha-ẓa-hu-mul- laah: ʹin-na-hoo Q̣a-wiy-yuñ- Sha-dee-dul- ʻi-q̣aab.

40:23.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹar-sal-naa Moo-saa bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa wa-Ṣul-taa-nim- mu-been,

40:24.text: ʹI-laa Fir-ʻaw-na wa-Haa-maa-na wa-Q̣aa-roo-na fa-q̣aa-loo saa-ḥi-ruñ- kaẓ-ẓaab!

40:25.text: Fa-lam-maa jaa-ʹa-hum̃- bil-Ḥaq̣-q̣i min ʻiñ-di-naa q̣aa-luq̣- tu-looo ʹab-naaa-ʹal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo ma-ʻa-hoo was-taḥ-yoo ni-saaa-ʹa-hum. Wa-maa kay-dul- kaa-fi-ree-na ʹil-laa fee ḍa-laal!...

40:26.text: Wa-q̣aa-la Fir-ʻaw-nu ẓa-roo-neee ʹaq̣-tul Moo-saa wal-yad-ʻu Rab-bah! ʹIn-neee ʹa-khaa-fu ʹañy- yu-bad-di-la dee-na-kum ʹaw ʹañy- yuz̤̣-hi-ra fil- ʹar-ḍil- fa-saad!

40:27.text: Wa-q̣aa-la Moo-saaa ʹin-nee ʻuẓ-tu bi-Rab-bee wa-Rab-bi-kum- miñ- kul-li mu-ta-kab-bi-ril- laa yuʹ-mi-nu bi-Yaw-mil- Ḥi-saab.

40:28.text: Wa-q̣aa-la ra-ju-lum- Muʹ-mi-num- min ʹAa-li- Fir-ʻaw-na yak-tu-mu ʹee-maa-na-hooo ʹa-taq̣-tu-loo-na ra-ju-lan ʹañy- ya-q̣oo-la Rab-bi-yal- laa-hu wa-q̣ad jaaa-ʹa-kum bil-Bay-yi-naa-ti mir- Rab-bi-kum? Wa-ʹiñy- ya-ku kaa-ẓi-bañ- fa-ʻa-lay-hi ka-ẓi-buh; wa-ʹiñy- ya-ku ṣaa-di-q̣añy- yu-ṣib-kum̃- baʻ-ḍul- la-ẓee ya-ʻi-du-kum: ʹin-nal- laa-ha laa- yah-dee man hu-wa mus-ri-fuñ- kaẓ-ẓaab!

40:29.text: Yaa-Q̣aw-mi la-ku-mul- mul-kul- yaw-ma z̤̣aa-hi-ree-na fil- ʹarḍ: fa-mañy- yañ-ṣu-ru-naa mim- baʹ-sil- laa-hi ʹiñ- jaaa-ʹa-naa? Q̣aa-la Fir-ʻaw-nu maaa ʹu-ree-kum ʹil-laa maaa ʹa-raa wa-maaa ʹah-dee-kum ʹil-laa Sa-bee-lar- Ra-shaad!

40:30.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-ẓeee ʹaa-ma-na yaa-Q̣aw-mi ʹin-neee ʹa-khaa-fu ʻa-lay-kum- mis̤-la Yaw-mil- ʹAḥ-zaab;

40:31.text: Mis̤-la daʹ-bi Q̣aw-mi Noo-ḥiñw- Wa-ʻAa-diñw- Wa-Sa-moo-da wal-la-ẓee-na mim- baʻ-di-him: wa-mal- laa-hu yu-ree-du z̤̣ul-mal- lil-ʻI-baad.

40:32.text: Wa-yaa-Q̣aw-mi ʹin-neee ʹa-khaa-fu ʻa-lay-kum Yaw-mat- Ta-naad,―

40:33.text: Yaw-ma tu-wal-loo-na mud-bi-reen: maa- la-kum- mi-nal- laa-hi min ʻaa-ṣim: wa-mañy- yuḍ-li-lil- laa-hu fa-maa la-hoo min haad.

40:34.text: Wa-la-q̣ad jaaa-ʹa-kum Yoo-su-fu miñ- q̣ab-lu bil-Bay-yi-naa-ti fa-maa zil-tum fee shak-kim- mim-maa jaaa-ʹa-kum̃- bih: ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa ha-la-ka q̣ul-tum lañy- yab-ʻa-s̤al- laa-hu mim- baʻ-di-hee ra-soo-laa. Ka-ẓaa-li-ka yu-ḍil-lul- laa-hu man hu-wa mus-ri-fum- mur-taab,―

40:35.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na yu-jaa-di-loo-na feee ʹAa-yaa-til- laa-hi bi-g̣ay-ri sul-ṭaa-nin ʹa-taa-hum. Ka-bu-ra maq̣-tan ʻiñ-dal- laa-hi wa-ʻiñ-dal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo. Ka-ẓaa-li-ka yaṭ-ba-ʻul- laa-hu ʻa-laa kul-li q̣al-bi mu-ta-kab-bi-riñ- jab-baar.

40:36.text: Wa-q̣aa-la Fir-ʻaw-nu yaa-Haa-maa-nub- ni lee ṣar-ḥal- la-ʻal-leee ʹab-lu-g̣ul- ʹas-baab―

40:37.text: ʹAs-baa-bas- sa-maa-waa-ti fa-ʹaṭ-ṭa-li-ʻa ʹi-laaa ʹi-laa-hi Moo-saa wa-ʹin-nee la-ʹa-z̤̣un-nu-hoo kaa-ẓi-baa! Wa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka zuy-yi-na li-Fir-ʻaw-na sooo-ʹu ʻa-ma-li-hee wa-ṣud-da ʻa-nis- Sa-beel: wa-maa kay-du Fir-ʻaw-na ʹil-laa fee ta-baab.

40:38.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-ẓeee ʹaa-ma-na yaa-Q̣aw-mit- ta-bi-ʻoo-ni ʹah-di-kum Sa-bee-lar- Ra-shaad.

40:39.text: Yaa-Q̣aw-mi ʹin-na-maa haa-ẓi-hil- ḥa-yaa-tud- dun-yaa ma-taaʻ; wa-ʹin-nal- ʹAa-khi-ra-ta hi-ya Daa-rul- Q̣a-raar.

40:40.text: Man ʻa-mi-la say-yi-ʹa-tañ- fa-laa yuj-zaaa ʹil-laa mis̤-la-haa: wa-man ʻa-mi-la ṣaa-li-ḥam- miñ ẓa-ka-rin ʹaw ʹuñ-s̤aa wa-hu-wa Muʹ-mi-nuñ fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka yad-khu-loo-nal- Jan-na-ta yur-za-q̣oo-na fee-haa bi-g̣ay-ri ḥi-saab.

40:41.text: Wa-yaa-Q̣aw-mi maa- leee ʹad-ʻoo-kum ʹi-lan- Na-jaa-ti wa-tad-ʻoo-na-neee ʹi-lan- Naar!

40:42.text: Tad-ʻoo-na-nee li-ʹak-fu-ra bil-laa-hi wa-ʹush-ri-ka bi-hee maa- lay-sa lee bi-hee ʻilm: wa-ʹa-na ʹad-ʻoo-kum ʹi-lal- ʻA-zee-zil- G̣af-faar.

40:43.text: Laa- ja-ra-ma ʹan-na-maa tad-ʻoo-na-neee ʹi-lay-hi lay-sa la-hoo daʻ-wa-tuñ- fid- dun-yaa wa-laa fil- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti wa-ʹan-na ma-rad-da-naaa ʹi-lal- laa-hi wa-ʹan-nal- mus-ri-fee-na hum ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bun- Naar!

40:44.text: Fa-sa-taẓ-ku-roo-na maaa ʹa-q̣oo-lu la-kum. Wa-ʹu-faw-wi-ḍu ʹam-reee ʹi-lal- laah: ʹin-nal- laa-ha Ba-ṣee-rum bil-ʻi-baad.

40:45.text: Fa-wa-q̣aa-hul- laa-hu say-yi-ʹaa-ti maa- ma-ka-roo wa-ḥaa-q̣a bi-ʹAa-li- Fir-ʻaw-na sooo-ʹul- ʻA-ẓaab.

40:46.text: ʹAn-Naa-ru yuʻ-ra-ḍoo-na ʻa-lay-haa g̣u-duw-wañw- wa-ʻa-shiy-yaa: wa-Yaw-ma ta-q̣oo-mus- Saa-ʻah: ʹad-khi-looo ʹAa-la- Fir-ʻaw-na ʹa-shad-dal- ʻa-ẓaab!

40:47.text: Wa-ʹiẓ ya-ta-ḥaaaj-joo-na fin- Naa-ri fa-ya-q̣oo-luḍ- ḍu-ʻa-faaa-ʹu lil-la-ẓee-nas- tak-ba-rooo ʹin-naa kun-naa la-kum ta-ba-ʻañ- fa-hal ʹañ-tum- mug̣-noo-na ʻan-naa na-ṣee-bam- mi-nan- Naar?

40:48.text: Q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-nas- tak-ba-rooo ʹin-naa kul-luñ- fee-haaa ʹin-nal- laa-ha q̣ad ḥa-ka-ma bay-nal- ʻi-baad!

40:49.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na fin- Naa-ri li-kha-za-na-ti Ja-han-na-mad- ʻoo Rab-ba-kum yu-khaf-fif ʻan-naa yaw-mam- mi-nal- ʻa-ẓaab!

40:50.text: Q̣aa-looo ʹa-wa-lam ta-ku taʹ-tee-kum ru-su-lu-kum̃- bil-Bay-yi-naat? Q̣aa-loo ba-laa. Q̣aa-loo fad-ʻoo! Wa-maa du-ʻaaa-ʹul- kaa-fi-ree-na ʹil-laa fee ḍa-laal!

40:51.text: ʹIn-naa la-nañ-ṣu-ru ru-su-la-naa wal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo fil- ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa wa-Yaw-ma ya-q̣oo-mul- ʹAsh-haad,―

40:52.text: Yaw-ma laa- yañ-fa-ʻuz̤̣-z̤̣ aa-li-mee-na maʻ-ẓi-ra-tu-hum wa-la-hu-mul- Laʻ-na-tu wa-la-hum Sooo-ʹud- Daar.

40:53.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹaa-tay-naa Moo-sal- Hu-daa wa-ʹaw-ras̤-naa Ba-neee- ʹIs-raaa-ʹee-lal- Ki-taab―

40:55.text: Faṣ-bir ʹin-na Waʻ-dal- laa-hi ḥaq̣-q̣uñw- was-tag̣-fir li-ẓam-bi-ka wa-sab-biḥ bi-Ḥam-di Rab-bi-ka bil-ʻa-shiy-yi wal-ʹib-kaar.

40:56.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na yu-jaa-di-loo-na feee ʹAa-yaa-til- laa-hi bi-g̣ay-ri sul-ṭaa-nin ʹa-taa-hum ʹiñ fee ṣu-doo-ri-him ʹil-laa kib-rum- maa hum̃- bi-baa-li-g̣eeh: fas-ta-ʻiẓ bil-laah: ʹin-na-hoo Hu-was- Sa-mee-ʻul- Ba-ṣeer.

40:57.text: La-khal-q̣us- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi ʹak-ba-ru min khal-q̣in- naa-si wa-laa-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ran- naa-si laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

40:58.text: Wa-maa yas-ta-wil- ʹaʻ-maa wal-ba-ṣeer: wal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti wa-lal- mu-seeeʹ. Q̣a-lee-lam- maa ta-ta-ẓak-ka-roon!

40:59.text: ʹIn-nas- Saa-ʻa-ta la-ʹaa-ti-ya-tul- laa ray-ba fee-haa wa-laa-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ran- naa-si laa- yuʹ-mi-noon.

40:60.text: Wa-q̣aa-la Rab-bu-ku-mud- ʻoo-neee ʹas-ta-jib la-kum. ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na yas-tak-bi-roo-na ʻan ʻi-baa-da-tee sa-yad-khu-loo-na Ja-han-na-ma daa-khi-reen!

40:61.text: ʹAl-laa-hul- la-ẓee ja-ʻa-la la-ku-mul- lay-la li-tas-ku-noo fee-hi wan-na-haa-ra mub-ṣi-raa. ʹIn-nal- laa-ha la-Ẓoo- Faḍ-lin ʻa-lan- naa-si wa-laa-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ran- naa-si laa- yash-ku-roon.

40:62.text: Ẓaa-li-ku-mul- laa-hu Rab-bu-kum khaa-li-q̣u kul-li shayʹ. Laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa Hoo: Fa-ʹan-naa tuʹ-fa-koon!

40:63.text: Ka-ẓaa-li-ka yuʹ-fa-kul- la-ẓee-na kaa-noo bi-ʹAa-yaa-til- laa-hi yaj-ḥa-doon.

40:64.text: ʹAl-laa-hul- la-ẓee ja-ʻa-la la-ku-mul- ʹar-ḍa q̣a-raa-rañw- was-sa-maaa-ʹa bi-naaa-ʹañw- wa-ṣaw-wa-ra-kum fa-ʹaḥ-sa-na ṣu-wa-ra-kum wa-ra-za-q̣a-kum- mi-naṭ- ṭay-yi-baat;― ẓaa-li-ku-mul- laa-hu Rab-bu-kum. Fa-ta-baa-ra-kal- laa-hu Rab-bul- ʻAa-la-meen!

40:65.text: Hu-wal- Ḥay-yu Laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa Hu-wa fad-ʻoo-hu mukh-li-ṣee-na la-hud- deen. ʹAl-Ḥam-du lil-laa-hi Rab-bil- ʻAa-la-meen!

40:66.text: Q̣ul ʹin-nee nu-hee-tu ʹan ʹaʻ-bu-dal- la-ẓee-na tad-ʻoo-na miñ doo-nil- laa-hi lam-maa jaa-ʹa-ni-yal- Bay-yi-naa-tu mir- Rab-bee, wa-ʹu-mir-tu ʹan ʹus-li-ma li-Rab-bil- ʻAa-la-meen.

40:67.text: Hu-wal- la-ẓee kha-la-q̣a-kum- miñ- tu-raa-biñ- s̤um-ma min- nuṭ-fa-tiñ- s̤um-ma min ʻa-la-q̣a-tiñ s̤um-ma yukh-ri-ju-kum ṭif-lañ s̤um-ma li-tab-lu-g̣ooo ʹa-shud-da-kum s̤um-ma li-ta-koo-noo shu-yoo-khaa,― Wa-miñ-kum- mañy- yu-ta-waf-faa miñ q̣ab-lu wa-li-tab-lu-g̣ooo ʹa-ja-lam- mu-sam-mañw- wa-la-ʻal-la-kum taʻ-q̣i-loon.

40:68.text: Hu-wal- la-ẓee yuḥ-yee wa-yu-meet; fa-ʹi-ẓaa q̣a-ḍaaa ʹam-añ fa-ʹin-na-maa ya-q̣oo-lu la-hoo ʻʻKUÑʹʹ fa-ya-koon.

40:69.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹi-lal- la-ẓee-na yu-jaa-di-loo-na feee ʹAa-yaa-til- laah? ʹAn-naa yuṣ-ra-foon?

40:70.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na kaẓ-ẓa-boo bil-Ki-taa-bi wa-bi-maaa ʹar-sal-naa bi-hee ru-su-la-naa fa-saw-fa yaʻ-la-moon,

40:71.text: ʹI-ẓil- ʹag̣-laa-lu feee ʹaʻ-naa-q̣i-him was-sa-laa-si-lu yus-ḥa-boon.

40:72.text: Fil- ḥa-mee-mi, s̤um-ma fin- Naa-ri yus-ja-roon.

40:73.text: S̤um-ma q̣ee-la la-hum ʹay-na maa- kuñ-tum tush-ri-koon-

40:74.text: Miñ doo-nil- laah? Q̣aa-loo ḍal-loo ʻan-naa bal- lam na-kun- nad-ʻoo miñ- q̣ab-lu shay-ʹaa. Ka-ẓaa-li-ka yu-ḍil-lul- laa-hul- kaa-fi-reen.

40:75.text: Ẓaa-li-kum̃- bi-maa kuñ-tum taf-ra-ḥoo-na fil- ʹar-ḍi bi-g̣ay-ril- Ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-bi-maa kuñ-tum tam-ra-ḥoon.

40:76.text: ʹUd-khu-looo ʹab-waa-ba Ja-han-na-ma khaa-li-dee-na fee-haa: fa-biʹ-sa mas̤-wal- mu-ta-kab-bi-reen!

40:77.text: Faṣ-bir ʹin-na Waʹ-dal- laa-hi Ḥaq̣q̣; fa-ʹim-maa nu-ri-yan-na-ka baʻ-ḍal- la-ẓee na-ʻi-du-hum ʹaw na-ta-waf-fa-yan-na-ka fa-ʹi-lay-naa yur-ja-ʹoon.

40:78.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹar-sal-naa ru-su-lam- miñ q̣ab-li-ka min-hum- mañ q̣a-ṣaṣ-naa ʻa-lay-ka wa-min-hum- mal- lam naq̣-ṣuṣ ʻa-layk. Wa-maa kaa-na li-ra-soo-lin ʹañy- yaʹ-ti-ya bi-ʹAa-ya-tin ʹil-laa bi-ʹiẓ-nil- laah: fa-ʹi-ẓaa jaaa-ʹa ʹam-rul- laa-hi q̣u-ḍi-ya bil-ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-kha-si-ra hu-naa-li-kal- mub-ṭi-loon.

40:79.text: ʹAl-laa-hul- la-ẓee ja-ʻa-la la-ku-mul- ʹan-ʻaa-ma li-tar-ka-boo min-haa wa-min-haa taʹ-ku-loon;

40:80.text: Wa-la-kum fee-haa ma-naa-fi-ʻu wa-li-tab-lu-g̣oo ʻa-lay-haa ḥaa-ja-tañ- fee ṣu-doo-ri-kum wa-ʻa-lay-haa wa-ʻa-lal- ful-ki tuḥ-ma-loon.

40:81.text: Wa-yu-ree-kum ʹAa-yaa-ti-hee fa-ʹay-ya ʹAa-yaa-til- laa-hi tuñ-ki-roon.

40:82.text: ʹA-fa-lam ya-see-roo fil- ʹar-ḍi fa-yañ-z̤̣u-roo kay-fa kaa-na ʻAa-q̣i-ba-tul- la-ẓee-na miñ- q̣ab-li-him? Kaa-nooo ʹak-s̤a-ra min-hum wa-ʹa-shad-da q̣uw-wa-tañw- wa-ʹaa-s̤aa-rañ- fil- ʹar-ḍi fa-maaa ʹag̣-naa ʻan-hum- maa kaa-noo yak-si-boon.

40:83.text: Fa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹat-hum ru-su-lu-hum̃- bil-Bay-yi-naa-ti fa-ri-ḥoo bi-maa ʻiñ-da-hum- mi-nal ʻil-mi wa-ḥaa-q̣a bi-him- maa kaa-noo bi-hee yas-tah-zi-ʹoon.

40:84.text: Fa-lam-maa ra-ʹaw Baʹsa-naa q̣aa-looo ʹaa-man-naa bil-laa-hi Waḥ-da-hoo wa-ka-far-naa bi-maa kun-naa bi-hee mush-ri-keen.

40:85.text: Fa-lam ya-ku yañ-fa-ʻu-hum ʹee-maa-nu-hum lam-maa ra-ʹaw Baʹ-sa-naa. Sunnatal laa-hil latee q̣ad khalat fee ʻibaadih. Wa-khasira hunaalikal- kaafiroon!

41:3.text: Ki-taa-buñ- fuṣ-ṣi-lat ʹAa-yaa-tu-hoo Q̣ur-ʹaa-nan ʻa-ra-biy-yal- li-q̣aw-miñy- yaʻ-la-moon;-

41:4.text: Ba-shee-rañw- Wa-Na-ẓee-raa: fa-ʹaʻ-ra-ḍa ʹak-s̤a-ru-hum fa-hum laa- yas-ma-ʻoon.

41:5.text: Wa-q̣aa-loo q̣u-loo-bu-naa feee ʹa-kin-na-tim- mim-maa tad-ʻoo-naaa ʹi-lay-hi wa-feee ʹaa-ẓaa-ni-naae waq̣-ruñw- wa-mim- bay-ni-naa wa-bay-ni-ka ḥi-jaa-buñ- faʻ-mal ʹin-na-naa ʻaa-mi-loon.

41:6.text: Q̣ul ʹin-na-maaa ʹa-na ba-sha-rum- mis̤-lu-kum yoo-ḥaaa ʹi-lay-ya ʹan-na-maaa ʹI-laa-hu-kum ʹI-laa-huñw- Waa-ḥi-duñ- fas-ta-q̣ee-mooo ʹi-lay-hi was-tag̣-fi-rooh. Wa-way-lul- lil-Mush-ri-keen,―

41:7.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na laa- yuʹ-too-naz- Za-kaa-ta wa-hum̃- bil-ʹAa-khi-ra-ti hum kaa-fi-roon.

41:8.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti la-hum ʹaj-run g̣ay-ru mam-noon.

41:9.text: Q̣ul ʹa-ʹin-na-kum la-tak-fu-roo-na bil-la-ẓee kha-la-q̣al- ʹar-ḍa fee Yaw-may-ni wa-taj-ʻa-loo-na la-hooo ʹañ-daa-daa? Ẓaa-li-ka Rab-bul- ʻAa-la-meen.

41:10.text: Wa-ja-ʻa-la fee-haa ra-waa-si-ya miñ- faw-q̣i-haa wa-baa-ra-ka fee-haa wa-q̣ad-da-ra fee-haaa ʹaq̣-waa-ta-haa feee ar-ba-ʻa-ti ʹAy-yaam; sa-waaa-ʹal- lis-saaa-ʹi-leen.

41:11.text: S̤um-mas- ta-waaa ʹi-las- sa-maaa-ʹi wa-hi-ya du-khaa-nuñ- fa-q̣aa-la la-haa wa-lil-ʹar-ḍiʹ- ti-yaa ṭaw-ʻan ʹaw kar-haa. Q̣aa-la-taaa ʹa-tay-naa ṭaa-ʹi-ʻeen.

41:12.text: Fa-q̣a-ḍaa-hun-na sab-ʻa sa-maa-waa-tiñ fee Yaw-may-ni wa-ʹaw-ḥaa fee kul-li sa-maaa-ʹin ʹam-ra-haa. Wa-zay-yan-nas-sa- maaa-ʹad- dun-yaa bi-ma-ṣaa-bee-ḥa wa-ḥif-z̤̣aa. Ẓaa-li-ka Taq̣-dee-rul- ʻA-zee-zil- ʻA-leem.

41:13.text: Fa-ʹin ʹaʻ-ra-ḍoo fa-q̣ul ʹañ-ẓar-tu-kum Ṣaa-ʻi-q̣a-tam- mis̤-la Ṣaa-ʻi-q̣a-ti ʻAa-diñw- Wa-S̤a-mood!

41:14.text: ʹIẓ jaaa-ʹat-hu-mur- ru-su-lu mim- bay-ni ʹay-dee-him wa-min khal-fi-him ʹal-laa taʻ-bu-dooo ʹil-lal- laah. Q̣aa-loo law shaaa-ʹa Rab-bu-naa la-ʹañ-za-la ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tañ fa-ʹin-naa bi-maaa ʹur-sil-tum̃- bi-hee kaa-fi-roon.

41:15.text: Fa-ʹam-maa ʻAa-duñ- fas-tak-ba-roo fil- ʹar-ḍi bi-g̣ay-ril- ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-q̣aa-loo man ʹa-shad-du min-naa q̣uw-wah? ʹA-wa-lam ya-raw ʹan-nal- laa-hal- la-ẓee kha-la-q̣a-hum Hu-wa ʹa-shad-du min-hum q̣uw-wah? Wa-kaa-noo bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa yaj-ḥa-doon!

41:16.text: Fa-ʹar-sal-naa ʻa-lay-him Ree-ḥañ ṣar-ṣa-rañ feee ʹAy-yaa-min- na-ḥi-saa-til- li-nu-ẓee-q̣a-hum ʻa-ẓaa-bal- khiz-yi fil- ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa; wa-la-ʻA-ẓaa-bul- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti ʹakh-zaa Wa-hum laa- yuñ-ṣa-roon.

41:17.text: Wa-ʹam-maa S̤a-moo-du fa-ha-day-naa-hum fas-ta-ḥab-bul- ʻa-maa ʻa-lal- Hu-daa fa-ʹa-kha-ẓat-hum Ṣaa-ʻi-q̣a-tul- ʻa-ẓaa-bil- hoo-ni bi-maa kaa-noo yak-si-boon.

41:19.text: Wa-Yaw-ma yuḥ-sha-ru ʹaʻ-daaa-ʹul- laa-hi ʹi-lan- Naa-ri fa-hum yoo-za-ʻoon.

41:20.text: Ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa maa- jaaa-ʹoo-haa sha-hi-da ʻa-lay-him sam-ʻu-hum wa-ʹab-ṣaa-ru-hum wa-ju-loo-du-hum̃- bi-maa kaa-noo yaʻ-ma-loon.

41:21.text: Wa-q̣aa-loo li-ju-loo-di-him li-ma sha-hit-tum ʻa-lay-naa? Q̣aa-looo ʹañ-ṭa-q̣a-nal- laa-hul- la-ẓeee ʹañ-ṭa-q̣a kul-la shay-ʹiñw- wa-Hu-wa kha-la-q̣a-kum ʹaw-wa-la mar-ra-tiñw- wa-ʹi-lay-hi tur-ja-ʻoon.

41:22.text: Wa-maa kuñ-tum tas-ta-ti-roo-na ʹañy- yash-ha-da ʻa-lay-kum sam-ʻu-kum wa-laaa ʹab-ṣaa-ru-kum wa-laa ju-loo-du-kum wa-laa-kiñ- z̤̣a-nañ-tum ʹan-nal- laa-ha laa- yaʻ-la-mu ka-s̤ee-ram- mim-maa taʻ-ma-loon!

41:23.text: Wa-ẓaa-li-kum z̤̣an-nu-ku-mul- la-ẓee z̤̣a-nañ-tum̃- bi-Rab-bi-kum ʹar-daa-kum fa-ʹaṣ-baḥ-tum- mi-nal- khaa-si-reen.

41:24.text: Fa-ʹiñy- yaṣ-bi-roo fan-naa-ru mas̤-wal- la-hum! Wa-ʹiñy- yas-taʻ-ti-boo fa-maa hum- mi-nal- muʻ-ta-been.

41:25.text: Wa-q̣ay-yaḍ-naa la-hum q̣u-ra-naaa-ʹa fa-zay-ya-noo la-hum- maa bay-na ʹay-dee-him wa-maa khal-fa-hum wa-ḥaq̣-q̣a ʻa-lay-hi-mul- q̣aw-lu feee ʹu-ma-miñ- q̣ad kha-lat miñ q̣ab-li-him- mi-nal- Jin-ni wal-ʹIñs; ʹin-na-hum kaa-noo khaa-si-reen.

41:26.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo laa- tas-ma-ʻoo li-haa-ẓal- Q̣ur-ʹaa-ni wal-g̣aw fee-hi la-ʻal-la-kum tag̣-li-boon!

41:27.text: Fa-la-nu-ẓee-q̣an-nal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo ʻa-ẓaa-bañ sha-dee-dañw- wa-la-naj-zi-yan-na-hum ʹas-wa-ʹal- la-ẓee kaa-noo yaʻ-ma-loon.

41:28.text: Ẓaa-li-ka ja-zaaa-ʹu ʹaʻ-daaa-ʹil- laa-hin- Naar: la-hum fee-haa Daa-rul- Khuld: ja-zaaa-ʹam- bi-maa kaa-noo bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa yaj-ḥa-doon.

41:29.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo Rab-ba-naaa ʹa-ri-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹa-ḍal-laa-naa mi-nal- jin-ni wal-ʹiñ-si naj-ʻal-hu-maa taḥ-ta ʹaq̣-daa-mi-naa li-ya-koo-naa mi-nal- ʹas-fa-leen.

41:30.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na q̣aa-loo Rab-bu-nal- laa-hu s̤um-mas- ta-q̣aa-moo ta-ta-naz-zalu ʻa-lay-hi-mul- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tu ʹal-laa ta-khaa-foo wa-laa taḥ-za-noo wa-ʹab-shi-roo bil-Jan-na-til- la-tee kuñ-tum too-ʻa-doon!

41:31.text: Naḥ-nu ʹaw-li-yaaa-ʹu-kum fil- ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa wa-fil- ʹAa-khi-rah: wa-la-kum fee-haa maa- tash-ta-heee ʹañ-fu-su-kum wa-la-kum fee-haa maa- tad-da-ʻoon!

41:33.text: Wa-man ʹaḥ-sa-nu q̣aw-lam- mim-mañ- da-ʻaaa ʹi-lal- laa-hi wa-ʻa-mi-la ṣaa-li-ḥañw- wa-q̣aa-la ʹin-na-nee mi-nal- Mus-li-meen?

41:34.text: Wa-laa tas-ta-wil- ḥa-sa-na-tu wa-las- say-yi-ʹah. ʹId-faʻ bil-la-tee hi-ya ʹaḥ-sa-nu fa-ʹi-ẓal- la-ẓee bay-na-ka wa-bay-na-hoo ʻa-daa-wa-tuñ ka-ʹan-na-hoo wa-liy-yun ḥa-meem!

41:35.text: Wa-maa yu-laq̣-q̣aa-haaa ʹil-lal- la-ẓee-na wa-maa ṣa-ba-roo yu-laq̣-q̣aa-haaa ʹil-laa ẓoo ḥaz̤̣-z̤̣in ʻa-z̤̣eem.

41:36.text: Wa-ʹim-maa yañ-za-g̣an-na-ka mi-nash- Shay-ṭaa-ni naz-g̣uñ- fas-ta-ʻiẓ bil-laah. ʹIn-na-hoo Hu-was- Sa-mee-ʻul- ʻA-leem.

41:37.text: Wa-min ʹAa-yaa-ti-hil- lay-lu wan-na-haa-ru wash-sham-su wal-q̣a-mar. Laa- tas-ju-doo lish-sham-si wa-laa lil-q̣a-ma-ri was-ju-doo lil-laa-hil- la-ẓee kha-la-q̣a-hun-na ʹiñ- kuñ-tum ʹiy-yaa-hu taʻ-bu-doon.

41:38.text: Fa-ʹi-nis- tak-ba-roo fal-la-ẓee-na ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-ka yu-sab-bi-ḥoo-na la-hoo bil-lay-li wan-na-haa-ri wa-hum laa- yas-ʹa-moon.

41:39.text: Wa-min ʹAa-yaa-ti-heee ʹan-na-ka ta-ral- ʹar-ḍa khaa-shi-ʻa-tañ fa-ʹi-ẓaaa ʹañ-zal-naa ʻa-lay-hal- maaa-ʹah- taz-zat wa-ra-bat. ʹIn-nal- la-ẓeee ʹaḥ-yaa-haa la-Muḥ-yil- maw-taa. ʹIn-na-hoo ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Q̣a-deer.

41:40.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na yul-ḥi-doo-na feee ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa laa- yakh-faw-na ʻa-lay-naa. ʹA-fa-mañy- yul-q̣aa fin- naa-ri khay-run ʹam- mañy- yaʹ-teee ʹaa-mi-nañy- Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-mah? ʹIʻ-ma-loo maa- shiʹ-tum ʹin-na-hoo bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na Ba-ṣeer.

41:41.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo biẓ-Ẓik-ri lam-maa jaaa-ʹa-hum. Wa-ʹin-na-hoo la-Ki-taa-bun ʻA-zeez.

41:42.text: Laa- yaʹ-tee-hil- baa-ṭi-lu mim- bay-ni ya-day-hi wa-laa min khal-fih: Tañ-zee-lum- min Ḥa-kee-min Ḥa-meed.

41:43.text: Maa- yu-q̣aa-lu la-ka ʹil-laa maa- q̣ad q̣ee-la lir-ru-su-li miñ q̣ab-lik: ʹin-na Rab-ba-ka la-Ẓoo mag̣-fi-ra-tiñw- wa-Ẓoo ʻI-q̣aa-bin ʹa-leem.

41:44.text: Wa-law ja-ʻal-naa-hu Q̣ur-ʹaa-nan ʹAʻ-ja-miy-yal- la-q̣aa-loo law-laa- fuṣ-ṣi-lat ʹAa-yaa-tuh? ʹAʻ-ja-miy-yuñw- Wa-ʻA-ra-biyy? Q̣ul hu-wa lil-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo hu-dañw- wa-shi-faaaʹ: wal-la-ẓee-na laa- yuʹ-mi-noo-na feee ʹaa-ẓaa-ni-him waq̣-ruñw- wa-hu-wa ʻa-lay-him ʻa-maa. ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka yu-naa-daw-na mim- ma-kaa-nim- ba-ʻeed!

41:45.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹaa-tay-naa Moo-sal- Ki-taa-ba fakh-tu-li-fa feeh. Wa-lawlaa- Ka-li-ma-tuñ- sa-ba-q̣at mir- Rab-bi-ka la-q̣u-ḍi-ya bay-na-hum: wa-ʹin-na-hum la-fee shak-kim- min-hu mu-reeb.

41:46.text: Man ʻa-mi-la ṣaa-li-ḥañ- fa-li-naf-si-hee wa-man ʹa-saaa-ʹa fa-ʻa-lay-haa: wa-maa Rab-bu-ka bi-z̤̣al-la-mil- lil-ʻa-beed.

41:47.text: ʹI-lay-hi yu-rad-du ʻil-mus- Saa-ʻah: wa-maa takh-ru-ju miñ- s̤a-ma-raa-tim- min ʹak-maa-mi-haa wa-maa taḥ-mi-lu min ʹuñ-s̤aa wa-laa ta-ḍa-ʻu ʹil-laa bi-ʻil-mih. Wa-Yaw-ma yu-naa-dee-him ʹay-na shu-ra-kaaa-ʹee q̣aa-looo ʹaa-ẓan-naa-ka maa- min-naa miñ- sha-heed!

41:48.text: Wa-ḍal-la ʻan-hum- maa kaa-noo yad-ʻoo-na miñ- q̣ab-lu wa-z̤̣an-noo maa- la-hum- mim- ma-ḥeeṣ.

41:49.text: Laa- yas-ʹa-mul- ʹiñ-saa-nu miñ du-ʻaaa-ʹil- khay-ri wa-ʹim- mas-sa- hush-shar-ru fa-ya-ʹoo-suñ- q̣a-nooṭ.

41:50.text: Wa-la-ʹin ʹa-ẓaq̣-naa-hu Raḥ-ma-tam- min-naa mim- baʻ-di ḍar-raaa-ʹa mas-sat-hu la-ya-q̣oo-lan-na haa-ẓaa lee wa-maaa ʹa-z̤̣un-nus- Saa-ʻa-ta q̣aaa-ʹi-ma-tañw- wa-la-ʹir- ru-jiʻ-tu ʹi-laa Rab-beee ʹin-na lee ʻiñ-da-hoo lal-ḥus-naa! Fa-la-nu-nab-bi-ʹan-nal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo bi-maa ʻa-mi-loo, wa-la-nu-ẓee-q̣an-na-hum- min ʻA-ẓaa-bin g̣a-leez̤̣.

41:51.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaaa ʹan-ʻam-naa ʻa-lal- ʹiñ-saa-ni ʹaʻ-ra-ḍa wa-na-ʹaa bi-jaa-ni-bih; wa-ʹi-ẓaa mas-sa-hush- shar-ru fa-ẓoo du-ʻaaa-ʹin ʻa-reeḍ!

41:52.text: Q̣ul ʹa-ra-ʹay-tum ʹiñ- kaa-na min ʻiñ-dil- laa-hi s̤um-ma ka-far-tum̃- bi-hee man ʹa-ḍal-lu mim-man hu-wa fee shi-q̣aa-q̣im- ba-ʻeed?

41:53.text: Sa-nu-ree-him ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa fil- ʹaa-faa-q̣i wa-feee ʹañ-fu-si-him ḥat-taa ya-ta-bay-ya-na la-hum ʹan-na-hul- Ḥaq̣q̣. ʹA-wa-lam yak-fi bi-Rab-bi-ka ʹan-na-hoo ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- sha-heed?

41:54.text: ʹA-laaa ʹin-na-hum fee mir-ya-tim- mil- Li-q̣aaa-ʹi Rab-bi-him? ʹA-laaa ʹin-na-hoo bi-kul-li shay-ʹim- Mu-ḥeeṭ.

42:3.text: Ka-ẓaa-li-ka yoo-ḥeee ʹi-lay-ka wa-ʹi-lal- la-ẓee-na miñ- q̣ab-li-kal- laa-hul- ʻA-zee-zul- Ḥa-keem.

42:4.text: La-hoo maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-maa fil- ʹarḍ: wa-Hu-wal- ʻA-liy-yul- ʻA-z̤̣eem.

42:5.text: Ta-kaa-dus- sa-maa-waa-tu ya-ta-faṭ-ṭar-na miñ- faw-q̣i-hin-na wal-ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tu yu-sab-bi-ḥoo-na bi-Ḥam-di Rab-bi-him wa-yas-tag̣-fi-roo-na li-mañ fil- ʹarḍ: ʹa-laaa ʹin-nal- laa-ha Hu-wal- G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

42:6.text: Wal-la-ẓee-nat- ta-kha-ẓoo miñ doo-ni-heee ʹaw-li-yaaa-ʹal- laa-hu ḥa-fee-z̤̣un ʻa-lay-him wa-maaa ʹañ-ta ʻa-lay-him̃- bi-wa-keel.

42:7.text: Wa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka ʹaw-ḥay-naaa ʹi-lay-ka Q̣ur-ʹaa-nan ʻA-ra-biy-yal- li-tuñ-ẓi-ra ʹUm-mal- Q̣u-raa wa-man ḥaw-la-haa wa-tuñ-ẓi-ra Yaw-mal- Jam-ʻi laa- ray-ba feeh: fa-ree-q̣uñ- fil- Jan-na-ti wa-fa-ree-q̣uñ- fis- Sa-ʻeer.

42:8.text: Wa-law shaaa-ʹal- laa-hu la-ja-ʻa-la-hum ʹUm-ma-tañw- Waa-ḥi-da-tañw- wa-laa-kiñy- yud-khi-lu mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu fee Raḥ-ma-tih; waz̤̣-z̤̣aa-li-moo-na maa- la-hum- miñw- wa-liy-yiñw- wa-laa- na-ṣeer.

42:9.text: ʹA-mit- ta-kha-ẓoo miñ- doo-ni-heee ʹaw-li-yaaaʹ? Fal-laa-hu Hu-wal- Wa-liy-yu wa-Hu-wa yuḥ-yil- maw-taa, wa-Hu-wa ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Q̣a-deer.

42:10.text: Wa-makh- ta-laf-tum fee-hi miñ shay-ʹiñ- fa-ḥuk-mu-hooo ʹi-lal- laah: ẓaa-li-ku-mul- laa-hu Rab-bee ʻa-lay-hi ta-wak-kal-tu wa-ʹi-lay-hi ʹu-neeb.

42:11.text: Faa-ṭi-rus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ! Ja-ʻa-la la-kum- min ʹañ-fu-si-kum ʹaz-waa-jañw- Wa-mi-nal- ʹan-ʻaa-mi ʹaz-waa-jaa: yaẓ-ra-ʹu-kum feeh: Lay-sa ka-mis̤-li-hee shayʹ; wa-Hu-was- sa-mee-ʻul- Ba-ṣeer.

42:12.text: La-hoo ma-q̣aa-lee-dus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ; Yab-su-ṭur- Riz-q̣a li-mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu wa-yaq̣-dir: ʹin-na-hoo bi-kul-li shay-ʹin ʻA-leem.

42:13.text: Sha-ra-ʻa la-kum- mi-nad- Dee-ni maa- waṣ-ṣaa bi-hee Noo-ḥañw- wal-la-ẓeee ʹaw-ḥay-naaa ʹi-lay-ka wa-maa waṣ-ṣay-naa bi-heee ʹIb-raa-hee-ma wa-Moo-saa wa-ʻEe-saaa ʹan ʹa-q̣ee-mud- Dee-na wa-laa ta-ta-far-ra-q̣oo feeh: ka-bu-ra ʻa-lal- mush-ri-kee-na maa- tad-ʻoo-hum ʹi-layh. ʹAl-laa-hu yaj-ta-beee ʹi-lay-hi mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu wa-yah-deee ʹi-lay-hi mañy- yu-neeb.

42:14.text: Wa-maa ta-far-ra-q̣ooo ʹil-laa mim- baʻ-di maa- jaaa-ʹa-hu-mul- ʻil-mu bag̣-yam- bay-na-hum. Wa-law-laa- Ka-li-ma-tuñ- sa-ba-q̣at mir- Rab-bi-ka ʹi-laaa ʹa-ja-lim- mu-sam-mal- li-q̣u-ḍi-ya bay-na-hum: wa-ʹin-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹoo-ri-s̤ul- Ki-taa-ba mim- baʻ-di-him la-fee shak-kim- min-hu mu-reeb.

42:15.text: Fa-li-ẓaa-li-ka fad-ʻu was-ta-q̣im ka-maaa ʹu-mirt. Wa-laa tat-ta-biʻ ʹah-waaa-ʹa-hum; wa-q̣ul ʹaa-mañ-tu bi-maaa ʹañ-za-la- laa-hu miñ- Ki-taab; wa-ʹu-mir-tu li-ʹaʻ-di-la bay-na-kum. ʹAl-laa-hu Rab-bu-naa wa-Rab-bu-kum. La-naaa ʹaʻ-maa-lu-naa wa-la-kum ʹaʻ-maa-lu-kum. Laa- ḥuj-ja-ta bay-na-naa wa-bay-na-kum. ʹAl-laa-hu yaj-ma-ʻu bay-na-naa, wa-ʹi-lay-hil- ma-ṣeer.

42:16.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na yu-ḥaaaj-joo-na fil- laa-hi mim- baʻ-di mas- tu-jee-ba la-hoo ḥuj-ja-tu-hum daa-ḥi-ḍa-tun ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-him wa-ʻa-lay-him g̣a-ḍa-buñw- wa-la-hum ʻA-ẓaa-buñ- sha-deed.

42:17.text: ʹAl-laa-hul- la-ẓeee ʹañ-za-lal- Ki-taa-ba bil-ḥaq̣-q̣i wal-Mee-zaan. Wa-maa yud-ree-ka la-ʻal-las- Saa-ʻa-ta q̣a-reeb?

42:18.text: Yas-taʻ-ji-lu bi-hal- la-ẓee-na laa- yuʹ-mi-noo-na bi-haa: wal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo mush-fi-q̣oo-na min-haa wa-yaʻ-la-moo-na ʹan-na-hal- Ḥaq̣q̣. ʹA-laaa ʹin-nal- la-ẓee-na yu-maa-roo-na fis- Saa-ʻa-ti la-fee ḍa-laa-lim- ba-ʻeed.

42:19.text: ʹAl-laa-hu La-ṭee-fum- bi-ʻi-baa-di-hee yar-zu-q̣u mañy- ya-shaaaʹ: wa-Hu-wal- Q̣a-wiy-yul- ʻA-zeez.

42:20.text: Mañ- kaa-na yu-ree-du ḥar-s̤al- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti na-zid la-hoo fee ḥar-s̤ih; wa-mañ- kaa-na yu-ree-du ḥar-s̤ad- dun-yaa nuʹ-ti-hee min-haa wa-maa la-hoo fil- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti min- na-ṣeeb.

42:21.text: ʹAm la-hum shu-ra-kaaa-ʹu sha-ra-ʻoo la-hum- mi-nad- Dee-ni maa- lam yaʹ-ẓam- bi-hil- laah? Wa-law-laa- Ka-li-ma-tul- Faṣ-li la-q̣u-ḍi-ya bay-na-hum. Wa-ʹin-naz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-mee-na la-hum ʻA-ẓaa-bun ʹa-leem.

42:22.text: Ta-raz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-mee-na mush-fi-q̣ee-na mim-maa ka-sa-boo wa-hu-wa waa-q̣i-ʻum- bi-him. Wal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti fee raw-ḍaa-til- Jan-naat: la-hum- maa ya-shaaa-ʹoo-na ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-him. Ẓaa-li-ka hu-wal- Faḍ-lul- Ka-beer.

42:23.text: Ẓaa-li-kal- la-ẓee yu-bash-shi-rul- laa-hu ʻI-baa-da-hul- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaat. Q̣ul laaa ʹas-ʹa-lu-kum ʻa-lay-hi ʹaj-ran ʹil-lal- ma-wad-da-ta fil- q̣ur-baa. Wa-mañy- yaq̣-ta-rif ḥa-sa-na-tan- na-zid la-hoo fee-haa ḥus-naa: ʹin-nal- laa-ha G̣a-foo-ruñ- Sha-koor.

42:24.text: ʹAm ya-q̣oo-loo-naf- ta-raa ʻa-lal- laa-hi ka-ẓi-baa? Fa-ʹiñy- ya-sha- ʹil-laa-hu yakh-tim ʻa-laa q̣al-bik. Wa-yam-ḥul- laa-hul- Baa-ṭi-la wa-yu-ḥiq̣-q̣ul- Ḥaq̣-q̣a bi-Ka-li-maa-tih. ʹIn-na-hoo ʻA-lee-mum- bi-ẓaa-tiṣ- ṣu-door.

42:25.text: Wa-Hu-wal- la-ẓee yaq̣-ba-lut- Taw-ba-ta ʻan ʻI-baa-di-hee wa-yaʻ-foo ʻa-nis- say-yi-ʹaa-ti wa-yaʻ-la-mu maa- taf-ʻa-loon.

42:26.text: Wa-yas-ta-jee-bul- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti wa-ya-zee-du-hum- miñ- faḍ-lih: wal-kaa-fi-roo-na la-hum ʻA-ẓaa-buñ- sha-deed.

42:27.text: Wa-law ba-sa-ṭal- laa-hur- Riz-q̣a li-ʻI-baa-di-hee la-ba-g̣aw fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-laa-kiñy- yu-naz-zi-lu bi-q̣a-da-rim- maa ya-shaaaʹ. ʹIn-na-hoo bi-ʻI-baa-di-hee Kha-bee-rum- Ba-ṣeer.

42:28.text: Wa-Hu-wal- la-ẓee yu-naz-zi-lul- g̣ay-s̤a mim- baʻ-di maa- q̣a-na-ṭoo wa-yañ-shu-ru Raḥ-ma-tah. Wa-Hu-wal- Wa-liy-yul- Ḥa-meed.

42:29.text: Wa-min ʹAa-yaa-ti-hee khal-q̣us- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi wa-maa bas̤-s̤a fee-hi-maa miñ- daaab-bah: wa-Hu-wa ʻa-laa jam-ʻi-him ʹi-ẓaa ya-shaaa-ʹu Q̣a-deer.

42:30.text: Wa-maaa ʹa-ṣaa-ba-kum- mim- mu-ṣee-ba-tiñ- fa-bi-maa ka-sa-bat ʹay-dee-kum wa-yaʻ-foo ʻañ- ka-s̤eer.

42:31.text: Wa-maaa ʹañ-tum̃ bi-muʻ-ji-zee-na fil- ʹar-ḍi la-kum wa-maa miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi miñw- wa-liy-yiñw- na-ṣeer. wa-laa

42:32.text: Wa-min ʹAa-yaa-ti-hil- ja-waa-ri fil- baḥ-ri kal-ʹaʻ-laam.

42:33.text: ʹIñy- ya-shaʹ yus-ki-nir- ree-ḥa fa-yaz̤̣-lal-na ra-waa-ki-da ʻa-laa z̤̣ah-rih. ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yaa-til- li-kul-li ṣab-ba-riñ sha-koor.

42:34.text: ʹAw yoo-biq̣-hun-na bi-maa ka-sa-boo wa-yaʻ-fu ʻañ- ka-s̤eer.

42:35.text: Wa-yaʻ-la-mal- la-ẓee-na yu-jaa-di-loo-na feee Aa-yaa-ti-naa, maa-ʹ la-hum- mim- ma-ḥeeṣ.

42:36.text: Fa-maaa ʹoo-tee-tum- miñ- shay-ʹiñ- fa-ma-taa-ʻul- ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa: wa-maa ʻiñ-dal- laa-hi khay-ruñw- wa-ʹab-q̣aa lil-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-laa Rab-bi-him ya-ta-wak-ka-loon;

42:37.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na yaj-ta-ni-boo-na ka-baaa-ʹi-ral- ʹis̤-mi wal-fa-waa-ḥi-sha waʹi-ẓaa maa- g̣a-ḍi-boo hum yag̣-fi-roon;

42:38.text: Wal-la-ẓee-nas- ta-jaa-boo li-Rab-bi-him wa-ʹa-q̣aa-muṣ- Ṣa-laah; wa-ʹam-ru-hum SHOO-RAA bay-na-hum; wa-mim-maa ra-zaq̣-naa-hum yuñ-fi-q̣oon;

42:39.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ʹi-ẓaaa ʹa-ṣaa-ba-hu-mul- bag̣-yu hum yañ-ta-ṣi-roon.

42:40.text: Wa-ja-zaaa-ʹu say-yi-ʹa-tiñ- say-yi-ʹa-tum- mis̤-lu-haa: fa-man ʻa-faa wa-ʹaṣ-la-ḥa fa-ʹaj-ru-hoo ʻa-lal- laah: ʹin-na-hoo laa- yu-ḥib-buz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen.

42:41.text: Wa-la-ma-niñ- ta-ṣa-ra baʻ-da z̤̣ul-mi-hee fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka maa- ʻa-lay-him- miñ- sa-beel.

42:42.text: ʹIn-na-mas- sa-bee-lu ʻa-lal- la-ẓee-na yaz̤̣-li-moo-nan- naa-sa wa-yab-g̣oo-na fil- ʹar-ḍi bi-g̣ay-ril- ḥaq̣q̣: ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka la-hum ʻA-ẓaa-bun ʹa-leem.

42:43.text: Wa-la-mañ- ṣa-ba-ra wa-g̣a-fa-ra ʹin-na ẓaa-li-ka la-min ʻaz-mil- ʹu-moor.

42:44.text: Wa-mañy- yuḍ-li- lil-laa-hu fa-maa la-hoo miñw- wa-liy-yim- mim- baʻ-dih. Wa-ta-raz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-mee-na lam-maa ra-ʹa-wul- ʻa-ẓaa-ba ya-q̣oo-loo-na hal ʹi-laa ma-rad-dim- miñ- sa-beel?

42:45.text: Wa-ta-raa-hum yaʻ-ra-ḍoo-na ʻa-lay-haa khaa-shi-ʻee-na mi-naẓ- ẓul-li yañ-z̤̣u-roo-na miñ- ṭar-fin kha-fiyy. Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nooo ʹin-nal- khaa-si-ree-nal- la-ẓee-na kha-si-rooo ʹañ-fu-sa-hum wa-ʹah-lee-him Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-mah. ʹA-laaa ʹin-naz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-mee-na fee ʻA-ẓaa-bim- mu-q̣eem!

42:46.text: Wa-maa kaa-na la-hum- min ʹaw-li-yaaa-ʹa yañ-ṣu-roo-na-hum- miñ doo-nil- laah. Wa-mañy- yuḍ-li-lil- laa-hu fa-maa la-hoo miñ- sa-beel.

42:47.text: ʹIs-ta-jee-boo li-Rab-bi-kum- miñ- q̣ab-li ʹañy- yaʹ-ti-ya Yaw-mul- laa ma-rad-da la-hoo mi-n al-laah. maa- la-kum- mim- mal-ja-ʹiñy- Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓiñw- Wa-Maa la-kum- min- na-keer.

42:48.text: Fa-ʹin ʹaʻ-ra-ḍoo fa-maaa ʹar-sal-naa-ka ʻa-lay-him ḥa-fee-z̤̣aa. ʹIn ʻa-lay-ka ʹil-lal- ba-laag̣. Wa-ʹin-naaa ʹi-ẓaaa ʹa-ẓaq̣-nal- ʹiñ-saa-na min-naa Raḥ-ma-tañ- fa-ri-ḥa bi-haa: wa-ʹiñ- tu-ṣib-hum say-yi-ʹa-tum- bi-maa q̣ad-da-mat ʹay-dee-him fa-ʹin-nal- ʹiñ-saa-na ka-foor!

42:49.text: Lil-laa-hi mul-kus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ. Yakh-lu-q̣u maa- ya-shaaaʹ. Ya-ha-bu li-mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu ʹi-naa-s̤añw wa-ya-ha-bu li-mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹuẓ- ẓu-koor,

42:50.text: ʹAw yu-zaw-wi-ju-hum ẓuk-raa-nañw- wa-ʹi-naa-s̤aa; wa-yaj-ʻa-lu mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu ʻa-q̣ee-maa: ʹin-na-hoo ʻA-lee-muñ- Q̣a-deer.

42:51.text: Wa-maa kaa-na li-ba-sha-rin ʹañy- yu-kal-li-ma-hul- laa-hu ʹil-laa Waḥ-yan ʹaw miñw- wa-raaa-ʹi ḥi-jaa-bin ʹaw yur-si-la ra-soo-lañ- fa-yoo-ḥi-ya bi-ʹiẓ-ni-hee maa- ya-shaaaʹ: ʹin-na-hoo ʻA-liy-yun Ḥa-keem.

42:52.text: Wa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka ʹaw-ḥay-naaa ʹi-lay-ka Roo-ḥam- min ʹam-ri-naa: maa- kuñ-ta tad-ree mal- ki-taa-bu wa-lal- ʹee-maa-nu wa-laa-kiñ- ja-ʻal-naa-hu Noo-ran- nah-dee bi-hee man- na-shaaa-ʹu min ʻI-baa-di-naa: wa-ʹin-na-ka la-tah-deee ʹi-laa Ṣi-raa-ṭim- Mus-ta-q̣eem,―

42:53.text: Ṣi-raa-ṭil- laa-hil- la-ẓee la-hoo maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-maa fil- ʹarḍ; ʹA-laaa ʹi-lal- laa-hi ta-ṣee-rul- ʹu-moor.

43:3.text: ʹIn-naa ja-ʻal-naa-hu Q̣ur-ʹaa-nan ʻA-ra-biy-yal- la-ʻal-la-kum taʻ-q̣i-loon.

43:4.text: Wa-ʹin-na-hoo feee ʹUm-mil- Ki-taa-bi la-day-naa la-ʻa-liy-yun Ḥa-keem.

43:5.text: ʹA-fa-naḍ-ri-bu ʻañ-ku-muẓ- Ẓik-ra ṣaf-ḥan ʹañ- kuñ-tum q̣aw-mam- mus-ri-feen?

43:6.text: Wa-kam ʹar-sal-naa min- na-biy-yiñ- fil- ʹaw-wa-leen?

43:7.text: Wa-maa yaʹ-tee-him- min- na-biy-yin- ʹil-laa kaa-noo bi-hee yas-tah-zi-ʹoon.

43:8.text: Fa-ʹah-lak-naaa ʹa-shad-da min-hum̃- baṭ-shañw- wa-ma-ḍaa Ma-s̤a-lul- ʹaw-wa-leen.

43:9.text: Wa-la-ʹiñ- sa-ʹal-ta-hum- man kha-la-q̣as- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa la-ya-q̣oo-lun-na kha-la-q̣a-hun-nal- ʻA-zee-zul- ʻA-leem;―

43:10.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee ja-ʻa-la la-ku-mul- ʹar-ḍa mah-dañw- wa-ja-ʻa-la la-kum fee-haa su-bu-lal- la-ʻal-la-kum tah-ta-doon;

43:11.text: Wal-la-ẓee naz-za-la mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi maaa-ʹam- bi-q̣a-dar;― fa-ʹañ-shar-naa bi-hee bal-da-tam- may-taa; ka-ẓaa-li-ka tukh-ra-joon;―

43:12.text: Wal-la-ẓee kha-la-q̣al- ʹaz-waa-ja kul-la-haa wa-ja-ʻa-la la-kum- mi-nal- ful-ki wal-ʹan-ʻaa-mi maa- tar-ka-boon.

43:13.text: Li-tas-ta-woo ʻa-laa z̤̣u-hoo-ri-hee s̤um-ma taẓ-ku-roo niʻ-ma-ta Rab-bi-kum ʹi-ẓas- ta-way-tum ʻa-lay-hi wa-ta-q̣oo-loo ʻʻSub-ḥaa-nal- la-ẓee sakh-kha-ra la-naa haa-ẓaa wa-maa kun-naa la-hoo muq̣-ri-neen.

43:15.text: Wa-ja-ʻa-loo la-hoo min ʻi-baa-di-hee juz-ʹaa! ʹIn-nal- ʹiñ-saa-na la-ka-foo-rum- mu-been!

43:16.text: ʹA-mit- ta-kha-ẓa mim-maa yakh-lu-q̣u ba-naa-tiñw- wa-ʹaṣ-faa-kum bil-ba-neen?

43:17.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa bush-shi-ra ʹa-ḥa-du-hum̃- bi-maa ḍa-ra-ba lir-Raḥ-maa-ni ma-s̤a-lañ- z̤̣al-la waj-hu-hoo mus-wad-dañw- wa-hu-wa ka-z̤̣eem!

43:18.text: ʹA-wa-mañy- yu-nash-sha-ʹu fil- ḥil-ya-ti wa-hu-wa fil- khi-ṣaa-mi g̣ay-ru mu-been?

43:19.text: Wa-ja-ʻa-lul- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tal- la-ẓee-na hum ʻi-baa-dur- Raḥ-maa-ni ʹi-naa-s̤aa. ʹA-sha-hi-doo khal-q̣a-hum? Sa-tuk-ta-bu sha-haa-da-tu-hum wa-yus-ʹa-loon!

43:20.text: Wa-q̣aa-loo law shaaa-ʹar- Raḥ-maa-nu Maa- ʻa-bad-naa-hum! maa- la-hum̃- bi-ẓaa-li-ka min ʻilm! ʹIn hum ʹil-laa yakh-ru-ṣoon!

43:21.text: ʹAm ʹaa-tay-naa-hum Ki-taa-bam- miñ- q̣ab-li-hee fa-hum̃- bi-hee mus-tam-si-koon?

43:22.text: Bal q̣aa-looo ʹin-naa wa-jad-naaa ʹaa-baaa-ʹa-naa ʻa-laaa ʹum-ma-tiñw- Wa-ʹin-naa ʻa-laaa ʹaa-s̤aa-ri-him- muh-ta-doon.

43:23.text: Wa-ka-ẓaa-li-ka maaa ʹar-sal-naa miñ- q̣ab-li-ka fee q̣ar-ya-tim- min- Na-ẓee-rin ʹil-laa q̣aa-la mut-ra-foo-haaa ʹin-naa wa-jad-naaa ʹaa-baaa-ʹa-naa ʻa-laaa ʹum-ma-tiñw- waʹin-naa ʻa-laaa ʹaa-s̤aa-ri-him- muq̣-ta-doon.

43:24.text: Q̣aa-la ʹa-wa- law jiʹ-tu-kum̃- bi-ʹah-daa mim-maa wa-jat-tum ʻa-lay-hi ʹaa-baaa-ʹa-kum? Q̣aa-looo ʹin-naa bi-maaa ʹur-sil-tum̃- bi-hee- kaa-fi-roon.

43:25.text: Fañ-ta-q̣am-naa min-hum fañ-z̤̣ur kay-fa kaa-na ʻaa-q̣i-ba-tul- mu-kaẓ-ẓi-been!

43:26.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣aa-la ʹIb-raa-hee-mu li-ʹa-bee-hi wa-q̣aw-mi-heee ʹin-na-nee ba-raaa-ʹum- mim-maa taʻ-bu-doon:

43:28.text: Wa-ja-ʻa-la-haa Ka-li-ma-tam- baa-q̣i-ya-tañ- fee ʻa-q̣i-bi-hee la-ʻal-la-hum yar-ji-ʻoon.

43:29.text: Bal mat-taʻ-tu haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi wa-ʹaa-baaa-ʹa-hum ḥat-taa jaaa-ʹa-hu-mul- Ḥaq̣-q̣u wa-Ra-soo-lum- mu-been.

43:30.text: Wa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹa-hu-mul- Ḥaq̣-q̣u q̣aa-loo haa-ẓaa siḥ-ruñw- wa-ʹin-naa bi-hee kaa-fi-roon.

43:31.text: Wa-q̣aa-loo Law-laa- nuz-zi-la haa-ẓal- Q̣ur-ʹaa-nu ʻa-laa ra-ju-lim- mi-nal- q̣ar-ya-tay-ni ʻa-z̤̣eem?

43:32.text: ʹA-hum yaq̣-si-moo-na Raḥ-ma-ta Rab-bik? Naḥ-nu q̣a-sam-naa bay-na-hum- ma-ʻee-sha-ta-hum fil- ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa wa-ra-faʻ-naa baʻ-ḍa-hum faw-q̣a baʻ-ḍiñ- da-ra-jaa-til- li-yat-ta-khi-ẓa baʻ-ḍu-hum̃- baʻ-ḍañ- sukh-riy-yaa. Wa-Raḥ-ma-tu Rab-bi-ka khay-rum- mim-maa yaj-ma-ʻoon.

43:33.text: Wa-law-laaa ʹañy- ya-koo-nan- naa-su ʹum-ma-tañw- waa-ḥi-da-tal- la-ja-ʻal-naa li-mañy- yak-fu-ru bir-Raḥ-maa-ni li-bu-yoo-ti-him su-q̣u-fam- miñ- fiḍ-ḍa-tiñw- wa-ma-ʻaa-ri-ja ʻa-lay-haa yaz̤̣-ha-roon,

43:35.text: Wa-ZUKH-RU-FAA. Wa-ʹiñ- kul-lu ẓaa-li-ka lam-maa ma-taa-ʻul- ḥa-yaa-tid- dun-yaa: wal-ʹAa-khi-ra-tu ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-ka lil-Mut-ta-q̣een.

43:36.text: Wa-mañy- yaʻ-shu ʻañ- ẓik-rir- Raḥ-maa-ni nu-q̣ay-yiḍ la-hoo shay-ṭaa-nañ- fa-hu-wa la-hoo q̣a-reen.

43:37.text: Wa-ʹin-na-hum la-ya-ṣud-doo-na-hum ʻa-nis- sa-bee-li wa-yaḥ-sa-boo-na ʹan-na-hum- muh-ta-doon!

43:38.text: Ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa jaaa-ʹa-naa q̣aa-la yaa-lay-ta bay-nee wa-bay-na-ka buʻ-dal- Mash-ri-q̣ay-ni fa-biʹ-sal- q̣a-reen!

43:39.text: Wa-lañy- yañ-fa-ʻa-ku-mul- yaw-ma ʹiz̤̣- z̤̣a-lam-tum ʹan-na-kum fil- ʻa-ẓaa-bi mush-ta-ri-koon!

43:40.text: ʹA-fa-ʹañ-ta tus-mi-ʻuṣ- ṣum-ma ʹaw tah-dil- ʻum-ya wa-mañ kaa-na fee ḍa-laa-lim- mu-been?

43:41.text: Fa-ʹim-maa naẓ-ha-ban-na bi-ka fa-ʹin-naa min-hum- muñ-ta-q̣i-moon,

43:42.text: ʹAw nu-ri-yan-na-kal- la-ẓee wa-ʻad-naa-hum fa-ʹin-naa ʻa-lay-him- muq̣-ta-di-roon.

43:43.text: Fas-tam-sik bil-la-ẓeee ʹoo-ḥi-ya ʹi-layk: ʹin-na-ka ʻa-laa Ṣi-raa-ṭim- Mus-ta-q̣eem.

43:44.text: Wa-ʹin-na-hoo la-Ẓik-rul- la-ka wa-li-q̣aw-mik; wa-saw-fa tus-ʹa-loon.

43:45.text: Was-ʹal man ʹar-sal-naa miñ- q̣ab-li-ka mir- ru-su-li-naaa ʹa-ja-ʻalnaa miñ- doo-nir- Raḥ-maa-ni ʹaa-li-ha-tañy- yuʻ-ba-doon?

43:46.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹar-sal-naa Moo-saa bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naaa ʹi-laa Fir-ʻaw-na wa-ma-la-ʹi-hee fa-q̣aa-la ʹin-nee Ra-soo-lu Rab-bil- ʻAa-la-meen.

43:47.text: Fa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹa-hum̃- bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naaa ʹi-ẓaa hum- min-haa yaḍ-ḥa-koon.

43:48.text: Wa-maa nu-ree-him- min ʹaa-ya-tin ʹil-laa hi-ya ʹak-ba-ru min ʹukh-ti-haa, wa-ʹa-khaẓ-naa-hum̃- bil-ʻa-ẓaa-bi la-ʻal-la-hum yar-ji-ʻoon.

43:49.text: Wa-q̣aa-loo yaaa-ʹay-yu-has- saa-ḥi-rud- ʹu la-naa Rab-ba-ka bi-maa ʻa-hi-da ʻiñ-dak; ʹin-na-naa la-muh-ta-doon.

43:50.text: Fa-lam-maa ka-shaf-naa ʻan-hu-mul- ʻa-ẓaa-ba ʹi-ẓaa hum yañ-ku-s̤oon.

43:51.text: Wa-naa-daa Fir-ʻaw-nu fee q̣aw-mi-hee q̣aa-la yaa-q̣aw-mi ʹa-lay-sa lee mul-ku Miṣ-ra wa-haa-ẓi-hil- ʹan-haa-ru taj-ree miñ- taḥ-tee? ʹA-fa-laa tub-ṣi-roon?

43:52.text: ʹAm ʹa-na khay-rum- min haa-ẓal- la-ẓee hu-wa ma-hee-nuñw- wa-laa- ya-kaa-du yu-been?

43:53.text: Fa-law-laaa ʹul-q̣i-ya ʻa-lay-hi ʹas-wi-ra-tum- miñ- ẓa-ha-bin ʹaw jaaa-ʹa ma-ʻa-hul- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tu muq̣-ta-ri-neen?

43:54.text: Fas-ta-khaf-fa q̣aw-ma-hoo fa-ʹa-ṭaa-ʻooh: ʹin-na-hum kaa-noo q̣aw-mañ- faa-si-q̣een.

43:55.text: Fa-lam-maaa ʹaa-sa-foo-nañ- ta-q̣am-naa min-hum fa-ʹag̣-raq̣-naa-hum ʹaj-ma-ʻeen.

43:57.text: Wa-lam-maa ḍu-ri-bab- nu- Mar-ya-ma ma-s̤a-lan ʹi-ẓaa q̣aw-mu-ka min-hu ya-ṣid-doon!

43:58.text: Wa-q̣aa-looo ʹa-ʹaa-li-ha-tu-naa khay-run ʹam hoo? Maa- ḍa-ra-boo-hu la-ka ʹil-laa ja-da-laa: bal hum q̣aw-mun kha-ṣi-moon.

43:59.text: ʹIn hu-wa ʹil-laa ʻab-dun ʹan-ʻam-naa ʻa-lay-hi wa-ja-ʻal-naa-hu ma-s̤a-lal- li-Ba-neee- ʹIs-raaa-ʹeel.

43:60.text: Wa-law na-shaaa-ʹu la-ja-ʻal-naa miñ-kum- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tañ- fil- ʹar-ḍi yakh-lu-foon.

43:61.text: Wa-ʹin-na-hoo la-ʻil-mul- lis-Saa-ʻa-ti fa-laa tam-ta-run-na bi-haa wat-ta-bi-ʻoon: haa-ẓaa Ṣi-ra-ṭum- Mus-ta-q̣eem.

43:62.text: Wa-laa ya-ṣud-dan-na-ku-mush- Shay-ṭaan: ʹin-na-hoo la-kum ʻa-duw-wum- mu-been.

43:63.text: Wa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹa ʻEe-saa bil-Bay-yi-naa-ti q̣aa-la q̣ad jiʹ-tu-kum̃- bil-Ḥik-ma-ti wa-li-ʹu-bay-yi-na la-kum baʻ-ḍal- la-ẓee takh-ta-li-foo-na feeh: fat-ta-q̣ul- laa-ha wa-ʹa-ṭee-ʻoon.

43:64.text: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha Hu-wa Rab-bee wa-Rab-bu-kum faʻ-bu-dooh: haa-ẓaa Ṣi-raa-ṭum- Mus-ta-q̣eem.

43:65.text: Fakh-ta-la-fal- ʹaḥ-zaa-bu mim- bay-ni-him: fa-way-lul- lil-la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-moo min ʻa-ẓaa-bi Yaw-min ʹA-leem!

43:66.text: Hal yañ-z̤̣u-roo-na ʹil-las- Saa-ʻa-ta ʹañ- taʹ-ti-ya-hum̃- bag̣-ta-tañw- wa-hum laa- yash-ʻu-roon?

43:67.text: ʹAl-ʹa-khil-laaa-ʹu Yaw-ma-ʹi-zim- baʻ-ḍu-hum li-baʻ-ḍin ʻa-duw-wun ʹil-lal- Mut-ta-q̣een.

43:68.text: Yaa-ʻi-baa-di laa- khaw-fun ʻa-lay-ku-mul- Yaw-ma wa-laaa ʹañ-tum taḥ-za-noon,―

43:71.text: Yu-ṭaa-fu ʻa-lay-him̃- bi-ṣi-ḥaa-fim- miñ- ẓa-ha-biñw- wa-ʹak-waab: wa-fee-haa maa- tash-ta-hee-hil- ʹañ-fu-su wa-ta-laẓ-ẓul- ʹaʻ-yun: wa-ʹañ-tum fee-haa khaa-li-doon.

43:72.text: Wa-til-kal- Jan-na-tul- la-teee ʹoo-ris̤-tu-moo-haa bi-maa kuñ-tum taʻ-ma-loon.

43:73.text: La-kum fee-ha faa-ki-ha-tuñ- ka-s̤ee-ra-tum- min-haa taʹ-ku-loon.

43:74.text: ʹIn-nal- muj-ri-mee-na fee ʻa-ẓaa-bi Ja-han-na-ma khaa-li-doon.

43:75.text: Laa- yu-fat-ta-ru ʻan-hum wa-hum fee-hi mub-li-soon.

43:76.text: Wa-maa z̤̣a-lam-naa-hum wa-laa-kiñ- kaa-noo hu-muz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen.

43:77.text: Wa-naa-daw yaa-Maa-li-ku li-yaq̣-ḍi ʻa-lay-naa Rab-buk! Q̣aa-la ʹin-na-kum- maa-ki-s̤oon.

43:78.text: La-q̣ad jiʹ-naa-kum̃- bil-Ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-laa-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ra-kum lil-Ḥaq̣-q̣i kaa-ri-hoon.

43:80.text: ʹAm yaḥ-sa-boo-na ʹan-naa laa- nas-ma-ʻu sir-ra-hum wa-naj-waa-hum? Ba-laa wa-Ru-su-lu-naa la-day-him yak-tu-boon.

43:81.text: Q̣ul ʹiñ- kaa-na lir-Raḥ-maa-ni wa-la-duñ- fa-ʹa-na ʹaw-wa-lul- ʻaa-bi-deen.

43:82.text: Sub-ḥaa-na Rab-bis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi Rab-bil- ʻAr-shi ʻam-maa ya-ṣi-foon!

43:83.text: Fa-ẓar-hum ya-khoo-ḍoo wa-yal-ʻa-boo ḥat-taa yu-laa-q̣oo Yaw-ma-hu-mul- la-ẓee yoo-ʻa-doon.

43:84.text: Wa-Hu-wal- la-ẓee fis- sa-maaa-ʹi ʹI-laa-huñw- Wa-fil- ʹar-ḍi ʹI-laah; wa-Hu-wal- Ḥa-kee-mul- ʻA-leem.

43:85.text: Wa-ta-baa-ra-kal- la-ẓee la-hoo mul-kus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi wa-maa bay-na-hu-maa: wa-ʻiñ-da-hoo ʻil-mus- Saa-ʻah: wa-ʹi-lay-hi tur-ja-ʻoon.

43:86.text: Wa-laa yam-li-kul- la-ẓee-na yad-ʻoo-na miñ- doo-ni-hish- Sha-faa-ʻa-ta ʹil-laa mañ- sha-hi-da bil-Ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-hum yaʻ-la-moon.

43:87.text: Wa-la-ʹiñ- sa-ʹal-ta-hum- man kha-la-q̣a-hum la-ya-q̣oo-lun- nal-laa-hu fa-ʹan-naa yuʹ-fa-koon?

43:88.text: Wa-q̣ee-li-hee yaa-Rab-bi ʹin-na haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi q̣aw-mul- laa yuʹ-mi-noon!

43:89.text: Faṣ-faḥ ʻan-hum wa-q̣ul sa-laam! Fa-saw-fa yaʻ-la-moon!

44:3.text: ʹIn-naaa ʹañ-zal-naa-hu fee lay-la-tim- mu-baa-ra-ka-tin ʹin-naa kun-naa muñ-ẓi-reen.

44:5.text: ʹAm-ram- min ʻiñ-di-naa. ʹIn-naa kun-naa mur-si-leen―

44:6.text: Raḥ-ma-tam- mir- Rab-bik: ʹin-na-hoo Hu-was- Sa-mee-ʻul- ʻA-leem;

44:7.text: Rab-bis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi wa-maa bay-na-hu-maa, Iñ- kun-tum- moo-q̣i-neen.

44:8.text: Laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa Hu-wa yuḥ-yee wa-yu-meet:― Rab-bu-kum wa-Rab-bu ʹaa-baaa-ʹi-ku-mul- ʹaw-wa-leen.

44:10.text: Far-ta-q̣ib Yaw-ma taʹ-tis- sa-maaa-ʹu bi-DU-KHAA-NIM- mu-been,

44:12.text: Rab-ba-nak- shif ʻan-nal- ʻa-ẓaa-ba ʹin-naa Muʹ-mi-noon!

44:13.text: ʹAn-naa la-hu-muẓ- Ẓik-raa wa-q̣ad jaaa-ʹa-hum Ra-soo-lum- mu-been,―

44:14.text: S̤um-ma ta-wal-law ʻan-hu wa-q̣aa-loo mu-ʻal-la-mum- maj-noon.

44:15.text: ʹIn-naa kaa-shi-ful- ʻa-ẓaa-bi q̣a-lee-lan ʹin-na-kum ʻaaa-ʹi-doon.

44:16.text: Yaw-ma nab-ṭi-shul- baṭ-sha-tal- kub-raa: ʹin-naa muñ-ta-q̣i-moon!

44:17.text: Wa-la-q̣ad fa-tan-naa q̣ab-la-hum q̣aw-ma Fir-ʻaw-na wa-jaaa-ʹa-hum Ra-soo-luñ- Ka-reem,

44:18.text: ʹAn ʹad-dooo ʹi-lay-ya ʻi-baa-dal- laah: ʹin-nee la-kum Ra-soo-lun ʹa-meen;

44:19.text: Wa-ʹal- laa taʻ-loo ʻa-lal- laah: ʹin-neee ʹaa-tee-kum̃ bi-sul-ṭaa-nim- mu-been.

44:20.text: Wa-ʹin-nee ʻuẓ-tu bi-Rab-bee wa-Rab-bi-kum ʹañ- tar-ju-moon.

44:22.text: Fa-da-ʻaa Rab-ba-hooo ʹan-na haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi q̣aw-mum- muj-ri-moon.

44:24.text: Wat-ru-kil- baḥ-ra rah-waa: ʹin-na-hum juñ-dum- mug̣-ra-q̣oon.

44:29.text: Fa-maa ba-kat ʻa-lay-hi-mus- sa-maaa-ʹu wal-ʹar-ḍu wa-maa kaa-noo muñ-z̤̣a-reen.

44:30.text: Wa-la-q̣ad naj-jay-naa Ba-neee- ʹIs-raaa-ʹee-la mi-nal- ʻa-ẓaa-bil- mu-heen.

44:31.text: Miñ- Fir-ʻawn: ʹin-na-hoo kaa-na ʻaa-li-yam- mi-nal- mus-ri-feen.

44:32.text: Wa-la-q̣a-dikh- tar-naa-hum ʻa-laa ʻil-min ʻa-lal- ʻaa-la-meen,

44:33.text: Waʹaa-tay-naa-hum- mi-nal- ʹAa-yaa-ti maa- fee-hi ba-laaa-ʹum- mu-been.

44:35.text: ʹIn hi-ya ʹil-laa maw-ta-tu-nal- ʹoo-laa wa-maa naḥ-nu bi-muñ-sha-reen.

44:37.text: ʹA-hum khay-run ʹam q̣aw-mu Tub-ba-ʻiñw- wal-la-ẓee-na miñ q̣ab-li-him? ʹAh-lak-naa-hum ʹin-na-hum kaa-noo muj-ri-meen.

44:38.text: Wa-maa kha-laq̣-nas- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa wa-maa bay-na-hu-maa laa-ʻi-been.

44:39.text: Maa- kha-laq̣-naa-hu-maaa ʹil-laa bil-ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-laa-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ra-hum laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

44:41.text: Yaw-ma laa- yug̣-nee maw-lan ʻam- maw-lañ shay-ʹañw- wa-laa- hum yuñ-ṣa-roon,

44:42.text: ʹIl-laa mar- ra-ḥi-mal- laah: ʹin-na-hoo Hu-wal- ʻA-zee-zur- Ra-ḥeem.

44:48.text: S̤um-ma ṣub-boo faw-q̣a raʹ-si-hee min ʻA-ẓaa-bil- Ḥa-meem.

44:50.text: ʹIn-na haa-ẓaa maa- kuñ-tum̃- bi-hee tam-ta-roon!

44:56.text: Laa- ya-ẓoo-q̣oo-na fee-hal- Maw-ta ʹil-lal- maw-ta-tal- ʹoo-laa; wa-wa-q̣aa-hum ʻa-ẓaa-bal- Ja-ḥeem,―

44:57.text: Faḍ-lam- mir- Rab-bik! Ẓaa-li-ka hu-wal- faw-zul- ʻa-z̤̣eem!

45:2.text: Tañ-zee-lul- Ki-taa-bi mi-nal- laa-hil- ʻA-zee-zil- Ḥa-keem.

45:3.text: ʹIn-na fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi la-ʹAa-yaa-til- lil-Muʹ-mi-neen.

45:4.text: Wa-fee khal-q̣i-kum wa-maa ya-bus̤-s̤u miñ daaab-ba-tin ʹAa-yaa-tul- li-q̣aw-miñy- yoo-q̣i-noon.

45:5.text: Wakh-ti-laa-fil- Lay-li wan-Na-haa-ri wa-maaa ʹañ-za-lal- laa-hu mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi mir- Riz-q̣iñ fa-ʹaḥ-yaa bi-hil- ʹar-ḍa baʻ-da maw-ti-haa wa-taṣ-ree-fir- ri-yaa-ḥi ʹAa-yaa-tul- li-q̣aw-miñy- yaʻ-q̣i-loon.

45:6.text: Til-ka ʹAa-yaa-tul- laa-hi nat-loo-haa ʻa-lay-ka bil-ḥaq̣q̣: fa-bi-ʹay-yi ḥa-dee-s̤im- baʻ-dal- laa-hi wa-ʹAa-yaa-ti-hee yuʹ-mi-noon?

45:8.text: yas-ma-ʻu ʹAa-yaa-til- laa-hi tut-laa ʻa-lay-hi s̤um-ma yu-ṣir-ru mus-tak-bi-rañ- ka-ʹal- lam yas-maʻ-haa: fa-bash-shir-hu bi-ʻA-ẓaa-bin ʹa-leem!

45:9.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaaa ʻa-li-ma min ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa shay-ʹa-nit- ta-kha-ẓa-haa hu-zu-waa: ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka la-hum ʻA-ẓaa-bum- mu-heen.

45:10.text: Miñw- Wa-raaa-ʹi-him Ja-han-nam: wa-laa yug̣-nee ʻan-hum- maa ka-sa-boo shay-ʹañw- wa-laa- mat- ta-kha-ẓoo miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi ʹaw-li-yaaaʹ: wa-la-hum ʻA-ẓaa-bun ʻa-z̤̣eem.

45:11.text: Haa-ẓaa Hu-daa: wal-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti- Rab-bi-him la-hum ʻA-ẓaa-bum- mir- rij-zin ʹa-leem.

45:12.text: ʹAl-laa-hul- la-ẓee sakh-kha-ra la-ku-mul- baḥ-ra li-taj-ri-yal- ful-ku fee-hi bi-ʹam-ri-hee wa-li-tab-ta-g̣oo miñ- Faḍ-li-hee wa-la-ʻal-la-kum tash-ku-roon.

45:13.text: Wa-sakh-kha-ra la-kum- maa fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-maa fil- ʹar-ḍi ja-mee-ʻam- minh: ʹin-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʹAa-yaa-til- li-q̣aw-miñy- ya-ta-fak-ka-roon.

45:14.text: Q̣ul lil-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo yag̣-fi-roo lil-la-ẓee-na laa- yar-joo-na ʹAy-yaa-mal- laa-hi li-yaj-zi-ya Q̣aw-mam- bi-maa kaa-noo yak-si-boon.

45:15.text: Man ʻa-mi-la ṣaa-li-ḥañ- fa-li-naf-sih; wa-man ʹa-saaa-ʹa fa-ʻa-lay-haa. S̤um-ma ʹi-laa Rab-bi-kum tur-ja-ʻoon.

45:16.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹaa-tay-naa Ba-neee- ʹIs-raaa-ʹee-lal- Ki-taa-ba wal-Ḥuk-ma wan-Nu-buw-wa- wa-ra-zaq̣-naa-hum- mi-naṭ- Ṭay-yi-baa-ti wa-faḍ-ḍal-naa-hum ʻa-lal- ʻaa-la-meen.

45:17.text: Wa-ʹaa-tay-naa-hum̃ Bay-yi-naa-tim- mi-nal- ʹamr: fa-makh- ta-la-fooo ʹil-laa mim- baʻ-di maa- jaaa-ʹa-hu-mul- ʻil-mu bag̣-yam- bay-na-hum. ʹIn-na Rab-ba-ka yaq̣-ḍee bay-na-hum Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti fee-maa kaa-noo fee-hi yakh-ta-li-foon.

45:18.text: S̤um-ma ja-ʻal-naa-ka ʻa-laa Sha-ree-ʻa-tim- mi-nal- ʹam-ri fat-ta-biʻ-haa wa-laa tat-ta-biʻ ʹah-waaa- ʹal-la-ẓee-na laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

45:19.text: ʹIn-na-hum lañy- yug̣-noo ʹañ-ka mi-nal- laa-hi shay-ʹaa: wa-ʹin-naz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-mee-na baʻ-ḍu-hum ʹaw-li-yaaa-ʹu baʻḍ: wal-laa-hu Wa-liy-yul- Mut-ta-q̣een.

45:20.text: Haa-ẓaa Ba-ṣaaa-ʹi-ru lin-naa-si wa-Hu-dañw- wa-Raḥ-ma-tul- li-q̣aw-miñy- yoo-q̣i-noon.

45:21.text: ʹAm ḥa-si-bal- la-ẓee-naj- ta-ra-ḥus- say-yi-ʹaa-ti ʹan- naj-ʻa-la-hum kal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti sa-waaa-ʹam- maḥ-yaa-hum wa-ma-maa-tu-hum? Saaa-ʹa maa- yaḥ-ku-moon.

45:22.text: Wa-kha-la-q̣al- laa-hus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa bil-ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-li-tuj-zaa kul-lu naf-sim- bi-maa ka-sa-bat wa-hum laa- yuz̤̣-la-moon.

45:23.text: ʹA-fa-ra-ʹay-ta ma-nit- ta-kha-ẓa ʹi-laa-ha-hoo ha-waa-hu wa-ʹa-ḍal-la-hul- laa-hu ʻa-laa ʻil-miñw- Wa-kha-ta-ma ʻa-laa sam-ʻi-hee wa-q̣al-bi-hee wa-ja-ʻa-la ʻa-laa ba-ṣa-ri-hee g̣i-shaa-wah. Fa-mañy- yah-dee-hi mim- baʻ-dil- laah? ʹA-fa-laa ta-ẓak-ka-roon?

45:24.text: Wa-q̣aa-loo maa- hi-ya ʹil-laa ḥa-yaa-tu-nad- dun-yaa na-moo-tu wa-naḥ-yaa wa-maa yuh-li-ku-naaa ʹil-lad- Dahr. Wa-maa la-hum̃- bi-ẓaa-li-ka min- ʻilm: ʹin hum ʹil-laa ya-z̤̣un-noon.

45:25.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa tut-laa ʻa-lay-him ʹAa-yaa-tu-naa Bay-yi-naa-tim- maa kaa-na ḥuj-ja-tu-hum ʹil-laaa ʹañ q̣aa-luʹ- too bi-ʹaa-baaa-ʹi-naaa ʹiñ- kuñ-tum ṣaa-di-q̣een!

45:26.text: Q̣u-lil- laa-hu yaḥ-yee-kum s̤um-ma yu-mee-tu-kum s̤um-ma yaj-ma-ʻu-kum ʹi-laa Yaw-mil- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti laa- ray-ba fee-hi wa-laa-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ran- naa-si laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

45:27.text: Wa-lil-laa-hi Mul-kus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ. Wa-Yaw-ma ta-q̣oo-mus- Saa-ʻa-tu Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓiñy- yakh-sa-rul- mub-ṭi-loon!

45:28.text: Wa-ta-raa kul-la ʹum-ma-tiñ- JAA-S̤I-YAH: Kul-lu ʹum-ma-tiñ- tud-ʻaaa ʹi-laa Ki-taa-bi-haa; ʹal-Yaw-ma tuj-zaw-na maa- kuñ-tum taʻ-ma-loon!

45:29.text: Haa-ẓaa Ki-taa-bu-naa yañ-ṭi-q̣u ʻa-lay-kum̃- bil-ḥaq̣q̣; ʹin-naa kun-naa nas-tañ-si-khu maa- kuñ-tum taʻ-ma-loon.

45:30.text: Fa-ʹam-mal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti fa-yud-khi-lu-hum Rab-bu-hum fee Raḥ-ma-tih. Ẓaa-li-ka hu-wal- Faw-zul- mu-been.

45:31.text: Wa-ʹam-mal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo: ʹa-fa-lam ta-kun ʹAa-yaa-tee tut-laa ʻa-lay-kum fas-tak-bar-tum wa-kuñ-tum q̣aw-mam- muj-ri-meen?

45:32.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa q̣ee-la ʹin-na waʻ-dal-laa-hi ḥaq̣-q̣uñw- was- Saa-ʻa-tu laa- ray-ba fee-haa q̣ul-tum- maa nad-ree mas- Saa-ʻa-tu ʹin- na-z̤̣un-nu ʹil-laa z̤̣an-nañw- wa-maa- naḥ-nu bi-mus-tay-q̣i-neen.

45:33.text: Wa-ba-daa la-hum say-yi-ʹaa-tu maa- ʻa-mi-loo wa-ḥaa-q̣a bi-him- maa kaa-noo bi-hee yas-tah-zi-ʹoon!

45:34.text: Wa-q̣ee-lal- Yaw-ma nañ-saa-kum ka-maa na-see-tum Li-q̣aaa-ʹa Yaw-mi-kum haa-ẓaa wa-maʹ-waa-ku-mun- Naa-ru wa-maa la-kum- min- naa-ṣi-reen!

45:35.text: Ẓaa-li-kum̃- bi-ʹan-na-ku-mut- ta-khaẓ-tum ʹAa-yaa-til- laa-hi hu-zu-wañw- wa-g̣ar-rat-ku-mul- ḥa-yaa-tud- dun-yaa: fal-Yaw-ma laa- yukh-ra-joo-na min-haa wa-laa hum yus-taʻ-ta-boon.

45:36.text: Fa-lil-laa-hil- Ḥam-du Rab-bis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-Rab-bil- ʹar-ḍi Rab-bil- ʻAa-la-meen!

45:37.text: Wa-la-hul- Kib-ri-yaaa-ʹu fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ: wa-Hu-wal- ʻA-zee-zul- Ḥa-keem!

46:2.text: Tañ-zee-lul- Ki-taa-bi mi-nal- laa-hil- ʻA-zee-zil- Ḥa-keem.

46:3.text: Maa- kha-laq̣-nas- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa wa-maa bay-na-hu-maaa ʹil-laa bil-ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-ʹa-ja-lim- mu-sam-maa: wal-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo ʻam-maaa ʹuñ-ẓi-roo muʻ-ri-ḍoon.

46:4.text: Q̣ul ʹa-ra-ʹay-tum- maa tad-ʻoo-na miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi ʹa-roo-nee maa-ẓaa kha-la-q̣oo mi-nal- ʹar-ḍi ʹam la-hum shir-kuñ- fis- sa-maa-waat? ʹEe-too-nee bi-Ki-taa-bim- miñ- q̣ab-li haa-ẓaaa ʹaw ʹa-s̤aa-ra-tim- min ʻil-min ʹiñ- kuñ-tum ṣaa-di-q̣een!

46:5.text: Wa-man ʹa-ḍal-lu mim-mañy- yad-ʻoo miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi mal- laa yas-ta-jee-bu la-hooo ʹi-laa Yaw-mil- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti wa-hum ʻañ- du-ʻaaa-ʹi-him g̣aa-fi-loon?

46:6.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa ḥu-shi-ran- naa-su kaa-noo la-hum ʹaʻ-daaa-ʹañw- Wa-kaa-noo bi-ʻi-baa-da-ti-him kaa-fi-reen!

46:7.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa tut-laa ʻa-lay-him ʹAa-yaa-tu-naa Bay-yi-naa-tiñ q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo lil-Ḥaq̣-q̣i lam-maa jaaa-ʹa-hum haa-ẓaa siḥ-rum- mu-been!

46:8.text: ʹAm ya-q̣oo-loo-naf- ta-raah? Q̣ul ʹi-nif- ta-ray-tu-hoo fa-laa tam-li-koo-na lee mi-nal- laa-hi shay-ʹaa. Hu-wa ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-maa tu-fee-ḍoo-na feeh! Ka-faa bi-hee Sha-hee-dam- bay-nee wa-bay-na-kum! Wa-Hu-wal- G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

46:9.text: Q̣ul maa- kuñ-tu bid-ʻam- mi-nar- ru-su-li wa-maaa ʹad-ree maa- yuf-ʻa-lu bee wa-laa bi-kum. ʹIn ʹat-ta-bi-ʻu ʹil-laa maa- yoo-ḥaaa ʹi-lay-ya wa-maaa ʹa-na ʹil-laa Na-ẓee-rum- mu-been.

46:10.text: Q̣ul ʹa-ra-ay-tum ʹiñ- kaa-na min ʻiñ-dil- laa-hi wa-ka-far-tum̃- bi-hee wa-sha-hi-da shaa-hi-dum- mim- Ba-neee ʹIs-raaa-ʹee-la ʻa-laa mis̤-li-hee fa-ʹaa-ma-na was-tak-bar-tum? ʹIn-nal- laa-ha laa- yah-dil- q̣aw-maz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen.

46:11.text: Wa-q̣aa-lal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo lil-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo law kaa-na khay-ram- maa sa-ba-q̣oo-naaa ʹi-layh! Wa-ʹiẓ lam yah-ta-doo bi-hee fa-sa-ya-q̣oo-loo-na haa-ẓaaa ʹif-kuñ- q̣a-deem!

46:12.text: Wa-miñ- q̣ab-li-hee Ki-taa-bu Moo-saaa ʹi-maa-mañw- Wa-raḥ-mah: wa-haa-ẓaa Ki-taa-bum- mu-ṣad-di-q̣ul- li-saa-nan ʻA-ra-biy-yal- li-yuñ-ẓi-ral- la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-moo wa-Bush-raa lil-Muḥ-si-neen.

46:13.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na q̣aa-loo Rab-bu-nal- laa-hu s̤um-mas- ta-q̣aa-moo fa-laa khaw-fun ʻa-lay-him wa-laa hum yaḥ-za-noon.

46:14.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bul- Jan-na-ti khaa-li-dee-na fee-haa: ja-zaaa-ʹam bi-maa kaa-noo yaʻ-ma-loon.

46:15.text: Wa-waṣ-ṣay-nal- ʹiñ-saa-na bi-waa-li-day-hi ʹiḥ-saa-naa: ḥa-ma-lat-hu ʹum-mu-hoo kur-hañw- wa-wa-ḍa-ʻat-hu kur-haa. Wa-ḥam-lu-hoo wa-fi-ṣaa-lu-hoo s̤a-laa-s̤oo-na shah-raa. Ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa ba-la-g̣a ʹa-shud-da-hoo wa-ba-la-g̣a ʹar-ba-ʻee-na sa-na-tañ- q̣aa-la Rab-bi ʹaw-ziʻ-neee ʹan ʹash-ku-ra niʻ-ma-ta-kal- la-teee ʹan-ʻam-ta ʻa-lay-ya wa-ʻa-laa waa-li-day-ya wa-ʹan ʹaʻ-ma-la ṣaa-li-ḥañ- tar-ḍaa-hu wa-ʹaṣ-liḥ lee fee ẓur-riy-ya-tee. ʹIn-nee tub-tu ʹi-lay-ka wa-ʹin-nee mi-nal- Mus-li-meen.
