46:16.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-kal- la-ẓee-na na-ta-q̣ab-ba-lu ʻan-hum ʹaḥ-sa-na maa- ʻa-mi-loo wa-na-ta-jaa-wa-zu ʻañ- say-yi-ʹaa-ti-him feee ʹaṣ-ḥaa-bil- Jan-nah: waʻ-daṣ- ṣid-q̣il- la-ẓee kaa-noo yoo-ʻa-doon.

46:17.text: Wal-la-ẓee q̣aa-la li-waa-li-day-hi ʹuf-fil- la-ku-maaa ʹa-ta-ʻi-daa-ni-neee ʹan ʹukh-ra-ja wa-q̣ad kha-la-til- q̣u-roo-nu miñ- q̣ab-lee? Wa-hu-maa yas-ta-g̣ee-s̤aa-nil- laa-ha way-la-ka ʹaa-min! ʹIn-na waʻ-dal- laa-hi ḥaq̣q̣. Fa-ya-q̣oo-lu maa- haa-ẓaaa ʹil-laaa ʹa-saa-ṭee-rul- ʹaw-wa-leen!

46:18.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-kal- la-ẓee-na ḥaq̣-q̣a ʻa-lay-hi-mul- Q̣aw-lu feee ʹu-ma-miñ- q̣ad kha-lat miñ- q̣ab-li-him- mi-nal- jin-ni wal-ʹiñs: ʹin-na-hum kaa-noo khaa-si-reen.

46:19.text: Wa-li-kul-liñ- da-ra-jaa-tum- mim-maa ʻa-mi-loo, wa-li-yu-waf-fi-ya-hum ʹaʻ-maa-la-hum Wa-hum laa- yuz̤̣-la-moon.

46:20.text: Wa-Yaw-ma yuʻ-ra-ḍul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo ʻa-lan- Naar. ʹAẓ-hab-tum ṭay-yi-baa-ti-kum fee ḥa-yaa-ti-ku-mud- dun-yaa was-tam-taʻ-tum̃- bi-haa: fal-Yaw-ma tuj-zaw-na ʻa-ẓaa-bal- hoo-ni bi-maa kuñ-tum tas-tak-bi-roo-na fil- ʹar-ḍi bi-g̣ay-ril- ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-bi-maa kuñ-tum taf-su-q̣oon.

46:21.text: Waẓ-kur ʹA-khaa ʻAad: ʹIẓ ʹañ-ẓa-ra q̣aw-ma-hoo bil-ʹAḤ-Q̣AA-FI wa-q̣ad kha-la-tin- nu-ẓu-ru mim- bay-ni ya-day-hi wa-min khal-fi-heee ʹal-laa taʻ-bu-dooo ʹil-lal- laah: ʹin-neee ʹa-khaa-fu ʻa-lay-kum ʻa-ẓaa-ba Yaw-min ʻa-z̤̣eem.

46:22.text: Q̣aa-looo ʹa-jiʹ-ta-naa li-taʹ-fi-ka-naa ʻan ʹaa-li-ha-ti-naa? Faʹ-ti-naa bi-maa ta-ʻi-du-naaa ʹiñ- kuñ-ta mi-naṣ- ṣaa-di-q̣een!

46:23.text: Q̣aa-la ʹin-na-mal- ʻil-mu ʻiñ-dal- laah: wa-ʹu-bal-li-g̣u-kum- maaa ʹur-sil-tu bi-hee wa-laa-kin-neee ʹa-raa-kum q̣aw-mañ- taj-ha-loon!

46:24.text: fa-lam-maa ra-ʹaw-hu ʻaa-ri-ḍam- mus-taq̣-bi-la ʹaw-di-ya-ti-him q̣aa-loo haa-ẓaa ʻaa-ri-ḍum- mum-ṭi-ru-naa! Bal hu-wa mas- taʻ-jal-tum̃- bih! ree-ḥuñ fee-haa ʻA-ẓaa-bun ʹa-leem!

46:25.text: Tu-dam-mi-ru kul-la shay-ʹim- bi-ʹam-ri Rab-bi-haa fa-ʹaṣ-ba-ḥoo laa- yu-raaa ʹil-laa ma-saa-ki-nu-hum! Ka-ẓaa-li-ka naj-zil- q̣aw-mal- muj-ri-meen!

46:26.text: Wa-la-q̣ad mak-kan-naa-hum fee-maaa ʹim- mak-kan-naa-kum fee-hi wa-ja-ʻal-naa la-hum sam-ʻañw- wa-ʹab-ṣaa-rañw- waʹaf-ʹi-dah: fa-maaa ʹag̣-naa ʻan-hum sam-ʻu-hum wa-laaa ʹab-ṣaa-ru-hum wa-laaa ʹaf-ʹi-da-tu-hum- miñ- shay-ʹin ʹiẓ kaa-noo yaj-ḥa-doo-na bi-ʹAa-yaa-til- laa-hi wa-ḥaa-q̣a bi-him- maa kaa-noo bi-hee yas-tah-zi-ʹoon!

46:27.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹah-lak-naa maa- ḥaw-la-kum- mi-nal- q̣u-raa wa-ṣar-raf-nal- ʹAa-yaa-ti la-ʻal-la-hum yar-ji-ʻoon.

46:28.text: Fa-law-laa- na-ṣa-ra-hu-mul- la-ẓee-nat- ta-kha-ẓoo miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi q̣ur-baa-nan ʹaa-li-hah? Bal ḍal-loo ʻan-hum: wa-ẓaa-li-ka ʹif-ku-hum wa-maa kaa-noo yaf-ta-roon.

46:29.text: Wa-ʹiẓ ṣa-raf-naaa ʹi-lay-ka na-fa-ram- mi-nal- Jin-ni yas-ta-mi-ʻoo-nal- Q̣ur-ʹaan. Fa-lam-maa ḥa-ḍa-roo-hu q̣aa-looo ʹañ-ṣi-too! Fa-lam-maa q̣u-ḍi-ya wal-law ʹi-laa q̣aw-mi-him- muñ-ẓi-reen.

46:30.text: Q̣aa-loo yaa-q̣aw-ma-naaa ʹin-naa sa-miʻ-naa Ki-taa-ban ʹuñ-zi-la mim- baʻ-di Moo-saa mu-ṣad-di-q̣al- li-maa bay-na ya-day-hi yah-deee ʹi-lal- Ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-ʹi-laa Ṭa-ree-q̣im- Mus-ta-q̣eem.

46:31.text: Yaa-q̣aw-ma-naaa ʹa-jee-boo Daa-ʻi-yal- laa-hi wa-ʹaa-mi-noo bi-hee yag̣-fir la-kum- miñ- ẓu-noo-bi-kum wa-yu-jir-kum- min ʻA-ẓaa-bin ʹa-leem.

46:32.text: Wa-mal- laa yu-jib Daa-ʻi-yal- laa-hi fa-lay-sa bi-muʻ-ji-ziñ- fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-lay-sa la-hoo miñ- doo-ni-heee ʹaw-li-yaaaʹ: ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka fee ḍa-laa-lim- mu-been.

46:33.text: ʹA-wa-lam ya-raw ʹan-nal- laa-hal- la-ẓee kha-la-q̣as- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa wa-lam yaʻ-ya bi-khal-q̣i-hin-na bi-q̣aa-di-rin ʻa-laaa ʹañy- yuḥ-yi-yal- maw-taa? Ba-laaa ʹin-na-hoo ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Q̣a-deer.

46:34.text: Wa-Yaw-ma yuʻ-ra-ḍul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo ʻa-lan- Naar; ʹa-lay-sa haa-ẓaa bil-Ḥaq̣q̣? Q̣aa-loo ba-laa wa-Rab-bi-naa! Q̣aa-la fa-ẓoo-q̣ul- ʻa-ẓaa-ba bi-maa kuñ-tum tak-fu-roon!

46:35.text: Faṣ-bir ka-maa ṣa-ba-ra ʹu-lul- ʻaz-mi mi-nar- ru-su-li wa-laa tas-taʻ-jil- la-hum. Ka-ʹan-na-hum Yaw-ma ya-raw-na maa- yoo-ʻa-doo-na lam yal-ba-s̤ooo ʹil-laa saa-ʻa-tam- min- na-haar. Ba-laa-g̣uñ fa-hal yuh-la-ku ʹil-lal- q̣aw-mul- faa-si-q̣oon.

47:1.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo wa-ṣad-doo ʻañ- Sa-bee-lil- laa-hi ʹa-ḍal-la ʹaʻ-maa-la-hum.

47:2.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti wa-ʹaa-ma-noo bi-maa nuz-zi-la ʻa-laa MU-ḤAM-MA-DIÑW- Wa-hu-wal- Ḥaq̣-q̣u mir- Rab-bi-him kaf-fa-ra ʻan-hum say-yi-ʹaa-ti-him wa-ʹaṣ-la-ḥa baa-la-hum.

47:3.text: Ẓaa-li-ka bi-ʹan-nal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-rut- ta-ba-ʻul- baa-ṭi-la wa-ʹan-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nut- ta-ba-ʻul- Ḥaq̣-q̣a mir- Rab-bi-him: ka-ẓaa-li-ka yaḍ-ri-bul- laa-hu lin-naa-si ʹam-s̤aa-la-hum.

47:4.text: Fa-ʹi-ẓaa la-q̣ee-tu-mul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo fa-ḍar-bar- ri-q̣aab; ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaaa ʹas̤-khañ-tu-moo-hum fa-shud-dul- wa-s̤aa-q̣a fa-ʹim-maa man-nam- baʻ-du wa-ʹim-maa fi-daaa-ʹan ḥat-taa ta-ḍa-ʻal- ḥar-bu ʹaw-zaa-ra-haa. Ẓaa-li-ka wa-law ya-shaaa-ʹul- laa-hu lañ-ta-ṣa-ra min-hum wa-laa-kil- li-yab-lu-wa baʻ-ḍa-kum̃- bi-baʻḍ. Wal-la-ẓee-na q̣u-ti-loo fee Sa-bee-lil- laa-hi fa-lañy- yu-ḍil-la ʹaʻ-maa-la-hum.

47:7.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nooo ʹiñ- tañ-ṣu-rul- laa-ha yañ-ṣur-kum wa-yu-s̤ab-bit ʹaq̣-daa-ma-kum.

47:8.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo fa-taʻ-sal- la-hum wa-ʹa-ḍal-la ʹaʻ-maa-la-hum.

47:9.text: Ẓaa-li-ka bi-ʹan-na-hum ka-ri-hoo maaa ʹañ-za-lal- laa-hu fa-ʹaḥ-ba-ṭa ʹaʻ-maa-la-hum.

47:10.text: ʹA-fa-lam ya-see-roo fil- ʹar-ḍi fa-yañ-z̤̣u-roo kay-fa kaa-na ʻAa-q̣i-ba-tul- la-ẓee-na miñ- q̣ab-li-him? Dam-ma-ral- laa-hu ʻa-lay-him, wa-lil-kaa-fi-ree-na ʹam-s̤aa-lu-haa.

47:11.text: Ẓaa-li-ka bi-ʹan-nal- laa-ha Maw-lal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo waʹan-nal- kaa-fi-ree-na laa- maw-laa la-hum.

47:12.text: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha yud-khi-lul- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti Jan-naa-tiñ- taj-ree miñ- taḥ-ti-hal- ʹan-haar; wal-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo ya-ta-mat-ta-ʻoo-na wa-yaʹ-ku-loo-na ka-maa taʹ-ku-lul- ʹan-ʻaa-mu wan-Naa-ru mas̤-wal- la-hum.

47:13.text: Wa-ka-ʹay-yim- miñ- q̣ar-ya-tin hi-ya ʹa-shad-du q̣uw-wa-tam- miñ- q̣ar-ya-ti-kal- la-teee ʹakh-ra-jat-ka: ʹAh-lak-naa-hum fa-laa naa-ṣi-ra la-hum.

47:14.text: ʹA-fa-mañ- kaa-na ʻa-laa Bay-yi-na-tim- mir- Rab-bi-hee ka-mañ zuy-yi-na la-hoo sooo-ʹu ʻa-ma-li-hee wat-ta-ba-ʻooo ʹah-waaa-ʹa-hum?

47:15.text: Ma-s̤a-lul- Jan-na-til- la-tee wu-ʻi-dal- Mut-ta-q̣oon: fee-haaa ʹan-haa-rum- mim- maaa-ʹin g̣ay-ri ʹaa-sin; wa-ʹan-haa-rum- mil- la-ba-nil- lam ya-ta-g̣ay-yar ṭaʻ-muh; wa-ʹan-haa-rum- min kham-ril- laẓ-ẓa-til- lish-shaa-ri-been; wa-ʹan-haa-rum- min ʻa-sa-lim- mu-ṣaf-faa. Wa-la-hum fee-haa miñ- kul-lis̤- s̤a-ma-raa-ti wa-mag̣-fi-ra-tum- mir- Rab-bi-him: Ka-man hu-wa khaa-li-duñ- fin- Naa-ri wa-su-q̣oo maaa-ʹan ḥa-mee-mañ- fa-q̣aṭ-ṭa-ʹa ʹam-ʻaaa-ʹa-hum?

47:16.text: Wa-min-hum- mañy- yas-ta-mi-ʻu ʹi-lay-ka ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa kha-ra-joo min ʻiñ-di-ka q̣aa-loo lil-la-ẓee-na ʹoo-tul- ʻIl-ma maa-ẓaa q̣aa-la ʹaa-ni-faa? ʹU-laaa-ʹi-kal- la-ẓee-na ṭa-ba-ʻal- laa-hu ʻa-laa q̣u-loo-bi-him wat-ta-ba-ʻooo ʹah-waaa-ʹa-hum.

47:17.text: Wal-la-ẓee-nah- ta-daw zaa-da-hum hu-dañw- wa-ʹa-taa-hum taq̣-waa-hum.

47:18.text: Fa-hal yañ-z̤̣u-roo-na ʹil-las- Saa-ʻa-ta ʹañ taʹ-ti-ya-hum̃- bag̣-tah? Fa-q̣ad jaaa-ʹa ʹash-raa-ṭu-haa. Fa-ʹan-naa la-hum ʹi-ẓaa jaaa-ʹat-hum ẓik-raa-hum?

47:19.text: Faʻ-lam ʹan-na-hoo Laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-lal- laa-hu was-tag̣-fir li-ẓam-bi-ka wa-lil-Muʹ-mi-nee-na wal-Muʹ-mi-naat: wal-laa-hu yaʻ-la-mu mu-ta-q̣al-la-ba-kum wa-mas̤-waa-kum.

47:20.text: Wa-ya-q̣oo-lul- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo Law-laa- nuz-zi-lat Soo-rah? Fa-ʹi-ẓaaa ʹuñ-zi-lat Soo-ra-tum- Muḥ-ka-ma-tuñw- Wa-ẓu-ki-ra fee-hal- q̣i-taa-lu ra-ʹay-tal- la-ẓee-na fee q̣u-loo-bi-him- ma-ra-ḍuñy- yañ-z̤̣u-roo-na ʹi-lay-ka na-z̤̣a-ral- mag̣-shiy-yi ʻa-lay-hi mi-nal- mawt. Fa-ʹaw-laa la-hum!

47:21.text: Ṭaa-ʻa-tuñw- Wa-q̣aw-lum- maʻ-roof. Fa-ʹi-ẓaa ʻa-za-mal- ʹamr. Fa-law ṣa-da-q̣ul- laa-ha la-kaa-na khay-ral- la-hum.

47:22.text: Fa-hal ʻa-say-tum ʹiñ- ta-wal-lay-tum ʹañ- tuf-si-doo fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-tu-q̣aṭ-ṭi-ʻooo ʹar-ḥaa-ma-kum?

47:23.text: ʹU-laaa-ʹi-kal- la-ẓee-na la-ʻa-na-hu-mul- laa-hu fa-ʹa-ṣam-ma-hum wa-ʹaʻ-maaa ʹab-ṣaa-ra-hum.

47:24.text: ʹA-fa-laa ya-ta-dab-ba-roo-nal- Q̣ur-ʹaa-na ʹam ʻa-laa q̣u-loo-bin ʹaq̣-faa-lu-haa?

47:25.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-nar- tad-doo ʻa-laaa ʹad-baa-ri-him- mim- baʻ-di maa- ta-bay-ya-na la-hu-mul- Hu-dash- Shay-ṭaa-nu saw-wa-la la-hum, wa-ʹam-laa la-hum.

47:26.text: Ẓaa-li-ka bi-ʹan-na-hum q̣aa-loo lil-la-ẓee-na ka-ri-hoo maa- naz-za-lal- laa-hu sa-nu-ṭee-ʻu-kum fee baʻ-ḍil- ʹamr; wal-laa-hu yaʻ-la-mu ʹis-raa-ra-hum.

47:27.text: Fa-kay-fa ʹi-zaa ta-waf-fat-hu-mul- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tu yaḍ-ri-boo-na wu-joo-ha-hum wa-ʹad-baa-ra-hum?

47:28.text: Ẓaa-li-ka bi-ʹan-na-hu-mut- ta-ba-ʻoo maaa ʹas-kha-ṭal- laa-ha wa-ka-ri-hoo riḍ-waa-na-hoo fa-ʹaḥ-ba-ṭa ʹaʻ-maa-la-hum.

47:29.text: ʹAm ḥa-si-bal- la-ẓee-na fee q̣u-loo-bi-him- ma-ra-ḍun ʹal- lañy- yukh-ri-jal- laa-hu ʹaḍ-g̣aa-na-hum?

47:30.text: Wa-law na-shaaa-ʹu la-ʹa-ray-naa-ka-hum fa-la-ʻa-raf-ta-hum̃- bi-see-maa-hum: wa-la-taʻ-ri-fan-na-hum fee laḥ-nil- q̣awl! Wal-laa-hu yaʻ-la-mu ʹaʻ-maa-la-kum.

47:31.text: Wa-la-nab-lu-wan-na-kum ḥat-taa naʻ-la-mal- mu-jaa-hi-dee-na miñ-kum waṣ-ṣaa-bi-ree-na wa-nab-lu-wa ʹakh-baa-ra-kum.

47:32.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo wa-ṣad-doo ʻañ- Sa-bee-lil- laa-hi wa-shaaaq̣-q̣ur- Ra-soo-la mim- baʻ-di maa- ta-bay-ya-na la-hu-mul- Hu-daa lañy- ya-ḍur-rul- laa-ha shay-ʹaa: wa-sa-yuḥ-bi-ṭu ʹaʻ-maa-la-hum.

47:33.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nooo ʹa-ṭee-ʻul- laa-ha wa-ʹa-ṭee-ʻur- Ra-soo-la wa-laa tub-ṭi-looo ʹaʻ-maa-la-kum!

47:34.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo wa-ṣad-doo ʻañ- Sa-bee-lil- laa-hi s̤um-ma maa-too wa-hum kuf-faa-ruñ- fa-lañy- yag̣-fi-ral- laa-hu la-hum.

47:35.text: Fa-laa ta-hi-noo wa-tad-ʻooo ʹi-las- sal-mi wa-ʹañ-tu-mul- ʹaʻ-law-na wal-laa-hu ma-ʻa-kum wa-lañy- ya-ti-ra-kum ʹaʻ-maa-la-kum.

47:36.text: ʹIn-na-mal- ḥa-yaa-tud- dun-yaa la-ʻi-buñw- wa-lahw: wa-ʹiñ- tuʹ-mi-noo wa-tat-ta-q̣oo yuʹ-ti-kum ʹu-joo-ra-kum wa-laa yas-ʹal-kum ʹam-waa-la-kum.

47:37.text: ʹIñy- yas-ʹal-ku-moo-haa fa-yuḥ-fi-kum tab-kha-loo wa-yukh-rij ʹaḍ-g̣aa-na-kum.

47:38.text: Haaa-ʹañ-tum haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi tud-ʻaw-na li-tuñ-fi-q̣oo fee Sa-bee-lil- laah: fa-miñ-kum- mañy- yab-khal- Wa-mañy- yab-khal fa-ʹin-na-maa yab-kha-lu ʻan- naf-sih. Wal-laa-hul- G̣a-niy-yu wa-ʹañ-tu-mul- Fu-q̣a-raaaʹ. Wa-ʹiñ- ta-ta-wal-law yas-tab-dil- q̣aw-man g̣ay-ra-kum s̤um-ma laa- ya-koo-nooo ʹam-s̤aa-la-kum!

48:2.text: Li-yag̣-fi-ra la-kal- laa-hu maa- ta-q̣ad-da-ma miñ- ẓam-bi-ka wa-maa ta-ʹakh-kha-ra wa-yu-tim-ma niʻ-ma-ta-hoo ʻa-lay-ka wa-yah-di-ya-ka Ṣi-raa-ṭam- Mus-ta-q̣ee-maa,

48:4.text: Hu-wal- la-ẓee ʹañ-za-las- Sa-kee-na-ta fee q̣u-loo-bil- Muʹ-mi-nee-na li-yaz-daa-dooo ʹee-maa-nam- ma-ʻa ʹee-maa-ni-him: wa-lil-laa-hi Ju-noo-dus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ; wa-kaa-nal- laa-hu ʻA-lee-man Ḥa-kee-maa,

48:5.text: Li-yud-khi-lal- Muʹ-mi-nee-na wal-Muʹ-mi-naa-ti Jan-naa-tiñ- taj-ree miñ- taḥ-ti-hal- ʹan-haa-ru khaa-li-dee-na fee-haa wa-yu-kaf-fi-ra ʻan-hum say-yi-ʹaa-ti-him;― wa-kaa-na ẓaa-li-ka ʻiñ-dal- laa-hi faw-zan ʻa-z̤̣ee-maa,―

48:6.text: Wa-yu-ʻaẓ-ẓi-bal- Mu-naa-fi-q̣ee-na wal-Mu-naa-fi-q̣aa-ti wal-Mush-ri-kee-na wal-Mush-ri-kaa-tiz̤̣- z̤̣aaan-nee-na bil-laa-hi z̤̣an-nas- sawʹ. ʻA-lay-him daaa-ʹi-ra-tus- sawʹ: wa-g̣a-ḍi-bal- laa-hu ʻa-lay-him wa-la-ʻa-na-hum wa-ʹa-ʻad-da la-hum Ja-han-nam; wa-saaa-ʹat ma-ṣee-raa.

48:7.text: Wa-lil-laa-hi Ju-noo-dus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ: wa-kaa-nal- laa-hu ʻA-zee-zan Ḥa-kee-maa.

48:9.text: Li-tuʹ-mi-noo bil-laa-hi wa-Ra-soo-li-hee wa-tu-ʹaz-zi-roo-hu wa-tu-waq̣-q̣i-rooh, wa-tu-sab-bi-ḥoo-hu buk-ra-tañw- wa-ʹa-ṣee-laa.

48:10.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na yu-baa-yi-ʻoo-na-ka ʹin-na-maa yu-baa-yi-ʻoo-nal- laah: Ya-dul- laa-hi faw-q̣a ʹay-dee-him: fa-man- na-ka-s̤a fa-ʹin-na-maa yañ-ku-s̤u ʻa-laa naf-sih; wa-man ʹaw-faa bi-maa ʻaa-ha-da ʻa-lay-hul- laa-ha fa-sa-yuʹ-tee-hi ʹaj-ran ʻa-z̤̣ee-maa.

48:11.text: Sa-ya-q̣oo-lu la-kal- mu-khal-la-foo-na mi-nal- ʹAʻ-raa-bi sha-g̣a-lat-naaa ʹam-waa-lu-naa wa-ʹah-loo-naa fas-tag̣-fir la-naa. Ya-q̣oo-loo-na bi-ʹal-si-na-ti-him- maa lay-sa fee q̣u-loo-bi-him. Q̣ul fa-mañy- yam-li-ku la-kum- mi-nal- laa-hi shay-ʹan ʹin ʹa-raa-da bi-kum ḍar-ran ʹaw ʹa-raa-da bi-kum naf-ʻaa? Bal kaa-nal- laa-hu bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na kha-bee-raa.

48:12.text: Bal z̤̣a-nañ-tum ʹal- lañy- yañ-q̣a-li-bar- Ra-soo-lu wal-Muʹ-mi-noo-na ʹi-laaa ʹah-lee-him ʹa-ba-dañw- wa-zuy-yi-na ẓaa-li-ka fee q̣u-loo-bi-kum wa-z̤̣a-nañ-tum z̤̣an-nas- saw-ʹi wa-kuñ-tum q̣aw-mam- boo-raa.

48:13.text: Wa-mal- lam yuʹ-mim- bil-laa-hi wa-Ra-soo-li-hee fa-ʹin-naaa ʹaʻ-tad-naa lil-kaa-fi-ree-na Sa-ʻee-raa!

48:14.text: Wa-lil-laa-hi Mul-kus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ: yag̣-fi-ru li-mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu wa-yu-ʻaẓ-ẓi-bu mañy- ya-shaaaʹ: wa-kaa-nal- laa-hu G̣a-foo-rar- Ra-ḥee-maa.

48:15.text: Sa-ya-q̣oo-lul- mu-khal-la-foo-na ʹi-ẓañ- ṭa-laq̣-tum ʹi-laa ma-g̣aa-ni-ma li-taʹ-khu-ẓoo-haa ẓa-roo-naa nat-ta-biʻ-kum: yu-ree-doo-na ʹañy- yu-bad-di-loo Ka-laa-mal- laah. Q̣ul- lañ- tat-ta-bi-ʻoo-naa ka-ẓaa-li-kum q̣aa-lal- laa-hu miñ- q̣abl: fa-sa-ya-q̣oo-loo-na bal taḥ-su-doo-na-naa. Bal kaa-noo laa- yaf-q̣a-hoo-na ʹil-laa q̣a-lee-laa.

48:16.text: Q̣ul- lil-mu-khal-la-fee-na mi-nal- ʹAʻ-raa-bi sa-tud-ʻaw-na ʹi-laa q̣aw-min ʹu-lee baʹ-siñ- sha-dee-diñ- tu-q̣aa-ti-loo-na-hum ʹaw yus-li-moon. Fa-ʹiñ- tu-ṭee-ʻoo yuʹ-ti-ku-mul- laa-hu ʹaj-ran ḥa-sa-naa: wa-ʹiñ- ta-ta-wal-law ka-maa ta-wal-lay-tum- miñ- q̣ab-lu yu-ʻaẓ-ẓib-kum ʻa-ẓaa-ban ʹa-lee-maa.

48:17.text: Lay-sa ʻa-lal- ʹaʻ-maa ḥa-ra-juñw- wa-laa- ʻa-lal- ʹaʻ-ra-ji ḥa-ra-juñw- wa-laa- ʻa-lal- ma-ree-ḍi ha-raj. Wa-mañy- yu-ṭi-ʻil- laa-ha wa-Ra-soo-la-hoo yud-khil-hu Jan-naa-tiñ- taj-ree miñ- taḥ-ti-hal- ʹan-haar; wa-mañy- ya-ta-wal-la yu-ʻaẓ-ẓib-hu ʻa-ẓaa-ban ʹa-lee-maa.

48:18.text: La-q̣ad ra-ḍi-yal- laa-hu ʻa-nil- Muʹ-mi-nee-na ʹiẓ yu-baa-yi-ʻoo-na-ka taḥ-tash- Sha-ja-ra-ti fa-ʻa-li-ma maa- q̣u-loo-bi-him fee fa-ʹañ-za-las- Sa-kee-na-ta ʻa-lay-him wa-ʹa-s̤aa-ba-hum Fat-ḥañ- q̣a-ree-baa;

48:19.text: Wa-ma-g̣aa-ni-ma ka-s̤ee-ra-tañy- yaʹ-khu-ẓoo-na-haa: wa-kaa-nal- laa-hu ʻA-zee-zan Ḥa-kee-maa.

48:20.text: Wa-ʻa-da-ku-mul- laa-hu ma-g̣aa-ni-ma ka-s̤ee-ra-tañ taʹ-khu-ẓoo-na-haa fa-ʻaj-ja-la la-kum haa-ẓi-hee wa-kaf-fa ʹay-di-yan- naa-si ʻañ-kum; wa-li-ta-koo-na ʹAa-ya-tal- lil-Muʹ-mi-nee-na wa-yah-di-ya-kum Ṣi-raa-ṭam- Mus-ta-q̣ee-maa;

48:21.text: Wa-ʹukh-raa lam taq̣-di-roo ʻa-lay-haa q̣ad ʹa-ḥaa-ṭal- laa-hu bi-haa: wa-kaa-nal- laa-hu ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Q̣a-dee-raa.

48:22.text: Wa-law q̣aa-ta-la-ku-mul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo la-wal-la-wul- ʹad-baa-ra s̤um-ma laa- ya-ji-doo-na wa-liy-yañw-wa laa- na-ṣee-raa.

48:23.text: Sun-na-tal- laa-hil- la-tee q̣ad kha-lat miñ- q̣ab-lu wa-lañ- ta-ji-da li-Sun-na-til- laa-hi tab-dee-laa.

48:24.text: Wa-Hu-wal- la-ẓee kaf-fa ʹay-di-ya-hum ʻañ-kum wa-ʹay-di-ya-kum ʻan-hum bi-baṭ-ni Mak-ka-ta mim- baʻ-di ʹan ʹaz̤̣-fa-ra-kum ʻa-lay-him. Wa-kaa-nal- laa-hu bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na Ba-ṣee-raa.

48:25.text: Hu-mul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo wa-ṣad-doo-kum ʻa-nil- Mas-ji-dil- Ḥa-raa-mi wal-had-ya maʻ-koo-fan ʹañy- yab-lu-g̣a ma-ḥil-lah. Wa-law-laa- ri-jaa-lum- Muʹ-mi-noo-na wa-ni-saaa-ʹum- Muʹ-mi-naa-tul- lam taʻ-la-moo-hum ʹañ- ta-ṭa-ʹoo-hum fa-tu-ṣee-ba-kum- min-hum- ma-ʻar-ra-tum- bi-g̣ay-ri ʻilm, li-yud-khi-lal- laa-hu fee Raḥ-ma-ti-hee mañy- ya-shaaaʹ. Law ta-zay-ya-loo la-ʻaẓ-ẓab-nal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo min-hum ʻa-ẓaa-ban ʹa-lee-maa.

48:26.text: ʹIẓ ja-ʻa-lal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo fee q̣u-loo-bi-hi-mul- ḥa-miy-ya-ta Ḥa-miy-ya-tal- Jaa-hi-liy-ya-ti fa-ʹañ-za-lal- laa-hu Sa-kee-na-ta-hoo ʻa-laa Ra-soo-li-hee wa-ʻa-lal- Muʹ-mi-nee-na wa-ʹal-za-ma-hum ka-li-ma-tat- taq̣-waa wa-ka-nooo ʹa-ḥaq̣-q̣a bi-haa wa-ʹah-la-haa. Wa-kaa-nal- laa-hu bi-kul-li shay-ʹin ʻA-lee-maa.

48:27.text: La-q̣ad ṣa-da-q̣al- laa-hu Ra-soo-la-hur- ruʹ-yaa bil-ḥaq̣q̣: la-tad-khu-lun-nal- Mas-ji-dal- Ḥa-raa-ma ʹiñ- shaaa-ʹal- laa-hu ʹaa-mi-nee-na mu-ḥal-li-q̣ee-na ru-ʹoo-sa-kum wa-mu-q̣aṣ-ṣi-ree-na laa- ta-khaa-foon. Fa-ʻa-li-ma maa- lam taʻ-la-moo fa-ja-ʻa-la miñ- doo-ni ẓaa-li-ka fat-ḥañ- q̣a-ree-baa.

48:28.text: Hu-wal- la-ẓeee ʹar-sa-la Ra-soo-la-hoo bil-Hu-daa wa-Dee-nil- Ḥaq̣-q̣i li-yuz̤̣-hi-ra-hoo ʻa-lad- dee-ni kul-lih: wa-ka-faa bil-laa-hi Sha-hee-daa.

48:29.text: Mu-ḥam-ma-dur- Ra-soo-lul- laah: wal-la-ẓee-na ma-ʻa-hooo ʹa-shid-daaa-ʹu ʻa-lal- kuf-faa-ri ru-ḥa-maaa-ʹu bay-na-hum ta-raa-hum ruk-ka-ʻañ- suj-ja-dañy- yab-ta-g̣oo-na faḍ-lam- mi-nal- laa-hi wa-Riḍ-waa-naa. See-maa-hum fee wu-joo-hi-him- min ʹa-s̤a-ris- su-jood. Ẓaa-li-ka ma-s̤a-lu-hum fit- Taw-raa-ti wa-ma-s̤a-lu-hum fil- ʹIñ-jeel: ka-zar-ʻin ʹakh-ra-ja shaṭ-ʹa-hoo fa-ʹaa-za-ra-hoo fas-tag̣-la-z̤̣a fas-ta-waa ʻa-laa soo-q̣i-hee yuʻ-ji-buz- zur-raa-ʻa li-ya-g̣ee-z̤̣a bi-hi-mul- kuf-faar. Wa-ʻa-dal- laa-hul- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti min-hum Mag̣-fi-ra-tañw- Wa-ʹAj-ran ʻa-z̤̣ee-maa.

49:1.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo laa- tu-q̣ad-di-moo bay-na ya-da-yil- laa-hi wa-Ra-soo-li-hee wat-ta-q̣ul- laah: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha Sa-mee-ʻun ʻA-leem.

49:2.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo laa- tar-fa-ʻooo ʹaṣ-waa-ta-kum faw-q̣a ṣaw-tin- Na-biy-yi wa-laa taj-ha-roo la-hoo bil-q̣aw-li ka-jah-ri baʻ-ḍi-kum li-baʻ-ḍin ʹañ taḥ-ba-ṭa ʹaʻ-maa-lu-kum wa-ʹañ-tum laa- tash-ʻu-roon.

49:3.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ya-g̣uḍ-ḍoo-na ʹaṣ-waa-ta-hum ʻiñ-da Ra-soo-lil- laa-hi ʹu-laaa-ʹi-kal- la-ẓee-nam- ta-ḥa-nal- laa-hu q̣u-loo-ba-hum lit-taq̣-waa: la-hum- Mag̣-fi-ra-tuñw- Wa-ʹAj-run ʻa-z̤̣eem.

49:4.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na yu-naa-doo-na-ka miñw- wa-raaa-ʹil- ḤU-JU-RAA-TI ʹak-s̤a-ru-hum laa- yaʻ-q̣i-loon.

49:5.text: Wa-law ʹan-na-hum ṣa-ba-roo ḥat-taa takh-ru-ja ʹi-lay-him la-kaa-na khay-ral- la-hum: wal-laa-hu G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

49:6.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nooo ʹiñ- jaa-ʹa-kum faa-si-q̣um- bi-na-ba-ʹiñ fa-ta-bay-ya-nooo ʹañ- tu-ṣee-boo q̣aw-mam- bi-ja-haa-la-tiñ- fa-tuṣ-bi-ḥoo ʻa-laa maa- fa-ʻal-tum naa-di-meen.

49:7.text: Waʻ-la-mooo ʹan-na fee-kum Ra-soo-lal- laah: law yu-ṭee-ʻu-kum fee ka-s̤ee-rim- mi-nal- ʹam-rila- ʻa-nit-tum wa-laa-kin-nal- laa-ha ḥab-ba-ba ʹi-lay-ku-mul- ʹEe-maa-na wa-zay-ya-na-hoo fee q̣u-loo-bi-kum wa-kar-ra-ha ʹi-lay-ku-mul- kuf-ra wal-fu-soo-q̣a wal-ʻiṣ-yaan: ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mur- raa-shi-doon;―

49:8.text: Faḍ-lam- mi-nal- laa-hi wa-niʻ-mah; wal-laa-hu ʹA-lee-mun Ḥa-keem.

49:9.text: Wa-ʹiñ- ṭaaa-ʹi-fa-taa-ni mi-nal- Muʹ-mi-nee- naq̣-ta-ta-loo fa-ʹaṣ-li-ḥoo bay-na-hu-maa: fa-ʹim- ba-g̣at ʹiḥ-daa-hu-maa ʻa-lal- ʹukh-raa fa-q̣aa-ti-lul- la-tee tab-g̣ee ḥat-taa ta-feee-ʹa ʹi-laaa ʹam-ril- laah: fa-ʹiñ- faaa-ʹat fa-ʹaṣ-li-ḥoo bay-na-hu-maa bil-ʻad-li wa-ʹaq̣-si-ṭoo: ʹin-nal- laa-ha yu-ḥib-bul- Muq̣-si-ṭeen.

49:10.text: ʹIn-na-mal- Muʹ-mi-noo-na ʹIkh-wa-tuñ- fa-ʹaṣ-li-ḥoo bay-na ʹa-kha-way-kum wat-ta-q̣ul- laa-ha la-ʻal-la-kum tur-ḥa-moon.

49:11.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo la yas-khar q̣aw-mum- miñ- q̣aw-min ʻa-saaa ʹañy- ya-koo-noo khay-ram- min-hum wa-laa ni-saaa-ʹum- min- ni-saaa-ʹin ʻa-saaa ʹañy- ya-kun-na khay-ram- min-hunn: wa-laa tal-mi-zooo ʹañ-fu-sa-kum wa-laa ta-naa-ba-zoo bil-ʹal-q̣aab: biʹ-sal- is-mul- fu-soo-q̣u baʻ-dal- ʹee-maan: wa-mal- lam ya-tub fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-muz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-moon.

49:12.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nuj- ta-ni-boo ka-s̤ee-ram- mi-naz̤̣- z̤̣ann: ʹin-na baʻ-ḍaz̤̣- z̤̣an-ni ʹis̤-muñw- Wa-laa- ta-jas-sa-soo wa-laa yag̣-tab- baʻ-ḍu-kum baʻ-ḍaa. ʹA-yu-ḥib-bu ʻa-ḥa-du-kum ʹañy- yaʹ-ku-la laḥ-ma ʹa-khee-hi may-tañ- fa-ka-rih-tu-mooh? Wat-ta-q̣ul- laah: ʹin-nal- laa-ha Taw-waa-bur- Ra-ḥeem.

49:13.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-han- naa-su ʹin-naa kha-laq̣-naa-kum- miñ- ẓa-ka-riñw- wa-ʹuñ-s̤aa wa-ja-ʻal-naa-kum shu-ʻoo-bañw- wa-q̣a-baaa-ʹi-la li-ta-ʻaa-ra-foo. ʹIn-na ʹak-ra-ma-kum ʻiñ-dal- laa-hi ʹat-q̣aa-kum. ʹIn-nal- laa-ha ʻA-lee-mun Kha-beer.

49:14.text: Q̣aa-la-til- ʹAʻ-raa-bu ʹaa-man-naa. Q̣ul lam tuʹ-mi-noo wa-laa-kiñ- q̣oo-looo ʹas-lam-naa wa-lam-maa yad-khu-lil- ʹee-maa-nu fee q̣u-loo-bi-kum. Wa-ʹiñ- tu-ṭee-ʻul- laa-ha wa-Ra-soo-la-hoo laa- ya-lit-kum- min ʹaʻ-maa-li-kum shay-ʹaa: ʹin-nal- laa-ha G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

49:15.text: ʹIn-na-mal- Muʹ-mi-noo-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo bil-laa-hi wa-Ra-soo-li-hee s̤um-ma lam yar-taa-boo wa-jaa-ha-doo bi-ʹam-waa-li-him wa-ʹañ-fu-si-him fee Sa-bee-lil- laah: ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-muṣ- Ṣaa-di-q̣oon.

49:16.text: Q̣ul ʹa-tu-ʻal-li-moo-nal- laa-ha bi-dee-ni-kum? Wal-laa-hu yaʻ-la-mu maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-maa fil- arḍ: wal-laa-hu bi-kul-li shay-ʹin ʻA-leem.

49:17.text: Ya-mun-noo-na ʻa-lay-ka ʹan ʹas-la-moo. Q̣ul laa- ta-mun-noo ʻa-lay-ya ʹIs-laa-ma-kum. Ba-lil- laa-hu ya-mun-nu ʻa-lay-kum ʹan ha-daa-kum lil-ʹee-maa-ni ʹiñ- kuñ-tum ṣaa-di-q̣een.

49:18.text: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha yaʻ-la-mu g̣ay-bas- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ: wal-laa-hu ba-ṣee-rum- bi-maa taʻ-ma-loon.

50:2.text: Bal ʻa-ji-booo ʹañ- jaaa-ʹa-hum- Muñ-ẓi-rum- min-hum fa-q̣aa-lal- kaa-fi-roo-na haa-ẓaa shay-ʹun ʻa-jeeb!

50:3.text: ʹA-ʹi-ẓaa mit-naa wa-kun-naa tu-raa-baa? Ẓaa-li-ka Raj-ʻum- ba-ʻeed!

50:4.text: Q̣ad ʻa-lim-naa maa- tañ-q̣u-ṣul- ʹar-ḍu min-hum: wa-ʻiñ-da-naa Ki-taa-bun Ha-feez̤̣.

50:5.text: Bal kaẓ-ẓa-boo bil-Ḥaq̣-q̣i lam-maa jaaa-ʹa-hum fa-hum feee ʹam-rim- ma-reej.

50:6.text: ʹA-fa-lam yañ-z̤̣u-rooo ʹi-las- sa-maaa-ʹi faw-q̣a-hum kay-fa ba-nay-naa-haa wa-zay-yan-naa-haa wa-maa la-haa miñ- fu-rooj?

50:7.text: Wal-ʹar-ḍa ma-dad-naa-haa wa-ʹal-q̣ay-naa fee-haa ra-waa-si-ya wa-ʹam-bat-naa fee-haa miñ- kul-li zaw-jim- ba-heej,―

50:9.text: Wa-naz-zal-naa mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi maaa-ʹam- mu-baa-ra-kañ fa-ʹam-bat-naa bi-hee jan-na-tiñw- wa-ḥab-bal- ḥa-ṣeed;

50:11.text: Riz-q̣al- lil-ʻi-baa-di wa-ʹaḥ-yay-naa bi-hee bal-da-tam- may-taa. Ka-ẓaa-li-kal- khu-rooj.

50:12.text: Kaẓ-ẓa-bat q̣ab-la-hum Q̣aw-mu Noo-ḥiñw- waʹAṣ-ḥaa-bur- Ras-si wa-S̤a-mood,

50:14.text: Wa-ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bul- ʹay-ka-ti wa-Q̣aw-mu Tub-baʻ; kul-luñ- kaẓ-ẓa-bar- ru-su-la fa-ḥaq̣-q̣a Wa-ʻeed.

50:15.text: ʹA-fa-ʻa-yee-naa bil-khal-q̣il- ʹaw-wal: bal hum fee lab-sim- min khal-q̣iñ- ja-deed?

50:16.text: Wa-la-q̣ad kha-laq̣-nal- ʹiñ-saa-na Wa-naʻ-la-mu maa- tu-was-wi-su bi-hee naf-suh: wa-Naḥ-nu ʹaq̣-ra-bu ʹi-lay-hi min ḥab-lil- wa-reed.

50:17.text: ʹIẓ ya-ta-laq̣-q̣al- mu-ta-laq̣-q̣i-yaa-ni ʻa-nil- ya-mee-ni wa-ʻa-nish- shi-maa-li q̣a-ʻeed.

50:18.text: Maa- yal-fi-z̤̣u miñ- q̣aw-lin ʹil-laa la-day-hi ra-q̣ee-bun ʻa-teed.

50:19.text: Wa-jaaa-ʹat sak-ra-tul- maw-ṭi bil-ḥaq̣q̣: ẓaa-li-ka maa- kuñ-ta min-hu ta-ḥeed!

50:20.text: Wa-nu-fi-kha fiṣ- Ṣoor: ẓaa-li-ka Yaw-mul- Wa-ʻeed.

50:21.text: Wa-jaaa-ʹat kul-lu naf-sim- ma-ʻa-haa saaa-ʹi-q̣uñw- wa-sha-heed.

50:22.text: La-q̣ad kuñ-ta fee g̣af-la-tim- min haa-ẓaa fa-ka-shaf-naa ʻañ-ka g̣i-ṭaaa-ʹa-ka fa-ba-ṣa-ru-kal- Yaw-ma ḥa-deed!

50:23.text: Wa-q̣aa-la Q̣a-ree-nu-hoo haa-ẓaa maa- la-day-ya ʻa-teed!

50:24.text: ʹAl-q̣i-yaa fee Ja-han-na-ma kul-la kaf-faa-rin ʻa-need,

50:26.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee ja-ʻa-la ma-ʻal- laa-hi ʹi-laa-han ʹaa-kha-ra fa-ʹal-q̣i-yaa-hu fil- ʻA-ẓaa-bish- sha-deed.

50:27.text: Q̣aa-la Q̣a-ree-nu-hoo Rab-ba-naa maaa ʹaṭ-g̣ay-tu-hoo wa-laa-kiñ kaa-na fee ḍa-laa-lim- ba-ʻeed.

50:28.text: Q̣aa-la laa- takh-ta-ṣi-moo la-day-ya wa-q̣ad q̣ad-dam-tu ʹi-lay-kum̃- bil-wa-ʻeed.

50:29.text: Maa- yu-bad-da-lul- Q̣aw-lu la-day-ya wa-maaa ʹa-na bi-z̤̣al-laa-mil- lil-ʻA-beed.

50:30.text: Yaw-ma na-q̣oo-lu li-Ja-han-na-ma ha-lim- ta-laʹ-ti wa-ta-q̣oo-lu hal- mim- ma-zeed?

50:32.text: Haa-ẓaa maa- too-ʻa-doo-na li-kul-li ʹaw-waa-bin ḥa-feez̤̣,―

50:33.text: Man kha-shi-yar- Raḥ-maa-na bil-g̣ay-bi wa-jaaa-ʹa bi-q̣al-bim- mu-neeb:

50:35.text: La-hum- maa ya-shaaa-ʹoo-na fee-haa wa-La-day-naa ma-zeed.

50:36.text: Wa-kam ʹah-lak-naa q̣ab-la-hum- miñ- q̣ar-nin hum ʹa-shad-du min-hum baṭ-shañ- fa-naq̣-q̣a-boo fil- bi-laad? Hal mim- ma-ḥeeṣ?

50:37.text: ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-Ẓik-raa li-mañ- kaa-na la-hoo q̣al-bun ʹaw ʹal-q̣as- sam-ʻa wa-hu-wa sha-heed.

50:38.text: Wa-la-q̣ad kha-laq̣-nas- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa wa-maa bay-na-hu-maa fee Sit-ta-ti ʹAy-yaam; wa-maa mas-sa-naa mil- lu-g̣oob.

50:39.text: Faṣ-bir ʻa-laa maa- ya-q̣oo-loo-na wa-sab-biḥ bi-Ḥam-di Rab-bi-ka q̣ab-la ṭu-loo-ʻish- sham-si wa-q̣ab-lal- g̣u-roob,―

50:41.text: Was-ta-miʻ Yaw-ma yu-naa-dil- Mu-naa-di mim- ma-kaa-niñ- q̣a-reeb,―

50:42.text: Yaw-ma yas-ma-ʻoo-naṣ- Ṣay-ḥa-ta bil-ḥaq̣q̣: ẓaa-li-ka Yaw-mul- Khu-rooj.

50:43.text: ʹIn-naa Naḥ-nu nuḥ-yee wa-nu-mee-tu wa-ʹi-lay-nal- Ma-ṣeer!

50:44.text: Yaw-ma ta-shaq̣-q̣a-q̣ul- ʹar-ḍu ʻan-hum si-raa-ʻaa: ẓaa-li-ka ḥash-run ʻa-lay-naa ya-seer.

50:45.text: Naḥ-nu ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-maa ya-q̣oo-loo-na wa-maaa ʹañ-ta ʻa-lay-him̃- bi-jab-baar. Fa-ẓak-kir bil-Q̣ur-ʹaa-ni mañy- ya-khaa-fu Wa-ʻeed!

51:14.text: Ẓoo-q̣oo fit-na-ta-kum! Haa-ẓal- la-ẓee kuñ-tum̃- bi-hee tas-taʻ-ji-loon!

51:16.text: ʹAa-khi-ẓee-na maaa ʹaa-taa-hum Rab-bu-hum: ʹin-na-hum kaa-noo q̣ab-la ẓaa-li-ka Muḥ-si-neen.

51:17.text: Kaa-noo q̣a-lee-lam- mi-nal- lay-li maa- yah-ja-ʻoon:

51:23.text: Fa-wa-Rab-bis- sa-maaa-ʹi wal-ʹar-ḍi ʹin-na-hoo la-Ḥaq̣-q̣um- mis̤-la maaa ʹan-na-kum tañ-ṭi-q̣oon.

51:24.text: Hal ʹa-taa-ka ḥa-dee-s̤u ḍay-fi ʹib-raa-hee-mal- muk-ra-meen?

51:25.text: ʹIẓ da-kha-loo ʻa-lay-hi fa-q̣aa-loo Sa-laa-maa! Q̣aa-la Sa-laam! Q̣aw-mum- muñ-ka-roon.

51:26.text: Fa-raa-g̣a ʹi-laaa ʹah-li-hee fa-jaaa-ʹa bi-ʻij-liñ- sa-meen,

51:28.text: Fa-ʹaw-ja-sa min-hum khee-faḥ Q̣aa-loo laa- ta-khaf! wa-bash-sha-roo-hu bi-g̣u-laa-min ʻa-leem.

51:29.text: Fa-ʹaq̣-ba-la-tim- ra-ʹa-tu-hoo fee ṣar-ra-tiñ- fa-ṣak-kat waj-ha-haa wa-q̣aa-lat ʻa-joo-zun ʻa-q̣eem!

51:30.text: Q̣aa-loo ka-ẓaa-li-ki q̣aa-la Rab-buk: ʹin-na-hoo Hu-wal- Ḥa-kee-mul- ʻA-leem.

51:32.text: Q̣aa-looo ʹin-naaa ʹur-sil-naaa ʹi-laa q̣aw-mim- muj-ri-meen;―

51:35.text: Fa-ʹakh-raj-naa mañ- kaa-na fee-haa mi-nal- Muʹ-mi-neen.

51:36.text: Fa-maa wa-jad-naa fee-ha g̣ay-ra bay-tim- mi-nal- Mus-li-meen:

51:37.text: Wa-ta-rak-naa fee-haaa ʹAa-ya-tal- lil-la-ẓee-na ya-khaa-foo-nal- ʻA-ẓaa-bal- ʹa-leem.

51:38.text: Wa-fee Moo-saaa ʹiẓ ʹar-sal-naa-hu ʹi-laa Fir-ʻaw-na bi-sul-ṭaa-nim- mu-been.

51:40.text: Fa-ʹa-khaẓ-naa-hu wa-ju-noo-da-hoo fa-na-baẓ-naa-hum fil- yam-mi wa-hu-wa mu-leem.

51:41.text: Wa-fee ʻAa-din ʹiẓ ʹar-sal-naa ʻa-lay-hi-mur- Ree-ḥal- ʻa-q̣eem:

51:42.text: Maa- ta-ẓa-ru miñ- shay-ʹin ʹa-tat ʻa-lay-hi ʹil-laa ja-ʻa-lat-hu kar-ra-meem.

51:43.text: Wa-fee S̤a-moo-da ʹiẓ q̣ee-la la-hum ta-mat-ta-ʻoo ḥat-taa ḥeen!

51:44.text: Fa-ʻa-taw ʻan ʹAm-ri Rab-bi-him fa-ʹa-kha-ẓat-hu-muṣ- ṣaa-ʻi-q̣a-tu wa-hum yañ-z̤̣u-roon.

51:45.text: fa-mas- ta-ṭaa-ʻoo miñ- q̣i-yaa-miñw- wa-maa- kaa-noo muñ-ta-ṣi-reen.

51:46.text: Wa-Q̣aw-ma Noo-ḥim- miñ q̣abl: ʹin-na-hum kaa-noo q̣aw-mañ- faa-si-q̣een.

51:49.text: Wa-miñ- kul-li shay-ʹin kha-laq̣-naa zaw-jay-ni la-ʻal-la-kum ta-ẓak-ka-roon.

51:50.text: Fa-fir-rooo ʹi-lal- laah: ʹin-nee la-kum- min-hu Na-ẓee-rum- mu-been!

51:51.text: Wa-laa taj-ʻa-loo ma-ʻal- laa-hi ʹi-laa-han ʹaa-khar: ʹin-nee la-kum- min-hu Na-ẓee-rum- mu-been!

51:52.text: Ka-ẓaa-li-ka maaa ʹa-tal- la-ẓee-na miñ- q̣ab-li-him- mir- Ra-soo-lin ʹil-laa q̣aa-loo saa-ḥi-run ʹaw maj-noon!

51:53.text: ʹA-ta-waa-ṣaw bih? Bal hum q̣aw-muñ- ṭaa-g̣oon!

51:56.text: Wa-maa kha-laq̣-tul- Jin-na wal-ʹiñ-sa ʹil-laa li-yaʻ-bu-doon.

51:57.text: Maaa ʹu-ree-du min-hum- mir- Riz-q̣iñw- Wa-maaa ʹu-ree-du ʹañy- yuṭ-ʻi-moon.

51:58.text: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha Hu-war- Raz-zaa-q̣u Ẓul- Q̣uw-wa-til- Ma-teen.

51:59.text: Fa-ʹin-na lil-la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-moo ẓa-noo-bam- mis̤-la ẓa-noo-bi ʹaṣ-ḥaa-bi-him fa-laa yas-taʻ-ji-loon!

51:60.text: Fa-way-lul- lil-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo miñy- Yaw-mi-hi-mul- la-ẓee yoo-ʻa-doon

52:13.text: Yaw-ma yu-daʻ-ʻoo-na ʹi-laa Naa-ri Ja-han-na-ma daʻ-ʻaa.

52:14.text: Haa-ẓi-hin- Naa-rul- la-tee kuñ-tum̃- bi-haa tu-kaẓ-ẓi-boon!

52:15.text: ʹA-fa-siḥ-run haa-ẓaaa ʹam ʹañ-tum laa- tub-ṣi-roon?

52:16.text: ʹIṣ-law-haa faṣ-bi-rooo ʹaw laa- taṣ-bi-roo: sa-waaa-ʹun ʻa-lay-kum: ʹin-na-maa tuj-zaw-na maa- kuñ-tum taʻ-ma-loon.

52:18.text: Faa-ki-hee-na bi-maaa ʹaa-taa-hum rab-bu-hum wa-waq̣aa-hum Rab-bu-hum ʻA-ẓaa-bal- Ja-ḥeem.

52:19.text: Ku-loo wash-ra-boo ha-neee-ʹam- bi-maa kuñ-tum taʻ-ma-loon.

52:20.text: Mut-ta-ki-ʹee-na ʻa-laa su-ru-rim- maṣ-foo-fah: wa-zaw-waj-naa-hum̃- bi-ḥoo-rin ʻeen.

52:21.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wat-ta-ba-ʻat-hum ẓur-riy-ya-tu-hum̃- bi-ʹee-maa-nin ʹal-ḥaq̣-naa bi-him ẓur-riy-ya-ta-hum wa-maaa ʹa-lat-naa-hum- min ʻa-ma-li-him- miñ shayʹ: kul-lum- ri-ʹim- bi-maa ka-sa-ba ra-heen.

52:23.text: Ya-ta-naa-za-ʻoo-na fee-haa kaʹ-sal- laa lag̣-wuñ- fee-haa wa-laa taʹ-s̤eem.

52:24.text: Wa-ya-ṭoo-fu ʻa-lay-him g̣il-maa-nul- la-hum ka-ʹan-na-hum Luʹ-lu-ʹum- mak-noon.

52:26.text: Q̣aa-looo ʹin-naa kun-naa q̣ab-lu feee ʹah-li-naa mush-fi-q̣een.

52:27.text: Fa-man-nal- laa-hu ʻa-lay-naa wa-waq̣aa-naa ʻA-ẓaa-bas- Sa-moom.

52:28.text: ʹIn-naa kun-naa miñ- q̣ab-lu nad-ʻooh: ʹin-na-hoo Hu-wal- Bar-rur- Ra-ḥeem!

52:29.text: Fa-ẓak-kir fa-maaa ʹañ-ta bi-Niʻ-ma-ti Rab-bi-ka bi-kaa-hi-niñw- wa-laa- maj-noon.

52:30.text: ʹAm ya-q̣oo-loo-na Shaa-ʻi-run- na-ta-rab-ba-ṣu bi-hee ray-bal- ma-noon!

52:31.text: Q̣ul ta-rab-ba-ṣoo fa-ʹin-nee ma-ʻa-kum- mi-nal- mu-ta-rab-bi-ṣeen!

52:32.text: ʹAm taʹ-mu-ru-hum ʹaḥ-laa-mu-hum̃- bi-haa-ẓaaa ʹam hum q̣aw-muñ- ṭaa-g̣oon?

52:33.text: ʹAm ya-q̣oo-loo-na ta-q̣aw-wa-lah? Bal- laa yuʹ-mi-noon!

52:34.text: Fal-yaʹ-too bi-ḥa-dee-s̤im- mis̤-li-heee ʹiñ- kaa-noo Ṣaa-di-q̣een!

52:35.text: ʹAm khu-li-q̣oo min g̣ay-ri shay-ʹin ʹam hu-mul- khaa-li-q̣oon?

52:36.text: ʹAm kha-la-q̣us- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ? Bal- laa yoo-q̣i-noon.

52:37.text: ʹAm ʻiñ-da-hum kha-zaaa-ʹi-nu Rab-bi-ka ʹam hu-mul- mu-say-ṭi-roon?

52:38.text: ʹAm la-hum- sul-la-muñy- yas-ta-mi-ʻoo-na feeh? fal-yaʹ-ti mus-ta-mi-ʻu-hum̃- bi-sul-ṭaa-nim- mu-been.

52:40.text: ʹAm tas-ʹa-lu-hum ʹaj-rañ- fa-hum- mim- mag̣-ra-mim- mus̤-q̣a-loon?

52:42.text: ʹAm yu-ree-doo-na kay-daa? Fal-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo hu-mul- ma-kee-doon!

52:43.text: ʹAm la-hum- ʹi-laa-hun g̣ay-rul- laah? Sub-ḥaa-nal- laa-hi ʻam-maa yush-ri-koon!

52:44.text: Wa-ʹiñy- ya-raw kis-fam- mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi saa-q̣i-ṭañy- ya-q̣oo-loo sa-ḥaa-bum- mar-koom!

52:45.text: Fa-ẓar-hum ḥat-taa yu-laa-q̣oo Yaw-ma-hu-mul- la-ẓee fee-hi yuṣ-ʻa-q̣oon,―

52:46.text: Yaw-ma laa- yug̣-nee ʻan-hum kay-du-hum shay-ʹañw- wa-laa- hum yuñ-ṣa-roon.

52:47.text: Wa-ʹin-na lil-la-ẓee-na z̤̣a-la-moo ʻa-ẓaa-bañ- doo-na ẓaa-li-ka wa-laa-kin-na ʹak-s̤a-ra-hum laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

52:48.text: Waṣ-bir li-ḥuk-mi Rab-bi-ka fa-ʹin-na-ka bi-ʹaʻ-yu-ni-naa wa-sab-biḥ bi-Ḥam-di Rab-bi-ka ḥee-na ta-q̣oom,

53:18.text: La-q̣ad ra-ʹaa min ʹAa-yaa-ti Rab-bi-hil- Kub-raa!

53:23.text: ʹIn hi-ya ʹil-laaa ʹas-maaa-ʹuñ- sam-may-tu-moo-haaa ʹañ-tum wa-ʹaa-baaa-ʹu-kum- maaa ʹañ-za-lal- laa-hu bi-haa miñ- sul-ṭaan. ʹIñy- yat-ta-bi-ʻoo-na ʹil-laz̤̣- z̤̣an-na wa-maa tah-wal- ʹañ-fus!- Wa-la-q̣ad jaaa-ʹa-hum- mir- Rab-bi-hi-mul- Hu-daa!

53:26.text: Wa-kam- mim- ma-la-kiñ- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti laa- tug̣-nee sha-faa-ʻa-tu-hum shay-ʹan ʹil-laa mim- baʻ-di ʹañy- yaʹ-ẓa-nal- laa-hu li-mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu wa-yar-ḍaa.

53:27.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na laa- yuʹ-mi-noo-na bil-ʹAa-khi-ra-ti la-yu-sam-moo-nal- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-ta tas-mi-ya-tal- ʹuñ-s̤aa.

53:28.text: Wa-maa la-hum̃- bi-hee min ʻilm. ʹIñy- yat-ta-bi-ʻoo-na ʹil-laz̤̣- z̤̣ann: wa-ʹin-naz̤̣- z̤̣an-na laa- yug̣-nee mi-nal- Ḥaq̣-q̣i shay-ʹaa.

53:29.text: Fa-ʹaʻ-riḍ ʻam- mañ- ta-wal-laa ʻañ- ẓik-ri-naa wa-lam yu-rid ʹil-lal- ḥa-yaa-tad- dun-yaa.

53:30.text: Ẓaa-li-ka mab-la-g̣u-hum- mi-nal- ʻilm. ʹIn-na Rab-ba-ka Hu-wa ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-mañ- ḍal-la ʻañ- sa-bee-li-hee wa-Hu-wa ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-ma-nih- ta-daa.

53:31.text: Wa-lil-laa-hi maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-maa fil- ʹar-ḍi li-yaj-zi-yal- la-ẓee-na ʹa-saaa-ʹoo bi-maa ʻa-mi-loo wa-yaj-zi-yal- la-ẓee-na ʹaḥ-sa-noo bil-ḥus-naa.

53:32.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na yaj-ta-ni-boo-na ka-baaa-ʹi-ral- ʹis̤-mi wal-fa-waa-ḥi-sha ʹil-lal- la-mam,― ʹin-na Rab-ba-ka Waa-si-ʻul- Mag̣-fi-rah. Hu-wa ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-kum ʹiz ʹañ-sha-ʹa-kum- mi-nal- ʹar-ḍi wa-ʹiz ʹañ-tum ʹa-jin-na-tuñ- fee bu-ṭoo-ni ʹum-ma-haa-ti-kum. Fa-laa tu-zak-kooo ʹañ-fu-sa-kum: Hu-wa ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-ma-nit- ta-q̣aa.

53:36.text: ʹAm lam yu-nab-baʹ bi-maa fee Ṣu-ḥu-fi Moo-saa.

53:39.text: Wa-ʹal- lay-sa lil-ʹiñ-saa-ni ʹil-laa maa- sa-ʻaa;

53:52.text: Wa-q̣aw-ma Noo-ḥim- miñ- q̣ab-lu ʹin-na-hum kaa-noo hum ʹaz̤̣-la-ma wa-ʹaṭ-g̣aa;

53:58.text: Lay-sa la-haa miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi kaa-shi-fah.

54:2.text: Wa-ʹiñy- ya-raw ʹaa-ya-tañy- yuʻ-ri-ḍoo wa-ya-q̣oo-loo siḥ-rum- mus-ta-mirr.

54:3.text: Wa-kaẓ-ẓa-boo wat-ta-ba-ʻooo ʹah-waaa-ʹa-hum wa-kul-lu ʹam-rim- mus-ta-q̣irr.

54:4.text: Wa-la-q̣ad jaaa-ʹa-hum- mi-nal- ʹam-baaa-ʹi maa- fee-hi muz-da-jar.

54:6.text: Fa-ta-wal-la ʻan-hum. Yaw-ma yad-ʻud- Daa-ʻi ʹi-laa shay-ʹin- nu-kur,

54:7.text: Khush-sha-ʻan ʹab-ṣaa-ru-hum yakh-ru-joo-na mi-nal- ʹaj-daa-s̤i ka-ʹan-na-hum ja-raa-dum- muñ-ta-shir.

54:8.text: Muh-ṭi-ʻee-na ʹi-lad- Daaʻ! Ya-q̣oo-lul- kaa-fi-roo-na ˹Haa-ẓaa Yaw-mun ʻa-sir.˺

54:9.text: Kaẓ-ẓa-bat q̣ab-la-hum Q̣aw-mu Noo-ḥiñ- fa-kaẓ-ẓa-boo ʻAb-da-naa wa-q̣aa-loo maj-noo-ñuw- waz-du-jir.

54:12.text: Wa-faj-jar-nal- ʹar-ḍa ʻu-yoo-nañ- fal-ta-q̣al- maaa-ʹu ʻa-laaa ʹam-riñ- q̣ad q̣u-dir.

54:14.text: Taj-ree bi-ʹaʻ-yu-ni-naa; ja-zaaa-ʹal- li-mañ- kaa-na ku-fir!

54:15.text: Wa-la-q̣at- ta-rak-naa-haaa ʹAa-ya-tañ fa-hal mim- mud-da-kir?

54:17.text: Wa-la-q̣ad yas-sar-nal- Q̣ur-ʹaa-na liẓ-Ẓik-ri fa-hal mim- mud-da-kir?

54:18.text: Kaẓ-ẓa-bat ʻAa-duñ- fa-kay-fa kaa-na ʻA-ẓaa-bee wa-Nu-ẓur.

54:19.text: ʹIn-naaa ʹar-sal-naa ʻa-lay-him ree-ḥañ- ṣar-ṣa-rañ- fee Yaw-mi naḥ-sim- mus-ta-mirr,

54:20.text: Tañ-zi-ʻun- naa-sa ka-ʹan-na-hum ʹaʻ-jaa-zu nakh-lim- muñ-q̣a-ʻir.

54:22.text: Wa-la-q̣ad yas-sar-nal- Q̣ur-ʹaa-na liẓ-Ẓik-ri fa-hal mim- mud-da-kir?

54:24.text: Fa-q̣aa-looo ʹa-ba-sha-ram- min-naa waa-ḥi-dan- nat-ta-bi-ʻu-hooo ʹin-naaa ʹi-ẓal- la-fee ḍa-laa-liñw- wa-su-ʻur!

54:25.text: ʹA-ʹul-q̣i-yaẓ- Ẓik-ru ʻa-lay-hi mim- bay-ni-naa bal hu-wa kaẓ-ẓaa-bun ʹa-shir!

54:27.text: ʹIn-naa mur-si-lun- naa-q̣a-ti fit-na-tal- la-hum far-ta-q̣ib-hum waṣ-ṭa-bir!

54:28.text: Wa-nab-biʹ-hum ʹan-nal- maaa-ʹa q̣is-ma-tum- bay-na-hum: kul-lu shir-bim- muḥ-ta-ḍar.

54:31.text: ʹIn-naaa ʹar-sal-naa ʻa-lay-him Ṣay-ḥa-tañw- waa-ḥi-da-tañ- fa-kaa-noo ka-ha-shee-mil- muḥ-ta-z̤̣ir.

54:32.text: Wa-la-q̣ad yas-sar-nal- Q̣ur-ʹaa-na liẓ-Ẓik-ri fa-hal mim- mud-da-kir?

54:34.text: ʹIn-naaa ʹar-sal-naa ʻa-lay-him ḥaa-ṣi-ban ʹil-laaa ʹaa-la Looṭ; naj-jay-naa-hum̃- bi-sa-ḥar,―

54:35.text: Niʻ-ma-tam- min ʻIñ-di-naa; ka-ẓaa-li-ka naj-zee mañ- sha-kar.

54:37.text: Wa-la-q̣ad raa-wa-doo-hu ʻañ- ḍay-fi-hee fa-ṭa-mas-naaa ʹaʻ-yu-na-hum fa-ẓoo-q̣oo ʻA-ẓaa-bee wa-nu-ẓur.

54:40.text: Wa-la-q̣ad yas-sar-nal- Q̣ur-ʹaa-na liẓ-Ẓik-ri fa-hal mim- mud-da-kir?

54:42.text: Kaẓ-ẓa-boo bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa kul-li-haa fa-ʹa-khaẓ-naa-hum ʹakh-ẓa ʻA-zee-zim- Muq̣-ta-dir.

54:43.text: ʹA-kuf-faa-ru-kum khay-rum- min ʹu-laaa-ʹi-kum ʹam la-kum̃- ba-raaa-ʹa-tuñ- fiz- Zu-bur?

54:46.text: Ba-lis- Saaa-ʻa-tu maw-ʻi-du-hum was-Saa-ʻa-tu ʹad-haa wa-ʹa-marr.

54:48.text: Yaw-ma yus-ḥa-boo-na fin- Naa-ri ʻa-laa wu-joo-hi-him: ẓoo-q̣oo mas-sa- Sa-q̣ar!

54:50.text: Wa-maaa ʹAm-ru-naaa ʹil-laa waa-ḥi-da-tuñ ka-lam-ḥim- bil-ba-ṣar.

54:51.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹah-lak-naaa ʹash-yaa-ʻa-kum fa-hal mim- mud-da-kir?

54:55.text: Fee Maq̣-ʻa-di Ṣid-q̣in ʻiñ-da Ma-lee-kim- Muq̣-ta-dir.

55:9.text: Wa-ʹa-q̣ee-mul- waz-na bil-q̣is-ṭi wa-laa tukh-si-rul- mee-zaan.

55:15.text: Wa-kha-la-q̣al- Jaaan-na mim- maa-ri-jim- min- Naar:

55:24.text: Wa-la-hul- Ja-waa-ril- muñ-sha-ʹaaa-tu fil- baḥ-ri kal-ʹaʻ-laam:

55:27.text: Wa-yab-q̣aa Waj-hu Rab-bi-ka Ẓul- Ja-laa-li wal-ʹIk-raam.

55:29.text: Yas-ʹa-lu-hoo mañ- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-arḍ: kul-la Yaw-min Hu-wa fee shaʹn!

55:33.text: Yaa-Maʻ-sha-ral- jin-ni wal-ʹiñ-si ʹi-nis- ta-taʻ-tum ʹañ tañ-fu-ẓoo min ʹaq̣-ṭaa-ris- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi fañ-fu-ẓoo! laa- tañ-fu-ẓoo-na ʹil-laa bi-sul-ṭaan!

55:35.text: Yur-sa-lu ʻa-lay-ku-maa shu-waa-z̤̣um- min- naa-riñw-wa nu-ḥaa-suñ- fa-laa tañ-ta-ṣi-raan;

55:37.text: Fa-ʹi-ẓañ- shaq̣-q̣a-tis- sa-maaa-ʹu fa-kaa-nat war-da-tañ- kad-di-haan:

55:39.text: Fa-yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓil- laa yus-ʹa-lu ʻañ- ẓam-bi-heee ʹiñ-suñw- Wa-laa- jaaann,―

55:41.text: Yuʻ-ra-ful- muj-ri-moo-na bi-see-maa-hum fa-yuʹ-kha-ẓu bin-na-waa-ṣee wal-ʹaq̣-daam.

55:43.text: Haa-ẓi-hee Ja-han-na-mul- la-tee yu-kaẓ-ẓi-bu bi-hal- muj-ri-moon;

55:54.text: Mut-ta-ki-ʹee-na ʻa-laa fu-ru-shim- ba-ṭaaa-ʹi-nu-haa min ʹis-tab-raq̣: wa-ja-nal- jan-na-tay-ni daan.

55:56.text: Fee-hin-na q̣aa-ṣi-raa-tuṭ- ṭar-fi lam yaṭ-mis̤-hun-na ʹiñ-suñ- q̣ab-la-hum wa-laa jaaann;―

55:74.text: Lam yaṭ-mis̤-hun-na ʹiñ-suñ- q̣ab-la-hum wa-laa jaaan;

55:76.text: Mut-ta-ki-ʹee-na ʻa-laa raf-ra-fin khuḍ-riñw- wa-ʻab-q̣a-riy-yin ḥi-saan.

55:78.text: Ta-baa-ra-k as-mu Rab-bi-ka Ẓil- Ja-laa-li wal-ʹIk-raam.

56:25.text: Laa- yas-ma-ʻoo-na fee-haa lag̣-wañw- wa-laa- taʹ-s̤ee-maa,―

56:47.text: Wa-kaa-nu ya-q̣oo-loo-na, ʹa-ʹi-ẓaa mit-naa wa-kun-naa tu-raa-bañw- wa-ʻi-z̤̣aa-man ʹa-ʹin-naa la-mab-ʻoo-s̤oon,

56:60.text: Naḥ-nu q̣ad-dar-naa bay-na-ku-mul- Maw-ta wa-maa Naḥ-nu bi-mas-boo-q̣een-

56:61.text: ʻA-laaa ʹan- nu-bad-di-la ʹAm-s̤aa-la-kum wa-nuñ-shi-ʹa-kum fee maa laa- taʻ-la-moon.

56:62.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʻa-lim-tu-mun- nash-ʹa-tal- ʹoo-laa fa-law-laa- ta-ẓak-ka-roon?

56:65.text: Law na-shaaa-ʹu la-ja-ʻal-naa-hu ḥu-ṭaa-mañ- fa-z̤̣al-tum ta-fak-ka-hoon:

56:69.text: ʹA-ʹañ-tum ʹañ-zal-tu-moo-hu mi-nal- muz-ni ʹam Naḥ-nul- muñ-zi-loon?

56:70.text: Law na-shaaa-ʹu ja-ʻal-naa-hu ʹu-jaa-jañ- fa-law-laa- tash-ku-roon?

56:72.text: ʹA-ʹañ-tum ʹañ-shaʹ-tum sha-ja-ra-ta-haaa ʹam Naḥ-nul- muñ-shi-ʹoon?

56:85.text: Wa-Naḥ-nu ʹaq̣-ra-bu ʹi-lay-hi miñ-kum wa-laa-kil- laa tub-ṣi-roon,―

56:90.text: Wa-ʹam-maaa ʹiñ- kaa-na min ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bil- ya-meen.―

56:92.text: Wa-ʹam-maaa ʹiñ- kaa-na mi-nal- Mu-kaẓ-ẓi-bee-naḍ- ḍaaal-leen,

57:1.text: Sab-ba-ḥa lil-laa-hi maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ: wa-Hu-wal- ʻA-zee-zul- Ḥa-keem.

57:2.text: La-hoo Mul-kus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ: yuḥ-yee wa-yu-meet; wa-Hu-wa ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Q̣a-deer.

57:3.text: Hu-wal- ʹAw-wa-lu wal-ʹAa-khi-ru waz̤̣-Z̤̣aa-hi-ru wal-Baa-ṭin: wa-Hu-wa bi-kul-li shay-ʹin ʻA-leem.

57:4.text: Hu-wal- la-ẓee kha-la-q̣as- sa-maa-waa-ti wal- ʹar-ḍa fee Sit-ta-ti ʹAy-yaa-miñ s̤um-mas- ta-waa ʻa-lal- ʻArsh. Yaʻ-la-mu maa- ya-li-ju fil-ʹar-ḍi wa-maa yakh-ru-ju min-haa wa-maa yañ-zi-lu mi-nas- sa-maaa-ʹi wa-maa yaʻ-ru-ju fee-haa. Wa-Hu-wa ma-ʻa-kum ʹay-na maa- kuñ-tum. Wal-laa-hu bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na ba-ṣeer.

57:5.text: La-hoo Mul-kus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ: wa-ʹi-lal- laa-hi tur-ja-ʻul- ʹu-moor.

57:6.text: Yoo-li-jul- Lay-la fin- Na-haa-ri wa-yoo-li-jun- Na-haa-ra fil- Layl; wa-Hu-wa ʻA-lee-mum- bi-ẓaa-tiṣ- ṣu-door.

57:7.text: ʹAa-mi-noo bil-laa-hi wa-Ra-soo-li-hee wa-ʹañ-fi-q̣oo mim-maa ja-ʻa-la-kum- mus-takh-la-fee-na feeh. Fal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo miñ-kum wa-ʹañ-fa-q̣oo la-hum ʹAj-ruñ- ka-beer.

57:8.text: Wa-maa la-kum laa- tuʹ-mi-noo-na bil-laa-hi- war-Ra-soo-lu yad-ʻoo-kum li-tuʹ-mi-noo bi-Rab-bi-kum wa-q̣ad ʹa-kha-ẓa Mee-s̤aa-q̣a-kum ʹiñ- kuñ-tum- Muʹ-mi-neen.

57:9.text: Hu-wal- la-ẓee yu-naz-zi-lu ʻa-laa ʻAb-di-heee ʹAa-yaa-tim- Bay-yi-naa-til- li-yukh-ri-ja-kum- mi-naz̤̣- Z̤̣u-lu-maa-ti ʹi-lan- Noor. Wa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha bi-kum la-Ra-ʻoo-fur- Ra-ḥeem.

57:10.text: Wa-maa la-kum ʹal-laa tuñ-fi-q̣oo fee Sa-bee-lil- laa-hi wa-lil-laa-hi mee-raa-s̤us- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ. Laa- yas-ta-wee miñ-kum- man ʹañ-fa-q̣a miñ- q̣ab-lil- Fat-ḥi wa-q̣aa-tal. ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka ʹaʻ-z̤̣a-mu da-ra-ja-tam- mi-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹañ-fa-q̣oo mim- baʻ-du wa-q̣aa-ta-loo. Wa-kul-lañw- wa-ʻa-d al-laa-hul- ḥus-naa. Wal-laa-hu bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na Kha-beer.

57:11.text: Mañ- ẓal- la-ẓee yuq̣-ri-ḍul- laa-ha Q̣ar-ḍan Ḥa-sa-nañ- fa-yu-ḍaa-ʻi-fa-hoo la-hoo wa-la-hooo ʹaj-ruñ- ka-reem.

57:12.text: Yaw-ma ta-ral- Muʹ-mi-nee-na wal-Muʹ-mi-naa-ti yas-ʻaa Noo-ru-hum̃- bay-na ʹay-dee-him wa-bi-ʹay-maa-ni-him Bush-raa-ku-mul- Yaw-ma Jan-naa-tuñ- taj-ree miñ- taḥ-ti-hal- ʹan-haa-ru khaa-li-dee-na fee-ha! Ẓaa-li-ka hu-wal- Faw-zul- ʻa-z̤̣eem!

57:13.text: Yaw-ma ya-q̣oo-lul- Mu-naa-fi-q̣oo-na wal-Mu-naa-fi-q̣aa-tu lil-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nuñ- z̤̣u-roo-naa naq̣-ta-bis min- Noo-ri-kum! Q̣ee-la r-ji-ʻoo wa-raaa-ʹa-kum fal-ta-mi-soo noo-raa! Fa-ḍu-ri-ba bay-na-hum̃- bi-soo-ril- la-hoo baab. Baa-ṭi-nu-hoo fee-hir- Raḥ-ma-tu wa-z̤̣aa-hi-ru-hoo miñ- q̣i-ba-li-hil- ʻa-ẓaab!

57:14.text: Yu-naa-doo-na-hum ʹa-lam na-kum- ma-ʻa-kum? Q̣aa-loo ba-laa wa-laa-kin-na-kum fa-tañ-tum ʹañ-fu-sa-kum wa-ta-rab-baṣ-tum war-tab-tum wa-g̣ar-rat-ku-mul- ʹa-maa-niy-yu ḥat-taa jaaa-ʹa ʹAm-rul- laa-hi wa-g̣ar-ra-kum̃- bil-laa-hil- G̣a-roor.

57:15.text: Fal-Yaw-ma laa- yuʹ-kha-ẓu miñ-kum fid-ya-tuñw- wa-laa- mi-nal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo. Maʹ-waa-ku-mun- Naar: hi-ya maw-laa-kum: wa-biʹ-sal- Ma-ṣeer!

57:16.text: ʹA-lam yaʹ-ni lil-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nooo ʹañ- takh-sha-ʻa q̣u-loo-bu-hum li-ẓik-ril- laa-hi wa-maa na-za-la mi-nal- Ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-laa ya-koo-noo kal-la-ẓee-na ʹoo-tul- Ki-taa-ba miñ- q̣ab-lu fa-ṭaa-la ʻa-lay-hi-mul- ʹa-ma-du fa-q̣a-sat q̣u-loo-bu-hum? Wa-ka-s̤ee-rum- min-hum faa-si-q̣oon.

57:17.text: ʹIʻ-la-mooo ʹan-nal- laa-ha yuḥ-yil- ʹar-ḍa baʻ-da maw-ti-haa! Q̣ad bay-yan-naa la-ku-mul- ʹAa-yaa-ti la-ʻal-la-kum taʻ-q̣i-loon.

57:18.text: ʹIn-nal- Muṣ-ṣad-di-q̣ee-na wal-Muṣ-ṣad-di-q̣aa-ti wa-ʹaq̣-ra-ḍul- laa-ha Q̣ar-ḍan ḥa-sa-nañy- yu-ḍaa-ʻa-fu la-hum wa-la-hum ʹaj-ruñ- ka-reem.

57:19.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo bil-laa-hi wa-ru-su-li-hee ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-muṣ- Ṣid-dee-q̣oo-na wash-Shu-ha-daaa-ʹu ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-him: la-hum ʹAj-ru-hum wa-Noo-ru-hum. Wal-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo wa-kaẓ-ẓa-boo bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naaa ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bul- Ja-ḥeem.

57:20.text: ʹIʻ-la-mooo ʹan-na-mal- ḥa-yaa-tud- dun-yaa la-ʻi-buñw- wa-lah-wuñw- wa-zee-na-tuñw- wa-ta-faa-khu-rum- bay-na-kum wa-ta-kaa-s̤u-ruñ- fil- ʹam-waa-li wal-ʹaw-laad; Ka-ma-s̤a-li g̣ay-s̤in ʹaʻ-ja-bal- kuf-faa-ra na-baa-tu-hoo s̤um-ma ya-hee-ju fa-ta-raa-hu muṣ-far-rañ- s̤um-ma ya-koo-nu ḥu-ṭaa-maa. Wa-fil- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti ʻA-ẓaa-buñ- sha-dee-duñw- wa-Mag̣-fi-ra-tum- mi-nal- laa-hi wa-Riḍ-waan. Wa-mal- ḥa-ya-tud- dun-yaaa ʹil-laa ma-taa-ʻul- g̣u-roor?

57:21.text: Saa-bi-q̣ooo ʹi-laa Mag̣-fi-ra-tim- mir- Rab-bi-kum wa-Jan-na-tin ʻar-ḍu-haa ka-ʻar-ḍis- sa-maaa-ʹi wal-ʹar-ḍi ʹu-ʻid-dat lil-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo bil-laa-hi wa-ru-su-lih: ẓaa-li-ka Faḍ-lul- laa-hi yuʹ-tee-hi mañy- ya-shaaaʹ: wal-laa-hu Ẓul- Faḍ-lil- ʻA-ḍeem.

57:22.text: Maaa ʹa-ṣaa-ba mim- mu-ṣee-ba-tiñ- fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-laa feee ʹañ-fu-si-kum ʹil-laa fee ki-taa-bim- miñ q̣ab-li ʹan- nab-ra-ʹa-haa: ʹin-na ẓaa-li-ka ʻa-lal- laa-hi ya-seer:

57:23.text: Li-kay-laa taʹ-saw ʻa-laa maa- faa-ta-kum wa-laa taf-ra-ḥoo bi-maaa ʹaa-taa-kum. Wal-laa-hu laa- yu-ḥib-bu kul-la mukh-taa-liñ- fa-khoor,―

57:24.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na yab-kha-loo-na wa-yaʹ-mu-roo-nan- naa-sa bil-bukhl. Wa-mañy- ya-ta-wal-la fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha Hu-wal- G̣a-niy-yul- Ḥa-meed.

57:25.text: La-q̣ad ʹar-sal-naa ru-su-la-naa bil-Bay-yi-naa-ti wa-ʹañ-zal-naa ma-ʻa-hu-mul- Ki-taa-ba wal-Mee-zaa-na li-ya-q̣oo-man- naa-su bil-q̣isṭ; wa-ʹañ-zal-nal- ḤA-DEE-DA fee-hi baʹ-suñ- sha-dee-duñw- wa-ma-naa-fi-ʻu lin-naa-si wa-li-yaʻ-la-mal- laa-hu mañy- yañ-ṣu-ru-hoo wa-ru-su-la-hoo bil-G̣ayb: ʹin-nal- laa-ha Q̣a-wiy-yun ʻA-zeez.

57:26.text: Wa-la-q̣ad ʹar-sal-naa Noo-ḥañw- Wa-ʹIb-raa-hee-ma wa-ja-ʻal-naa fee ẓur-ri-ya-ti-hi-man- Nu-buw-wa-ta wal-ki-taa-ba fa-min-hum- muh-tad, wa-ka-s̤ee-rum- min-hum faa-si-q̣oon.

57:27.text: S̤um-ma q̣af-fay-naa ʻa-laaa ʹaa-s̤aa-ri-him̃- bi-ru-su-li-naa wa-q̣af-fay-naa bi-ʻEe-sab- ni- Mar-ya-ma wa-ʹaa-tay-naa-hul- ʹIñ-jeel; wa-ja-ʻal-naa fee q̣u-loo-bil- la-ẓee-nat- ta-ba-ʻoo-hu Raʹ-fa-tañw- Wa-Raḥ-mah. Wa-Rah-baa-niy-ya-ta-n ib-ta-da-ʻoo-haa maa- ka-tab-naa-haa ʻa-lay-him ʹil-lab- ti-g̣aaa-ʹa Riḍ-waa-nil- laa-hi fa-maa ra-ʻaw-haa ḥaq̣-q̣a ri-ʻaa-ya-ti-haa. Fa-ʹaa-tay-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo min-hum ʹaj-ra-hum, wa-ka-s̤ee-rum- min-hum faa-si-q̣oon.

57:28.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nut- ta-q̣ul- laa-ha wa-ʹaa-mi-noo bi-Ra-soo-li-hee yuʹ-ti-kum kif-lay-ni mir- Raḥ-ma-ti-hee wa-yaj-ʻal- la-kum Noo-rañ- tam-shoo-na bi-hee wa-yag̣-fir la-kum: wal-laa-hu G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem:

57:29.text: Li-ʹal-laa yaʻ-la-ma ʹAh-lul- Ki-taa-bi ʹal-laa yaq̣-di-roo-na ʻa-laa shay-ʹim- miñ- Faḍ-lil- laa-hi wa-ʹan-nal- Faḍ-la bi-ya-dil- laa-hi yuʹ-tee-hi mañy- ya-shaaaʹ. Wal-laa-hu Ẓul- Faḍ-lil- ʻA-z̤̣eem.

58:1.text: Q̣ad sa-mi-ʻal- laa-hu q̣aw-lal- la-tee tu-jaa-di-lu-ka fee zaw-ji-haa wa-tash-ta-keee ʹi-lal- laah: wal-laa-hu yas-ma-ʻu ta-ḥaa-wu-ra-ku-maa: ʹin-nal- laa-ha Sa-mee-ʻum- Ba-ṣeer.

58:2.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na yu-z̤̣aa-hi-roo-na miñ-kum- min- ni-saaa-ʹi-him- maa hun-na ʹum-ma-haa-ti-him: ʹin ʹum-ma-haa-tu-hum ʹil-lal- laaa-ʹee wa-lad-na-hum. Wa-ʹin-na-hum la-ya-q̣oo-loo-na muñ-ka-ram- mi-nal- q̣aw-li wa-zoo-raa: wa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha la-ʻA-fuw-wun- G̣a-foor.

58:3.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na yu-z̤̣aa-hi-roo-na min- ni-saaa-ʹi-him s̤um-ma ya-ʻoo-doo-na li-maa q̣aa-loo fa-taḥ-ree-ru ra-q̣a-ba-tim- miñ- q̣ab-li ʹañy- ya-ta-maaas-saa: ẓaa-li-kum too-ʻa-z̤̣oo-na bih: wal-laa-hu bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na kha-beer.

58:4.text: Fa-mal- lam ya-jid fa-ṣi-yaa-mu shah-ray-ni mu-ta-taa-bi-ʻay-ni miñ q̣ab-li ʹañy- ya-ta-maaas-saa. Fa-mal- lam- yas-ta-ṭiʻ fa-ʹiṭ-ʻaa-mu sit-tee-na mis-kee-naa. Ẓaa-li-ka li-tuʹ-mi-noo bil-la-hi wa-Ra-soo-lih-Wa- til-ka Ḥu-doo-dul- laah; Wa-lil-kaa-fi-ree-na ʻA-ẓaa-bun ʹa-leem.

58:5.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na yu-ḥaaad-doo-nal- laa-ha wa-Ra-soo-la-hoo ku-bi-too ka-maa ku-bi-tal- la-ẓee-na miñ- q̣ab-li-him wa-q̣ad ʹañ-zal-naaa ʹAa-yaa-tim- Bay-yi-naat. Wa-lil-kaa-fi-ree-na ʻA-ẓaa-bum- mu-heen,―

58:6.text: Yaw-ma yab-ʻa-s̤u-hu-mul- laa-hu ja-mee-ʹañ fa-yu-nab-bi-ʹu-hum̃- bi-maa ʻa-mi-loo. ʹAḥ-ṣaa-hul- laa-hu wa-na-sooh: wal-laa-hu ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Sha-heed.

58:7.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹan-nal- laa-ha yaʻ-la-mu maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-maa fil- ʹarḍ? Maa- ya-koo-nu min- naj-waa s̤a-laa-s̤a-tin ʹil-laa Hu-wa raa-bi-ʻu-hum wa-laa kham-sa-tin ʹil-laa Hu-wa saa-di-su-hum wa-laaa ʹad-naa miñ- ẓaa-li-ka wa-laaa ʹak-s̤a-ra ʹil-laa Hu-wa ma-ʻa-hum ʹay-na- maa kaa-noo: s̤um-ma yu-nab-bi-ʹu-hum̃- bi-maa ʻa-mi-loo Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-mah. ʹIn-nal- laa-ha bi-kul-li shay-ʹin ʻA-leem.

58:8.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹi-lal- la-ẓee-na nu-hoo ʻa-nin- naj-waa s̤um-ma ya-ʻoo-doo-na li-maa nu-hoo ʻan-hu wa-ya-ta-naa-jaw-na bil-ʹis̤-mi wal-ʻud-waa-ni wa-maʻ-ṣi-ya-tir- Ra-sool. Wa-ʹi-ẓaa jaaa-ʹoo-ka ḥay-yaw-ka bi-maa lam yu-ḥay-yi-ka bi-hil- laa-hu wa-ya-q̣oo-loo-na feee ʹañ-fu-si-him Law-laa- yu-ʻaẓ-ẓi-bu-nal- laa-hu bi-maa na-q̣ool? Ḥas-bu-hum Ja-han-nam: yaṣ-law-na-haa, fa-biʹ-sal- ma-ṣeer!

58:9.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nooo ʹi-ẓaa ta-naa-jay-tum fa-laa ta-ta-naa-jaw bil-ʹis̤-mi wal-ʻud-waa-ni wa-maʻ-si-ya-tir- Ra-soo-li wa-ta-naa-jaw bil-bir-ri wat-taq̣-waa; wat-ta-q̣ul- laa-hal- la-ẓeee ʹi-lay-hi tuḥ-sha-roon.

58:10.text: ʹIn-na-man- naj-waa mi-nash- Shay-ṭaa-ni li-yaḥ-zu-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-lay-sa bi-ḍaaar-ri-him shay-ʹan ʹil-laa bi-ʹiẓ-nil- laah; wa-ʻa-lal- laa-hi fal-ya-ta-wak-ka-lil- Muʹ-mi-noon.

58:11.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nooo ʹi-ẓaa q̣ee-la la-kum ta-fas-sa-ḥoo fil- ma-jaa-li-si faf-sa-hoo yaf-sa-ḥil- laa-hu la-kum. Wa-ʹi-ẓaa q̣ee-lañ- shu-zoo fañ-shu-zoo yar-fa-ʻil- laa-hul- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo miñ-kum wal-la-ẓee-na ʹoo-tul- ʻIl-ma da-ra-jaat. Wal-laa-hu bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na kha-beer.

58:12.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nooo ʹi-ẓaa naa-jay-tu-mur- Ra-soo-la fa-q̣ad-di-moo bay-na ya-day naj-waa-kum ṣa-da-q̣ah. Ẓaa-li-ka khay-rul- la-kum wa-ʹaṭ-har. Fa-ʹil- lam ta-ji-doo fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

58:13.text: ʹA-ʹash-faq̣-tum ʹañ- tu-q̣ad-di-moo bay-na ya-day naj-waa-kum ṣa-da-q̣aat? Fa-ʹiẓ lam taf-ʻa-loo wa-taa-bal- laa-hu ʻa-lay-kum fa-ʹa-q̣ee-muṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta wa-ʹaa-tuz- Za-kaa-ta wa-ʹa-ṭee-ʻul- laa-ha wa-Ra-soo-lah. Wal-laa-hu kha-bee-rum- bi-maa taʻ-ma-loon.

58:14.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹi-lal- la-zee-na ta-wal-law q̣aw-man g̣a-ḍi-bal- laa-hu ʻa-lay-him? Maa- hum- miñ-kum wa-laa min-hum wa-yaḥ-li-foo-na ʻa-lal- ka-ẓi-bi wa-hum yaʻ-la-moon.

58:15.text: ʹA-ʻad-dal- laa-hu la-hum ʻa-ẓaa-bañ- sha-dee-daa: ʹin-na-hum saaa-ʹa maa- kaa-noo yaʻ-ma-loon.

58:16.text: ʹIt-ta-kha-ẓooo ʹay-maa-na-hum jun-na-tañ- fa-ṣad-doo ʻañ- Sa-bee-lil- laa-hi fa-la-hum ʻA-ẓaa-bum- mu-heen.

58:17.text: Lañ- tug̣-ni-ya ʻan-hum ʹam-waa-lu-hum wa-laaa ʹaw-laa-du-hum- mi-nal- laa-hi shay-ʹaa: ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bun- Naar; hum fee-haa khaa-li-doon.

58:18.text: Yaw-ma yab-ʻa-s̤u-hu-mul- laa-hu ja-mee-ʻañ- fa-yaḥ-li-foo-na la-hoo ka-maa yaḥ-li-foo-na la-kum wa-yaḥ-sa-boo-na ʹan-na-hum ʻa-laa shayʹ. ʹA-laaa ʹin-na-hum hu-mul- kaa-ẓi-boon!

58:19.text: ʹIs-taḥ-wa-ẓa ʻa-lay-hi-mush- Shay-ṭaa-nu fa-ʹañ-saa-hum ẓik-ral- laah. ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka Ḥiz-bush- Shay-ṭaan. ʹA-laaa ʹin-na Ḥiz-bash- Shay-ṭaa-ni hu-mul- khaa-si-roon!

58:20.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na yu-ḥaaad-doo-nal- laa-ha wa-Ra-soo-la-hooo ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka fil- ʹa-ẓal-leen.

58:21.text: Ka-ta-bal- laa-hu la-ʹag̣-li-ban-na ʹa-na wa-ru-su-lee: ʹin-nal- laa-ha Q̣a-wiy-yun ʻA-zeez.

58:22.text: Laa- ta-ji-du q̣aw-mañy- yuʹ-mi-noo-na bil-laa-hi wal-Yaw-mil- ʹAa-khi-ri yu-waaad-doo-na man ḥaaad-dal- laa-ha wa-Ra-soo-la-hoo wa-law kaa-nooo ʹaa-baaa-ʹa-hum ʹaw ʹab-naaa-ʹa-hum ʹaw ʹikh-waa-na-hum ʹaw ʻa-shee-ra-ta-hum. ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka ka-ta-ba fee q̣u-loo-bi-hi-mul- ʹee-maa-na wa-ʹay-ya-da-hum̃- bi-roo-ḥim- minh. Wa-yud-khi-lu-hum Jan-naa-tiñ- taj-ree miñ taḥ-ti-hal- ʹan-haa-ru khaa-li-dee-na fee-haa. Ra-ḍi-yal- laa-hu ʻan-hum wa-ra-ḍoo ʻanh. ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka Ḥiz-bul- laah. ʹA-laaa ʹin-na Ḥiz-bal- laa-hi hu-mul- Muf-li-ḥoon.

59:1.text: Sab-ba-ḥa lil-laa-hi maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-maa fil- ʹarḍ: wa-Hu-wal- ʻA-zee-zul- Ḥa-keem.

59:2.text: Hu-wal- la-ẓeee ʹakh-ra-jal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo min ʹAh-lil- Ki-taa-bi miñ di-yaa-ri-him li-ʹaw-wa-lil- ḤASHR. Maa- z̤̣a-nañ-tum ʹañy- yakh-ru-joo wa-z̤̣an-nooo ʹan-na-hum- Maa-ni-ʻa-tu-hum ḥu-ṣoo-nu-hum- mi-nal- laa-hi fa-ʹa-taa-hu-mul- laa-hu min ḥay-s̤u lam yaḥ-ta-si-boo, wa-q̣a-ẓa-fa fee q̣u-loo-bi-hi-mur- ruʻ-ba yukh-ri-boo-na bu-yoo-ta-hum̃- bi-ʹay-dee-him wa-ʹay-dil- Muʹ-mi-neen. Faʻ-ta-bi-roo yaaa-ʹu-lil- ʹab-ṣaar!

59:3.text: Wa-law-laaa ʹañ- ka-ta-bal- laa-hu ʻa-lay-hi-mul- ja-laaa-ʹa la-ʻaẓ-ẓa-ba-hum fid- dun-yaa: wa-la-hum fil- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti ʻA-ẓaa-bun- Naar.

59:4.text: Ẓaa-li-ka bi-ʹAn-na-hum shaaaq̣-q̣ul- laa-ha wa-Ra-soo-lah. Wa-mañy- yu-shaaaq̣-q̣il- laa-ha fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha Sha-dee-dul- ʻI-q̣aab.

59:5.text: Maa- q̣a-ṭaʻ-tum- mil- lee-na-tin aw ta-rak-tu-moo-haa q̣aaa-ʹi-ma-tan ʻa-laaa ʹu-ṣoo-li-haa fa-bi-ʹiẓ-nil- laa-hi wa-li-yukh-zi-yal- faa-si-q̣een.

59:6.text: Wa-maaa ʹa-faaa-ʹal- laa-hu ʻa-laa Ra-soo-li-hee min-hum fa-maaa ʹaw-jaf-tum ʻa-lay-hi min khay-liñw- wa-laa- ri-kaa-biñw- wa-laa-kin-nal- laa-ha yu-sal-li-ṭu ru-su-la-hoo ʻa-laa mañy- ya-shaaaʹ. Wal-laa-hu ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Q̣a-deer.

59:7.text: Maaa ʹa-faaa-ʹal- laa-hu ʻa-laa Ra-soo-li-hee min ʹah-lil- Q̣u-raa fa-lil-laa-hi wa-lir-ra-soo-li wa-li-ẓil- q̣ur-baa wal-ya-taa-maa wal-ma-saa-kee-ni wab-nis- sa-bee-li kay laa- ya-koo-na doo-la-tam- bay-nal- ʹag̣-ni-yaaa-ʹi miñ-kum. Wa-maaa ʹaa-taa-ku-mur- Ra-soo-lu fa-khu-ẓoo-hu wa-maa na-haa-kum ʻan-hu fañ-ta-hoo. Wat-ta-q̣ul- laah; ʹin-nal- laa-ha Sha-dee-dul- ʻI-q̣aab.

59:8.text: Lil-fu-q̣a-raaa-ʹil- Mu-haa-ji-ree-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹukh-ri-joo miñ- di-yaa-ri-him wa-ʹam-waa-li-him yab-ta-g̣oo-na Faḍ-lam- mi-nal- laa-hi wa-Riḍ-waa-nañw- wa-yañ-ṣu-roo-nal- laa-ha wa-Ra-soo-lah: ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-muṣ- Ṣaa-di-q̣oon;―

59:9.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ta-baw-wa-ʹud- daa-ra wal-ʹee-maa-na miñ- q̣ab-li-him yu-ḥib-boo-na man haa-ja-ra ʹi-lay-him wa-laa ya-ji-doo-na fee ṣu-doo-ri-him ḥaa-ja-tam- mim-maaa ʹoo-too wa-yuʹ-s̤i-roo-na ʻa-laaa ʹañ-fu-si-him wa-law kaa-na bi-him kha-ṣaa-ṣah. Wa-mañy- yoo-q̣a shuḥ-ḥa naf-si-hee fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- Muf-li-ḥoon.

59:10.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na jaaa-ʹoo mim- baʻ-di-him ya-q̣oo-loo-na Rab-ba-nag̣- fir la-naa wa-li-ʹikh-waa-ni-nal- la-ẓee-na sa-ba-q̣oo-naa bil-ʹEe-maa-ni wa-laa taj-ʻal fee q̣u-loo-bi-naa g̣il-lal-lil- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo Rab-ba-naaa ʹin-na-ka Ra-ʹoo-fur- Ra-ḥeem.

59:11.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra ʹi-lal- la-ẓee-na naa-fa-q̣oo ya-q̣oo-loo-na li-ʹikh-waa-ni-hi-mul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo min ʹAh-lil- Ki-taa-bi la-ʹin ʹukh-rij-tum la-nakh-ru-jan-na ma-ʻa-kum wa-laa nu-ṭee-ʻu fee-kum ʹa-ḥa-dan ʹa-ba-dañw- waʹiñ- q̣oo-til-tum la-nañ-ṣu-ran-na-kum. Wal-laa-hu yash-ha-du ʹin-na-hum la-kaa-ẓi-boon.

59:12.text: La-ʹin ʹukh-ri-joo laa- yakh-ru-joo-na ma-ʻa-hum; wa-la-ʹiñ- q̣oo-ti-loo laa- yañ-ṣu-roo-na-hum; wa-la-ʹin- na-ṣa-roo-hum la-yu-wal-lun-nal- ʹad-baar; s̤um-ma laa- yuñ-ṣa-roon.

59:13.text: La-ʹañ-tum ʹa-shad-du rah-ba-tañ- fee ṣu-doo-ri-him- mi-nal- laah. Ẓaa-li-ka bi-ʹan-na-hum q̣aw-mul- laa yaf-q̣a-hoon.

59:14.text: Laa- yu-q̣aa-ti-loo-na-kum ja-mee-ʻan ʹil-laa fee q̣u-ram- mu-ḥaṣ-ṣa-na-tin ʹaw miñw- wa-raaa-ʹi ju-dur. Baʹ-su-hum̃- bay-na-hum sha-deed: taḥ-sa-bu-hum ja-mee-ʻañw-wa q̣u-loo-bu-hum shat-taa: ẓaa-li-ka bi-ʹan-na-hum q̣aw-mul- laa yaʻ-q̣i-loon.

59:15.text: Ka-ma-s̤a-lil- la-ẓee-na miñ- q̣ab-li-him q̣a-ree-bañ ẓaa-q̣oo wa-baa-la ʹam-ri-him; wa-la-hum ʻa-ẓaa-bun ʹa-leem;―

59:16.text: Ka-ma-s̤a-lish- Shay-ṭaa-ni ʹiẓ q̣aa-la lil-ʹiñ-saa-nik- fur: fa-lam-maa ka-fa-ra q̣aa-la ʹin-nee ba-reee-ʹum- miñ-ka ʹin-neee ʹa-khaa-ful- laa-ha Rab-bal- ʻAa-la-meen!

59:17.text: Fa-kaa-na ʻaa-q̣i-ba-ta-hu-maaa ʹan-na-hu-maa fin- Naa-ri khaa-li-day-ni fee-haa. Wa-ẓaa-li-ka ja-zaaa-ʹuz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen.

59:18.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nut- ta-q̣ul- laa-ha Wal-tañ-z̤̣ur naf-sum- maa q̣ad-da-mat li-g̣ad. Wat-ta-q̣ul- laah: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha kha-bee-rum- bi-maa taʻ-ma-loon.

59:19.text: Wa-laa ta-koo-noo kal-la-ẓee-na na-sul- laa-ha fa-ʹañ-saa-hum ʹañ-fu-sa-hum! ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- faa-si-q̣oon!

59:20.text: Laa- yas-ta-weee ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bun- Naa-ri wa-ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bul- Jan-nah: ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bul- Jan-na-ti hu-mul- Faaa-ʹi-zoon.

59:21.text: Law ʹañ-zal-naa haa-ẓal- Q̣ur-ʹaa-na ʻa-laa ja-ba-lil- la-ra-ʹay-ta-hoo khaa-shi-ʻam- mu-ta-ṣad-di-ʻam- min khash-ya-til- laah. Wa-til-kal- ʹam-s̤aa-lu naḍ-ri-bu-haa lin-naa-si la-ʻal-la-hum va-ta-fak-ka-roon.

59:22.text: Hu-wal- laa-hul- la-ẓee Laaa- ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa Hoo;―ʻ ʻAa-li-mul- g̣ay-bi wash-sha-haa-dah; Hu-war- Raḥ-maa-nur- Ra-ḥeem.

59:23.text: Hu-wal- laa-hul- la-ẓee Laaa- ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa Hoo,ʹAl- Ma-li-kul- Q̣ud-doo-sus- Sa-laa-mul- Muʹ-mi-nul- Mu-hay-mi-nul- ʻA-zee-zul- Jab-baa-rul- Mu-ta-kab-bir: Sub-ḥaa-nal- laa-hi ʻam-maa yush-ri-koon.

59:24.text: Hu-wal- laa-hul- Khaa-li-q̣ul- Baa-ri-ʹul- Mu-ṣaw-wi-ru la-hul- ʹAs-maaa- ʹul-Ḥus-naa: yu-sab-bi-ḥu la-hoo maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ: wa-Hu-wal- ʻA-zee-zul- Ḥa-keem.

60:1.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo laa- tat-ta-khi-ẓoo ʻa-duw-wee wa-ʻa-duw-wa-kum ʹaw-li-yaaa-ʹa tulq̣oo-na ʹi-lay-him̃- bil-ma-wad-da-ti wa-q̣ad ka-fa-roo bi-maa jaaa-ʹa-kum- mi-nal- Ḥaq̣-q̣i, yukh-ri-joo-nar- Ra-soola wa-ʹiy-yaa-kum ʹañ- tuʹ-mi-noo bil-laa-hi Rab-bi-kum! ʹIñ kuñ-tum kha-raj-tum ji-haa-dañ- fee Sa-bee-lee wab-ti-g̣aaa-ʹa Mar-ḍaa-tee tu-sir-roo-na ʹi-lay-him bil-ma-wad-da-ti wa-ʹa-na ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-maaa ʹakh-fay-tum wa-maaa ʹaʻ-lañ-tum. Wa-mañy- yaf-ʻal-hu miñ-kum fa-q̣ad ḍal-la Sa-waaa-ʹas- Sa-beel.

60:2.text: ʹIñy- yas̤-q̣a-foo-kum ya-koo-noo la-kum ʹaʻ-daaa-ʹañw- Wa-yab-su-ṭooo ʹi-lay-kum ʹay-di-ya-hum wa-ʹal-si-na-ta-hum̃- bis-sooo-ʹi wa-wad-doo law tak-fu-roon.

60:3.text: Lañ- tañ-fa-ʻa-kum ʹar-ḥaa-mu-kum wa-laaa ʹaw-laa-du-kum Yaw-mal- Q̣i-yaa-mah: yaf-ṣi-lu bay-na-kum: wal-laa-hu bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na Ba-ṣeer.

60:4.text: Q̣ad kaa-nat la-kum ʹus-wa-tun ḥa-sa-na-tuñ- feee ʹIb-raa-hee-ma wal-la-ẓee-na ma-ʻa-hooo ʹiẓ q̣aa-loo li-q̣aw-mi-him ʹin-naa bu-ra-ʹaaa-ʹu miñ-kum wa-mim-maa taʻ-bu-doo-na miñ- doo-nil- laah: ka-far-naa bi-kum wa-ba-daa bay-na-naa wa-bay-na-ku-mul- ʻa-daa-wa-tu wal-bag̣-ḍaaa-ʹu ʹa-ba-dan ḥat-taa tuʹ-mi-noo bil-laa-hi Waḥ-da-hooo ʹil-laa q̣aw-la ʹIb-raa-hee-ma li-ʹa-bee-hi la-ʹas-tag̣-fi-ran-na la-ka wa-maaa ʹam-li-ku la-ka mi-nal- laa-hi miñ- shayʹ. Rab-ba-naa ʻa-lay-ka ta-wak-kal-naa wa-ʹi-lay-ka ʹa-nab-naa wa-ʹi-lay-kal- Ma-ṣeer.

60:5.text: Rab-ba-naa laa- taj-ʻal-naa fit-na-tal- lil-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo wag̣-fir la-naa Rab-ba-naa! ʹIn-na-ka ʹAñ-tal- ʻA-zee-zul- Ḥa-keem.

60:6.text: La-q̣ad kaa-na la-kum fee-him ʹus-wa-tun ḥa-sa-na-tul- li-mañ- kaa-na yar-jul- laa-ha wal-Yaw-mal- ʹAa-khir. Wa-mañy- ya-ta-wal-la fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha Hu-wal- G̣a-niy-yul- Ḥa-meed.

60:7.text: ʻA-sal- laa-hu ʹañy- yaj-ʻa-la bay-na-kum wa-bay-nal- la-ẓee-na ʻaa-day-tum- min-hum- ma-wad-dah. Wal-laa-hu Q̣a-deer; wal-laa-hu G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

60:8.text: Laa- yan-haa-ku-mul- laa-hu ʻa-nil- la-ẓee-na lam yu-q̣aa-ti-loo-kum fid- Dee-ni wa-lam yukh-ri-joo-kum- miñ di-yaa-ri-kum ʹañ- ta-bar-roo-hum wa-tuq̣-si-ṭooo ʹi-lay-him: ʹin-nal- laa-ha yu-ḥib-bul- Muq̣-si-ṭeen.

60:9.text: ʹIn-na-maa yan-haa-ku-mul- laa-hu ʻa-nil- la-ẓee-na q̣aa-ta-loo-kum fid- Dee-ni wa-ʹakh-ra-joo-kum- miñ- di-yaa-ri-kum wa-z̤̣aa-ha-roo ʻa-laaa ʹikh-raa-ji-kum ʹañ- ta-wal-law-hum. Wa-mañy- ya-ta-wal-la-hum fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-muz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-moon.

60:10.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo ʹi-ẓaa jaaa-ʹa-ku-mul- Muʹ-mi-naa-tu Mu-haa-ji-raa-tiñ- fam-ta-ḥi-noo-hunn: ʹAl-laa-hu ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-ʹee-maa-ni-hinn: fa-ʹin ʻa-lim-tu-moo-hun-na Muʹ-mi-naa-tiñ- fa-laa tar-ji-ʻoo-hun-na ʹi-lal- Kuf-faar. Laa- hun-na ḥil-lul- la-hum wa-laa hum ya-ḥil-loo-na la-hunn. Wa-ʹaa-too-hum- maaa ʹañ-fa-q̣oo. Wa-laa ju-naa-ḥa ʻa-lay-kum ʹañ tañ-ki-ḥoo-hun-na ʹi-ẓaaa ʹaa-tay-tu-moo-hun-na ʹu-joo-ra-hunn. Wa-laa tum-si-koo bi-ʻi-ṣa-mil- ka-waa-fi-ri was-ʹa-loo maaa ʹañ-faq̣-tum wal-yas-ʹa-loo maaa ʹañ-fa-q̣oo. Ẓaa-li-kum ḥuk-mul- laah. Yaḥ-ku-mu bay-na-kum. Wal-laa-hu ʻA-lee-mun Ḥa-keem.

60:11.text: Wa-ʹiñ- faa-ta-kum shay-ʹum- min ʹaz-waa-ji-kum ʹi-lal- kuf-faa-ri fa-ʻaa-q̣ab-tum fa-ʹaa-tul- la-ẓee-na ẓa-ha-bat ʹaz-waa-ju-hum mis̤-la maaa ʹañ-fa-q̣oo. Wat-ta-q̣ul- laa-hal- la-ẓeee ʹañ-tum̃- bi-hee Muʹ-mi-noon.

60:12.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-han- Na-biy-yu ʹi-ẓaa jaaa-ʹa-kal- Muʹ-mi-naa-tu yu-baa-yiʻ-na-ka ʻa-laaa ʹal- laa yush-rik-na bil-laa-hi shay-ʹañw- wa-laa- yas-riq̣-na wa-laa yaz-nee-na wa-laa yaq̣-tul-na ʹaw-laa-da-hun-na wa-laa yaʹ-tee-na bi-buh-taa-niñy- yaf-ta-ree-na-hoo bay-na ʹay-dee-hin-na wa-ʹar-ju-li-hin-na wa-laa yaʻ-ṣee-na-ka fee maʻ-roo-fiñ- fa-baa-yiʻ-hun-na was-tag̣-fir la-hun-nal- laah: ʹin-nal- laa-ha G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

60:13.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo laa- ta-ta-wal-law q̣aw-man g̣a-ḍi-bal- laa-hu ʻa-lay-him q̣ad ya-ʹi-soo mi-nal- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti ka-maa ya-ʹi-sal- kuf-faa-ru min ʹaṣ-ḥaa-bil- q̣u-boor.

61:1.text: Sab-ba-ḥa lil-laa-hi maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-maa fil- ʹarḍ: wa-Hu-wal- ʻA-zee-zul- Ḥa-keem.

61:2.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo li-ma ta-q̣oo-loo-na maa laa- taf-ʻa-loon?

61:3.text: Ka-bu-ra maq̣-tan ʻiñ-dal- laa-hi ʹañ- ta-q̣oo-loo maa  laa- taf-ʻa-loon.

61:4.text: ʹIn-nal- laa-ha yu-ḥib-bul- la-ẓee-na yu-q̣aa-ti-loo-na fee Sa-bee-li-hee ṢAF-FAÑ- ka-ʹan-na-hum̃- bun-yaa-num- mar-ṣooṣ.

61:5.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣aa-la Moo-saa li-q̣aw-mi-hee yaa-q̣aw-mi li-ma tuʹ-ẓoo-na-nee wa-q̣at- taʻ-la-moo-na ʹan-nee ra-soo-lul- laa-hi ʹi-lay-kum?˺ Fa-lam-maa zaa-g̣ooo ʹa-zaa-g̣al- laa-hu q̣u-loo-ba-hum. Wal-laa-hu laa- yah-dil- q̣aw-mal- faa-si-q̣een.

61:6.text: Wa-ʹiẓ q̣aa-la ʻEe-sab- nu- Mar-ya-ma yaa-Ba-neee- ʹIs-raaa-ʹee-la ʹin-nee Ra-soo-lul- laa-hi ʹi-lay-kum- mu-ṣad-di-q̣al- li-maa bay-na ya-day-ya mi-nat- Taw-raa-ti wa-Mu-bash-shi-ram- bi-Ra-soo-liñy- yaʹ-tee mim- baʻ-dis- mu-hooo ʹAh-mad.˺ Fa-lam-maa jaaa-ʹa-hum̃- bil-Bay-yi-naa-ti q̣aa-loo Haa-ẓaa Siḥ-rum- mu-been.

61:7.text: Wa-man ʹaz̤̣-la-mu mim-ma-nif- ta-raa ʻa-lal laa-hil- ka-ẓi-ba wa-hu-wa yud-ʻaaa ʹi-lal- ʹIs-laam? Wal-laa-hu laa- yah-dil- q̣aw-maz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen.

61:8.text: Yu-ree-doo-na li-yuṭ-fi-ʹoo Noo-ral- laa-hi bi-ʹaf-waa-hi-him wal-laa-hu mu-tim-mu Noo-ri-hee wa-law ka-ri-hal- kaa-fi-roon.

61:9.text: Hu-wal- la-ẓeee ʹar-sa-la Ra-soo-la-hoo bil-Hu-daa wa-Dee-nil- Ḥaq̣-q̣i li-yuz̤̣-hi-ra-hoo ʻa-lad- dee-ni kul-li-hee wa-law ka-ri-hal- Mush-ri-koon.

61:10.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo hal ʹa-dul-lu-kum ʻa-laa ti-jaa-ra-tiñ- tuñ-jee-kum- min ʻA-ẓaa-bin ʹa-leem?

61:11.text: Tuʹ-mi-noo-na bil-laa-hi wa-Ra-soo-li-hee wa-tu-jaa-hi-doo-na fee Sa-bee-lil- laa-hi bi-ʹam-waa-li-kum wa-ʹañ-fu-si-kum: ẓaa-li-kum khay-rul- la-kum ʹiñ- kuñ-tum taʻ-la-moon!

61:12.text: Yag̣-fir la-kum ẓu-noo-ba-kum wa-yud-khil-kum Jan-naa-tiñ- taj-ree miñ taḥ-ti-hal- ʹan-haa-ru wa-ma-saa-ki-na ṭay-yi-ba-tañ- fee Jan-naa-ti ʻAdn: ẓaa-li-kal- Faw-zul- ʻa-z̤̣eem.

61:13.text: Wa-ʹukh-raa tu-ḥib-boo-na-haa,― naṣ-rum- mi-nal- laa-hi wa-fat-ḥuñ- q̣a-reeb. Wa-bash-shi-ril- Muʹ-mi-neen.

61:14.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo koo-nooo ʹañ-ṣaa-ral- laa-hi ka-maa q̣aa-la ʻEe-sab- nu- Mar-ya-ma lil-Ḥa-waa-riy-yee-na man ʹañ-ṣaa-reee ʹi-lal- laah? Q̣aa-lal- Ḥa-waa-riy-yoo-na naḥ-nu ʹañ-ṣaa-rul- laa-hi fa-ʹaa-ma-naṭ- ṭaaa-ʹi-fa-tum- mim- Ba-neee- ʹIs-raaa-ʹee-la wa-ka-fa-raṭ- ṭaaa-ʹi-fah. Fa-ʹay-yad-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo ʻa-laa ʻa-duw-wi-him fa-ʹaṣ-ba-ḥoo z̤̣aa-hi-reen.

62:1.text: Yu-sab-bi-ḥu lil-laa-hi maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-maa fil- ʹar-ḍil- Ma-li-kil- Q̣ud-doo-sil- ʻA-zee-zil- Ḥa-keem.

62:2.text: Hu-wal- la-ẓee ba-ʻa-s̤a fil- ʹUm-miy-yee-na Ra-soo-lam- min-hum yat-loo ʻa-lay-him ʹAa-yaa-ti-hee wa-yu-zak-kee-him wa-yu-ʻal-li-mu-hu-mul- Ki-taa-ba wal-Ḥik-mah,― wa-ʹiñ- kaa-noo miñ- q̣ab-lu la-fee ḍa-laa-lim- mu-been;―

62:3.text: Wa-ʹaa-kha-ree-na min-hum lam-maa yal-ḥa-q̣oo bi-him: wa-Hu-wal- ʻA-zee-zul- Ḥa-keem.

62:4.text: Ẓaa-li-ka Faḍ-lul- laa-hi yuʹ-tee-hi mañy- ya-shaaaʹ: wal-laa-hu Ẓul- Faḍ-lil- ʻa-z̤̣eem.

62:5.text: Ma-s̤a-lul- la-ẓee-na ḥum-mi-lut- Taw-raa-ta s̤um-ma lam yaḥ-mi-loo-haa ka-ma-s̤a-lil- ḥi-maa-ri yaḥ-mi-lu ʹas-faa-raa. Biʹ-sa ma-s̤a-lul- q̣aw-mil- la-ẓee-na kaẓ-ẓa-boo bi-ʹAa-yaa-til- laah. Wal-laa-hu laa- yah-dil- q̣aw-maz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen.

62:6.text: Q̣ul yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na haa-dooo ʹiñ- za-ʻam-tum ʹan-na-kum ʹaw-li-yaaa-ʹu lil-laa-hi miñ- doo-nin- naa-si fa-ta-man-na-wul- Maw-ta ʹiñ- kuñ-tum ṣaa-di-q̣een!

62:7.text: Wa-laa ya-ta-man-naw-na-hooo ʹa-ba-dam- bi-maa q̣ad-da-mat ʹay-dee-him! Wal-laa-hu ʻA-lee-mum- biz̤̣-z̤̣aa-li-meen!

62:8.text: Q̣ul ʹin-nal- Maw-tal- la-ẓee ta-fir-roo-na min-hu fa-ʹin-na-hoo mu-laa-q̣ee-kum sum-ma tu-rad-doo-na ʹi-laa ʻAa-li-mil- g̣ay-bi wash-sha-haa-da-ti fa-yu-nab-bi-ʹu-kum̃- bi-maa kun-tum taʻ-ma-loon!

62:9.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-zee-na ʹaa-ma-nooo ʹi-ẓaa noo-di-ya liṣ-Ṣa-laa-ti miñy- Yaw-mil- JU-MU-ʻA-TI fas-ʻaw ʹi-laa Ẓik-ril- laa-hi wa-ẓa-rul- bayʻ: ẓaa-li-kum khay-rul- la-kum ʹiñ- kuñ-tum taʻ-la-moon!

62:10.text: Fa-ʹi-ẓaa q̣u-ḍi-ya-tiṣ- Ṣa-laa-tu fañ-ta-shi-roo fil- ʹar-ḍi wab-ta-g̣oo miñ- Faḍ-lil- laa-hi waẓ-ku-rul- laa-ha ka-s̤ee-ral- la-ʻal-la-kum tuf-li-ḥoon.

62:11.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa ra-ʹaw ti-jaa-ra-tan ʹaw lah-wa-niñ- faḍ-ḍooo ʹi-lay-haa wa-ta-ra-koo-ka q̣aaa-ʹi-maa: Q̣ul maa- ʻiñ-dal- laa-hi khay-rum- mi-nal- lah-wi wa-mi-nat- ti-jaa-rah! wal-laa-hu Khay-rur- Raa-zi-q̣een.

63:1.text: ʹI-ẓaa jaaa-ʹa-kal- MU-NAA-FI-Q̣OO-NA q̣aa-loo nash-ha-du ʹin-na-ka la-Ra-soo-lul- laah. Wal-laa-hu yaʻ-la-mu ʹin-na-ka la-Ra-soo-luh: wal-laa-hu yash-ha-du ʹin-nal- Mu-naa-fi-q̣ee-na la-kaa-ẓi-boon.

63:2.text: ʹIt-ta-kha-ẓooo ʹay-maa-na-hum jun-na-tañ- fa-ṣad-doo ʻañ- Sa-bee-lil- laah: ʹin-na-hum saaa-ʹa maa- kaa-noo yaʻ-ma-loon.

63:3.text: Ẓaa-li-ka bi-ʹan-na-hum ʹaa-ma-noo s̤um-ma ka-fa-roo fa-ṭu-bi-ʻa ʻa-laa q̣u-loo-bi-him fa-hum laa- yaf-q̣a-hoon.

63:4.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa ra-ʹay-ta-hum tuʻ-ji-bu-ka ʹaj-saa-mu-hum; wa-ʹiñy- ya-q̣oo-loo tas-maʻ li-q̣aw-li-him: Ka-ʹan-na-hum khu-shu-bum- mu-san-na-dah. Yaḥ-sa-boo-na kul-la ṣay-ḥa-tin ʻa-lay-him. Hu-mul- ʻa-duw-wu faḥ-ẓar-hum. Q̣aa-ta-la-hu-mul- laah! ʹAn-naa yuʹ-fa-koon!

63:5.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa q̣ee-la la-hum ta-ʻaa-law yas-tag̣-fir la-kum Ra-soo-lul- laa-hi law-waw ru-ʹoo-sa-hum wa-ra-ʹay-ta-hum ya-ṣud-doo-na wa-hum- mus-tak-bi-roon.

63:6.text: Sa-waaa-ʹun ʻa-lay-him ʹas-tag̣-far-ta la-hum ʹam lam tas-tag̣-fir la-hum. Lañy- yag̣-fi-ral- laa-hu la-hum. ʹIn-nal- laa-ha laa- yah-dil- q̣aw-mal- faa-si-q̣een.

63:7.text: Hu-mul- la-ẓee-na ya-q̣oo-loo-na laa- tuñ-fi-q̣oo ʻa-laa man ʻiñ-da Ra-soo-lil- laa-hi ḥat-taa yañ-faḍ-ḍoo. Wa-lil-laa-hi kha-zaaa-ʹi-nus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi wa-laa-kin-nal- Mu-naa-fi-q̣ee-na laa- yaf-q̣a-hoon.

63:8.text: Ya-q̣oo-loo-na la-ʹir- ra-jaʻ-naaa ʹi-lal- Ma-dee-na-ti la-yukh-ri-jan-nal- ʹa-ʻaz-zu min-hal ʹa-ẓall. Wa-lil-laa-hil- ʻiz-za-tu wa-li-Ra-soo-li-hee wa-lil-Muʹ-mi-nee-na wa-laa-kin-nal- Mu-naa-fi-q̣ee-na laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

63:9.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo laa- tul-hi-kum ʹam-waa-lu-kum wa-laaa ʹaw-laa-du-kum ʻañ-Ẓik- ril- laah. Wa-mañy- yaf-ʻal ẓaa-li-ka fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- khaa-si-roon.

63:10.text: Wa-ʹañ-fi-q̣oo mim- maa ra-zaq̣-naa-kum- miñ- q̣ab-li ʹañy- yaʹ-ti-ya ʹa-ḥa-da-ku-mul- Maw-tu fa-ya-q̣oo-la Rab-bi Law-laaa ʹakh-khar-ta-neee ʹi-laaa ʹa-ja-liñ- q̣a-ree-biñ- fa-ʹaṣ-ṣad-da-q̣a wa-ʹa-kum- mi-naṣ- Ṣaa-li-ḥeen.

63:11.text: Wa-lañy- yu-ʹakh-khi-ral- laa-hu naf-san ʹi-ẓaa jaaa-ʹa ʹa-ja-lu-haa; Wal-laa-hu kha-bee-rum- bi-maa taʻ-ma-loon.

64:1.text: Yu-sab-bi-ḥu lil-laa-hi maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wa-maa fil- ʹarḍ. La-hul- Mul-ku wa-la-hul- Ḥamd; wa-Hu-wa ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Q̣a-deer.

64:2.text: Hu-wal- la-ẓee kha-la-q̣a-kum fa-miñ-kum kaa-fi-ruñw- wa-miñ-kum- Muʹ-min. Wal-laa-hu bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na Ba-ṣeer.

64:3.text: Kha-la-q̣as- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍa bil-ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-ṣaw-wa-ra-kum fa-ʹaḥ-sa-na ṣu-wa-ra-kum, wa-ʹi-lay-hil- Ma-ṣeer.

64:4.text: Yaʻ-la-mu maa- fis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi wa-yaʻ-la-mu maa- tu-sir-roo-na wa-maa tuʻ-li-noon; wal-laa-hu ʻA-lee-mum- bi-ẓaa-tiṣ- ṣu-door.

64:5.text: ʹA-lam yaʹ-ti-kum na-ba-ʹul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo miñ- q̣abl? Fa-ẓaa-q̣oo wa-baa-la ʹam-ri-him wa-la-hum ʻa-ẓaa-bun ʹa-leem.

64:6.text: Ẓaa-li-ka bi-ʹan-na-hoo kaa-nat- taʹ-tee-him ru-su-lu-hum̃- bil-Bay-yi-naa-ti fa-q̣aa-looo ʹa-ba-sha-ruñy- yah-doo-na-naa? Fa-ka-fa-roo wa-ta-wal-law- was-tag̣-nal- laah: wal-laa-hu G̣a-niy-yun Ḥa-meed.

64:7.text: Za-ʻa-mal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-rooo ʹal- lañy- yub-ʻa-s̤oo. Q̣ul ba-laa wa-Rab-bee la-tub-ʻa-s̤un-na s̤um-ma la-tu-nab-ba-ʹun-na bi-maa ʻa-mil-tum. Wa-ẓaa-li-ka ʻa-lal- laa-hi ya-seer.

64:8.text: Fa-ʹaa-mi-noo bil-laa-hi wa-Ra-soo-li-hee wan-Noo-ril- la-ẓeee ʹañ-zal-naa. Wal-laa-hu bi-maa taʻ-ma-loo-na kha-beer.

64:9.text: Yaw-ma yaj-ma-ʻu-kum li-Yaw-mil- Jam-ʻi ẓaa-li-ka Yaw-mut- TA-G̣AA-BUN. Wa-mañy- yuʹ-mim- bil-laa-hi wa-yaʻ-mal ṣaa-li-ḥañy- yu-kaf-fir ʻan-hu say-yi-ʹaa-ti-hee wa-yud-khil-hu Jan-naa-tiñ- taj-ree miñ- taḥ-ti-hal- ʹan-haa-ru khaa-li-dee-na fee-haaa ʹa-ba-daa: ẓaa-li-kal- faw-zul- ʻa-z̤̣eem.

64:10.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo wa-kaẓ-ẓa-boo bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naaa ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bun- Naa-ri khaa-li-dee-na fee-haa: wa-biʹ-sal- Ma-ṣeer.

64:11.text: ʹa-ṣaa-ba Maaa mim- mu-ṣee-ba-tin ʹil-laa bi-ʹiẓ-nil- laah. Wa-mañy- yuʹ-mim- bil-laa-hi yah-di q̣al-bah; wal-laa-hu bi-kul-li shay-ʹin ʻA-leem.

64:12.text: Wa-ʹa-ṭee-ʻul- laa-ha wa-ʹa-ṭee-ʻur- Ra-sool: fa-ʹiñ- ta-wal-lay-tum fa-ʹin-na-maa ʻa-laa Ra-soo-li-nal- Ba-laa-g̣ul- mu-been.

64:13.text: ʹAl-laa-hu Laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa Hoo! Wa-ʻa-lal- laa-hi fal-ya-ta-wak-ka-lil- Muʹ-mi-noon.

64:14.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nooo ʹin-na min ʹaz-waa-ji-kum wa-ʹaw-laa-di-kum ʻa-duw-wal- la-kum faḥ-ẓa-roo-hum! Wa-ʹiñ- taʻ-foo wa-taṣ-fa-ḥoo wa-tag̣-fi-roo fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

64:15.text: ʹIn-na-maaa ʹam-waa-lu-kum wa-ʹaw-laa-du-kum fit-nah: wal-laa-hu ʻiñ-da-hooo ʹAj-run ʻa-z̤̣eem.

64:16.text: Fat-ta-q̣ul- laa-ha mas- ta-ṭaʻ-tum was-ma-ʻoo wa-ʹa-ṭee-ʻoo wa-ʹañ-fi-q̣oo khay-ral-li- ʹañ-fu-si-kum. Wa-mañy- yoo-q̣a shuḥ-ḥa naf-si-hee fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- Muf-li-ḥoon.

64:17.text: ʹIñ- tuq̣-ri-ḍul- laa-ha Q̣ar-ḍan Ḥa-sa-nañy- yu-ḍaa-ʻif-hu la-kum wa-yag̣-fir la-kum: wal-laa-hu Sha-koo-run Ḥa-leem,―

65:1.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-han- Na-biy-yu ʹi-ẓaa ṭal-laq̣-tu-mun- ni-saaa-ʹa fa-ṭal-li-q̣oo-hun-na li-ʻid-da-ti-hin-na wa-ʹaḥ-ṣul- ʻid-dah; wat-ta-q̣ul- laa-ha Rab-ba-kum: laa- tukh-ri-joo-hun-na mim- bu-yoo-ti-hin-na wa-laa yakh-ruj-na ʹil-laaa ʹañy- yaʹ-tee-na bi-faa-ḥi-sha-tim- mu-bay-yi-nah. Wa-til-ka ḥu-doo-dul- laah: wa-mañy- ya-ta-ʻad-da ḥu-doo-dal- laa-hi fa-q̣ad z̤̣a-la-ma naf-sah: laa- tad-ree la-ʻal-lal- laa-ha yuḥ-di-s̤u baʻ-da ẓaa-li-ka ʹam-raa.

65:2.text: Fa-ʹi-ẓaa ba-lag̣-na ʹa-ja-la-hun-na fa-ʹam-si-koo-hun-na bi-maʻroo-fin ʹaw faa-ri-q̣oo-hun-na bi-maʻ-roo-fiñw- wa-ʹash-hi-doo ẓa-way- ʻad-lim- miñ-kum wa-ʹa-q̣ee-mush- sha-haa-da-ta lil-laah. Ẓaa-li-kum yoo-ʻa-z̤̣u bi-hee mañ kaa-na yuʹ-mi-nu bil-laa-hi wal-Yaw-mil- ʹAa-khir. Wa-mañy- yat-ta-q̣il- laa-ha yaj-ʻal- la-hoo makh-ra-jaa,

65:3.text: Wa-yar-zuq̣-hu min hay-s̤u laa- yaḥ-ta-sib. Wa-mañy- ya-ta-wak-kal ʻa-lal- laa-hi fa-Hu-wa ḥas-buh. ʹIn-nal- laa-ha baa-li-g̣u ʹam-rih: q̣ad ja-ʻa-lal- laa-hu li-kul-li shay-ʹiñ- q̣ad-raa.

65:4.text: Wal-laaa-ʹee ya-ʹis-na mi-nal- ma-ḥee-ḍi min- ni-saaa-ʹi-kum ʹi-nir- tab-tum fa-ʻid-da-tu-hun-na s̤a-laa-s̤a-tu ʹash-hu-riñw- wal-laaa-ʹee lam ya-ḥiḍn: wa-ʹu-laa-tul- ʹaḥ-maa-li ʹa-ja-lu-hun-na ʹañy- ya-ḍaʻ-na ḥam-la-hunn: wa-mañy- yat-ta-q̣il- laa-ha yaj-ʻal- la-hoo min ʹam-ri-hee yus-raa.

65:5.text: Ẓaa-li-ka ʹAm-rul- laa-hi ʹañ-za-la-hooo ʹi-lay-kum: wa-mañy- yat-ta-q̣il- laa-ha yu-kaf-fir ʻan-hu say-yi-ʹaa-ti-hee wa-yuʻ-z̤̣im la-hooo ʹaj-raa.

65:6.text: ʹAs-ki-noo-hun-na min ḥay-s̤u sa-kañ-tum- miñw- wuj-di-kum wa-laa tu-ḍaaar-roo-hun-na li-tu-ḍay-yi-q̣oo ʻa-lay-hinn. Wa-ʹiñ- kun-na ʹu-laa-ti ḥam-liñ- fa-ʹañ-fi-q̣oo ʻa-lay-hin-na ḥat-taa ya-ḍaʻ-na ḥam-la-hunn. Fa-ʹin ʹar-ḍaʻ-na la-kum fa-ʹaa-too-hun-na ʹu-joo-ra-hunn: waʹ-ta-mi-roo bay-na-kum̃- bi-maʻ-roof. Wa-ʹiñ- ta-ʻaa-sar-tum fa-sa-tur-ḍi-ʻu la-hooo ʹukh-raa.

65:7.text: Li-yuñ-fiq̣ ẓoo- sa-ʻa-tim- miñ- sa-ʻa-tih, wa-mañ- q̣u-di-ra ʻa-lay-hi riz-q̣u-hoo fal-yuñ-fiq̣ mim-maaa ʹaa-taa-hul- laah. Laa- yu-kal-li-ful- laa-hu naf-san ʹil-laa maaa ʹaa-taa-haa. Sa-yaj-ʻa-lul- laa-hu baʻ-da ʻus-riñy- yus-raa.

65:8.text: Wa-ka-ʹay-yim- miñ- q̣ar-ya-tin ʻa-tat ʻan ʹAm-ri Rab-bi-haa wa-ru-su-li-hee fa-ḥaa-sab-naa-haa ḥi-saa-bañ- sha-dee-dañw- wa-ʻaẓ-ẓab-naa-haa ʻA-ẓaa-ban- nuk-raa.

65:9.text: Fa-ẓaa-q̣at wa-baa-la ʹam-ri-haa wa-kaa-na ʻAa-q̣i-ba-tu ʹam-ri-haa khus-raa.

65:10.text: ʹA-ʻad-dal- laa-hu la-hum ʻA-ẓaa-bañ- sha-dee-dañ- fat-ta-q̣ul- laa-ha yaaa-ʹu-lil- ʹal-baa-bil- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo!― Q̣ad ʹan-za-lal- laa-hu ʹi-lay-kum Ẓik-raa,―

65:11.text: Ra-soo-lañy- yat-loo ʻa-lay-kum ʹAa-yaa-til- laahi mu-bay-yi-naa-til- li-yukh-ri-jal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti mi-naz̤̣- z̤̣u-lu-maa-ti ʹi-lan- Noor. Wa-mañy- yuʹ-mim- bil-laa-hi wa-yaʻ-mal ṣa-li-ḥañy- yud-khil-hu Jan-naa-tiñ- taj-ree miñ- taḥ-ti-hal- ʹan-haa-ru khaa-li-dee-na fee-haaa ʹa-ba-daa: q̣ad ʹaḥ-sa-nal- laa-hu la-hoo riz-q̣aa.

65:12.text: ʹAl-laa-hul- la-ẓee kha-la-q̣a sab-ʻa Sa-maa-waa-tiñw- Wa-mi-nal- ʹar-ḍi mis̤-la-hunn. Ya-ta-naz-za-lul- ʹAm-ru bay-na-hun-na li-taʻ-la-mooo ʹan-nal- laa-ha ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Q̣a-deer: wa-ʹan-nal- laa-ha q̣ad ʹa-ḥaa-ṭa bi-kul-li shay-ʹin ʻil-maa.

66:1.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-han- Na-biy-yu li-ma tu-ḥar-ri-mu maaa ʹa-ḥal-lal- laa-hu lak? Tab-ta-g̣i mar-ḍaa-ta ʹaz-waa-jik. wal-laa-hu G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

66:2.text: Q̣ad fa-ra-ḍal- laa-hu la-kum ta-ḥil-la-ta ʹay-maa-ni-kum: wal-laa-hu Maw-laa-kum, wa-Hu-wal- ʻA-lee-mul- Ḥa-keem.

66:3.text: Wa-ʹiẓ ʹa-sar-ran- Na-biy-yu ʹi-laa baʻ-ḍi ʹaz-waa-ji-hee ḥa-dee-s̤aa, fa-lam-maa nab-ba-ʹat bi-hee wa-ʹaz̤̣-ha-ra-hul- laa-hu ʻa-lay-hi ʻar-ra-fa baʻ-ḍa-hoo wa-ʹaʻ-ra-ḍa ʻam- baʻḍ. Fa-lam-maa nab-ba-ʹa-haa bi-hee q̣aa-lat man ʹam-ba-ʹa-ka haa-ẓaa? Q̣aa-la nab-ba-ʹa-ni-yal- ʻA-lee-mul- Kha-beer.

66:4.text: ʹIñ- ta-too-baaa ʹi-lal- laa-hi fa-q̣ad ṣa-g̣at q̣u-loo-bu-ku-maa; wa-ʹiñ- ta-z̤̣aa-ha-raa ʻa-lay-hi fa-ʹin-nal- laa-ha Hu-wa Maw-laa-hu wa-Jib-ree-lu wa-Ṣaa-li-ḥul- Muʹ-mi-neen, wal-ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tu baʻ-da ẓaa-li-ka z̤̣a-heer.

66:5.text: ʻA-saa Rab-bu-hooo ʹiñ- ṭal-la-q̣a-kun-na ʹañy- yub-di-la-hooo ʹaz-waa-jan khay-ram- miñ-kun-na Mus-li-maa-tim- Muʹ-mi-naa-tiñ q̣aa-ni-taa-tiñ- taaa-ʹi-baa-tin ʻaa-bi-daa-tiñ- saaa-ʹi-ḥaa-tiñ- s̤ay-yi-baa-tiñw- wa-ʹab-kaa-raa.

66:6.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo q̣ooo ʹañ-fu-sa-kum wa-ʹah-lee-kum Naa-rañw- Wa-q̣oo-du-han- Naa-su wal-Ḥi-jaa-ra-tu ʻa-lay-haa ma-laa-ʹi-ka-tun g̣i-laa-z̤̣uñ shi-daa-dul- laa yaʻ-ṣoo-nal- laa-ha maaa ʹa-ma-ra-hum Wa-yaf-ʻa-loo-na maa- yuʹ-ma-roon.

66:7.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo laa- taʻ-ta-ẓi-rul- Yawm! ʹIn-na-maa tuj-zaw-na maa- kuñ-tum taʻ-ma-loon!

66:8.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo too-booo ʹi-lal- laa-hi Taw-ba-tan- Na-ṣoo-ḥaa: ʻa-saa Rab-bu-kum ʹañy- yu-kaf-fi-ra ʻañ-kum say-yi-ʹaa-ti-kum wa-yud-khi-la-kum Jan-na-tiñ- taj-ree miñ taḥ-ti-hal- ʹan-haa-ru Yaw-ma laa- yukh-zil- laa-hun- Na-biy-ya wal-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo ma-ʻah. Noo-ru-hum yas-ʻaa bay-na ʹay-dee-him wa-bi-ʹay-maa-ni-him ya-q̣oo-loo-na ˹Rab-ba-naaa ʹat-mim la-naa Noo-ra-naa wag̣-fir la-naa: ʹin-na-ka ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Q̣a-deer.˺

66:9.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-han- Na-biy-yu jaa-hi-dil- kuf-faa-ra wal-Mu-naa-fi-q̣ee-na wag̣-luz̤̣ ʻa-lay-him. Wa-maʹ-waa-hum Ja-han-nam,― Wa-biʹ-sal- ma-ṣeer.

66:10.text: Ḍa-ra-bal- laa-hu ma-s̤a-lal- lil-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-rum- ra-ʹa-ta Noo-ḥiñw- wam-ra-ʹa-ta Looṭ. Kaa-na-taa taḥ-ta ʻAb-day-ni min ʻi-baa-di-naa ṣaa-li-ḥay-ni fa-khaa-na-taa-hu-maa fa-lam yug̣-ni-yaa ʻan-hu-maa mi-nal- laa-hi shay-ʹañw- wa-q̣ee-lad- khu-lan- Naa-ra ma-ʻad- daa-khi-leen!

66:11.text: Wa-ḍa-ra-bal- laa-hu ma-s̤a-lal- lil-la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-num- ra-ʹa-ta Fir-ʻawn. ʹIẓ q̣aa-lat Rab-bib- ni lee ʻiñ-da-ka bay-tañ- fil- Jan-na-ti wa-naj-ji-nee miñ- Fir-ʻaw-na wa-ʻa-ma-li-hee wa-naj-ji-nee mi-nal- q̣aw-miz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-meen;

66:12.text: Wa-Mar-ya-mab- na-ta ʻIm-raa-nal- la-teee ʹaḥ-ṣa-nat far-ja-haa fa-na-fakh-naa fee-hi mir- roo-ḥi-naa wa-ṣad-da-q̣at bi-Ka-li-maa-ti Rab-bi-haa wa-Ku-tu-bi-hee wa-kaa-nat mi-nal- Q̣aa-ni-teen.

67:1.text: Ta-baa-ra-kal- la-ẓee bi-Ya-di-hil- MULK; wa-Hu-wa ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Q̣a-deer:―

67:2.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee kha-la-q̣al- Maw-ta wal-Ḥa-yaa-ta li-yab-lu-wa-kum ʹay-yu-kum ʹaḥ-sa-nu ʻa-ma-laa; wa-Hu-wal- ʻA-zee-zul- G̣a-foor;―

67:3.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee kha-la-q̣a sab-ʻa sa-maa-waa-tiñ- ṭi-baa-q̣aa: maa- ta-raa fee Khal-q̣ir- Raḥ-maa-ni miñ- ta-faa-wut. Far-ji-ʻil- ba-ṣa-ra hal ta-raa miñ- fu-ṭoor?

67:4.text: S̤um-mar- ji-ʻil- ba-ṣa-ra kar-ra-tay-ni yañ-q̣a-lib ʹi-lay-kal- ba-ṣa-ru khaa-si-ʹañw- wa-hu-wa ḥa-seer.

67:5.text: Wa-la-q̣ad zay-yan-nas- sa-maaa-ʹad- dun-yaa bi-ma-ṣaa-bee-ḥa wa-ja-ʻal-naa-haa ru-joo-mal- lish-sha-yaa-ṭee-ni wa-ʹaʻ-tad-naa la-hum ʻa-ẓaa-bas- Sa-ʻeer.

67:6.text: Wa-lil-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo bi-Rab-bi-him ʻA-ẓaa-bu Ja-han-nam: wa-biʻ-sal- ma-ṣeer.

67:7.text: ʹI-ẓaaa ʹul-q̣oo fee-haa sa-mi-ʻoo la-haa sha-hee-q̣añw- wa-hi-ya ta-foor,―

67:8.text: Ta-kaa-du ta-may-ya-zu mi-nal- g̣ayz̤̣: kul-la-maaa ʹul-q̣i-ya fee-haa faw-juñ sa-ʹa-la-hum kha-za-na-tu-haaa ʹa-lam yaʹ-ti-kum Na-ẓeer?

67:9.text: Q̣aa-loo ba-laa q̣ad jaaa-ʹa-naa Na-ẓeer; fa-kaẓ-ẓab-naa wa-q̣ul-naa maa- naz-za-lal- laa-hu miñ- shayʹ: ʹin ʹañ-tum ʹil-laa fee ḍa-laa-liñ- ka-beer!

67:10.text: Wa-q̣aa-loo law kun-naa nas-ma-ʻu ʹaw naʻ-q̣i-lu maa- kun-naa feee ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bis- Sa-ʻeer!

67:12.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na yakh-shaw-na Rab-ba-hum̃- bil-g̣ay-bi la-hum- Mag̣-fi-ra-tuñw- Wa-ʹAj-ruñ- ka-beer.

67:13.text: Wa-ʹa-sir-roo q̣aw-la-kum ʹa-wij- ha-roo bih; ʹin-na-hoo ʻA-lee-mum- bi-ẓaa-tiṣ- ṣu-door.

67:14.text: ʹA-laa yaʻ-la-mu man kha-laq̣? Wa-Hu-wal- La-ṭee-ful- Kha-beer.

67:15.text: Hu-wal- la-ẓee ja-ʻa-la la-ku-mul- ʹar-ḍa ẓa-loo-lañ- fam-shoo fee ma-naa-ki-bi-haa wa-ku-loo mir- riz-q̣ih: wa-ʹi-lay-hin- Nu-shoor.

67:16.text: ʹA-ʹa-miñ-tum- mañ- fis- Sa-maaa-ʹi ʹañy- yakh-si-fa bi-ku-mul- ʹar-ḍa fa-ʹi-ẓaa hi-ya ta-moor?

67:17.text: ʹAm ʹa-miñ-tum- mañ- fis- Sa-maaa-ʹi ʹañy- yur-si-la ʻa-lay-kum ḥaa-ṣi-baa? Fa-sa-taʻ-la-moo-na kay-fa na-ẓeer.

67:18.text: Wa-la-q̣ad kaẓ-ẓa-bal- la-ẓee-na miñ- q̣ab-li-him fa-kay-fa kaa-na na-keer?

67:19.text: ʹA-wa-lam ya-raw ʹi-laṭ- ṭay-ri faw-q̣a-hum ṣaaaf-faa-tiñw- Wa-yaq̣-biḍn? Maa- yum-si-ku-hun-na ʹil-lar- Raḥ-maan: ʹin-na-hoo bi-kul-li shay-ʹim- Ba-ṣeer.

67:20.text: ʹAm-man haa-ẓal- la-ẓee hu-wa juñ-dul- la-kum yañ-ṣu-ru-kum- miñ doo-nir- Raḥ-maan? ʹI-nil- kaa-fi-roo-na ʹil-laa fee g̣u-roor.

67:21.text: ʹAm-man haa-ẓal- la-ẓee yar-zu-q̣u-kum ʹin ʹam-sa-ka Riz-q̣ah? Bal- laj-joo fee ʻu-tuw-wiñw- Wa-nu-foor.

67:22.text: ʹA-fa-mañy- yam-shee mu-kib-ban ʻa-laa waj-hi-heee ʹah-daaa ʹam-mañy- yam-shee sa-wiy-yan ʻa-laa Ṣi-raa-ṭim- Mus-ta-q̣eem.

67:23.text: Q̣ul Hu-wal- la-ẓeee ʹañ-sha-ʹa-kum wa-ja-ʻa-la la-ku-mus- sam-ʻa wal-ʹab-ṣaa-ra wal-ʹaf-ʹi-dah: q̣a-lee-lam- maa tash-ku-roon.

67:24.text: Q̣ul Hu-wal- la-ẓee ẓa-ra-ʹa-kum fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-ʹi-lay-hi tuḥ-sha-roon.

67:25.text: Wa-ya-q̣oo-loo-na ma-taa haa-ẓal- waʻ-du ʹiñ- kuñ-tum ṣaa-di-q̣een.

67:26.text: Q̣ul ʹin-na-mal- ʻil-mu ʻiñ-dal- laah: wa-ʹin-na-maaa ʹa-na Na-ẓee-rum- mu-been.

67:27.text: Fa-lam-maa ra-ʹaw-hu zul-fa-tañ- seee-ʹat wu-joo-hul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo wa-q̣ee-la haa-ẓal- la-ẓee kuñ-tum̃- bi-hee tad-da-ʻoon!

67:28.text: Q̣ul ʹa-ra-ʹay-tum ʹin ʹah-la-ka-ni-yal- laa-hu wa-mam- ma-ʻi-ya ʹaw ra-ḥi-ma-naa fa-mañy- yu-jee-rul- kaa-fi-ree-na min ʻA-ẓaa-bin ʹa-leem.

67:29.text: Q̣ul Hu-war- Raḥ-maa-nu ʹaa-man-naa bi-hee wa-ʻa-lay-hi ta-wak-kal-naa: fa-sa-taʻ-la-moo-na man hu-wa fee ḍa-laa-lim- mu-been.

67:30.text: Q̣ul ʹa-ra-ʹay-tum ʹin ʹaṣ-ba-ḥa maaa-ʹu-kum g̣aw-rañ- fa-mañy- yaʹ-tee-kum̃ bi-maaa-ʹim- ma-ʻeen?

68:7.text: ʹIn-na Rab-ba-ka Hu-wa ʹaʻ-la-mu bi-mañ ḍal-la ʻañ Sa-bee-lih: wa-Hu-wa ʹAʻ-la-mu bil-Muh-ta-deen.

68:15.text: ʹI-ẓaa tut-laa ʻa-lay-hi ʹAa-yaa-tu-naa q̣aa-la ʹA-saa-ṭee-rul- ʹAw-wa-leen!

68:17.text: ʹIn-naa ba-law-naa-hum ka-maa ba-law-naaa ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bal- Jan-nah, ʹiẓ ʹaq̣-sa-moo la-yaṣ-ri-mun-na-haa muṣ-bi-ḥeen,

68:19.text: Fa-ṭaa-fa ʻa-lay-haa ṭaaa-ʹi-fum- mir- Rab-bi-ka wa-hum naaa-ʹi-moon.

68:22.text: ʹA-nig̣- doo ʻa-laa ḥar-s̤i-kum ʹiñ- kuñ-tum ṣaa-ri-meen.

68:24.text: ʹAl- laa yad-khu-lan-na-hal- yaw-ma ʻa-lay-kum- mis-keen.

68:28.text: Q̣aa-la ʹaw-sa-ṭu-hum ʹa-lam ʹa-q̣ul- la-kum law-laa- tu-sab-bi-ḥoon?

68:29.text: Q̣aa-loo Sub-ḥaa-na Rab-bi-naaa ʹin-naa kun-naa z̤̣aa-li-meen!

68:32.text: ʻA-saa Rab-bu-naaa ʹañy- yub-di-la-naa khay-ram- min-haaa ʹin-naaa ʹi-laa Rab-bi-naa raa-g̣i-boon!

68:33.text: Ka-ẓaa-li-kal- ʻA-ẓaab; wa-la-ʻA-ẓaa-bul- ʹAa-khi-ra-ti ʹak-bar. Law kaa-noo yaʻ-la-moon!

68:34.text: ʹIn-na lil-Mut-ta-q̣ee-na ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-him Jan-na-tin- Na-ʻeem.

68:39.text: ʹAm la-kum ʹAy-maa-nun ʻa-lay-naa baa-li-g̣a-tun ʹi-laa Yaw-mil- Q̣i-yaa-ma-ti ʹin-na la-kum la-maa taḥ-ku-moon?
