68:41.text: ʹAm la-hum shu-ra-kaaa-ʹu fal-yaʹ-too bi-shu-ra-kaaa-ʹi-him ʹiñ- kaa-noo ṣaa-di-q̣een!

68:42.text: Yaw-ma yuk-sha-fu ʻañ- saa-q̣iñw- wa-yud-ʻaw-na ʹi-las- su-joo-di fa-laa yas-ta-ṭee-ʻoon,―

68:43.text: Khaa-shi-ʻa-tan ʹab-ṣaa-ru-hum tar-ha-q̣u-hum ẓil-lah: wa-q̣ad kaa-noo yud-ʻaw-na ʹi-las- su-joo-di wa-hum saa-li-moon.

68:44.text: Fa-ẓar-nee wa-mañy- yu-kaẓ-ẓi-bu bi-haa-ẓal- Ḥa-dees̤: sa-nas-tad-ri-ju-hum- min ḥay-s̤u laa- yaʻ-la-moon.

68:46.text: ʹAm tas-ʹa-lu-hum ʹaj-rañ- fa-hum- mim- mag̣-ra-mim- mus̤-q̣a-loon?

68:48.text: Faṣ-bir li-Ḥuk-mi Rab-bi-ka wa-laa ta-kuñ- ka-Ṣaa-ḥi-bil- Ḥoot. ʹIẓ naa-daa wa-hu-wa mak-z̤̣oom.

68:49.text: Law-laaa ʹañ- ta-daa-ra-ka-hoo Niʻ-ma-tum- mir- Rab-bi-hee la-nu-bi-ẓa bil-ʻa-raaa-ʹi wa-hu-wa maẓ-moom.

68:51.text: Wa-ʹiñy- ya-kaa-dul- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo la-yuz-li-q̣oo-na-ka bi-ʹab-ṣaa-ri-him lam-maa sa-mi-ʻuẓ- Ẓik-ra wa-ya-q̣oo-loo-na ʹin-na-hoo la-maj-noon!

69:6.text: Wa-ʹam-maa ʻAa-duñ- fa-ʹuh-li-koo bi-Ree-ḥiñ- ṣar-ṣa-rin ʻaa-ti-yah;

69:7.text: Sakh-kha-ra-haa ʻa-lay-him sab-ʻa la-yaa-liñw- wa-s̤a-maa-ni-ya-ta ʹay-yaa-min ḥu-soo-mañ- fa-ta-ral- q̣aw-ma fee-haa ṣar-ʻaa ka-ʹan-na-hum ʹaʻ-jaa-zu nakh-lin khaa-wi-yah!

69:9.text: Wa-jaaa-ʹa Fir-ʻaw-nu wa-mañ- q̣ab-la-hoo wal-muʹ-ta-fi-kaa-tu bil-khaa-ṭi-ʹah,

69:10.text: Fa-ʻa-ṣaw ra-soo-la Rab-bi-him fa-ʹa-kha-ẓa-hum ʹakh-ẓa-tar- raa-bi-yah.

69:11.text: ʹIn-naa lam-maa ṭa-g̣al- maaa-ʹu ḥa-mal-naa-kum fil- jaa-ri-yah.

69:12.text: Li-naj-ʻa-la-haa la-kum Taẓ-ki-ra-tañw-wa ta-ʻi-ya-haaa ʹu-ẓu-nuñw- waa-ʻi-yah.

69:13.text: Fa-ʹi-ẓaa nu-fi-kha fiṣ- Ṣoo-ri naf-kha-tuñw- waa-ḥi-dah,

69:14.text: Wa-ḥu-mi-la-til- ʹar-ḍu wal-ji-baa-lu fa-duk-ka-taa dak-ka-tañw- waa-ḥi-dah,―

69:17.text: Wal-ma-la-ku- ʻa-laaa ʹar-jaaa-ʹi-haa, wa-yaḥ-mi-lu ʻAr-sha Rab-bi-ka faw-q̣a-hum Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓiñ- s̤a-maa-ni-yah.

69:18.text: Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓiñ- tuʻ-ra-ḍoo-na laa- takh-faa miñ-kum khaa-fi-yah.

69:19.text: Fa-ʹam-maa man ʹoo-ti-ya Ki-taa-ba-hoo bi-ya-mee-ni-hee fa-ya-q̣oo-lu haaa-ʹu-muq̣- ra-ʹoo Ki-taa-bi-yah!

69:24.text: Ku-loo wash-ra-boo ha-neee-ʹam- bi-maaa ʹas-laf-tum fil- ʹay-yaa-mil- khaa-li-yah!

69:25.text: Wa-ʹam-maa man ʹoo-ti-ya Ki-taa-ba-hoo bi-shi-maa-li-hee fa-ya-q̣oo-lu yaa-lay-ta-nee lam ʹoo-ta Ki-taa-bi-yah!

69:32.text: S̤um-ma fee sil-si-la-tiñ- ẓar-ʻu-haa sab-ʻoo-na ẓi-raa-ʻañ- fas-lu-kooh!

69:33.text: ʹIn-na-hoo kaa-na laa- yuʹ-mi-nu bil-laa-hil- ʻA-z̤̣eem,

69:41.text: Wa-maa hu-wa bi-q̣aw-li shaa-ʻir: q̣a-lee-lam- maa tuʹ-mi-noon!

69:42.text: Wa-laa bi-q̣aw-li- kaa-hin: q̣a-lee-lam- maa ta-ẓak-ka-roon.

69:47.text: Fa-maa miñ-kum- min ʹa-ḥa-din ʻan-hu ḥaa-ji-zeen.

70:4.text: Taʻ-ru-jul- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tu war-Roo-ḥu ʹi-lay-hi fee Yaw-miñ- kaa-na miq̣-daa-ru-hoo kham-see-na ʹal-fa sa-nah:

70:11.text: Yu-baṣ-ṣa-roo-na-hum,: ya-wad-dul- muj-ri-mu law yaf-ta-dee min ʻA-ẓaa-bi Yaw-mi-ʹi-ẓim- bi-ba-neeh,

70:14.text: Wa-mañ fil- ʹar-ḍi ja-mee-ʻañ- s̤um-ma yuñ-jeeh:

70:27.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na- hum- min ʻa-zaa-bi Rab-bi-him- mush-fi-q̣oon,―

70:30.text: ʹIl-laa ʻa-laaa ʹaz-waa-ji-him ʹaw maa- ma-la-kat ʹay-maa-nu-hum fa-ʹin-na-hum g̣ay-ru ma-loo-meen,

70:31.text: Fa-ma-nib- ta-g̣aa wa-raaa-ʹa ẓaa-li-ka fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hu-mul- ʻaa-doon;―

70:38.text: ʹA-yaṭ-ma-ʻu kul-lum- ri-ʹim- min-hum ʹañy- yud-kha-la Jan-na-ta Na-ʻeem?

70:40.text: Fa-laaa ʹuq̣-si-mu bi-Rab-bil- Ma-shaa-ri-q̣i wal-Ma-g̣aa-ri-bi ʹin-naa la-Q̣aa-di-roon.

70:41.text: ʻA-laaa ʹan- nu-bad-di-la khay-ram- min-hum wa-maa Naḥ-nu bi-mas-boo-q̣een.

70:42.text: Fa-ẓar-hum ya-khoo-ḍoo wa-yal-ʻa-boo ḥat-taa yu-laa-q̣oo Yaw-ma-hu-mul- la-ẓee yoo-ʻa-doon!

70:43.text: Yaw-ma yakh-ru-joo-na mi-nal- ʹaj-daa-s̤i si-raa-ʻañ- ka-ʹan-na-hum ʹi-laa nu-ṣu-biñy- yoo-fi-ḍoon,―

70:44.text: Khaa-shi-ʻa-tan ʹab-ṣaa-ru-hum tar-ha-q̣u-hum ẓil-lah! Ẓaa-li-kal- Yaw-mul- la-ẓee kaa-noo yoo-ʻa-doon!

71:1.text: ʹIn-naaa ʹar-sal-naa Noo-ḥan ʹi-laa Q̣aw-mi-heee ʹan ʹañ-ẓir Q̣aw-ma-ka miñ- q̣ab-li ʹañy- yaʹ-ti-ya-hum ʻA-ẓaa-bun ʹa-leem,

71:2.text: Q̣aa-la yaa-Q̣aw-mi ʹin-nee la-kum Na-ẓee-rum- mu-been:

71:4.text: Yag̣-fir la-kum- miñ- ẓu-noo-bi-kum wa-yu-ʹakh-khi-ru-kum ʹi-laaa ʹA-ja-lim- Mu-sam-maa: ʹin-na ʹA-ja-lal- laa-hi ʹi-ẓaa jaaa-ʹa laa- yu-ʹakh-khar, Law kuñ-tum taʻ-la-moon.

71:5.text: Q̣aa-la Rab-bi ʹin-nee da-ʻaw-tu Q̣aw-mee lay-lañw- wa-na-haa-raa:

71:7.text: Wa-ʹin-nee kul-la-maa da-ʻaw-tu-hum li-tag̣-fi-ra la-hum ja-ʻa-looo ʹa-ṣaa-bi-ʻa-hum feee ʹaa-ẓaa-ni-him was-tag̣-shaw s̤i-yaa-ba-hum wa-ʹa-ṣar-roo was-tak-ba-rus- tik-baa-raa,

71:9.text: S̤um-ma ʹin-neee ʹaʻ-lañ-tu la-hum wa-ʹas-rar-tu la-hum ʹis-raa-raa,

71:10.text: Fa-q̣ul-tus- tag̣-fi-roo Rab-ba-kum; ʹin-na-hoo kaa-na G̣af-faa-raa;

71:12.text: Wa-yum-did-kum̃- bi-ʹam-waa-liñw- wa-ba-nee-na wa-yaj-ʻal- la-kum Jan-naa-tiñw- Wa- yaj-ʻal- la-kum ʹan-haa-raa.

71:13.text: Maa- la-kum laa- tar-joo-na lil-laa-hi wa-q̣aa-raa,―

71:15.text: ʹA-lam ta-raw kay-fa kha-la-q̣al- laa-hu sab-ʻa sa-maa-waa-tiñ ṭi-baa-q̣aa,

71:16.text: Wa-ja-ʻa-lal- q̣a-ma-ra fee-hin-na noo-rañw- wa-ja-ʻa-lash- sham-sa Si-raa-jaa?

71:21.text: Q̣aa-la Noo-ḥur- Rab-bi ʹin-na-hum ʻa-ṣaw-nee wat-ta-ba-ʻoo mal- lam ya-zid-hu maa-lu-hoo wa-wa-la-du-hooo ʹil-laa kha-saa-raa.

71:23.text: Wa-q̣aa-loo laa- ta-ẓa-run-na ʹaa-li-ha-ta-kum wa-laa ta-ẓa-run-na Wad-dañw- Wa-laa- Su-waa-ʻaa, wa-laa Ya-g̣oo-s̤a wa-Ya-ʻoo-q̣a wa-Nas-raa;―

71:24.text: Wa-q̣ad ʹa-ḍal-loo ka-s̤ee-raa; wa-laa ta-zi-diz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-mee-na ʹil-laa ḍa-laa-laa.

71:25.text: Mim-maa kha-ṭeee-ʹaa-ti-him ʹug̣-ri-q̣oo fa-ʹud-khi-loo Naa-raa: fa-lam ya-ji-doo la-hum- miñ- doo-nil- laa-hi ʹañ-ṣaa-raa.

71:26.text: Wa-q̣aa-la Noo-ḥur- Rab-bi laa- ta-ẓar ʻa-lal- ʹar-ḍi mi-nal- kaa-fi-ree-na day-yaa-raa!

71:27.text: ʹIn-na-ka ʹiñ- ta-ẓar-hum yu-ḍil-loo ʻi-baa-da-ka wa-laa ya-li-dooo ʹil-laa faa-ji-rañ- kaf-faa-raa.

71:28.text: Rab-big̣- fir lee wa-li-waa-li-day-ya wa-li-mañ- da-kha-la bay-ti-ya Muʹ-mi-nañw- Wa-lil-Muʹ-mi-nee-na wal-Muʹ-mi-naat: wa-laa ta-zi-diz̤̣- z̤̣aa-li-mee-na ʹil-laa ta-baa-raa!

72:1.text: Q̣ul ʹoo-ḥi-ya ʹi-lay-ya ʹan-na- hus-ta-ma-ʻa na-fa-rum- mi-nal- Jin-ni fa-q̣aa-looo ʹin-naa sa-miʻ-naa Q̣ur-ʹaa-nan ʻa-ja-baa,

72:2.text: Yah-deee ʹi-lar- Rush-di fa-ʹaa-man-naa bih: wa-lan- nush-ri-ka bi-Rab-bi-naaa ʹa-ḥa-daa.

72:3.text: Wa-ʹan-na-hoo Ta-ʻaa-laa Jad-du Rab-bi-naa mat- ta-kha-ẓa ṣaa-ḥi-ba-tañw- wa-laa- wa-la-daa.

72:4.text: Wa-ʹan-na-hoo kaa-na ya-q̣oo-lu sa-fee-hu-naa ʻa-l al-laa-hi sha-ṭa-ṭaa;

72:5.text: Wa-ʹan-naa z̤̣a-nan-naaa ʹal- lañ- ta-q̣oo-lal- ʹiñ-su wal-jin-nu ʻa-l al-laa-hi ka-ẓi-baa.

72:6.text: Wa-ʹan-na-hoo kaa-na ri-jaa-lum- mi-nal- ʹiñ-si ya-ʻoo-ẓoo-na bi-ri-jaa-lim- mi-nal- Jin-ni fa-zaa-doo-hum ra-ha-q̣aa.

72:7.text: Wa-ʹan-na-hum z̤̣an-noo ka-maa z̤̣a-nañ-tum ʹal- lañy- yab-ʻa-s̤al- laa-hu ʹa-ḥa-daa.

72:8.text: Wa-ʹan-naa la-mas-nas- sa-maaa-ʹa fa-wa-jad-naa-haa mu-li-ʹat ḥa-ra-sañ- sha-dee-dañw- wa-shu-hu-baa.

72:9.text: Wa-ʹan-naa kun-naa naq̣-ʻu-du min-haa ma-q̣aa-ʻi-da lis-samʻ; fa-mañy- yas-ta-mi-ʻil- ʹaa-na ya-jid la-hoo shi-haa-bar- ra-ṣa-daa.

72:10.text: Waʹan-naa laa- nad-reee ʹa-shar-run ʹu-ree-da bi-mañ- fil- ʹar-ḍi ʹam ʹa-raa-da bi-him Rab-bu-hum ra-sha-daa.

72:11.text: Wa-ʹan-naa min-naṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥoo-na wa-min-naa doo-na ẓaa-lik: kun-naa ṭa-raaa-ʹi-q̣a q̣i-da-daa.

72:12.text: Wa-ʹan-naa z̤̣a-nan-naaa ʹal- lan- nuʻ-ji-zal- laa-ha fil- ʹar-ḍi wa-lan- nuʻ-ji-za-hoo ha-ra-baa.

72:13.text: Wa-ʹan-naa lam-maa sa-miʻ-nal- Hu-daaa ʹaa-man-naa bih. Fa-mañy- yuʹ-mim- bi-Rab-bi-hee fa-laa ya-khaa-fu bakh-sañw- wa-laa- ra-ha-q̣aa.

72:14.text: Wa-ʹan-naa min-nal- Mus-li-moo-na wa-min-nal- Q̣aa-si-ṭoon. Fa-man ʹas-la-ma fa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka ta-ḥar-raw ra-sha-daa.

72:16.text: Wa-ʹal-la-wis- ta-q̣aa-moo ʻa-laṭ- Ṭa-ree-q̣a-ti la-ʹas-q̣ay-naa-hum- maaa-ʹan g̣a-da-q̣aa.

72:17.text: Li-naf-ti-na-hum feeh. Wa-mañy- yuʻ-riḍ ʻañ Ẓik-ri Rab-bi-hee yas-luk-hu ʻA-ẓaa-bañ- ṣa-ʻa-daa.

72:18.text: Wa-ʹan-nal- Ma-saa-ji-da lil-laa-hi fa-laa tad-ʻoo ma-ʻal- laa-hi ʹa-ḥa-daa;

72:19.text: Wa-ʹan-na-hoo lam-maa q̣aa-ma ʻAb-dul- laa-hi yad-ʻoo-hu kaa-doo ya-koo-noo-na ʻa-lay-hi li-ba-daa.

72:20.text: Q̣ul ʹin-na-maaa ʹad-ʻoo Rab-bee wa-laaa ʹush-ri-ku bi-heee ʹa-ḥa-daa.

72:21.text: Q̣ul ʹin-nee laaa ʹam-li-ku la-kum ḍar-rañw- wa-laa- ra-sha-daa.

72:22.text: Q̣ul ʹin-nee lañy- yu-jee-ra-nee mi-nal- laa-hi ʹa-ḥad, wa-lan ʹa-ji-da miñ- doo-ni-hee mul-ta-ḥa-daa,

72:23.text: ʹIl-laa ba-laa-g̣am- mi-nal- laa-hi wa-Ri-saa-laa-tih: wa-mañy- yaʻ-ṣil- laa-ha wa-Ra-soo-la-hoo fa-ʹin-na la-hoo Naa-ra Ja-han-na-ma khaa-li-dee-na fee-haaa ʹa-ba-daa.

72:24.text: Ḥat-taaa ʹi-ẓaa ra-ʹaw maa- yoo-ʻa-doo-na fa-sa-yaʻ-la-moo-na man ʹaḍ-ʻa-fu naa-ṣi-rañw- wa-ʹa-q̣al-lu ʻa-da-daa.

72:25.text: Q̣ul ʹin ʹad-reee ʹa-q̣a-ree-bum- maa too-ʻa-doo-na ʹam yaj-ʻa-lu la-hoo Rab-beee ʹa-ma-daa.

72:26.text: ʻAa-li-mul- G̣ay-bi fa-laa yuz̤̣-hi-ru ʻa-laa G̣ay-bi-heee ʹa-ḥa-daa,

72:27.text: ʹIl-laa ma-nir- ta-ḍaa mir- ra-soo-liñ- fa-ʹin-na-hoo yas-lu-ku mim- bay-ni ya-day-hi wa-min khal-fi-hee ra-ṣa-daa,

72:28.text: Li-yaʻ-la-ma ʹañ- q̣ad ʹab-la-g̣oo Ri-saa-laa-ti Rab-bi-him wa-ʹa-ḥaa-ṭa bi-maa la-day-him wa-ʹaḥ-ṣaa kul-la shay-ʹin ʻa-da-daa.

73:4.text: ʹAw zid ʻa-lay-hi wa-rat-ti-lil- Q̣ur-ʹaa-na tar-tee-laa.

73:6.text: ʹIn-na naa-shi-ʹa-tal- lay-li hi-ya ʹa-shad-du waṭ-ʹañw- wa-ʹaq̣-wa-mu Q̣ee-laa.

73:7.text: ʹIn-na la-ka fin- na-haa-ri sab-ḥañ- ṭa-wee-laa.

73:8.text: Waẓ-ku-ris- ma Rab-bi-ka wa-ta-bat-tal ʹi-lay-hi tab-tee-laa.

73:9.text: Rab-bul- Mash-ri-q̣i wal-Mag̣-ri-bi Laaa ʹi-laa-ha ʹil-laa Hu-wa fat-ta-khiẓ-hu Wa-kee-laa.

73:10.text: Waṣ-bir ʻa-laa maa- ya-q̣oo-loo-na wah-jur-hum haj-rañ- ja-mee-laa.

73:11.text: Wa-ẓar-nee wal-mu-kaẓ-ẓi-bee-na ʹu-lin- naʻ-ma-ti wa-mah-hil-hum q̣a-lee-laa.

73:14.text: Yaw-ma tar-ju-ful- ʹar-ḍu wal-Ji-baa-lu wa-kaa-na-til- ji-baa-lu ka-s̤ee-bam- ma-hee-laa.

73:15.text: ʹIn-naaa ʹar-sal-naaa ʹi-lay-kum Ra-soo-lañ- shaa-hi-dan ʻa-lay-kum ka-maaa ʹar-sal-naaa ʹi-laa Fir-ʻaw-na Ra-soo-laa.

73:16.text: Fa-ʻa-ṣaa Fir-ʻaw-nur- Ra-soo-la fa-ʹa-khaẓ-naa-hu ʹakh-ẓañw- Wa-bee-laa.

73:17.text: Fa-kay-fa tat-ta-q̣oo-na ʹiñ- ka-far-tum Yaw-mañy- yaj-ʻa-lul- wil-daa-na shee-baa―

73:18.text: ʹAs-sa-maaa-ʹu muñ-fa-ṭi-rum- bih? Kaa-na waʻ-du-hoo maf-ʻoo-laa.

73:19.text: ʹIn-na haa-ẓi-hee Taẓ-ki-rah: fa-mañ shaaa-ʹat- ta-kha-ẓa ʹi-laa Rab-bi-hee Sa-bee-laa!

73:20.text: ʹIn-na Rab-ba-ka yaʻ-la-mu ʹan-na-ka ta-q̣oo-mu ʹad-naa miñ- s̤u-lu-s̤a-yil- lay-li wa-niṣ-fa-hoo wa-s̤u-lu-s̤a-hoo wa-ṭaaa-ʹi-fa-tum- mi-nal- la-ẓee-na ma-ʻak. Wal-laa-hu yu-q̣ad-di-rul- lay-la wan-na-haar. ʻA-li-ma ʹal- lañ- tuḥ-ṣoo-hu fa-taa-ba ʻa-lay-kum faq̣-ra-ʹoo maa- ta-yas-sa-ra mi-nal- Q̣ur-ʹaan. ʻA-li-ma ʹañ- sa-ya-koo-nu miñ-kum- mar-ḍaa wa-ʹaa-kha-roo-na yaḍ-ri-boo-na fil- ʹar-ḍi yab-ta-g̣oo-na miñ- Faḍ-lil- laa-hi wa-ʹaa-kha-roo-na yu-q̣aa-ti-loo-na fee Sa-bee-lil- laah. Faq̣-ra-ʹoo maa- ta-yas-sa-ra min-hu wa-ʹa-q̣ee-muṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta wa-ʹaa-tuz- Za-kaa-ta wa-ʹaq̣-ri-ḍul- laa-ha Q̣ar-ḍan Ḥa-sa-naa. Wa-maa tu-q̣ad-di-moo li-ʹañ-fu-si-kum- min khay-riñ- ta-ji-doo-hu ʻiñ-dal- laa-hi hu-wa khy-rañw- wa-ʹAʻ-z̤̣a-ma ʹAj-raa. Was-tag̣-fi-rul- laah: ʹin-nal- laa-ha G̣a-foo-rur- Ra-ḥeem.

74:24.text: Fa-q̣aa-la ʹin haa-ẓaaa ʹil-laa siḥ-ruñy- yuʹ-s̤ar;

74:31.text: Wa-maa ja-ʻal-naaa ʹAṣ-ḥaa-ban- naa-ri ʹil-laa ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tañw- wa-maa ja-ʻal-naa ʻid-da-ta-hum ʹil-laa fit-na-tal- lil-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo li-yas-tay-q̣i-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹoo-tul- Ki-taa-ba wa-yaz-daa-dal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-nooo ʹee-maa-nañw- Wa-laa- yar-taa-bal- la-ẓee-na ʹoo-tul- Ki-taa-ba wal-Muʹ-mi-noo-na wa-li-ya-q̣oo-lal- la-ẓee-na fee q̣u-loo-bi-him- ma-ra-ḍuñw- wal-kaa-fi-roo-na maa-ẓaaa ʹa-raa-dal- laa-hu bi-haa-ẓaa ma-s̤a-laa? Ka-ẓaa-li-ka yu-ḍil-lul- laa-hu mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu wa-yah-dee mañy- ya-shaaaʹ. Wa-maa yaʻ-la-mu ju-noo-da Rab-bi-ka ʹil-laa Hoo. Wa-maa hi-ya ʹil-laa ẓik-raa lil-ba-shar.

74:37.text: Li-mañ shaaa-ʹa miñ-kum ʹañy- ya-ta-q̣ad-da-ma ʹaw ya-ta-ʹakh-khar;

74:52.text: Bal yu-ree-du kul-lum- ri-ʹim- min-hum ʹañy- yuʹ-taa ṣu-ḥu-fam- mu-nash-sha-rah!

74:56.text: Wa-maa yaẓ-ku-roo-na ʹil-laaa ʹañy- ya-shaaa-ʹal- laah: Hu-wa ʹAh-lut- taq̣-waa wa-ʹAh-lul- Mag̣-fi-rah.

75:4.text: Bal-laa Q̣aa-di-ree-na ʻa-laaa ʹan- nu-saw-wi-ya ba-naa-nah.

75:13.text: Yu-nab-ba-ʹul- ʹiñ-saa-nu Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓim- bi-maa q̣ad-da-ma wa-ʹakh-khar.

75:16.text: Laa- tu-ḥar-rik bi-hee li-saa-na-ka li-taʻ-ja-la bih.

75:37.text: ʹA-lam ya-ku nuṭ-fa-tam- mim- ma-niy-yiñy- yum-naa?

75:40.text: ʹA-lay-sa ẓaa-li-ka bi-q̣aa-di-rin ʻa-laaa ʹañy- yuḥ-yi-yal- maw-taa?

76:1.text: Hal ʹa-taa ʻa-lal- ʹIÑ-SAA-NI ḥee-num- mi-nad- DAH-RI lam ya-kuñ- shay-ʹam- maẓ-koo-raa?

76:2.text: ʹIn-naa kha-laq̣-nal- ʹiñ-saa-na min- nuṭ-fa-tin ʹam-shaa-jin- nab-ta-lee-hi fa-ja-ʻal-naa-hu sa-mee-ʻam- ba-ṣee-raa.

76:3.text: ʹIn-naa ha-day-naa-hus- sa-bee-la ʹim-maa sha-ki-rañw- wa-ʹim-maa ka-foo-raa.

76:4.text: ʹIn-naaa ʹaʻ-tad-naa lil-kaa-fi-ree-na sa-laa-si-la wa-ʹag̣-laa-lañw- wa-Sa-ʻee-raa.

76:5.text: ʹIn-nal- ʹab-raa-ra yash-ra-boo-na miñ- kaʹ-siñ- kaa-na mi-zaa-ju-haa kaa-foo-raa,―

76:6.text: ʻAy-nañy- yash-ra-bu bi-haa ʻI-baa-dul- laa-hi yu-faj-ji-roo-na-haa taf-jee-raa.

76:7.text: Yoo-foo-na bin-naẓ-ri wa-ya-khaa-foo-na yaw-mañ- kaa-na shar-ru-hoo mus-ta-ṭee-raa.

76:8.text: Wa-yuṭ-ʻi-moo-naṭ- ṭa-ʻaa-ma ʻa-laa ḥub-bi-hee mis-kee-nañw- wa-ya-tee-mañw- wa-ʹa-see-raa,―

76:9.text: ʹIn-na-maa nuṭ-ʻi-mu-kum li-waj-hil- laa-hi laa- nu-ree-du miñ-kum ja-zaaa-ʹañw- wa-laa- shu-koo-raa.

76:10.text: ʹIn-naa na-khaa-fu mir- Rab-bi-naa Yaw-man ʻa-boo-sañ- q̣am-ṭa-ree-raa.

76:11.text: Fa-wa-q̣aa-hu-mul- laa-hu shar-ra ẓaa-li-kal- Yaw-mi wa-laq̣-q̣aa-hum naḍ-ra-tañw- wa-su-roo-raa.

76:13.text: Mut-ta-ki-ʹee-na fee-haa ʻa-lal- ʹa-raaa-ʹik, laa- ya-raw-na fee-haa sham-sañw- wa-laa- zam-ha-ree-raa.

76:14.text: Wa-daa-ni-ya-tan ʻa-lay-him z̤̣i-laa-lu-haa wa-ẓul-li-lat q̣u-ṭoo-fu-haa taẓ-lee-laa.

76:15.text: Wa-yu-ṭaa-fu ʻa-lay-him̃- bi-ʹaa-ni-ya-tim- miñ- fiḍ-ḍa-tiñw- wa-ʹak-waa-biñ- kaa-nat q̣a-waa-ree-raa,―

76:17.text: Wa-yus-q̣aw-na fee-haa kaʹ-sañ- kaa-na mi-zaa-ju-haa zañ-ja-bee-laa,―

76:19.text: Wa-ya-ṭoo-fu ʻa-lay-him wil-daa-num- mu-khal-la-doon: ʹi-ẓaa ra-ʹay-ta-hum ḥa-sib-ta-hum luʹ-lu-ʹam- mañ-s̤oo-raa.

76:20.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa ra-ʹay-ta s̤am-ma ra-ʹay-ta Na-ʻee-mañw- Wa-Mul-kañ- Ka-bee-raa.

76:21.text: ʻAa-li-ya-hum s̤i-yaa-bu suñ-du-sin khuḍ-ruñw- wa-ʹis-tab-raq̣, wa-ḥul-looo ʹa-saa-wi-ra miñ- fiḍ-ḍah; wa-sa-q̣aa-hum Rab-bu-hum Sha-raa-bañ- Ṭa-hoo-raa.

76:22.text: ʹIn-na haa-ẓaa kaa-na la-kum ja-zaaa-ʹañw- wa-kaa-na saʻ-yu-kum- mash-koo-raa.

76:23.text: ʹIn-naa Naḥ-nu naz-zal-naa ʻa-lay-kal- Q̣ur-ʹaa-na tañ-zee-laa.

76:24.text: Faṣ-bir li-Ḥuk-mi Rab-bi-ka wa-laa tu-ṭiʻ min-hum ʹaa-s̤i-man ʹaw ka-foo-raa.

76:26.text: Wa-mi-nal- lay-li fas-jud la-hoo wa-sab-biḥ-hu lay-lañ- ṭa-wee-laa.

76:27.text: ʹIn-na haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi yu-ḥib-boo-nal- ʻaa-ji-la-ta wa-ya-ẓa-roo-na wa-raaa-ʹa-hum Yaw-mañ- s̤a-q̣ee-laa.

76:28.text: Naḥ-nu kha-laq̣-naa-hum wa-sha-dad-naaa ʹas-ra-hum; wa-ʹi-ẓaa shiʹ-naa bad-dal-naaa ʹam-s̤aa-la-hum tab-dee-laa.

76:29.text: ʹin-na haa-ẓi-hee taẓ-ki-rah: fa-mañ- shaaa-ʹat- ta-kha-ẓa ʹi-laa Rab-bi-hee sa-bee-laa.

76:30.text: Wa-maa ta-shaaa-ʹoo-na ʹil-laaa ʹañy- ya-shaaa-ʹal- laah; ʹin-nal- laa-ha kaa-na ʻA-lee-man Ḥa-kee-maa.

76:31.text: Yud-khi-lu mañy- ya-shaaa-ʹu fee Raḥ-ma-tih; waz̤̣-z̤̣aa-li-mee-na ʹa-ʻad-da la-hum ʻA-ẓaa-ban ʹa-lee-maa.

77:27.text: Wa-ja-ʻal-naa fee-haa ra-waa-si-ya shaa-mi-khaa-tiñw- waʹas-q̣ay-naa-kum- maaa-ʹañ- fu-raa-taa?

77:29.text: ʹIñ-ṭa-li-q̣ooo ʹi-laa maa- kuñ-tum̃- bi-hee tu-kaẓ-ẓi-boon:

77:30.text: ʹIñ-ṭa-li-q̣ooo ʹi-laa z̤̣il-liñ- ẓee s̤a-laa-s̤i shu-ʻab.

77:31.text: laa-Laa z̤̣a-lee-liñw- wa yug̣-nee mi-nal- la-hab.

77:43.text: Ku-loo wash-ra-boo ha-neee-ʹam- bi-maa kuñ-tum taʻ-ma-loon.

77:48.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa q̣ee-la la-hu-mur- ka-ʻoo laa- yar-ka-ʻoon.

78:18.text: Yaw-ma yuñ-fa-khu fiṣ- Ṣoo-ri fa-taʹ-too-na ʹaf-waa-jaa;

78:24.text: Laa- ya-ẓoo-q̣oo-na fee-haa bar-dañw- wa-laa- sha-raa-baa,

78:35.text: Laa- yas-ma-ʻoo-na fee-haa lag̣-wañw- wa-laa- kiẓ-ẓaa-baa;

78:37.text: Rab-bis- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹar-ḍi wa-maa bay-na-hu-mar- Raḥ-maa-ni laa- yam-li-koo-na min-hu khi-ṭaa-baa.

78:38.text: Yaw-ma ya-q̣oo-mur- Roo-ḥu wal-ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tu ṣaf-faa, laa- ya-ta-kal-la-moo-na ʹil-laa man ʹa-ẓi-na la-hur- Raḥ-maa-nu wa-q̣aa-la ṣa-waa-baa.

78:39.text: Ẓaa-li-kal- Yaw-mul- Ḥaq̣q̣: fa-mañ- shaaa-ʹat- ta-kha-ẓa ʹi-laa Rab-bi-hee ma-ʹaa-baa!

78:40.text: ʹIn-naaa ʹañ-ẓar-naa-kum ʻA-ẓaa-bañ- q̣a-ree-baa,― Yaw-ma yañ-z̤̣u-rul- mar-ʹu maa- q̣ad-da-mat ya-daa-hu wa-ya-q̣oo-lul- kaa-fi-ru yaa-lay-ta-nee kuñ-tu tu-raa-baa!

79:16.text: ʹIẓ naa-daa-hu Rab-bu-hoo bil-waa-dil- mu-q̣ad-da-si Ṭu-waa:

79:18.text: Fa-q̣ul hal- la-ka ʹi-laaa ʹañ- ta-zak-kaa?―

79:26.text: ʹIn-na fee ẓaa-li-ka la-ʻib-ra-tal- li-mañy- yakh-shaa.

79:27.text: ʹA-ʹañ-tum ʹa-shad-du khal-q̣an ʹa-mis- sa-maaaʹ? Ba-naa-haa:

79:40.text: Wa-ʹam-maa man khaa-fa Ma-q̣aa-ma Rab-bi-hee wa-na-han- naf-sa ʻa-nil- ha-waa,

79:46.text: Ka-ʹan-na-hum Yaw-ma ya-raw-na-haa lam yal-ba-s̤ooo ʹil-laa ʻa-shiy-ya-tan ʹaw ḍu-ḥaa-haa!

80:37.text: Li-kul- lim-ri-ʹim- min-hum Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓiñ- shaʹ-nuñy- yug̣-neeh.

81:20.text: Ẓee- q̣uw-wa-tin ʻiñ-da Ẓil- ʻAr-shi ma-keen,

81:29.text: Wa-maa ta-shaaa-ʹoo-na ʹil-laaa ʹañy- ya-shaaa-ʹal- laa-hu Rab-bul- ʻAa-la-meen.

82:6.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- ʹiñ-saa-nu maa- g̣ar-ra-ka bi-Rab-bi-kal- Ka-reem?―

82:8.text: Feee ʹay-yi- Ṣoo-ra-tim- maa shaaa-ʹa rak-ka-bak.

82:18.text: S̤um-ma maaa ʹad-raa-ka maa- Yaw-mud- Deen?

82:19.text: Yaw-ma laa- tam-li-ku naf-sul- li-naf-siñ- shay-ʹaa: wal-ʹAm-ru Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓil- lil-laah.

83:2.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee-na ʹi-ẓak- taa-loo ʻa-lan- naa-si yas-taw-foon,

83:7.text: Kal-laaa ʹin-na Ki-taa-bal- fuj-jaa-ri la-fee Sij-jeen.

83:12.text: Wa-maa yu-kaẓ-ẓi-bu bi-heee ʹil-laa kul-lu muʻ-ta-din ʹa-s̤eem!

83:13.text: ʹI-ẓaa tut-laa ʻa-lay-hi ʹAa-yaa-tu-naa q̣aa-la ʹA-saa-ṭee-rul- ʹAw-wa-leen!

83:14.text: Kal-laa bal; raa-na ʻa-laa q̣u-loo-bi-him- maa kaa-noo yak-si-boon!

83:15.text: Kal-laaa ʹin-na-hum ʻar- Rab-bi-him Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓil- la-maḥ-joo-boon.

83:17.text: S̤um-ma yu-q̣aa-lu haa-ẓal- la-ẓee kuñ-tum̃- bi-hee tu-kaẓ-ẓi-boon!

83:18.text: Kal-laaa ʹin-na Ki-taa-bal- ʹAb-raa-ri la-fee ʻIl-liy-yeen.

83:26.text: Khi-taa-mu-hoo misk: wa-fee ẓaa-li-ka fal-ya-ta-naa-fa-sil- mu-ta-naa-fi-soon:

83:29.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaj-ra-moo kaa-noo mi-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo yaḍ-ḥa-koon,

83:31.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓañ- q̣a-la-booo ʹi-laaa ʹah-li-hi-muñ- q̣a-la-boo fa-ki-heen;

83:32.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa ra-ʹaw-hum q̣aa-looo ʹin-na haaa-ʹu-laaa-ʹi la-ḍaaal-loon!

83:34.text: Fal-Yaw-mal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo mi-nal- kuf-faa-ri yuḍ-ḥa-koon:

83:36.text: Hal- s̤uw-wi-bal- kuf-faa-ru maa- kaa-noo yaf-ʻa-loon?

84:6.text: Yaaa-ʹay-yu-hal- ʹiñ-saa-nu ʹin-na-ka kaa-di-ḥun ʹi-laa Rab-bi-ka kad-ḥañ- fa-mu-laa-q̣eeh.

84:10.text: Wa-ʹam-maa man ʹoo-ti-ya Ki-taa-ba-hoo wa-raaa-ʹa z̤̣ah-rih,

84:15.text: Ba-laaa ʹin-na Rab-ba-hoo kaa-na bi-hee Ba-ṣee-raa!

84:21.text: Wa-ʹi-ẓaa q̣u-ri-ʹa ʻa-lay-hi-mul- Q̣ur-ʹaa-nu laa- yas-ju-doon?

84:25.text: ʹIl-lal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti la-hum ʹAj-run g̣ay-ru mam-noon.

85:7.text: Wa-hum ʻa-laa maa- yaf-ʻa-loo-na bil-muʹ-mi-nee-na shu-hood.

85:8.text: Wa-maa na-q̣a-moo min-hum ʹil-laaa ʹañy- yuʹ-mi-noo bil-laa-hil- ʻA-zee-zil- Ḥa-meed,―

85:9.text: ʹAl-la-ẓee la-hoo mul-kus- sa-maa-waa-ti wal-ʹarḍ: Wal-laa-hu ʻa-laa kul-li shay-ʹiñ- Sha-heed.

85:10.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na fa-ta-nul- Muʹ-mi-nee-na wal-muʹ-mi-naa-ti s̤um-ma lam ya-too-boo fa-la-hum ʻa-ẓaa-bu Ja-han-na-ma wa-la-hum ʻA-ẓaa-bul- ḥa-reeq̣.

85:11.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti la-hum Jan-naa-tuñ- taj-ree miñ- taḥ-ti-hal- ʹan-haar: ẓaa-li-kal- Faw-zul- ka-beer.

86:4.text: ʹIñ- kul-lu naf-sil- lam-maa ʻa-lay-haa ḥa-fiz̤̣.

86:10.text: Fa-maa la-hoo miñ- q̣uw-tiñw-wa wa-laa- naa-ṣir.

87:7.text: ʹIl-laa maa- shaaa-ʹal- laah: ʹin-na-Hoo yaʻ-la-mul- jah-ra wa-maa yakh-faa.

87:13.text: S̤um-ma laa- ya-moo-tu fee-haa wa-laa yaḥ-yaa.

88:6.text: Lay-sa la-hum ṭa-ʻaa-mun ʹil-laa miñ- Ḍa-reeʻ

88:7.text: Laa- yus-mi-nu wa-laa yug̣-nee miñ- jooʻ.

88:17.text: ʹA-fa-laa yañ-z̤̣u-roo-na ʹi-lal- ʹi-bi-li kay-fa khu-li-q̣at?―

89:5.text: Hal fee ẓaa-li-ka q̣a-sa-mul- li-ẓee ḥijr?

89:6.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra kay-fa fa-ʻa-la Rab-bu-ka bi-ʻAad,―

89:8.text: ʹAl-la-tee lam yukh-laq̣ mis̤-lu-haa fil- bi-laad?

89:15.text: Fa-ʹam-mal- ʹiñ-saa-nu ʹi-ẓaa mab- ta-laa-hu Rab-bu-hoo fa-ʹak-ra-ma-hoo wa-naʻ-ʻa-mah, fa-ya-q̣oo-lu Rab-beee ʹak-ra-man.

89:16.text: Wa-ʹam-maaa ʹi-ẓaa mab- ta-laa-hu fa-q̣a-da-ra ʻa-lay-hi riz-q̣ah, fa-ya-q̣oo-lu Rab-beee ʹa-haa-nan.

89:21.text: Kal-laaa ʹi-ẓaa duk-ka-til- ʹar-ḍu dak-kañ dak-kaa,

89:23.text: Wa-jeee-ʹa Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓim- bi-Ja-han-nam,- Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓiñy- ya-ta-ẓak-ka-rul- ʹiñ-saa-nu wa-ʹan-naa la-huẓ- ẓik-raa?

90:5.text: ʹA-yaḥ-sa-bu ʹal- lañy- yaq̣-di-ra ʻa-lay-hi ʹa-ḥad?

90:14.text: ʹAw ʹiṭ-ʻaa-muñ- fee yaw-miñ- ẓee mas-g̣a-bah,

90:17.text: S̤um-ma kaa-na mi-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ta-waa-ṣaw biṣ-ṣab-ri wa-ta-waa-ṣaw bil-Mar-ḥa-mah.

90:19.text: Wal-la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo bi-ʹAa-yaa-ti-naa hum ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bul- mash-ʹa-mah.

91:13.text: Fa-q̣aa-la la-hum Ra-soo-lul- laa-hi Naa-q̣a-tal- laa-hi wa-suq̣-yaa-haa!

91:14.text: Fa-kaẓ-ẓa-boo-hu fa-ʻa-q̣a-roo-haa. Fa-dam-da-ma ʻa-lay-him Rab-bu-hum̃- bi-ẓam-bi-him fa-saw-waa-haa!

92:11.text: Wa-maa yug̣-nee ʻan-hu maa-lu-hooo ʹi-ẓaa ta-rad-daa.

92:19.text: Wa-maa li-ʹa-ḥa-din ʻiñ-da-hoo min- niʻ-ma-tiñ- tuj-zaa,

95:4.text: La-q̣ad kha-laq̣-nal- ʹiñ-saa-na feee ʹaḥ-sa-ni taq̣-weem,

95:6.text: ʹIl-lal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti fa-la-hum ʹaj-run g̣ay-ru mam-noon.

96:15.text: Kal-laa la-ʹil- lam yañ-ta-hi la-nas-fa-ʻam- bin-naa-ṣi-yah,―

97:3.text: Lay-la-tul- Q̣ad-ri khay-rum- min ʹal-fi Shahr.

97:4.text: Ta-naz-za-lul- ma-laaa-ʹi-ka-tu war-Roo-ḥu fee-haa bi-ʹiẓ-ni Rab-bi-him- miñ- kul-li ʹamr:

98:1.text: Lam ya-ku-nil- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo min ʹAh-lil- Ki-taa-bi wal-Mush-ri-kee-na muñ-fak-kee-na ḥat-taa taʹ-ti-ya-hu-mul- Bay-yi-nah,

98:2.text: Ra-soo-lum- mi-nal- laa-hi yat-loo ṣu-ḥu-fam- mu-ṭah-ha-rah,

98:4.text: Wa-maa ta-far-ra-q̣al- la-ẓee-na ʹoo-tul- Ki-taa-ba ʹil-laa mim- baʻ-di maa- jaaa-ʹat-hu-mul- Bay-yi-nah.

98:5.text: Wa-maaa ʹu-mi-rooo ʹil-laa li-yaʻ-bu-dul- laa-ha mukh-li-ṣee-na la-hud- Deen: ḥu-na-faaa-ʹa wa-yu-q̣ee-muṣ- Ṣa-laa-ta wa-yuʹ-tuz- Za-kaa-ta wa-ẓaa-li-ka Dee-nul- Q̣ay-yi-mah.

98:6.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ka-fa-roo min ʹAh-lil- Ki-taa-bi wal-Mush-ri-kee-na fee naa-ri Ja-han-na-ma khaa-li-dee-na fee-haa. ʹU-laaa-ʹi-ka hum shar-rul- ba-riy-yah.

98:7.text: ʹIn-nal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti ʹu-laaa-ʹi-ka hum khay-rul- ba-riy-yah.

98:8.text: Ja-zaaa-ʹu-hum ʻiñ-da Rab-bi-him Jan-naa-tu ʻad-niñ- taj-ree miñ- taḥ-ti-hal- ʹan-haa-ru khaa-li-dee-na fee-haaa ʹa-ba-daa: ra-ḍi-yal- laa-hu ʻan-hum wa-ra-ḍoo ʻanh: ẓaa-li-ka li-man kha-shi-ya Rab-bah.

99:6.text: Yaw-ma-ʹi-ẓiñy- yaṣ-du-run- naa-su ʹash-taa-tal- li-yu-raw ʹaʻ-maa-la-hum.

99:7.text: Fa-mañy- yaʻ-mal mis̤-q̣aa-la ẓar-ra-tin khay-rañy- ya-rah.

99:8.text: Wa-mañy- yaʻ-mal mis̤-q̣aa-la ẓar-ra-tiñ- shar-rañy- ya-rah.

100:9.text: ʹA-fa-laa yaʻ-la-mu ʹi-ẓaa buʻ-s̤i-ra maa- fil- q̣u-boor,

103:3.text: ʹIl-lal- la-ẓee-na ʹaa-ma-noo wa-ʻa-mi-luṣ- ṣaa-li-ḥaa-ti wa-ta-waa-ṣaw bil-Ḥaq̣-q̣i wa-ta-waa-ṣaw biṣ-Ṣabr.

105:1.text: ʹA-lam ta-ra kay-fa fa-ʻa-la Rab-bu-ka bi-ʹAṣ-ḥaa-bil- FEEL?

106:4.text: ʹAl-la-ẓeee ʹaṭ-ʻa-ma-hum- miñ- joo-ʻiñw- wa-ʹaa-ma-na-hum- min khawf.

110:2.text: Wa-ra-ʹay-tan- naa-sa yad-khu-loo-na fee Dee-nil- laa-hi ʹaf-waa-jaa,

110:3.text: Fa-sab-biḥ bi-Ḥam-di Rab-bi-ka was-tag̣-firh. ʹIn-na-Hoo kaa-na Taw-waa-baa.

111:2.text: Maaa ʹag̣-naa ʻan-hu maa-lu-hoo wa-maa ka-sab.
